Our method has the potential to combine the advantages of mixed-effects modeling with machine learning for biomedical applications of EEG, such as multicenter clinical trials.

</details>


### [41] [Conformal Prediction in Dynamic Biological Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.02644)
*Alberto Portela,Julio R. Banga,Marcos Matabuena*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出将共形推断方法用于系统生物学动态模型的不确定性量化，作为传统贝叶斯方法的替代方案，并展示其在非渐近保证、鲁棒性和可扩展性方面的优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 系统生物学中动态模型的不确定性量化面临非线性、参数敏感性、样本量有限、贝叶斯方法需要强先验且计算速度慢等挑战，亟需更鲁棒和可扩展的替代方案。

Method: 提出两种基于共形推断的新算法，用于确定性非线性常微分方程表示的动态模型的不确定性量化，在某些情况下提供非渐近保证。

Result: 通过多个场景展示了所提算法相比传统贝叶斯方法的优势，在多种生物数据结构和场景下均表现出有效性。

Conclusion: 共形推断方法为系统生物学动态模型提供了一种通用、鲁棒且可扩展的不确定性量化框架，有望克服贝叶斯方法在生物系统中的应用限制。

Abstract: Uncertainty quantification (UQ) is the process of systematically determining and characterizing the degree of confidence in computational model predictions. In the context of systems biology, especially with dynamic models, UQ is crucial because it addresses the challenges posed by nonlinearity and parameter sensitivity, allowing us to properly understand and extrapolate the behavior of complex biological systems. Here, we focus on dynamic models represented by deterministic nonlinear ordinary differential equations. Many current UQ approaches in this field rely on Bayesian statistical methods. While powerful, these methods often require strong prior specifications and make parametric assumptions that may not always hold in biological systems. Additionally, these methods face challenges in domains where sample sizes are limited, and statistical inference becomes constrained, with computational speed being a bottleneck in large models of biological systems. As an alternative, we propose the use of conformal inference methods, introducing two novel algorithms that, in some instances, offer non-asymptotic guarantees, enhancing robustness and scalability across various applications. We demonstrate the efficacy of our proposed algorithms through several scenarios, highlighting their advantages over traditional Bayesian approaches. The proposed methods show promising results for diverse biological data structures and scenarios, offering a general framework to quantify uncertainty for dynamic models of biological systems.The software for the methodology and the reproduction of the results is available at https://zenodo.org/doi/10.5281/zenodo.13644870.

</details>


### [42] [Meta-Posterior Consistency for the Bayesian Inference of Metastable System](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.01868)
*Zachary P Adams,Sayan Mukherjee*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出"元一致性"概念，用于描述在有限时间尺度上收敛但长期发散的非稳态（亚稳定）动力系统的贝叶斯推断性质，并探讨了其与谱性质的关系及在子系统推断中的应用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有文献主要关注稳定或遍历系统的推断一致性，但真实世界系统多为亚稳定系统（短期内看似稳定，长期不稳定）。传统一致性理论不适用，需要新的理论框架来刻画这类系统在有限时间观测下的推断行为及其局限性。

Method: 在贝叶斯框架下定义并量化"元一致性"概念，分析均匀遍历与非遍历扩散过程的谱性质与元一致性之间的关系，讨论如何利用元一致性高效推断大系统中子系统的模型。

Result: 建立了亚稳定系统下贝叶斯推断元一致性的理论框架，揭示了元一致性与动力系统谱性质的关联，展示了元一致性在子系统推断中的实用性。

Conclusion: 对于亚稳定动力系统，传统的一致性无法保证，但元一致性提供了合理的替代准则；通过谱性质可分析元一致性，且该概念有助于在全局推断困难时高效完成局部（子系统）推断。

Abstract: The vast majority of the literature on learning dynamical systems or stochastic processes from time series has focused on stable or ergodic systems, for both Bayesian and frequentist inference procedures. However, most real-world systems are only metastable, that is, the dynamics appear to be stable on some time scale, but are in fact unstable over longer time scales. Consistency of inference for metastable systems may not be possible, but one can ask about metaconsistency: Do inference procedures converge when observations are taken over a large but finite time interval, but diverge on longer time scales? In this paper we introduce, discuss, and quantify metaconsistency in a Bayesian framework. We discuss how metaconsistency can be exploited to efficiently infer a model for a sub-system of a larger system, where inference on the global behavior may require much more data, or there is no theoretical guarantee as to the asymptotic success of inference procedures. We also discuss the relation between metaconsistency and the spectral properties of the model dynamical system in the case of uniformly ergodic and non-ergodic diffusions.

</details>


### [43] [Machine Learning for Complex Systems with Abnormal Pattern by Exception Maximization Outlier Detection Method](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.04248)
*Zhikun Zhang,Yiting Duan,Xiangjun Wang,Mingyuan Zhang*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出了一种名为异常最大化异常检测方法(EMODM)的新型快速在线异常检测方法，基于两状态高斯混合模型，无需先验分布信息即可实时检测复杂系统输出的异常模式，在合成数据、三相逆变器短路检测以及美国2020-2024年疫情相关失业数据异常检测中验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有异常检测方法通常依赖先验分布信息或无法高效处理实时原始数据，亟需一种无需特殊先验知识、能够在线上快速检测复杂系统异常模式的方法。

Method: 提出异常最大化异常检测方法(EMODM)，基于两状态高斯混合模型，采用概率模型和统计算法，直接在实时原始数据上进行概率异常检测，无需特殊先验分布信息。

Result: 在合成数据两个数值案例中验证了性能；在真实数据中成功检测到三相逆变器电路系统的短路模式，并在美国53个地区2000-2024年 insured 失业数据中发现了COVID-19疫情导致的异常周期。

Conclusion: EMODM在两个真实数据集上的应用证明了该算法的有效性和准确性，表明其能够在不依赖先验分布信息的情况下，有效检测复杂系统的实时异常模式。

Abstract: This paper proposes a novel fast online methodology for outlier detection called the exception maximization outlier detection method(EMODM), which employs probabilistic models and statistical algorithms to detect abnormal patterns from the outputs of complex systems. The EMODM is based on a two-state Gaussian mixture model and demonstrates strong performance in probability anomaly detection working on real-time raw data rather than using special prior distribution information. We confirm this using the synthetic data from two numerical cases. For the real-world data, we have detected the short circuit pattern of the circuit system using EMODM by the current and voltage output of a three-phase inverter. The EMODM also found an abnormal period due to COVID-19 in the insured unemployment data of 53 regions in the United States from 2000 to 2024. The application of EMODM to these two real-life datasets demonstrated the effectiveness and accuracy of our algorithm.

</details>


### [44] [Introduction to Machine Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.02668)
*Laurent Younes*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本书系统介绍了机器学习算法的数学基础，涵盖微积分、线性代数、概率论、矩阵分析、优化理论、再生核理论、希尔伯特空间技术，以及监督学习（线性模型、SVM、决策树、Boosting、神经网络）、生成方法（采样、马尔可夫链、图模型、变分方法、深度生成模型）、无监督学习（聚类、因子分析、流形学习）和理论章节（集中不等式、泛化界）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为机器学习的各种算法提供统一的数学理论基础，帮助读者建立从数学原理到算法实现的完整知识体系，从而能够深入理解和分析机器学习算法。

Method: 全书采用由基础到进阶的结构：先回顾微积分、线性代数、概率论及测度论基础，再介绍矩阵分析和优化理论（含随机梯度下降、近端方法等），随后分别讲解监督学习、生成方法、无监督学习三大类算法，最后以集中不等式和泛化界的理论章节收尾。

Result: 提供了一整套涵盖机器学习核心算法（线性模型、SVM、决策树、Boosting、神经网络、采样方法、马尔可夫链、图模型、变分方法、深度生成模型、聚类、因子分析、流形学习）及其数学支撑（优化理论、再生核理论、希尔伯特空间、集中不等式、泛化界）的完整论述。

Conclusion: 这是一本以数学基础为导向的机器学习综合性教材，旨在通过严谨的数学推导和系统的算法分类，使读者掌握机器学习背后的数学原理，为理论研究和实际应用提供坚实的理论支撑。

Abstract: This book introduces the mathematical foundations and techniques that lead to the development and analysis of many of the algorithms that are used in machine learning. It starts with an introductory chapter that describes notation used throughout the book and serve at a reminder of basic concepts in calculus, linear algebra and probability and also introduces some measure theoretic terminology, which can be used as a reading guide for the sections that use these tools. The introductory chapters also provide background material on matrix analysis and optimization. The latter chapter provides theoretical support to many algorithms that are used in the book, including stochastic gradient descent, proximal methods, etc. After discussing basic concepts for statistical prediction, the book includes an introduction to reproducing kernel theory and Hilbert space techniques, which are used in many places, before addressing the description of various algorithms for supervised statistical learning, including linear methods, support vector machines, decision trees, boosting, or neural networks. The subject then switches to generative methods, starting with a chapter that presents sampling methods and an introduction to the theory of Markov chains. The following chapter describe the theory of graphical models, an introduction to variational methods for models with latent variables, and to deep-learning based generative models. The next chapters focus on unsupervised learning methods, for clustering, factor analysis and manifold learning. The final chapter of the book is theory-oriented and discusses concentration inequalities and generalization bounds.

</details>


### [45] [DNA-SE: Towards Deep Neural-Nets Assisted Semiparametric Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.02045)
*Qinshuo Liu,Zixin Wang,Xi-An Li,Xinyao Ji,Lei Zhang,Lin Liu,Zhonghua Liu*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出DNA-SE框架，利用深度神经网络求解半参数统计中的Fredholm第二类积分方程，将估计问题转化为双层优化，在保持统计最优性的同时提升计算可扩展性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统半参数方法在求解多维Fredholm积分方程时面临计算瓶颈：数值方法（多项式/样条逼近）难以扩展至高维，而闭式近似方法虽计算高效但统计次优甚至不正确。亟需一种兼顾统计最优性与计算可扩展性的方法。

Method: 将半参数估计问题重构为双层优化问题，利用深度神经网络的通用逼近性质作为积分方程的数值求解器，提出DNA-SE（Deep Neural-Nets Assisted Semiparametric Estimation）算法。

Result: 通过大量数值实验和真实数据分析，证明DNA-SE在数值精度和统计效率上均优于传统方法。

Conclusion: 首次将深度神经网络引入半参数统计领域作为积分方程的通用数值求解器，为高维半参数估计提供了一种既统计最优又可扩展的新框架。

Abstract: Semiparametric statistics play a pivotal role in a wide range of domains, including but not limited to missing data, causal inference, and transfer learning, to name a few. In many settings, semiparametric theory leads to (nearly) statistically optimal procedures that yet involve numerically solving Fredholm integral equations of the second kind. Traditional numerical methods, such as polynomial or spline approximations, are difficult to scale to multi-dimensional problems. Alternatively, statisticians may choose to approximate the original integral equations by ones with closed-form solutions, resulting in computationally more efficient, but statistically suboptimal or even incorrect procedures. To bridge this gap, we propose a novel framework by formulating the semiparametric estimation problem as a bi-level optimization problem; and then we develop a scalable algorithm called Deep Neural-Nets Assisted Semiparametric Estimation (DNA-SE) by leveraging the universal approximation property of Deep Neural-Nets (DNN) to streamline semiparametric procedures. Through extensive numerical experiments and a real data analysis, we demonstrate the numerical and statistical advantages of $\dnase$ over traditional methods. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first to bring DNN into semiparametric statistics as a numerical solver of integral equations in our proposed general framework.

</details>


### [46] [Linear causal disentanglement via higher-order cumulants](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.04605)
*Paula Leyes Carreno,Chiara Meroni,Anna Seigal*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文研究线性因果解缠的识别性问题，证明在完美干预下每个潜变量一次干预足以（最坏情况下必要）恢复参数，允许潜变量多于观测变量；对软干预则刻画了等价类。结果依赖于非高斯性假设。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 线性因果解缠是因果表征学习中的新方法，用于通过具有因果依赖关系的潜变量解释观测变量。现有工作在完美干预下已有识别性结果，但限制潜变量数不超过观测变量。本文旨在放宽这一限制，研究更一般情形下的参数可识别性。

Method: 通过耦合张量分解给出完美干预下的构造性证明；对软干预，通过研究多项式方程组系统刻画潜图与参数的等价类。

Result: 完美干预下，每个潜变量一次干预足以（最坏情况下必要）恢复参数，且允许潜变量多于观测变量；软干预下给出了等价类的完整刻画。

Conclusion: 线性因果解缠在完美干预下具有更广泛的识别性，为高维潜变量场景提供了理论基础；软干预下的等价类分析为实际应用中的不确定性量化提供了依据。

Abstract: Linear causal disentanglement is a recent method in causal representation learning to describe a collection of observed variables via latent variables with causal dependencies between them. It can be viewed as a generalization of both independent component analysis and linear structural equation models. We study the identifiability of linear causal disentanglement, assuming access to data under multiple contexts, each given by an intervention on a latent variable. We show that one perfect intervention on each latent variable is sufficient and in the worst case necessary to recover parameters under perfect interventions, generalizing previous work to allow more latent than observed variables. We give a constructive proof that computes parameters via a coupled tensor decomposition. For soft interventions, we find the equivalence class of latent graphs and parameters that are consistent with observed data, via the study of a system of polynomial equations. Our results hold assuming the existence of non-zero higher-order cumulants, which implies non-Gaussianity of variables.

</details>


### [47] [Regularized Multi-output Gaussian Convolution Process with Domain Adaptation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.02778)
*Wang Xinming,Wang Chao,Song Xuan,Kirby Levi,Wu Jianguo*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结合域自适应的正则化多输出高斯过程（MGP）建模框架，通过稀疏协方差矩阵和卷积过程解决负迁移问题，通过边缘化不一致特征和扩展缺失特征对齐输入域，从而同时克服MGP在迁移学习中的负迁移和输入域不一致两大挑战，并在仿真和陶瓷制造案例中取得优于现有方法的效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 虽然MGP作为迁移学习方法极具灵活性和泛化能力，但存在两个关键挑战尚未解决：一是输出间无共享信息时导致的负迁移问题，二是输入域不一致问题（在迁移学习中常见但在MGP中未被探索）。

Method: 提出正则化MGP建模框架：1）采用卷积过程构建稀疏协方差矩阵，并添加惩罚项自适应选择最具信息量的输出进行知识迁移；2）提出域自适应方法，通过边缘化不一致特征和扩展缺失特征来对齐不同输出间的输入域。

Result: 在综合仿真研究和陶瓷制造过程实际案例中，所提框架均优于当前最先进基准方法，有效处理了负迁移和域不一致问题。

Conclusion: 本文同时解决了MGP在迁移学习中的负迁移和输入域不一致两大挑战，提供了统计性质的理论保证，并通过实验验证了方法的有效性。

Abstract: Multi-output Gaussian process (MGP) has been attracting increasing attention as a transfer learning method to model multiple outputs. Despite its high flexibility and generality, MGP still faces two critical challenges when applied to transfer learning. The first one is negative transfer, which occurs when there exists no shared information among the outputs. The second challenge is the input domain inconsistency, which is commonly studied in transfer learning yet not explored in MGP. In this paper, we propose a regularized MGP modeling framework with domain adaptation to overcome these challenges. More specifically, a sparse covariance matrix of MGP is proposed by using convolution process, where penalization terms are added to adaptively select the most informative outputs for knowledge transfer. To deal with the domain inconsistency, a domain adaptation method is proposed by marginalizing inconsistent features and expanding missing features to align the input domains among different outputs. Statistical properties of the proposed method are provided to guarantee the performance practically and asymptotically. The proposed framework outperforms state-of-the-art benchmarks in comprehensive simulation studies and one real case study of a ceramic manufacturing process. The results demonstrate the effectiveness of our method in dealing with both the negative transfer and the domain inconsistency.

</details>


### [48] [Quantile Regression using Random Forest Proximities](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.02355)
*Mingshu Li,Bhaskarjit Sarmah,Dhruv Desai,Joshua Rosaler,Snigdha Bhagat,Philip Sommer,Dhagash Mehta*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于随机森林邻近度（proximity）计算分位数回归的新方法（QRF-Prox），用于金融市场的波动性预测（如公司债券日均交易量）。该方法通过单一模型估计目标变量的完整条件分布，相比传统分位数回归森林（QRF）在预测区间精度和计算效率上均表现更优。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 金融市场的动态特性使得精确预测困难，且投资者不仅需要点预测，更需要量化不确定性（尤其是偶然不确定性）以理解不同风险水平。现有分位数回归方法大多需要为每个分位数单独建模，效率低下；而原始QRF虽能单模型估计条件分布，但仍存在改进空间。

Method: 提出一种从随机森林中计算分位数回归的新框架，利用随机森林学习到的邻近度（proximity，即距离度量）来推断目标变量的条件分布。该方法保持随机森林的所有特征，但用邻近度替代原始QRF中的经验分布估计方式。

Result: 在公开数据集和公司债券日均交易量预测任务上，基于随机森林邻近度的分位数回归在近似条件目标分布和预测区间方面优于原始QRF，且计算效率显著高于传统分位数回归方法。

Conclusion: 提出的QRF-Prox框架在预测精度和计算效率上均优于原始QRF，为金融市场的波动预测与风险量化提供了更有效的工具。

Abstract: Due to the dynamic nature of financial markets, maintaining models that produce precise predictions over time is difficult. Often the goal isn't just point prediction but determining uncertainty. Quantifying uncertainty, especially the aleatoric uncertainty due to the unpredictable nature of market drivers, helps investors understand varying risk levels. Recently, quantile regression forests (QRF) have emerged as a promising solution: Unlike most basic quantile regression methods that need separate models for each quantile, quantile regression forests estimate the entire conditional distribution of the target variable with a single model, while retaining all the salient features of a typical random forest. We introduce a novel approach to compute quantile regressions from random forests that leverages the proximity (i.e., distance metric) learned by the model and infers the conditional distribution of the target variable. We evaluate the proposed methodology using publicly available datasets and then apply it towards the problem of forecasting the average daily volume of corporate bonds. We show that using quantile regression using Random Forest proximities demonstrates superior performance in approximating conditional target distributions and prediction intervals to the original version of QRF. We also demonstrate that the proposed framework is significantly more computationally efficient than traditional approaches to quantile regressions.

</details>


### [49] [Agnostic Private Density Estimation for GMMs via List Global Stability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.04783)
*Mohammad Afzali,Hassan Ashtiani,Christopher Liaw*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文研究了在不可知（agnostic）设置下，针对无限制高维高斯混合模型（GMMs）的私有密度估计问题，首次证明了该问题的样本复杂度上界，并利用列表全局稳定性（list global stability）的不可知变体实现了这一结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在隐私保护机器学习中，高维GMMs的私有密度估计此前仅在可实现（realizable）设置下有已知的样本复杂度上界[Afzali et al., 2024]。本文旨在填补不可知（agnostic）设置下的空白，即当真实分布不一定完全符合GMM假设时的更现实场景。

Method: 1) 利用列表全局稳定性（list global stability）概念，该概念最初用于私有监督学习[Ghazi et al., 2021b,a]；2) 定义了该概念的不可知变体（agnostic variant），证明其存在性足以保证不可知私有密度估计；3) 为GMMs构造了一个不可知列表全局稳定的学习器（agnostic list globally stable learner）。

Result: 首次证明了不可知设置下无限制高维GMMs私有密度估计的样本复杂度上界。

Conclusion: 本文通过引入不可知列表全局稳定性，成功将私有密度估计从可实现场景推广到更一般的不可知场景，为高维混合模型的差分隐私学习提供了新的理论工具和边界。

Abstract: We consider the problem of private density estimation for mixtures of unrestricted high dimensional Gaussians in the agnostic setting. We prove the first upper bound on the sample complexity of this problem. Previously, private learnability of high dimensional GMMs was only known in the realizable setting [Afzali et al., 2024].
  To prove our result, we exploit the notion of $\textit{list global stability}$ [Ghazi et al., 2021b,a] that was originally introduced in the context of private supervised learning. We define an agnostic variant of this definition, showing that its existence is sufficient for agnostic private density estimation. We then construct an agnostic list globally stable learner for GMMs.

</details>


### [50] [Non-stationary and Sparsely-correlated Multi-output Gaussian Process with Spike-and-Slab Prior](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.03149)
*Wang Xinming,Li Yongxiang,Yue Xiaowei,Wu Jianguo*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种非平稳多输出高斯过程模型，通过时变核函数的卷积构建协方差函数，并引入动态spike-and-slab先验来自动识别相关信息源，有效捕捉输出间的动态稀疏相关性并缓解负迁移，适用于高维时间序列数据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统多输出高斯过程（MGP）在处理具有动态特征的多变量时间序列数据时灵活性不足，且当部分输出缺乏相关性时，信息迁移会导致负迁移问题。

Method: 利用时变核函数的卷积构造MGP的协方差函数，在相关性参数上施加动态spike-and-slab先验以自动选择对目标输出有信息量的源，并通过EM算法进行高效模型拟合。

Result: 数值实验和真实案例表明，该模型能有效捕捉动态和稀疏的相关结构，缓解高维时间序列数据的负迁移问题；登山车强化学习案例验证了其在决策问题中的应用潜力。

Conclusion: 提出的非平稳MGP模型为处理具有动态稀疏相关结构的高维时间序列数据提供了有效工具，并能缓解负迁移，适用于后续决策任务。

Abstract: Multi-output Gaussian process (MGP) is commonly used as a transfer learning method to leverage information among multiple outputs. A key advantage of MGP is providing uncertainty quantification for prediction, which is highly important for subsequent decision-making tasks. However, traditional MGP may not be sufficiently flexible to handle multivariate data with dynamic characteristics, particularly when dealing with complex temporal correlations. Additionally, since some outputs may lack correlation, transferring information among them may lead to negative transfer. To address these issues, this study proposes a non-stationary MGP model that can capture both the dynamic and sparse correlation among outputs. Specifically, the covariance functions of MGP are constructed using convolutions of time-varying kernel functions. Then a dynamic spike-and-slab prior is placed on correlation parameters to automatically decide which sources are informative to the target output in the training process. An expectation-maximization (EM) algorithm is proposed for efficient model fitting. Both numerical studies and a real case demonstrate its efficacy in capturing dynamic and sparse correlation structure and mitigating negative transfer for high-dimensional time-series data. Finally, a mountain-car reinforcement learning case highlights its potential application in decision making problems.

</details>


### [51] [On Probabilistic Embeddings in Optimal Dimension Reduction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.02433)
*Ryan Murray,Adam Pickarski*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文研究广义多维缩放（MDS）降维算法的变分性质，证明标准粒子下降法可能导致非确定性嵌入，而松弛概率形式的最优解必然是确定性嵌入，并揭示该问题与最优传输理论及Gromov-Wasserstein距离的联系，最后指出标准计算实现可能学到次优且具有误导性聚类结构的嵌入。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 许多非线性降维算法虽然被广泛使用，但其理论基础尚不清晰，缺乏对其变分性质的深入理解。

Method: 将广义MDS形式化为优化问题，保留特征空间中内积或范数的分布；通过变分分析研究其性质，并与最优传输理论进行类比。

Result: 1) 标准粒子下降法可能产生非确定性嵌入；2) 松弛概率形式具有可解释的必要条件；3) 松弛问题的全局最优解必须是确定性嵌入；4) 在Gromov-Wasserstein距离相关情形下，最优嵌入具有参数化确定且不连续的结构；5) 标准计算实现学习到次优映射，产生误导性聚类。

Conclusion: 降维问题在理论上与最优传输理论密切关联，计算求解时需谨慎，标准方法可能得到具有误导性的结果。

Abstract: Dimension reduction algorithms are a crucial part of many data science pipelines, including data exploration, feature creation and selection, and denoising. Despite their wide utilization, many non-linear dimension reduction algorithms are poorly understood from a theoretical perspective. In this work we consider a generalized version of multidimensional scaling, which is posed as an optimization problem in which a mapping from a high-dimensional feature space to a lower-dimensional embedding space seeks to preserve either inner products or norms of the distribution in feature space, and which encompasses many commonly used dimension reduction algorithms. We analytically investigate the variational properties of this problem, leading to the following insights: 1) Solutions found using standard particle descent methods may lead to non-deterministic embeddings, 2) A relaxed or probabilistic formulation of the problem admits solutions with easily interpretable necessary conditions, 3) The globally optimal solutions to the relaxed problem actually must give a deterministic embedding. This progression of results mirrors the classical development of optimal transportation, and in a case relating to the Gromov-Wasserstein distance actually gives explicit insight into the structure of the optimal embeddings, which are parametrically determined and discontinuous. Finally, we illustrate that a standard computational implementation of this task does not learn deterministic embeddings, which means that it learns sub-optimal mappings, and that the embeddings learned in that context have highly misleading clustering structure, underscoring the delicate nature of solving this problem computationally.

</details>


### [52] [Training Guarantees of Neural Network Classification Two-Sample Tests by Kernel Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.04806)
*Varun Khurana,Xiuyuan Cheng,Alexander Cloninger*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文构建并分析了神经网络双样本检验，基于神经正切核（NTK）推导了检测数据集之间偏差所需的最小与最大训练时间，并扩展至实际神经网络训练动态中。证明了统计功效随样本量增加趋近于1，且零假设与备择假设下的训练时间可分离，最后通过实验验证了训练时间与网络复杂度对统计功效的影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的双样本检验方法在复杂高维数据上表现有限，神经网络方法虽有潜力但缺乏严格的理论分析，尤其是训练时间对检验性能的影响未被系统研究。

Method: 首先在NTK框架下对双样本检验进行时间分析，推导检测偏差所需的最小和最大训练时间；然后通过NTK动力学近似实际神经网络动态，将分析扩展到有限训练样本和总体训练两种场景；最后证明统计功效的渐近性质及训练时间的可分离性。

Result: 给出了NTK双样本检验的理论最小/最大训练时间边界；证明了神经网络双样本检验的统计功效随训练样本和测试样本趋于无穷而趋近于1；证明了零假设与备择假设下的检测训练时间可被分离。

Conclusion: 神经网络双样本检验在理论和实践上均有效，训练时间是影响检验性能的关键因素，网络复杂度与训练时间之间存在权衡关系。

Abstract: We construct and analyze a neural network two-sample test to determine whether two datasets came from the same distribution (null hypothesis) or not (alternative hypothesis). We perform time-analysis on a neural tangent kernel (NTK) two-sample test. In particular, we derive the theoretical minimum training time needed to ensure the NTK two-sample test detects a deviation-level between the datasets. Similarly, we derive the theoretical maximum training time before the NTK two-sample test detects a deviation-level. By approximating the neural network dynamics with the NTK dynamics, we extend this time-analysis to the realistic neural network two-sample test generated from time-varying training dynamics and finite training samples. A similar extension is done for the neural network two-sample test generated from time-varying training dynamics but trained on the population. To give statistical guarantees, we show that the statistical power associated with the neural network two-sample test goes to 1 as the neural network training samples and test evaluation samples go to infinity. Additionally, we prove that the training times needed to detect the same deviation-level in the null and alternative hypothesis scenarios are well-separated. Finally, we run some experiments showcasing a two-layer neural network two-sample test on a hard two-sample test problem and plot a heatmap of the statistical power of the two-sample test in relation to training time and network complexity.

</details>


### [53] [Semi-Supervised Sparse Gaussian Classification: Provable Benefits of Unlabeled Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.03335)
*Eyar Azar,Boaz Nadler*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文研究了高维稀疏高斯分类场景下半监督学习的理论优势，通过信息论下界和计算下界分析，识别出半监督学习在特定参数区间内能够实现分类和特征选择上的显著提升，而单独使用监督或无监督方法则无法达到相同效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 半监督学习在实践中表现优异，但理论理解尚不完善。本文旨在从理论上阐明半监督学习在何种条件下能够比纯监督或无监督方法更具优势，填补理论与实证之间的鸿沟。

Method: 针对高维稀疏高斯分类问题，分析特征选择的信息论下界和基于低度似然硬度猜想的计算下界，识别出半监督学习具有优势的参数区间，并通过仿真实验验证理论分析。

Result: 发现了半监督学习能够保证优势的参数区间：在该区间内，可以在多项式时间内构建准确的半监督分类器，而任何仅使用标记数据（监督学习）或仅使用未标记数据（无监督学习）的高效计算方法都会失败。

Conclusion: 半监督学习在高维稀疏分类中具有可证明的优势，结合标记和未标记数据在分类和特征选择方面能够超越单独使用任何一种数据的方案。

Abstract: The premise of semi-supervised learning (SSL) is that combining labeled and unlabeled data yields significantly more accurate models. Despite empirical successes, the theoretical understanding of SSL is still far from complete. In this work, we study SSL for high dimensional sparse Gaussian classification. To construct an accurate classifier a key task is feature selection, detecting the few variables that separate the two classes. % For this SSL setting, we analyze information theoretic lower bounds for accurate feature selection as well as computational lower bounds, assuming the low-degree likelihood hardness conjecture. % Our key contribution is the identification of a regime in the problem parameters (dimension, sparsity, number of labeled and unlabeled samples) where SSL is guaranteed to be advantageous for classification. Specifically, there is a regime where it is possible to construct in polynomial time an accurate SSL classifier. However, % any computationally efficient supervised or unsupervised learning schemes, that separately use only the labeled or unlabeled data would fail. Our work highlights the provable benefits of combining labeled and unlabeled data for {classification and} feature selection in high dimensions. We present simulations that complement our theoretical analysis.

</details>


### [54] [On high-dimensional modifications of the nearest neighbor classifier](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.05145)
*Annesha Ghosh,Deep Ghoshal,Bilol Banerjee,Anil K. Ghosh*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文针对高维低样本量（HDLSS）场景下传统最近邻分类器因距离浓度和邻域结构破坏导致的性能退化问题，讨论了现有改进方法并提出了若干新方法，通过理论分析、模拟和基准数据集实验验证了所提方法的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在高维低样本量（HDLSS）场景中，当类别间的尺度差异主导位置差异时，最近邻分类器因距离浓度现象和邻域结构破坏而表现不佳，现有改进方法尚不充分，亟需更有效的新方法。

Method: 讨论了现有改进方法并提出若干新方法，结合理论分析，在模拟数据集和基准数据集上进行实验比较。

Result: 通过模拟和基准数据集实验，对比了所提方法与现有方法的经验性能表现。

Conclusion: 所提出的新方法在HDLSS场景下相较于现有方法具有更好的分类性能。

Abstract: Nearest neighbor classifier is arguably the most simple and popular nonparametric classifier available in the literature. However, due to the concentration of pairwise distances and the violation of the neighborhood structure, this classifier often suffers in high-dimension, low-sample size (HDLSS) situations, especially when the scale difference between the competing classes dominates their location difference. Several attempts have been made in the literature to take care of this problem. In this article, we discuss some of these existing methods and propose some new ones. We carry out some theoretical investigations in this regard and analyze several simulated and benchmark datasets to compare the empirical performances of proposed methods with some of the existing ones.

</details>


### [55] [Distributionally Robust Optimisation with Bayesian Ambiguity Sets](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.03492)
*Charita Dellaporta,Patrick O'Hara,Theodoros Damoulas*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出了一种结合贝叶斯推断与分布鲁棒优化的新方法DRO-BAS，通过后验信息构造模糊集来对冲模型不确定性，在指数族分布下具有闭式对偶表示，并在报童问题中验证了其鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统贝叶斯决策在后验期望风险最小化下可能因模型不确定性或有限噪声观测导致次优决策，需要一种能更好应对DGP未知性的决策框架。

Method: 将贝叶斯后验分布融入分布鲁棒优化的模糊集构建中，定义后验信息驱动的模糊集，并在该集合上优化最坏情况下的风险；对于指数族成员推导出闭式对偶表示。

Result: 在指数族分布下获得了闭式对偶表示形式；在报童问题中展示了相比现有贝叶斯DRO方法更优的样本外鲁棒性。

Conclusion: DRO-BAS通过贝叶斯后验构造模糊集进行最坏情况风险优化，有效提升了决策对模型不确定性的鲁棒性，且具有良好的计算可处理性。

Abstract: Decision making under uncertainty is challenging since the data-generating process (DGP) is often unknown. Bayesian inference proceeds by estimating the DGP through posterior beliefs about the model's parameters. However, minimising the expected risk under these posterior beliefs can lead to sub-optimal decisions due to model uncertainty or limited, noisy observations. To address this, we introduce Distributionally Robust Optimisation with Bayesian Ambiguity Sets (DRO-BAS) which hedges against uncertainty in the model by optimising the worst-case risk over a posterior-informed ambiguity set. We show that our method admits a closed-form dual representation for many exponential family members and showcase its improved out-of-sample robustness against existing Bayesian DRO methodology in the Newsvendor problem.

</details>


### [56] [Evaluating Posterior Probabilities: Decision Theory, Proper Scoring Rules, and Calibration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.02841)
*Luciana Ferrer,Daniel Ramos*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文批判了机器学习中过度使用校准指标（如ECE）来评估后验概率质量的做法，主张应使用归一化的期望适当评分规则（PSRs）作为主要评估工具，而校准指标仅作为系统开发阶段的诊断工具。同时提出了一种基于PSR分解的校准损失指标，其性能优于ECE和期望分数散度校准指标。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大量机器学习文献使用校准指标（尤其是ECE）作为后验概率质量的代理度量，但校准指标只反映了后验概率的一个方面（校准性），忽略了判别性（discrimination）性能，导致对后验概率质量的评估不完整甚至误导。

Method: 1. 从贝叶斯决策理论角度重新审视适当评分规则（PSRs），阐明其定义动机；2. 论证期望PSR是评估后验概率质量的原则性度量，而校准指标不适合此任务；3. 通过期望PSR的分解，提出一种新的校准指标——校准损失（calibration loss）；4. 从理论和实验两方面对比校准损失与ECE及期望分数散度校准指标的优劣。

Result: 理论分析和实证证据表明，校准损失指标在作为诊断工具时优于ECE和期望分数散度校准指标。

Conclusion: 校准指标不应被用于评估后验概率质量，这项任务应交由期望PSR完成；校准指标仅适合在系统开发阶段作为诊断工具使用，其中校准损失是推荐采用的校准度量。

Abstract: Most machine learning classifiers are designed to output posterior probabilities for the classes given the input sample. These probabilities may be used to make the categorical decision on the class of the sample; provided as input to a downstream system; or provided to a human for interpretation. Evaluating the quality of the posteriors generated by these system is an essential problem which was addressed decades ago with the invention of proper scoring rules (PSRs). Unfortunately, much of the recent machine learning literature uses calibration metrics -- most commonly, the expected calibration error (ECE) -- as a proxy to assess posterior performance. The problem with this approach is that calibration metrics reflect only one aspect of the quality of the posteriors, ignoring the discrimination performance. For this reason, we argue that calibration metrics should play no role in the assessment of posterior quality. Expected PSRs should instead be used for this job, preferably normalized for ease of interpretation. In this work, we first give a brief review of PSRs from a practical perspective, motivating their definition using Bayes decision theory. We discuss why expected PSRs provide a principled measure of the quality of a system's posteriors and why calibration metrics are not the right tool for this job. We argue that calibration metrics, while not useful for performance assessment, may be used as diagnostic tools during system development. With this purpose in mind, we discuss a simple and practical calibration metric, called calibration loss, derived from a decomposition of expected PSRs. We compare this metric with the ECE and with the expected score divergence calibration metric from the PSR literature and argue, using theoretical and empirical evidence, that calibration loss is superior to these two metrics.

</details>


### [57] [Simulation-based Benchmarking for Causal Structure Learning in Gene Perturbation Experiments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.06015)
*Luka Kovačević,Izzy Newsham,Sach Mukherjee,John Whittaker*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出CausalRegNet，一个基于乘法效应的结构因果模型，用于生成具有上下文特异性属性的观测和干预数据，特别适用于基因扰动实验场景，可评估因果结构学习方法在特定生物学环境中的表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前因果结构学习(CSL)方法在实际应用中受上下文特异性因素（如数据分布、非线性依赖等）影响显著，但缺乏在特定上下文中评估和选择CSL方法的系统框架。

Method: 提出CausalRegNet——一个乘法效应结构因果模型(SCM)，能够生成融合上下文特异性属性的观测数据和干预数据，聚焦于基因扰动实验场景。

Result: 在真实基因扰动数据上，CausalRegNet能够生成准确的数据分布，且可扩展性远优于现有仿真框架。

Conclusion: CausalRegNet可用于在生物学干预实验的上下文中评估CSL方法，填补了上下文特异性CSL评估的空白。

Abstract: Causal structure learning (CSL) refers to the task of learning causal relationships from data. Advances in CSL now allow learning of causal graphs in diverse application domains, which has the potential to facilitate data-driven causal decision-making. Real-world CSL performance depends on a number of $\textit{context-specific}$ factors, including context-specific data distributions and non-linear dependencies, that are important in practical use-cases. However, our understanding of how to assess and select CSL methods in specific contexts remains limited. To address this gap, we present $\textit{CausalRegNet}$, a multiplicative effect structural causal model that allows for generating observational and interventional data incorporating context-specific properties, with a focus on the setting of gene perturbation experiments. Using real-world gene perturbation data, we show that CausalRegNet generates accurate distributions and scales far better than current simulation frameworks. We illustrate the use of CausalRegNet in assessing CSL methods in the context of interventional experiments in biology.

</details>


### [58] [Survey of Data-driven Newsvendor: Unified Analysis and Spectrum of Achievable Regrets](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.03505)
*Zhuoxin Chen,Will Ma*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文针对数据驱动型报童问题，通过引入“聚类分布”概念，统一分析了加性/乘性遗憾、高概率/期望界、不同分布类别等多种变体，填补了文献空白，证明了遗憾值在1/√n到1/n之间整个谱系的可能性，并通过模拟验证了该概念对经验遗憾的预测准确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 数据驱动报童问题存在多种变体（加性与乘性遗憾、高概率与期望界、不同分布类别），但缺乏统一的分析框架，导致许多理论空白未被填补，已有证明较为复杂。

Method: 提出“聚类分布”概念，建立统一分析框架；结合新下界证明，刻画遗憾值的完整谱系；通过模拟实验验证理论预测。

Result: 遗憾值可在1/√n到1/n之间连续变化；填补了文献中多个变体组合的理论空白；简化了多个已有证明；聚类分布能准确预测不同数据规模下的经验遗憾。

Conclusion: 聚类分布是数据驱动报童问题中预测经验遗憾的“正确”指标，统一框架为后续研究提供了理论基础。

Abstract: In the Newsvendor problem, the goal is to guess the number that will be drawn from some distribution, with asymmetric consequences for guessing too high vs. too low. In the data-driven version, the distribution is unknown, and one must work with samples from the distribution. Data-driven Newsvendor has been studied under many variants: additive vs. multiplicative regret, high probability vs. expectation bounds, and different distribution classes. This paper studies all combinations of these variants, filling in many gaps in the literature and simplifying many proofs. In particular, we provide a unified analysis based on the notion of clustered distributions, which in conjunction with our new lower bounds, shows that the entire spectrum of regrets between $1/\sqrt{n}$ and $1/n$ can be possible. Simulations on commonly-used distributions demonstrate that our notion is the "correct" predictor of empirical regret across varying data sizes.

</details>


### [59] [Exchangeable Sequence Models Quantify Uncertainty Over Latent Concepts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.03307)
*Naimeng Ye,Hongseok Namkoong*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文证明预训练序列模型天然具备对可交换数据点进行概率推理的能力，并从De Finetti预测视角重新解读：自回归预训练等价于经验贝叶斯，前向生成等价于后验推断，序列预测损失控制不确定性量化质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 智能体需要能够表达自身的不确定性，但传统的贝叶斯模型（如主题模型）通过潜参数的先验和似然来量化不确定性，而序列模型学习观测之间的关系。本文旨在建立可交换序列建模与有效贝叶斯模型之间的理论联系。

Method: 1) 从De Finetti经典预测视角出发，将不确定性归因于未观测数据而非潜参数；2) 将自回归预训练等价于基于先验观测形成信念（经验贝叶斯），前向生成等价于环境实例化的模拟（后验推断）；3) 提出三种编码可交换性的方法：数据增强、正则化和因果掩码。

Result: 可交换序列模型能够显式执行统计推断，对潜环境的认知不确定性通过预测未来观测的变异性来捕捉；序列预测损失控制着不确定性量化的质量。

Conclusion: 可交换序列建模提供了有效的贝叶斯模型框架，弥合了序列模型与经典贝叶斯推断之间的鸿沟，为智能体表达不确定性提供了新途径。

Abstract: Intelligent agents must be able to articulate its own uncertainty. In this work, we show that pre-trained sequence models are naturally capable of probabilistic reasoning over exchangeable data points -- forming informed beliefs and sharpening them as it gathers more information. A sequence model learns the relationship between observations, which differs from typical Bayesian models that quantify uncertainty over latent parameters through priors and likelihoods (e.g., topic models). Despite the apparent difference, we illustrate how exchangeable sequence modeling provides a valid Bayesian model by going back to De Finetti's classical predictive view of probabilistic reasoning: uncertainty comes from data that has not been observed yet, rather than latent parameters. From this perspective, pre-training autoregressive models is equivalent to formulating informed beliefs based on prior observations ("empirical Bayes"), and forward generation is equivalent to simulating instantiations of an environment ("posterior inference"). In particular, exchangeable sequence models can explicitly perform statistical inference; epistemic uncertainty over latent environments is captured by variation in predicted future observations. Formally, we show the sequence prediction loss controls the quality of uncertainty quantification, and propose several approaches for encoding exchangeability in sequence model architectures: data augmentation, regularization, and causal masking.

</details>


### [60] [JANET: Joint Adaptive predictioN-region Estimation for Time-series](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.06390)
*Eshant English,Eliot Wong-Toi,Matteo Fontana,Stephan Mandt,Padhraic Smyth,Christoph Lippert*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出JANET框架，将共形预测推广到时间序列的多步预测场景，生成联合预测区域并控制K族错误率，适用于单变量和多变量时间序列。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 共形预测的可交换性假设限制了其在时间序列数据上的应用，且现有方法难以处理多步预测任务中跨多个未来时间点的不确定性估计。

Method: 提出JANET框架，归纳共形预测框架的推广，生成联合预测区域，控制K族错误率。

Result: 在多种时间序列数据集的多步预测任务中展现出优越性能。

Conclusion: JANET为时序数据提供了可靠且可解释的不确定性量化方法，能够灵活适应不同应用需求。

Abstract: Conformal prediction provides machine learning models with prediction sets that offer theoretical guarantees, but the underlying assumption of exchangeability limits its applicability to time series data. Furthermore, existing approaches struggle to handle multi-step ahead prediction tasks, where uncertainty estimates across multiple future time points are crucial. We propose JANET (Joint Adaptive predictioN-region Estimation for Time-series), a novel framework for constructing conformal prediction regions that are valid for both univariate and multivariate time series. JANET generalises the inductive conformal framework and efficiently produces joint prediction regions with controlled K-familywise error rates, enabling flexible adaptation to specific application needs. Our empirical evaluation demonstrates JANET's superior performance in multi-step prediction tasks across diverse time series datasets, highlighting its potential for reliable and interpretable uncertainty quantification in sequential data.

</details>


### [61] [A method to benchmark high-dimensional process drift detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.03669)
*Edgar Wolf,Tobias Windisch*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种用于制造过程曲线漂移检测的机器学习基准测试框架，包括合成数据生成方法、时间AUC评估指标以及现有算法在多漂移段数据上表现不佳的实证研究。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的过程曲线漂移检测缺乏标准化的基准测试框架，难以系统评估和比较不同机器学习方法在此任务上的性能表现。

Method: 1）提出理论框架以可控方式合成多变量时间序列过程曲线数据；2）引入时间AUC（temporal AUC）作为评估指标，量化模型揭示漂移段曲线的能力；3）在合成数据上开展基准研究，比较多种主流机器学习方法。

Result: 现有算法在处理包含多个漂移段的数据集时往往表现不佳。

Conclusion: 该框架为过程曲线漂移检测提供了标准化评估工具，并揭示了当前方法在多漂移场景下的局限性，为未来研究指明了改进方向。

Abstract: Process curves are multivariate finite time series data coming from manufacturing processes. This paper studies machine learning that detect drifts in process curve datasets. A theoretic framework to synthetically generate process curves in a controlled way is introduced in order to benchmark machine learning algorithms for process drift detection. An evaluation score, called the temporal area under the curve, is introduced, which allows to quantify how well machine learning models unveil curves belonging to drift segments. Finally, a benchmark study comparing popular machine learning approaches on synthetic data generated with the introduced framework is presented that shows that existing algorithms often struggle with datasets containing multiple drift segments.

</details>


### [62] [Maximum a Posteriori Estimation for Linear Structural Dynamics Models Using Bayesian Optimization with Rational Polynomial Chaos Expansions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.03569)
*Felix Schneider,Iason Papaioannou,Bruno Sudret,Gerhard Müller*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结合稀疏贝叶斯学习与贝叶斯优化的方法，利用有理多项式混沌展开（RPCE）替代模型，在结构动力学模型的MAP估计中有效减少昂贵模型调用次数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在结构动力学模型的MAP估计中，每次模型调用计算成本高昂，需要一种替代模型方法来降低计算负担，同时保持参数估计的精度。

Method: 采用有理多项式混沌展开（RPCE）替代模型近似频率响应函数；基于Laplace近似扩展了RPCE的稀疏贝叶斯学习方法；引入贝叶斯优化，利用期望改进采集函数自适应地丰富实验设计，通过蒙特卡洛采样估计采集函数。

Result: 所提方法在代数二自由度系统和交叉层压木板的有限元模型参数更新问题中得到了验证，有效减少了MAP估计中的模型评估次数。

Conclusion: 将稀疏贝叶斯学习与自适应序贯实验设计相结合，能够在保证MAP估计精度的同时大幅降低计算成本，适用于结构动力学模型的参数估计问题。

Abstract: Bayesian analysis enables combining prior knowledge with measurement data to learn model parameters. Commonly, one resorts to computing the maximum a posteriori (MAP) estimate, when only a point estimate of the parameters is of interest. We apply MAP estimation in the context of structural dynamic models, where the system response can be described by the frequency response function. To alleviate high computational demands from repeated expensive model calls, we utilize a rational polynomial chaos expansion (RPCE) surrogate model that expresses the system frequency response as a rational of two polynomials with complex coefficients. We propose an extension to an existing sparse Bayesian learning approach for RPCE based on Laplace's approximation for the posterior distribution of the denominator coefficients. Furthermore, we introduce a Bayesian optimization approach, which allows to adaptively enrich the experimental design throughout the optimization process of MAP estimation. Thereby, we utilize the expected improvement acquisition function as a means to identify sample points in the input space that are possibly associated with large objective function values. The acquisition function is estimated through Monte Carlo sampling based on the posterior distribution of the expansion coefficients identified in the sparse Bayesian learning process. By combining the sparsity-inducing learning procedure with the sequential experimental design, we effectively reduce the number of model evaluations in the MAP estimation problem. We demonstrate the applicability of the presented methods on the parameter updating problem of an algebraic two-degree-of-freedom system and the finite element model of a cross-laminated timber plate.

</details>


### [63] [Improving Out-of-Distribution Detection by Combining Existing Post-hoc Methods](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.07135)
*Paul Novello,Yannick Prudent,Joseba Dalmau,Corentin Friedrich,Yann Pequignot*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出通过组合多个现有OOD检测方法（而非开发新方法）来提升OOD检测性能，探索了四种融合策略（多数投票、基于经验/连接函数的CDF建模、最优输运多变量分位数），并扩展了评估指标至多维度场景，在缺乏OOD数据的现实条件下提供了选择检测器的指南。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有OOD检测方法众多但无统一最优者，实践中需对所有方法进行测试，成本高昂；论文旨在通过有效组合现有方法而非开发新方法，提升OOD检测的鲁棒性与实用性。

Method: 提出了四种多检测分数融合策略：(1) 多数投票；(2) 基于经验累积分布函数的CDF建模；(3) 基于Copula的CDF建模；(4) 基于最优输运的多变量分位数。扩展了AUROC、FPR@固定TPR等指标至多维检测器场景，并借鉴Outlier Exposure思想提出无OOD数据时的检测器选择指南。

Result: 在广泛基准上比较了四种融合策略与单个方法的性能，展示了组合方法相对于单一方法的优势，并验证了在无OOD数据场景下指南的有效性。

Conclusion: 组合现有OOD检测方法比开发新方法更具实用价值；所提融合策略和评估框架为实际部署提供了有效工具；未来可进一步探索更复杂的融合机制与自适应选择策略。

Abstract: Since the seminal paper of Hendrycks et al. arXiv:1610.02136, Post-hoc deep Out-of-Distribution (OOD) detection has expanded rapidly. As a result, practitioners working on safety-critical applications and seeking to improve the robustness of a neural network now have a plethora of methods to choose from. However, no method outperforms every other on every dataset arXiv:2210.07242, so the current best practice is to test all the methods on the datasets at hand. This paper shifts focus from developing new methods to effectively combining existing ones to enhance OOD detection. We propose and compare four different strategies for integrating multiple detection scores into a unified OOD detector, based on techniques such as majority vote, empirical and copulas-based Cumulative Distribution Function modeling, and multivariate quantiles based on optimal transport. We extend common OOD evaluation metrics -- like AUROC and FPR at fixed TPR rates -- to these multi-dimensional OOD detectors, allowing us to evaluate them and compare them with individual methods on extensive benchmarks. Furthermore, we propose a series of guidelines to choose what OOD detectors to combine in more realistic settings, i.e. in the absence of known OOD data, relying on principles drawn from Outlier Exposure arXiv:1812.04606. The code is available at https://github.com/paulnovello/multi-ood.

</details>


### [64] [Iterative thresholding for non-linear learning in the strong $\varepsilon$-contamination model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.03703)
*Arvind Rathnashyam,Alex Gittens*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文研究了在标签和协变量可能受到对抗性攻击的情况下，使用阈值梯度下降学习单神经元模型的近似界。对于sigmoid、leaky-ReLU和ReLU激活函数，得到了$O(ν\sqrt{ε\log(1/ε)})$的$\ell_2$范数近似界，样本复杂度为$O(d/ε)$。对于线性回归，得到了$O(νε\log(1/ε))$的近似界，优于先前结果，且算法运行时间复杂度为$O(\text{polylog}(N,d)\log(R/ε))$。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有对抗性鲁棒学习算法在单神经元模型上的近似界不够紧致，尤其是梯度下降类阈值算法在存在对抗性污染时，线性回归任务的近似误差仅为$O(ν)$，且运行时间复杂度较高。本文旨在改进这些边界并降低计算复杂度。

Method: 采用阈值梯度下降（thresholded gradient descent）算法，在假设数据服从模型$y = σ(\mathbf{w}^{*} \cdot \mathbf{x}) + ξ$且存在对抗性污染的条件下，分别针对sigmoid、leaky-ReLU、ReLU激活函数以及线性回归情形推导近似误差界。通过精细的浓度分析和阈值策略，得到更紧的$\ell_2$范数误差界和更优的样本及运行时间复杂度。

Result: 对于sigmoid、leaky-ReLU和ReLU激活函数，得到$O(ν\sqrt{ε\log(1/ε)})$的$\ell_2$范数近似界，样本复杂度$O(d/ε)$，失败概率$e^{-Ω(d)}$。对于线性回归，得到$O(νε\log(1/ε))$的近似界，优于先前$O(ν)$的结果；算法运行时间复杂度为$O(\text{polylog}(N,d)\log(R/ε))$，优于先前$O(\text{polylog}(N,d)/ε^2)$。

Conclusion: 本文提出的阈值梯度下降算法在对抗性污染下对单神经元模型（包括非线性激活和线性回归）具有更好的近似保证和计算效率，显著改进了现有方法的理论边界和运行复杂度。

Abstract: We derive approximation bounds for learning single neuron models using thresholded gradient descent when both the labels and the covariates are possibly corrupted adversarially. We assume the data follows the model $y = σ(\mathbf{w}^{*} \cdot \mathbf{x}) + ξ,$ where $σ$ is a nonlinear activation function, the noise $ξ$ is Gaussian, and the covariate vector $\mathbf{x}$ is sampled from a sub-Gaussian distribution. We study sigmoidal, leaky-ReLU, and ReLU activation functions and derive a $O(ν\sqrt{ε\log(1/ε)})$ approximation bound in $\ell_{2}$-norm, with sample complexity $O(d/ε)$ and failure probability $e^{-Ω(d)}$.
  We also study the linear regression problem, where $σ(\mathbf{x}) = \mathbf{x}$. We derive a $O(νε\log(1/ε))$ approximation bound, improving upon the previous $O(ν)$ approximation bounds for the gradient-descent based iterative thresholding algorithms of Bhatia et al. (NeurIPS 2015) and Shen and Sanghavi (ICML 2019). Our algorithm has a $O(\textrm{polylog}(N,d)\log(R/ε))$ runtime complexity when $\|\mathbf{w}^{*}\|_2 \leq R$, improving upon the $O(\text{polylog}(N,d)/ε^2)$ runtime complexity of Awasthi et al. (NeurIPS 2022).

</details>


### [65] [Bayes-optimal learning of an extensive-width neural network from quadratically many samples](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.03733)
*Antoine Maillard,Emanuele Troiani,Simon Martin,Florent Krzakala,Lenka Zdeborová*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文研究了具有二次激活函数和随机权重的单隐层神经网络的学习问题。在输入维度与网络宽度成比例大的渐近极限下，针对样本数量与维度成二次关系这一更具挑战性的区域，推导出了贝叶斯最优测试误差的闭式表达式，并提出了结合近似消息传递与旋转不变矩阵去噪的GAMP-RIE算法，该算法可渐近达到最优性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有工作[Cui & al '23]已建立了线性回归在样本量仅与维度成线性关系时可实现贝叶斯最优测试误差，但留下了更具挑战性的问题——样本量与维度成二次关系时的最优测试误差的理论分析仍是开放的。本文旨在解决这一挑战。

Method: 将问题与近期关于广泛秩矩阵最优去噪和椭球拟合问题的研究成果建立联系，从而推导出闭式解；并提出GAMP-RIE算法，该算法结合了近似消息传递（AMP）与旋转不变矩阵去噪技术。

Result: 推导出了二次激活函数下贝叶斯最优测试误差的闭式表达式；GAMP-RIE算法可渐近达到最优性能；在无噪声情况下，随机初始化的梯度下降似乎能对权重空间进行采样，初始化平均后的测试误差等于贝叶斯最优误差。

Conclusion: 成功解决了样本量与维度成二次关系时单隐层神经网络学习的最优测试误差理论分析难题，提供了闭式解和可实现最优性能的算法，并揭示了梯度下降与贝叶斯最优性之间的经验联系。

Abstract: We consider the problem of learning a target function corresponding to a single hidden layer neural network, with a quadratic activation function after the first layer, and random weights. We consider the asymptotic limit where the input dimension and the network width are proportionally large. Recent work [Cui & al '23] established that linear regression provides Bayes-optimal test error to learn such a function when the number of available samples is only linear in the dimension. That work stressed the open challenge of theoretically analyzing the optimal test error in the more interesting regime where the number of samples is quadratic in the dimension. In this paper, we solve this challenge for quadratic activations and derive a closed-form expression for the Bayes-optimal test error. We also provide an algorithm, that we call GAMP-RIE, which combines approximate message passing with rotationally invariant matrix denoising, and that asymptotically achieves the optimal performance. Technically, our result is enabled by establishing a link with recent works on optimal denoising of extensive-rank matrices and on the ellipsoid fitting problem. We further show empirically that, in the absence of noise, randomly-initialized gradient descent seems to sample the space of weights, leading to zero training loss, and averaging over initialization leads to a test error equal to the Bayes-optimal one.

</details>


### [66] [Towards Complete Causal Explanation with Expert Knowledge](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.07338)
*Aparajithan Venkateswaran,Emilija Perković*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文研究了在最大祖先图（MAGs）的马尔可夫等价类中，通过加入专家知识或方向知识来限制等价类的问题，提出了受限本质祖先图的概念，并给出了新的方向规则和算法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将马尔可夫等价类限制为仅包含具有特定边标记（专家知识或方向知识）的MAGs，以更精确地刻画因果结构。

Method: 证明了整个马尔可夫等价类的若干性质（包括Ali等人2009年的猜想）；提出了多个用于在本质祖先图中添加方向知识的新的可靠图形定向规则；分析了Zhang（2008b）中部分规则对限制马尔可夫等价类并非必要；提供了包含方向知识的算法，并在特定设置下保证输出为受限本质祖先图；给出了检查一个图是否为受限本质祖先图的算法并讨论了其运行时间。

Result: 证明了等价类的若干性质；提出了新的可靠定向规则；识别了部分不必要的规则；在特定设置下算法能正确输出受限本质祖先图；给出了图是否为受限本质祖先图的判定算法。

Conclusion: 本文将Meek（1995）的工作推广到允许潜在混淆变量的设置，为在存在隐变量条件下利用专家知识限制马尔可夫等价类提供了理论基础和实用算法。

Abstract: We study the problem of restricting a Markov equivalence class of maximal ancestral graphs (MAGs) to only those MAGs that contain certain edge marks, which we refer to as expert or orientation knowledge. Such a restriction of the Markov equivalence class can be uniquely represented by a restricted essential ancestral graph. Our contributions are several-fold. First, we prove certain properties for the entire Markov equivalence class including a conjecture from Ali et al. (2009). Second, we present several new sound graphical orientation rules for adding orientation knowledge to an essential ancestral graph. We also show that some orientation rules of Zhang (2008b) are not needed for restricting the Markov equivalence class with orientation knowledge. Third, we provide an algorithm for including this orientation knowledge and show that in certain settings the output of our algorithm is a restricted essential ancestral graph. Finally, outside of the specified settings, we provide an algorithm for checking whether a graph is a restricted essential graph and discuss its runtime. This work can be seen as a generalization of Meek (1995) to settings which allow for latent confounding.

</details>


### [67] [Resultant: Incremental Effectiveness on Likelihood for Unsupervised Out-of-Distribution Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.03801)
*Yewen Li,Chaojie Wang,Xiaobo Xia,Xu He,Ruyi An,Dong Li,Tongliang Liu,Bo An,Xinrun Wang*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出Resultant方法，通过缓解潜在分布不匹配和校准数据集熵-互信息整合两个方向改进变分深度生成模型在无监督OOD检测中相对于似然函数的增量有效性，在多种任务上达到SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于深度生成模型的OOD检测方法在"困难"基准上表现优异，但在"非困难"基准（如SVHN vs CIFAR10）上往往无法持续超越或匹配简单的似然检测器性能。作者呼吁关注方法的增量有效性（incremental effectiveness），即能否始终超越或至少匹配似然函数的性能。

Method: 1）分析变分DGM似然函数的两个改进方向：缓解潜在分布不匹配（latent distribution mismatch）和校准数据集熵-互信息整合（dataset entropy-mutual integration）；2）为每个方向应用相应技术：后验先验（post-hoc prior）和数据集熵-互信息校准（dataset entropy-mutual calibration）；3）将两者结合为Resultant方法。

Result: 实验结果证明Resultant在广泛任务中成为新的SOTA无监督OOD检测器，同时保持了相对于似然函数的增量有效性。

Conclusion: 本文强调增量有效性应成为U-OOD检测方法评估的重要指标，并通过结合两种改进方向实现了既保持似然优势又在困难场景下超越似然的方法。

Abstract: Unsupervised out-of-distribution (U-OOD) detection is to identify OOD data samples with a detector trained solely on unlabeled in-distribution (ID) data. The likelihood function estimated by a deep generative model (DGM) could be a natural detector, but its performance is limited in some popular "hard" benchmarks, such as FashionMNIST (ID) vs. MNIST (OOD). Recent studies have developed various detectors based on DGMs to move beyond likelihood. However, despite their success on "hard" benchmarks, most of them struggle to consistently surpass or match the performance of likelihood on some "non-hard" cases, such as SVHN (ID) vs. CIFAR10 (OOD) where likelihood could be a nearly perfect detector. Therefore, we appeal for more attention to incremental effectiveness on likelihood, i.e., whether a method could always surpass or at least match the performance of likelihood in U-OOD detection. We first investigate the likelihood of variational DGMs and find its detection performance could be improved in two directions: i) alleviating latent distribution mismatch, and ii) calibrating the dataset entropy-mutual integration. Then, we apply two techniques for each direction, specifically post-hoc prior and dataset entropy-mutual calibration. The final method, named Resultant, combines these two directions for better incremental effectiveness compared to either technique alone. Experimental results demonstrate that the Resultant could be a new state-of-the-art U-OOD detector while maintaining incremental effectiveness on likelihood in a wide range of tasks.

</details>


### [68] [Better Locally Private Sparse Estimation Given Multiple Samples Per User](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.04313)
*Yuheng Ma,Ke Jia,Hanfang Yang*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文研究用户级本地差分隐私下的稀疏线性回归，证明当每个用户贡献m个样本时，维度d的线性依赖可以被消除，误差上界从项级LDP的O(s^* d / nmε²)降低到用户级的O(s^*² / nmε²)，并提出一个先变量选择后估计的通用框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 以往项级本地差分隐私稀疏线性回归在s^*稀疏假设下，误差界为O(s^* d / nmε²)，在高维数据（d极大）场景下效果不佳。本文旨在探索用户级本地差分隐私设置能否消除对维度d的线性依赖，从而获得更紧的误差界。

Method: 提出一个两阶段框架：首先进行候选变量选择（在稀疏假设下筛选重要特征），然后在缩小的低维空间中进行参数估计。该框架可扩展至一般稀疏估计问题。

Result: 理论上证明用户级LDP的误差上界为O(s^*² / nmε²)，消除了对维度d的线性依赖。在合成和真实数据集上的实验验证了提出方法的优越性。

Conclusion: 在相同样本量下，当每个用户拥有多个样本时，本地差分隐私稀疏估计效果更好。用户级隐私相较于项级隐私在高维稀疏回归中具有显著优势。

Abstract: Previous studies yielded discouraging results for item-level locally differentially private linear regression with $s^*$-sparsity assumption, where the minimax rate for $nm$ samples is $\mathcal{O}(s^{*}d / nm\varepsilon^2)$. This can be challenging for high-dimensional data, where the dimension $d$ is extremely large. In this work, we investigate user-level locally differentially private sparse linear regression. We show that with $n$ users each contributing $m$ samples, the linear dependency of dimension $d$ can be eliminated, yielding an error upper bound of $\mathcal{O}(s^{*2} / nm\varepsilon^2)$. We propose a framework that first selects candidate variables and then conducts estimation in the narrowed low-dimensional space, which is extendable to general sparse estimation problems with tight error bounds. Experiments on both synthetic and real datasets demonstrate the superiority of the proposed methods. Both the theoretical and empirical results suggest that, with the same number of samples, locally private sparse estimation is better conducted when multiple samples per user are available.

</details>


### [69] [Long-Term Fairness in Sequential Multi-Agent Selection with Positive Reinforcement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.07350)
*Bhagyashree Puranik,Ozgur Guldogan,Upamanyu Madhow,Ramtin Pedarsani*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文研究多智能体在顺序决策中通过平衡贪婪评分与公平性来实现长期社会公平的机制，提出Multi-agent Fair-Greedy策略，证明在相同分数分布下资源池和录取结果收敛到长期公平目标，并在非相同分布下通过实验发现均衡存在，同时警示复杂演化模型中智能体非协调行为可能导致负强化效应，指出正向强化机制虽具潜力但需谨慎设计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有公平决策研究多聚焦于单次决策的公平性指标，而近期工作提出顺序决策可能通过正向反馈机制改善长期社会公平。本文旨在检验这一假设在多智能体同时从共同申请池中选拔的场景下是否成立，并探索其后果与局限性。

Method: 提出Multi-agent Fair-Greedy策略，该策略平衡贪婪分数最大化与公平性目标。通过理论分析证明在群体分数分布相同时资源池和录取过程收敛到长期公平目标；通过合成数据和真实世界数据集进行实验验证非相同分数分布下均衡的存在性；并构建更复杂的申请池演化模型探究智能体非协调行为的负面效应。

Result: 在相同分数分布下，Multi-agent Fair-Greedy策略能保证资源池和录取结果收敛到智能体设定的长期公平目标；在非相同分数分布下，实验证据表明存在均衡；但在更复杂的演化模型中，智能体的非协调行为可能导致负强化，降低弱势群体申请者比例。

Conclusion: 正向强化机制是实现长期公平的有前景手段，但政策设计必须谨慎，需对演化模型的变化具有稳健性。算法设计者、社会科学家和政策制定者仍需探索诸多开放问题。

Abstract: While much of the rapidly growing literature on fair decision-making focuses on metrics for one-shot decisions, recent work has raised the intriguing possibility of designing sequential decision-making to positively impact long-term social fairness. In selection processes such as college admissions or hiring, biasing slightly towards applicants from under-represented groups is hypothesized to provide positive feedback that increases the pool of under-represented applicants in future selection rounds, thus enhancing fairness in the long term. In this paper, we examine this hypothesis and its consequences in a setting in which multiple agents are selecting from a common pool of applicants. We propose the Multi-agent Fair-Greedy policy, that balances greedy score maximization and fairness. Under this policy, we prove that the resource pool and the admissions converge to a long-term fairness target set by the agents when the score distributions across the groups in the population are identical. We provide empirical evidence of existence of equilibria under non-identical score distributions through synthetic and adapted real-world datasets. We then sound a cautionary note for more complex applicant pool evolution models, under which uncoordinated behavior by the agents can cause negative reinforcement, leading to a reduction in the fraction of under-represented applicants. Our results indicate that, while positive reinforcement is a promising mechanism for long-term fairness, policies must be designed carefully to be robust to variations in the evolution model, with a number of open issues that remain to be explored by algorithm designers, social scientists, and policymakers.

</details>


### [70] [Active Sampling of Interpolation Points to Identify Dominant Subspaces for Model Reduction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.03892)
*Celine Reddig,Pawan Goyal,Igor Pontes Duff,Peter Benner*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向线性结构化系统的主动采样模型降阶策略，通过从大规模训练集中选择少量插值点来估计主导可达子空间和可观子空间，在保持精度的同时实现了17倍加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高保真模型降阶中，当训练集包含大量插值点时，求解多个大规模线性系统以确定主导子空间的计算代价过高，亟需一种能降低计算负担的采样方法。

Method: 将子空间识别问题转化为广义Sylvester方程求解，通过主动采样策略从训练集中选取最相关的样本点，并以低秩形式构造矩阵方程的解来编码子空间信息，进而获取降阶模型。

Result: 与使用全部训练集点的方法相比，主动采样策略在几乎不损失精度的情况下实现了17倍的加速比。

Conclusion: 基于主动采样的广义Sylvester方程求解方法能高效准确地估计主导可达/可观子空间，为大规模线性结构系统的模型降阶提供了一种可行的计算方案。

Abstract: Model reduction is an active research field to construct low-dimensional surrogate models of high fidelity to accelerate engineering design cycles. In this work, we investigate model reduction for linear structured systems using dominant reachable and observable subspaces. When the training set $-$ containing all possible interpolation points $-$ is large, then these subspaces can be determined by solving many large-scale linear systems. However, for high-fidelity models, this easily becomes computationally intractable. To circumvent this issue, in this work, we propose an active sampling strategy to sample only a few points from the given training set, which can allow us to estimate those subspaces accurately. To this end, we formulate the identification of the subspaces as the solution of the generalized Sylvester equations, guiding us to select the most relevant samples from the training set to achieve our goals. Consequently, we construct solutions of the matrix equations in low-rank forms, which encode subspace information. We extensively discuss computational aspects and efficient usage of the low-rank factors in the process of obtaining reduced-order models. We illustrate the proposed active sampling scheme to obtain reduced-order models via dominant reachable and observable subspaces and present its comparison with the method where all the points from the training set are taken into account. It is shown that the active sample strategy can provide us $17$x speed-up without sacrificing any noticeable accuracy.

</details>


### [71] [Robustness investigation of cross-validation based quality measures for model assessment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.04391)
*Thomas Most,Lars Gräning,Sebastian Wolff*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文研究了评估机器学习模型预测质量的准确性度量与鲁棒性度量，采用模型无关的交叉验证方法估计未知数据的近似误差，通过数值示例验证其可靠性，并估计置信区间及推导局部质量度量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器学习模型质量评估方法缺乏对度量本身准确性与鲁棒性的系统性研究，需要一种模型无关、可量化的评估框架来确保模型对未知数据的预测可靠性。

Method: 采用模型无关的交叉验证方法估计未知数据的近似误差；通过数值示例（含额外验证数据集）评估度量可靠性；估计质量度量的置信区间；从交叉验证预测残差中推导局部质量度量。

Result: 所提出的质量度量能够量化模型预测中已解释变异量；数值示例验证了预测误差估计的可靠性；成功估计了置信区间并推导出局部质量度量。

Conclusion: 基于交叉验证的质量度量方法能够有效评估机器学习模型的预测精度与鲁棒性，置信区间和局部质量度量提供了更细致的模型性能刻画工具。

Abstract: In this paper the accuracy and robustness of quality measures for the assessment of machine learning models are investigated. The prediction quality of a machine learning model is evaluated model-independent based on a cross-validation approach, where the approximation error is estimated for unknown data. The presented measures quantify the amount of explained variation in the model prediction. The reliability of these measures is assessed by means of several numerical examples, where an additional data set for the verification of the estimated prediction error is available. Furthermore, the confidence bounds of the presented quality measures are estimated and local quality measures are derived from the prediction residuals obtained by the cross-validation approach.

</details>


### [72] [Entry-Specific Matrix Estimation under Arbitrary Sampling Patterns through the Lens of Network Flows](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.03980)
*Yudong Chen,Xumei Xi,Christina Lee Yu*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于网络流的矩阵补全算法，针对任意观测模式（非均匀随机），利用二分图上的电导流（additive矩阵）和边不相交路径（rank-1矩阵）进行缺失值预测。理论证明每个条目的极小化最大平方误差正比于图中对应边的有效电阻，估计器等价于最小二乘估计，并应用于两向固定效应模型实现个体因果推断。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有矩阵补全理论大多假设观测模式均匀随机或具有特定结构，对任意采样模式的理解存在空白。本文旨在填补这一空白，提出一种能处理任意观测模式、并能对每个条目给出精细误差分析的矩阵补全方法。

Method: 基于观测模式诱导的二分图上的网络流：对additive矩阵使用电导流（electrical flow），对rank-1矩阵使用边不相交路径（edge-disjoint paths）。估计器等价于最小二乘估计。误差分析与图中边的有效电阻（effective resistance）相关联。

Result: 每个条目的极小化最大平方误差与对应边的有效电阻成正比，且匹配极小化最大下界。在additive矩阵设定下，该估计器可应用于两向固定效应模型，准确推断个体因果效应及单位/时间特异混杂因素。rank-1矩阵在采样足够稠密时达到极小化最优。

Conclusion: 网络流参数化估计器族为矩阵补全提供了细粒度、直观的理解，将观测模式对估计难度的影响从全局度量细化到条目级别，量化了每个条目的内在复杂度。

Abstract: Matrix completion tackles the task of predicting missing values in a low-rank matrix based on a sparse set of observed entries. It is often assumed that the observation pattern is generated uniformly at random or has a very specific structure tuned to a given algorithm. There is still a gap in our understanding when it comes to arbitrary sampling patterns. Given an arbitrary sampling pattern, we introduce a matrix completion algorithm based on network flows in the bipartite graph induced by the observation pattern. For additive matrices, the particular flow we used is the electrical flow and we establish error upper bounds customized to each entry as a function of the observation set, along with matching minimax lower bounds. Our results show that the minimax squared error for recovery of a particular entry in the matrix is proportional to the effective resistance of the corresponding edge in the graph. Furthermore, we show that our estimator is equivalent to the least squares estimator. We apply our estimator to the two-way fixed effects model and show that it enables us to accurately infer individual causal effects and the unit-specific and time-specific confounders. For rank-$1$ matrices, we use edge-disjoint paths to form an estimator that achieves minimax optimal estimation when the sampling is sufficiently dense. Our discovery introduces a new family of estimators parametrized by network flows, which provide a fine-grained and intuitive understanding of the impact of the given sampling pattern on the relative difficulty of estimation at an entry-specific level. This graph-based approach allows us to quantify the inherent complexity of matrix completion for individual entries, rather than relying solely on global measures of performance.

</details>


### [73] [Hybrid Reinforcement Learning Breaks Sample Size Barriers in Linear MDPs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.04526)
*Kevin Tan,Wei Fan,Yuting Wei*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文针对混合强化学习（Hybrid RL）中的关键开放问题，提出了两种计算高效的算法（分别针对PAC RL和遗憾最小化RL），在线性函数逼近设定下，无需单策略集中性假设，实现了优于或至少不差于纯离线/纯在线RL最优样本复杂度的理论保证，是目前线性MDP混合RL领域最紧的理论结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 混合RL中能否在无需单策略集中性假设（single-policy concentrability）的情况下，突破纯离线和纯在线RL已有的下界？该问题在表格型PAC RL已被解决，但在遗憾最小化RL和非表格型设定中仍未解决。

Method: 结合近期离线RL和奖励无关探索（reward-agnostic exploration）的最新进展，为线性函数逼近下的PAC RL和遗憾最小化RL分别设计了计算高效的算法。算法无需单策略集中性假设，在线性MDP中进行分析。

Result: 两种算法均实现了更紧的误差或遗憾界，无论行为策略质量如何，其样本复杂度均不差于（且可改进）纯离线RL（针对PAC RL）和纯在线RL（针对遗憾最小化RL）的最优结果。

Conclusion: 本文建立了目前线性MDP混合RL领域最紧的理论保证，表明在无需单策略集中性假设的情况下，混合RL确实可以超越纯离线/纯在线RL的下界。

Abstract: Hybrid Reinforcement Learning (RL), where an agent learns from both an offline dataset and online explorations in an unknown environment, has garnered significant recent interest. A crucial question posed by Xie et al. (2022) is whether hybrid RL can improve upon the existing lower bounds established in purely offline and purely online RL without relying on the single-policy concentrability assumption. While Li et al. (2023) provided an affirmative answer to this question in the tabular PAC RL case, the question remains unsettled for both the regret-minimizing RL case and the non-tabular case.
  In this work, building upon recent advancements in offline RL and reward-agnostic exploration, we develop computationally efficient algorithms for both PAC and regret-minimizing RL with linear function approximation, without single-policy concentrability. We demonstrate that these algorithms achieve sharper error or regret bounds that are no worse than, and can improve on, the optimal sample complexity in offline RL (the first algorithm, for PAC RL) and online RL (the second algorithm, for regret-minimizing RL) in linear Markov decision processes (MDPs), regardless of the quality of the behavior policy. To our knowledge, this work establishes the tightest theoretical guarantees currently available for hybrid RL in linear MDPs.

</details>


### [74] [Stochastic Gradient Descent for Two-layer Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.07670)
*Dinghao Cao,Zheng-Chu Guo,Lei Shi*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文研究了过参数化两层神经网络中随机梯度下降（SGD）算法的收敛速率，结合神经正切核（NTK）近似与再生核希尔伯特空间（RKHS）中的收敛分析，将神经元数量从指数依赖优化为多项式依赖，建立了SGD算法最后迭代的尖锐收敛界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 旨在深入理解过参数化两层神经网络中SGD的收敛行为，揭示核方法与优化过程之间的相互作用，并放宽对神经元数量的严格约束条件。

Method: 将神经正切核（NTK）近似与再生核希尔伯特空间（RKHS）中的收敛分析相结合，建立统一的收敛分析框架，研究SGD在过参数化两层神经网络中的优化动力学。

Result: 建立了SGD算法最后迭代的尖锐收敛速率；将神经元数量的依赖关系从指数级降低为多项式级（依赖于样本量或迭代次数）。

Conclusion: 该研究为神经网络模型在SGD训练下的理论理解提供了更深入的认识，并在神经网络的规模设计和灵活性方面取得了重要进展。

Abstract: This paper presents a comprehensive study on the convergence rates of the stochastic gradient descent (SGD) algorithm when applied to overparameterized two-layer neural networks. Our approach combines the Neural Tangent Kernel (NTK) approximation with convergence analysis in the Reproducing Kernel Hilbert Space (RKHS) generated by NTK, aiming to provide a deep understanding of the convergence behavior of SGD in overparameterized two-layer neural networks. Our research framework enables us to explore the intricate interplay between kernel methods and optimization processes, shedding light on the optimization dynamics and convergence properties of neural networks. In this study, we establish sharp convergence rates for the last iterate of the SGD algorithm in overparameterized two-layer neural networks. Additionally, we have made significant advancements in relaxing the constraints on the number of neurons, which have been reduced from exponential dependence to polynomial dependence on the sample size or number of iterations. This improvement allows for more flexibility in the design and scaling of neural networks, and will deepen our theoretical understanding of neural network models trained with SGD.

</details>


### [75] [Half-VAE: An Encoder-Free VAE to Bypass Explicit Inverse Mapping](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.04140)
*Yuan-Hao Wei,Yan-Jie Sun,Chen Zhang*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出Half-VAE方法，通过丢弃编码器、将潜变量设为可训练参数直接优化，无需显式逆映射即可解决独立成分分析（ICA）等逆问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索变分自编码器（VAE）在无需显式逆映射过程的情况下解决逆问题（如ICA）的可行性。

Method: 在VAE架构中丢弃编码器，将潜变量直接设为可训练参数，通过目标函数直接优化使其收敛到适当值，无需编码过程。

Result: 在适当的先验设定下，可训练参数表示的潜变量在收敛后能够表现出相互独立的特性，无需编码过程即可实现ICA。

Conclusion: Half-VAE方法证明了在不依赖显式逆映射过程的情况下，利用VAE解决ICA逆问题是可行的。

Abstract: Inference and inverse problems are closely related concepts, both fundamentally involving the deduction of unknown causes or parameters from observed data. Bayesian inference, a powerful class of methods, is often employed to solve a variety of problems, including those related to causal inference. Variational inference, a subset of Bayesian inference, is primarily used to efficiently approximate complex posterior distributions. Variational Autoencoders (VAEs), which combine variational inference with deep learning, have become widely applied across various domains. This study explores the potential of VAEs for solving inverse problems, such as Independent Component Analysis (ICA), without relying on an explicit inverse mapping process. Unlike other VAE-based ICA methods, this approach discards the encoder in the VAE architecture, directly setting the latent variables as trainable parameters. In other words, the latent variables are no longer outputs of the encoder but are instead optimized directly through the objective function to converge to appropriate values. We find that, with a suitable prior setup, the latent variables, represented by trainable parameters, can exhibit mutually independent properties as the parameters converge, all without the need for an encoding process. This approach, referred to as the Half-VAE, bypasses the inverse mapping process by eliminating the encoder. This study demonstrates the feasibility of using the Half-VAE to solve ICA without the need for an explicit inverse mapping process.

</details>


### [76] [Inference with the Upper Confidence Bound Algorithm](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.04595)
*Koulik Khamaru,Cun-Hui Zhang*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文研究了多臂老虎机中UCB算法的渐近行为及其稳定性，证明了UCB算法在固定臂数下具有稳定性（样本均值渐近正态），并在臂数K随拉动次数T增长时给出了稳定性条件（log K / log T → 0且近最优臂数较多）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 顺序收集数据给统计推断带来挑战，而UCB算法是否具有稳定性会影响后续推断任务的可行性。作者试图证明UCB算法满足某种稳定性条件，从而缓解顺序数据带来的推断困难。

Method: 借鉴Lai and Wei (1982)的稳定性概念，分别分析固定臂数K和臂数K随T增长的两种场景下UCB算法的渐近行为，推导样本均值的渐近正态性及稳定性条件。

Result: 1) 固定K时，UCB算法始终满足稳定性，各臂样本均值渐近正态；2) K随T增长时，当log K / log T → 0且近最优臂数足够多时，各臂保持稳定。

Conclusion: UCB算法具有良好的稳定性性质，这为在顺序决策数据上进行统计推断提供了理论基础，且该性质在高维臂场景下仍可在一定条件下保持。

Abstract: In this paper, we discuss the asymptotic behavior of the Upper Confidence Bound (UCB) algorithm in the context of multiarmed bandit problems and discuss its implication in downstream inferential tasks. While inferential tasks become challenging when data is collected in a sequential manner, we argue that this problem can be alleviated when the sequential algorithm at hand satisfies certain stability property. This notion of stability is motivated from the seminal work of Lai and Wei (1982). Our first main result shows that such a stability property is always satisfied for the UCB algorithm, and as a result the sample means for each arm are asymptotically normal. Next, we examine the stability properties of the UCB algorithm when the number of arms $K$ is allowed to grow with the number of arm pulls $T$. We show that in such a case the arms are stable when $\frac{\log K}{\log T} \rightarrow 0$, and the number of near-optimal arms are large.

</details>


### [77] [Density Estimation via Binless Multidimensional Integration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.08094)
*Matteo Carli,Alex Rodriguez,Alessandro Laio,Aldo Glielmo*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出了一种名为BMTI的非参数密度估计方法，通过计算邻接数据点间的对数密度差异并加权积分实现高维空间中的稳健密度估计，无需数据分箱或空间划分。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统非参数密度估计方法（如直方图、核密度估计）在高维空间中受限于维数灾难，且依赖分箱或空间划分，导致估计不稳定或效率低下。本文旨在开发一种无需分箱、数据高效且鲁棒的非参数密度估计算法。

Method: BMTI方法首先计算相邻数据点之间的对数密度差异，然后利用最大似然框架对这些差异进行加权积分，从而得到对数密度的估计。该方法借鉴了统计物理中的热力学积分思想，并将其推广到多维场景。BMTI利用流形假设，在数据内在流形上估计密度，无需显式坐标映射。通过自适应带宽选择的邻域图构建来替代传统的分箱或空间分割。

Result: 在多种复杂合成高维数据集上，BMTI优于传统密度估计方法；在化学物理领域的真实数据集上进行了基准测试，验证了其实用性。

Conclusion: BMTI是一种非参数、鲁棒且数据高效的密度估计方法，能够有效重构高维嵌入空间中的平滑密度剖面，克服了传统非参数估计器的局限性。

Abstract: We introduce the Binless Multidimensional Thermodynamic Integration (BMTI) method for nonparametric, robust, and data-efficient density estimation. BMTI estimates the logarithm of the density by initially computing log-density differences between neighbouring data points. Subsequently, such differences are integrated, weighted by their associated uncertainties, using a maximum-likelihood formulation. This procedure can be seen as an extension to a multidimensional setting of the thermodynamic integration, a technique developed in statistical physics. The method leverages the manifold hypothesis, estimating quantities within the intrinsic data manifold without defining an explicit coordinate map. It does not rely on any binning or space partitioning, but rather on the construction of a neighbourhood graph based on an adaptive bandwidth selection procedure. BMTI mitigates the limitations commonly associated with traditional nonparametric density estimators, effectively reconstructing smooth profiles even in high-dimensional embedding spaces. The method is tested on a variety of complex synthetic high-dimensional datasets, where it is shown to outperform traditional estimators, and is benchmarked on realistic datasets from the chemical physics literature.

</details>


### [78] [Benchmarking Estimators for Natural Experiments: A Novel Dataset and a Doubly Robust Algorithm](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.04500)
*R. Teal Witter,Christopher Musco*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文基于早期儿童识字非营利组织的自然实验数据，发现20多种既有估计器结果不一致。通过构建合成结果基准评估，发现双重稳健估计器性能显著优于其他方法，并推导了其方差闭式表达式，进而设计了基于新损失函数的改进估计器。研究团队开源了相关数据集和Python工具包。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 已有超过20种成熟的因果效应估计器在同一个自然实验数据集上产生不一致的结果，这暴露出当前评估方法在真实应用场景中的不可靠性，因此需要系统性地评估和比较不同估计器的性能。

Method: (1) 收集早期儿童识字非营利组织的真实自然实验数据；(2) 在领域专家指导下构建合成结果基准，系统变化样本量、处理相关性、倾向得分精度等条件；(3) 比较20多种估计器的表现；(4) 推导使用数据分割的双重稳健估计器的方差闭式表达式；(5) 基于方差分析设计新的损失函数来改进双重稳健估计器；(6) 开源模块化Python工具包。

Result: 基于回归调整的简单直观的双重稳健估计器在性能上比其他复杂估计器高出几个数量级。

Conclusion: 双重稳健估计器在实际自然实验数据分析中具有显著优势；通过方差闭式表达式的理论指导，可以进一步优化其性能；开源工具包有助于该领域的标准化评估和方法发展。

Abstract: Estimating the effect of treatments from natural experiments, where treatments are pre-assigned, is an important and well-studied problem. We introduce a novel natural experiment dataset obtained from an early childhood literacy nonprofit. Surprisingly, applying over 20 established estimators to the dataset produces inconsistent results in evaluating the nonprofit's efficacy. To address this, we create a benchmark to evaluate estimator accuracy using synthetic outcomes, whose design was guided by domain experts. The benchmark extensively explores performance as real world conditions like sample size, treatment correlation, and propensity score accuracy vary. Based on our benchmark, we observe that the class of doubly robust treatment effect estimators, which are based on simple and intuitive regression adjustment, generally outperform other more complicated estimators by orders of magnitude. To better support our theoretical understanding of doubly robust estimators, we derive a closed form expression for the variance of any such estimator that uses dataset splitting to obtain an unbiased estimate. This expression motivates the design of a new doubly robust estimator that uses a novel loss function when fitting functions for regression adjustment. We release the dataset and benchmark in a Python package; the package is built in a modular way to facilitate new datasets and estimators.

</details>


### [79] [A Density Ratio Super Learner](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.04796)
*Wencheng Wu,David Benkeser*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于超级学习的密度比集成估计器，使用新损失函数，并在因果推断的中介分析和纵向修正治疗策略两个模拟中展示了其性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 密度比估计在因果推断等多个统计领域有重要应用，但现有估计方法可能存在偏差或效率不足，因此需要更稳健的集成估计方法。

Method: 基于超级学习框架，提出了一种新的损失函数来构建密度比的集成估计器。

Result: 通过中介分析和纵向修正治疗策略两个因果推断模拟实验，验证了所提密度比超级学习器的经验性能。

Conclusion: 新损失函数适用于构建超级学习器，所提密度比集成估计器在因果推断的 nuisance 参数估计中表现良好。

Abstract: The estimation of the ratio of two density probability functions is of great interest in many statistics fields, including causal inference. In this study, we develop an ensemble estimator of density ratios with a novel loss function based on super learning. We show that this novel loss function is qualified for building super learners. Two simulations corresponding to mediation analysis and longitudinal modified treatment policy in causal inference, where density ratios are nuisance parameters, are conducted to show our density ratio super learner's performance empirically.

</details>


### [80] [Causal inference through multi-stage learning and doubly robust deep neural networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.08560)
*Yuqian Zhang,Jelena Bradic*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文研究深度神经网络在高维因果推断任务（如条件平均处理效应、动态处理效应）中的理论保证，提出将DNN以双重稳健方式集成到多阶段学习中，以减轻早期阶段估计误差的传播，并在维度p随样本量n增长的情境下提供了理论保障。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究缺乏对DNN在高维因果推断中（p随n增长）的理论保证，且多阶段学习中早期误差会传播到后续阶段，需要有效的误差控制方法。

Method: 构建顺序式DNN框架，后续阶段依赖前序阶段；采用双重稳健（doubly robust）集成方式将DNN融入多阶段学习，以缓解早期估计误差对后续阶段的影响。

Result: 在高维设定（p随n增长）下为DNN在因果推断任务中的有效性提供了理论保证；该结果同样适用于退化的单阶段学习问题。

Conclusion: 双重稳健的DNN方法能有效控制多阶段因果推断中的误差传播，且在维度扩张情形下仍具有理论保障，拓展了DNN在因果推断中的适用范围。

Abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have demonstrated remarkable empirical performance in large-scale supervised learning problems, particularly in scenarios where both the sample size $n$ and the dimension of covariates $p$ are large.
