This study delves into the application of DNNs across a wide spectrum of intricate causal inference tasks, where direct estimation falls short and necessitates multi-stage learning. Examples include estimating the conditional average treatment effect and dynamic treatment effect. In this framework, DNNs are constructed sequentially, with subsequent stages building upon preceding ones. To mitigate the impact of estimation errors from early stages on subsequent ones, we integrate DNNs in a doubly robust manner. In contrast to previous research, our study offers theoretical assurances regarding the effectiveness of DNNs in settings where the dimensionality $p$ expands with the sample size. These findings are significant independently and extend to degenerate single-stage learning problems.

</details>


### [81] [Sliding-Window Thompson Sampling for Non-Stationary Settings](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.05181)
*Marco Fiandri,Alberto Maria Metelli,Francesco Trovò*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文针对非平稳多臂老虎机（NS-MABs）中的汤普森采样（TS）算法提供了新颖的分析，修正并推广了现有工作。提出了基于滑动窗口的Beta-SWTS和γ-SWGTS两种算法，推导了适用于任意NS-MAB（伯努利或次高斯奖励）的统一遗憾上界，并引入了新的复杂度指标。在突变和渐变两种常见环境下，该结果与最新成果相当。最后通过仿真验证了算法性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有对NS-MAB中TS算法的分析存在不足或局限性，本文旨在填补这些空白，提供更一般化且正确的理论分析。

Method: 研究两种基于滑动窗口的TS算法（Beta-SWTS和γ-SWGTS），采用不同的先验分布，推导统一的累积频繁派遗憾上界，并引入新的复杂度指标来刻画学习问题的内在难度。

Result: 得到了适用于任意NS-MAB的通用遗憾上界；在突变环境和渐变环境中均达到与现有最优方法相当的理论结果；仿真实验验证了算法有效性。

Conclusion: 本文的分析不仅修正了现有工作，还提供了统一的框架，可适用于更广泛的非平稳MAB设置，具有理论上的普适性和实践中的竞争力。

Abstract: Non-stationary multi-armed bandits (NS-MABs) model sequential decision-making problems in which the expected rewards of a set of actions, a.k.a.~arms, evolve over time. In this paper, we fill a gap in the literature by providing a novel analysis of Thompson sampling-inspired (TS) algorithms for NS-MABs that both corrects and generalizes existing work. Specifically, we study the cumulative frequentist regret of two algorithms based on sliding-window TS approaches with different priors, namely $\textit{Beta-SWTS}$ and $\textit{$γ$-SWGTS}$. We derive a unifying regret upper bound for these algorithms that applies to any arbitrary NS-MAB (with either Bernoulli or subgaussian rewards). Our result introduces new indices that capture the inherent sources of complexity in the learning problem. Then, we specialize our general result to two of the most common NS-MAB settings: the $\textit{abruptly changing}$ and the $\textit{smoothly changing}$ environments, showing that it matches state-of-the-art results. Finally, we evaluate the performance of the analyzed algorithms in simulated environments and compare them with state-of-the-art approaches for NS-MABs.

</details>


### [82] [A Pipeline for Data-Driven Learning of Topological Features with Applications to Protein Stability Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.04847)
*Amish Mishra,Francis Motta*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出一种数据驱动方法，利用可解释的拓扑特征预测小型合成蛋白的稳定性，仅用拓扑特征即可达到专家特征模型92%-99%的性能，且两者结合可进一步提升预测效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有蛋白质稳定性预测依赖大量由领域专家设计的生物物理特征，这些特征构建成本高且可能遗漏重要信息；而拓扑特征作为自动学习到的结构性表示，有望以更简洁的方式捕捉蛋白质稳定性相关的关键信息。

Method: 采用数据驱动方法自动学习生物分子数据的可解释拓扑特征，训练简约模型用于合成小型蛋白稳定性预测；与基于大量专家设计的生物物理特征的模型进行对比，并分析特征重要性及拓扑特征与专家特征之间的相关性。

Result: 仅基于拓扑特征的模型在平均精度上达到了专家特征模型92%-99%的性能；拓扑特征与专家特征之间存在高度相关性；将两类特征结合使用可进一步提升模型性能，表明拓扑特征提供了专家特征未捕获的补充判别信息。

Conclusion: 拓扑特征能够以更简练的方式有效预测蛋白质稳定性，且能提供专家特征中不存在的互补信息，展示了拓扑数据分析在生物分子建模中的潜力。

Abstract: In this paper, we propose a data-driven method to learn interpretable topological features of biomolecular data and demonstrate the efficacy of parsimonious models trained on topological features in predicting the stability of synthetic mini proteins. We compare models that leverage automatically-learned structural features against models trained on a large set of biophysical features determined by subject-matter experts (SME). Our models, based only on topological features of the protein structures, achieved 92%-99% of the performance of SME-based models in terms of the average precision score. By interrogating model performance and feature importance metrics, we extract numerous insights that uncover high correlations between topological features and SME features. We further showcase how combining topological features and SME features can lead to improved model performance over either feature set used in isolation, suggesting that, in some settings, topological features may provide new discriminating information not captured in existing SME features that are useful for protein stability prediction.

</details>


### [83] [Adaptive Smooth Non-Stationary Bandits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.08654)
*Joe Suk*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文针对奖励随时间平滑变化的非平稳多臂赌博机模型，首次建立了对所有Hölder参数(β,λ)通用的极小极大动态遗憾界，并实现了自适应最优算法；同时研究了基于安全臂的间隙相关遗憾率，证明了在非平稳环境中可实现比√T更快的速度，并给出了简洁的刻画。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 非平稳多臂赌博机中奖励随时间平滑变化（由Hölder类刻画），但已有工作仅针对β≤1和β=2等特殊情形给出了上界，缺乏统一的极小极大最优分析。同时，非平稳环境下间隙相关遗憾率通常被认为不可能实现，但安全臂的存在可能改变这一局面。

Method: 在Hölder光滑性假设下，利用Hölder指数β和系数λ刻画奖励变化，推导极小极大动态遗憾的通用下界，并设计自适应算法（无需知晓β,λ）达到该下界；针对间隙相关遗憾，引入安全臂概念，证明在光滑Hölder模型下安全臂可带来比对数遗憾更快的乐观非平稳速度。

Result: 1) 首次建立了对所有K,β,λ统一的极小极大动态遗憾界；2) 设计了无需参数知识的自适应算法达到该最优界；3) 证明了安全臂环境下可实现比√T更快的间隙相关遗憾率，且该速度紧确；4) 给出了安全臂在光滑Hölder模型下能否实现快速遗憾的简洁刻画。

Conclusion: 本文解决了非平稳赌博机中Hölder平滑奖励模型的开放问题，统一并推广了此前分散的结论；同时揭示了安全臂在非平稳环境中实现乐观间隙相关速率的潜力，挑战了传统对数遗憾在非平稳设定下的最优性认知。

Abstract: We study a $K$-armed non-stationary bandit model where rewards change smoothly, as captured by Hölder class assumptions on rewards as functions of time. Such smooth changes are parametrized by a Hölder exponent $β$ and coefficient $λ$. While various sub-cases of this general model have been studied in isolation, we first establish the minimax dynamic regret rate generally for all $K,β,λ$. Next, we show this optimal dynamic regret can be attained adaptively, without knowledge of $β,λ$. To contrast, even with parameter knowledge, upper bounds were only previously known for limited regimes $β\leq 1$ and $β=2$ (Slivkins, 2014; Krishnamurthy and Gopalan, 2021; Manegueu et al., 2021; Jia et al.,2023). Thus, our work resolves open questions raised by these disparate threads of the literature.
  We also study the problem of attaining faster gap-dependent regret rates in non-stationary bandits. While such rates are long known to be impossible in general (Garivier and Moulines, 2011), we show that environments admitting a safe arm (Suk and Kpotufe, 2022) allow for much faster rates than the worst-case scaling with $\sqrt{T}$. While previous works in this direction focused on attaining the usual logarithmic regret bounds, as summed over stationary periods, our new gap-dependent rates reveal new optimistic regimes of non-stationarity where even the logarithmic bounds are pessimistic. We show our new gap-dependent rate is tight and that its achievability (i.e., as made possible by a safe arm) has a surprisingly simple and clean characterization within the smooth Hölder class model.

</details>


### [84] [Empowering Bayesian Neural Networks with Functional Priors through Anchored Ensembling for Mechanics Surrogate Modeling Applications](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.05234)
*Javad Ghorbanian,Nicholas Casaprima,Audrey Olivier*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于锚定集成（anchored ensembling）的贝叶斯神经网络（BNN）训练方案，能够在函数空间中整合先验信息（如低保真度模型），并通过学习神经网络参数之间的低秩相关性来弥合函数空间与参数空间先验之间的差距。该方法在多输入多输出材料代理建模任务中展示了良好的准确性和不确定性量化能力，尤其适用于分布外数据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统神经网络是确定性函数，仅依赖数据学习输入-输出映射，无法量化因训练数据不足引起的认知不确定性，也难以整合先验知识。贝叶斯神经网络虽然能解决这些问题，但参数空间的高维度、非物理性以及参数与输出之间的复杂关系使得先验设计和后验推断都极具挑战性。

Method: 提出一种基于锚定集成（anchored ensembling）的BNN训练方案，通过从函数先验的实现中预训练来学习神经网络参数间的低秩相关性，从而实现函数空间先验信息（如低保真度模型）的有效整合。

Result: 在一维小示例中验证了算法在插值和外推场景下的行为；在多输入多输出材料代理建模任务中，该算法在准确性和不确定性估计质量上均表现出色，对分布内和分布外数据均有效。

Conclusion: 神经网络权重之间的相关性对于在函数空间和参数空间先验之间传递知识至关重要，而现有BNN实现中常常忽视这一点；提出的锚定集成方案能有效解决该问题。

Abstract: In recent years, neural networks (NNs) have become increasingly popular for surrogate modeling tasks in mechanics and materials modeling applications. While traditional NNs are deterministic functions that rely solely on data to learn the input--output mapping, casting NN training within a Bayesian framework allows to quantify uncertainties, in particular epistemic uncertainties that arise from lack of training data, and to integrate a priori knowledge via the Bayesian prior. However, the high dimensionality and non-physicality of the NN parameter space, and the complex relationship between parameters (NN weights) and predicted outputs, renders both prior design and posterior inference challenging. In this work we present a novel BNN training scheme based on anchored ensembling that can integrate a priori information available in the function space, from e.g. low-fidelity models. The anchoring scheme makes use of low-rank correlations between NN parameters, learnt from pre-training to realizations of the functional prior. We also perform a study to demonstrate how correlations between NN weights, which are often neglected in existing BNN implementations, is critical to appropriately transfer knowledge between the function-space and parameter-space priors. Performance of our novel BNN algorithm is first studied on a small 1D example to illustrate the algorithm's behavior in both interpolation and extrapolation settings. Then, a thorough assessment is performed on a multi--input--output materials surrogate modeling example, where we demonstrate the algorithm's capabilities both in terms of accuracy and quality of the uncertainty estimation, for both in-distribution and out-of-distribution data.

</details>


### [85] [Causal Discovery of Linear Non-Gaussian Causal Models with Unobserved Confounding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.04907)
*Daniela Schkoda,Elina Robeva,Mathias Drton*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 针对含潜变量混淆的线性非高斯结构方程模型，提出一种基于递归消除和高阶累积量秩条件的因果效应识别算法，无需预知潜变量数量且避免过完备ICA的局部最优问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法依赖过完备独立成分分析（ICA），存在收敛于局部最优的问题，且需要预先知道潜变量数量，这在实际中往往难以满足。

Method: 提出递归算法：先推断一个源变量，估计该源及其潜父变量对后代变量的效应，然后从数据中消除其影响；源识别和效应估计均基于高阶累积量矩阵的秩条件。

Result: 在局部潜变量数不超过观测变量数的温和假设下证明了渐近正确性；仿真实验表明，尽管无需预知潜变量数，方法性能与过完备ICA相当。

Conclusion: 该递归方法有效克服了过完备ICA的局限性，在更宽松的假设下实现可比的因果效应识别性能。

Abstract: We consider linear non-Gaussian structural equation models that involve latent confounding. In this setting, the causal structure is identifiable, but, in general, it is not possible to identify the specific causal effects. Instead, a finite number of different causal effects result in the same observational distribution. Most existing algorithms for identifying these causal effects use overcomplete independent component analysis (ICA), which often suffers from convergence to local optima. Furthermore, the number of latent variables must be known a priori. To address these issues, we propose an algorithm that operates recursively rather than using overcomplete ICA. The algorithm first infers a source, estimates the effect of the source and its latent parents on their descendants, and then eliminates their influence from the data. For both source identification and effect size estimation, we use rank conditions on matrices formed from higher-order cumulants. We prove asymptotic correctness under the mild assumption that locally, the number of latent variables never exceeds the number of observed variables. Simulation studies demonstrate that our method achieves comparable performance to overcomplete ICA even though it does not know the number of latents in advance.

</details>


### [86] [Modeling Spatial Extremal Dependence of Precipitation Using Distributional Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.08668)
*Christopher Bülte,Lisa Leimenstoll,Melanie Schienle*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于生成神经网络的模拟估计方法，用于确定时间与空间上降水极大值的依赖关系及其不确定性。在最大稳定过程框架下，该方法能估计过程参数、不确定性，并通过成对极值系数函数提供空间依赖的非参数估计。在2021-2023年德国西部的月降雨极大值研究中验证了有效性，特别涵盖了2021年7月的极端降水和洪水事件。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统闭式似然估计在复杂时空依赖的极端降水建模中变得难以处理，需要一种更灵活、可扩展的估计方法来捕捉降水极大值的依赖结构及其不确定性。

Method: 利用生成神经网络进行基于模拟的估计，在最大稳定过程的框架下，同时估计过程参数、不确定性，并通过成对极值系数函数给出空间依赖的非参数估计。

Result: 在有限样本研究中获得了良好的性能，在传统闭式似然估计难以处理的复杂场景下表现稳健；成功应用于2021-2023年德国西部月降雨极大值的实际数据分析。

Conclusion: 所提出的基于生成神经网络的模拟估计方法能有效处理复杂时空依赖下的极端降水建模，不仅适用于当前设定，其核心生成思想还具有更广泛的应用潜力。

Abstract: In this work, we propose a simulation-based estimation approach using generative neural networks to determine dependencies of precipitation maxima and their underlying uncertainty in time and space. Within the common framework of max-stable processes for extremes under temporal and spatial dependence, our methodology allows estimating the process parameters and their respective uncertainty, but also delivers an explicit nonparametric estimate of the spatial dependence through the pairwise extremal coefficient function. We illustrate the effectiveness and robustness of our approach in a thorough finite sample study where we obtain good performance in complex settings for which closed-form likelihood estimation becomes intractable. We use the technique for studying monthly rainfall maxima in Western Germany for the period 2021-2023, which is of particular interest since it contains an extreme precipitation and consecutive flooding event in July 2021 that had a massive deadly impact. Beyond the considered setting, the presented methodology and its main generative ideas also have great potential for other applications.

</details>


### [87] [Robust Non-adaptive Group Testing under Errors in Group Membership Specifications](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.05345)
*Shuvayan Banerjee,Radhendushka Srivastava,James Saunderson,Ajit Rajwade*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为DRLT的群测试新方法，能够在群成员指定存在错误的情况下，通过去偏Lasso估计和假设检验，准确识别缺陷样本和错误指定的群组。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的群测试方法假设群成员关系准确无误，但在实际应用中，由于资源限制等因素，群成员指定错误（如技术员混合错误样本）时有发生，导致传统方法失效。

Method: 提出DRLT方法，基于对Lasso估计量进行去偏处理以降低固有偏差，并结合两个精心设计的假设检验：一个用于在群成员错误下识别缺陷样本，另一个用于识别群成员指定错误的群组。

Result: 提供了重构误差的理论上界，并通过数值实验表明DRLT在识别缺陷样本和错误指定群组方面优于多种基线和鲁棒回归方法。

Conclusion: DRLT方法将统计估计量（如LASSO）的偏差缓解文献扩展到了测量值包含异常值（如群成员指定错误）的重要场景。

Abstract: Given $p$ samples, each of which may or may not be defective, group testing (GT) aims to determine their defect status by performing tests on $n < p$ `groups', where a group is formed by mixing a subset of the $p$ samples. Assuming that the number of defective samples is very small compared to $p$, GT algorithms have provided excellent recovery of the status of all $p$ samples with even a small number of groups. Most existing methods, however, assume that the group memberships are accurately specified. This assumption may not always be true in all applications, due to various resource constraints. Such errors could occur, eg, when a technician, preparing the groups in a laboratory, unknowingly mixes together an incorrect subset of samples as compared to what was specified. We develop a new GT method, the Debiased Robust Lasso Test Method (DRLT), that handles such group membership specification errors. The proposed DRLT method is based on an approach to debias, or reduce the inherent bias in, estimates produced by Lasso, a popular and effective sparse regression technique. We also provide theoretical upper bounds on the reconstruction error produced by our estimator. Our approach is then combined with two carefully designed hypothesis tests respectively for (i) the identification of defective samples in the presence of errors in group membership specifications, and (ii) the identification of groups with erroneous membership specifications. The DRLT approach extends the literature on bias mitigation of statistical estimators such as the LASSO, to handle the important case when some of the measurements contain outliers, due to factors such as group membership specification errors. We present numerical results which show that our approach outperforms several baselines and robust regression techniques for identification of defective samples as well as erroneously specified groups.

</details>


### [88] [Variational Bayesian Phylogenetic Inference with Semi-implicit Branch Length Distributions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.05058)
*Tianyu Xie,Frederick A. Matsen,Marc A. Suchard,Cheng Zhang*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出基于半隐式分层分布和图神经网络的变分贝叶斯系统发育推断方法，设计了适用于非欧几里得分支长度空间的置换等变变分后验，并通过多种下界优化策略在基准数据上取得了优于基线的表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有变分贝叶斯系统发育推断（VBPI）中默认的对角对数正态分布难以充分刻画分支长度的真实后验复杂性，亟需更灵活的变分后验族以提升近似精度。

Method: 采用半隐式分层分布结合图神经网络构建分支长度的变分后验，利用半隐式构造天然具备置换等变性以处理不同树拓扑下的非欧几里得空间；针对不可解的边际似然，推导多种替代下界以支持随机优化。

Result: 在基准数据集上，所提方法在边际似然估计和分支长度后验近似两项指标上均优于基线方法。

Conclusion: 半隐式变分后验结合图神经网络能更灵活地捕捉复杂后验结构，为大规模系统发育推断提供了一种高效且准确的替代方案。

Abstract: Reconstructing the evolutionary history relating a collection of molecular sequences is the main subject of modern Bayesian phylogenetic inference. However, the commonly used Markov chain Monte Carlo methods can be inefficient due to the complicated space of phylogenetic trees, especially when the number of sequences is large. An alternative approach is variational Bayesian phylogenetic inference (VBPI) which transforms the inference problem into an optimization problem. While effective, the default diagonal lognormal approximation for the branch lengths of the tree used in VBPI is often insufficient to capture the complexity of the exact posterior. In this work, we propose a more flexible family of branch length variational posteriors based on semi-implicit hierarchical distributions using graph neural networks. We show that this semi-implicit construction emits straightforward permutation equivariant distributions, and therefore can handle the non-Euclidean branch length space across different tree topologies with ease. To deal with the intractable marginal probability of semi-implicit variational distributions, we develop several alternative lower bounds for stochastic optimization. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method over baseline methods on benchmark data examples, in terms of both marginal likelihood estimation and branch length posterior approximation.

</details>


### [89] [Computational-Statistical Trade-off in Kernel Two-Sample Testing with Random Fourier Features](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.08976)
*Ikjun Choi,Ilmun Kim*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文研究了基于随机傅里叶特征的近似MMD检验，发现通过精心选择随机特征数量，可以在亚二次时间内达到与原始MMD检验相同的极小化最优分离速率，解决了MMD检验计算复杂性与统计功效之间的权衡问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: MMD检验虽在高维复杂数据的两样本检验中表现出色，但其二次时间复杂度限制了大规模应用。现有加速方法未能明确是否能在亚二次时间内保持与MMD检验相同的功效保证，本文旨在填补这一理论空白。

Method: 首先揭示近似MMD检验仅在随机特征数量趋于无穷时点态一致有效；然后基于极小化最优检验框架，研究时间-功效权衡，在不同分布假设（如Sobolev球中的密度）下分析如何选择随机特征数量以达到最优分离速率。

Result: 通过精心选择随机特征数量，近似MMD检验能够在亚二次时间内达到与原始MMD检验相同的极小化最优分离速率，该结论在多种分布假设下均成立，并通过仿真研究验证。

Conclusion: 近似MMD检验通过合理配置随机特征数量，可以在亚二次时间复杂度下实现与原始MMD检验相当的统计功效，为大规模两样本检验提供了理论和实践上的可行方案。

Abstract: Recent years have seen a surge in methods for two-sample testing, among which the Maximum Mean Discrepancy (MMD) test has emerged as an effective tool for handling complex and high-dimensional data. Despite its success and widespread adoption, the primary limitation of the MMD test has been its quadratic-time complexity, which poses challenges for large-scale analysis. While various approaches have been proposed to expedite the procedure, it has been unclear whether it is possible to attain the same power guarantee as the MMD test at sub-quadratic time cost. To fill this gap, we revisit the approximated MMD test using random Fourier features, and investigate its computational-statistical trade-off. We start by revealing that the approximated MMD test is pointwise consistent in power only when the number of random features approaches infinity. We then consider the uniform power of the test and study the time-power trade-off under the minimax testing framework. Our result shows that, by carefully choosing the number of random features, it is possible to attain the same minimax separation rates as the MMD test within sub-quadratic time. We demonstrate this point under different distributional assumptions such as densities in a Sobolev ball. Our theoretical findings are corroborated by simulation studies.

</details>


### [90] [Approximation Bounds for Recurrent Neural Networks with Application to Regression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.05577)
*Yuling Jiao,Yang Wang,Bokai Yan*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文研究了深度ReLU循环神经网络（RNN）的逼近能力，并探索了使用RNN进行非参数最小二乘回归的收敛性质。推导了RNN对Hölder光滑函数的逼近误差上界，并将逼近结果应用于回归问题，得到了在指数β-混合和i.i.d.数据假设下均达到极小化最优速率的预测误差非渐近上界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为深度ReLU RNN的逼近能力和统计学习性能提供理论保证，推导非渐近误差界并达到极小化最优速率。

Method: 通过构造特殊的RNN结构，证明其输出在每个时间步能够逼近仅依赖过去和当前信息的Hölder光滑函数（称为过去依赖函数），从而同时逼近一序列此类函数；进而将逼近结果应用于经验风险最小化器，推导预测误差的非渐近上界。

Result: 得到了RNN对Hölder光滑函数的逼近误差上界；在指数β-混合和i.i.d.数据假设下，回归问题的预测误差均达到了极小化最优速率，优于现有结果。

Conclusion: 为RNN的性能提供了统计保证，证明了其在非参数回归中能够达到最优收敛速率。

Abstract: We study the approximation capacity of deep ReLU recurrent neural networks (RNNs) and explore the convergence properties of nonparametric least squares regression using RNNs. We derive upper bounds on the approximation error of RNNs for Hölder smooth functions, in the sense that the output at each time step of an RNN can approximate a Hölder function that depends only on past and current information, termed a past-dependent function. This allows a carefully constructed RNN to simultaneously approximate a sequence of past-dependent Hölder functions. We apply these approximation results to derive non-asymptotic upper bounds for the prediction error of the empirical risk minimizer in regression problem. Our error bounds achieve minimax optimal rate under both exponentially $β$-mixing and i.i.d. data assumptions, improving upon existing ones. Our results provide statistical guarantees on the performance of RNNs.

</details>


### [91] [fastkqr: A Fast Algorithm for Kernel Quantile Regression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.05393)
*Qian Tang,Yuwen Gu,Boxiang Wang*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出fastkqr算法，通过有限平滑和谱技术加速核空间分位数回归，在保持精度的同时实现一个数量级的提速，并扩展了带交叉惩罚的灵活核分位数回归。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 分位数回归虽强大，但非光滑分位数损失函数导致计算负担重，限制了其广泛应用。

Method: 提出fastkqr算法，核心是有限平滑算法（精确产生回归分位数而非近似解），并配备新颖的谱技术以重利用矩阵计算，加速算法运行。

Result: fastkqr匹配最先进算法的精度，但运行速度快一个数量级。

Conclusion: fastkqr通过平滑算法和谱技术显著加速了核空间分位数回归计算，并扩展了带交叉惩罚的灵活模型，具有实际应用价值。

Abstract: Quantile regression is a powerful tool for robust and heterogeneous learning that has seen applications in a diverse range of applied areas. However, its broader application is often hindered by the substantial computational demands arising from the non-smooth quantile loss function. In this paper, we introduce a novel algorithm named fastkqr, which significantly advances the computation of quantile regression in reproducing kernel Hilbert spaces. The core of fastkqr is a finite smoothing algorithm that magically produces exact regression quantiles, rather than approximations. To further accelerate the algorithm, we equip fastkqr with a novel spectral technique that carefully reutilizes matrix computations. In addition, we extend fastkqr to accommodate a flexible kernel quantile regression with a data-driven crossing penalty, addressing the interpretability challenges of crossing quantile curves at multiple levels. We have implemented fastkqr in a publicly available R package. Extensive simulations and real applications show that fastkqr matches the accuracy of state-of-the-art algorithms but can operate up to an order of magnitude faster.

</details>


### [92] [Meta-Analysis with Untrusted Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.09387)
*Shiva Kaul,Geoffrey J. Gordon*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于共形预测的元分析新方法，通过引入不可信数据（如大型观察数据库）和处理试验异质性，在保证严谨性的前提下显著提升了因果效应估计的精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统元分析仅依赖少量可信数据（如随机对照试验），导致估计精度有限；同时难以处理试验间的异质性。本文旨在通过整合不可信数据并构建更丰富的模型来更精确地回答因果问题。

Method: 基于共形预测框架，提出了一种完全共形核岭回归的高效版本。核心创新包括：(1) 引入idiocentricity条件解决间接观测问题；(2) 在残差中加入噪声校正项；(3) 采用"方差削减"技术处理噪声交互。

Result: 在多个医疗健康数据集上的实验表明，该方法相比传统元分析方法能够生成更紧凑、更可靠的预测区间。

Conclusion: 为元分析和循证医学开辟了新方向，通过接纳异质性和不可信数据实现更精细、更准确的预测。

Abstract: [See paper for full abstract] Meta-analysis is a crucial tool for answering scientific questions. It is usually conducted on a relatively small amount of ``trusted'' data -- ideally from randomized, controlled trials -- which allow causal effects to be reliably estimated with minimal assumptions. We show how to answer causal questions much more precisely by making two changes. First, we incorporate untrusted data drawn from large observational databases, related scientific literature and practical experience -- without sacrificing rigor or introducing strong assumptions. Second, we train richer models capable of handling heterogeneous trials, addressing a long-standing challenge in meta-analysis. Our approach is based on conformal prediction, which fundamentally produces rigorous prediction intervals, but doesn't handle indirect observations: in meta-analysis, we observe only noisy effects due to the limited number of participants in each trial. To handle noise, we develop a simple, efficient version of fully-conformal kernel ridge regression, based on a novel condition called idiocentricity. We introduce noise-correcting terms in the residuals and analyze their interaction with a ``variance shaving'' technique. In multiple experiments on healthcare datasets, our algorithms deliver tighter, sounder intervals than traditional ones. This paper charts a new course for meta-analysis and evidence-based medicine, where heterogeneity and untrusted data are embraced for more nuanced and precise predictions.

</details>


### [93] [Optimal Projections for Classification with Naive Bayes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.05635)
*David P. Hofmeyr,Francois Kamper,Michail C. Melonas*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于投影寻踪的优化朴素贝叶斯（OPNB）方法，通过寻找最优线性投影方向来替代传统坐标基分解，以增强朴素贝叶斯分类器的判别能力。在162个公开基准数据集上的实验表明，该方法显著优于其他概率判别分析模型，且与支持向量机（SVM）性能相当。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统朴素贝叶斯模型将类条件密度分解为沿坐标基方向边缘密度的乘积，这种分解方式忽略了特征之间的依赖关系，限制了分类模型的判别能力。本文旨在寻找一个更优的基方向进行分解，以提升分类性能。

Method: 将问题形式化为投影寻踪任务，寻找最优线性投影方向使得投影后的数据在朴素贝叶斯因子化下的多项似然最大。该方法同时具备降维和可视化的优势，并与类条件独立成分分析存在直观联系。

Result: 在162个公开基准数据集上的实验表明，所提出的OPNB方法显著优于其他流行的概率判别分析模型，且与支持向量机（SVM）具有高度竞争力。

Conclusion: 优化投影方向的朴素贝叶斯模型能够有效提升分类性能，结合了概率建模的可解释性与投影寻踪的降维可视化优势，是一种实用的分类方法。相关R包已开源。

Abstract: In the Naive Bayes classification model the class conditional densities are estimated as the products of their marginal densities along the cardinal basis directions. We study the problem of obtaining an alternative basis for this factorisation with the objective of enhancing the discriminatory power of the associated classification model. We formulate the problem as a projection pursuit to find the optimal linear projection on which to perform classification. Optimality is determined based on the multinomial likelihood within which probabilities are estimated using the Naive Bayes factorisation of the projected data. Projection pursuit offers the added benefits of dimension reduction and visualisation. We discuss an intuitive connection with class conditional independent components analysis, and show how this is realised visually in practical applications. The performance of the resulting classification models is investigated using a large collection of (162) publicly available benchmark data sets and in comparison with relevant alternatives. We find that the proposed approach substantially outperforms other popular probabilistic discriminant analysis models and is highly competitive with Support Vector Machines.
  Code to implement the proposed approach, in the form of an R package, is available from https://github.com/DavidHofmeyr/OPNB

</details>


### [94] [S-SIRUS: an explainability algorithm for spatial regression Random Forest](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.05537)
*Luca Patelli,Natalia Golini,Rosaria Ignaccolo,Michela Cameletti*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出S-SIRUS方法，将SIRUS扩展到空间相关数据场景，通过提取简洁规则集来解释回归随机森林模型。模拟实验表明，在空间相关数据上，S-SIRUS相比SIRUS具有更高的测试预测精度，且空间相关性越强，生成的规则列表越短，可解释性越好。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随机森林(RF)虽广泛应用但不可解释，现有解释方法未考虑空间相关数据场景，而许多应用领域（如地理、环境科学）的数据具有空间依赖性。因此需要一种能在空间相关数据下解释RF的方法。

Method: 提出S-SIRUS（Spatial SIRUS），将SIRUS算法扩展到空间相关数据场景，通过提取紧凑且简单的规则列表来解释回归随机森林。通过模拟实验设置不同水平的空间依赖性，对比S-SIRUS与SIRUS的可解释性和预测性能。

Result: 在空间相关数据上，S-SIRUS比SIRUS具有更高的测试预测精度；空间相关性越强，S-SIRUS生成的规则列表越短，从而更易于解释预测机制。

Conclusion: S-SIRUS有效解决了空间相关数据下随机森林的可解释性问题，在保持高预测精度的同时提供更简洁的规则集，对涉及空间数据的应用领域具有重要价值。

Abstract: Random Forest (RF) is a widely used machine learning algorithm known for its flexibility, user-friendliness, and high predictive performance across various domains. However, it is non-interpretable. This can limit its usefulness in applied sciences, where understanding the relationships between predictors and response variable is crucial from a decision-making perspective. In the literature, several methods have been proposed to explain RF, but none of them addresses the challenge of explaining RF in the context of spatially dependent data. Therefore, this work aims to explain regression RF in the case of spatially dependent data by extracting a compact and simple list of rules. In this respect, we propose S-SIRUS, a spatial extension of SIRUS, the latter being a well-established regression rule algorithm able to extract a stable and short list of rules from the classical regression RF algorithm. A simulation study was conducted to evaluate the explainability capability of the proposed S-SIRUS, in comparison to SIRUS, by considering different levels of spatial dependence among the data. The results suggest that S-SIRUS exhibits a higher test predictive accuracy than SIRUS when spatial correlation is present. Moreover, for higher levels of spatial correlation, S-SIRUS produces a shorter list of rules, easing the explanation of the mechanism behind the predictions.

</details>


### [95] [Towards Understanding Epoch-wise Double descent in Two-layer Linear Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.09845)
*Amanda Olmin,Fredrik Lindsten*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文研究两层线性神经网络中的逐轮双下降现象，推导了连接标准线性回归与对角网络的梯度流，发现除了输入方差外，输入-输出协方差矩阵的奇异值也是影响双下降的重要因素。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理解逐轮双下降的机制对于掌握机器学习模型的泛化行为及早停法等模型选择策略至关重要。现有理论结果多基于简单线性回归模型，缺乏对更复杂模型（如深度神经网络）的理论分析。

Method: 首先推导了两层线性神经网络的梯度流，该梯度流桥接了标准线性回归模型与线性两层对角网络（带二次权重）的学习动态；然后通过推导泛化误差遵循双下降模式的必要条件，识别了由额外模型层带来的逐轮双下降的新因素。

Result: 在线性回归中，逐轮双下降归因于输入方差的差异；而在两层线性模型中，输入-输出协方差矩阵的奇异值也起着重要作用，这是由额外模型层引入的新因素。

Conclusion: 两层线性神经网络中存在比线性回归更丰富的逐轮双下降机制，输入-输出协方差矩阵的奇异值是关键影响因素，这为进一步研究深度模型中的双下降现象打开了新的问题空间。

Abstract: Epoch-wise double descent is the phenomenon where generalisation performance improves beyond the point of overfitting, resulting in a generalisation curve exhibiting two descents under the course of learning. Understanding the mechanisms driving this behaviour is crucial not only for understanding the generalisation behaviour of machine learning models in general, but also for employing conventional selection methods, such as the use of early stopping to mitigate overfitting. While we ultimately want to draw conclusions of more complex models, such as deep neural networks, a majority of theoretical results regarding the underlying cause of epoch-wise double descent are based on simple models, such as standard linear regression. In this paper, to take a step towards more complex models in theoretical analysis, we study epoch-wise double descent in two-layer linear neural networks. First, we derive a gradient flow for the linear two-layer model, that bridges the learning dynamics of the standard linear regression model, and the linear two-layer diagonal network with quadratic weights. Second, we identify additional factors of epoch-wise double descent emerging with the extra model layer, by deriving necessary conditions for the generalisation error to follow a double descent pattern. While epoch-wise double descent in linear regression has been attributed to differences in input variance, in the two-layer model, also the singular values of the input-output covariance matrix play an important role. This opens up for further questions regarding unidentified factors of epoch-wise double descent for truly deep models.

</details>


### [96] [LLMs Will Always Hallucinate, and We Need to Live With This](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.05746)
*Sourav Banerjee,Ayushi Agarwal,Saloni Singla*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文论证了大语言模型中的幻觉问题并非偶然错误，而是这些系统固有的数学与逻辑必然特征，无法通过架构改进、数据增强或事实核查等手段完全消除，并提出了"结构性幻觉"的概念。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着大语言模型在各领域的广泛应用，迫切需要批判性地审视其固有局限性。当前研究普遍认为幻觉是可缓解的问题，本文旨在从数学和计算理论层面证明幻觉的不可消除性，挑战主流认知。

Method: 基于计算理论和哥德尔第一不完备定理，通过图灵机的停机问题、空性问题和接受问题等不可判定性问题，从训练数据收集、事实检索、意图分类到文本生成的每个阶段，证明幻觉产生的非零概率必然性。

Result: 论证了LLM的每个处理阶段都存在非零概率的幻觉输出，证明了幻觉是大语言模型系统的结构性特征而非偶然缺陷，建立了幻觉的数学确定性。

Conclusion: 幻觉是大语言模型不可消除的固有属性，挑战了"幻觉可被完全缓解"的主流观点，提出了"结构性幻觉"这一概念来刻画其内在本质。

Abstract: As Large Language Models become more ubiquitous across domains, it becomes important to examine their inherent limitations critically. This work argues that hallucinations in language models are not just occasional errors but an inevitable feature of these systems. We demonstrate that hallucinations stem from the fundamental mathematical and logical structure of LLMs. It is, therefore, impossible to eliminate them through architectural improvements, dataset enhancements, or fact-checking mechanisms. Our analysis draws on computational theory and Godel's First Incompleteness Theorem, which references the undecidability of problems like the Halting, Emptiness, and Acceptance Problems. We demonstrate that every stage of the LLM process-from training data compilation to fact retrieval, intent classification, and text generation-will have a non-zero probability of producing hallucinations. This work introduces the concept of Structural Hallucination as an intrinsic nature of these systems. By establishing the mathematical certainty of hallucinations, we challenge the prevailing notion that they can be fully mitigated.

</details>


### [97] [Divide-and-Conquer Predictive Coding: a structured Bayesian inference algorithm](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.05834)
*Eli Sennesh,Hao Wu,Tommaso Salvatori*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为分治预测编码（DCPC）的结构化生成模型新算法，该算法在保持生物合理性的同时，尊重生成模型的相关性结构并可证明执行模型参数的极大似然更新，在多个高维结构化推理问题上优于现有算法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 预测编码理论虽然能解释大脑中的意外刺激信号（如错误/惊喜信号），但其算法在机器学习的高维结构化推理任务中表现不如其他变分方法，因此需要提出一种性能更优且保持生物合理性的预测编码算法。

Method: 提出分治预测编码（DCPC）算法。该方法区别于传统预测编码公式，通过尊重生成模型的相关性结构，可证明执行模型参数的极大似然更新，同时保持生物合理性。

Result: DCPC在数值性能上优于竞争算法，能够在一系列以前预测编码无法解决的问题上提供准确的推理。

Conclusion: DCPC在保持生物合理性的前提下，通过尊重生成模型结构并实现可证明的极大似然参数更新，在高维结构化推理任务中取得了优于现有算法的性能，拓展了预测编码的应用范围。

Abstract: Unexpected stimuli induce "error" or "surprise" signals in the brain. The theory of predictive coding promises to explain these observations in terms of Bayesian inference by suggesting that the cortex implements variational inference in a probabilistic graphical model. However, when applied to machine learning tasks, this family of algorithms has yet to perform on par with other variational approaches in high-dimensional, structured inference problems. To address this, we introduce a novel predictive coding algorithm for structured generative models, that we call divide-and-conquer predictive coding (DCPC). DCPC differs from other formulations of predictive coding, as it respects the correlation structure of the generative model and provably performs maximum-likelihood updates of model parameters, all without sacrificing biological plausibility. Empirically, DCPC achieves better numerical performance than competing algorithms and provides accurate inference in a number of problems not previously addressed with predictive coding. We provide an open implementation of DCPC in Pyro on Github.

</details>


### [98] [Asymptotic Normality of Generalized Low-Rank Matrix Sensing via Riemannian Geometry](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.10238)
*Osbert Bastani*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文证明了广义低秩矩阵感知问题中，在一定条件下，估计量的渐近正态性：$\sqrt{n}(\phi^0 - \phi^*) \xrightarrow{D} N(0, (H^*)^{-1})$。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 低秩矩阵感知问题中，由于参数空间存在旋转对称性，损失函数的Hessian矩阵退化，导致经典渐近理论无法直接应用。本文旨在利用黎曼几何工具解决这一退化问题，建立渐近正态性保证。

Method: 将低秩矩阵参数化为$\bar{\theta}\bar{\theta}^\top$（$\bar{\theta}\in\mathbb{R}^{d\times k}$），在黎曼商流形$\mathbb{R}^{d\times k}/\text{O}(k)$的水平空间中表示参数$\phi$，从而消除旋转对称性导致的Hessian退化，并推导出估计量的渐近分布。

Result: 在经验损失最小化器$\bar{\theta}^0$位于真实参数$\bar{\theta}^*$的常数大小邻域内的假设下，证明了$\sqrt{n}(\phi^0 - \phi^*) \xrightarrow{D} N(0, (H^*)^{-1})$，其中$H^*$为真实损失在水平空间表示下的Hessian矩阵。

Conclusion: 本文为广义低秩矩阵感知提供了渐近正态性理论保证，展示了黎曼几何方法处理参数空间对称性导致Hessian退化问题的有效性。

Abstract: We prove an asymptotic normality guarantee for generalized low-rank matrix sensing -- i.e., matrix sensing under a general convex loss $\bar\ell(\langle X,M\rangle,y^*)$, where $M\in\mathbb{R}^{d\times d}$ is the unknown rank-$k$ matrix, $X$ is a measurement matrix, and $y^*$ is the corresponding measurement. Our analysis relies on tools from Riemannian geometry to handle degeneracy of the Hessian of the loss due to rotational symmetry in the parameter space. In particular, we parameterize the manifold of low-rank matrices by $\barθ\barθ^\top$, where $\barθ\in\mathbb{R}^{d\times k}$. Then, assuming the minimizer of the empirical loss $\barθ^0\in\mathbb{R}^{d\times k}$ is in a constant size ball around the true parameters $\barθ^*$, we prove $\sqrt{n}(φ^0-φ^*)\xrightarrow{D}N(0,(H^*)^{-1})$ as $n\to\infty$, where $φ^0$ and $φ^*$ are representations of $\barθ^*$ and $\barθ^0$ in the horizontal space of the Riemannian quotient manifold $\mathbb{R}^{d\times k}/\text{O}(k)$, and $H^*$ is the Hessian of the true loss in the same representation.

</details>


### [99] [Variational Search Distributions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.06142)
*Daniel M. Steinberg,Rafael Oliveira,Cheng Soon Ong,Edwin V. Bonilla*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: VSD是一种通过变分推断实现主动生成的方法，能够高效地对离散组合设计的生成模型进行条件化，使其生成稀有的理想类别设计。该方法利用黑盒评估（如实验、模拟）的批量顺序反馈，结合梯度优化和可扩展预测模型，在蛋白质和DNA/RNA工程等序列设计任务上优于现有基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有生成模型难以高效地为稀有理想类别生成离散组合设计，传统方法需要大量昂贵实验或模拟评估。作者希望开发一种能够利用黑盒反馈、批量顺序评估的方式，高效地条件化生成模型以产生稀有理想设计的方法。

Method: VSD通过变分推断框架将主动生成任务形式化，利用现成的梯度优化例程，结合可扩展的预测模型，以批量顺序方式使用黑盒评估（实验或模拟）来条件化生成模型。推导了特定配置下学习真实条件生成分布的渐近收敛率。

Result: 在图像上展示了生成模型的效果，并在多个真实的蛋白质和DNA/RNA工程序列设计任务中，VSD优于现有的基线方法。

Conclusion: VSD提供了一种有效的主动生成方法，能够高效利用黑盒评估反馈，在稀有类别离散组合设计生成任务中表现出优越性能，具有良好的理论收敛保证。

Abstract: We develop VSD, a method for conditioning a generative model of discrete, combinatorial designs on a rare desired class by efficiently evaluating a black-box (e.g. experiment, simulation) in a batch sequential manner. We call this task active generation; we formalize active generation's requirements and desiderata, and formulate a solution via variational inference. VSD uses off-the-shelf gradient based optimization routines, can learn powerful generative models for desirable designs, and can take advantage of scalable predictive models. We derive asymptotic convergence rates for learning the true conditional generative distribution of designs with certain configurations of our method. After illustrating the generative model on images, we empirically demonstrate that VSD can outperform existing baseline methods on a set of real sequence-design problems in various protein and DNA/RNA engineering tasks.

</details>


### [100] [Parameters Inference for Nonlinear Wave Equations with Markovian Switching](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.05990)
*Yi Zhang,Zhikun Zhang,Xiangjun Wang*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文针对带有马尔可夫切换的波动方程，提出了一种基于离散稀疏贝叶斯学习的贝叶斯统计框架，用于估计跳跃系数参数，证明了收敛性和一致误差界，并通过三个数值案例验证了方法在含噪时空数据下的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统常系数偏微分方程难以捕捉实际现象中的突变，变系数PDE和马尔可夫切换模型应运而生。虽然已有研究建立了带马尔可夫切换PDE的适定性和数值方法，但对跳跃系数的参数估计问题讨论不足。本文旨在填补这一空白。

Method: 提出贝叶斯统计框架，采用离散稀疏贝叶斯学习(DSBL)方法，建立收敛性和一致误差界。该方法假设更少，允许在分段时间区间内根据不同底层结构独立推断每个分段的参数。

Result: 通过三个涉及不同带马尔可夫切换波动方程的含噪时空数据数值案例，展示了该方法在变系数PDE参数估计中的强性能。

Conclusion: 提出的贝叶斯框架能够有效估计带马尔可夫切换波动方程中的跳跃系数参数，且方法具有收敛性保证和较小的假设依赖。

Abstract: Traditional partial differential equations with constant coefficients often struggle to capture abrupt changes in real-world phenomena, leading to the development of variable coefficient PDEs and Markovian switching models. Recently, research has introduced the concept of PDEs with Markov switching models, established their well-posedness and presented numerical methods. However, there has been limited discussion on parameter estimation for the jump coefficients in these models. This paper addresses this gap by focusing on parameter inference for the wave equation with Markovian switching. We propose a Bayesian statistical framework using discrete sparse Bayesian learning to establish its convergence and a uniform error bound. Our method requires fewer assumptions and enables independent parameter inference for each segment by allowing different underlying structures for the parameter estimation problem within each segmented time interval. The effectiveness of our approach is demonstrated through three numerical cases, which involve noisy spatiotemporal data from different wave equations with Markovian switching. The results show strong performance in parameter estimation for variable coefficient PDEs.

</details>


### [101] [Augmented prediction of a true class for Positive Unlabeled data under selection bias](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.10309)
*Jan Mielniczuk,Adam Wawrzeńczyk*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出了"增强型PU预测"这一新任务：在正例-无标签（PU）数据场景中，预测阶段的观测数据也带有标签信息。作者建立了该场景下的贝叶斯分类器及其风险，提出多种经验贝叶斯规则变体，并发现基于变分自编码器的方法在未标记样本上优于仅依赖特征的方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 实际应用中，预测阶段的观测数据常常也带有标签信息，但现有PU学习研究未考虑这一情况。若研究者忽视这一信息而直接应用传统分类规则，会因缺乏相关研究而得到有偏的预测结果。

Method: 建立增强型PU预测的贝叶斯分类器及风险分析；引入多种经验贝叶斯规则变体；采用近期提出的专为PU场景设计的变分自编码器（VAE）作为其中一种变体。

Result: 基于PU场景变分自编码器的方法表现与其他变体相当或更优，且在未标记样本的准确性上优于仅依赖特征的方法。

Conclusion: 在增强型PU预测场景中，利用预测阶段也存在的标签信息能提升未标记样本的预测准确性，尤其是基于VAE的方法效果最佳。

Abstract: We introduce a new observational setting for Positive Unlabeled (PU) data where the observations at prediction time are also labeled. This occurs commonly in practice -- we argue that the additional information is important for prediction, and call this task "augmented PU prediction". We allow for labeling to be feature dependent. In such scenario, Bayes classifier and its risk is established and compared with a risk of a classifier which for unlabeled data is based only on predictors. We introduce several variants of the empirical Bayes rule in such scenario and investigate their performance. We emphasise dangers (and ease) of applying classical classification rule in the augmented PU scenario -- due to no preexisting studies, an unaware researcher is prone to skewing the obtained predictions. We conclude that the variant based on recently proposed variational autoencoder designed for PU scenario works on par or better than other considered variants and yields advantage over feature-only based methods in terms of accuracy for unlabeled samples.

</details>


### [102] [A new paradigm for global sensitivity analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.06271)
*Gildas Mazo*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文挑战了传统Sobol指数依赖于Sobol分解的构建方式，重新将Sobol指数定义为一种更广义的“敏感性度量”的特例。该度量在输入子集上为零当且仅当输出在概率上不依赖于这些输入，并通过将输入子集固定为随机值来度量输出的条件不确定性。该方法隐式定义了对称的两水平析因实验，可推广多种已知敏感性指数并定义新的交互效应，无需对输入分布做任何假设。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统Sobol指数依赖于Sobol分解，限制了其适用范围和概念理解。作者希望摆脱这一依赖，揭示Sobol指数背后更一般的数学结构，从而统一和推广现有敏感性分析方法。

Method: 重新定义敏感性度量为满足“零于某输入子集当且仅当输出不依赖该子集”的集函数，将Sobol指数视为其特例。通过将输入子集固定为随机值来度量条件不确定性，并由此隐式构造对称两水平析因实验，计算析因效应。

Result: Sobol指数可被视为更广义敏感性度量的特例；该框架可推广多种已知敏感性指数，定义新的指数；交互效应可独立于敏感性度量的选择而定义；无需对输入分布施加任何假设。

Conclusion: 该新范式统一了现有敏感性分析方法，提供了更灵活、更具一般性的理论框架，为后续敏感性分析研究开辟了新方向。

Abstract: It is well-known that Sobol indices, which count among the most popular sensitivity indices, are based on the Sobol decomposition. Here we challenge this construction by redefining Sobol indices without the Sobol decomposition. In fact, we show that Sobol indices are a particular instance of a more general concept which we call sensitivity measures. A sensitivity measure of a system taking inputs and returning outputs is a set function that is null at a subset of inputs if and only if, with probability one, the output actually does not depend on those inputs. A sensitivity measure evaluated at the whole set of inputs represents the uncertainty about the output. We show that measuring sensitivity to a particular subset is akin to measuring the expected output's uncertainty conditionally on the fact that the inputs belonging to that subset have been fixed to random values. By considering all of the possible combinations of inputs, sensitivity measures induce an implicit symmetric factorial experiment with two levels, the factorial effects of which can be calculated. This new paradigm generalizes many known sensitivity indices, can create new ones, and defines interaction effects independently of the choice of the sensitivity measure. No assumption about the distribution of the inputs is required.

</details>


### [103] [Reciprocal Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.06257)
*Julian Rodemann,Christoph Jansen,Georg Schollmeyer*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文证明了主动学习、多臂老虎机、自训练等多种机器学习算法都是"互惠学习"这一统一范式的具体实例，并利用决策理论语言对其进行泛化，通过Banach不动点定理研究了收敛条件。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器学习算法（如主动学习、多臂老虎机、自训练）看似分属不同领域，但它们实际上共享一个核心机制：不仅从数据中学习参数，还根据当前模型拟合结果迭代地改变训练数据。作者希望统一这些算法并揭示其底层共性。

Method: 提出互惠学习（reciprocal learning）这一泛化范式，用决策理论语言形式化描述；利用Banach不动点定理分析收敛性，要求互惠学习映射是压缩映射；在预测概率化、样本适应非贪婪且随机化或正则化的条件下推导线性收敛速率。

Result: 互惠学习算法在损失函数假设相对温和的条件下，以线性速率收敛到近似最优模型；结果可具体应用于主动学习、自训练和bandit算法等实例。

Conclusion: 互惠学习提供了一个统一框架来理解多种机器学习算法的共同本质，其收敛条件为设计新的互惠学习算法提供了理论指导。

Abstract: We demonstrate that a wide array of machine learning algorithms are specific instances of one single paradigm: reciprocal learning. These instances range from active learning over multi-armed bandits to self-training. We show that all these algorithms do not only learn parameters from data but also vice versa: They iteratively alter training data in a way that depends on the current model fit. We introduce reciprocal learning as a generalization of these algorithms using the language of decision theory. This allows us to study under what conditions they converge. The key is to guarantee that reciprocal learning contracts such that the Banach fixed-point theorem applies. In this way, we find that reciprocal learning algorithms converge at linear rates to an approximately optimal model under relatively mild assumptions on the loss function, if their predictions are probabilistic and the sample adaption is both non-greedy and either randomized or regularized. We interpret these findings and provide corollaries that relate them to specific active learning, self-training, and bandit algorithms.

</details>


### [104] [Proper losses regret at least 1/2-order](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.10417)
*Han Bao,Asuka Takatsu*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文研究了在恰当损失函数框架下，估计概率向量与真实概率向量之间的p-范数行为，证明了严格恰当性是建立非平凡代理遗憾界的充要条件，并揭示了p-范数收敛速度不能快于代理遗憾的1/2阶这一重要结论，从而表明强恰当损失函数具有最优收敛速率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器学习中损失函数的选择至关重要，恰当损失函数因其能确保全风险最小化与真实概率向量相匹配而被广泛使用。然而，基于恰当损失估计器构建的下游任务预测器（如分类、排序）的性能表现机制尚不清晰，特别是估计概率向量更新时的p-范数行为与下游任务性能之间的关系亟待阐明。

Method: 在恰当损失框架下，利用代理遗憾度量估计概率向量与真实概率向量之间的次优性。首先通过理论分析建立严格恰当性与非平凡代理遗憾界之间的充要关系；其次证明对于一大类严格恰当损失函数，p-范数收敛速度不能快于代理遗憾的1/2阶。

Result: 1) 证明了严格恰当性是建立非平凡代理遗憾界的必要充分条件；2) 解决了重要开放问题：对于广泛类别的严格恰当损失，p-范数收敛速度最快为代理遗憾的1/2阶；3) 表明强恰当损失能够达到最优收敛速率。

Conclusion: 该研究为恰当损失框架下的收敛性理论提供了重要理论支撑，明确了严格恰当性与代理遗憾界的关系，并揭示了p-范数收敛的基本极限，为实际应用中损失函数的选择提供了理论指导。

Abstract: A fundamental challenge in machine learning is the choice of a loss as it characterizes our learning task, is minimized in the training phase, and serves as an evaluation criterion for estimators. Proper losses are commonly chosen, ensuring minimizers of the full risk match the true probability vector. Estimators induced from a proper loss are widely used to construct forecasters for downstream tasks such as classification and ranking. In this procedure, how does the forecaster based on the obtained estimator perform well under a given downstream task? This question is substantially relevant to the behavior of the $p$-norm between the estimated and true probability vectors when the estimator is updated. In the proper loss framework, the suboptimality of the estimated probability vector from the true probability vector is measured by a surrogate regret. First, we analyze a surrogate regret and show that the strict properness of a loss is necessary and sufficient to establish a non-vacuous surrogate regret bound. Second, we solve an important open question that the order of convergence in p-norm cannot be faster than the $1/2$-order of surrogate regrets for a broad class of strictly proper losses. This implies that strongly proper losses entail the optimal convergence rate.

</details>


### [105] [Modified Meta-Thompson Sampling for Linear Bandits and Its Bayes Regret Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.06329)
*Hao Li,Dong Liang,Zheng Xie*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出Meta-TSLB算法，将Meta-Thompson Sampling从高斯 bandit 扩展到线性上下文bandit，推导出贝叶斯遗憾界为 O((m+log(m))√(n log(n)))，并通过实验验证其泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Meta-Thompson Sampling (Meta-TS) 此前仅在高斯 bandit 设定下得到分析，而线性上下文bandit作为更一般的框架，需要相应的元学习算法及其理论保证。

Method: 提出Meta-TSLB算法，是对Meta-TS针对线性上下文bandit的改进版本；通过理论分析推导Bayes遗憾上界；在多种设置下进行实验评估并分析泛化能力。

Result: 推导出 O((m+log(m))√(n log(n))) 的Bayes遗憾界，其中m为bandit实例数，n为Thompson Sampling轮数；实验验证了Meta-TSLB在不同设置下的性能及其对未见实例的泛化能力。

Conclusion: Meta-TSLB成功将Meta-TS推广到线性上下文bandit，提供了理论遗憾界并补充了Meta-TS在线性上下文bandit下的分析，实验表明具有良好的泛化性能。

Abstract: Meta-learning is characterized by its ability to learn how to learn, enabling the adaptation of learning strategies across different tasks. Recent research introduced the Meta-Thompson Sampling (Meta-TS), which meta-learns an unknown prior distribution sampled from a meta-prior by interacting with bandit instances drawn from it. However, its analysis was limited to Gaussian bandit. The contextual multi-armed bandit framework is an extension of the Gaussian Bandit, which challenges agent to utilize context vectors to predict the most valuable arms, optimally balancing exploration and exploitation to minimize regret over time. This paper introduces Meta-TSLB algorithm, a modified Meta-TS for linear contextual bandits. We theoretically analyze Meta-TSLB and derive an $ O((m+\log(m))\sqrt{n\log(n)})$ bound on its Bayes regret, in which $m$ represents the number of bandit instances, and $n$ the number of rounds of Thompson Sampling. Additionally, our work complements the analysis of Meta-TS for linear contextual bandits. The performance of Meta-TSLB is evaluated experimentally under different settings, and we experimente and analyze the generalization capability of Meta-TSLB, showcasing its potential to adapt to unseen instances.

</details>


### [106] [Multi-marginal Schrödinger Bridges with Iterative Reference Refinement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.06277)
*Yunyi Shen,Renato Berlinghieri,Tamara Broderick*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出了一种新方法，仅需指定参考动力学家族而非固定动力学，能从多个时间点的样本快照中学习未观测的种群轨迹，解决了现有方法仅能处理两个时间点或依赖固定参考动力学的局限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于Schrödinger桥的方法存在两个主要问题：(1) 只能插值两个时间点之间的轨迹，无法捕捉长期依赖；(2) 需要指定一个固定的参考动力学（如布朗运动），而实践中研究人员通常只能指定参考动力学的模型族，无法确定精确参数值。因此需要一种能从多个时间点样本快照中学习未观测轨迹、且仅需参考动力学族而非固定动力学的方法。

Method: 提出一种新方法，能够从多个时间点的样本快照中学习未观测种群轨迹，且仅需用户指定参考动力学的模型族（family），而非一个固定的参考动力学，从而避免了预设精确参数值的需求。

Result: 在模拟数据和真实数据上验证了该方法相比现有方法的优势。

Conclusion: 该方法解决了现有SB方法的两大局限，在多个时间点轨迹推断任务中表现更优，更符合实际应用场景中仅能指定参考动力学模型族的需求。

Abstract: Practitioners often aim to infer an unobserved population trajectory using sample snapshots at multiple time points. E.g., given single-cell sequencing data, scientists would like to learn how gene expression changes over a cell's life cycle. But sequencing any cell destroys that cell. So we can access data for any particular cell only at a single time point, but we have data across many cells. The deep learning community has recently explored using Schrödinger bridges (SBs) and their extensions in similar settings. However, existing methods either (1) interpolate between just two time points or (2) require a single fixed reference dynamic (often set to Brownian motion within SBs). But learning piecewise from adjacent time points can fail to capture long-term dependencies. And practitioners are typically able to specify a model family for the reference dynamic but not the exact values of the parameters within it. So we propose a new method that (1) learns the unobserved trajectories from sample snapshots across multiple time points and (2) requires specification only of a family of reference dynamics, not a single fixed one. We demonstrate the advantages of our method on simulated and real data.

</details>


### [107] [Flow Perturbation to Accelerate Unbiased Sampling of Boltzmann distribution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.10666)
*Xin Peng,Ang Gao*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出流扰动方法，通过优化随机扰动避免计算流量雅可比矩阵，在玻尔兹曼分布采样中实现数量级加速，成功采样了迄今为止最大的蛋白质分子（Chignolin）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 基于流的生成模型在高维玻尔兹曼分布采样中受限于计算流雅可比矩阵的高昂成本，亟需一种无需显式计算雅可比矩阵的高效采样方法。

Method: 将优化的随机扰动引入流中，生成扰动轨迹，并通过重加权实现无偏采样，从而绕过耗时的雅可比矩阵计算。

Result: 相比暴力雅可比计算和Hutchinson估计器，实现了数量级的加速，并成功以全原子坐标显式表示的方式采样了Chignolin蛋白质，这是目前生成模型玻尔兹曼采样的最大分子。

Conclusion: 流扰动方法能高效、无偏地对高维玻尔兹曼分布进行采样，极大拓展了基于流的生成模型在分子模拟中的应用规模。

Abstract: Flow-based generative models have been employed for sampling the Boltzmann distribution, but their application to high-dimensional systems is hindered by the significant computational cost of obtaining the Jacobian of the flow. To overcome this challenge, we introduce the flow perturbation method, which incorporates optimized stochastic perturbations into the flow. By reweighting trajectories generated by the perturbed flow, our method achieves unbiased sampling of the Boltzmann distribution with orders of magnitude speedup compared to both brute force Jacobian calculations and the Hutchinson estimator. Notably, it accurately sampled the Chignolin protein with all atomic Cartesian coordinates explicitly represented, which, to our best knowledge, is the largest molecule ever Boltzmann sampled in such detail using generative models.

</details>


### [108] [Constructive Universal Approximation and Finite Sample Memorization by Narrow Deep ReLU Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.06555)
*Martín Hernández,Enrique Zuazua*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文对深度ReLU神经网络在分类和函数逼近任务中进行了完全构造性分析。证明了N个不同点、M类分类任务可用宽度2、深度至多2N+4M-1的MLP精确分类（宽度最优），并给出了显式参数构造。该构造提供了参数范数的均匀上界，解释了过参数化训练在小正则化下的有效性。同时证明了固定宽度d+1的MLP在L^p空间上的万有逼近定理，对Sobolev空间中的目标函数给出了深度显式估计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有神经网络理论多关注存在性而非构造性，缺乏对网络参数显式构建、宽度深度精确界以及正则化训练动力学之间联系的理解。本文旨在提供一个完全构造性的分析框架，统一理解神经网络的表达能力、训练动态与可控性之间的关系。

Method: 采用完全构造性方法：1) 基于离散非线性动力学中的同步/群体可控性思想，构造宽度为2的MLP实现精确分类；2) 利用构造性结果推导正则化训练中极小化器的参数范数上界；3) 基于几何驱动的方法构造固定宽度d+1的MLP逼近任意L^p函数，对Sobolev空间中的函数给出深度显式估计。

Result: 1) 任意N点M类数据集可用宽度2、深度≤2N+4M-1的MLP精确分类，该宽度结果是最优的；2) 构造的参数范数有界，当正则化参数趋零时训练网络收敛到有界范数的精确分类器；3) 固定宽度d+1的MLP可逼近任意L^p(Ω; R_+)函数，对W^{1,p}函数给出深度显式估计；4) 结果推广到L^p(Ω; R^m)。

Conclusion: 本文建立了可控性、表达能力和训练动态之间的统一可解释框架。构造性结果不仅给出了网络容量（宽度和深度）的精确界，还解释了过参数化网络在小正则化下有效训练的理论原因，为理解深度学习的成功提供了新的理论视角。

Abstract: We present a fully constructive analysis of deep ReLU neural networks for classification and function approximation tasks. First, we prove that any dataset with $N$ distinct points in $\mathbb{R}^d$ and $M$ output classes can be exactly classified using a multilayer perceptron (MLP) of width $2$ and depth at most $2N + 4M - 1$, with all network parameters constructed explicitly. This result is sharp with respect to width and is interpreted through the lens of simultaneous or ensemble controllability in discrete nonlinear dynamics.
  Second, we show that these explicit constructions yield uniform bounds on the parameter norms and, in particular, provide upper estimates for minimizers of standard regularized training loss functionals in supervised learning. As the regularization parameter vanishes, the trained networks converge to exact classifiers with bounded norm, explaining the effectiveness of overparameterized training in the small-regularization regime.
  We also prove a universal approximation theorem in $L^p(Ω; \mathbb{R}_+)$ for any bounded domain $Ω\subset \mathbb{R}^d$ and $p \in [1, \infty)$, using MLPs of fixed width $d + 1$. The proof is constructive, geometrically motivated, and provides explicit estimates on the network depth when the target function belongs to the Sobolev space $W^{1,p}$. We also extend the approximation and depth estimation results to $L^p(Ω; \mathbb{R}^m)$ for any $m \geq 1$.
  Our results offer a unified and interpretable framework connecting controllability, expressivity, and training dynamics in deep neural networks.

</details>


### [109] [Langevin dynamics for high-dimensional optimization: the case of multi-spiked tensor PCA](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.06401)
*Gérard Ben Arous,Cédric Gerbelot,Vanessa Piccolo*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文研究高维非凸优化中Langevin动力学在多尖峰张量PCA问题中的应用，分析了不同张量阶数（p≥3和p=2）下信噪比分离条件对样本复杂度的影响，发现恢复最大SNR尖峰的样本复杂度与单尖峰情况一致，但恢复所有r个尖峰时阈值会退化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究Langevin动力学在高维多尖峰张量PCA问题中恢复隐藏信号向量所需的样本数量，以及信噪比分离条件对精确恢复的影响。

Method: 通过Langevin动力学进行高维非凸优化，对低维投影的轨迹和相互作用进行详细刻画，从而捕捉高维动力学行为，并区分p≥3和p=2两种张量阶数情况进行分析。

Result: 恢复最大SNR对应尖峰的样本复杂度与单尖峰情况的算法阈值匹配；恢复所有r个尖峰时阈值退化；p≥3与p=2情形下所需信噪比分离条件存在差异。

Conclusion: Langevin动力学在多尖峰张量PCA中恢复尖峰时，样本复杂度依赖于尖峰数量，恢复全部尖峰比仅恢复最大SNR尖峰需要更严格的信噪比分离条件。

Abstract: We study nonconvex optimization in high dimensions through Langevin dynamics, focusing on the multi-spiked tensor PCA problem. This tensor estimation problem involves recovering $r$ hidden signal vectors (spikes) from noisy Gaussian tensor observations using maximum likelihood estimation. We study the number of samples required for Langevin dynamics to efficiently recover the spikes and determine the necessary separation condition on the signal-to-noise ratios (SNRs) for exact recovery, distinguishing the cases $p \ge 3$ and $p=2$, where $p$ denotes the order of the tensor. In particular, we show that the sample complexity required for recovering the spike associated with the largest SNR matches the well-known algorithmic threshold for the single-spike case, while this threshold degrades when recovering all $r$ spikes. As a key step, we provide a detailed characterization of the trajectory and interactions of low-dimensional projections that capture the high-dimensional dynamics.

</details>


### [110] [Principal Component Flow Map Learning of PDEs from Incomplete, Limited, and Noisy Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.10854)
*Victor Churchill*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于降阶基的神经流图学习方法，用于在部分观测、噪声和有限数据条件下建模高维非均匀网格上的偏微分方程动态系统，通过学习线性降维变换将节点空间映射到模态空间进行动力学学习，再映射回节点空间，显著减少了网络参数，降低了训练数据需求和训练时间。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数据驱动流图学习方法在处理部分观测偏微分方程时存在局限，尤其是在噪声和有限数据条件下难以应用于真实场景。本文旨在解决高维非均匀网格上、仅能观测部分状态变量时的动态系统建模问题。

Method: 提出一种神经流图结构：先通过学习的线性变换将空间网格点测量值降维到降阶基（模态空间），在低维空间中学习动力学演化，再通过逆变换映射回原始节点空间。该结构结合了模态空间和节点空间的建模优势。

Result: 与先前在节点空间直接学习的流图模型相比，该方法显著减少了神经网络参数量，能够使用更小的训练数据集和更短的训练时间实现高分辨率快速仿真。

Conclusion: 所提方法通过降阶基策略有效解决了噪声和有限数据条件下部分观测PDE的建模难题，降低了计算成本和数据需求，更适用于真实世界的数据采集场景。

Abstract: We present a computational technique for modeling the evolution of dynamical systems in a reduced basis, with a focus on the challenging problem of modeling partially-observed partial differential equations (PDEs) on high-dimensional non-uniform grids. We address limitations of previous work on data-driven flow map learning in the sense that we focus on noisy and limited data to move toward data collection scenarios in real-world applications. Leveraging recent work on modeling PDEs in modal and nodal spaces, we present a neural network structure that is suitable for PDE modeling with noisy and limited data available only on a subset of the state variables or computational domain. In particular, spatial grid-point measurements are reduced using a learned linear transformation, after which the dynamics are learned in this reduced basis before being transformed back out to the nodal space. This approach yields a drastically reduced parameterization of the neural network compared with previous flow map models for nodal space learning. This allows for rapid high-resolution simulations, enabled by smaller training data sets and reduced training times.

</details>


### [111] [A Primer on Variational Inference for Physics-Informed Deep Generative Modelling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.06560)
*Alex Glyn-Davies,Arnaud Vadeboncoeur,O. Deniz Akyildiz,Ieva Kazlauskaite,Mark Girolami*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文为变分推断（VI）在物理学正反问题中的应用提供了全面且易读的技术导论，重点阐述了VI如何通过深度学习实现不确定性量化，并统一回顾了近年来的相关文献。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: VI在计算效率和可扩展性方面具有优势，能兼顾不确定性量化的准确性和实际可操作性。对于物理相关问题，物理模型决定了变量间的依赖结构，而这一结构对于准确捕捉动力学行为至关重要，因此需要为VI学习目标进行定制化推导。

Method: 以系统化的方式引导读者从VI标准框架出发，逐步推导其如何通过深度学习实现。随后对近年来展现VI灵活性的文献进行回顾与统一梳理。

Result: 展示了VI在生成建模和反演任务中的优异表现，特别是其内置的贝叶斯正则化机制和灵活性在处理物理问题时的有效性。

Conclusion: VI是一种适用于物理学问题（尤其是需强调不确定性量化的场景）的有效近似贝叶斯推断方法，本文为相关领域的科研人员提供了实用的技术入门指南。

Abstract: Variational inference (VI) is a computationally efficient and scalable methodology for approximate Bayesian inference. It strikes a balance between accuracy of uncertainty quantification and practical tractability. It excels at generative modelling and inversion tasks due to its built-in Bayesian regularisation and flexibility, essential qualities for physics related problems. For such problems, the underlying physical model determines the dependence between variables of interest, which in turn will require a tailored derivation for the central VI learning objective. Furthermore, in many physical inference applications this structure has rich meaning and is essential for accurately capturing the dynamics of interest. In this paper, we provide an accessible and thorough technical introduction to VI for forward and inverse problems, guiding the reader through standard derivations of the VI framework and how it can best be realized through deep learning. We then review and unify recent literature exemplifying the flexibility allowed by VI. This paper is designed for a general scientific audience looking to solve physics-based problems with an emphasis on uncertainty quantification

</details>


### [112] [Note on computational complexity of the Gromov-Wasserstein distance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.06525)
*Natalia Kravtsova*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文指出GW距离优化问题本质上是一个非凸二次规划问题，并通过实例加以说明。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 文献中常提及Gromov-Wasserstein距离的计算困难性，但缺乏对其优化问题结构的详细分析。

Method: 分析了Gromov-Wasserstein距离优化问题的数学结构，证明其对于任何输入数据实例均为非凸二次规划问题，并给出了显式实例。

Result: 明确了Gromov-Wasserstein距离优化问题的非凸二次性质。

Conclusion: Gromov-Wasserstein距离的计算困难源于其本质上是一个非凸二次优化问题。

Abstract: This note addresses computational difficulty of the Gromov-Wasserstein distance frequently mentioned in the literature. We provide details on the structure of the Gromov-Wasserstein distance optimization problem that show its non-convex quadratic nature for any instance of an input data. We further illustrate the non-convexity of the problem with several explicit examples.

</details>


<div id='math.OC'></div>

# math.OC [[Back]](#toc)

### [113] [An Operational Scheduling Framework for Tanker-based Water Distribution System under Uncertainty](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00431)
*Abhilasha Maheshwari,Shamik Misra,Ravindra Gudi,Senthilmurugan Subbiah,Chrysi Laspidou*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文针对城市水危机中罐车供水系统的调度优化问题，提出了一种两阶段随机优化模型，在考虑用水需求与运输时间不确定性的条件下，通过混合蒙特卡洛模拟与场景树方法实现高效求解，并以城市案例验证了模型在促进经济可行性、确保及时交付和减少水资源浪费方面的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 罐车供水系统在缓解城市水危机中扮演关键角色，但现有的调度框架未能充分考虑消费者需求与罐车运输时间的内在不确定性，导致供水操作不可持续。因此，需要一种能够在不确定性下实现经济可行性、及时交付并避免水资源浪费的优化调度方法。

Method: 采用带补偿（recourse）的两阶段随机优化模型；通过混合蒙特卡洛模拟与场景树方法对不确定的水需求与罐车运输时间进行联合建模；设置最大需求满足、地下水抽取限制及水质按时交付等约束条件以保证可持续运行。

Result: 通过城市案例研究，分别在仅需求不确定性以及需求-运输时间联合不确定性两种情形下进行讨论；分析了随机解相对于期望值解和完美信息解的价值，并展示了框架对决策支持的贡献。

Conclusion: 所提出的两阶段随机优化框架能有效整合不确定性因素，提升罐车供水系统的调度效率与可持续性，为管理者在不确定环境下进行知情决策提供有力工具。

Abstract: Tanker water systems play critical role in providing adequate service to meet potable water demands in the face of acute water crisis in many cities globally. Managing tanker movements among the supply and demand sides requires an efficient scheduling framework that could promote economic feasibility, ensure timely delivery, and avoid water wastage. However, to realize such a sustainable water supply operation, inherent uncertainties related to consumer demand and tanker travel time need to accounted in the operational scheduling. Herein, a two-stage stochastic optimization model with a recourse approach is developed for scheduling and optimization of tanker based water supply and treatment facility operations under uncertainty. The uncertain water demands and tanker travel times are combinedly modelled in a computationally efficient manner using a hybrid Monte Carlo simulation and scenario tree approach. The maximum demand fulfillment, limited extraction of groundwater, and timely delivery of quality water are enforced through a set of constraints to achieve sustainable operation. A representative urban case study is demonstrated, results are discussed for two uncertainty cases (i) only demand, and (ii) integrated demand-travel time. Value of stochastic solution over expected value and perfect information model solutions are analyzed and features of the framework for informed decision-making are discussed.

</details>


### [114] [Quadratic Optimal Control of Graphon Q-noise Linear Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00212)
*Alex Dunyak,Peter E. Caines*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文利用图论（Graphon）和Q-噪声理论，将大规模复杂网络上的线性二次高斯最优控制问题（LQG）扩展到无限维函数空间，证明了有限图最优控制问题收敛于图论系统极限，并针对低秩系统及标准图论极限下的最坏情况最优控制性能进行了计算。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大规模复杂网络上的LQG最优控制问题计算上难以处理，图论理论虽然能通过极限对象逼近任意大规模网络，但此前未扩展到具有随机扰动的随机系统，因此需要将图论框架与Q-噪声结合以处理随机最优控制问题。

Method: 采用图论作为无穷大图的极限对象，将Q-噪声（有限维Wiener过程到函数空间的推广）引入随机系统，定义图论系统上的LQG最优控制问题，并证明有限图最优控制问题收敛于该图论系统极限；进一步扩展到低秩系统，并针对一组标准图论极限计算最坏情况下的长期平均和无限时域折扣最优控制性能。

Result: 成功证明了图论系统上的LQG最优控制问题是有限图最优控制问题的极限；将理论推广至低秩系统并给出完整特例；针对标准图论极限计算出最坏情况下的长期平均和无限时域折扣最优控制性能。

Conclusion: 图论与Q-噪声结合为大规模随机网络的最优控制提供了可计算的理论框架，且该框架在低秩系统和标准图例中均有效，为复杂网络控制问题提供了新的分析工具。

Abstract: The modelling of linear quadratic Gaussian optimal control problems on large complex networks is intractable computationally. Graphon theory provides an approach to overcome these issues by defining limit objects for infinite sequences of graphs permitting one to approximate arbitrarily large networks by infinite dimensional operators. This is extended to stochastic systems by the use of Q-noise, a generalization of Wiener processes in finite dimensional spaces to processes in function spaces. The optimal control of linear quadratic problems on graphon systems with Q-noise disturbances are defined and shown to be the limit of the corresponding finite graph optimal control problem. The theory is extended to low rank systems, and a fully worked special case is presented. In addition, the worst-case long-range average and infinite horizon discounted optimal control performance with respect to Q-noise distribution are computed for a small set of standard graphon limits.

</details>


### [115] [Modelling and analysis of multi-timescale uncertainty in energy system planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00227)
*Hongyu Zhang,Erlend Heir,Asbjørn Nisi,Asgeir Tomasgard*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文通过REORIENT模型全面建模并分析了能源系统规划中的多时间尺度不确定性（短期与长期），提出了一种并行稳定Benders分解方法作为求解方案。结果表明：多时间尺度不确定性提升了随机解的价值；长期右端项参数不确定性比成本系数不确定性对解结构影响更大；并行稳定Benders分解比串行版本快7.5倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的分解方法虽能求解多时间尺度随机规划问题，但多时间尺度不确定性对能源系统规划的具体影响尚未得到充分分析，存在研究空白。

Method: 使用REORIENT模型对短期和长期不确定性进行综合建模，提出并行稳定Benders分解作为替代求解方法，并从稳定性、随机解价值、滚动时域随机解价值及规划决策等多个维度分析多时间尺度不确定性。

Result: (1) 多时间尺度不确定性提升了随机解的价值；(2) 长期右端项参数不确定性比成本系数不确定性对解结构影响更大；(3) 并行稳定Benders分解速度是串行版本的7.5倍。

Conclusion: 多时间尺度不确定性对能源系统规划具有显著影响，并行稳定Benders分解是一种高效的求解方法。

Abstract: Recent developments in decomposition methods for multi-stage stochastic programming with block separable recourse enable the solution to large-scale stochastic programs with multi-timescale uncertainty. Multi-timescale uncertainty is important in energy system planning problems. Therefore, the proposed algorithms were applied to energy system planning problems to demonstrate their performance. However, the impact of multi-timescale uncertainty on energy system planning is not sufficiently analysed. In this paper, we address this research gap by comprehensively modelling and analysing short-term and long-term uncertainty in energy system planning. We use the REORIENT model to conduct the analysis. We also propose a parallel stabilised Benders decomposition as an alternative solution method to existing methods. We analyse the multi-timescale uncertainty regarding stability, the value of the stochastic solution, the rolling horizon value of the stochastic solutions and the planning decisions. The results show that (1) including multi-timescale uncertainty yields an increase in the value of the stochastic solutions, (2) long-term uncertainty in the right-hand side parameters affects the solution structure more than cost coefficient uncertainty, (3) parallel stabilised Benders decomposition is up to 7.5 times faster than the serial version.

</details>


### [116] [Global convergence of a modified BFGS-type method based on function information for nonconvex multiobjective optimization problems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00543)
*Yingxue Yang*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 针对非凸多目标优化问题，提出了一种基于函数信息的改进BFGS型方法（MFQNMO），通过共享BFGS矩阵降低存储和计算成本，在温和条件下实现了局部超线性收敛，并在非凸和凸测试问题上验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统多目标拟牛顿方法（QNMO）需为每个目标函数分别近似Hessian矩阵，导致存储和计算负担沉重；现有方法多依赖凸性假设，缺乏对非凸问题的理论保证。

Method: 在每次迭代中使用一个公共的BFGS型矩阵来近似所有目标函数的Hessian矩阵，该矩阵利用上一步的函数信息进行更新，在效率与计算成本之间取得平衡。

Result: 在温和条件下（不依赖凸性假设）建立了MFQNMO的局部超线性收敛率，并在非凸和凸测试问题上通过实验验证了方法的有效性。

Conclusion: MFQNMO在保持收敛性的同时显著降低了多目标优化中拟牛顿方法的计算与存储开销，为非凸多目标优化问题提供了一种高效可行的解决方案。

Abstract: In this paper, based on function information, we propose a modified BFGS-type method for nonconvex multiobjective optimization problems (MFQNMO). In the multiobjective quasi-Newton method (QNMO), each iteration involves separately approximating the Hessian matrix for each component objective function, which results in significant storage and computational burdens. MFQNMO employs a common BFGS-type matrix to approximate the Hessian matrix of all objective functions in each iteration. This matrix is updated using function information from the previous step. This approach strikes a balance between efficacy and computational cost. We confirm the convergence of the method without relying on convexity assumptions, under mild conditions, we establish a local superlinear convergence rate for MFQNMO. Furthermore, we validate its effectiveness through experiments on both nonconvex and convex test problems.

</details>


### [117] [Vector-valued robust stochastic control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00266)
*Igor Cialenco,Gabriela Kováčová*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文研究带有多目标（向量值）准则的Knightian不确定性下的动态随机控制问题。通过采用理想点向量值上确界来处理鲁棒部分，并将控制部分视为多目标优化问题，在集合值框架下推导了动态规划原理（DPP）的弱版本和强版本（Bellman方程）。弱版本在最小假设下成立，强版本引入了关于一般预序的矩形性质。进一步针对分量偏序特例，使用上像作为值函数推导了DPP。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统随机控制问题中Knightian不确定性与多目标（向量值）准则的结合带来两大挑战：如何正确定义和解释向量值情形的上下确界，以及如何应对这些上下确界的不唯一性问题。本文旨在克服这些困难，建立适用于向量值损失函数的鲁棒控制框架。

Method: 采用理想点向量值上确界定义鲁棒部分的上确界；将控制部分建模为多目标（向量）优化问题；建立集合值框架，以所有可行动作下的最坏期望损失的集合作为值函数；通过引入关于一般预序的矩形性质推导强DPP；针对分量偏序特例，使用上像作为值函数推导DPP。

Result: 在最小假设下证明了弱版本Bellman原理；通过引入预序矩形性质建立了强版本DPP；针对分量偏序情况，基于上像值函数推导了额外DPP；提供了金融问题中的示例。

Conclusion: 这些结果为在模型不确定性下处理时间不一致问题奠定了集合值框架基础，也为研究模型不确定性下的多投资组合分配问题提供了理论工具。

Abstract: We study a dynamic stochastic control problem subject to Knightian uncertainty with multi-objective (vector-valued) criteria. Assuming the preferences across expected multi-loss vectors are represented by a given, yet general, preorder, we address the model uncertainty by adopting a robust or minimax perspective, minimizing expected loss across the worst-case model. For loss functions taking real (or scalar) values, there is no ambiguity in interpreting supremum and infimum. In contrast to the scalar case, major challenges for multi-loss control problems include properly defining and interpreting the notions of supremum and infimum, and addressing the non-uniqueness of these suprema and infima. To deal with these, we employ the notion of an ideal point vector-valued supremum for the robust part of the problem, while we view the control part as a multi-objective (or vector) optimization problem. Using a set-valued framework, we derive both a weak and strong version of the dynamic programming principle (DPP) or Bellman equations by taking the value function as the collection of all worst expected losses across all feasible actions. The weak version of Bellman's principle is proved under minimal assumptions. To establish a stronger version of DPP, we introduce the rectangularity property with respect to a general preorder. We also further study a particular, but important, case of component-wise partial order of vectors, for which we additionally derive DPP under a different set-valued notion for the value function, the so-called upper image of the multi-objective problem. Finally, we provide illustrative examples motivated by financial problems.
  These results will serve as a foundation for addressing time-inconsistent problems subject to model uncertainty through the lens of a set-valued framework, as well as for studying multi-portfolio allocation problems under model uncertainty.

</details>


### [118] [Exact Recovery Guarantees for Parameterized Nonlinear System Identification Problem under Sparse Disturbances or Semi-Oblivious Attacks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00276)
*Haixiang Zhang,Baturalp Yalcin,Javad Lavaei,Eduardo D. Sontag*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文研究了在稀疏干扰（以概率 p 发生）下，通过基函数参数化非线性动力系统的有限时间学习问题。采用 LASSO 型非光滑估计器，建立了解的适定性和唯一性的充要条件，并在有界性和 Lipschitz 连续性两种条件下给出了精确恢复保证。即使 p 接近 1，也能以高概率实现有限时间精确恢复。该工作首次在高度一般的干扰模型（允许时序相关和半 oblivious 对抗攻击）下，对非线性动力系统进行了有限时间分析。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有工作主要假设干扰是独立同分布的，且仅提供渐近性保证。本文旨在建立更具一般性的干扰模型（允许稀疏、任意分布、时序相关、甚至半 oblivious 对抗攻击），并在有限时间内完成非线性动力系统的学习，分析样本复杂度与稀疏概率 p 的关系。

Method: 将非线性动力系统参数化为基函数线性组合；引入 LASSO 型非光滑估计器处理稀疏干扰；推导估计器适定性与解唯一性的充要条件；在基函数有界或 Lipschitz 连续两种假设下，给出精确恢复的理论保证。

Result: 即使在干扰发生概率 p 接近 1 的情况下，系统动态也能以高概率在有限时间内被精确恢复。该结果适用于具有时序相关性的干扰及半 oblivious 对抗攻击场景。

Conclusion: 本文首次在高度一般的干扰模型下，为非线性动力系统的有限时间学习提供了理论保证，显著拓宽了现有理论结果的适用范围。

Abstract: In this work, we study the problem of learning a nonlinear dynamical system by parameterizing its dynamics using basis functions. We assume that disturbances occur at each time step with an arbitrary probability $p$, which models the sparsity level of the disturbance vectors over time. These disturbances are drawn from an arbitrary, unknown probability distribution, which may depend on past disturbances, provided that it satisfies a zero-mean assumption. The primary objective of this paper is to learn the system's dynamics within a finite time and analyze the sample complexity as a function of $p$. To achieve this, we examine a LASSO-type non-smooth estimator, and establish necessary and sufficient conditions for its well-specifiedness and the uniqueness of the global solution to the underlying optimization problem. We then provide exact recovery guarantees for the estimator under two distinct conditions: boundedness and Lipschitz continuity of the basis functions. We show that finite-time exact recovery is achieved with high probability, even when $p$ approaches 1. Unlike prior works, which primarily focus on independent and identically distributed (i.i.d.) disturbances and provide only asymptotic guarantees for system learning, this study presents the first finite-time analysis of nonlinear dynamical systems under a highly general disturbance model. Our framework allows for possible temporal correlations in the disturbances and accommodates semi-oblivious adversarial attacks, significantly broadening the scope of existing theoretical results.

</details>


### [119] [Lipschitz Modulus of Convex Functions via Function Values](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00586)
*Pham Duy Khanh,Vu Vinh Huy Khoa,Vo Thanh Phat,Le Duc Viet*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文证明了有限维全局凸函数在所有给定球上的Lipschitz连续性，以及该类函数的全局Lipschitz连续性，Lipschitz常数仅从函数值中提取信息，并计算了全局Lipschitz模量，还提供了除范数外的全局Lipschitz连续凸函数类及其模量示例。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 建立有限维全局凸函数的Lipschitz连续性结果，特别是仅利用函数值信息来估计Lipschitz常数，并拓展全局Lipschitz连续凸函数的类。

Method: 理论分析与证明，利用凸函数的性质在有限维空间上推导Lipschitz连续性条件，并通过构造示例展示不同函数类的全局Lipschitz模量。

Result: 得到了有限维全局凸函数在球上的局部Lipschitz连续性以及全局Lipschitz连续性的充分条件，给出了仅依赖函数值的Lipschitz常数表达式，并提供了若干非范数类的全局Lipschitz连续凸函数示例。

Conclusion: 有限维全局凸函数具有良好的Lipschitz正则性，且其Lipschitz常数可由函数值直接控制，此外存在丰富的非范数类全局Lipschitz连续凸函数。

Abstract: In this note, we establish the Lipschitz continuity of finite-dimensional globally convex functions on all given balls and global Lipschitz continuity for eligible functions of that type. The Lipschitz constants in both situations draw information solely from function values, and the global Lipschitz modulus is found when it exists. Some examples of classes of globally Lipschitz continuous convex functions beside the norms are also provided along with their global Lipschitz modulus.

</details>


### [120] [Deterministic and Stochastic Frank-Wolfe Recursion on Probability Spaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00307)
*Di Yu,Shane G. Henderson,Raghu Pasupathy*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文针对概率测度空间上的光滑随机优化问题，提出了确定性Frank-Wolfe (dFW)和随机Frank-Wolfe (sFW)算法。dFW利用影响函数的闭式解实现无限维子问题求解；sFW则适用于仅能获取蒙特卡洛观测的场景。理论证明了sFW在凸目标下具有O(k^{-1})迭代复杂度，非凸目标下具有O(k^{-1/2})复杂度，固定步长版本可实现指数收敛，并给出了中心极限定理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 受应急响应和实验设计等应用驱动，需要求解定义在概率测度空间上的光滑随机优化问题。这类问题往往只能通过蒙特卡洛采样获取目标函数和影响函数的观测值，缺乏高效的求解算法。

Method: (1) 以影响函数为变分对象，构建概率空间上的确定性Frank-Wolfe (dFW)递归，核心创新是发现了无限维Frank-Wolfe子问题的闭式解引理，每次迭代将当前测度与Dirac测度的凸组合作为新测度。(2) 针对仅有蒙特卡洛观测的场景，提出随机Frank-Wolfe (sFW)变体，利用影响函数的渐近精确估计构造随机测度序列。(3) 分析固定步长固定样本版本的指数收敛性并建立中心极限定理。

Result: (1) sFW在光滑凸目标下，最优性间隙序列几乎必然和期望意义下均达到O(k^{-1})迭代复杂度。(2) 光滑非凸目标下，Frank-Wolfe间隙达到O(k^{-1/2})。(3) 固定步长固定样本版本可实现指数收敛到ε-最优。(4) 建立了关于观测目标函数值的中心极限定理。

Conclusion: 提出的概率空间上的Frank-Wolfe框架为分布优化问题提供了高效的理论算法，兼具闭式子问题求解和随机逼近的理论保证，适用于应急响应和实验设计等实际场景。

Abstract: Motivated by applications in emergency response and experimental design, we consider smooth stochastic optimization problems over probability measures supported on compact subsets of the Euclidean space. With the influence function as the variational object, we construct a deterministic Frank-Wolfe (dFW) recursion for probability spaces, made especially possible by a lemma that identifies a ``closed-form'' solution to the infinite-dimensional Frank-Wolfe sub-problem. Each iterate in dFW is expressed as a convex combination of the incumbent iterate and a Dirac measure concentrating on the minimum of the influence function at the incumbent iterate. To address common application contexts that have access only to Monte Carlo observations of the objective and influence function, we construct a stochastic Frank-Wolfe (sFW) variation that generates a random sequence of probability measures constructed using minima of increasingly accurate estimates of the influence function.
