Result: 实验表明该机制能够在不降低网约车服务质量的前提下，以较低社会成本实现较高的感知任务完成率。参与双任务的司机收入更高，但该优势会随双任务司机数量和网约车服务需求的增加而减弱。

Conclusion: 车载移动群智感知与网约车系统的整合具有实际可行性，所提机制能有效平衡双方任务需求，实现双赢。

Abstract: This paper evaluates the benefit of integrating vehicle-based mobile crowd-sensing tasks into the ride-hailing system through the collaboration between the data user and the ride-hailing platform. In such a system, the ride-hailing platform commissions high-valued sensing tasks to idle drivers who can undertake either ride-hailing or sensing requests. Considering the different service requirements and time windows between sensing and ride-hailing requests, we design a staggered operation strategy for ride-hailing order matching and the sensing task assignment. The auction-based mechanisms are employed to minimize costs while incentivizing driver participation in mobile sensing. To address the budget deficit problem of the primal VCG-based task assignment mechanism, we refine the driver selection approach and tailor the payment rule by imposing additional budget constraints. We demonstrate the benefits of our proposed mechanism through a series of numerical experiments using the NYC Taxi data. Experimental results reveal the potential of the mechanism for achieving high completion rates of sensing tasks at low social costs without degrading ride-hailing services. Furthermore, drivers who participate in both mobile sensing tasks and ride-hailing requests may gain higher income, but this advantage may diminish with an increasing number of such drivers and higher demand for ride-hailing services.

</details>


### [163] [Comparison of control regularization techniques for minimum-fuel low-thrust trajectory design using indirect methods](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.01490)
*Saeid Tafazzol,Ehsan Taheri,Nan Li*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文比较了双曲正切平滑和L2范数平滑两种方法在最小燃料低推力轨迹优化问题中对拟牛顿梯度法收敛性能的影响，并评估了结合状态转移矩阵计算灵敏度时的效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 最小燃料低推力轨迹的推力幅值剖面存在有限但未知数量的切换，这使得求解哈密顿边值问题具有挑战性，需要有效的平滑方法来提升数值方法的收敛性能。

Method: 在控制层面直接应用双曲正切平滑和L2范数平滑两种方法，结合状态转移矩阵精确计算边值问题残差向量对未知初始协态值的灵敏度，并通过多个基准问题评估性能。

Result: 通过多个基准最小燃料低推力轨迹优化问题评估了两种控制平滑方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 两种平滑方法均能简化实现，其中L2范数平滑作为一种新方法被引入并展现竞争力，具体性能对比结果需通过基准问题验证。

Abstract: Minimum-fuel low-thrust trajectories typically consist of a finite, yet unknown number of switches in the thrust magnitude profile. This optimality-driven characteristic of minimum-fuel trajectories poses a challenge to the numerical methods that are typically used for solving the resulting Hamiltonian boundary-value problems (BVPs). In this paper, we compare the impact of the popular hyperbolic-tangent-based smoothing with a novel L2-norm-based smoothing on the convergence performance of quasi-Newton gradient-based methods. Both smoothing methods are applied directly at the level of control, which offer a significant implementation simplicity. We also investigate the application of each method in scenarios where the State Transition Matrix (STM) is used for accurate calculation of the sensitivities of the residual vector of the resulting BVPs with respect to the unknown initial costate values. The effectiveness of each control smoothing method is assessed across several benchmark minimum-fuel low-thrust trajectory optimization problems.

</details>


### [164] [Diagonally forced systems and the spectral signature of matrix cycles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.01987)
*Michael Thorne*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文研究任意对角为负的方阵M，通过寻找最小标量σ使M_σ的最大特征值恰好为零，从而保证系统稳定性。作者证明了一个解析关系，揭示了特征多项式根与矩阵缩放操作特征值之间的等价性，并利用特征多项式系数中的稳定与失稳反馈循环，识别出基于矩阵元素大小与符号的内在谱特征。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 对于对角元素为负的方阵M，通过参数σ缩放后，希望找到使系统恰好处于稳定边界（最大特征值为零）的最小σ值。现有Gershgorin定理仅给出σ足够大时系统稳定的充分条件，但缺乏精确确定临界σ的解析方法。

Method: 1. 建立特征多项式根与矩阵缩放操作特征值之间的等价关系；2. 通过特征多项式系数分解出矩阵元素构成的稳定与失稳反馈循环；3. 基于这些反馈循环的符号与大小，识别矩阵固有的谱特征。

Result: 证明了能够解析确定使最大特征值为零的σ值；建立了特征多项式根与矩阵缩放操作特征值的等价性；揭示了特征多项式系数中稳定/失稳反馈循环与矩阵元素符号及大小的内在联系。

Conclusion: 本文提供了一种解析确定临界缩放参数σ的方法，并揭示了矩阵元素结构与其谱特征之间的深层联系，可用于系统稳定性分析与控制。

Abstract: Given any square matrix, $\mathbf{M}$, whose diagonal elements are negative, and which is multiplied by a variable, $σ$, we wish to find the minimal $σ$ such that the eigenvalue of $\mathbf{M}_σ$ is exactly zero. By Gershgorin, we know that $\mathbf{M}_σ$ can be made stable by making $σ$ large enough. We prove a relation which analytically determines when and how we are able to find the value of $σ$ such that the maximal eigenvalue is exactly zero. In so doing, we prove the equivalence of the roots of the characteristic polynomial of $\mathbf{M}_σ$ and the eigenvalues that arise from a scaling operation on $\mathbf{M}$. Further, through the characteristic polynomial, we are able to isolate the dominant feedback cycles comprising the elements of the matrix which, under the action of $σ$, ensures the stability of the system. We then explore, using the stabilising and destabilising cycles within the coefficients of the characteristic polynomial, an intrinsic spectral signature associated with any matrix based on the size and sign (or zero) of its respective elements.

</details>


### [165] [R2 v2: The Pareto-compliant R2 Indicator for Better Benchmarking in Bi-objective Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.01504)
*Lennart Schäpermeier,Pascal Kerschke*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文重新审视了R2指标在连续均匀Tchebycheff效用函数分布下的性质，证明其连续变体是Pareto合规的（即任何有益解都能提升指标值），并提出了双目标问题下O(N log N)的高效计算方法及增量更新策略，为Pareto合规性单性能指标提供了超体积指标之外的高效替代方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统R2指标通过离散化效用函数分布来实现，但该离散变体仅为弱Pareto合规——添加非支配或支配解不一定改善指标值。这一缺陷限制了R2指标在严格性能评估中的应用。作者希望探究连续分布下R2指标的Pareto合规性，并解决其计算效率问题。

Method: (1) 理论分析：重新定义连续均匀Tchebycheff效用函数分布下的R2指标，严格证明其Pareto合规性；(2) 算法设计：针对双目标问题提出O(N log N)的计算方法，以及支持解集增删操作的增量更新算法，避免全局重算。

Result: (1) 证明了连续变体R2指标具有Pareto合规性，克服了离散版本的弱Pareto合规缺陷；(2) 双目标问题下实现了O(N log N)的高效计算；(3) 设计了增量更新机制，可高效处理解集的动态变化。

Conclusion: 连续R2指标不仅具备Pareto合规性，还具备高效的计算性能，是超体积指标的一个有前景的替代方案，尤其适用于双目标优化问题的性能评估。

Abstract: In multi-objective optimization, set-based quality indicators are a cornerstone of benchmarking and performance assessment. They capture the quality of a set of trade-off solutions by reducing it to a scalar number. One of the most commonly used set-based metrics is the R2 indicator, which describes the expected utility of a solution set to a decision-maker under a distribution of utility functions. Typically, this indicator is applied by discretizing the latter distribution, yielding a weakly Pareto-compliant indicator. In consequence, adding a nondominated or dominating solution to a solution set may -- but does not have to -- improve the indicator's value.
  In this paper, we reinvestigate the R2 indicator under the premise that we have a continuous, uniform distribution of (Tchebycheff) utility functions. We analyze its properties in detail, demonstrating that this continuous variant is indeed Pareto-compliant -- that is, any beneficial solution will improve the metric's value. Additionally, we provide efficient computational procedures that (a) compute this metric for bi-objective problems in $\mathcal O (N \log N)$, and (b) can perform incremental updates to the indicator whenever solutions are added to (or removed from) the current set of solutions, without needing to recompute the indicator for the entire set. As a result, this work contributes to the state-of-the-art Pareto-compliant unary performance metrics, such as the hypervolume indicator, offering an efficient and promising alternative.

</details>


### [166] [Modular Vehicle Routing Problem: Applications in Logistics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.01518)
*Hang Zhou,Yang Li,Chengyuan Ma,Keke Long,Xiaopeng Li*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文研究了模块化车辆（MVs）在物流配送中的应用，提出了模块化车辆路径问题（MVRP），包括容量受限和时间窗两种基本类型。通过混合整数线性规划（MILP）模型和基于甘特图及邻域结构的禁忌搜索（TS）算法求解该NP-hard问题。实验表明，该算法能高效找到最优解，相比传统配送方法可降低成本约5.6%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管模块化车辆在多个领域已有探索，但其在物流领域的应用尚未得到充分研究。本文旨在填补这一空白，通过将MV的对接与分离能力应用于货物配送，以降低总配送成本。

Method: 将问题建模为MVRP（车辆路径问题的变体），分别针对容量受限和时间窗两种基本类型建立MILP模型；针对NP-hard性质，设计了基于甘特图编码和定制邻域结构的禁忌搜索算法，并引入多起点和抖动策略以跳出局部最优。

Result: 在小规模算例中，所提算法几乎能识别MILP的所有最优解；在大规模算例中表现出良好的收敛速度。对比实验显示，MVRP方法相比传统配送可降低约5.6%的成本，敏感性分析表明提升MV编队的成本节省能力可进一步增强整体效益。

Conclusion: 模块化车辆在物流配送中具有显著的成本节约潜力，所提出的求解方法有效且高效；未来可进一步探索其他MVRP变体及更广泛的应用场景。

Abstract: Recent studies and industry advancements indicate that modular vehicles (MVs) have the potential to enhance transportation systems through their ability to dock and split during a trip. Although various applications of MVs have been explored across different domains, their application in logistics remains underexplored. This study examines the use of MVs in cargo delivery to reduce total delivery costs. We model the delivery problem for MVs as a variant of the Vehicle Routing Problem, referred to as the Modular Vehicle Routing Problem (MVRP). In the MVRP, MVs can either serve customers independently or dock with other MVs to form a platoon, thereby reducing the average cost per unit. In this study, we mainly focus on two fundamental types of MVRPs, namely the capacitated MVRP and the MVRP with time windows. To address these problems, we first developed mixed-integer linear programming (MILP) models, which can be solved using commercial optimization solvers. Given the NP-hardness of this problem, we also designed a Tabu Search (TS) algorithm with a solution representation based on Gantt charts and a neighborhood structure tailored for the MVRP. Multi-start and shaking strategies were incorporated into the TS algorithm to escape local optima. Additionally, we explored other potential applications in logistics and discussed problem settings for three MVRP variants. Results from numerical experiments indicate that the proposed algorithm successfully identifies nearly all optimal solutions found by the MILP model in small-size benchmark instances, while also demonstrating good convergence speed in large-size benchmark instances. Comparative experiments show that the MVRP approach can reduce costs by approximately 5.6\% compared to traditional delivery methods. Sensitivity analyses reveal that improving the cost-saving capability of MV platooning can enhance overall benefits.

</details>


### [167] [A Bregman-Sinkhorn Algorithm for the Maximum Weight Independent Set Problem](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.02086)
*Stefan Haller,Bogdan Savchynskyy*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于对偶坐标下降和熵平滑LP松弛的可扩展近似算法，用于求解NP难的最大权重独立集问题。通过新的平滑调度策略（基于对偶间隙估计）和投影方法，结合随机贪婪生成与最优重组启发式，该方法能在10秒内处理多达88.2万节点和3.44亿边的图，并发现高质量近似解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 最大权重独立集问题是NP难的，现有算法在处理大规模图时效率不足，需要一种可扩展的近似算法来在合理时间内获得高质量解。

Method: 采用对偶坐标下降（Bregman方法/Sinkhorn算法）求解熵平滑的团覆盖LP松弛；提出基于松弛对偶间隙估计的新型平滑调度策略替代传统的可行性估计方法；开发了新的投影方法以支持对偶间隙估计；结合随机贪婪生成与最优重组的原始启发式方法，利用对偶优化给出的缩减成本获得可行整数解。

Result: 在两个真实应用数据集上，该方法能在10秒内处理高达88.2万节点和3.44亿边的图，并发现高质量近似解。实验表明，基于对偶间隙估计的平滑调度显著优于标准的可行性估计方法。

Conclusion: 所提出的可扩展近似算法能有效处理超大规模图上的最大权重独立集问题，新型平滑调度策略和原始启发式方法共同保证了求解质量和效率。

Abstract: We propose a scalable approximate algorithm for the NP-hard maximum-weight independent set problem. The core component of our algorithm is a dual coordinate descent applied to a smoothed LP relaxation of the problem. This technique is commonly known by the names Bregman method and Sinkhorn algorithm in the literature. Our algorithm addresses a family of clique cover LP relaxations, where the constraints are determined by the set of cliques covering the underlying graph. The objective function of the relaxation is smoothed with an entropy term. A crucial aspect determining efficiency of our approach is controlling the smoothing level during the optimization process. While several dedicated techniques have been considered in the literature to this end, we propose a new one based on estimation of the relaxed duality gap. To make this estimation possible, we developed a new projection method to the feasible set of the considered LP relaxation. We experimentally show that our smoothing scheduling significantly outperforms the standard one based on feasibility estimation. Additionally to solving the relaxed dual, we utilize a simple and very efficient primal heuristic to obtain feasible integer solutions of the original non-relaxed problem. Our heuristic is a combination of randomized greedy generation and optimal recombination applied to the reduced costs computed by the dual optimization. Our experimental validation considers two datasets rooted in real-world applications, where our method demonstrates the ability to discover high-quality approximate solutions within 10 seconds for graphs with up to 882 thousand nodes and 344 million edges.

</details>


### [168] [An infinite-dimensional Christoffel function and detection of abnormal trajectories](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.02019)
*Didier Henrion,Jean-Bernard Lasserre*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文提出了无限维版本的Christoffel函数，将其定义在希尔伯特空间中的函数上，支撑测度定义在希尔伯特空间的紧子集上。该函数保持了有限维版本的关键性质：其倒数的增长在支撑集外至少是指数级的，在支撑集内至多是多项式级的。利用矩的矩（moments of moments）构造矩矩阵，并将其应用于轨迹异常检测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将Christoffel函数从有限维推广到无限维，以处理函数空间中的异常检测问题，特别是轨迹数据中异常轨迹（out-of-distribution）的识别。

Method: 提出了无限维Christoffel函数，证明了其在支撑集内外具有不同增长速率（指数级 vs 多项式级），并通过矩的矩来构造无限维矩矩阵，将有限维的计算范式扩展到无限维场景。

Result: 理论证明了无限维Christoffel函数保持识别测度支撑集的能力；在轨迹异常检测应用中，该函数可作为评分函数有效区分正常与异常轨迹，并通过数值算例验证了理论结果。

Conclusion: 无限维Christoffel函数是有限维版本在函数空间中的自然推广，保留了支撑集识别的核心性质，为函数型数据（特别是轨迹）的异常检测提供了新的理论工具。

Abstract: We introduce an infinite-dimensional version of the Christoffel function, where now (i) its argument lies in a Hilbert space of functions, and (ii) its associated underlying measure is supported on a compact subset of the Hilbert space. We show that it possesses the same crucial property as its finite-dimensional version to identify the support of the measure (and so to detect outliers). Indeed, the growth of its reciprocal with respect to its degree is at least exponential outside the support of the measure and at most polynomial inside. Moreover, for a fixed degree, its computation mimics that of the finite-dimensional case, but now  the entries of the moment matrix associated with the measure are moments of moments. To illustrate the potential of this new tool, we consider the following application. Given a data base  of registered reference trajectories, we consider the problem of detecting whether a newly acquired trajectory is abnormal (or out of distribution) with respect to the data base. As in the finite-dimensional case, we use the infinite-dimensional Christoffel function as a score function to detect outliers and abnormal trajectories. A few numerical examples are provided to illustrate the theory.

</details>


### [169] [A proximal splitting algorithm for generalized DC programming with applications in signal recovery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.01535)
*Tan Nhat Pham,Minh N. Dao,Nima Amjady,Rakibuzzaman Shah*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文针对一类广义DC规划问题（目标函数由非光滑非凸函数+可微非凸函数-非光滑连续凸函数组成），提出了一种结合近端算子与Douglas-Rachford分裂的近端分裂算法，在Kurdyka–Łojasiewicz性质下证明了全局收敛性和收敛速率，并在信号恢复问题上验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: DC规划是非凸优化中的重要模型，但现有方法对目标函数中非光滑非凸项与可微非凸项的混合处理能力有限，尤其是当凹部分不可微时缺乏收敛性保证。

Method: 提出一种近端分裂算法：对凹部分使用近端算子，对其他分量采用Douglas-Rachford分裂；利用Kurdyka–Łojasiewicz性质建立全局收敛性及收敛速率分析。

Result: 算法保证子序列收敛到问题的临界点；在Kurdyka–Łojasiewicz性质下，建立了全迭代序列的全局收敛性，并推导了迭代序列和目标函数值的收敛速率；在信号恢复问题（含非凸正则项）上表现优于多种对比算法。

Conclusion: 该算法有效解决了更一般形式的DC规划问题，放宽了对凹部分可微性的要求，理论分析与实验均验证了其优越性。

Abstract: The difference-of-convex (DC) program is an important model in nonconvex optimization due to its structure, which encompasses a wide range of practical applications. In this paper, we aim to tackle a generalized class of DC programs, where the objective function is formed by summing a possibly nonsmooth nonconvex function and a differentiable nonconvex function with Lipschitz continuous gradient, and then subtracting a nonsmooth continuous convex function. We develop a proximal splitting algorithm that utilizes proximal evaluation for the concave part and Douglas--Rachford splitting for the remaining components. The algorithm guarantees subsequential convergence to a {\color{black}critical} point of the problem model. Under the widely used Kurdyka--Łojasiewicz property, we establish global convergence of the full sequence of iterates and derive convergence rates for both the iterates and the objective function values, without assuming the concave part is differentiable. The performance of the proposed algorithm is tested on signal recovery problems with a nonconvex regularization term and exhibits competitive results compared to notable algorithms in the literature on both synthetic data and real-world data.

</details>


### [170] [Optimal policy for control of epidemics with constrained time intervals and region-based interactions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.02097)
*Xia Li,Andrea L. Bertozzi,P. Jeffrey Brantingham,Yevgeniy Vorobeychik*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个结合SIR流行病模型的策略模型，研究政策制定与流行病动态之间的相互作用，涵盖单区域策略、多区域博弈模型以及多层博弈的层级交互。通过在法国COVID-19案例、洛杉矶县反事实研究以及三县交互案例中的分析，展示了最优政策的结构及其与现实中实施策略的差异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究多关注传染病动态或政策效果的单一方面，缺乏对政策制定与流行病扩散之间双向耦合机制的深入理解。特别是多区域间策略互动以及不同层级政策制定者之间的博弈关系尚未被充分建模。此外，现实中的政策往往不能频繁变动，这要求在建模中引入最小政策时间间隔约束。

Method: 将策略模型与SIR流行病模型耦合，策略函数假设为分段常数，每个策略阶段有最小时间间隔约束。通过最小化包含实施成本、影响成本（以及多层博弈中的不遵从成本）的代价函数来求解最优政策。考虑单区域、多区域博弈以及多层博弈三种场景。

Result: 在法国COVID-19案例中，当代价函数简化为影响成本并以最终疫情规模参数化时，若最小政策间隔足够小，解近似于Bliman等人(2021)的最优控制结果；但间隔较大时，最优政策呈阶梯下降结构，与现实中普遍采用的阶梯上升策略（逐步加强封锁）截然不同。洛杉矶县反事实研究表明，若在第二波达到群体免疫，疫情演化路径将发生显著变化。三县交互案例展示了有无上级政府（州）管辖下的政策差异。

Conclusion: 政策制定需考虑时间约束导致的策略结构变化，现实中的阶梯上升策略可能并非最优；多区域和多层级的博弈模型能更真实地刻画政策与疫情间的复杂交互，为未来疫情应对提供理论指导。

Abstract: We introduce a policy model coupled with the susceptible-infected-recovered (SIR) epidemic model to study interactions between policy-making and the dynamics of epidemics. We consider both single-region policies, as well as game-theoretic models involving interactions among several regions, and hierarchical interactions among policy-makers modeled as multi-layer games. We assume that the policy functions are piece-wise constant with a minimum time interval for each policy stage, considering policies cannot change frequently in time or they cannot be easily followed. The optimal policy is obtained by minimizing a cost function which consists of an implementation cost, an impact cost, and, in the case of multi-layer games, a non-compliance cost. We show in a case study of COVID-19 in France that when the cost function is reduced to the impact cost and is parameterized as the final epidemic size, the solution approximates that of the optimal control in Bliman et al, J. Optim. Theory Appl., 189, 2021, for sufficiently small minimum policy time interval. For a larger time interval however the optimal policy is a step down function, quite different from the step up structure typically deployed during the COVID-19 pandemic. In addition, we present a counterfactual study of how the pandemic would have evolved if herd immunity was reached during the second wave in the county of Los Angeles, California. Lastly, we study a case of three interacting counties with and without a governing state.

</details>


### [171] [Decentralized Optimization with Coupled Constraints](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.02020)
*Demyan Yarmoshik,Alexander Rogozin,Nikita Kiselev,Daniil Dorin,Alexander Gasnikov,Dmitry Kovalev*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文针对具有仿射耦合约束的分布式优化问题，提出了下界复杂度以及能达到该下界的一阶算法，该算法是首个针对一般仿射耦合约束具有线性收敛速度的分布式一阶方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 分布式优化中，目标函数是可分离的，但变量通过仿射约束耦合，这类问题在资源分配、系统控制和分布式机器学习中有重要应用。现有方法缺乏针对一般仿射耦合约束的线性收敛保证和复杂度下界分析。

Method: 提出了针对耦合约束的分布式优化问题的下界复杂度，并设计了一个达到该下界的一阶算法。

Result: 该算法是首个针对一般仿射耦合约束具有线性收敛速度的分布式一阶算法，并且达到了提出的下界复杂度。

Conclusion: 本文填补了分布式优化中耦合约束问题的理论空白，提供了复杂度下界与最优算法。

Abstract: We consider the decentralized minimization of a separable objective $\sum_{i=1}^{n} f_i(x_i)$, where the variables are coupled through an affine constraint $\sum_{i=1}^n\left(\mathbf{A}_i x_i - b_i\right) = 0$. We assume that the functions $f_i$, matrices $\mathbf{A}_i$, and vectors $b_i$ are stored locally by the nodes of a computational network, and that the functions $f_i$ are smooth and strongly convex.
  This problem has significant applications in resource allocation and systems control and can also arise in distributed machine learning. We propose lower complexity bounds for decentralized optimization problems with coupled constraints and a first-order algorithm achieving the lower bounds. To the best of our knowledge, our method is also the first linearly convergent first-order decentralized algorithm for problems with general affine coupled constraints.

</details>


### [172] [Convergence of the Heterogeneous Deffuant-Weisbuch Model: A Complete Proof and Some Extensions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.01593)
*Ge Chen,Wei Su,Wenjun Mei,Francesco Bullo*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文证明了具有异质性置信界限和异质性加权因子的Deffuant-Weisbuch（DW）模型的收敛性，解决了该领域20年来的开放性问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管异质性DW模型已通过仿真研究超过20年，但其收敛性证明一直是一个开放问题。先前工作仅解决了均匀加权因子≥1/2的特殊情况，一般情况仍未解决。

Method: 本文考虑具有异质性置信界限和异质性（无约束）加权因子的DW模型，采用概率分析方法证明每个智能体的意见几乎必然收敛到固定向量。

Result: 证明了异质性DW模型以概率1收敛，即每个智能体的意见收敛到固定向量，解决了该收敛猜想。同时阐明了在某些参数条件下收敛速度可能任意缓慢。

Conclusion: 本文完整解决了异质性DW模型的收敛性问题，为有界置信意见动力学领域提供了理论基础。

Abstract: The Deffuant-Weisbuch (DW) model is a well-known bounded-confidence opinion dynamics that has attracted wide interest. Although the heterogeneous DW model has been studied by simulations over $20$ years, its convergence proof is open. Our previous paper \cite{GC-WS-WM-FB:20} solves the problem for the case of uniform weighting factors greater than or equal to $1/2$, but the general case remains unresolved.
  This paper considers the DW model with heterogeneous confidence bounds and heterogeneous (unconstrained) weighting factors and shows that, with probability one, the opinion of each agent converges to a fixed vector. In other words, this paper resolves the convergence conjecture for the heterogeneous DW model. Our analysis also clarifies how the convergence speed may be arbitrarily slow under certain parameter conditions.

</details>


### [173] [Sensitivity analysis of multiobjective linear programming from a geometric perspective](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.02101)
*Mustapha Kaci*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新的多目标线性规划灵敏度分析方法，通过在二维变量空间中将所有MOLP问题划分为有限个等价类，每个等价类唯一对应可行域边界的某个子集，从而高效分析目标函数系数扰动对有效解的影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 灵敏度分析在多目标线性规划中至关重要，但现有方法计算复杂，决策者难以高效研究目标函数系数扰动对有效解行为的影响。

Method: 在二维变量空间$S \subset \mathbb{R}^{2}$中，通过定义等价关系来划分所有线性映射的空间（即$\mathbb{R}^2$上长度为$K \geq 2$的线性形式序列），将其划分为有限个等价类。每个等价类与$S$边界的一个唯一子集相关联。

Result: 对于属于同一等价类的任何具有$K$个目标函数的MOLP问题，其有效解集对应$S$边界的关联子集。该方法通过数值示例进行了说明。

Conclusion: 该分类方法使得决策者能够以计算可行的方式研究二维变量空间中MOLP问题在目标函数系数扰动下有效解的行为，是对现有灵敏度分析工作的推广和深化。

Abstract: Sensitivity analysis plays a crucial role in multiobjective linear programming (MOLP), where understanding the impact of parameter changes on efficient solutions is essential. This work builds upon and extends previous investigations. In this paper, we introduce a novel approach to sensitivity analysis in MOLP, designed to be computationally feasible for decision-makers studying the behavior of efficient solutions under perturbations of objective function coefficients in a two-dimensional variable space. This approach classifies all MOLP problems in $S \subset \mathbb{R}^{2}$ by defining an equivalence relation that partitions the space of linear maps$-$comprising all sequences of linear forms on $\mathbb{R}^2$ of length $K \geq 2-$into a finite number of equivalence classes. Each equivalence class is associated with a unique subset of the boundary of $S$. For any MOLP with $K$ objective functions belonging to the same equivalence class, its set of efficient solutions corresponds to the associated subset of the boundary of $S$. This approach is detailed and illustrated with a numerical example.

</details>


### [174] [Coderivative-Based Newton Methods with Wolfe Linesearch for Nonsmooth Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.02146)
*Miantao Chao,Boris S. Mordukhovich,Zijian Shi,Jin Zhang*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于余导数的 Wolfe 线搜索牛顿方法（GRNM-W）用于求解非光滑优化问题，并在此基础上结合前向-后向包络和增广拉格朗日方法设计了 CNFB 和 CNAL 两种算法，在 Lasso 和 SVM 问题上验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 非光滑优化问题广泛存在于机器学习、统计等领域，但传统的牛顿方法难以直接处理目标函数的一阶或二阶非光滑性。现有方法在收敛速度和全局收敛性之间存在权衡，缺乏既能保证全局收敛又能实现超局部收敛的高效算法。

Method: 1) 提出 GRNM-W：基于余导数的广义正则化牛顿方法，结合 Wolfe 线搜索条件处理 C^{1,1} 类非光滑无约束极小化问题；2) 提出 CNFB：将 GRNM-W 与前向-后向包络框架结合，处理凸复合极小化问题；3) 提出 CNAL：将 GRNM-W 与增广拉格朗日方法结合，处理带约束的凸复合极小化问题。

Result: 理论方面：GRNM-W 具有全局收敛性和局部超线性收敛速度。实验方面：在 Lasso 和支持向量机（SVM）问题上的数值结果验证了所提算法的有效性。

Conclusion: 基于余导数的 Wolfe 线搜索牛顿方法为求解一阶和二阶非光滑优化问题提供了统一的理论框架，CNFB 和 CNAL 两种算法在凸复合极小化问题上表现出良好的数值性能。

Abstract: This paper introduces and develops novel coderivative-based Newton methods with Wolfe linesearch conditions to solve various classes of problems in nonsmooth optimization. We first propose a generalized regularized Newton method with Wolfe linesearch (GRNM-W) for unconstrained $C^{1,1}$ minimization problems (which are second-order nonsmooth) and establish global as well as local superlinear convergence of their iterates. To deal with convex composite minimization problems (which are first-order nonsmooth and can be constrained), we combine the proposed GRNM-W with two algorithmic frameworks: the forward-backward envelope and the augmented Lagrangian method resulting in the two new algorithms called CNFB and CNAL, respectively. Finally, we present numerical results to solve Lasso and support vector machine problems appearing in, e.g., machine learning and statistics, which demonstrate the efficiency of the proposed algorithms.

</details>


### [175] [Bilateral boundary finite-time stabilization of 2x2 linear first-order hyperbolic systems with spatially varying coefficients](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.01649)
*Wei Sun,Jing Li,Liangyu Xu*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文针对具有空间变化系数的一维线性2×2双曲型一阶系统，提出了双边控制律，通过反步法设计全状态反馈控制器，使闭环系统在有限时间内收敛到零平衡点，并为容错设计提供了可能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的双边控制研究大多针对常速度传输的系统，而实际系统中传输速度往往随空间变化，这一问题尚未得到充分解决。

Method: 通过选择合适的反步变换和目标系统，将无穷维反步法扩展到空间变化系数的情形，设计全状态反馈控制律。

Result: 所设计的全状态反馈控制律能够确保闭环系统在有限时间内收敛到零平衡点。

Conclusion: 双边控制器的设计为容错控制提供了潜在可能，该扩展虽然复杂但具有实际意义。

Abstract: This paper presents bilateral control laws for one-dimensional(1-D) linear 2x2 hyperbolic first-order systems (with spatially varying coefficients). Bilateral control means there are two actuators at each end of the domain. This situation becomes more complex as the transport velocities are no longer constant, and this extension is nontrivial. By selecting the appropriate backstepping transformation and target system, the infinite-dimensional backstepping method is extended and a full-state feedback control law is given that ensures the closed-loop system converges to its zero equilibrium in finite time. The design of bilateral controllers enables a potential for fault-tolerant designs.

</details>


### [176] [Embedding generalization within the learning dynamics: An approach based-on sample path large deviation theory](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.02167)
*Getachew K. Befekadu*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于随机梯度动力学的大偏差理论框架，将测试集损失景观作为稀有事件目标集嵌入学习过程，从而在连续时间视角下通过小随机扰动实现泛化能力提升与鲁棒性增强，并建立了与最优控制问题的联系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有经验风险最小化方法中，泛化验证通常作为学习过程的独立环节而非内嵌部分；同时，如何将测试集损失景观以可预见目标的形式融入学习动力学缺乏理论支撑。

Method: 利用Freidlin-Wentzell大偏差理论分析连续时间随机梯度动力系统的小噪声渐近概率估计；将测试集损失景观构造为稀有事件目标集，建立其与最优控制问题的联系；提出求解变分问题的计算算法。

Result: 在小噪声极限下给出了随机扰动梯度动力系统到达目标集的渐近概率估计；建立了与最优控制问题的等价性并给出验证结果；通过非线性回归数值实验验证了方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 所提框架可将测试集信息以未来目标形式嵌入训练动力学，为改进泛化与鲁棒性提供了新视角；最优控制视角下的验证结果强化了该框架的理论合理性。

Abstract: We consider a typical learning problem of point estimations for modeling of nonlinear functions or dynamical systems in which generalization, i.e., verifying a given learned model, can be embedded as an integral part of the learning process or dynamics. In particular, we consider an empirical risk minimization based learning problem that exploits gradient methods from continuous-time perspective with small random perturbations, which is guided by the training dataset loss. Here, we provide an asymptotic probability estimate in the small noise limit based-on the Freidlin-Wentzell theory of large deviations, when the sample path of the random process corresponding to the randomly perturbed gradient dynamical system hits a certain target set, i.e., a rare event, when the latter is specified by the testing dataset loss landscape. Interestingly, the proposed framework can be viewed as one way of improving generalization and robustness in learning problems that provides new insights leading to optimal point estimates which is guided by training data loss, while, at the same time, the learning dynamics has an access to the testing dataset loss landscape in some form of future achievable or anticipated target goal. Moreover, as a by-product, we establish a connection with optimal control problem, where the target set, i.e., the rare event, is considered as the desired outcome or achievable target goal for a certain optimal control problem, for which we also provide a verification result reinforcing the rationale behind the proposed framework. Finally, we present a computational algorithm that solves the corresponding variational problem leading to an optimal point estimates and, as part of this work, we also present some numerical results for a typical case of nonlinear regression problem.

</details>


### [177] [Formation Mission Design for Commercial Aircraft Using Switched Optimal Control Techniques](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.02163)
*María Cerezo-Magaña,Alberto Olivares,Ernesto Staffetti*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文研究商用航班编队任务设计问题，将飞行模式建模为切换动力系统，采用嵌入方法和打结伪谱法求解最优控制问题，实验表明编队飞行能显著降低燃油消耗和排放。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 商用航班通过编队飞行可降低燃油消耗和排放，但如何组织多架航班在编队与单飞之间切换并规划最优轨迹是一个复杂的优化问题，现有方法缺乏有效的解决方案。

Method: 将编队任务建模为切换动力系统，离散状态描述各飞机的飞行模式组合，析取逻辑约束建立状态切换逻辑；采用嵌入方法建模切换决策（无需二进制变量），将问题转化为经典最优控制问题，并使用打结伪谱法求解。

Result: 数值实验证明了该方法的有效性，编队飞行具有显著降低燃油消耗和排放的潜力。

Conclusion: 所提出的嵌入方法结合打结伪谱法能够有效求解编队任务最优控制问题，编队飞行在商业航空中具有节能环保的实用价值。

Abstract: In this article, the formation mission design problem for commercial aircraft is studied. Given the departure times and the departure and arrival locations of several commercial flights, the relevant weather forecast, and the expected fuel savings during formation flight, the problem consists in establishing how to organize them in formation or solo flights and in finding the trajectories that minimize the overall direct operating cost of the flights. Each aircraft can fly solo or in different positions inside a formation. Therefore, the mission is modeled as a switched dynamical system, in which the discrete state describes the combination of flight modes of the individual aircraft and logical constraints in disjunctive form establish the switching logic among the discrete states of the system. The formation mission design problem has been formulated as an optimal control problem of a switched dynamical system and solved using an embedding approach, which allows switching decision among discrete states to be modeled without relying on binary variables. The resulting problem is a classical optimal control problem which has been solved using a knotting pseudospectral method. Several numerical experiments have been conducted to demonstrate the effectiveness of this approach. The obtained results show that formation flight has great potential to reduce fuel consumption and emissions.

</details>


### [178] [Optimal control of quantum stochastic systems in fermion fields: The Pontryagin-type maximum principle (II)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.01684)
*Penghui Wang,Shan Wang*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文利用松弛转置方法解决了费米子场中量子随机系统最优控制对应的二阶伴随方程，该方程在W*-拓扑意义下有解，为量子随机最优控制中的Pontryagin型最大值原理研究奠定了基础。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决量子随机最优控制中二阶伴随方程的存在性问题，该方程作为算子值后向量子随机微分方程，在有界算子代数中无定义，需要寻求新的解定义方式以支撑Pontryagin型最大值原理的研究。

Method: 采用松弛转置方法（relaxed transposition method）求解二阶伴随方程，该方法使解在W*-拓扑下有意义，从而克服了有界算子代数中无定义的困难。

Result: 成功地用松弛转置方法求得了费米子场量子随机系统中二阶伴随方程的解，该解在W*-拓扑下被定义。

Conclusion: 松弛转置方法是解决量子随机最优控制中二阶伴随方程的有效工具，所获得的解为Pontryagin型最大值原理的建立提供了理论基础。

Abstract: In the present paper, by using the relaxed transposition method[29], we solve the second-order adjoint equations, corresponding to the optimal control of quantum stochastic systems in fermion fields, which plays the fundamental roles in the study of the Pointryagin-type maximum principle in quantum stochastic optimal control. The second-order adjoint equation is a backard operator valued quantum stochastic differential equation, which has no definition in the algebra of bounded operators, and the solution derived from the relaxed transposition method makes sense in W*-topology.

</details>


### [179] [Discrete Shortest Paths in Optimal Power Flow Feasible Regions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.02172)
*Daniel Turizo,Diego Cifuentes,Anton Leykin,Daniel K. Molzahn*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文针对最优潮流（OPF）中从当前运行点向最优运行点安全过渡的难题，提出了一种将过渡路径构建为最短路径问题的算法。通过离散化分段线性路径并预先固定分段数量以限制控制动作次数，将问题转化为具有稀疏块三对角结构的非线性优化问题，并利用专用内点法求解。通过同伦式松弛-收紧策略生成初始可行路径，数值实验验证了算法的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: OPF问题的可行域非凸，从当前运行点向最优运行点过渡时难以保证不违反约束；同时实际运行要求控制动作次数少且幅度小，现有方法难以同时满足这些要求。

Method: 将过渡路径建模为最短路径问题，采用离散化分段线性路径表示，预定义分段数量以限制控制动作数；问题转化为具有稀疏块三对角结构的NLP，利用专用内点法求解；通过同伦式方法（先求解松弛问题，再逐步收紧）生成初始可行路径。

Result: 数值实验表明该算法能有效计算从当前运行点到最优运行点的可行过渡路径，在控制动作数量受限的条件下满足约束要求。

Conclusion: 提出了一种能够在有限控制动作下安全实现OPF最优运行点过渡的算法，利用问题的稀疏结构提高了计算效率。

Abstract: Optimal power flow (OPF) is a critical optimization problem for power systems to operate at points where cost or other operational objectives are optimized. Due to the non-convexity of the set of feasible OPF operating points, it is non-trivial to transition the power system from its current operating point to the optimal one without violating constraints. On top of that, practical considerations dictate that the transition should be achieved using a small number of small-magnitude control actions. To solve this problem, this paper proposes an algorithm for computing a transition path by framing it as a shortest path problem. This problem is formulated in terms of a discretized piece-wise linear path, where the number of pieces is fixed a priori in order to limit the number of control actions. This formulation yields a nonlinear optimization problem (NLP) with a sparse block tridiagonal structure, which we leverage by utilizing a specialized interior point method. An initial feasible path for our method is generated by solving a sequence of relaxations which are then tightened in a homotopy-like procedure. Numerical experiments illustrate the effectiveness of the algorithm.

</details>


### [180] [A Stochastic Switched Optimal Control Approach to Formation Mission Design for Commercial Aircraft](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.02168)
*María Cerezo-Magaña,Alberto Olivares,Ernesto Staffetti*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文研究了不确定条件下商用飞机的编队任务设计问题，通过非侵入式广义多项式混沌随机配点法将随机切换最优控制问题转化为增广确定性切换最优控制问题，在考虑起飞时间和燃油节省不确定性的情况下，评估编队飞行相比单飞的预期直接运营成本效益。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在实际商业航空运营中，起飞时间延迟和编队飞行燃油节省量存在内在不确定性，这些不确定性会显著影响编队飞行的经济可行性。现有研究多基于确定性假设，无法准确评估编队飞行在真实随机环境下的效益，因此需要建立考虑不确定性的编队任务设计方法。

Method: 将编队任务设计问题建模为随机切换动力系统的最优控制问题，采用非侵入式广义多项式混沌（NIPC）随机配点法进行求解。该方法通过少量随机参数样本点联合求解切换最优控制问题实例，将随机问题转化为增广确定性切换最优控制问题，并将解表示为随机参数的正交多项式展开，从而实现低计算成本的统计和全局敏感性分析。

Result: 在多个数值实验中考虑了起飞时间和编队燃油节省的不确定性，结果表明即使在不确定性存在的情况下，编队飞行相比单飞仍能实现预期直接运营成本的降低，证明了编队飞行的经济可行性。

Conclusion: 本文建立的不确定性框架有效验证了商业航空编队飞行的鲁棒经济效益，为实际运营决策提供了理论依据；同时展示了非侵入式广义多项式混沌方法在处理航空领域随机最优控制问题中的有效性。

Abstract: This paper studies the formation mission design problem for commercial aircraft in the presence of uncertainties. Specifically, it considers uncertainties in the departure times of the aircraft and in the fuel burn savings for the trailing aircraft. Given several commercial flights, the problem consists in arranging them in formation or solo flights and finding the trajectories that minimize the expected value of the direct operating cost of the flights. The formation mission design problem is formulated as an optimal control problem of a stochastic switched dynamical system and solved using nonintrusive generalized polynomial chaos based stochastic collocation. The stochastic collocation method converts the stochastic switched optimal control problem into an augmented deterministic switched optimal control problem. With this approach, a small number of sample points of the random parameters are used to jointly solve particular instances of the switched optimal control problem. The obtained solutions are then expressed as orthogonal polynomial expansions in terms of the random parameters using these sample points. This technique allows statistical and global sensitivity analysis of the stochastic solutions to be conducted at a low computational cost. The aim of this study is to establish if, in the presence of uncertainties, a formation mission is beneficial with respect to solo flight in terms of the expected value of the direct operating costs. Several numerical experiments have been conducted in which uncertainties on the departure times and on the fuel saving during formation flight have been considered. The obtained results demonstrate that benefits can be achieved even in the presence of these uncertainties.

</details>


### [181] [New results on the local-nonglobal minimizers of the generalized trust-region subproblem](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.01697)
*Wenbao Ai,Mengxiao Zhang,Jianhua Yuan*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文研究广义信任域子问题(GTR)及其等式约束版本(GTRE)的局部非全局最小化。在联合正定性假设下建立了GTR与GTRE局部非全局最小化的等价关系，并推翻了Song-Wang-Liu-Xia的一个猜想；同时证明了联合正定情况下最多有两个局部非全局最小化，联合负定情况下最多有一个，证实了Song-Wang-Liu-Xia的另一个猜想；最后提出了求解所有局部非全局最小化的算法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 已有研究对GTR和GTRE的局部非全局最小化存在认识不足，Song-Wang-Liu-Xia提出了相关猜想但未得到验证或证伪。本文旨在厘清GTR和GTRE局部非全局最小化的数量上界与存在性条件，并给出有效的数值求解方法。

Method: 首先通过理论分析建立GTR与GTRE在联合正定性假设下局部非全局最小化的等价性，并构造反例推翻已有猜想；然后利用矩阵对的正定性/负定性条件推导最小化数量的上界；最后设计数值算法以容差方式求解所有局部非全局最小化。

Result: (1) 建立了GTR与GTRE局部非全局最小化的等价关系；给出了反例证伪Song-Wang-Liu-Xia的一个猜想。(2) 证明了联合正定情况下每个问题至多有两个局部非全局最小化，证实了Song-Wang-Liu-Xia的另一个猜想。(3) 证明了联合负定情况下每个问题至多有一个局部非全局最小化，且退化为球约束时回归经典Martínez结果。(4) 提出的数值算法能有效找到所有局部非全局最小化或确认其不存在。

Conclusion: 本文完整刻画了GTR和GTRE在联合正定/负定下的局部非全局最小化数量上界，纠正并完善了相关猜想，同时提供了有效的数值求解算法，为广义信任域问题的理论与计算做出了重要贡献。

Abstract: In this paper, we study the local-nonglobal minimizers of the Generalized Trust-Region subproblem $(GTR)$ and its Equality-constrained version $(GTRE)$. Firstly, the equivalence is established between the local-nonglobal minimizers of both $(GTR)$ and $(GTRE)$ under assumption of the joint definiteness. By the way, a counterexample is presented to disprove a conjecture of Song-Wang-Liu-Xia [SIAM J. Optim., 33(2023), pp.267-293]. Secondly, if the Hessian matrix pair is jointly positive definite, it is proved that each of $(GTR)$ and $(GTRE)$ has at most two local-nonglobal minimizers. This result first confirms the correctness of another conjecture of Song-Wang-Liu-Xia [SIAM J. Optim., 33(2023), pp.267-293]. Thirdly, if the Hessian matrix pair is jointly negative definite, it is verified that each of $(GTR)$ and $(GTRE)$ has at most one local-nonglobal minimizer. In special, if the constraint is reduced to be a ball or a sphere, the above result is just the classical Martínez's. Finally, an algorithm is proposed to find all the local-nonglobal minimizers of $(GTR)$ and $(GTRE)$ or confirm their nonexistence in a tolerance. Preliminary numerical results demonstrate the effectiveness of the algorithm.

</details>


### [182] [On the Equilibrium of a Class of Leader-Follower Games with Decision-Dependent Chance Constraints](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.02174)
*Jingxiang Wang,Zhaojian Wang,Bo Yang,Feng Liu,Xinping Guan*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文研究具有决策依赖机会约束的单领导者多追随者博弈的均衡存在性，通过使用决策依赖模糊集和Cantelli不等式将机会约束转化为二阶锥约束，并利用Kakutani不动点定理证明至少存在一个均衡点，最后通过数值算例展示决策依赖不确定性对均衡的影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在单领导者多追随者博弈中，追随者的约束中存在决策依赖的不确定性（DDUs），即不确定性受领导者策略影响，但领导者无法获知其精确概率分布。现有方法难以处理此类问题，因此需要一种能够消除概率分布依赖的转化方法，并证明博弈均衡的存在性。

Method: 1) 利用矩信息下的决策依赖模糊集和Cantelli不等式，将决策依赖机会约束（DDCCs）转化为二阶锥约束，从而消除概率分布；2) 简化后的博弈模型不再依赖概率分布；3) 应用Kakutani不动点定理证明该博弈至少存在一个均衡点。

Result: 成功将DDCCs转化为二阶锥约束，简化了博弈模型；理论上证明了该博弈至少存在一个均衡点；数值算例验证了DDUs对博弈均衡的影响。

Conclusion: 本文提出的转化方法和存在性证明为处理含决策依赖不确定性的领导者-追随者博弈提供了理论基础，数值实验表明决策依赖不确定性对均衡结果有显著影响。

Abstract: In this paper, we study the existence of equilibrium in a single-leader-multiple-follower game with decision-dependent chance constraints (DDCCs), where decision-dependent uncertainties (DDUs) exist in the constraints of followers. DDUs refer to the uncertainties impacted by the leader's strategy, while the leader cannot capture their exact probability distributions. To address such problems, we first use decision-dependent ambiguity sets under moment information and Cantelli's inequality to transform DDCCs into second-order cone constraints. This simplifies the game model by eliminating the probability distributions. We further prove that there exists at least one equilibrium point for this game by applying Kakutani's fixed-point theorem. Finally, a numerical example is provided to show the impact of DDUs on the equilibrium of such game models.

</details>


### [183] [Data-Driven Probabilistic Methodology for Aircraft Conflict Detection Under Wind Uncertainty](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.02186)
*Jaime de la Mota,María Cerezo-Magaña,Alberto Olivares,Ernesto Staffetti*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种概率性方法，利用集合天气预报中的风预测不确定性，通过Karhunen-Loève展开和任意多项式混沌技术，在巡航阶段检测飞机之间的冲突风险。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在巡航阶段，风预测不确定性会影响飞机轨迹规划的可靠性，进而导致飞机之间的潜在冲突。现有方法未充分考虑这种不确定性，因此需要一种能够高效量化不确定性并检测冲突的概率方法。

Method: 首先，使用Karhunen-Loève展开将风场速度的东向和北向分量表示为一系列不相关随机变量和确定性系数的级数展开；然后，利用任意多项式混沌技术量化这些随机变量对飞机轨迹规划器输出的不确定性影响；最后，基于高斯核密度估计从多项式展开中推导出飞机间大圆距离的概率密度函数，并据此估计冲突概率。

Result: 通过基于最优控制的飞机轨迹规划器进行数值实验，验证了所提方法在给定集合预报风场下的有效性。任意多项式混沌技术仅需有限阶统计矩，无需假设概率分布，且具有高计算效率。

Conclusion: 所提出的冲突检测方法能够在风预测不确定性条件下高效、可靠地评估飞机间冲突概率，适用于复杂非线性动力学系统，且无需对随机变量的概率分布做先验假设。

Abstract: Assuming the availability of a reliable aircraft trajectory planner, this paper presents a probabilistic methodology to detect conflicts between aircraft, in the cruise phase of the flight, in the presence of wind prediction uncertainties quantified by ensemble weather forecasts, which are regarded as realizations of correlated random processes and employed to derive the eastward and northward components of the wind velocity. First, the Karhunen-Lo`eve expansion is used to obtain a series expansion of the wind components in terms of a set of uncorrelated random variables and deterministic coefficients. Then, the uncertainty induced by these uncorrelated random variables in the outputs of the aircraft trajectory planner is quantified by means of the arbitrary polynomial chaos technique. Finally, the probability density function of the great circle distance between each pair of aircraft is derived from the polynomial expansions using a Gaussian kernel density estimator and employed to estimate the probability of conflict. The arbitrary polynomial chaos technique allows the effects of uncertainties in complex nonlinear dynamical system, such as those underlying aircraft trajectory planners, to be quantified with high computational efficiency, only requiring the existence of a finite number of statistical moments of the random variables of the Karhunen-Lo`eve expansion, while avoiding any assumption on their probability distributions. In order to demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed conflict detection method, numerical experiments are conducted through an optimal control based aircraft trajectory planner for a given wind forecast represented by an ensemble prediction system.

</details>


### [184] [Positive definiteness of a class of cyclic symmetric tensors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.01747)
*Yisheng Song*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文针对4阶3维循环对称张量建立了半正定性的充要条件，并给出了4阶n维对称张量正定性的充要条件，进而推导出一类4阶3维循环对称张量及一类非循环对称张量的正定性条件，最后将这些结论应用于三元四次齐次多项式的严格不等式构建。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究高阶对称张量的正定性（半正定性）判定问题，特别是针对循环对称张量这类具有特殊对称结构的张量，建立简洁有效的判定条件。

Method: 通过分析4阶循环对称张量的结构特性，推导半正定性的充要条件；利用对称张量的代数性质，建立正定性的充要条件；将理论结果应用于三元四次齐次多项式的不等式证明。

Result: 给出了4阶3维循环对称张量半正定性的充要条件；给出了4阶n维对称张量正定性的充要条件；得到了两类特殊张量（循环对称与非循环对称）的正定性条件；建立了若干三元四次齐次多项式的严格不等式。

Conclusion: 本文的理论结果不仅完善了循环对称张量正定性判定的理论基础，而且为三元四次齐次多项式的不等式研究提供了有效的代数工具。

Abstract: For a 4th order 3-dimensional cyclic symmetric tensor, a sufficient and necessary condition is bulit for its positive semi-definiteness. A sufficient and necessary condition of positive definiteness is showed for a 4th order $n$-dimensional symmetric tensor. With the help of such a condition, the positive definiteness of a class of 4th order 3-dimensional cyclic symmetric tensors is given. Moreover, the positive definiteness of a class of non-cyclic symmetric tensors is showed also. By applying these conclusions, several (strict) inequalities are erected for ternary quartic homogeneous polynomials.

</details>


### [185] [Fairness in Multi-Proposer-Multi-Responder Ultimatum Game](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.02410)
*Hana Krakovská,Rudolf Hanel,Mark Broom*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文提出多提议者-多响应者最后通牒博弈模型，推导了所有场景下的子博弈完美纳什均衡，并发现当玩家数量渐近时，响应者的"公平"阈值估计为31.8%或36.8%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统最后通牒博弈局限于两名玩家，而现实社会互动往往涉及多人群体交互。为填补这一空白，本文扩展了经典模型以研究多人同时博弈中的提议与拒绝行为。

Method: 构建多提议者-多响应者最后通牒博弈模型，允许多个响应者和提议者在一次性博弈中同时互动，在提议者和响应者内部引入竞争，并通过推导子博弈完美纳什均衡进行分析，同时考虑玩家数量的渐近情形。

Result: 推导出所有场景下的子博弈完美纳什均衡；在玩家数量趋于无穷时，得到两个潜在的"公平"阈值估计：提议者应向响应者提供31.8%或36.8%的份额。

Conclusion: 该模型能为经典一对一最后通牒博弈中实验观察到的提议和拒绝行为提供新见解，多人互动情境下的理论公平阈值对理解现实群体谈判具有参考价值。

Abstract: The Ultimatum Game is conventionally formulated in the context of two players. Nonetheless, real-life scenarios often entail community interactions among numerous individuals. To address this, we introduce an extended version of the Ultimatum Game, called the Multi-Proposer-Multi-Responder Ultimatum Game. In this model, multiple responders and proposers simultaneously interact in a one-shot game, introducing competition both within proposers and within responders. We derive subgame-perfect Nash equilibria for all scenarios and explore how these non-trivial values might provide insight into proposal and rejection behavior experimentally observed in the context of one vs. one Ultimatum Game scenarios. Additionally, by considering the asymptotic numbers of players, we propose two potential estimates for a "fair" threshold: either 31.8% or 36.8% of the pie (share) for the responder.

</details>


### [186] [A tactical time slot management problem under mixed logit demand](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.02308)
*Dorsa Abdolhamidi,Virginie Lurkin*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文研究订阅模式下考虑混合Logit需求的家庭配送战术性时间槽管理问题，提出了一个整合配送时段组合、价格折扣决策和路径优化的静态混合整数线性规划模型，并开发了基于仿真的自适应大邻域搜索算法结合样本均值近似方法，在大规模实例上验证了方法的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有时间槽管理研究未能充分捕捉顾客异质性（偏好差异）和随机选择行为，特别是在订阅制家庭配送场景下，传统Logit模型假设过于简化，无法准确刻画现实中的复杂需求结构。

Method: 建立静态混合整数线性规划模型，整合时段组合、定价与路径优化；采用混合Logit模型表征顾客异质性；提出基于仿真的自适应大邻域搜索（ALNS）算法，并结合样本均值近似（SAA）方法处理模拟选择概率带来的计算挑战。

Result: 在大规模算例上的计算实验表明，所提方法能有效捕捉随机顾客行为和偏好异质性，具备良好的可扩展性和灵活性。

Conclusion: 该方法为复杂需求结构下的时间槽管理优化提供了一种可扩展且灵活的解决方案，能够有效应对顾客异质性和随机选择行为。

Abstract: We study the tactical time slot management problem under mixed logit demand for attended home delivery in subscription settings. We propose a static mixed-integer linear programming model that integrates delivery slot assortment, price discount decisions, and routing optimization while capturing customer heterogeneity through the mixed logit model. To overcome the computational challenges posed by simulation-based choice probabilities, we develop a simulation-based Adaptive Large Neighborhood Search method aligned with a Sample Average Approximation reformulation. Computational experiments on large-scale instances demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach in capturing stochastic customer behavior and preference heterogeneity, providing a scalable and flexible method for optimizing time slot management under complex demand structures.

</details>


### [187] [Stochastic Singular Linear Systems and Related Linear-Quadratic Optimal Control Problems under Finite and Infinite Horizons](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.01820)
*Mengzhen Li,Tianyang Nie,Zhen Wu*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文研究了随机奇异系统的适定性条件，将有限和无限时域的随机奇异线性二次型控制问题转化为标准线性二次型问题，建立了PBH秩判据以确保无限时域问题的有限性，并给出了最优控制的反馈形式及算例验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究对随机奇异系统的适定性条件以及相应的线性二次型控制问题缺乏系统性分析，特别是在无限时域情形下的可控性与有限性保障机制尚不明确。

Method: 首先推导随机奇异系统适定性的充要条件；然后将有限和无限时域的随机奇异LQ问题转化为标准LQ问题；利用PBH秩判据分析系统可控性以保障无限时域问题的有限性；最后推导最优控制的反馈形式并通过算例验证。

Result: 建立了随机奇异系统适定性的充要条件，成功将两类时域LQ问题转化为标准形式，得到了PBH秩判据，导出了最优控制的反馈形式，并通过数值算例验证了方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 本文为随机奇异系统的LQ控制问题提供了完整的理论框架，包括适定性条件、问题转化方法、可控性判据及最优反馈控制形式，对随机奇异系统的控制理论具有重要推进意义。

Abstract: In this paper, we study the necessary and sufficient conditions for ensuring the well-posedness of the stochastic singular systems. Moreover, we investigate the stochastic singular linear-quadratic control problems, considering both finite and infinite horizons, and transform each of these problems into their corresponding normal linear-quadratic control problem. To guarantee the finiteness of the infinite-horizon linear-quadratic control problem, we establish the Popov-Belevitch-Hautus rank criterion for accessing the controllability of the stochastic system. Furthermore, we derive the feedback form of the optimal control. Finally, we provide solutions for illustrated examples of the stochastic singular linear-quadratic control problem in both finite and infinite horizons.

</details>


### [188] [Full error analysis of policy gradient learning algorithms for exploratory linear quadratic mean-field control problem in continuous time with common noise](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.02489)
*Noufel Frikha,Huyên Pham,Xuanye Song*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文研究了连续时间无限时域下带共同噪声和熵正则化的线性二次型平均场控制问题的强化学习方法，证明了基于模型的策略梯度收敛性，并提出了模型无关设置下基于两点梯度估计的PG算法的全局线性收敛性和样本复杂度分析，最后提供了数值验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将策略梯度方法扩展到带共同噪声和熵正则化的连续时间LQ-MFC问题，并建立其收敛理论保证和样本复杂度分析。

Method: 在基于模型的设置中，通过建立梯度支配条件证明收敛性；在模型无关的设置中，使用两点梯度估计的PG算法，从状态和群体分布的样本中学习参数化最优策略，并进行全面的误差分析。

Result: 在模型无关设置下证明了PG算法的全局线性收敛性，并给出了样本复杂度分析。

Conclusion: 所提出的PG方法在LQ-MFC问题中具有理论收敛保证，数值实验进一步支持了算法的收敛性。

Abstract: We consider reinforcement learning (RL) methods for finding optimal policies in linear quadratic (LQ) mean field control (MFC) problems over an infinite horizon in continuous time, with common noise and entropy regularization. We study policy gradient (PG) learning and first demonstrate convergence in a model-based setting by establishing a suitable gradient domination condition.Next, our main contribution is a comprehensive error analysis, where we prove the global linear convergence and sample complexity of the PG algorithm with two-point gradient estimates in a model-free setting with unknown parameters. In this setting, the parameterized optimal policies are learned from samples of the states and population distribution.Finally, we provide numerical evidence supporting the convergence of our implemented algorithms.

</details>


### [189] [Subpath-Based Column Generation for Electric Vehicle Routing Problems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.02640)
*Alexandre Jacquillat,Sean Lo*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文针对带时间窗和非线性充电的电动车辆路径问题（EVRPTWNL），提出了一种基于子路径标签设置算法的列生成方案，通过将定价问题分解为充电站间子路径生成与路径组合两个阶段，形式化支配框架确保算法收敛与精确性，实验证明该方法在计算时间和解质量上优于基于路径的基准方法，可扩展至100个客户的复杂实例。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 受广泛电气化目标的驱动，现有EVRP研究在联合优化路径-调度决策与充电决策方面存在不足，尤其是在考虑车辆容量、时间窗、电池容量及非线性充电特性时，需要更高效且精确的求解方法。

Method: 采用列生成方案，定价问题分解为两阶段：(i) 在充电站之间生成子路径；(ii) 组合子路径为完整路径并优化充电决策；形式化支配框架确保算法收敛性与精确性；支持多种EVRP变体及松弛强化策略（如ng-relaxations和subset-row cuts）。

Result: 计算结果表明，该方法在计算时间和解质量上均优于基于路径的基准方法，尤其在时间窗更宽、车辆可单次充电执行多任务以及需多次充电的场景下优势明显；可扩展至最多100个客户的原本难以处理的实例。

Conclusion: 所提出的子路径标签设置列生成方法能有效求解EVRPTWNL及多种EVRP变体，提升电气化物流领域的车队管理能力。

Abstract: Motivated by widespread electrification targets, this paper studies an Electric Vehicle Routing Problem with Time Windows and Nonlinear Charging (EVRPTWNL) that jointly optimizes routing-scheduling decisions and charging decisions given vehicle capacities, time windows and battery capacities. We develop a column generation scheme with a subpath-based label-setting algorithm that decomposes the pricing problem into two phases: (i) generating subpaths between charging stations, and (ii) combining subpaths into paths while optimizing charging decisions in between. We formalize a domination framework to establish the convergence and exactness of the algorithm, and prove that the methodology can solve a range of EVRP variants (e.g., with vehicle capacities, time windows, and nonlinear charging) and relaxation-tightening strategies (e.g., ng-relaxations and subset-row cuts). Computational results show improvements over path-based benchmarks in both computational time and solution quality, especially when time windows become wider, when vehicles can perform multiple tasks on a single charge and when vehicles still need to recharge several times across the planning horizon. Ultimately, the methodology can scale to otherwise intractable instances with up to 100 customers, thereby enhancing fleet management capabilities across electrified logistics areas.

</details>


### [190] [Feature-Based Interpretable Surrogates for Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.01869)
*Marc Goerigk,Michael Hartisch,Sebastian Merten,Kartikey Sharma*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种通过优化规则（而非决策树）来增强优化模型可解释性的方法，允许从实例映射到一组具有共同特征的解，并给出了精确的混合整数规划求解方法与启发式算法，实验表明该方法在解质量上优于现有可解释替代方法，同时探讨了可解释性与性能之间的权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为了让优化模型在实际中得到应用，用户必须信任其结果，而可解释性是信任的关键因素。现有可解释优化框架使用决策树将实例映射到具体解，本文希望使用更一般的优化规则进一步提升可解释性，同时给予决策者更多自由度。

Method: 提出优化规则的概念（从实例映射到一组具有共同特征的解），并分别设计了基于混合整数规划（MIP）的精确求解方法和启发式求解方法。

Result: 实验表明该方法在解质量上优于现有的可解释优化替代方法，并揭示了可解释性与性能之间的权衡关系。

Conclusion: 所提出的优化规则方法在提升可解释性的同时能保证较好的解质量，为可解释优化提供了一种更灵活的替代方案，但也面临相应挑战与机遇。

Abstract: For optimization models to be used in practice, it is crucial that users trust the results. A key factor in this aspect is the interpretability of the solution process. A previous framework for inherently interpretable optimization models used decision trees to map instances to solutions of the underlying optimization model. Based on this work, we investigate how we can use more general optimization rules to further increase interpretability and, at the same time, give more freedom to the decision-maker. The proposed rules do not map to a concrete solution but to a set of solutions characterized by common features. To find such optimization rules, we present an exact methodology using mixed-integer programming formulations as well as heuristics. We also outline the challenges and opportunities that these methods present. In particular, we demonstrate the improvement in solution quality that our approach offers compared to existing interpretable surrogates for optimization, and we discuss the relationship between interpretability and performance. These findings are supported by experiments using both synthetic and real-world data.

</details>


### [191] [Inventory problems and the parametric measure $m_λ$](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.02700)
*Irina Georgescu*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文通过引入参数化测度 $m_λ$ 推广了可信性测度，构建了风险中性多物品模糊库存模型，推导出需求为梯形和三角模糊数时的最优解公式，并将 $λ=1/2$ 时的结果退化到经典的 Li-Liu 可信性库存模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有可信性库存模型（Li & Liu, 2019）基于固定可信性测度，缺乏灵活性。本文通过参数化 $m_λ$ 测度推广可信性理论，旨在建立更具一般性的风险中性多物品模糊库存优化框架。

Method: （1）基于 $m_λ$ 测度定义模糊变量的 $m_λ$-期望值；（2）将多物品库存问题建模为 $m_λ$-期望值最大化问题；（3）推导一般解公式，并针对梯形和三角模糊数需求场景给出闭式最优解；（4）通过数值实例验证模型。

Result: 获得了多物品库存优化问题的一般解公式；给出了梯形和三角模糊数需求下的显式计算表达式；$λ=1/2$ 时精确回归到 Li-Liu 模型的最优解计算公式；数值算例验证了方法的有效性。

Conclusion: $m_λ$ 测度框架有效统一并推广了可信性库存模型，为不同风险偏好下的模糊库存决策提供了更灵活的理论工具。

Abstract: The credibility theory was introduced by B. Liu as a new way to describe the fuzzy uncertainty. The credibility measure is the fundamental notion of the credibility theory. Recently, L.Yang and K. Iwamura extended the credibility measure by defining the parametric measure $m_λ$ ($λ$ is a real parameter in the interval $[0,1]$ and for $λ= 1/2$ we obtain as a particular case the notion of credibility measure). By using the $m_λ$-measure, we studied in this paper a risk neutral multi-item inventory problem. Our construction generalizes the credibilistic inventory model developed by Y. Li and Y. Liu in 2019. In our model, the components of demand vector are fuzzy variables and the maximization problem is formulated by using the notion of $m_λ$-expected value. We shall prove a general formula for the solution of optimization problem, from which we obtained effective formulas for computing the optimal solutions in the particular cases where the demands are trapezoidal and triangular fuzzy numbers. For $λ=1/2$ we obtain as a particular case the computation formulas of the optimal solutions of the credibilistic inventory problem of Li and Liu. These computation formulas are applied for some $m_λ$-models obtained from numerical data.

</details>


### [192] [Stochastic Iterative Methods for Online Rank Aggregation from Pairwise Comparisons](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.02656)
*Benjamin Jarman,Lara Kassab,Deanna Needell,Alexander Sietsema*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文提出利用随机梯度下降方法解决大规模排序问题，基于（可能含噪声的）成对比较数据恢复底层排序，并证明了几乎必然收敛性，通过引入多种变体在速度与收敛性之间取得权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大规模排序问题中，给定一组成对比较数据（可能包含冗余或噪声），需要恢复出这些比较所隐含的底层排序。传统方法在内存和计算效率上存在瓶颈，亟需一种低内存开销且能处理噪声的高效算法。

Method: 采用随机梯度下降（SGD）方法解决大规模排序问题；引入多种SGD变体以应对噪声比较数据，在收敛速度与鲁棒性之间进行权衡；理论分析证明了算法在完全观测、部分观测和有噪声观测三种场景下的几乎必然收敛性。

Result: 理论证明了算法几乎必然收敛；实验揭示了恢复排序所需的最小观测数量以及算法能容忍的噪声水平上限。

Conclusion: 随机梯度下降方法能够高效、低内存地解决大规模排序问题，即使面对含噪声的成对比较数据也能保证收敛，为实际应用提供了理论保证与实验指导。

Abstract: In this paper, we consider large-scale ranking problems where one is given a set of (possibly non-redundant) pairwise comparisons and the underlying ranking explained by those comparisons is desired. We show that stochastic gradient descent approaches can be leveraged to offer convergence to a solution that reveals the underlying ranking while requiring low-memory operations. We introduce several variations of this approach that offer a tradeoff in speed and convergence when the pairwise comparisons are noisy (i.e., some comparisons do not respect the underlying ranking). We prove theoretical results for convergence almost surely and study several regimes including those with full observations, partial observations, and noisy observations. Our empirical results give insights into the number of observations required as well as how much noise in those measurements can be tolerated.

</details>


### [193] [$\ell_0$ Factor Analysis: A P-Stationary Point Theory](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.01888)
*Linyang Wang,Bin Zhu,Wanquan Liu*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文针对时间序列的因子分析，提出基于ℓ₀范数的非凸非光滑优化方法，实现协方差矩阵的低秩加稀疏分解，并设计了ADMM算法，理论证明了最优解存在性与收敛性，实验验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 因子分析作为降维技术广泛应用于平稳时间序列，其核心在于协方差矩阵的低秩加稀疏结构分解。现有方法多采用凸松弛（如ℓ₁范数）近似，但存在估计偏差。本文希望直接基于ℓ₀范数构建优化问题，以更精确地实现低秩稀疏分解，并保证理论上的最优解存在性与算法收敛性。

Method: 构建一个非凸非光滑的ℓ₀范数优化问题，用于实现样本协方差矩阵的低秩加稀疏分解。通过近端驻点的概念刻画最优解的存在性与特征。设计ADMM算法求解该ℓ₀优化问题，并在合理假设下证明算法子序列的收敛性。

Result: 理论层面：证明了ℓ₀优化问题最优解的存在性，并利用近端驻点对其进行了刻画；证明了ADMM算法在合理假设下具有子序列收敛性。实验层面：在数值实验中，所提方法优于文献中的若干对比方法。

Conclusion: 本文提出的基于ℓ₀范数的非凸非光滑优化方法能有效实现协方差矩阵的低秩稀疏分解，ADMM算法具备理论收敛保证且在实际中表现优于现有替代方法，为时间序列因子分析提供了新的求解框架。

Abstract: Factor Analysis is a widely used modeling technique for stationary time series which achieves dimensionality reduction by revealing a hidden low-rank plus sparse structure of the covariance matrix. Such an idea of parsimonious modeling has also been important in the field of systems and control. In this article, a nonconvex nonsmooth optimization problem involving the $\ell_0$ norm is constructed in order to achieve the low-rank and sparse additive decomposition of the sample covariance matrix. We establish the existence of an optimal solution and characterize these solutions via the concept of proximal stationary points. Furthermore, an ADMM algorithm is designed to solve the $\ell_0$ optimization problem, and a subsequence convergence result is proved under reasonable assumptions. Finally, numerical experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method in comparison with some alternatives in the literature.

</details>


### [194] [Optimal Gaussian Strategies for Vector-valued Witsenhausen Counterexample with Non-causal State Estimator](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.02807)
*Mengyuan Zhao,Tobias J. Oechtering,Maël Le Treust*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文研究了向量值Witsenhausen模型，其中第二个决策者非因果地进行向量估计，第一个决策者因果地行动。随着向量长度增长，通过单字母表达式刻画了功率代价与估计代价之间的最优权衡。结果表明，最佳线性方案通过两个仿射策略之间的时间共享实现，等同于Witsenhausen原始解的凸包络。但Witsenhausen的两点策略及Grover-Sahai的非因果方案均优于该线性方案，因此分组编码的增益仅在所有决策者均非因果操作时才能实现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为了理解在向量长度增长时，因果与非因果决策者共存场景下Witsenhausen模型的最优折中关系，并探究线性策略的极限以及分组编码增益的适用条件。

Method: 采用单字母表达式刻画最优折中，通过时间共享方法联合两个仿射策略实现最佳线性方案，并与Witsenhausen两點策略及Grover-Sahai非因果方案进行对比分析。

Result: 最佳线性方案等价于Witsenhausen原始解的凸包络；Witsenhausen的两点策略和Grover-Sahai的非因果方案均优于该线性方案；分组编码增益只有在所有决策者均为非因果操作时才可实现。

Conclusion: 在向量值Witsenhausen模型中，若第二个决策者非因果估计而第一个因果作用，线性策略存在性能瓶颈；非因果操作是实现分组编码增益的必要条件。

Abstract: In this study, we investigate a vector-valued Witsenhausen model where the second decision maker (DM) acquires a vector of observations before selecting a vector of estimations. Here, the first DM acts causally whereas the second DM estimates non-causally. When the vector length grows, we characterize, via a single-letter expression, the optimal trade-off between the power cost at the first DM and the estimation cost at the second DM. In this paper, we show that the best linear scheme is achieved by using the time-sharing method between two affine strategies, which coincides with the convex envelope of the solution of Witsenhausen in 1968. Here also, Witsenhausen's two-point strategy and the scheme of Grover and Sahai in 2010 where both devices operate non-causally, outperform our best linear scheme. Therefore, gains obtained with block-coding schemes are only attainable if all DMs operate non-causally.

</details>


### [195] [A novel shape optimization approach for source identification in elliptic equations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.02909)
*Wei Gong,Ziyi Zhang*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种针对椭圆方程源项识别问题的形状优化方法，将源强度与支撑区域同时优化的问题转化为仅依赖支撑区域的形状优化问题，并基于一阶最优性系统推导了形状导数，采用水平集方法实现了梯度下降形状优化算法，数值实验验证了算法的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 源识别问题源于两个应用背景：PDE约束最优控制中的执行器布置问题，以及源识别的正则化最小二乘公式。现有方法通常同时优化源强度及其支撑区域，计算复杂且耦合度高，需要一种更高效的方法来解耦这两个变量。

Method: 通过消除源强度变量，将原问题简化为关于耦合椭圆系统（一阶最优性系统）的形状优化问题。以正则化最小二乘逆源问题的数学模型为例，推导了形状导数，并结合水平集方法实现了梯度下降形状优化算法。

Result: 多组数值实验展示了所提算法在源识别问题中的有效性，能够准确重构源项的位置与形状。

Conclusion: 所提出的形状优化框架为椭圆方程源项识别问题提供了一种新的有效途径，通过将源强度与支撑区域解耦，显著降低了问题的复杂度，算法具有良好的数值性能。

Abstract: In this paper, we propose a novel shape optimization approach for the source identification of elliptic equations. This identification problem arises from two application backgrounds: actuator placement in PDE-constrained optimal controls and the regularized least-squares formulation of source identifications. The optimization problem seeks both the source strength and its support. By eliminating the variable associated with the source strength, we reduce the problem to a shape optimization problem for a coupled elliptic system, known as the first-order optimality system. As a model problem, we derive the shape derivative for the regularized least-squares formulation of the inverse source problem and propose a gradient descent shape optimization algorithm, implemented using the level-set method. Several numerical experiments are presented to demonstrate the efficiency of our proposed algorithms.

</details>


### [196] [Open-loop and closed-loop solvabilities for zero-sum stochastic linear quadratic differential games of Markovian regime switching system](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.01973)
*Fan Wu,Xun Li,Xin Zhang*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文研究了带马尔可夫跳的零和随机线性二次（SLQ）微分对策，通过"分解方法"将开环和闭环可解性问题分解为两个耦合的SLQ控制问题，在一致凸-凹条件下基于约束耦合微分Riccati方程（CDREs）的解构造了开环鞍点及其闭环表示，并利用维数扩展技术和连续方法证明了CDREs的可解性，最后给出了具体算例。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究对带马尔可夫跳的零和SLQ微分对策的开环和闭环可解性问题缺乏统一的处理框架，亟需建立系统的理论方法来解决这两类可解性问题。

Method: 提出"分解方法"将开环和闭环可解性问题分解为两个耦合的SLQ控制问题；在一致凸-凹条件下，基于约束耦合微分Riccati方程（CDREs）的解构造开环鞍点及其闭环表示；采用维数扩展技术和连续方法建立CDREs的可解性。

Result: 成功建立了开环和闭环可解性的理论框架，证明了CDREs的可解性，并给出了闭式鞍点的具体算例。

Conclusion: 所提出的分解方法能够有效解决带马尔可夫跳的零和SLQ微分对策的开环和闭环可解性问题，为后续相关研究提供了理论基础。

Abstract: This paper investigates zero-sum stochastic linear quadratic (SLQ) differential games with Markovian jumps. Open-loop and closed-loop solvabilities are studied by employing a new ``decomposition method", which decomposes the open-loop and closed-loop solvability problems of zero-sum SLQ differential games into two coupled SLQ control problems. Under the uniform convexity-concavity condition, we construct the open-loop saddle point along with its closed-loop representation based on the solution to a system of constrained coupled differential Riccati equations (CDREs), whose solvability is also established by employing the dimension extension technique and the continuation method. Finally, we provide a concrete example and present its closed-form saddle point based on the theoretical results obtained.

</details>


### [197] [Positive Dynamic Programming: A Critique](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.02809)
*Aaqib Peerzada*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: Blackwell在《正动态规划》中证明了有界最优回报条件下弱最优平稳策略的存在性，同时指出最优策略不一定存在（与折扣动态规划不同），并通过反例说明其早期结论不能推广到正动态规划情形。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 回答正动态规划问题中是否存在最优平稳策略这一核心问题，并检验早期关于折扣动态规划的结论是否能推广到正动态规划情形。

Method: 通过理论证明（主定理）建立有界最优回报下弱最优平稳策略存在的条件，并构造反例展示最优策略不存在的情况。

Result: 证明了有界最优回报条件下弱最优平稳策略的存在性；同时通过反例表明最优策略未必存在，且折扣动态规划的结果不能推广到正动态规划情形。

Conclusion: 正动态规划中，弱最优平稳策略在一定条件下（有界最优回报）存在，但最优策略并非总是存在，这区别于折扣动态规划的情形。

Abstract: In the article Positive Dynamic Programming, David Blackwell tries to answer the question concerning the existence of optimal stationary strategies for a positive dynamic programming problem. The principal results obtained in the paper are indicative of the existence of weakly optimal stationary plans where the optimal return need not be Borel measurable. More specifically, the main theorem establishes the condition for the weakly optimal stationary plan when the optimal return is bounded. Blackwell also gives an example that demonstrates that no optimal plan exists showing that the results obtained in his earlier work on discounted dynamic programming, cannot be generally extended to the positive case.

</details>


### [198] [Competing for the most profitable tour: The orienteering interdiction game](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.02959)
*Eduardo Álvarez-Miranda,Markus Sinnl,Kübra Tanınmış*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文提出了定向越野干扰博弈问题，并将其建模为双层优化问题，通过单层重构、分支切割算法和遗传算法进行求解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将经典定向越野问题扩展到竞争性博弈场景，研究一个参与者（领导者）通过干扰部分节点来最小化另一个参与者（跟随者）所能收集的总奖品的博弈问题。

Method: 将该问题建模为双层优化问题，通过基于干扰割的单层重构获得等价单层形式；提出带解池、割池和启发式方法的分支切割算法，以及遗传算法以获得高质量解。

Result: 基于文献中的定向越野问题实例进行计算实验，评估了各算法组件的有效性，并比较了分支切割算法和遗传算法在求解时间和解质量上的表现。

Conclusion: 所提出的分支切割算法能够精确求解该博弈问题，遗传算法则能在更短时间内获得高质量解，两种方法各有优势。

Abstract: The orienteering problem is a well-studied and fundamental problem in transportation science. In the problem, we are given a graph with prizes on the nodes and lengths on the edges, together with a budget on the overall tour length. The goal is to find a tour that respects the length budget and maximizes the collected prizes. In this work, we introduce the orienteering interdiction game, in which a competitor (the leader) tries to minimize the total prize that the follower can collect within a feasible tour. To this end, the leader interdicts some of the nodes so that the follower cannot collect their prizes. The resulting interdiction game is formulated as a bilevel optimization problem, and a single-level reformulation is obtained based on interdiction cuts. A branch-and-cut algorithm with several enhancements, including the use of a solution pool, a cut pool and a heuristic method for the follower's problem, is proposed. In addition to this exact approach, a genetic algorithm is developed to obtain high-quality solutions in a short computing time. In a computational study based on instances from the literature for the orienteering problem, the usefulness of the proposed algorithmic components is assessed, and the branch-and-cut and genetic algorithms are compared in terms of solution time and quality.

</details>


### [199] [Logarithmic regret in the ergodic Avellaneda-Stoikov market making model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.02025)
*Jialun Cao,David Šiška,Lukasz Szpruch,Tanut Treetanthiploet*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文分析了在遍历性Avellaneda-Stoikov做市模型中，学习流动性接受者价格敏感参数κ所产生的遗憾（regret），提出基于最大似然估计的学习算法可实现期望遗憾上界O(ln²T)，并通过数值实验验证了收敛性与鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在做市场景中，流动性接受者的价格敏感参数κ是未知的，做市商需要在线学习这一参数以优化报价策略，因此需要量化学习过程中的遗憾并设计高效的学习算法。

Method: 采用基于最大似然估计（MLE）的学习算法；利用遍历性HJB方程中ergodic常数关于κ的二阶可微性推导二阶性能差距；利用Bernoulli信号浓度不等式得到正则化MLE的学习速率。

Result: 提出了一个期望遗憾上界为O(ln²T)的学习算法，并通过数值实验验证了算法的收敛性和鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 在遍历性Avellaneda-Stoikov模型中，最大似然估计方法能够有效学习价格敏感参数，遗憾界为对数平方阶，算法具备理论保障和实际可行性。

Abstract: We analyse the regret arising from learning the price sensitivity parameter $κ$ of liquidity takers in the ergodic version of the Avellaneda-Stoikov market making model. We show that a learning algorithm based on a maximum-likelihood estimator for the parameter achieves the regret upper bound of order $\ln^2 T$ in expectation. To obtain the result we need two key ingredients. The first is the twice differentiability of the ergodic constant under the misspecified parameter in the Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman (HJB) equation with respect to $κ$, which leads to a second--order performance gap. The second is the learning rate of the regularised maximum-likelihood estimator which is obtained from concentration inequalities for Bernoulli signals. Numerical experiments confirm the convergence and the robustness of the proposed algorithm.

</details>


### [200] [Randomized quasi-Monte Carlo methods for risk-averse stochastic optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.02842)
*Olena Melnikov,Johannes Milz*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文针对风险函数基于样本的近似的图收敛和一致大数定律进行了理论分析，涵盖了蒙特卡洛和随机拟蒙特卡洛（如加扰网络积分）方法，并将其应用于风险厌恶随机规划和变分不等式。数值实验表明，基于加扰Sobol序列的RQMC方法在风险厌恶优化中比MC方法具有更小的偏差和均方根误差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为基于样本的风险函数近似方法（MC和RQMC）提供严格的图收敛和一致大数定律理论保证，填补风险厌恶随机规划和变分不等式近似理论方面的空白。

Method: 建立了样本近似下风险函数的图收敛和一致大数定律，涵盖MC和RQMC（如加扰网络积分）方法，并通过数值模拟对比MC和基于加扰Sobol序列的RQMC方法在风险厌恶优化中的表现。

Result: 基于加扰Sobol序列的RQMC方法在风险厌恶优化中相比MC方法具有更小的偏差和均方根误差。

Conclusion: 所提出的理论结果为风险厌恶随机程序和变分不等式的样本近似提供了收敛性保证，且RQMC方法在数值表现上优于MC方法。

Abstract: We establish epigraphical and uniform laws of large numbers for sample-based approximations of law invariant risk functionals. These sample-based approximation schemes include Monte Carlo (MC) and certain randomized quasi-Monte Carlo integration (RQMC) methods, such as scrambled net integration. Our results can be applied to the approximation of risk-averse stochastic programs and risk-averse stochastic variational inequalities. Our numerical simulations empirically demonstrate that RQMC approaches based on scrambled Sobol' sequences can yield smaller bias and root mean square error than MC methods for risk-averse optimization.

</details>


### [201] [Incremental Gauss--Newton Methods with Superlinear Convergence Rates](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.03195)
*Zhiling Zhou,Zhuanghua Liu,Chengchang Liu,Luo Luo*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种增量高斯-牛顿（IGN）方法，用于求解具有Hölder连续雅可比的大规模非线性方程组，实现了显式超线性收敛速度，优于现有仅达到线性收敛的方法，并提供了小批量扩展以获得更快的超线性收敛。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在处理具有Hölder连续雅可比的大规模非线性方程组时仅能达到线性收敛速度，缺乏能够实现超线性收敛的高效算法。

Method: 将问题建模为具有有限和结构的非线性最小二乘问题，提出增量高斯-牛顿（IGN）方法，每轮仅利用一个分量的信息进行增量迭代，并进一步设计了小批量扩展版本以加速收敛。

Result: IGN方法实现了显式超线性收敛速度，小批量扩展版本获得了更快的超线性收敛速度，数值实验验证了方法的优越性。

Conclusion: 提出的IGN方法及其小批量扩展在求解大规模非线性方程组方面显著优于现有仅线性收敛的方法。

Abstract: This paper addresses the challenge of solving large-scale nonlinear equations with Hölder continuous Jacobians. We introduce a novel Incremental Gauss--Newton (IGN) method within explicit superlinear convergence rate, which outperforms existing methods that only achieve linear convergence rate. In particular, we formulate our problem by the nonlinear least squares with finite-sum structure, and our method incrementally iterates with the information of one component in each round. We also provide a mini-batch extension to our IGN method that obtains an even faster superlinear convergence rate. Furthermore, we conduct numerical experiments to show the advantages of the proposed methods.

</details>


### [202] [Parameter estimation of hidden Markov models: comparison of EM and quasi-Newton methods with a new hybrid algorithm](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.02477)
*Sidonie Foulon,Thérèse Truong,Anne-Louise Leutenegger,Hervé Perdry*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种混合算法QNEM，结合Baum-Welch算法（EM特例）和拟牛顿法（L-BFGS-B）来优化隐马尔可夫模型（HMM）的参数估计。该算法根据似然函数的凸性在两种方法之间切换，以兼顾Baum-Welch的全局收敛性和拟牛顿法的快速收敛性。实验表明，QNEM整体性能良好，速度始终不低于L-BFGS-B，但最优算法因模型而异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: HMM参数估计的Baum-Welch算法（EM算法）保证收敛到局部最优但收敛速度慢，而拟牛顿法（如L-BFGS-B）收敛快但实现复杂且需处理参数有界约束。为结合两者优势，作者提出QNEM混合算法。

Method: 提出QNEM混合算法，在Baum-Welch算法和L-BFGS-B拟牛顿法之间根据似然函数的凸性动态切换。通过四个不同HMM模型的参数估计任务，将QNEM与Baum-Welch、SQUAREM（EM加速算法）和L-BFGS-B进行性能对比。

Result: 最佳算法取决于具体模型。QNEM整体表现良好，速度始终不低于L-BFGS-B。在某些多最优值场景中，Baum-Welch和SQUAREM比拟牛顿法和QNEM更快。

Conclusion: QNEM为HMM参数估计提供了一种有前景的替代方案，在多种模型上展现出可靠的性能。

Abstract: Hidden Markov Models (HMM) model a sequence of observations that are dependent on a hidden (or latent) state that follow a Markov chain. These models are widely used in diverse fields including ecology, speech recognition, and genetics.Parameter estimation in HMM is typically performed using the Baum-Welch algorithm, a special case of the Expectation-Maximisation (EM) algorithm. While this method guarantee the convergence to a local maximum, its convergence rates is usually slow.Alternative methods, such as the direct maximisation of the likelihood using quasi-Newton methods (such as L-BFGS-B) can offer faster convergence but can be more complicated to implement due to challenges to deal with the presence of bounds on the space of parameters.We propose a novel hybrid algorithm, QNEM, that combines the Baum-Welch and the quasi-Newton algorithms. QNEM aims to leverage the strength of both algorithms by switching from one method to the other based on the convexity of the likelihood function.We conducted a comparative analysis between QNEM, the Baum-Welch algorithm, an EM acceleration algorithm called SQUAREM (Varadhan, 2008, Scand J Statist), and the L-BFGS-B quasi-Newton method by applying these algorithms to four examples built on different models. We estimated the parameters of each model using the different algorithms and evaluated their performances.Our results show that the best-performing algorithm depends on the model considered. QNEM performs well overall, always being faster or equivalent to L-BFGS-B. The Baum-Welch and SQUAREM algorithms are faster than the quasi-Newton and QNEM algorithms in certain scenarios with multiple optimum. In conclusion, QNEM offers a promising alternative to existing algorithms.

</details>


### [203] [Discrete approximations and optimality conditions for integro-differential inclusions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.02856)
*Abderrahim Bouach,Tahar Haddad,Boris S. Mordukhovich*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文研究了一类由非凸积分-微分包含控制且带有端点约束的广义Bolza问题，其中积分项为含时变核的Volterra形式。作者实现了三个目标：(1) 构建了连续时间系统到离散时间系统的逼近，证明可行解在W^{1,2}范数下的强收敛性；(2) 利用变分分析的广义微分工具推导离散问题的最优性必要条件；(3) 通过对离散逼近取极限，建立连续时间问题的最优性必要条件，特别得到了Volterra型新最优性条件。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究对非凸积分-微分包含系统的广义Bolza问题缺乏系统的最优性条件，特别是Volterra型积分项带来的时变动态特性使得传统方法难以适用，亟需建立相应的理论框架和必要条件。

Method: 采用离散逼近方法，将连续时间积分-微分包含系统离散化，利用W^{1,2}范数拓扑证明可行解的强逼近性质；运用变分分析中的广义微分工具（如次微分、法锥等）处理非光滑性，推导离散问题的必要条件；最后通过极限过渡得到连续时间问题的最优性条件。

Result: 建立了离散-连续系统间的强逼近收敛性；得到了离散时间问题的最优性必要条件；通过对极限过程的分析，导出了连续时间积分-微分包含系统的Volterra型新最优性必要条件。

Conclusion: 成功为含Volterra型积分项的广义Bolza问题建立了完整的最优性必要条件理论框架，所得到的Volterra型条件是该领域对积分-微分包含动态优化的关键性理论成果。

Abstract: This paper addresses a new class of generalized Bolza problems governed by nonconvex integro-differential inclusions with endpoint constraints on trajectories, where the integral terms are given in the general (with time-dependent integrands in the dynamics) Volterra form. We pursue here a threefold goal. First we construct well-posed approximations of continuous-time integro-differential systems by their discrete-time counterparts with showing that any feasible solution to the original system can be strongly approximated in the $W^{1,2}$-norm topology by piecewise-linear extensions of feasible discrete trajectories. This allows us to verify in turn the strong convergence of discrete optimal solutions to a prescribed local minimizer for the original problem. Facing intrinsic nonsmoothness of original integro-differential problem and its discrete approximations, we employ appropriate tools of generalized differentiation in variational analysis to derive necessary optimality conditions for discrete-time problems (which is our second goal) and finally accomplish our third goal to obtain necessary conditions for the original continuous-time problems by passing to the limit from discrete approximations. In this way we establish, in particular, a novel necessary optimality condition of the Volterra type, which is the crucial result for dynamic optimization of integro-differential inclusions.

</details>


### [204] [On second order conditions for singular optimal control of port-Hamiltonian systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.03213)
*M. Soledad Aronna,Volker Mehrmann*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文研究了端口-哈密顿（描述子）系统的非线性奇异最优控制问题，采用包含系统供给能量作为特例的一般控制仿射代价泛函。首先针对有无控制约束的常微分方程情况推导最优性条件，并展示在线性情况下这些条件尤为简洁，随后将这些结果扩展到非线性端口-哈密顿描述子系统。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将奇异最优控制理论应用于端口-哈密顿系统这一具有特殊结构（如能量守恒/耗散性质）的系统，以利用其结构特性推导更简洁的最优性条件。

Method: 将一般最优控制理论应用于特殊结构的端口-哈密顿系统，推导最优性条件；先处理常微分方程情形（含/不含控制约束），再扩展至描述子系统。

Result: 得到了端口-哈密顿系统奇异最优控制问题的简洁最优性条件，尤其在线性情况下条件形式优雅；并将结果成功推广至非线性描述子系统。

Conclusion: 端口-哈密顿结构能够导出简洁的最优性条件，且该框架可推广至更一般的描述子系统类。

Abstract: We study nonlinear singular optimal control problems of port-Hamil-tonian (descriptor) systems. We employ general control-affine cost functionals that include as a special case the energy supplied to the system. We first derive optimality conditions for the case of ordinary differential equations with and without control bounds by applying the general theory to the specially structured port-Hamiltonian case, and show that this leads to elegant optimality conditions, in particular in the linear case. We then extend these results to classes of nonlinear port-Hamiltonian descriptor systems.

</details>


### [205] [Stochastic maximum principle for optimal control problem with varying terminal time and non-convex control domain](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.02491)
*Jin Shi,Shuzhen Yang*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文研究状态约束下具有可变终端时间的随机最优控制问题，通过建立渐近一阶和二阶伴随方程及变分方程，证明了无需凸性控制域和含控制扩散系数的庞特里亚金随机最大值原理，并通过两个算例验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
