Motivation: 现有随机最优控制理论中的终端时间通常是固定的或自由但不受状态均值影响，而实际工程与经济模型中终端时间往往依赖于系统状态的整体表现（如平均状态达到某阈值时停止），因此需要发展能处理可变终端时间结构下的随机最优控制理论。

Method: 针对终端时间随状态均值变化的特征，首先构造了适用于可变终端时间的渐近一阶和二阶伴随方程；其次推导了相应的变分方程；在此基础上，在不要求控制域凸性且扩散系数包含控制变量的设定下，证明了庞特里亚金随机最大值原理。

Result: 成功在非凸控制域和含控制扩散系数的条件下，建立了状态约束下可变终端时间随机最优控制的庞特里亚金最大值原理，并通过两个数值算例验证了理论结果的有效性。

Conclusion: 本文提出的可变终端时间框架拓展了随机最优控制理论的适用范围，为终端时间由系统状态均值决定的实际问题提供了严格的数学理论基础。

Abstract: In this paper, we consider a varying terminal time structure for the stochastic optimal control problem under state constraints, in which the terminal time varies with the mean value of the state. In this new stochastic optimal control system, the control domain does not need to be convex and the diffusion coefficient contains the control variable. To overcome the difficulty in the proof of the related Pontryagin's stochastic maximum principle, we develop asymptotic first- and second-order adjoint equations for the varying terminal time, and then establish its variational equation. In the end, two examples are given to verify the main results of this study.

</details>


### [206] [Viability for locally monotone evolution inclusions and lower semicontinuous solutions of Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman equations in infinite dimensions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.02915)
*Jichao Jiang,Christian Keller*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文为具有局部单调算子的发展包含建立了可行性的充要条件，并证明了相关Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman方程下半连续解的良好适定性，从而在多个方面推广了Bayraktar和Keller的结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将Bayraktar和Keller关于无穷维Hamilton-Jacobi方程的结果从单调算子推广到局部单调算子，以涵盖更广泛的方程类型（如Burgers方程、反应扩散方程、2D Navier-Stokes方程），并处理带状态约束的最优控制问题以及获得粘性解的唯一性。

Method: 建立具有局部单调算子的发展包含的可行性充要条件，并在此基础上证明Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman方程下半连续解的良好适定性。

Result: (1) 获得了局部单调算子情形下发展包含可行性的充要条件；(2) 证明了相关HJB方程下半连续解的良好适定性；(3) 将适用范围扩展到Burgers方程、反应扩散方程、2D Navier-Stokes方程等；(4) 适用于带状态约束的最优控制问题；(5) 获得了粘性解的唯一性。

Conclusion: 本文的结果在单调算子情形下也是全新的，为更广泛一类非线性偏微分方程的最优控制问题提供了理论基础。

Abstract: We establish necessary and sufficient conditions for viability of evolution inclusions with locally monotone operators in the sense of Liu and Röckner [J. Funct. Anal., 259 (2010), pp. 2902-2922]. This allows us to prove wellposedness of lower semicontinuous solutions of Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman equations associated to the optimal control of evolution inclusions. Thereby, we generalize results in Bayraktar and Keller [J. Funct. Anal., 275 (2018), pp. 2096-2161] on Hamilton-Jacobi equations in infinite dimensions with monotone operators in several ways. First, we permit locally monotone operators. This extends the applicability of our theory to a wider class of equations such as Burgers' equations, reaction-diffusion equations, and 2D Navier-Stokes equations. Second, our results apply to optimal control problems with state constraints. Third, we have uniqueness of viscosity solutions. Our results on viability and lower semicontinuous solutions are new even in the case of monotone operators.

</details>


### [207] [Asynchronous Parallel Policy Gradient Methods for the Linear Quadratic Regulator](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.03233)
*Xingyu Sha,Feiran Zhao,Keyou You*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文研究了异步并行零阶策略梯度（AZOPG）方法在连续时间线性二次型调节问题中的应用，并从理论和仿真两方面证明了其线性加速特性，揭示了并行工作器在策略学习中的优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 异步并行学习在强化学习中取得了广泛成功，但其收敛性能尚未得到严格评估，本文旨在填补这一理论空白。

Method: 采用异步并行零阶策略梯度（AZOPG）方法，类似于A3C算法，利用多个并行工作器异步估计策略梯度并发送给中央主节点进行策略更新，应用于连续时间线性二次型调节问题。

Result: 量化了AZOPG方法的策略迭代收敛速率，从理论和仿真两方面证明了其线性加速特性。

Conclusion: AZOPG方法在线性二次型调节问题中具有线性加速效果，验证了并行工作器在策略学习中的优势。

Abstract: Learning policies in an asynchronous parallel way is essential to the numerous successes of RL for solving large-scale problems. However, their convergence performance is still not rigorously evaluated. To this end, we adopt the asynchronous parallel zero-order policy gradient (AZOPG) method to solve the continuous-time linear quadratic regulation problem. Specifically, as in the celebrated A3C algorithm, there are multiple parallel workers to asynchronously estimate PGs which are then sent to a central master for policy updates. Via quantifying its convergence rate of policy iterations, we show the linear speedup property of the AZOPG, both in theory and simulation, which clearly reveals the advantages of using parallel workers for learning policies.

</details>


### [208] [Revenue Management with Calendar-Aware and Dependent Demands: Asymptotically Tight Fluid Approximations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.02637)
*Weiyuan Li,Paat Rusmevichientong,Huseyin Topaloglu*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文针对收益管理中的需求建模问题，提出了一个支持任意分布且允许跨阶段需求依赖的流体近似方法，并证明了其渐近最优性，这是首个在依赖需求和任意分布下达到渐近最优策略的工作。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有收益管理中的需求模型多基于离散时间近似泊松过程，无法兼容两种自然需求建模需求：(1) 使用任意分布刻画每个规范时间段（如一周）的需求；(2) 捕捉不同时间段之间需求的依赖关系。本文旨在构建与自然预测方法兼容的收益管理模型及其对应的流体近似。

Method: 将销售期划分为多个阶段，每个阶段对应日历上的规范时间段。每个阶段的顾客到达数量服从任意分布，且依赖于前一阶段的到达数量。基于此模型，推导出流体近似的正确形式：约束条件使用资源在某个时间点之前的期望容量消耗，该期望值以该时间点之前阶段的到达数量为条件。在资源容量和阶段数以相同速率增长的渐进框架下进行分析。

Result: 给出了正确的流体近似形式，并证明了其产生的策略是渐近最优的（性能保证随着规模增长收敛到1）。这是首个在依赖需求和任意分布下得到渐近最优策略的结果。计算实验表明，使用正确的流体近似能在实践中产生显著影响。

Conclusion: 本文提出的流体近似方法在理论上具有渐近最优保证，并且在实践中能带来显著的性能提升。该方法解决了收益管理中长期存在的需求建模灵活性与最优策略之间的张力。

Abstract: When modeling the demand in revenue management systems, a natural approach is to focus on a canonical interval of time, such as a week, so that we forecast the demand over each week in the selling horizon. Ideally, we would like to use random variables with general distributions to model the demand over each week. The current demand can give a signal for the future demand, so we also would like to capture the dependence between the demands over different weeks. Prevalent demand models in the literature, which are based on a discrete-time approximation to a Poisson process, are not compatible with these needs. In this paper, we focus on revenue management models that are compatible with a natural approach for forecasting the demand. Building such models through dynamic programming is not difficult. We divide the selling horizon into multiple stages, each stage being a canonical interval of time on the calendar. We have random number of customer arrivals in each stage, whose distribution is arbitrary and depends on the number of arrivals in the previous stage. The question we seek to answer is the form of the corresponding fluid approximation. We give the correct fluid approximation in the sense that it yields asymptotically optimal policies. The form of our fluid approximation is surprising as its constraints use expected capacity consumption of a resource up to a certain time period, conditional on the demand in the stage just before the time period in question. As the resource capacities and number of stages increase with the same rate, our performance guarantee converges to one. To our knowledge, this result gives the first asymptotically optimal policy under dependent demands with arbitrary distributions. Our computational experiments indicate that using the correct fluid approximation can make a dramatic impact in practice.

</details>


### [209] [Competitive Facility Location under Cross-Nested Logit Customer Choice Model: Hardness and Exact Approaches](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.02925)
*Ba Luat Le,Tien Mai,Thuy Anh Ta,Minh Hoang Ha,Duc Minh Vu*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文研究了竞争性设施选址问题，在客户采用交叉嵌套Logit（CNL）选择模型的假设下，证明了该问题即使仅有一类客户也是NP难的，但通过变量替换可将非凹目标函数转化为凸规划问题，并采用外近似算法高效求解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 设施选址问题中客户选择行为至关重要，现有研究多采用Logit或Nested Logit等较简单模型，而CNL模型更具灵活性和一般性。本文旨在探索CNL模型下竞争性设施选址问题的计算复杂性与求解方法。

Method: 首先证明单客户类下CNL选址问题是NP难的，并论证该下界是紧的（Logit/Nested Logit单客户类可多项式求解）；接着证明原始目标函数非凹，但通过变量替换将其转化为具有凹目标与凸约束的凸规划；最后设计外近似算法进行求解。

Result: 证明了CNL选址问题的NP难性；发现了变量替换下的凸性转化机制；外近似算法可求得全局最优解；大量实验验证了算法效率及CNL模型在选址中的优势。

Conclusion: CNL模型下的竞争性设施选址问题虽为NP难，但通过凸转化可有效求解，且相比简单选择模型能带来更好的选址决策效果。

Abstract: We study the competitive facility location problem, where a firm aims to establish new facilities in a market already occupied by competitors. In this problem, customer behavior is crucial for making optimal location decisions. We explore a general class of customer choice models, known as the cross-nested logit (CNL) model, which is recognized for its flexibility and generality in predicting people's choice behavior. To explore the problem, we first demonstrate that it is NP-hard, even when there is only one customer class. We further show that this hardness result is tight, as the facility location problem under any simpler choice models (such as the logit or nested logit) is polynomial-time solvable when there is one customer class. To tackle the resulting facility location problem, we demonstrate that the objective function under a general cross-nested structure is not concave. Interestingly, we show that by a change of variables, the objective function can be converted to a convex program (i.e., a maximization problem with a concave objective and convex constraints), enabling it to be solved to optimality via an outer-approximation algorithm. Extensive experiments show the efficiency of our approach and provide analyses on the benefits of using the cross-nested model in the facility location context.

</details>


### [210] [Uniqueness Analysis of Controllability Scores and Their Application to Brain Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.03023)
*Kazuhiro Sato,Ryohei Kawamura*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文研究了两种控制理论中心性度量——体积可控性分数(VCS)和平均能量可控性分数(AECS)在线性时不变网络系统中的应用，证明了它们对几乎所有指定终端时间的唯一性，分析了在对称和斜对称系统中的差异，以及极小终端时间下的均匀性，并证明了投影梯度法的线性收敛性。在真实脑网络数据上的评估揭示了VCS和AECS的对比性评价趋势。




<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在网络系统中评估节点中心性对于理解节点重要性和指导决策至关重要。动态网络中需要引入可控性视角来识别关键节点，而现有中心性度量在唯一性、可解释性和比较性方面存在不足。



Method: 研究了两种控制理论中心性度量VCS和AECS；证明了其在几乎所有终端时间下的唯一性；分析了对称与斜对称过渡矩阵下的差异；研究了终端时间极小时的均匀性；证明了投影梯度法序列的线性收敛性；在Laplacian动力学建模的脑网络上进行了真实数据评估。



Result: 证明了VCS和AECS在几乎所有指定终端时间下的唯一性；发现两者在对称与斜对称系统中存在显著差异；极小终端时间下两者趋于均匀；投影梯度法线性收敛；真实脑网络数据中AECS偏好认知和运动功能脑区，VCS强调感觉和情感脑区。



Conclusion: VCS和AECS作为控制理论中心性度量具有唯一性和可解释性，在不同网络结构中表现出显著差异，在脑网络分析中揭示了互补的节点重要性评估视角。



Abstract: Assessing centrality in network systems is critical for understanding node importance and guiding decision-making processes. In dynamic networks, incorporating a controllability perspective is essential for identifying key nodes. In this paper, we study two control theoretic centrality measures -- the Volumetric Controllability Score (VCS) and Average Energy Controllability Score (AECS) -- to quantify node importance in linear time-invariant network systems. We prove the uniqueness of VCS and AECS for almost all specified terminal times, thereby enhancing their applicability beyond previously recognized cases. This ensures their interpretability, comparability, and reproducibility. Our analysis reveals substantial differences between VCS and AECS in linear systems with symmetric and skew-symmetric transition matrices. We also investigate the dependence of VCS and AECS on the terminal time and prove that when this parameter is extremely small, both scores become essentially uniform. Additionally, we prove that a sequence generated by a projected gradient method for computing VCS and AECS converges linearly to both measures under several assumptions. Finally, evaluations on brain networks modeled via Laplacian dynamics using real data reveal contrasting evaluation tendencies and correlations for VCS and AECS, with AECS favoring brain regions associated with cognitive and motor functions, while VCS emphasizes sensory and emotional regions.

</details>


### [211] [NewVEM: A Newton Vertex Exchange Method for a Class of Constrained Self-Concordant Minimization Problems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.03294)
*Ling Liang,Kim-Chuan Toh,Haizhao Yang*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: NewVEM是一种牛顿顶点交换方法，用于高效求解广义单纯形约束下的自和谐极小化问题，采用“快×快”双层框架，内外环均线性收敛。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在求解广义单纯形约束下的自和谐极小化问题时效率有限，需要一种兼具高效率与可扩展性的新算法。

Method: 提出NewVEM算法，外层循环采用投影牛顿法，内层循环采用顶点交换法求解强凸二次子问题；此外，设计了一个半光滑牛顿法用于计算到广义单纯形的投影以获取可行初始点。

Result: 在技术条件下，内外环均以线性速率局部收敛，数值实验证明了算法的高效性和可扩展性。

Conclusion: NewVEM是一种高效可扩展的框架，适用于广义单纯形约束下的自和谐极小化问题，并具有现实应用潜力。

Abstract: We propose \textbf{NewVEM}, a Newton vertex exchange method for efficiently solving self-concordant minimization problems under generalized simplex constraints. The algorithm features a two-level structure: the outer loop employs a projected Newton method, and the inner loop uses a vertex exchange approach to solve strongly convex quadratic subproblems. Both loops converge locally at linear rates under technical conditions, resulting in a ``fast $\times$ fast'' framework that demonstrates high efficiency and scalability in practice. To get a feasible initial point to execute the algorithm, we also present and analyze a highly efficient semismooth Newton method for computing the projection onto the generalized simplex. The excellent practical performance of the proposed algorithms is demonstrated by a set of numerical experiments. Our results further motivate the potential real-world applications of the considered model and the proposed algorithms.

</details>


### [212] [Fair Clustering with Minimum Representation Constraints](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.02963)
*Connor Lawless,Oktay Gunluk*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文研究在k-means和k-medians聚类中引入公平性约束——要求每个群组在至少指定数量的簇中达到最低代表比例，并提出名为MiniReL的交替最小化算法来求解这一混合整数非线性优化问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在许多实际应用（如选区划分、播放列表、电视频道）中，聚类结果对应现实世界的构造，一个群体只有在其所在簇中达到最低代表比例（如50%）才能获得利益。现有聚类方法未考虑这种公平性约束。

Method: 将问题建模为混合整数非线性优化问题，提出交替最小化算法MiniReL。尽管公平约束导致分配子问题NP-hard，但设计了多种启发式策略使其适用于大规模数据集。

Result: 在标准基准数据集上的数值结果表明，所提方法能够在不增加聚类成本的前提下获得公平的聚类结果。

Conclusion: MiniReL算法能有效在聚类问题中融入公平性约束，在保持聚类质量的同时实现群体代表比例的公平性要求。

Abstract: Clustering is a well-studied unsupervised learning task that aims to partition data points into a number of clusters. In many applications, these clusters correspond to real-world constructs (e.g., electoral districts, playlists, TV channels), where a group (e.g., social or demographic) benefits only if it reaches a minimum level of representation in the cluster (e.g., 50% to elect their preferred candidate). In this paper, we study the k-means and k-medians clustering problems under the additional fairness constraint that each group must attain a minimum level of representation in at least a specified number of clusters. We formulate this problem as a mixed-integer (nonlinear) optimization problem and propose an alternating minimization algorithm, called MiniReL, to solve it. Although incorporating fairness constraints results in an NP-hard assignment problem within the MiniReL algorithm, we present several heuristic strategies that make the approach practical even for large datasets. Numerical results demonstrate that our method yields fair clusters without increasing clustering cost across standard benchmark datasets.

</details>


### [213] [Global null controllability of stochastic semilinear complex Ginzburg-Landau equations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.03114)
*Sen Zhang,Hang Gao,Ganghua Yuan*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文研究了带有全局Lipschitz非线性项的前向和后向随机半线性复Ginzburg-Landau方程的零可控性。通过推导线性系统的改进全局Carleman估计，得到了带L^2值源项的随机线性系统的可控性结果，并结合Banach不动点论证，推导出半线性系统的零可控性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究随机半线性复Ginzburg-Landau方程的零可控性，该类方程在物理和工程领域有重要应用（如超导、流体动力学等），但可控性分析较为复杂。

Method: 首先推导线性系统的改进全局Carleman估计，获得带L^2值源项的随机线性系统的可控性；再利用Banach不动点定理，将结果推广至半线性系统。

Result: 成功建立了前向和后向随机半线性复Ginzburg-Landau方程在全局Lipschitz非线性条件下的零可控性。

Conclusion: 结合Carleman估计与不动点方法是处理随机半线性偏微分方程可控性问题的有效途径，为更复杂非线性和随机系统的控制理论研究提供了基础。

Abstract: In this paper, we study the null controllability of forward and backward stochastic semilinear complex Ginzburg-Landau equations with global Lipschitz nonlinear terms. For this purpose, by deriving an improved global Carleman estimates for linear systems, we obtain the controllability results for the stochastic linear systems with a $L^2$-valued source term. Based on it, together with a Banach fixed point argument, the desired null controllability of semilinear systems is derived.

</details>


### [214] [Fault-Ride-Through (FRT) Control of a grid-connected Fixed-Speed Wind Energy Conversion System using STATCOM](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.03429)
*Ayobami Olajube,Satish Vedula,Koto Omiloli,Olugbenga Anubi*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文提出使用48脉冲三相STATCOM对固定转速鼠笼式感应发电机（SCIG）进行无功补偿和故障穿越（FRT）控制，以解决其并网电压稳定性问题，并与双馈感应发电机（DFIG）方案进行了对比分析。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 风能转换系统具有随机性、低惯性、无功补偿能力差且易受故障影响。固定转速SCIG在故障时无法自行稳定，需要外部无功支持；而DFIG虽能独立控制有功/无功，但控制复杂且成本高。因此需要一种针对SCIG的经济有效的电压稳定与故障穿越解决方案。

Method: 采用48脉冲三相STATCOM（静态同步补偿器），将其接入并网电力系统的公共耦合点（PCC），用于固定转速SCIG的无功补偿和故障穿越控制，以抑制故障引起的过电压。

Result: 该方案能够保证在注入故障后的特定时间范围内，实现PCC处的电压稳定和故障穿越控制，使SCIG具备与DFIG相近的故障恢复能力。

Conclusion: 48脉冲STATCOM可有效替代复杂昂贵的DFIG方案，为固定转速SCIG提供无功补偿和故障穿越能力，是一种经济可行的并网风能系统稳定性解决方案。

Abstract: Wind energy conversion system (WECS) is stochastic in nature and has low inertia to grid voltage instability, poor reactive power compensation and most importantly fault susceptibility. Variable speed WECS such as a doubly-fed induction generators (DFIG) are well known to reach steady state quickly after fault occurrence without the need for an external reactive power source because of the presence of a back-to-back converter that provides independent control of the active and reactive power unlike in the fixed-speed squirrel cage induction generator (SCIG) counterpart that cant be stabilized unless ab external source of reactive power support is present. However, controlling DFIG is complicated and costly due to complete tripping unlike the fixed-speed generators which doesnt trip completely when fault occurs. Hence, in this work, a 48-pulse, 3-phase static synchronous compensator (STATCOM) is used to ensure reactive power compensation and fault-ride through (FRT) control of the SCIG against over-voltage emanating from fault occurrence in a grid-connected power system. The goal here is to guarantee voltage stability and fault-ride through control against injected faults within certain time ranges at the point of common coupling (PCC) between the AC sources, the load, and the fixed-speed WECS.

</details>


### [215] [Resilient Two-Time-Scale Local Stochastic Gradient Descent for Byzantine Federated Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.03092)
*Amit Dutta,Thinh T. Doan*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文针对存在拜占庭恶意攻击者的联邦优化问题，提出了一种新的局部随机梯度下降变体方法，在强凸和非凸场景下均能以最优速率O(1/k)精确收敛到目标解，解决了该领域一个悬而未决的开放问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有局部随机梯度下降方法在处理拜占庭攻击时仅能返回近似解，能否找到精确解是尚未解决的开放问题。本文旨在填补这一理论空白。

Method: 提出一种新的局部随机梯度下降变体方法，在相似条件假设下，通过改进算法机制实现对抗拜占庭攻击的精确收敛。

Result: 在强凸和非凸两种设置下，方法均达到最优收敛速率O(1/k)；理论分析与仿真实验均验证了精确收敛性。

Conclusion: 本文成功解决了拜占庭攻击下局部SGD能否精确收敛的开放问题，提出的新方法在理论上达到了最优收敛速率，为分布式鲁棒优化提供了新的理论基础。

Abstract: We study local stochastic gradient descent methods for solving federated optimization over a network of agents communicating indirectly through a centralized coordinator. We are interested in the Byzantine setting where there is a subset of $f$ malicious agents that could observe the entire network and send arbitrary values to the coordinator to disrupt the performance of other non-faulty agents. The objective of the non-faulty agents is to collaboratively compute the optimizer of their respective local functions under the presence of Byzantine agents. In this setting, prior works show that the local stochastic gradient descent method can only return an approximate of the desired solutions due to the impacts of Byzantine agents. Whether this method can find an exact solution remains an open question. In this paper, we will address this open question by proposing a new variant of the local stochastic gradient descent method. Under similar conditions that are considered in the existing works, we will show that the proposed method converges exactly to the desired solutions. We will provide theoretical results to characterize the convergence properties of our method, in particular, the proposed method convergences at an optimal rate $\mathcal{O}(1/k)$ in both strongly convex and non-convex settings, where $k$ is the number of iterations. Finally, we will present a number of simulations to illustrate our theoretical results.

</details>


### [216] [Convergence Conditions for Stochastic Line Search Based Optimization of Over-parametrized Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.03199)
*Matteo Lapucci,Davide Pucci*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文研究在过参数化模型（满足插值条件）的有限和问题中，使用随机线搜索和通用搜索方向的算法。提出了保证有限终止和后向追踪过程边界的搜索方向序列条件，并揭示了在插值机制下对PL函数实现快速（线性）收敛所需的额外方向属性，为将随机线搜索集成到动量、共轭梯度或自适应预处理方法中提供了安全保障条件。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决过参数化模型拟合中的有限和问题，特别是满足插值条件的情况，为随机线搜索方法提供理论保证。

Method: 定义了搜索方向序列的条件以保证有限终止和后向追踪边界，分析了PL函数插值机制下实现线性收敛所需的额外方向性质。

Result: 提出了保证有限终止和后向追踪过程边界的条件，揭示了快速线性收敛所需的额外方向属性。

Conclusion: 分析识别出了可用于相关算法框架的安全保障条件，有助于将随机线搜索集成到动量法、共轭梯度法或自适应预处理方法中。

Abstract: In this paper, we deal with algorithms to solve the finite-sum problems related to fitting over-parametrized models, that typically satisfy the interpolation condition. In particular, we focus on approaches based on stochastic line searches and employing general search directions. We define conditions on the sequence of search directions that guarantee finite termination and bounds for the backtracking procedure. Moreover, we shed light on the additional property of directions needed to prove fast (linear) convergence of the general class of algorithms when applied to PL functions in the interpolation regime. From the point of view of algorithms design, the proposed analysis identifies safeguarding conditions that could be employed in relevant algorithmic frameworks. In particular, it could be of interest to integrate stochastic line searches within momentum, conjugate gradient or adaptive preconditioning methods.

</details>


### [217] [Fault-Tolerant Decentralized Control for Large-scale Inverter-based Resources for Active Power Tracking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.03444)
*Satish Vedula,Ayobami Olajube,Olugbenga Anubi*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文针对缺乏传统同步发电机惯性响应的逆变器基资源(IBRs)在电网稳定性分析中的挑战，提出了一种基于去中心化原始-对偶的容错控制框架，用于IBRs的功率分配。该算法采用分层控制架构，底层负责电流控制与参数估计，高层根据期望有功功率生成参考值，并考虑传输线路健康状态自适应分配功率。仿真结果表明，在故障条件下，该算法在功率偏差幅度和稳定时间上均显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: IBRs缺乏传统同步发电机固有的惯性响应特性，导致在其接入下电网稳定性分析面临新挑战。现有控制方法在故障条件下的功率分配性能不足，需要一种能考虑传输线路健康状态的容错控制方案。

Method: 提出去中心化原始-对偶容错控制框架，采用分层控制结构：底层负责电流控制和参数估计，高层作为参考功率生成器；基于网络的自适应算法根据IBRs传输线路的健康状态，自适应地分配期望功率。

Result: 在IBR网络仿真中，所提算法在故障条件下相比现有方法，功率偏差幅度和恢复到标称值的稳定时间均显著改善。

Conclusion: 所提出的去中心化容错控制框架能有效提升IBRs在故障条件下的功率分配性能，在功率偏差和稳定时间方面均优于现有文献中的算法。

Abstract: Integration of Inverter Based Resources (IBRs) which lack the intrinsic characteristics such as the inertial response of the traditional synchronous-generator (SG) based sources presents a new challenge in the form of analyzing the grid stability under their presence. While the dynamic composition of IBRs differs from that of the SGs, the control objective remains similar in terms of tracking the desired active power. This letter presents a decentralized primal-dual-based fault-tolerant control framework for the power allocation in IBRs. Overall, a hierarchical control algorithm is developed with a lower level addressing the current control and the parameter estimation for the IBRs and the higher level acting as the reference power generator to the low level based on the desired active power profile. The decentralized network-based algorithm adaptively splits the desired power between the IBRs taking into consideration the health of the IBRs transmission lines. The proposed framework is tested through a simulation on the network of IBRs and the high-level controller performance is compared against the existing framework in the literature. The proposed algorithm shows significant performance improvement in the magnitude of power deviation and settling time to the nominal value under faulty conditions as compared to the algorithm in the literature.

</details>


### [218] [Optimal Placement and Coordinated Scheduling of Distributed Space-Based Lasers for Orbital Debris Remediation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.03146)
*David O. Williams Rogers,Matthew C. Fox,Paul R. Stysley,Hang Woon Lee*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文针对轨道碎片问题，提出了一种基于空间协同激光星座的碎片清除框架。通过建立delta-v矢量分析框架量化多激光-碎片交互的累积效应，并构建位置-调度组合优化问题(CLSP)，采用分解策略（最大覆盖定位问题+整数线性规划）求解，实验验证了该框架在协同推离、离轨及碰撞规避中的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 轨道碎片数量持续增长严重威胁太空操作的安全性和可持续性，亟需高效的碎片清除方法。

Method: 提出delta-v矢量分析框架量化多激光-碎片交互的累积效应；构建Concurrent Location-Scheduling Optimization Problem (CLSP)；采用分解策略，先通过最大覆盖定位问题确定激光平台位置，再通过整数线性规划调度交互序列。

Result: 实验验证了框架在协同推离、离轨以及适时代碰撞规避等关键星座功能上的有效性；敏感性分析揭示了激光平台数量与分布对碎片清除能力的影响规律。

Conclusion: 所提出的空间协同激光星座框架能够有效提升碎片清除能力，为空间碎片治理提供了优化设计和运行的理论依据。

Abstract: The significant expansion of the orbital debris population poses a serious threat to the safety and sustainability of space operations. This paper investigates orbital debris remediation through a constellation of collaborative space-based lasers, leveraging the principle of momentum transfer onto debris via laser ablation. A novel delta-v vector analysis framework quantifies the cumulative effects of multiple concurrent laser-to-debris (L2D) engagements by utilizing the vector composition of the imparted delta-v vectors. The paper formulates the Concurrent Location-Scheduling Optimization Problem (CLSP) to optimize the placement of laser platforms and the scheduling of L2D engagements, aiming to maximize debris remediation capacity. Given the computational intractability of the CLSP, a decomposition strategy is employed, yielding two sequential subproblems: (1) determining optimal laser platform locations via the Maximal Covering Location Problem, and (2) scheduling L2D engagements using a novel integer linear programming approach to maximize debris remediation capacity. Computational experiments evaluate the efficacy of the proposed framework across diverse mission scenarios, demonstrating critical constellation functions such as collaborative and controlled nudging, deorbiting, and just-in-time collision avoidance. A sensitivity analysis further explores the impact of varying the number and distribution of laser platforms on debris remediation capacity, offering insights into optimizing the performance of space-based laser constellations.

</details>


### [219] [On branch and cut approach for q-Allocation Hub Interdiction Problem](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.03258)
*Saikat Mukherjee,Prasanna Ramamoorthy,Navneet Vidyarthi*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文研究双层q-分配枢纽中断问题，通过分支切割法和切割平面改进，有效解决了一些先前未求解的大型实例。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 枢纽网络广泛应用于物流、运输和配送行业，但枢纽故障可能导致整个网络产生巨大成本。现有文献仅研究了单分配和多分配协议下的枢纽中断问题，缺乏对更一般的q-分配场景的研究。

Method: 提出双层q-分配枢纽中断问题（bilevel q-allocation hub interdiction problem），该问题将单分配和多分配问题作为特例；采用分支切割法（branch and cut）并引入切割平面（cutting planes）进行改进。

Result: 基于大规模实例的实验表明，该方法有效解决了一些先前未能求解的实例，展现了算法的效率。

Conclusion: 提出的q-分配枢纽中断模型具有更强的通用性，改进的分支切割法能够处理更大规模的问题实例。

Abstract: Many industries widely adopted hub networks these days. Managing logistics, transportation, and distribution requires a delicate balance to ensure seamless operations within this network. Hub network promotes cost-effective routing through inter-hub flows. Failure of such hubs may impact the total network with huge costs. In this paper, we study bilevel $q$-allocation hub interdiction problem. In previous literature hub interdiction problem was studied with single and multiple allocation protocols.This problem focus on $q$ allocation which solves single and multiple allocation problem as special case. We also show improvements on the branch and cut approach by using cutting planes.Our experiments based on large instances present the efficiency of the approach to solve some previously unsolved instances.

</details>


### [220] [A strongly convergent inertial inexact proximal-point algorithm for monotone inclusions with applications to variational inequalities](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.03485)
*M. Marques Alves,J. E. Navarro Caballero,M. Geremia,R. T. Marcavillaca*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 提出了一种惯性变体的强收敛非精确邻近点方法，用于单调包含问题。在惯性参数上采用了更宽松的假设，证明了强收敛性，并应用于变分不等式，获得了Korpolevich外梯度、前向-后向和Tseng修正前向-后向方法的强收敛惯性变体。数值实验表明在矩阵博弈问题上表现良好。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有惯性PP类型算法的分析对惯性参数的限制过于严格，需要更宽松的条件以提升算法的适用性，即使在有限维环境下也有意义。

Method: 提出了Solodov和Svaiter (2000)非精确邻近点方法的惯性变体，在更宽松的惯性参数假设下证明强收敛性，并进行了迭代复杂度分析。将该方法应用于单调算子的变分不等式，推导出Korpolevich外梯度法、前向-后向法和Tseng修正前向-后向法的惯性变体。

Result: 在更宽松的惯性参数条件下证明了强收敛性，完成了迭代复杂度分析，数值实验表明Tseng修正前向-后向法的惯性变体在矩阵博弈问题上表现良好。

Conclusion: 所提出的惯性非精确PP方法在更宽松条件下仍能保持强收敛性，为求解单调包含问题和变分不等式提供了更灵活有效的算法框架。

Abstract: We propose an inertial variant of the strongly convergent inexact proximal-point (PP) method of Solodov and Svaiter (2000) for monotone inclusions. We prove strong convergence of our main algorithm under less restrictive assumptions on the inertial parameters when compared to previous analysis of inertial PP-type algorithms, which makes our method of interest even in finite-dimensional settings. We also performed an iteration-complexity analysis and applied our main algorithm to variational inequalities for monotone operators, obtaining strongly convergent (inertial) variants of Korpolevich's extragradient, forward-backward and Tseng's modified forward-backward methods. Preliminary numerical experiments indicate that our strongly convergent variant of Tseng's modified forward-backward method performs well on certain matrix game problems.

</details>


### [221] [Predefined-time distributed non-convex optimization via a time-base generator](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.03188)
*Qinlong Lin,Yang Liu,Jianquan Lu,Weihua Gui*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文提出两种基于新型时间基发生器(TBG)的多智能体系统，用于解决资源分配问题和基于共识的分布式优化问题，实现了预定义时间内的非凸优化近似收敛。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有分布式优化方法在处理非强凸甚至非凸代价函数时收敛性能不足，亟需一种能在预定义时间内实现近似收敛的分布式优化方法。

Method: 提出新型时间基发生器(TBG)用于预定义时间非凸优化；基于TBG分析Lyapunov函数的粗糙性和有界性；设计了两种多智能体系统架构。

Result: 当代价函数非强凸或非凸时，方法能在预定义时间内近似收敛到最优解；当代价函数具有广义光滑性时，能精确收敛到最优解，且具有更快的收敛速度和CPU处理速度。

Conclusion: 通过大量数值仿真验证了所提方法在资源分配和分布式优化问题中的有效性。

Abstract: In this paper, we propose two novel multi-agent systems for the resource allocation problems (RAPs) and consensus-based distributed optimization problems. Different from existing distributed optimal approaches, we propose the new time-base generators (TBGs) for predefined-time non-convex optimization. Leveraging the proposed time-base generator, we study the roughness and boundedness of Lyapunov function based on TBGs. We prove that our approach achieves predefined-time approximate convergence to the optimal solution if the cost functions exhibit non-strongly convex or even non-convex characteristics. Furthermore, we prove that our approaches converge to the optimal solution if cost functions are generalized smoothness, and exhibit faster convergence rate and CPU speed. Finally, we present numerous numerical simulation examples to confirm the effectiveness of our approaches.

</details>


### [222] [A PINN approach for the online identification and control of unknown PDEs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.03456)
*Alessandro Alla,Giulia Bertaglia,Elisa Calzola*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于物理信息神经网络（PINNs）的方法，用于求解信息不完整（如稀疏初始边界数据、部分未知系统参数）的开环最优控制问题（OCPs）。该方法通过拉格朗日乘子推导最优性条件，将状态、伴随和控制变量集成到单个神经网络中统一预测。针对部分方程未知的场景，采用2-in-series架构的PINNs，利用非受控解的散点数据在线识别潜在参数。数值实验表明，即使在信息严重缺失的情况下，该方法仍能有效求解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在处理信息不完整（稀疏初始/边界数据、部分未知参数）的开环最优控制问题时存在局限性，亟需一种能同时处理数据稀疏性和参数不确定性的统一框架。

Method: 从拉格朗日乘子推导最优性条件；将状态、伴随变量和控制变量集成到单个PINN中联合预测；针对部分未知方程，采用2-in-series架构的PINNs，利用非受控解的散点数据在线识别未知参数。

Result: 数值实验验证了该方法在信息严重缺失的场景下仍能有效求解最优控制问题。

Conclusion: 提出的PINN框架能够有效处理信息不完整的开环最优控制问题，包括稀疏数据和部分未知系统参数的情况，具有良好的鲁棒性和泛化能力。

Abstract: Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs) have revolutionized solving differential equations by integrating physical laws into neural networks training. This paper explores PINNs for open-loop optimal control problems (OCPs) with incomplete information, such as sparse initial and boundary data and partially unknown system parameters. We derive optimality conditions from the Lagrangian multipliers and use PINNs to predict the state, adjoint, and control variables. In contrast with previous methods, our approach integrates these elements into a single neural network and addresses scenarios with consistently limited data. In addition, we address the study of partially unknown equations identifying underlying parameters online by searching for the optimal solution recurring to a 2-in-series architecture of PINNs, in which scattered data of the uncontrolled solution is used. Numerical examples show the effectiveness of the proposed method even in scenarios characterized by a considerable lack of information.

</details>


### [223] [Improved Iteration Complexity in Black-Box Optimization Problems under Higher Order Smoothness Function Condition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.03507)
*Aleksandr Lobanov*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文针对强凸且高阶光滑（β≥2）的黑箱优化问题，提出了零阶加速批量随机梯度下降方法，在迭代复杂度上达到最优估计，并分析了最大噪声水平与批量大小B及光滑阶数β的关系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决黑箱优化问题中梯度不可用且存在随机噪声的挑战，特别是针对强凸且高阶光滑的目标函数，现有方法在迭代复杂度和噪声处理上尚未达到最优。

Method: 提出零阶加速批量随机梯度下降法（Zero-Order Accelerated Batched Stochastic Gradient Descent），利用高阶光滑性（β≥2）设计加速机制，并采用批量采样控制随机噪声。

Result: 理论分析证明了该方法在迭代复杂度上达到最优估计；揭示了最大噪声水平的边界条件，表明该边界同时依赖于批量大小B和光滑阶数β。

Conclusion: 该工作从理论上闭环了强凸高阶光滑黑箱优化问题的迭代复杂度问题，并提供了噪声容忍度的精确刻画，对实际应用具有指导意义。

Abstract: This paper is devoted to the study (common in many applications) of the black-box optimization problem, where the black-box represents a gradient-free oracle $\tilde{f} = f(x) + ξ$ providing the objective function value with some stochastic noise. Assuming that the objective function is $μ$-strongly convex, and also not just $L$-smooth, but has a higher order of smoothness ($β\geq 2$) we provide a novel optimization method: Zero-Order Accelerated Batched Stochastic Gradient Descent, whose theoretical analysis closes the question regarding the iteration complexity, achieving optimal estimates. Moreover, we provide a thorough analysis of the maximum noise level, and show under which condition the maximum noise level will take into account information about batch size $B$ as well as information about the smoothness order of the function $β$.

</details>


### [224] [Inertial Proximal Difference-of-Convex Algorithm with Convergent Bregman Plug-and-Play for Nonconvex Imaging](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.03262)
*Tsz Ching Chow,Chaoyan Huang,Zhongming Wu,Tieyong Zeng,Angelica I. Aviles-Rivero*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于Bregman几何的惯性近端DC算法（iBPDCA）及其即插即用变体（PnP-iBPDCA），用于解决非凸DC结构化优化问题，通过惯性技术加速收敛，并在Rician噪声和相位恢复任务上超越现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有DC算法（DCA）在处理非凸函数时效果不佳，或收敛速度缓慢，亟需一种能有效处理非凸项并加速收敛的新算法。

Method: 提出iBPDCA算法，在Bregman几何框架下结合惯性技术和近端算子处理非凸DC优化；进一步提出PnP-iBPDCA变体，用深度神经网络先验替代传统近端算子，并证明高斯梯度步降噪器等价于隐式弱凸函数的Bregman近端算子。

Result: 在Rician噪声和相位恢复任务上，iBPDCA及PnP-iBPDCA均超越了现有最先进方法。

Conclusion: iBPDCA及其PnP变体在理论上保证收敛，在实践中性能优越，为DC结构化优化提供了一种高效、鲁棒的解决方案。

Abstract: Imaging tasks are typically tackled using a structured optimization framework. This paper delves into a class of algorithms for difference-of-convex (DC) structured optimization, focusing on minimizing a DC function along with a possibly nonconvex function. Existing DC algorithm (DCA) versions often fail to effectively handle nonconvex functions or exhibit slow convergence rates. We propose a novel inertial proximal DC algorithm in Bregman geometry, named iBPDCA, designed to address nonconvex terms and enhance convergence speed through inertial techniques. We provide a detailed theoretical analysis, establishing both subsequential and global convergence of iBPDCA via the Kurdyka-Łojasiewicz property. Additionally, we introduce a Plug-and-Play variant, PnP-iBPDCA, which employs a deep neural network-based prior for greater flexibility and robustness while ensuring theoretical convergence. We also establish that the Gaussian gradient step denoiser used in our method is equivalent to evaluating the Bregman proximal operator for an implicitly weakly convex functional. We extensively validate our method on Rician noise and phase retrieval. We demonstrate that iBPDCA surpasses existing state-of-the-art methods.

</details>


### [225] [New global Carleman estimates and null controllability for a stochastic Cahn-Hilliard type equation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.03517)
*Sen Zhang,Hang Gao,Ganghua Yuan*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文研究了随机半线性Cahn-Hilliard型方程（其半线性项包含解的一阶和二阶导数）的零可控性。首先，基于随机四阶抛物型算子的新基本恒等式，推导了带有L²值源项的线性后向随机四阶抛物型方程的改进全局Carleman估计；进而建立了带有H⁻²值源项的同类方程的全局Carleman估计，并结合不动点论证，得到了所需的零可控性结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究半线性项包含一阶和二阶导数的随机Cahn-Hilliard型方程的零可控性，这是随机控制理论中较具挑战性的问题，现有结果较少。

Method: 先建立随机四阶抛物型算子的基本恒等式，据此推导L²值源项的Carleman估计，再推广至H⁻²值源项，最后结合不动点方法处理半线性项。

Result: 获得了所研究随机半线性Cahn-Hilliard型方程的零可控性结果。

Conclusion: 通过改进的Carleman估计与不动点论证，成功建立了该类方程的零可控性。

Abstract: In this paper, we study the null controllability for a stochastic semilinear CahnHilliard type equation, whose semilinear term contains first and second order derivatives of solutions. To start with, an improved global Carleman estimate for linear backward stochastic fourth order parabolic equations with $L^2$-valued source terms is derived, which is based on a new fundamental identity for a stochastic fourth order parabolic operator. Based on it, we establish a new global Carleman estimate for linear backward stochastic fourth order parabolic equations with $H^{-2}$-valued source terms, which, together with a fixed point argument, derive the desired null controllability for the stochastic Cahn-Hilliard type equation.

</details>


### [226] [A Fully Parameter-Free Second-Order Algorithm for Convex-Concave Minimax Problems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.03571)
*Junlin Wang,Zi Xu,Huiling Zhang*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文针对凸-凹极小极大问题，提出了两种无需Lipschitz常数的二阶算法：LF-CR（无需Lipschitz常数的三次正则化）和FF-CR（完全无参数的三次正则化）。LF-CR算法在限制性原始-对偶间隙下达到ε-最优解的迭代复杂度为O(ρ^{2/3}‖z0-z*‖^2 ε^{-2/3})；FF-CR算法无需任何问题参数，在梯度范数终止准则下达到ε-最优解的迭代复杂度为O(ρ^{2/3}‖z0-z*‖^{4/3} ε^{-2/3})，是目前关于ε的最优复杂度。数值实验验证了算法的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 凸-凹极小极大问题在机器学习等领域广泛应用，现有二阶算法通常需要已知Lipschitz常数等参数，限制了其实用性。本文旨在设计无需Lipschitz常数甚至完全无参数的二阶算法，以降低算法对先验知识的依赖。

Method: 1) 提出LF-CR算法：采用三次正则化方法，通过自适应机制避免对Lipschitz常数的依赖；2) 提出FF-CR算法：在LF-CR基础上进一步消除对初始点到最优解距离上界的依赖，实现完全无参数化；3) 分别推导两种算法在不同终止准则（限制性原始-对偶间隙和梯度范数）下的迭代复杂度。

Result: LF-CR算法在限制性原始-对偶间隙终止准则下迭代复杂度为O(ρ^{2/3}‖z0-z*‖^2 ε^{-2/3})；FF-CR算法在梯度范数终止准则下迭代复杂度为O(ρ^{2/3}‖z0-z*‖^{4/3} ε^{-2/3})，是目前关于ε的最优结果。数值实验验证了两种算法的有效性。

Conclusion: 本文首次提出了完全无参数的二阶算法FF-CR，在无需任何问题参数的条件下达到目前最优的ε-复杂度。这项工作为凸-凹极小极大问题的二阶优化提供了更实用的解决方案。

Abstract: In this paper, we study second-order algorithms for the convex-concave minimax problem, which has attracted much attention in many fields such as machine learning in recent years. We propose a Lipschitz-free cubic regularization (LF-CR) algorithm for solving the convex-concave minimax optimization problem without knowing the Lipschitz constant. It can be shown that the iteration complexity of the LF-CR algorithm to obtain an $ε$-optimal solution with respect to the restricted primal-dual gap is upper bounded by $\mathcal{O}(ρ^{2/3}\|z_0-z^*\|^2ε^{-2/3})$ , where $z_0=(x_0,y_0)$ is a pair of initial points, $z^*=(x^*,y^*)$ is a pair of optimal solutions, and $ρ$ is the Lipschitz constant. We further propose a fully parameter-free cubic regularization (FF-CR) algorithm that does not require any parameters of the problem, including the Lipschitz constant and the upper bound of the distance from the initial point to the optimal solution. We also prove that the iteration complexity of the FF-CR algorithm to obtain an $ε$-optimal solution with respect to the gradient norm is upper bounded by $\mathcal{O}(ρ^{2/3}\|z_0-z^*\|^{4/3}ε^{-2/3}) $. Numerical experiments show the efficiency of both algorithms. To the best of our knowledge, the proposed FF-CR algorithm is a completely parameter-free second-order algorithm, and its iteration complexity is currently the best in terms of $ε$ under the termination criterion of the gradient norm.

</details>


### [227] [Global prescribed-time control of a class of uncertain nonholonomic systems by smooth time-varying feedback](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.03337)
*Kang-Kang Zhang,Bin Zhou,Chenchen Fan,James Lam*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文针对一类不确定非完整系统，通过光滑时变状态变换将其转化为不确定线性时变系统，并利用参数Lyapunov方程和时变Lyapunov-like函数，设计了光滑时变高增益状态和输出反馈控制器，使状态和控制器在任意预设时间收敛到零。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决不确定非完整系统中控制状态在预设时间内光滑收敛的问题，现有方法难以同时兼顾控制性能的提升与预设时间收敛的平滑性。

Method: 1) 提出新型光滑时变状态变换，将不确定链式非完整系统重构为不确定线性时变系统；2) 利用参数Lyapunov方程性质和时变Lyapunov-like函数，设计光滑时变高增益状态反馈与输出反馈控制器。

Result: 状态和控制器在任意预设时间内收敛到零，数值算例验证了所提方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 提出的光滑时变方法兼具时变高增益函数提升控制性能的优势和光滑时变函数驱动状态在预设时间收敛的能力，为非完整系统的预设时间控制提供了有效方案。

Abstract: This paper investigates the prescribed-time smooth control problem for a class of uncertain nonholonomic systems. With a novel smooth time-varying state transformation, the uncertain chained nonholonomic system is reformulated as an uncertain linear time-varying system. By fully utilizing the properties of a class of parametric Lyapunov equations and constructing time-varying Lyapunov-like functions, smooth time-varying high-gain state and output feedback controllers are designed. The states and controllers are proven to converge to zero at any prescribed time. The proposed smooth time-varying method combines the advantage of a time-varying high-gain function, which enhances control performance, and a smooth time-varying function that can drive the states to zero at the prescribed time. The effectiveness of the proposed methods is verified by a numerical example.

</details>


### [228] [SLRQA: A Sparse Low-Rank Quaternion Model for Color Image Processing with Convergence Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.03563)
*Zhanwang Deng,Yuqiu Su,Wen Huang*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种稀疏低秩四元数逼近（SLRQA）模型及其无噪声变体SLRQA-NF，用于彩色图像处理（去噪和修复），并设计了相应的近邻线性化ADMM算法，在标准假设下证明了全局收敛性，实验表明该方法在定量和视觉效果上优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的彩色图像处理模型未充分利用四元数表示的优势，且通常需要预先估计秩，在噪声观测下性能有限。

Method: 提出SLRQA四元数模型，结合低秩性与稀疏性先验，无需初始秩估计；设计近邻线性化ADMM（PL-ADMM）算法求解；针对无噪声情形提出SLRQA-NF及其对应算法PL-ADMM-NF，并提出新的收敛性假设。

Result: 数值实验验证了四元数表示的有效性；在彩色图像去噪和修复任务中，SLRQA和SLRQA-NF在定量指标和视觉质量上均优于多种主流方法。

Conclusion: SLRQA模型及其算法在彩色图像处理中表现优越，且具有良好的全局收敛保证。

Abstract: In this paper, we propose a Sparse Low-rank Quaternion Approximation (SLRQA) model for color image processing problems with noisy observations. %Different from the existing color image processing models, The proposed SLRQA is a quaternion model that combines low-rankness and sparsity priors without an initial rank estimation. %Furthermore, it does not need an initial rank estimate. A proximal linearized ADMM (PL-ADMM) algorithm is proposed to solve SLRQA and the global convergence is guaranteed under standard assumptions. %where only one variable is linearized. When the observation is noise-free, a limiting case of the SLRQA, called SLRQA-NF, is proposed. Subsequently, a proximal linearized ADMM (PL-ADMM-NF) algorithm for SLRQA-NF is given. Since SLRQA-NF does not satisfy a widely-used assumption for global convergence of ADMM-type algorithms, we propose a novel assumption, under which the global convergence of PL-ADMM-NF is established. In numerical experiments, we verify the effectiveness of quaternion representation. Furthermore, for color image denoising and color image inpainting problems, SLRQA and SLRQA-NF demonstrate superior performance both quantitatively and visually when compared with some state-of-the-art methods.

</details>


<div id='cond-mat.stat-mech'></div>

# cond-mat.stat-mech [[Back]](#toc)

### [229] [Fluctuation-optimization theorem](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.01243)
*Pierre Nazé*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 本文提出一个涨落定理，将功与其最优平均功联系起来，并通过过阻尼布朗运动示例验证，指出该定理本质上是欧拉-拉格朗日方程，允许通过任意协议的功分布数值计算最优功而无须知道最优协议。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 建立功与最优平均功之间的涨落定理，并找到一种无须知道最优协议即可数值计算最优功的方法。

Method: 推导一个依赖于开关时间τ、驱动强度δλ/λ₀和协议g(t)的递增凸函数来关联功与最优平均功；利用过阻尼白噪声布朗运动在移动激光谐波陷阱中的示例进行验证；将涨落-优化定理视为欧拉-拉格朗日方程，得出最小化⟨h(-βW)⟩的函数满足所提关系。

Result: 所提出的涨落定理成功关联了功与其最优平均功；通过布朗运动示例得到验证；发现该定理本质上是欧拉-拉格朗日方程，从而可以用数值方法通过任意协议的功分布计算最优功，无需知道最优协议本身。

Conclusion: 涨落-优化定理为计算最优平均功提供了新途径，简化了优化问题的求解过程。

Abstract: A fluctuation theorem relating the work to its optimal average work is presented. The function mediating the relation is increasing and convex, and depends on the switching time $τ$, driving strength $δλ/λ_0$, and protocol $g(t)$. The result is corroborated by an example of an overdamped white noise Brownian motion subjected to a moving laser harmonic trap. Observing also that the fluctuation-optimization theorem is an Euler-Lagrange equation, I conclude that the function minimizing $\langle h(-βW)\rangle$ obeys the relation proposed. The optimal work can now be calculated with numerical methods without knowing the optimal protocol, using only a work distribution of an arbitrary protocol.

</details>


### [230] [The most uniform distribution of points on the sphere](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.01503)
*Luca Maria Del Bono,Flavio Nicoletti,Federico Ricci-Tersenghi*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于点间距离分布的物理均匀性度量，替代传统基于交互势的度量，并用于评估和优化球面上点分布的均匀性算法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 球面上均匀分布点集是一个经典问题，但现有方法缺乏统一的物理度量标准，传统基于交互势的度量存在局限。

Method: 引入基于点间距离分布的新型均匀性度量；利用该度量对现有算法进行表征；通过梯度下降最小化不同交互势来优化点位置。

Result: 分类比较了不同算法和交互势，识别出能生成最均匀球面点分布的方法。

Conclusion: 新提出的距离分布度量能有效评估球面点均匀性，结合梯度下降优化可进一步提升分布质量。

Abstract: How to distribute a set of points uniformly on a spherical surface is a very old problem that still lacks a definite answer. In this work, we introduce a physical measure of uniformity based on the distribution of distances between points, as an alternative to commonly adopted measures based on interaction potentials. We then use this new measure of uniformity to characterize several algorithms available in the literature. We also study the effect of optimizing the position of the points through the minimization of different interaction potentials via a gradient descent procedure. In this way, we can classify different algorithms and interaction potentials to find the one that generates the most uniform distribution of points on the sphere.

</details>


### [231] [Ergodicity breaking and restoration in models of heat transport with microscopic reversibility](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00430)
*Piero Olla*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 本文分析格子模型中在轨迹层面强制时间可逆性（微观可逆性）的行为，探讨了遍历性破缺的条件，展示了几种除能量外存在额外守恒量的系统。这些系统在与热浴接触时恢复遍历性，除非原子与热浴的相互作用具有特定选择。研究表明额外守恒量在非平衡条件下重新发挥作用，并与某些满足细致平衡但不满足微观可逆性的介观系统行为进行了比较。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究在轨迹层面强制时间可逆性（微观可逆性）的格子模型行为，探索遍历性破缺的条件，并理解额外守恒量在平衡与非平衡条件下的作用机制。

Method: 采用解析分析方法，研究在轨迹层面满足微观可逆性的格子模型，通过构造具有额外守恒量的系统实例，分析其在不同条件下的遍历性行为，并与满足细致平衡但不满足微观可逆性的介观系统进行对比。

Result: 发现了遍历性破缺的条件；展示了除能量外存在额外守恒量的系统实例；这些系统在与热浴接触时通常恢复遍历性，但原子与热浴的特定相互作用选择可阻止遍历性恢复；额外守恒量在非平衡条件下重新发挥重要作用。

Conclusion: 微观可逆性对格子模型的遍历性行为有重要影响；额外守恒量在非平衡条件下会重新影响系统行为；该发现与某些介观系统中满足细致平衡但不满足微观可逆性的行为存在相似性。

Abstract: The behavior of lattice models in which time reversibility is enforced at the level of trajectories (microscopic reversibility) is studied analytically. Conditions for ergodicity breaking are explored, and a few examples of systems characterized by an additional conserved quantity besides energy are presented. All the systems are characterized by ergodicity restoration when put in contact with a thermal bath, except for specific choices of the interactions between the atoms in the system and the bath. The study shows that the additional conserved quantities return to play a role in non-equilibrium conditions. The similarities with the behavior of some mesoscale systems, in which the transition rates satisfy detailed balance but not microscopic reversibility, are discussed.

</details>


### [232] [Force and kinetics of fast and slow muscle myosin determined with a synthetic sarcomere-like nanomachine](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00373)
*Valentina Buonfiglio,Irene Pertici,Matteo Marcello,Ilaria Morotti,Marco Caremani,Massimo Reconditi,Marco Linari,Duccio Fanelli,Vincenzo Lombardi,Pasquale Bianco*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 本文利用纯化的慢肌和快肌肌球蛋白亚型构建一维合成纳米机器，结合随机模型拟合，定义了驱动慢肌和快肌力量的亚型依赖型机械动力学参数（包括马达力、肌动蛋白结合比例和附着-解离循环速率），揭示了不同肌球蛋白亚型功能差异的分子基础。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 阐明骨骼肌中慢肌（主要负责姿势维持）和快肌（负责自主运动）不同肌球蛋白亚型在分子层面上的功能差异机制。

Method: 利用纯化的慢肌或快肌肌球蛋白亚型构建一维合成纳米机器，通过随机模型对实验数据进行拟合，自洽地估算出马达力、肌动蛋白结合马达比例及附着-解离循环转换速率等全套机械动力学参数。

Result: 成功获得了慢肌和快肌肌球蛋白亚型的全套机械动力学特性参数，包括马达力、附着比例和循环转换率，并实现了自洽估算。

Conclusion: 该研究为未来研究工程化或从突变动物模型/人类活检中纯化的肌球蛋白分子集合体的涌现机械动力学特性奠定了基础。

Abstract: Myosin II is the muscle molecular motor that works in two bipolar arrays in each thick filament of the striated (skeletal and cardiac) muscle, converting the chemical energy into steady force and shortening by cyclic ATP--driven interactions with the nearby actin filaments. Different isoforms of the myosin motor in the skeletal muscles account for the different functional requirements of the slow muscles (primarily responsible for the posture) and fast muscles (responsible for voluntary movements). To clarify the molecular basis of the differences, here the isoform--dependent mechanokinetic parameters underpinning the force of slow and fast muscles are defined with a unidimensional synthetic nanomachine powered by pure myosin isoforms from either slow or fast rabbit skeletal muscle. Data fitting with a stochastic model provides a self--consistent estimate of all the mechanokinetic properties of the motor ensemble including the motor force, the fraction of actin--attached motors and the rate of transition through the attachment--detachment cycle. The achievements in this paper set the stage for any future study on the emergent mechanokinetic properties of an ensemble of myosin molecules either engineered or purified from mutant animal models or human biopsies.

</details>


### [233] [Fluctuation-Response Relation in Non-Equilibrium Systems and Active Matter](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.01821)
*T. R. Kirkpatrick,D. Belitz*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 本文利用动力学方程推导了多体系统中关联函数与响应/弛豫函数之间的普遍关系，该关系在平衡态（涨落-耗散定理成立）和非平衡态（线性阶展开）均成立，并通过平衡/非平衡流体及活性物质系统进行了验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统涨落-耗散定理仅在平衡态成立，非平衡系统中关联与响应之间的关系尚不明确，作者希望建立一个在平衡和非平衡条件下均适用的普适关系。

Method: 采用动力学方程方法，从多体系统的动态方程出发，推导关联函数与响应/弛豫函数之间的数学关系，并分别在平衡态和非平衡态（线性阶展开）下验证其有效性。

Result: 得到了一个在平衡态（涨落-耗散定理成立）和非平衡态（线性近似下）均成立的一般性关系；在流体（平衡/非平衡）和活性物质系统中均得到了验证。

Conclusion: 该关系为多体系统中关联-响应关系的统一描述提供了理论框架，可推广至活性物质等非平衡系统，拓展了涨落-耗散定理的适用范围。

Abstract: We use dynamic equations to derive a relation between correlation functions and response or relaxation functions in many-body systems. The relation is very general and holds both in equilibrium, when the usual fluctuation-dissipation theorem is valid, and to linear order in an expansion about arbitrary non-equilibrium states, when it is not. We illustrate our results by discussing fluids, both in equilibrium and non-equilibrium states, as well as several active-matter systems.

</details>


### [234] [Exact moments for a run and tumble particle in a harmonic trap with a finite tumble time](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00578)
*Aoran Sun,Fangfu Ye,Rudolf Podgornik*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 本文研究了谐振陷阱中具有有限游动-翻转时间的游动-翻转粒子，通过直接积分运动方程，推导出精确的一维稳态分布、图解定律和可编程的Volterra差分方程，用于计算任意维度下任意阶矩的稳态和时间中间态的拉普拉斯变换。还利用矩通过高斯求积和矩的高阶标度律来推断分布。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究谐振陷阱中具有有限游动-翻转时间的游动-翻转粒子的精确统计特性。

Method: 直接积分运动方程，推导出精确的一维稳态分布、图解定律和可编程的Volterra差分方程，用于计算任意维度下任意阶矩的稳态和时间中间态的拉普拉斯变换。利用矩通过高斯求积和矩的高阶标度律来推断分布。

Result: 推导出精确的一维稳态分布、图解定律和可编程的Volterra差分方程。

Conclusion: 本文为谐振陷阱中有限游动-翻转时间粒子的统计特性提供了精确的解析框架。

Abstract: We study the problem of a run and tumble particle in a harmonic trap, with a finite run and tumble time, by a direct integration of the equation of motion. An exact 1D steady state distribution, diagram laws and a programmable Volterra difference equation are derived to calculate any order of moments in any other dimension, both for steady state as well as the Laplace transform in time for the intermediate states. We also use the moments to infer the distribution by considering a Gaussian quadrature for the corresponding measure, and from the scaling law of high order moments.

</details>


### [235] [Moderately dense granular gas of inelastic rough spheres](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00414)
*Gilberto M. Kremer*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 基于Enskog方程，发展了非弹性粗糙球分子中等密度气体的动力学理论，建立了包含29个标量场的宏观状态描述，并推导了输运系数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩展经典气体动力学理论，将非弹性碰撞和粗糙球分子的转动自由度纳入考虑，建立更完善的中等密度颗粒气体的宏观描述框架。

Method: 从Enskog方程出发，通过29个标量场（质量密度、流体速度、压力张量、绝对温度、平动和转动热流、流体角速度、角速度通量）描述宏观状态；利用Grad分布函数计算分布函数的新矩的动能部分和势能部分以及产生项；从29场理论约化到8场理论（质量密度、流体速度、绝对温度、流体角速度）推导Navier-Stokes和Fourier定律的输运系数。

Result: 获得了输运系数作为法向和切向恢复系数以及局域平衡径向分布函数的函数表达式，并确定了弹性粗糙球极限情况下的输运系数。

Conclusion: 成功建立了非弹性粗糙球分子中等密度气体的29场动力学理论，并给出了可约化至经典Navier-Stokes-Fourier层次的输运系数表达式。

Abstract: A kinetic theory for moderately dense gases of inelastic and rough spherical molecules is developed from the Enskog equation where a macroscopic state is characterized by 29 scalar fields which correspond to the moments of the distribution function: mass density, hydrodynamic velocity, pressure tensor, absolute temperature, translational and rotational heat fluxes, hydrodynamic angular velocity and angular velocity flux. The balance equations for the 29 scalar fields are obtained from a transfer equation derived from the Enskog equation where the kinetic and potential parts of the new moments of the distribution function and production terms are calculated from Grad's distribution function for the basic fields. The transition from the 29 field theory to an eight field theory -- with mass density, hydrodynamic velocity, absolute temperature and hydrodynamic angular velocity -- leads to the determination of the transport coefficients of the Navier-Stokes and Fourier laws. The transport coefficients are functions of the normal and tangential restitution coefficients and of the local equilibrium radial distribution function. The transport coefficients in the limiting case of elastic rough spheres is also determined.

</details>


### [236] [Fluctuations of dynamical observables in linear diffusions with time delay: a Riccati-based approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.01933)
*M. L. Rosinberg,G. Tarjus,T. Munakata*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 本文针对非马尔可夫过程中动力学可观测量的大偏差问题，提出了一种通过马尔可夫嵌入将时滞线性扩散转化为无限维马尔可夫系统的方法，进而利用矩阵Riccati微分方程和代数Riccati方程推导出标度累积生成函数、指数前因子及有效驱动过程的显式表达式，并分析了SCGF存在域边界处的特殊行为及其与热和熵产生涨落关系之间的联系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前对非马尔可夫过程中动力学（时间积分）可观测量涨落的理解非常有限，主要障碍是缺乏合适的理论框架来评估相关的偏差函数。

Method: 采用马尔可夫嵌入过程，将时滞线性扩散转化为无限维耦合微分方程组；通过求解矩阵Riccati微分方程（RDEs）和连续时间代数Riccati方程（CAREs）计算当前型可观测量的生成函数，并分析RDEs的固定点收敛行为。

Result: 推导了标度累积生成函数（SCGF）、指数前因子以及描述涨落动态生成机制的有效（驱动）过程的显式表达式；描述了SCGF存在域边界处的特殊行为。

Conclusion: 建立了非马尔可夫过程中动力学涨落大偏差理论的新框架，并揭示了其与热和熵产生涨落关系的内在联系。

Abstract: Our current understanding of fluctuations of dynamical (time-integrated) observables in non- Markovian processes is still very limited. A major obstacle is the lack of an appropriate theoretical framework to evaluate the associated large deviation functions. In this paper we bypass this difficulty in the case of linear diffusions with time delay by using a Markovian embedding procedure that introduces an infinite set of coupled differential equations. We then show that the generating functions of current-type observables can be computed at arbitrary finite time by solving matrix Riccati differential equations (RDEs) somewhat similar to those encountered in optimal control and filtering problems. By exploring in detail the properties of these RDEs and of the corresponding continuous-time algebraic Riccati equations (CAREs), we identify the generic fixed point towards which the solutions converge in the long-time limit. This allows us to derive the explicit expressions of the scaled cumulant generating function (SCGF), of the pre-exponential factors, and of the effective (or driven) process that describes how fluctuations are created dynamically. Finally, we describe the special behavior occurring at the limits of the domain of existence of the SCGF, in connection with fluctuation relations for the heat and the entropy production.

</details>


### [237] [Percolation in semicontinuum geometries](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00699)
*Jasna C. K,V. Krishnadev,V. Sasidevan*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 本文研究了半连续渗透问题——即部分方向具有晶格结构、部分方向具有连续结构的几何空间中的重叠物体渗透，分析了超立方体、圆盘和平行四边形等形状，发现超立方体的渗透阈值与连续方向上的边长无关，并通过蒙特卡洛模拟验证了排除体积理论的预测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究介于连续模型和晶格模型之间的半连续渗透问题，探索这种混合几何结构下的渗透行为特性，并建立与经典渗透模型的联系。

Method: 采用排除体积理论（排除体积参数）适配到半连续框架进行理论分析，结合蒙特卡洛模拟验证，研究超立方体、圆盘、平行四边形等形状在半连续几何中的渗透阈值。

Result: 发现超立方体的渗透阈值与连续方向边长无关（即使边长存在分布），获得了其他形状阈值随连续方向尺寸变化的趋势，模拟结果与排除体积理论预测高度吻合，并建立了2D连续渗透与三角晶格渗透之间的关联。

Conclusion: 半连续渗透问题中排除体积理论仍然有效，各向异性形状的渗透阈值保持各向同性，且标准渗透普适类在该设定中得到保持。

Abstract: We study percolation problems of overlapping objects where the underlying geometry is such that in D-dimensions, a subset of the directions has a lattice structure, while the remaining directions have a continuum structure. The resulting semicontinuum problem describes the percolation of overlapping shapes in parallel layers or lanes with positional constraints for the placement of the objects along the discrete directions. Several semicontinuum percolation systems are analyzed like hypercuboids with a particular focus on 2D and 3D cases, disks, and parallelograms. Adapting the excluded volume arguments to the semicontinuum setting, we show that for the semicontinuum problem of hypercuboids, for fixed side-lengths of the hypercuboids along the directions in which a lattice structure is maintained, the percolation threshold is always independent of the side-lengths along the continuum directions. The result holds even when there is a distribution for the side-lengths along the continuum directions. Trends in the variation of the thresholds, as we vary the linear measure of the shapes along the continuum directions, are obtained for other semicontinuum models like disks and parallelograms in 2D. The results are compared with those of corresponding continuum and lattice models. For the 2D and 3D models considered, using Monte Carlo simulations, we verify the excluded volume predictions for the trends and numerical values of the percolation thresholds. Very good agreement is seen between the predicted numerical values and the simulation results. The semicontinuum setting also allows us to establish a connection between the percolation problem of overlapping shapes in 2D continuum and the triangular lattice. We also verify that the isotropy of the threshold for anisotropic shapes and standard percolation universality class is maintained in the semicontinuum setting.

</details>


### [238] [Generalized hydrodynamics of integrable quantum circuits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00474)
*Friedrich Hübner,Eric Vernier,Lorenzo Piroli*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 本文研究XXZ海森堡自旋链的Trotter化量子电路中的非平衡动力学，基于广义流体力学（GHD）发展精确的大尺度描述，发现离散Trotter步骤会导致与连续时间演化完全不同的宏观行为，甚至单个微观缺陷就能改变非平衡宏观态的走向。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索离散Trotter化动力学与连续时间演化之间的定性差异，揭示当Trotter步长足够大时量子电路可能展现的新奇多体效应和非平衡现象。

Method: 以可积XXZ海森堡自旋链的Trotter化为例，采用二分协议（两侧初始化为不同乘积态），利用可积模型的广义流体力学（GHD）进行精确大尺度描述，分析不同Trotter步长和门参数下的动力学行为。

Result: 发现离散Trotter化在参数空间某些相中，其大尺度动力学与连续时间演化定性不同；特别是在交界处的单个微观缺陷（如单个额外量子比特）可能改变后期非平衡宏观态的性质。

Conclusion: 离散Trotter化量子电路可产生与连续时间演化本质上不同的非平衡宏观行为，且对微观细节高度敏感，这在量子模拟和量子计算中具有重要启示。

Abstract: Quantum circuits make it possible to simulate the continuous-time dynamics of a many-body Hamiltonian by implementing discrete Trotter steps of duration $τ$. However, when $τ$ is sufficiently large, the discrete dynamics exhibit qualitative differences compared to the original evolution, potentially displaying novel features and many-body effects. We study an interesting example of this phenomenon, by considering the integrable Trotterization of a prototypical integrable model, the XXZ Heisenberg spin chain. We focus on the well-known bipartition protocol, where two halves of a large system are prepared in different macrostates and suddenly joined together, yielding non-trivial nonequilibrium dynamics. Building upon recent results and adapting the generalized hydrodynamics (GHD) of integrable models, we develop an exact large-scale description of an explicit one-dimensional quantum-circuit setting, where the input left and right qubits are initialized in two distinct product states. We explore the phenomenology predicted by the GHD equations, which depend on the Trotter step and the gate parameters. In some phases of the parameter space, we show that the quantum-circuit large-scale dynamics is qualitatively different compared to the continuous-time evolution. In particular, we find that a single microscopic defect at the junction, such as the addition of a single qubit, may change the nonequilibrium macrostate appearing at late time.

</details>


### [239] [Thermodynamic Langevin Equations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00811)
*Amilcare Porporato,Salvatore Calabrese,Lamberto Rondoni*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 本文审视了广义吉布斯系综随机过程的物理意义，重点关注小系统的热力学涨落。与环境接触产生相互作用熵，控制涨落分布，使宏态的广义吉布斯系综能以势能形式写出。这自然地导出了这些变量的精确非线性热力学朗之万方程（TLEs），漂移项用熵力表示。对理想单原子气体正则系综的分析表明，引入流会导致非平衡热传递条件，对熵产生有有趣约束但无明显热力学极限。对于恒力下的胶体粒子，宏观变量的TLEs与微观位置的TLEs（常用于随机热力学）不同；TLEs与哈密顿量导出的基本方程一致，而随机热力学需要等温条件和正比于位置的熵。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 小系统的热力学涨落具有重要物理意义，但传统系综理论对此描述不足。本文旨在通过广义吉布斯系综的随机过程，建立小系统热力学涨落的严格理论框架，并揭示其与随机热力学的根本差异。

Method: 从相互作用熵概念出发，将广义吉布斯系综写成势能形式，推导非线性热力学朗之万方程（TLEs）。通过理想单原子气体正则系综和恒力下胶体粒子两个案例进行分析和对比。

Result: (1) 得到精确的非线性TLEs，漂移项由熵力表达；(2) 理想气体中引入流产生非平衡热传递，熵产生有界但无热力学极限；(3) 恒力胶体粒子中，宏观TLEs与微观随机热力学方程本质不同：TLEs与哈密顿量一致，随机热力学需等温假设和熵正比于位置。

Conclusion: 广义吉布斯系综的随机过程为小系统热力学涨落提供了自洽描述，但与传统随机热力学存在根本分歧，前者更符合基本物理定律。

Abstract: The physical significance of the stochastic processes associated to the generalized Gibbs ensembles is scrutinized here with special attention to the thermodynamic fluctuations of small systems. The contact with the environment produces an interaction entropy, which controls the distribution of fluctuations and allows writing the generalized Gibbs ensembles for macrostates in potential form. This naturally yields exact nonlinear thermodynamic Langevin equations (TLEs) for such variables, with drift expressed in terms of entropic forces. The analysis of the canonical ensemble for an ideal monoatomic gas and the related TLEs show that introducing currents leads to nonequilibrium heat transfer conditions with interesting bounds on entropy production but with no obvious thermodynamic limit. For a colloidal particle under constant force, the TLEs for macroscopic variables are different from those for the microscopic position, typically used in the so-called stochastic thermodynamics; while TLEs are consistent with the fundamental equation obtained from the Hamiltonian, stochastic thermodynamics requires isothermal conditions and entropy proportional to position.

</details>


### [240] [Generalised BBGKY hierarchy for near-integrable dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00593)
*Leonardo Biagetti,Maciej Lebek,Milosz Panfil,Jacopo De Nardis*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个称为“关联流体-细胞系综”（correlated fluid-cell ensemble）的态假设，将可积接触相互作用与通用长程两体势相结合的量子与经典多体系统的动力学，映射为基于准粒子密度及其关联的广义BBGKY（gBBGKY）层级方程。通过微观分子动力学模拟验证了该框架，证明了其在长时间尺度下通过玻尔兹曼型散射积分描述单粒子分布的弛豫，同时高阶关联保持非热化，表明了一种不完全热化或广义热化的形式。该框架特别应用于长程偶极量子气体，还原了费米黄金规则结果，并完整解释了Tang等人的实验观测。该工作将BBGKY程序扩展到强局域相互作用区域，适用于从一维偶极冷原子气体到Lennard-Jones分子流体等广泛实验体系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有BBGKY层级框架难以处理同时包含可积接触相互作用（强局域）和长程两体势的混合系统，缺乏描述此类系统在宏观时空尺度下动力学行为的统一理论方法，且对伴随的“广义热化”或“不完全热化”现象缺乏理论刻画。

Method: 提出“关联流体-细胞系综”（correlated fluid-cell ensemble）作为t时刻的态假设；将局域可观测量在宏观时空尺度下的动力学映射为基于准粒子密度及其关联的广义BBGKY（gBBGKY）层级方程；通过微观分子动力学模拟验证理论预测。

Result: 单粒子分布函数在长时间下通过玻尔兹曼型散射积分演化，该积分刻画了可积接触过程与长程碰撞的耦合；高阶（两点及以上）关联在热化时间尺度上保持显著非热特性，呈现不完全热化/广义热化。对于长程偶极量子气体，推导的碰撞积分严格还原为费米黄金规则形式，完整解释了Tang等人（Phys.Rev.X 8, 021030 (2018)）的实验观测。

Conclusion: 该框架将BBGKY程序成功扩展到存在强局域相互作用的体系，为理解兼有可积接触和长程作用的多体系统动力学提供了统一的理论工具，适用于一维偶极冷原子气体、Lennard-Jones分子流体等多种实验相关系统。

Abstract: We study quantum and classical many-body Hamiltonian systems that combine integrable contact interactions with generic long-range two-body potentials. Starting from an ansatz for the state at time $t$, which we call the correlated fluid-cell ensemble, we show that the dynamics of local observables at macroscopic times and length scales can be cast into a generalized Bogoliubov-Born-Green-Kirkwood-Yvon (gBBGKY) hierarchy formulated in terms of the quasiparticle densities of the underlying integrable model and their correlations. We derive this hierarchy and validate these predictions against microscopic molecular-dynamics simulations, finding perfect agreement.
  At late times, the one-particle distribution relaxes via a Boltzmann-type scattering integral encoding the interplay between integrable contact processes and long-range collisions, whereas higher-point correlations remain strongly non-thermal on thermalization time scales, indicative of a form of incomplete or generalised thermalisation. Focusing on long-range dipolar quantum gases, where the relevant matrix elements can be obtained explicitly, we show that our collision integral reduces exactly to the Fermi golden rule result and provide a complete theoretical account of the experimental observations of Tang et al. (Phys.Rev.X 8, 021030 (2018)). More broadly, our framework extends the BBGKY program to regimes with strong local interactions, and applies to a wide class of experimentally relevant systems, from one-dimensional dipolar cold-atom gases to Lennard--Jones molecular fluids.

</details>


### [241] [Emerging cost-time Pareto front for diffusion with stochastic return](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.02071)
*Prashant Singh*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 本文研究带有限返回时间的物理重置机制中，热力学成本（平均功）与搜索时间（首次通过时间）之间的权衡关系，通过分析扩散粒子在外部约束势阱下的随机返回协议，找到了帕累托最优前沿。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有重置策略研究多关注瞬时重置（直接传送），但物理重置机制涉及有限返回时间并伴随热力学成本，该成本对搜索时间的影响尚未被探索，而这对于设计成本高效的 resetting 策略至关重要。

Method: 对扩散粒子在势阱 U_R(x) ~ |x|^m (m>0) 下的随机返回协议进行热力学分析，通过改变势阱形状 m，在给定热力学成本（平均功）下最小化期望首次通过时间，进而构建帕累托最优前沿。

Result: 对于给定的热力学成本，存在最优势阱形状可最小化首次通过时间；通过改变成本值可得到帕累托最优前沿，揭示了首次通过时间与平均功之间存在权衡关系。

Conclusion: 有限返回时间的物理重置机制中，搜索性能与热力学成本之间存在不可兼得的权衡关系，需根据成本预算选择最优势阱形状来平衡二者。

Abstract: Resetting, in which a system is regularly returned to a given state after a fixed or random duration, has become a useful strategy to optimize the search performance of a system. While earlier theoretical frameworks focused on instantaneous resetting, wherein the system is directly teleported to a given state, there is a growing interest in physical resetting mechanisms that involve a finite return time. However employing such a mechanism involves cost and the effect of this cost on the search time remains largely unexplored. Yet answering this is important in order to design cost-efficient resetting strategies. Motivated from this, we present a thermodynamic analysis of a diffusing particle whose position is intermittently reset to a specific site by employing a stochastic return protocol with external confining trap. We show for a family of potentials $U_R(x) \sim |x|^{m}$ with $m>0$, it is possible to find optimal potential shape that minimises the expected first-passage time for a given value of the thermodynamic cost, i.e. mean work. By varying this value, we then obtain the Pareto optimal front, and demonstrate a trade-off relation between the first-passage time and the work done.

</details>


### [242] [Beyond the Carnot Limit in the Internal Cycles of a Quantum Heat Engine under Finite Heat Reservoirs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00914)
*L. -L. Yan,M. -R. Yun,M. Li,S. -L. Su,K. -F. Cui,Gang Chen,M. Feng*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 本文从解析角度研究了连接两个有限热库的微观热机的量子卡诺循环，发现其内循环效率可超越标准卡诺极限，且无需消耗额外的量子资源（如相干性或压缩特性）。发动机运行时依赖内外循环协同完成完整卡诺循环，效率取决于热库热容和工作物质。最大效率和最大功率输出的解析结果揭示了有限尺寸热库在微观发动机高性能表现中的关键作用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索微观热机在连接有限热库时能否超越标准卡诺极限，并厘清其高性能背后的物理机制，特别是有限尺寸热库所扮演的角色。

Method: 采用解析方法研究时间依赖的量子卡诺循环，该循环包含内部和外部循环的协同工作，并考虑热库热容和工作物质性质的影响。

Result: 推导出最大效率和最大功率输出的解析表达式，揭示了有限尺寸热库是微观发动机超越标准卡诺极限效率的关键因素，且无需额外量子资源消耗。

Conclusion: 该方案对任何微观热力学系统普遍适用，且在现有实验室条件下完全可行。

Abstract: We investigate, in an analytical fashion, quantum Carnot cycles of a microscopic heat engine coupled to two nite heat reservoirs, whose internal cycles could own higher e ciency than the standard Carnot limit without consuming extra quantum resources, e.g., coherence or squeezing properties. The engine runs time-dependently, involving both the internal and external cycles to collaboratively accomplish a complete Carnot cycle, and the e ciency of the engine depends on the reservoirs heat capacities and the working substance. Our analytical results of the maximum efficiency and the maximum power output clarify the mechanism behind the high performance of the microscopic engines, displaying the key roles played by the nite-sized heat reservoirs. Our proposal is generally valid for any microscopic thermodynamic system and fully feasible under current laboratory conditions.

</details>


### [243] [Topological Classification of Dynamical Quantum Phase Transitions in the 1D XY model via Critical Mode Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00597)
*Bao-Ming Xu*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 本文研究了XY模型量子淬火下的动力学量子相变(DQPTs)，发现拓扑多样性源于临界模式的分类（边界模式与内部模式），内部模式导致整数绕数，边界模式导致半整数绕数，并据此将DQPTs分为六种类型，其中三种此前未被报道。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: DQPTs的拓扑性质通常由绕数表征，实验已观察到整数和半整数跳变，但背后的机制以及是否存在其他拓扑类尚不清楚。本文旨在揭示这些拓扑多样性的底层原因，并提供完整的分类框架。

Method: 作者研究了一维XY模型在淬火协议下的DQPTs，通过分析临界模式的本质（边界模式与内部模式）来理解拓扑行为，并基于临界模式的数量和分类对DQPTs的拓扑性质进行分类。

Result: 发现临界内部模式产生整数绕数DQPTs，临界边界模式产生半整数绕数DQPTs。依据临界模式的分类和数量，将DQPTs分为六种类型，其中三种为新发现类型，并给出了相应的动力学相图。

Conclusion: 该分类框架不仅适用于XY模型，还可推广至其他一维两带模型（如SSH模型、Kitaev链、Rice-Mele模型和Creutz模型），为理解DQPTs的拓扑分类提供了统一视角。

Abstract: Dynamical quantum phase transitions (DQPTs), which serve as a theoretical framework for understanding far-from-equilibrium physics in quantum many-body systems, have recently been observed experimentally. Their topological properties are typically characterized by the winding number, which acts as an order parameter. While DQPTs exhibiting both integer and half-integer jumps in the winding number have been reported, the underlying mechanisms behind these distinct topological behaviors, as well as the potential existence of other topological classes, remain open questions. To address this, we investigate DQPTs in the one-dimensional XY model under a quench protocol. We show that the observed topological diversity originates from the nature of the critical modes, which we classify into two categories: boundary modes and interior modes. Specifically, critical interior modes always lead to DQPTs with an integer winding number, while critical boundary modes always result in DQPTs characterized by a half-integer winding number. By analyzing the number and classification of critical modes, we provide a classification of the topological properties of DQPTs in the one-dimensional XY model. According to their distinct topological features, we categorize DQPTs into six types, three of which have not been previously identified in the literature. We discuss in detail the conditions associated with each type and present the corresponding dynamical phase diagrams. Our framework is not restricted to the XY model; it is applicable to other two-band models in one-dimensional systems, including the SSH model, Kitaev chain, Rice-Mele model, and Creutz model.

</details>


### [244] [Method of images for one-dimensional discrete random walk under a reflecting barrier](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00926)
*Kazuhiko Seki*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 本文指出一维离散对称随机游走在反射边界下的转移概率在传统镜像法中存在不一致性，并提出通过偏移镜像位置可使镜像法适用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统镜像法在反射边界情形下存在不一致性问题，即使已有精确解，该方法仍被报道存在缺陷。

Method: 通过偏移镜像位置，使镜像法在反射边界条件下变得适用。

Result: 偏移后的镜像法能够正确导出反射边界下随机游走的转移概率，消除了原有的不一致性。

Conclusion: 镜像法在反射边界下的不一致性可通过偏移镜像位置来修正，从而恢复其适用性。

Abstract: The transition probability for a one-dimensional discrete symmetric random walk under a reflecting barrier was once given by the method of images. [S. Chandrasekhar, Rev. Mod. Phys. 15, 1 (1943).] However, several inconsistencies have been reported when the method of images is applied in cases where a reflecting barrier is considered, even after the exact solution has been obtained. Here, we explicitly show that the method of images becomes applicable if the image position is shifted.

</details>


### [245] [Asymptotic Matching the Self-Consistent Expansion to Approximate the Modified Bessel Functions of the Second Kind](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.02300)
*Chanania Steinbock,Eytan Katzav*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 本文提出将渐近匹配方法应用于自洽展开（SCE）技术，通过识别问题的渐近行为来先验地调整近似解，从而无需依赖实验或数值比较即可获得全域一致的均匀近似，并以修正贝塞尔函数K_α(x)为例进行了验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: SCE技术虽强大但存在"自由度过多"的问题，即能生成大量近似解，但优劣区分只能事后通过与实验或数值结果对比来判断，缺乏先验的筛选机制。

Method: 提出将渐近匹配方法引入SCE框架：首先识别问题的渐近行为，然后利用该行为对SCE生成的近似解进行调整（调谐），使其在渐近区域与目标行为匹配，从而在全定义域上获得均匀一致的近似解。

Result: 以修正贝塞尔函数K_α(x)为测试案例，成功通过渐近匹配方法获得了全域均匀的近似解，验证了该方法无需依赖经验对比即可实现先验筛选的有效性。

Conclusion: 渐近匹配为SCE的自由度问题提供了一种先验的解决方案，使得无需事后比较即可获得高质量的统一近似，拓展了SCE在实际物理问题中的应用前景。

Abstract: The self-consistent expansion (SCE) is a powerful technique for obtaining perturbative solutions to problems in statistical physics but it suffers from a subtle problem - too much freedom! The SCE can be used to generate an enormous number of approximations but distinguishing the superb approximations from the deficient ones can only be achieved after the fact by comparison to experimental or numerical results. Here, we propose a method of using the SCE to a priori obtain uniform approximations, namely asymptotic matching. If the asymptotic behaviour of a problem can be identified, then the approximations generated by the SCE can be tuned to asymptotically match the desired behaviour and this can be used to obtain uniform approximations over the entire domain of consideration, without needing to resort to empirical comparisons. We demonstrate this method by applying it to the task of obtaining uniform approximations of the modified Bessel functions of the second kind, $K_α(x)$.

</details>


### [246] [Tripartite entanglement in mixed-spin triangle trimmer](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.01204)
*Zh. Adamyan,V. Ohanyan*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 本文研究混合自旋-(1/2,1/2,1)海森堡自旋三聚体系统，通过非均匀朗德g因子和不同交换常数，在外磁场下生成和调控三体纠缠态，重点分析了非守恒磁化对三体纠缠的影响，并采用三体负性度量来量化纠缠。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 海森堡自旋系统是产生和操控纠缠量子态的有利物理平台，本文旨在寻找最优参数以创建纠缠态并通过外磁场进行控制。

Method: 研究混合自旋-(1/2,1/2,1)海森堡自旋三聚体系统，包含两种不同的各向同性朗德g因子和两种不同的交换常数，采用三体负性作为纠缠度量，分析非均匀g因子导致的磁矩算符与哈密顿量非对易性产生的非守恒磁化效应。

Result: 系统研究了三体纠缠随各种系统参数的依赖关系，特别揭示了非守恒磁化（由g因子非均匀性引起）对三体纠缠的影响。

Conclusion: 通过非均匀g因子引入磁矩算符与哈密顿量的非对易性，可在海森堡自旋三聚体系统中有效调控三体纠缠，三体负性度量适用于表征该系统中的三体纠缠特性。

Abstract: Heisenberg model spin systems offer favourable and manageable physical settings for generating and manipulating entangled quantum states. In this work mixed spin-(1/2,1/2,1) Heisenberg spin trimmer with two different but isotropic Lande $g$-factors and two different exchange constants is considered. The study undertakes the task of finding the optimal parameters to create entangled states and control them by external magnetic field. The primary objective of this work is to examine the tripartite entanglement of a system and the dependence of the tripartite entanglement on various system parameters. Particularly, the effects of non-conserving magnetization are in the focus of our research. The source of non-commutativity between the magnetic moment operator and the Hamiltonian is non-uniformity of $g$-factors. To quantify the tripartite entanglement, an entanglement measure refered to as "tripartite negativity" has been used in this work.

</details>


### [247] [Real Space Renormalization Group for One-Dimensional Ising Chains](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.01021)
*Shraddha singh,Vijay Singh*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 本文运用实空间重整化群（RNG）技术研究一维Ising链，在复述Nauenberg对有序Ising链的抽稀方法基础上，将其推广至交替Ising链和Fibonacci Ising链等非平凡情形，并以适合本科生的教学风格呈现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将实空间重整化群技术从简单的有序Ising链扩展到更具复杂性的非周期结构（交替链和Fibonacci链），填补教学材料中缺乏对非平凡一维自旋系统RNG处理实例的空白。

Method: 采用实空间重整化群中的抽稀（decimation）方法，对一维Ising链进行RNG分析。先复现Nauenberg对有序链的处理，再将该方法分别应用于交替Ising链（两种耦合常数交替排列）和Fibonacci Ising链（耦合常数按Fibonacci序列排列）两种非周期结构。

Result: 成功将抽稀RNG方法从有序Ising链推广至交替Ising链和Fibonacci Ising链，得到了这两种非平凡系统的重整化群变换递推关系，揭示了其标度行为。

Conclusion: 实空间RNG技术可有效应用于非周期一维Ising链，且该教学化处理方式能使统计力学入门学生直观理解重整化群思想在复杂系统中的应用。

Abstract: We apply the real space Renormalisation Group (RNG) technique to a variety of one-dimensional Ising chains. We begin by recapitulating the work of Nauenberg for an ordered Ising chain, namely the decimation approach. We extend this work to certain non-trivial situation namely, the Alternate Ising Chain and Fibonacci Ising chain. Our approach is pedagogical and accessible to undergraduate students who have had a first course in statistical mechanics.

</details>


### [248] [A mesoscopic theory for stochastic coupled oscillators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.02416)
*Victor Buendía*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 本文针对随机耦合振荡器系统，构建了有限大小种群的一般介观描述，并将其应用于随机Kuramoto模型。该介观描述能够获取振荡器系综的自然乘性涨落，首次推导出随机Kuramoto模型序参数的高精度封闭表达式，并获得了系统涨落和同步转变临界指数的新见解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Ott-Antonsen ansatz在处理热力学极限下的确定性系统时非常有效，但对于随机模型仅是一种近似。现有的理论框架缺乏对有限大小随机耦合振荡器系统的精确介观描述，导致无法准确刻画其自然涨落行为及同步相变的关键性质。

Method: 本文构建了一个一般性的介观描述框架，用于处理有限大小的随机耦合振荡器种群，并将其应用于随机Kuramoto模型。通过该介观描述，推导出振荡器系综的自然乘性涨落，并利用该框架求解序参数的封闭表达式。

Result: 首次获得了随机Kuramoto模型序参数的高精度封闭解析表达式；揭示了系统涨落的本质特征；确定了同步转变的临界指数，这些结果在此前的理论框架下是无法获得的。

Conclusion: 所提出的介观描述框架为研究有限大小随机耦合振荡器系统提供了一种精确且普适的理论工具，能够突破Ott-Antonsen ansatz在随机情形下的局限性，推动对同步现象中有限大小效应和临界行为的深入理解。

Abstract: The celebrated Ott-Antonsen ansatz for coupled oscillators provides a useful framework to work with deterministic systems in the thermodynamic limit, but remains just an approximation for stochastic models. In this paper, I construct a general mesoscopic description of finite-sized populations of stochastic coupled oscillators and apply it to study the stochastic Kuramoto model. From such a mesoscopic description it is possible to obtain the natural, multiplicative fluctuations of the oscillator ensemble. The analysis allows one to derive highly accurate, closed expressions for the stochastic Kuramoto model's order parameter for the first time. Moreover, it is possible to get novel insights into the system's fluctuations and the synchronization transition's critical exponents which were inaccessible before.

</details>


### [249] [Universal and non-universal large deviations in critical systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.01250)
*Ivan Balog,Bertrand Delamotte,Adam Rançon*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 本文通过多种理论方法与数值模拟，系统研究了临界O(n)系统中罕见事件的概率分布函数尾部行为，揭示了从普适到非普适的交叉特征，并挑战了关于尾部拉伸指数衰减中幂律修正的现有假设。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 罕见事件在理解复杂系统中至关重要，但在尺度不变（临界）系统中，由于强关联效应，表征和分析这些罕见事件的统计特性极具挑战性。现有理论对概率分布函数尾部的行为（特别是普适性与非普适性、以及指数衰减的修正形式）存在争议或不足，亟需系统研究。

Method: 综合运用微扰论、泛函重整化群、层次模型、大n极限分析以及蒙特卡洛模拟等多种方法，对临界O(n)系统中的通用罕见事件进行系统研究。
