Abstract: Active nematics, in their pure form, have demonstrated a plethora of dynamic and steady state behaviors, including large-scale dynamic structures, collective flows, and intricate multi-spatial temporal dynamics. This complexity further increases in the presence of external polar agents. We investigate active nematics interspersed with polar microswimmers, akin to active apolar cells infused with active impurities, microswimmers. Our comprehensive numerical study reveals that varying the microswimmers' motility induces a novel spatiotemporal state in the active nematics backdrop. This state is marked by macroscopic swirl-like structures and a reduction in the overall order of the active nematics. Interestingly, this state emerges at intermediate motility levels, where microswimmers form local clusters and exhibit coherent motion. However, at higher motility levels, the swirls become less coherent, and microswimmer clustering intensifies. We show that the effect of the polar microswimmers on active nematics can be interpreted as a spatiotemporally correlated colored noise on active nematics, which promotes bend instability in active nematics, leading to the observed swirling dynamics. Our findings indicate that the spatiotemporal states are highly sensitive to the microswimmers' motility, offering potential avenues for pathogen identification based on known motility characteristics

</details>


### [291] [An Efficient Enumeration of Flat-Foldings : Study on Random Single Vertex Origami](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.03240)
*Chihiro Nakajima*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 本文提出利用统计力学模型和高效尺寸缩减方法，对随机折纸图的平面折叠总数进行近似计数与平均计算复杂度评估，并给出单顶点折纸图折叠总数的渐近规模依赖性预测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 针对随机折纸图的平面折叠总数近似计数、多种实例上的平均值评估、forcing sets的获取以及平均计算复杂度评估等问题，现有方法难以高效处理，亟需新的物理模型与规模缩减方法。

Method: 采用统计力学模型建立物理模型，结合基于该模型的近似枚举数值方法，对中心顶点周围角度宽度随机的单顶点折纸图进行平面折叠总数的近似枚举；同时通过组织物理模型中的项，利用禁止贯穿约束导致的局部堆叠顺序链式确定关系，提出高效的折叠确定/枚举方法。

Result: 给出了单顶点随机折纸图平面折叠总数的近似枚举结果，获得了其规模依赖性，并实现了向无限大极限的渐近预测。

Conclusion: 所提出的物理模型与数值方法能够有效近似枚举随机折纸图的平面折叠总数，并揭示其渐近行为；基于约束传播的链式确定方法有望高效解决折叠确定与枚举问题，与forcing sets密切相关。

Abstract: This paper deals with themes such as approximate counting/evaluation of the total number of flat-foldings for random origami diagrams, evaluation of the values averaged over various instances, obtaining forcing sets for general origami diagrams, and evaluation of average computational complexity. An approach to the above problems using a physical model and an efficient size reduction method for them is proposed. Using a statistical mechanics model and a numerical method of approximate enumeration based on it, we give the result of approximate enumeration of the total number of flat-foldings of single-vertex origami diagram with random width of angles gathering around the central vertex, and obtain its size dependence for an asymptotic prediction towards the limit of infinite size. In addition, an outlook with respect to the chained determination of local stacking orders of facets caused by the constraint that prohibits the penetration of them is also provided from the viewpoint of organizing the terms included in the physical model. A method to efficiently solve the problem of the determination or enumeration of flat-foldings is discussed based on the above perspectives. This is thought to be closely related to forcing sets.

</details>


### [292] [Competing nucleation pathways in nanocrystal formation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.05931)
*Carlos R. Salazar,Akshay Krishna Ammothum Kandy,Jean Furstoss,Quentin Gromoff,Jacek Goniakowski,Julien Lam*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 本研究通过机器学习力场、数据驱动的局域有序化表征以及多温度采样策略，成功解决了纳米晶体成核过程中的三大障碍，揭示了氧化锌从纳米液滴熔体中结晶时，不同过冷度下存在竞争性的成核路径。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 数值方法在补充实验测量方面尽管付出了诸多努力，但真正从原子层面揭示纳米晶体成核过程仍面临根本性挑战，亟需突破三大关键障碍：长程相互作用的精确描述、复杂结构景观中局域有序的识别，以及广泛温度范围内的有效采样。

Method: 采用包含长程相互作用的机器学习力场；利用数据驱动方法表征与多种晶体多晶型相关的复杂结构景观中的局域有序性；结合强力模拟和稀有事件采样技术，在宽温度范围内进行比较研究。

Result: 成功模拟了氧化锌从纳米液滴熔体中的结晶过程，发现不同的成核路径会随着研究的过冷度不同而相互竞争。

Conclusion: 所提出的综合模拟策略能够克服纳米晶体成核研究中的关键障碍，揭示了过冷度对不同成核路径竞争机制的调控作用，为从原子层面理解成核过程提供了新的视角。

Abstract: Despite numerous efforts from numerical approaches to complement experimental measurements, several fundamental challenges have still hindered one's ability to truly provide an atomistic picture of the nucleation process in nanocrystals. Among them, our study resolves three obstacles: (1) Machine-learning force fields including long-range interactions able to capture the finesse of the underlying atomic interactions, (2) Data-driven characterization of the local ordering in a complex structural landscape associated with several crystal polymorphs and (3) Comparing results from a large range of temperatures using both brute-force and rare-event sampling. Altogether, our simulation strategy has allowed us to study zinc oxide crystallization from nano-droplet melt. Remarkably, our results show that different nucleation pathways compete depending on the investigated degree of supercooling.

</details>


### [293] [Absorbing state transitions with long-range annihilation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.03280)
*Nicholas O'Dea,Sayak Bhattacharjee,Sarang Gopalakrishnan,Vedika Khemani*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 本文研究了一类具有长程对湮灭和宇称约束的扩散分支粒子系统的随机过程，发现其吸收相变临界指数可连续调节，两个经典普适类（Directed Percolation和Parity-Conserving）是该连续谱的端点。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 这类长程过程在经典化学反应（如带电试剂的电磁相互作用）和量子动力学（如基于测量反馈的态制备与纠错）中自然出现，但对其吸收相变行为缺乏系统理解。

Method: 通过解析分析和数值模拟，研究在宇称约束下、对湮灭概率随粒子间距幂律衰减的扩散分支粒子系统，调节湮灭作用距离（幂律指数），考察吸收态和相变性质。

Result: 发现定向渗流（DP）和宇称守恒（PC）这两个经典吸收态普适类是连续谱的端点，随着湮灭作用距离增大，临界指数连续变化，形成一条新的普适类连续谱线。

Conclusion: 长程对湮灭可以连接并插值两个经典吸收态普适类，为理解非平衡相变中普适类的连续变形提供了新视角，并对量子纠错等过程有指导意义。

Abstract: We introduce a family of classical stochastic processes describing diffusive particles undergoing branching and long-range annihilation in the presence of a parity constraint. The probability for a pair-annihilation event decays as a power-law in the distance between particles, with a tunable exponent. Such long-range processes arise naturally in various classical settings, such as chemical reactions involving reagents with long-range electromagnetic interactions. They also increasingly play a role in the study of quantum dynamics, in which certain quantum protocols can be mapped to classical stochastic processes with long-range interactions: for example, state preparation or error correction processes aim to prepare ordered ground states, which requires removing point-like excitations in pairs via non-local feedback operations conditioned on a global set of measurement outcomes. We analytically and numerically describe features of absorbing phases and phase transitions in this family of classical models as pairwise annihilation is performed at larger and larger distances. Notably, we find that the two canonical absorbing-state universality classes -- directed-percolation and parity-conserving -- are endpoints of a line of universality classes with continuously interpolating critical exponents.

</details>


### [294] [Time-cost-error trade-off relation in thermodynamics: The third law and beyond](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.04576)
*Tan Van Vu,Keiji Saito*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 本文引入“分离态”概念，统一刻画了包括信息擦除、冷却和复制在内的热力学操作，揭示了时间、成本和误差之间的三元权衡关系 τ𝒞ε_τ ≥ 1-η，为热力学第三定律的不可达性原理提供了普适量化，并扩展至量子马尔可夫与非马尔可夫动力学领域。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在随机热力学和量子热力学框架下，热力学操作（如冷却、信息擦除、复制）中的时间、能量成本与误差之间的联合约束关系尚不清晰；第三定律的不可达性原理虽然指出需要无限资源才能达到绝对零度，但“资源”的精确识别及其如何共同约束可实现的误差仍缺乏统一理论。

Method: 引入由完全未占据态和完全占据态组成的“分离态”概念，定义相应的热动力学成本和误差，构建统一的理论框架；在此基础上推导出时间(τ)、成本(𝒞)和误差(ε_τ)之间的三元权衡关系 τ𝒞ε_τ ≥ 1-η，并拓展至量子林德布拉德动力学及非马尔可夫动力学情形。

Result: 得到了一个简洁普适的三元权衡不等式 τ𝒞ε_τ ≥ 1-η，适用于信息擦除、冷却和复制等多种热力学操作；该关系量化了第三定律的不可达性原理；在量子林德布拉德动力学下导出了类似的三元权衡关系，量化了以给定误差制备纯态的成本。

Conclusion: 本研究为第三定律的不可达性原理提供了通用的定量表达，揭示了时间、能量成本与误差之间的基本制约关系，并对冷却操作、分离态制备及经典精确复制的不可能性（no-go theorem）给出了定量界限；同时将结论延伸至量子非马尔可夫动力学，具有广泛的理论意义。

Abstract: Elucidating fundamental limitations inherent in physical systems is a central subject in physics. For important thermodynamic operations such as information erasure, cooling, and copying, resources like time and energetic cost must be expended to achieve the desired outcome within a predetermined error margin. In the context of cooling, the unattainability principle of the third law of thermodynamics asserts that infinite "resources" are needed to reach absolute zero. However, the precise identification of relevant resources and how they jointly constrain achievable error remains unclear within the frameworks of stochastic and quantum thermodynamics. In this work, we introduce the concept of separated states, which consist of fully unoccupied and occupied states, and formulate the corresponding thermokinetic cost and error, thereby establishing a unifying framework for a broad class of thermodynamic operations. We then uncover a three-way trade-off relation between time, cost, and error for thermodynamic operations aimed at creating separated states, simply expressed as $τ\mathcal{C}\varepsilon_τ\ge 1-η$. This fundamental relation is applicable to diverse thermodynamic operations, including information erasure, cooling, and copying. It provides a profound quantification of the unattainability principle in the third law of thermodynamics in a general form. Building upon this relation, we explore the quantitative limitations governing cooling operations, the preparation of separated states, and a no-go theorem for exact classical copying. Furthermore, we extend these findings to the quantum regime, encompassing both Markovian and non-Markovian dynamics. Specifically, within Lindblad dynamics, we derive a similar three-way trade-off relation that quantifies the cost of achieving a pure state with a given error.

</details>


### [295] [Functional Decomposition and Estimation of Irreversibility in Time Series via Machine Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.06063)
*Michele Vodret,Cristiano Pacini,Christian Bongiorno*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于梯度提升的高维时间序列不可逆性量化方法，通过轨迹编码、马尔可夫阶数识别和变量交互假设检验三阶段流程，可选择性关闭变量交互以分析其贡献。应用于金融市场发现：稳定期不可逆性主要源于短期模式，不稳定期短期模式被破坏，仅剩长期稳定模式贡献，凸显高阶变量交互在金融动态中的关键作用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有时间序列不可逆性量化方法在处理高维、非线性系统时存在局限，缺乏灵活且无需大量校准的通用框架。需要一种能够解析变量交互对不可逆性具体贡献的方法，以深入理解复杂系统（如金融市场）的动态机制。

Method: 将不可逆性量化映射为二元分类问题，采用梯度提升（Gradient Boosting）进行无模型、非线性估计。流程分为三阶段：(1) 轨迹编码，将时间序列转化为适合分类的特征表示；(2) 马尔可夫阶数识别，确定时间依赖的最优阶数；(3) 变量交互假设检验，通过选择性关闭特定变量交互来量化其对不可逆性的贡献。

Result: 在金融市场实证中，稳定期不可逆性主要与短期模式相关（低阶马尔可夫依赖），而不稳定期短期模式被破坏，仅保留来自稳定长期模式（高阶依赖）的贡献。这一转变表明高阶变量交互是理解金融市场动荡期动态的核心因素。

Conclusion: 提出了一种简单、灵活且能处理高维系统的不可逆性量化框架，其变量交互选择性关闭机制是核心创新。该方法揭示了金融市场的不可逆性来源在不同市场状态下的本质差异，证明了高阶交互在系统分析中的重要性。

Abstract: This work introduces a novel, simple, and flexible method to quantify irreversibility in generic high-dimensional time series based on the well-known mapping to a binary classification problem. Our approach utilizes gradient boosting for estimation, providing a model-free, nonlinear analysis able to handle large-dimensional systems while requiring minimal or no calibration. Our procedure is divided into three phases: trajectory encoding, Markovian order identification, and hypothesis testing for variable interactions. The latter is the key innovation that allows us to selectively switch off variable interactions to discern their specific contribution to irreversibility. When applied to financial markets, our findings reveal a distinctive shift: during stable periods, irreversibility is mainly related to short-term patterns, whereas in unstable periods, these short-term patterns are disrupted, leaving only contributions from stable long-term ones. This observed transition underscores the crucial importance of high-order variable interactions in understanding the dynamics of financial markets, especially in times of turbulence.

</details>


### [296] [Bayesian inference of wall torques for active Brownian particles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.03533)
*Sascha Lambert,Merle Duchene,Stefan Klumpp*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 本文比较了主动布朗粒子与平壁碰撞的经验模型（最小二乘法）和贝叶斯推断方法，发现贝叶斯方法无需方向数据即可有效构建模型参数的后验分布。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 主动布朗粒子模型常通过经验力或力矩来描述与复杂环境的相互作用（如壁面碰撞后的对齐行为），但这些经验模型的预测质量尚不明确。作者旨在评估这些经验模型的准确性。

Method: 采用经典最小二乘法评估瞬时力矩，并设计贝叶斯推断程序构建合理模型参数的后验分布。两者通过杆状活性粒子与平壁的刚性散射轨迹进行比较。

Result: 贝叶斯推断方法无需粒子的方向数据即可工作，可适用于实验追踪数据，而最小二乘法则需要方向信息。

Conclusion: 贝叶斯方法在无需方向数据的情况下有效评估经验模型的参数，更适用于实际实验场景中的主动粒子与复杂环境的交互建模。

Abstract: The motility of living things and synthetic self-propelled objects is often described using Active Brownian particles. To capture the interaction of these particles with their often complex environment, this model can be augmented with empirical forces or torques, for example, to describe their alignment with an obstacle or wall after a collision. Here, we assess the quality of these empirical models by comparing their output predictions with trajectories of rod-shaped active particles that scatter sterically at a flat wall. We employ a classical least-squares method to evaluate the instantaneous torque. In addition, we lay out a Bayesian inference procedure to construct the posterior distribution of plausible model parameters. In contrast to the least squares fit, the Bayesian approach does not require orientational data of the active particle and can readily be applied to experimental tracking data.

</details>


### [297] [Scaling and universality for percolation in random networks: A unified view](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.05125)
*Lorenzo Cirigliano,Gábor Timár,Claudio Castellano*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 本文通过生成函数方法，系统研究了随机网络渗流的临界性质，确定了各类异质性网络的所有临界指数、临界振幅比和团簇尺寸分布形式，揭示了高度异质性网络中的交叉现象、非平凡标度形式和超标度违反，澄清了先前文献中的矛盾结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管随机网络上标准渗流的基本现象已为人所知，但过渡的临界性质（尤其在异质性基底上）尚未完全阐明，文献中存在矛盾结果。本文旨在通过生成函数方法给出彻底而完整的研究。

Method: 采用生成函数方法（generating functions approach）对随机网络的渗流临界性质进行系统分析。

Result: 确定了所有临界指数和临界振幅比；给出了任意异质性水平下团簇尺寸分布的形式；发现高度异质性网络中的交叉现象、非平凡标度形式以及超标度违反。

Conclusion: 澄清了先前文献中关于随机网络渗流临界性质的不一致之处。

Abstract: Percolation processes on random networks have been the subject of intense research activity over the last decades: the overall phenomenology of standard percolation on uncorrelated and unclustered topologies is well known. Still some critical properties of the transition, in particular for heterogeneous substrates, have not been fully elucidated and contradictory results appear in the literature. In this paper we present, by means of a generating functions approach, a thorough and complete investigation of percolation critical properties in random networks. We determine all critical exponents, the associated critical amplitude ratios and the form of the cluster size distribution for networks of any level of heterogeneity. We uncover, in particular for highly heterogeneous networks, subtle crossover phenomena, nontrivial scaling forms and violations of hyperscaling. In this way we clarify the origin of inconsistencies in the previous literature.

</details>


### [298] [Full Statistics of Regularized Local Energy Density in a Freely Expanding Kipnis-Marchioro-Presutti Gas](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.06335)
*Eldad Bettelheim,Baruch Meerson*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 本文结合宏观涨落理论与逆散射方法，研究了KMP晶格气体中能量密度在空间间隔上平均值的长时间统计特性，发现大偏差函数具有普适性，并确定了条件于平均能量密度的最概然能量密度构型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为了理解KMP晶格气体中能量密度在空间间隔上平均值的长时间统计行为，特别是大偏差函数的普适性及其物理机制。

Method: 将宏观涨落理论（Macroscopic Fluctuation Theory）与逆散射方法（Inverse Scattering Method）相结合，分析自由膨胀的KMP晶格气体，其中初始时刻在原点释放有限能量。

Result: 当时间t趋于无穷大且固定间隔半长L时，能量密度平均值U的大偏差函数在能量含量表达下趋于与L无关的普适形式。关键结果之一是确定了给定U条件下t时刻能量密度的最概然构型。

Conclusion: 该方法成功揭示了KMP模型中长时间能量统计的普适特性，并为理解非平衡系统中的涨落行为提供了新的分析工具。

Abstract: We combine the Macroscopic Fluctuation Theory and the Inverse Scattering Method to determine the full long-time statistics of the energy density $u(x,t)$ averaged over a given spatial interval, $$U =\frac{1}{2L}\int_{-L}^{L}dx\, u(x,t),$$ in a freely expanding Kipnis-Marchioro-Presutti (KMP) lattice gas on the line, following the release at $t=0$ of a finite amount of energy at the origin. In particular, we show that, as time $t$ goes to infinity at fixed $L$, the large deviation function of $U$ approaches a universal, $L$-independent form when expressed in terms of the energy content of the interval $|x|<L$. A key part of the solution is the determination of the most likely configuration of the energy density at time $t$, conditional on $U$.

</details>


### [299] [A visual proof of entropy production during thermalization with a heat reservoir](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.03581)
*Ramandeep S. Johal*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 本文通过热力学系统的平衡曲线来描述与热库热平衡过程中的熵产生。研究发现，在热平衡过程中同时提取功会减少熵产生，最大功提取对应可逆过程，且损失的可用功与产生的熵成正比。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 本文旨在通过热力学系统的平衡曲线来刻画热平衡过程中的熵产生，并探究功提取对熵产生的影响机制。

Method: 采用热力学系统的平衡曲线作为分析工具，通过比较不同功提取条件下初始和最终平衡态之间的熵产生差异，推导可用功损失与熵产生之间的定量关系。

Result: 1) 在热平衡过程中提取功可以降低熵产生；2) 最大功提取时过程可逆，熵产生为零；3) 损失的可用功与熵产生之间存在直接正比关系。

Conclusion: 该研究为热力学过程中熵产生与功提取之间建立定量联系，揭示了可用功损失的本质源于熵产生，为理解热力学不可逆性提供了新的视角。

Abstract: In this note, the equilibrium curve of a thermodynamic system is used to depict entropy production in the process of thermalization with a reservoir. For the given initial and final equilibrium states of the system, the entropy production is reduced when work is also extracted during thermalization. The case of maximum work extraction corresponds to a reversible process. For less than optimal work extraction, the lost available work is shown to be directly proportional to the entropy produced.

</details>


### [300] [How to compute density fluctuations at the nanoscale](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.05530)
*Peter Krüger*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 本文指出基于点状粒子的标准数密度涨落定义忽略了排除体积效应，导致等温压缩率出现系统性有限尺寸标度和非物理的表面项。通过引入考虑粒子有限尺寸的修正对分布函数，作者消除了主导有限尺寸效应，使得在极小采样体积中也能精确计算密度涨落，为纳米尺度下从涨落理论获取局部压缩率开辟了道路。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准粒子数涨落定义基于点状粒子假设，忽略了排除体积效应，导致等温压缩率计算中出现系统性有限尺寸标度和非物理的表面项，需要纠正这一缺陷。

Method: 引入一种修正的对分布函数，该函数考虑了粒子的有限尺寸；在一维硬球流体中验证了压缩率严格尺寸无关性，并通过新理论从数涨落复现了该结果。

Result: 新方法消除了主导的有限尺寸效应，使得在可与单个粒子尺寸相比拟的极小采样体积中也能精确计算密度涨落；在一维硬球流体中，压缩率严格与尺寸无关。

Conclusion: 该发现为在纳米尺度下利用涨落理论获得局部压缩率提供了可能。

Abstract: The standard definition of particle number fluctuations based on point-like particles neglects the excluded volume effect. This leads to a large and systematic finite-size scaling and an unphysical surface term in the isothermal compressibility. We correct these errors by introducing a modified pair distribution function which takes account of the finite size of the particles. For the hard sphere fluid in one-dimension, we show that the compressibility is strictly size-independent and we reproduce this result from the number fluctuations calculated with the new theory. In general, the present method eliminates the leading finite-size effect, which makes it possible to compute density fluctuations accurately in very small sampling volumes, comparable to the single particle size. These findings open the way for obtaining the local compressibility from fluctuation theory at the nanometer scale.

</details>


### [301] [Committor guided estimates of molecular transition rates](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.05879)
*Andrew R. Mitchell,Grant M. Rotskoff*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 本文提出改进的半群方法结合自适应采样策略，通过神经网络精确学习高维物理系统的committor函数，并利用Hill关系直接计算分子系统的过渡速率，在多个基准问题上验证了方法的准确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 物理系统的构型反应概率（committor函数）包含丰富的过渡路径机制信息，但其完整参数化需要构建高维函数，传统方法难以处理。近年来基于神经网络的"物理信息"机器学习为解决高维偏微分方程提供了新途径，但如何高效准确地学习committor并用于预测过渡速率仍是挑战。

Method: 基于半群方法（semigroup approach）学习committor；重新设计目标函数（objective function reframing）；改进自适应采样策略（adaptive sampling strategies）；应用Hill关系（Hill relation）直接从committor计算过渡速率。

Result: 改进的目标函数和自适应采样策略能提供高度精确的committor表示；直接应用Hill关系得到的过渡速率在分子系统中准确可靠。

Conclusion: 通过目标函数重构和自适应采样优化，神经网络可精确学习高维committor函数，且结合Hill关系能有效预测分子系统的过渡速率，为复杂物理系统的动力学分析提供了实用工具。

Abstract: The probability that a configuration of a physical system reacts, or transitions from one metastable state to another, is quantified by the committor function. This function contains richly detailed mechanistic information about transition pathways, but a full parameterization of the committor requires building representing a high-dimensional function, a generically challenging task. Recent efforts to leverage neural networks as a means to solve high-dimensional partial differential equations, often called "physics-informed" machine learning, have brought the committor into computational reach. Here, we build on the semigroup approach to learning the committor and assess its utility for predicting dynamical quantities such as transition rates. We show that a careful reframing of the objective function and improved adaptive sampling strategies provide highly accurate representations of the committor. Furthermore, by directly applying the Hill relation, we show that these committors provide accurate transition rates for molecular system.

</details>


### [302] [Entanglement asymmetry in the critical XXZ spin chain](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.06427)
*Marco Lastres,Sara Murciano,Filiberto Ares,Pasquale Calabrese*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 本文通过纠缠不对称性研究SU(2)对称性显式破缺到U(1)子群的过程，以临界XXZ自旋链为模型，在连续极限下采用共形微扰理论并结合数值模拟，分析了各向异性点以外SU(2)的U(1)子群破缺以及完整SU(2)群的纠缠不对称性，并基于标度论证推导了其渐近表达式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 利用纠缠不对称性这一可观测量，系统地研究扩展量子系统部分中SU(2)对称性破缺到U(1)子群的机制，特别是在XXZ自旋链中各向异性点附近的临界行为。

Method: 以临界XXZ自旋链为具体模型，在连续极限下采用质量less紧致玻色子描述，应用共形微扰理论分析U(1)子群的破缺，并结合晶格数值模拟进行验证；对于完整SU(2)群的纠缠不对称性，采用通用标度论证推导渐近表达式。

Result: 通过共形微扰理论和数值模拟，得到了U(1)子群破缺的定量描述；基于标度论证，推导了完整SU(2)群纠缠不对称性的渐近行为表达式。

Conclusion: 纠缠不对称性能够有效刻画对称性破缺的程度，为理解量子多体系统中对称性破缺的纠缠特性提供了理论框架和分析工具。

Abstract: We study the explicit breaking of a $SU(2)$ symmetry to a $U(1)$ subgroup employing the entanglement asymmetry, a recently introduced observable that measures how much symmetries are broken in a part of extended quantum systems. We consider as specific model the critical XXZ spin chain, which breaks the $SU(2)$ symmetry of spin rotations except at the isotropic point, and is described by the massless compact boson in the continuum limit. We examine the $U(1)$ subgroup of $SU(2)$ that is broken outside the isotropic point by applying conformal perturbation theory, which we complement with numerical simulations on the lattice. We also analyse the entanglement asymmetry of the full $SU(2)$ group. By relying on very generic scaling arguments, we derive an asymptotic expression for it.

</details>


### [303] [Re-entrant percolation in active Brownian hard disks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.04141)
*David Evans,José Martín-Roca,Nathan J. Harmer,Chantal Valeriani,Mark A. Miller*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 通过模拟二维自推进布朗粒子，研究了活性物质中的非平衡成簇和逾渗行为，发现弱活性促进团簇形成和逾渗，但更强活性部分逆转此效应，导致逾渗阈值非单调变化，源于活性诱导有效吸引与活性驱动团簇破碎的竞争。利用迭代玻尔兹曼反演方法将弱活性系统映射到被动模型，发现二者径向分布函数相同但高阶结构存在差异，逾渗阈值对高阶结构敏感。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究活性物质在尚未发生运动诱导相分离(MIPS)的预分离区域中，非平衡成簇和逾渗行为的特征与机制，特别是活性如何影响逾渗阈值以及能否用平衡模型描述该非平衡系统。

Method: 采用二维自推进布朗排斥粒子的动态模拟，研究活性物质模型；利用迭代玻尔兹曼反演方法(IBI)推导有效势，将弱活性系统映射到具有保守吸引的被动平衡模型，并用蒙特卡洛模拟表征被动系统。

Result: 弱活性促进团簇形成并降低逾渗阈值；更强活性部分逆转此效应，临界密度出现最小值，逾渗作为活性函数呈现重入行为。活性-被动系统径向分布函数一致，但高阶结构相关性存在决定性差异，逾渗阈值对此高度敏感。足够强活性下，无被动对势能再现活性系统的径向分布函数。

Conclusion: 活性诱导的有效吸引（最终导致MIPS）与活性驱动团簇破碎之间的竞争导致了逾渗行为的非单调性；仅匹配径向分布函数的被动等效势无法捕捉活性系统的高阶结构，而高阶结构对逾渗阈值至关重要。

Abstract: Non-equilibrium clustering and percolation are investigated in an archetypal model of two-dimensional active matter using dynamic simulations of self-propelled Brownian repulsive particles. We concentrate on the single-phase region up to moderate levels of activity, before motility-induced phase separation (MIPS) sets in. Weak activity promotes cluster formation and lowers the percolation threshold. However, driving the system further out of equilibrium partly reverses this effect, resulting in a minimum in the critical density for the formation of system-spanning clusters and introducing re-entrant percolation as a function of activity in the pre-MIPS regime. This non-monotonic behaviour arises from competition between activity-induced effective attraction (which eventually leads to MIPS) and activity-driven cluster breakup. Using an adapted iterative Boltzmann inversion method, we derive effective potentials to map weakly active cases onto a passive (equilibrium) model with conservative attraction, which can be characterised by Monte Carlo simulations. While the active and passive systems have practically identical radial distribution functions, we find decisive differences in higher-order structural correlations, to which the percolation threshold is highly sensitive. For sufficiently strong activity, no passive pairwise potential can reproduce the radial distribution function of the active system.

</details>


### [304] [Improved Actions using The Renormalization Group](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.06414)
*Guy Segall,Snir Gazit,Daniel Podolsky*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结合张量重正化群与蒙特卡洛模拟的数值方法，通过在经典和量子相变附近提取改进作用量，从而利用小体系尺寸高效研究临界性质，并以三维XY模型进行了验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统蒙特卡洛模拟在研究相变临界性质时通常需要大体系尺寸才能获得精确结果，计算成本高昂。本文旨在开发一种更高效的方法，能够在相对较小的系统上准确提取临界性质，以降低计算资源消耗并扩展可研究的相变类型范围。

Method: 方法将张量重正化群（TRG）的思想应用于蒙特卡洛模拟：首先利用TRG对原始作用量进行粗粒化处理，得到改进后的有效作用量；随后在该改进作用量下对相对较小的晶格尺寸进行蒙特卡洛模拟，从而提取临界指数等普适性质。

Result: 在三维XY模型上进行了方法验证，成功在小体系上获得了关键的临界性质，证实了该方法的有效性和准确性。

Conclusion: 该方法为高效研究各类相变中的普适性质提供了一个可行的框架，有望推广到更多经典与量子相变问题中，降低对计算资源的需求。

Abstract: We introduce a numerical method to study critical properties near classical and quantum phase transitions. Our method applies ideas of the Tensor Renormalization Group to obtain an improved action which is used to extract critical properties by performing Monte Carlo simulations on relatively small system sizes. We demonstrate this method on the XY model in three dimensions. Our method may provide a framework with which to efficiently study universal properties in a large class of phase transitions.

</details>


### [305] [Inertial effects in discrete sampling information engines](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.06672)
*Aubin Archambault,Caroline Crauste-Thibierge,Sergio Ciliberto,Ludovic Bellon*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 本文实验研究了一种欠阻尼机械振荡器作为信息引擎，通过反馈协议测量粒子位置并控制势阱中心，分析了惯性效应、采样频率等参数对引擎输出功率的影响，并与过阻尼系统的理论预测和数值模拟进行了比较。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究惯性效应对信息引擎性能的影响，寻找最优参数以最大化功率输出，并验证信息理论对引擎做功的约束边界。

Method: 使用欠阻尼机械振荡器作为信息引擎，通过反馈协议以特定采样频率测量粒子位置并调节谐波势阱中心，系统等效于惯性布朗粒子。实验测量不同反馈协议和参数下的引擎输出功率，并与过阻尼系统的理论预测和数值模拟进行对比。

Result: 确定了最优参数；惯性效应可用于增加引擎提取的功率；在大采样间隔τ的 regime 下，产生的功受到信息理论给出的紧束缚边界的限制。

Conclusion: 惯性效应在信息引擎中可以提升功率输出，且在大τ条件下做功受到信息理论的严格约束。

Abstract: We describe an experiment on an underdamped mechanical oscillator used as an information engine. The system is equivalent to an inertial Brownian particle confined in a harmonic potential whose center is controlled by a feedback protocol which measures the particle position at a specific sampling frequency $1/τ$. Several feedback protocols are applied and the power generated by the engine is measured as a function of the oscillator parameters and the sampling frequency. The optimal parameters are then determined. The results are compared to the theoretical predictions and numerical simulations on overdamped systems. We highlight the specific effects of inertia, which can be used to increase the amount of power extracted by the engine. In the regime of large $τ$, we show that the produced work has a tight bound determined by information theories.

</details>


### [306] [Experimental realization of an analog of entanglement between two Brownian particles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.06708)
*Lakshmanan Theerthagiri,Sergio Ciliberto*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 本研究通过实验探究了由弹性力连接的两个布朗粒子在各自不同温度热库中的统计性质，发现坐标与粗粒化速度之间的不确定关系可以产生类似量子纠缠的现象，其中温度扮演普朗克常数的角色。理论分析与实验结果吻合，确认了这种布朗运动启发的经典关联纠缠，该效应源于布朗运动的粗粒化描述，并在更精细的分辨率下消失。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索经典系统中是否存在类似量子纠缠的统计现象，通过布朗运动体系研究粗粒化描述下的不确定关系能否产生类量子纠缠效应。

Method: 采用两个由弹性力连接的布朗粒子，分别置于不同温度的独立热库中，通过实验测量坐标与粗粒化速度的统计性质，并结合理论分析进行验证。

Result: 实验发现坐标与粗粒化速度之间的不确定关系可产生类似量子纠缠的现象，温度在其中起到类似普朗克常数的作用；这种经典关联纠缠源于布朗运动的粗粒化描述，在更精细分辨率下消失，并测量了粗粒化尺度范围。

Conclusion: 证实了经典布朗运动系统中存在量子启发的经典关联纠缠，理论分析与实验高度吻合，为理解经典与量子纠缠之间的联系提供了新的视角。

Abstract: We experimentally investigate the statistical properties of a classical analog of quantum entanglement considering two Brownian particles connected by an elastic force and maintained at different temperatures through separate heat reservoirs. Uncertainty relations between coordinates and coarse-grained velocity can produce a phenomenon similar to quantum entanglement, where temperature plays the role of Planck's constant. The theoretical analysis matches the experimental results, confirming that the interconnected particles exhibit Brownian quantum-inspired classical correlation entanglement. This effect arises from a coarse-grained description of Brownian motion and vanishes at a finer resolution. The coarsening scales range is measured too.

</details>


### [307] [Simulations of Mpemba Effect in WATER, Lennard-Jones and Ising Models: Metastability vs Critical Fluctuations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.06954)
*Soumik Ghosh,Purnendu Pathak,Sohini Chatterjee,Subir K. Das*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 通过分子动力学模拟，在TIP4P/Ice水模型和Lennard-Jones模型中均发现了Mpemba效应（热水比冷水更快结冰/结晶），并揭示了两种体系中该效应的不同机制：LJ模型中由临界涨落主导，而TIP4P/Ice模型中则由成核延迟（亚稳态）驱动。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究水结冰过程中的Mpemba效应（热水比冷水更快结冰的反直觉现象），探究其在不同体系（TIP4P/Ice水模型和Lennard-Jones模型）中的存在性及物理机制。

Method: 采用TIP4P/Ice水模型和Lennard-Jones模型进行分子动力学模拟，将不同初始温度（处于流体相）的平衡构型淬火至固定零下温度，分析结晶动力学过程，并对比冷却速率的影响。

Result: 两种模型均观察到Mpemba效应：初始温度越高的样品结晶越快。在LJ模型中，该效应源于临界涨落对非平衡生长过程的影响，并呈现标度行为；在TIP4P/Ice模型中，亚稳态导致的成核延迟是主要驱动因素。该效应与冷却速率无关。

Conclusion: Mpemba效应可在不同体系中以不同机制产生，其存在具有普适性，且不依赖于冷却速率的变化。

Abstract: Via molecular dynamics simulations we study ICE formation in the TIP4P/Ice model that is known to describe structure and dynamics in various phases of WATER accurately. For this purpose well equilibrated configurations from different initial temperatures, Ts, belonging to the fluid phase, are quenched to a fixed subzero temperature. Our results on kinetics, for a wide range of Ts, following such quenches, show quicker crystallization of samples that are hotter at the beginning. This implies the presence of the puzzling Mpemba effect (ME). Via a similar study, we also identify ME in fluid to solid transitions in a Lennard-Jones (LJ) model. In the latter case, the ME appears purely as an outcome of the influence of critical fluctuations on the nonequilibrium growth process, for which we present interesting scaling results. For the TIP4P/Ice case, on the other hand, we show that delay in nucleation, due to metastability, can alone be a driving factor for the exhibition of ME. To substantiate the difference between the two cases, we also present LJ-like scaling results for ME in a magnetic transition. Our simulations indicate that in each of the systems the effect can be observed independent of the cooling rate that may vary when samples from different Ts are brought in contact with a heat reservoir working at a fixed lower temperature.

</details>


### [308] [Dimensional crossover via confinement in the lattice Lorentz gas](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.04289)
*A. Squarcini,A. Tinti,P. Illien,O. Bénichou,T. Franosch*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 本文研究了一个示踪粒子在随机分布固定障碍物存在的晶格模型，通过将晶格卷成圆柱体引入准约束。计算了速度自相关函数，发现系统在平衡态下随时间从二维向一维维度交叉。在施加拉力后，解析表征了稳态速度和扩散系数，并通过随机模拟验证了解析结果的适用范围。计算对障碍物密度一阶精确，适用于任意大的力和约束尺寸。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究障碍物引起的拥挤效应与圆柱几何准约束之间的相互作用，理解维度交叉现象及其对粒子输运性质的影响。

Method: 采用晶格模型，解析计算速度自相关函数和稳态输运系数（一阶障碍物密度展开），并结合随机模拟验证。

Result: 平衡态下系统随时间从二维到一维的维度交叉；解析得到了稳态速度和扩散系数，模拟确认了解析结果的有效范围。

Conclusion: 该模型在一阶障碍物密度近似下，对任意大的拉力和约束尺寸均成立，揭示了约束与障碍物共同作用下的维度交叉动力学。

Abstract: We consider a lattice model in which a tracer particle moves in the presence of randomly distributed immobile obstacles. The crowding effect due to the obstacles interplays with the quasi-confinement imposed by wrapping the lattice onto a cylinder. We compute the velocity autocorrelation function and show that already in equilibrium the system exhibits a dimensional crossover from two- to one-dimensional as time progresses. A pulling force is switched on and we characterize analytically the stationary state in terms of the stationary velocity and diffusion coefficient. Stochastic simulations are used to discuss the range of validity of the analytic results. Our calculation, exact to first order in the obstacle density, holds for arbitrarily large forces and confinement size.

</details>


### [309] [Shortcuts to adiabaticity across a separatrix](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.06916)
*Roi Holtzman,Oren Raz,Christopher Jarzynski*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种扩展经典哈密顿捷径到绝热（STA）的方法，使其能够穿越相空间分界线（即不存在对应绝热协议的情况），并利用该方法设计了一种擦除过程，其能量消耗和保真度与协议持续时间无关。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的绝热捷径在穿越相空间分界线时失效，因为此时不存在对应的绝热协议。作者希望突破这一限制，使得快速驱动下也能实现原本需要绝热过程才能完成的相空间结构改变。

Method: 通过构建一个显式的时间依赖哈密顿量，使得系统从一个能壳演化到另一个跨越分界线的能壳。该方法基于经典哈密顿系统的反控制技术，在非绝热驱动下设计哈密顿量路径。

Result: 成功设计了一种擦除协议。该协议的核心优势在于：无论执行速度多快（协议持续时间多短），其能量消耗和保真度都保持恒定，不依赖于时间尺度。

Conclusion: 这项工作首次将绝热捷径扩展到分界线穿越场景，并展示了其在信息擦除中的实际应用，为超快、能量最优的经典计算操作提供了理论依据。

Abstract: Shortcuts to adiabaticity are strategies for conserving adiabatic invariants under non-adiabatic (i.e. fast-driving) conditions. Here, we show how to extend classical, Hamiltonian shortcuts to adiabaticity to allow the crossing of a phase-space separatrix -- a situation in which a corresponding adiabatic protocol does not exist. Specifically, we show how to construct a time-dependent Hamiltonian that evolves one energy shell to another energy shell across a separatrix. Leveraging this method, we design an erasure procedure whose energy cost and fidelity do not depend on the protocol's duration.

</details>


### [310] [Approach to stationarity for the KPZ fixed point with boundaries](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.07012)
*Sylvain Prolhac*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 本文利用精确方法研究一维完全不对称排他过程（TASEP）连接到粒子库时的电流涨落及其在有限体积下趋于KPZ不动点的大尺度极限。聚焦TASEP的最大电流相（对应KPZ高度场的无穷边界斜率），得到了一般初始条件下稳态修正的精确表达式，涉及布朗路径极值统计。对于稳态和窄楔初始条件，结合Bethe ansatz与数值猜想给出了完全显式的精确表达式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究一维TASEP连接到粒子库时的电流涨落及其大尺度极限下KPZ不动点在有限体积中的行为，特别是最大电流相中的稳态修正问题。

Method: 采用精确方法，包括Bethe ansatz和数值猜想，结合布朗路径极值统计理论，推导一般初始条件下稳态修正的精确表达式。

Result: 得到了一般初始条件下TASEP在最大电流相中晚期时间趋于稳态的修正表达式，该表达式涉及布朗路径的极值统计；对稳态和窄楔初始条件得到了完全显式的精确表达式。

Conclusion: 成功利用精确方法刻画了TASEP在有限体积下趋于KPZ不动点过程中的电流涨落行为，为理解非平衡系统涨落现象提供了理论依据。

Abstract: Current fluctuations for the one-dimensional totally asymmetric exclusion process (TASEP) connected to reservoirs of particles, and their large scale limit to the KPZ fixed point in finite volume, are studied using exact methods. Focusing on the maximal current phase for TASEP, corresponding to infinite boundary slopes for the KPZ height field, we obtain for general initial condition an exact expression for the late time correction to stationarity, involving extreme value statistics of Brownian paths. In the special cases of stationary and narrow wedge initial conditions, a combination of Bethe ansatz and numerical conjectures alternatively provide fully explicit exact expressions.

</details>


### [311] [Time-dependent dynamics in the confined lattice Lorentz gas](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.04293)
*A. Squarcini,A. Tinti,P. Illien,O. Bénichou,T. Franosch*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 本文研究受限几何中牵引粒子通过随机障碍物介质的非平衡动力学，解析推导了一阶障碍物密度下的特征函数，发现平衡态存在维度交叉，非平衡态下驱动力和限制共同影响扩散系数，限制可改变非解析行为，并发现中间区域存在超扩散反常行为。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究受限几何中牵引粒子通过含随机障碍物的无序介质的非平衡动力学，特别是限制诱导效应对系统行为的影响。

Method: 采用格子模型，通过解析推导得到一阶障碍物密度下矩的特征函数的精确结果，结合随机模拟验证解析结果的正确性。

Result: 平衡态下系统表现出维度交叉；非平衡稳态中驱动和限制共同影响扩散系数；限制能定性改变无界模型中观察到的力的非解析行为；中间区域存在超扩散反常行为。

Conclusion: 限制几何对牵引粒子在无序介质中的非平衡动力学有显著影响，可改变力的非解析行为并引入超扩散反常，解析结果与随机模拟一致。

Abstract: We study a lattice model describing the non-equilibrium dynamics emerging from the pulling of a tracer particle through a disordered medium occupied by randomly placed obstacles. The model is considered in a restricted geometry pertinent for the investigation of confinement-induced effects. We analytically derive exact results for the characteristic function of the moments valid to first order in the obstacle density. By calculating the velocity autocorrelation function and its long-time tail we find that already in equilibrium the system exhibits a dimensional crossover. This picture is further confirmed by the approach of the drift velocity to its terminal value attained in the non-equilibrium stationary state. At large times the diffusion coefficient is affected by both the driving and confinement in a way that we quantify analytically. The force-induced diffusion coefficient depends sensitively on the presence of confinement. The latter is able to modify qualitatively the non-analytic behavior in the force observed for the unbounded model. We then examine the fluctuations of the tracer particle along the driving force. We show that in the intermediate regime superdiffusive anomalous behavior persists even in the presence of confinement. Stochastic simulations are employed in order to test the validity of the analytic results, exact to first order in the obstacle density and valid for arbitrary force and confinement.

</details>


### [312] [Vacancy diffusion and the hydrodynamics of crystals](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.07399)
*Joel Mabillard,Pierre Gaspard*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 本文基于局部平衡热力学，建立了含空位晶体的流体动力学理论，提出了空位化学势的关键作用，并推导了包含空位电导率和热扩散系数的输运系数格林-久保公式。通过线性化宏观方程得到八个流体动力学模式的色散关系，并通过硬球晶体数值模拟验证了第八个模式即为空位扩散模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统流体动力学理论通常假设晶体是完美的，但实际晶体中普遍存在空位缺陷。现有理论无法准确描述含空位晶体的动力学行为，特别是空位输运与质量、能量输运之间的耦合关系。本文旨在建立含空位晶体的完整流体动力学理论框架。

Method: 采用局部平衡热力学方法，引入空位化学势作为关键变量，建立空位浓度与质量密度、应变张量之间的约束关系。从微观基础推导格林-久布和爱因斯坦-赫尔范德公式计算输运系数。通过线性化宏观方程推导色散关系，并利用硬球晶体分子动力学模拟验证理论预测。

Result: 建立了空位电导率与费克扩散系数之间的关系；推导出非完美单原子晶体的八个流体动力学模式，其中第八个模式被明确识别为空位扩散模式；硬球晶体数值模拟结果与理论预测一致，验证了理论框架的正确性。

Conclusion: 空位化学势的引入是描述含空位晶体流体动力学的关键，所建立的理论框架能够统一描述空位扩散与质量、能量输运过程，数值模拟结果有力支持了理论的预测。

Abstract: The hydrodynamics of crystals with vacancies is developed on the basis of local-equilibrium thermodynamics, where the chemical potential of vacancies plays a key role together with a constraint relating the concentration of vacancies to the density of mass and the strain tensor. The microscopic foundations are established, leading to Green-Kubo and Einstein-Helfand formulas for the transport coefficients, including the vacancy conductivities and the coefficients of vacancy thermodiffusion. As a consequence of having introduced the chemical potential of vacancies, a relationship is obtained between the conductivities and the Fickian diffusion coefficients for the vacancies. The macroscopic equations are linearized around equilibrium to deduce the dispersion relations of the eight hydrodynamic modes. The theoretical predictions are confirmed by numerical simulations of the hard-sphere crystal with vacancies. The study explicitly shows that the eighth hydrodynamic mode of nonperfect monatomic crystals is indeed a mode of vacancy diffusion.

</details>


### [313] [Acoustic waves in a halfspace material filled with random particulate](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.07032)
*Paulo S. Piva,Kevish K. Napal,Art L. Gower*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 本文解决了利用声波测量致密颗粒材料时的一个关键障碍：如何将反射/透射系数与有效波速和衰减联系起来，特别是在背景介质不同的情况下。作者通过系统扩展准晶近似（QCA）方法，针对半空间随机颗粒介质（背景与外部介质不同）这一简单情形，给出了解析方案，并通过数值结果验证了反射系数在广泛频率和颗粒特性范围内的可计算性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 颗粒材料（粉末、乳液、复合材料等）在工业和科学应用中广泛存在，需要原位、非破坏性地测量致密颗粒。声学方法理论上可行，但面临一个核心障碍：难以将容易测量的反射/透射系数与有效波速和衰减建立关联，尤其是当背景介质不同时。

Method: 系统扩展准晶近似（QCA）这一广泛使用的闭合近似方法，推导出半空间随机颗粒介质（背景与外部介质不同）的解析表达式，从而建立反射系数与有效波速、衰减之间的联系。

Result: 数值结果表明，该方法能够在广泛的频率和颗粒特性范围内轻松计算反射系数。

Conclusion: 解决了不同背景介质下声学测量颗粒材料的关键理论障碍，为工业原位、非破坏性颗粒测量提供了可行的声学方法基础。

Abstract: Particulate materials include powders, emulsions, composites, and many others. This is why measuring these has become important for both industry and scientific applications. For industrial applications, the greatest need is to measure dense particulates, in-situ, and non-destructively. In theory, this could be achieved with acoustics: the standard method is to send an acoustic wave through the particulate and then attempt to measure the effective wave speed and attenuation. A major obstacle here is that it is not clear how to relate the effective wave speed and attenuation to the reflection and transmission coefficients, which are far easier to measure. This is because it has been very difficult to mathematically account for different background mediums. In this paper we resolve this obstacle. We present how to account for different background mediums for a simple case, to help comprehension: a halfspace filled with a random particulate, where the background of the halfspace is different to the exterior medium. The key to solving this problem was to derive a systematic extension of a widely used closure approximation: the quasi-crystalline approximation (QCA). We present some numerical results to demonstrate that the reflection coefficient can be easily calculated for a broad range of frequencies and particle properties.

</details>


### [314] [Quantum percolation on Lieb Lattices](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.04610)
*W. S. Oliveira,J. Pimentel de Lima,Raimundo R. dos Santos*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 本文从理论上研究了二维和三维Lieb晶格上的量子渗流问题。通过随机矩阵理论分析了能级统计，并结合有限尺寸标度理论精确估算了位点和键渗流阈值及临界指数。研究发现存在有限阈值下的局域-退局域转变，阈值随平均配位数增加而降低。渗流长度指数ν随维度d减小，与经典渗流类似。在三维情况下，Lieb晶格上的量子渗流与安德森杂质模型属于同一普适类。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索Lieb晶格上量子渗流问题的局域-退局域转变特性，确定精确的渗流阈值和临界指数，并厘清其与经典渗流及安德森杂质模型的普适类关系。

Method: 采用随机矩阵理论分析能级间距分布，结合有限尺寸标度理论，对二维和三维Lieb晶格分别进行位点和键渗流的数值模拟与标度分析。

Result: 获得了精确的渗流阈值和临界指数；发现局域-退局域转变存在有限阈值且随配位数增加而降低；量子位点和键渗流属于同一普适类；三维下与安德森杂质模型同属一个普适类。

Conclusion: Lieb晶格上的量子渗流问题在有限阈值下发生局域-退局域转变，其普适类行为与经典渗流类似（ν随维度d递减），且在三维中与安德森杂质模型一致。

Abstract: We theoretically investigate the quantum percolation problem on Lieb lattices in two and three dimensions. We study the statistics of the energy levels through random matrix theory, and determine the level spacing distributions, which, with the aid of finite-size scaling theory, allows us to obtain accurate estimates for site- and bond percolation thresholds and critical exponents. Our numerical investigation supports a localized-delocalized transition at finite threshold, which decreases as the average coordination number increases. The precise determination of the localization length exponent enables us to claim that quantum site- and bond-percolation problems on Lieb lattices belong to the same universality class, with $ν$ decreasing with lattice dimensionality, $d$, similarly to the classical percolation problem. In addition, we verify that, in three dimensions, quantum percolation on Lieb lattices belongs to the same universality class as the Anderson impurity model.

</details>


### [315] [Truncation error in series expansions linking microcanonical and canonical ensembles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.07520)
*Atsushi Iwaki*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 本文证明了微正则热纯量子（mTPQ）方法中泰勒展开截断误差随系统大小呈指数衰减的条件（有效温度低于目标温度时），否则误差恒定；并给出了权衡误差与数值成本的参数设置准则。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 微正则热纯量子（mTPQ）方法通过泰勒级数展开推导正则系综，但其截断误差的行为尚未被严格分析，缺乏参数设置的指导原则。

Method: 理论证明截断误差在mTPQ态有效温度低于目标温度时随系统大小指数衰减，反之误差恒定；通过权衡误差与数值成本建立参数设置准则。

Result: 当mTPQ态有效温度低于目标温度时，截断误差随系统大小指数衰减；否则误差保持不变。给出了参数设置的权衡准则。

Conclusion: 明确了mTPQ方法中截断误差的标度行为，并提供了实用的参数选择策略，兼顾了计算精度与效率。

Abstract: In the microcanonical thermal pure quantum (mTPQ) method, the canonical ensemble is derived using Taylor series expansions. We prove that the truncation error decreases exponentially with system size when the effective temperature of the mTPQ state is smaller than the target temperature, and otherwise, the error remains constant. We also show the discipline to set the mTPQ parameter by considering the trade-off between the error and the numerical cost.

</details>


### [316] [Investigating dynamics and asymptotic trend to equilibrium in a reactive BGK model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.07129)
*Giorgio Martalò,Ana Jacinta Soares,Romina Travaglini*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 本文通过数值模拟研究了一种用于单原子气体多组分混合物的BGK型模型，该模型描述了可逆双分子化学反应，并验证了辅助温度相等假设对H-Boltzmann泛函单调性的必要性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 构建一个既满足热力学一致性（正确熵产生）又能分别描述机械过程与化学反应效应的BGK型弛豫模型，并验证模型在远离平衡态条件下的动力学行为。

Method: 采用数值模拟方法，假设各向同性分布，对宏观场进行仿真，通过调整初始温度条件测试模型在热化和化学平衡过程中的表现，并考察H-Boltzmann泛函的单调性。

Result: 辅助温度相等假设对确保经典H-Boltzmann泛函单调性是必要的；当初始温度远离平衡时，弛豫到平衡发生在后期阶段，且初始瞬态期间H-Boltzmann泛函不单调。

Conclusion: 该BGK模型在描述多组分化学反应混合物时具有一致性，验证了辅助温度相等假设的合理性，并揭示了远离平衡态时弛豫过程的非线性特征。

Abstract: We investigate numerically a recent BGK-type model for a multi-component mixture of monatomic gases, undergoing a reversible bimolecular chemical reaction. The model replaces each collisional term of the Boltzmann equation with a relaxation term, thereby describing separately the effects of the mechanical processes and the chemical reaction. Additionally, the model exhibits consistency properties. The correct entropy production is ensured when auxiliary temperatures in the chemical contributions share a common value. We assume isotropic distributions and perform numerical simulations for the macroscopic fields to appraise how the dynamics push the mixture toward thermalization and chemical equilibrium. We show that the hypothesis on the equalization of fictitious species temperatures is justifiable to ensure the monotonicity of the classical $H$-Boltzmann functional. Simulations show that, when initial temperatures are far from equilibrium, the relaxation towards equilibrium occurs at a later stage and the classical $H$-Boltzmann functional is not monotone during the initial transient.

</details>


### [317] [Stripe and Bubble Ratchets on Asymmetric Substrates](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.04646)
*C. Reichhardt,C. J. O. Reichhardt*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 本研究揭示了在交流驱动下，介观相图案形成系统（如各向异性晶体、条纹和气泡相）与一维非对称基底耦合时会产生多种非单调棘轮效应。棘轮效率和运动方向取决于介观相形态与基底周期性和形状的匹配程度。与基底对齐的条纹态表现出最强的棘轮效应，大气泡效应较弱，小气泡则显示出随交流驱动振幅振荡的强棘轮效应。研究绘制了不同整流相图，这些效应可用于硬/软物质系统中的图案分选。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索介观相图案形成系统（包括各向异性晶体、条纹和气泡相）在交流驱动下与非对称基底耦合时产生的非单调棘轮效应，并理解图案形态与棘轮性能之间的关系。

Method: 通过数值模拟方法，将介观相图案形成系统（表现出各向异性晶体、条纹和气泡相）耦合到一维非对称基底上，施加交流驱动，系统研究不同形态（条纹、大小气泡等）下的棘轮效率和运动方向随驱动振幅的变化。

Result: 发现棘轮效应强烈依赖于介观相形态与基底的匹配程度：与基底对齐的条纹态棘轮效应最强；大气泡棘轮效应弱；小气泡表现出随交流驱动振幅振荡的强棘轮效应。绘制了基于图案形态、基底强度和驱动振幅的整流相图。

Conclusion: 介观相图案形成系统中的棘轮效应具有丰富的非单调行为，可用于硬/软物质系统中的图案分选应用。

Abstract: We show that a variety of non-monotonic ratchet effects can arise when mesophase pattern-forming systems, which exhibit anisotropic crystal, stripe, and bubble reigmes, are coupled to one-dimensional asymmetric substrates under ac driving. The ratchet efficiency and direction of motion are determined by how well the mesophase morphology matches the periodicity and shape of the substrate. Stripe states that are aligned with the substrate show the strongest ratchet effect, large bubbles show a weak ratchet effect, and small bubbles show a strong ratchet effect with an efficiency that oscillates as a function of ac drive amplitude. We map out the different rectification phases as a function of the pattern morphology, substrate strength, and ac drive amplitude. The pronounced ratchet effects that we observe in some regimes can be exploited for pattern sorting in hard and soft matter systems.

</details>


### [318] [Critical dimension for hydrodynamic turbulence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.07573)
*Mahendra K. Verma*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 该论文通过递归重整化群方法（在Craya-Herring基下）研究了 hydrodynamic 湍流的非平衡与平衡行为，发现空间维度d=6是湍流的临界维度：当d<6时非平衡解（k^{-5/3}能谱）成立，d>6时仅有零粘度的平衡解（k^{d-1}能谱）；同时发现能量通量在d≈2.15处由正变负，并计算了不同维度下的能量通量和Kolmogorov常数，结果与已有数值模拟吻合良好。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 经典湍流理论中，非平衡湍流（含粘性）呈现k^{-5/3}谱，而平衡湍流（零粘度）呈现k^{d-1}谱。但两种行为在不同空间维度下的适用条件和临界维度尚不明确，本文旨在通过递归重整化群方法系统研究维度对湍流行为的影响。

Method: 采用递归重整化群方法，在Craya-Herring基下对Navier-Stokes方程进行尺度变换和重整化分析，导出不同空间维度d下的能谱标度律和能量通量表达式。

Result: (1) d=6为临界维度：d<6时非平衡解(k^{-5/3})成立，d>6时仅零粘度平衡解(k^{d-1})成立；(2) 能量通量在d≈2.15处由正(正向级串)变为负(逆级串)；(3) 计算了不同d下的能量通量和Kolmogorov常数，与已有数值结果一致。

Conclusion: 确立了d=6作为 hydrodynamic 湍流临界维度的地位，揭示了维度对湍流能量级串方向（正向/逆向）的调控作用，为理解高维和低维湍流行为提供了理论框架。

Abstract: Hydrodynamic turbulence exhibits nonequilibrium behaviour with $k^{-5/3}$ energy spectrum, and equilibrium behaviour with $k^{d-1}$ energy spectrum and zero viscosity, where $d$ is the space dimension. Using recursive renormalization group {in Craya-Herring basis}, we show that the nonequilibrium solution is valid only for $d < 6$, whereas equilibrium solution with zero viscosity is the only solution for $d>6$. Thus, $d=6$ is the critical dimension for hydrodynamic turbulence. In addition, we show that the energy flux changes sign from positive to negative near $d=2.15$. We also compute the energy flux and Kolmogorov's constants for various $d$'s, and observe that our results are in good agreement with past numerical results.

</details>


### [319] [Evidence for simple "arrow of time functions" in closed chaotic quantum systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.08007)
*Merlin Füllgraf,Jiaozi Wang,Jochen Gemmer*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 本文通过显式构造，为任意无限温度自相关函数 $C(t)$ 赋予一组函数 $\alpha^n(t)$。这些函数（几乎）单调递减时被称为"时间箭头函数"（AOTF）。对于少体可观测量，当系统处于或接近混沌区域时，可找到低阶AOTF。所有 $\alpha^n(t)$ 给出了自相关函数的上界，即 $\alpha^n(t) \geq C^2(t)$，其含义类似于H定理，指示了趋向平衡的方向性。数值发现可追溯至算符增长假说，并在递归方法框架下进行了论证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为量子混沌系统构建类似H定理的"时间箭头"指示量，通过构造单调递减函数来刻画系统趋向平衡的方向性，并探索与算符增长假说的联系。

Method: 通过显式构造从自相关函数 $C(t)$ 导出 $\alpha^n(t)$，需要用到 $C(t)$ 在 $t=0$ 和 $t$ 时刻的前 $2n$ 阶时间导数。采用递归方法框架，结合算符增长假说进行分析，并通过数值实验验证少体可观测量的行为。

Result: 发现当系统处于混沌区域时，总能找到低阶的时间箭头函数(AOTF)；在非混沌或接近非混沌区域时则不存在。所有 $\alpha^n(t)$ 满足 $\alpha^n(t) \geq C^2(t)$，表明自相关函数被其单调递减的上界所约束。数值发现可部分归因于算符增长假说。

Conclusion: 本文构造的AOTF提供了类似于H定理的平衡趋近方向性指示，建立了算符增长与热化行为之间的桥梁，为理解量子混沌系统的不可逆性提供了新的分析工具。

Abstract: Through an explicit construction, we assign to any infinite temperature autocorrelation function $C(t)$ a set of functions $α^n(t)$. The construction of $α^n(t)$ from $C(t)$ requires the first $2n$ temporal derivatives of $C(t)$ at times $0$ and $t$. Our focus is on $α^n(t)$ that (almost) monotonously decrease, we call these ``arrows of time functions" (AOTFs). For autocorrelation functions of few body observables we numerically observe the following: An AOTF featuring a low $n$ may always be found unless the the system is in or close to a nonchaotic regime with respect to a variation of some system parameter. All $α^n(t)$ put upper bounds to the respective autocorrelation functions, i.e. $α^n(t) \geq C^2(t)$. Thus the implication of the existence of an AOTF is comparable to that of the H-Theorem, as it indicates a directed approach to equilibrium. We furthermore argue that our numerical finding may to some extent be traced back to the operator growth hypothesis. This argument is laid out in the framework of the so-called recursion method.

</details>


### [320] [Hamilton's equations for relaxation function](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.07619)
*Pierre Nazé*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于哈密顿方程的新方法，用于确定热隔离系统的弛豫函数，通过将微观弛豫函数转化为正则变量并选择适当的初始条件，避免了初始正则系综平均的计算，并以四次振子为例验证了该方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 弛豫函数是弱驱动过程中计算的基石，但其计算困难仍是亟待解决的问题。已有研究确立了弛豫函数应满足的性质，但如何高效计算该函数仍是挑战。

Method: 基于哈密顿方程方法，将微观弛豫函数转化为正则变量，通过选择哈密顿方程解的初始条件，避免计算初始正则系综的平均值，从而简化弛豫函数的确定过程。

Result: 以四次振子这一典型难题为例，成功验证了所提方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 该方法为热隔离系统的弛豫函数计算提供了新途径，未来需将其扩展到量子领域和随机热力学中。

Abstract: The relaxation function is the cornerstone to perform calculations in weakly driven processes. Properties that such a function should obey are already established, but the difficulty in its calculation is still an issue to be overcome. In this work, I proposed a new method to determine such a function for thermally isolated systems, based on a Hamilton's equations approach. Observing that the microscopic relaxation function can be turned into a canonical variable, one can choose the initial conditions of the solutions of Hamilton's equations to avoid the calculation of the average in the initial canonical ensemble. The unbearable example of the quartic oscillator is solved to corroborate the method. Extensions to the quantum realm and stochastic thermodynamics are mandatory.

</details>


### [321] [Shortcuts to adiabaticity in open quantum critical systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.06387)
*Shishira Mahunta,Victor Mukherjee*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 本文研究了耗散量子临界系统中通过反绝热驱动实现绝热捷径（STAs）的方法，发现非平衡态熵变会导致多体相互作用项，且临界点附近耗散控制强度呈现普适标度，热流和功率耗散表现出临界行为。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索开放量子临界系统中实现绝热捷径的可能性，特别是在耗散存在的情况下如何通过反绝热驱动控制系统的密度矩阵沿目标轨迹演化。

Method: 利用反绝热驱动（counterdiabatic driving）方法，同时引入幺正和非幺正控制项，使系统密度矩阵始终跟随参考哈密顿量的瞬时本征态；以横场伊辛模型为例进行理论分析，研究低能态耗散控制项的标度行为。

Result: 耗散控制项强度在临界点附近呈现普适标度；与封闭系统不同，开放系统中即使远离临界点也可能需要多体相互作用项；热流在临界点附近出现极值，功率耗散改变曲率；精确反绝热哈密顿量的实现无操作成本。

Conclusion: 该反绝热协议对理解多体开放量子系统中的绝热捷径具有基础重要性，可应用于量子计算和多体量子热机等开放多体量子系统。

Abstract: We study shortcuts to adiabaticity (STAs) through counterdiabatic driving in quantum critical systems in the presence of dissipation. We evaluate unitary as well as nonunitary controls, such that the system density matrix follows a prescribed trajectory corresponding to the eigenstates of a time-dependent reference Hamiltonian at any instant of time. The strength of the dissipator control term for the low-energy states shows universal scaling close to criticality. Using the example of free-fermionic systems, in particular, the transverse-field Ising model, we show that in contrast to STAs in closed quantum critical systems, here, STAs may require multibody interactions terms, even away from criticality, owing to the change in entropy of the time-dependent target state. Further, the associated heat current shows an extremum, while power dissipation changes curvature, close to criticality, and analogous to unitary control, no operational cost is associated with implementation of the exact counterdiabatic Hamiltonian. We believe the counterdiabatic protocol studied here could be of fundamental importance for understanding STAs in many-body open quantum systems and could be highly relevant for varied topics involving open many-body quantum systems, such as quantum computation and many-body quantum heat engines.

</details>


### [322] [Link rewiring with local information--induced hybrid percolation transitions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.08572)
*Young Sul Cho*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 本文研究网络上的混合相变现象：当节点利用局部信息（有限数量有限簇的尺寸信息）持续进行有限次数的链路重连来限制大簇增长时，可以在贝特格点及其分支上观察到一种混合相变，具有非平凡临界指数，且该现象在无层次结构的贝特格点上同样存在。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统上利用局部信息限制大簇增长会导致连续但陡峭的相变，本文探索是否可以通过有限次数的链路重连产生混合相变（兼具连续与不连续特征），以丰富对网络相变类型的理解。

Method: 在配位数为4的贝特格点分支上，每个节点反复将其出链重连给后代节点，并按照簇大小升序进行有限次数的重连，达到稳态后分析链路分数作为控制参数下的相变行为。

Result: 在贝特格点分支上发现了具有非平凡临界指数的混合相变，并且在无层次结构的贝特格点上也观察到相同现象。

Conclusion: 这种混合相变可能在具有有限度的多样化树状网络中普遍存在，为利用局部信息调控网络结构提供了新的相变机制。

Abstract: When a link is occupied to restrict the growth of large clusters using the size information of a finite number of finite clusters, so-called local information, an abrupt but continuous transition is exhibited. We report here that a hybrid transition can occur if each node rewires its links to restrict the growth of large clusters using local information continuously up to a finite number of rewirings. For example, on a branch of a Bethe lattice with coordination number $4$, each node rewires its outgoing links to its descendants several times in ascending order of cluster size to reach a steady state. Then a hybrid transition with nontrivial critical exponents occurs as a function of the link fraction at the steady state. We observe this phenomenon even on a Bethe lattice without hierarchy, supporting that such a phenomenon may occur on diverse tree networks with finite degrees.

</details>


### [323] [Nonlinear Langevin functionals for a driven probe](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.07628)
*Juliana Caspers,Matthias Krüger*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 本文利用路径积分形式的非线性响应理论，推导了强驱动下探针粒子所受随机力的Volterra级数展开，其中各阶核函数由平衡关联函数表示。通过分析非线性布朗粒子模型，发现剪切稀化等非线性现象出现在三阶响应，振荡噪声协方差出现在二阶响应。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在强驱动条件下，探针粒子与非线性流体的相互作用力呈现非平衡统计特性，传统的线性响应理论不再适用。作者旨在建立一种系统的非线性响应框架，以描述强驱动下随机力各阶累积量（均值、噪声、非高斯涨落）与驱动协议之间的泛函关系。

Method: 采用路径积分形式的非线性响应理论，构建Volterra级数展开随机力的各阶累积量。各阶核函数通过连接平衡关联函数表达。方法涵盖两种典型场景：预设轨迹驱动的粒子和移动陷阱中的受限粒子。

Result: 在非线性布朗粒子模型的模拟中，剪切稀化（剪切变稀）现象出现在三阶响应中，而振荡噪声协方差出现在二阶响应中。这表明不同阶次的非线性响应对应不同的物理现象。

Conclusion: 本文建立的Volterra级数框架能够系统地描述强驱动下非线性流体中探针的随机力统计特性，将非线性现象与响应阶次对应起来，为理解非平衡态下的力涨落提供了理论工具。

Abstract: When a probe particle immersed in a fluid with nonlinear interactions is subject to strong driving, the cumulants of the stochastic force acting on the probe are nonlinear functionals of the driving protocol. We present a Volterra series for these nonlinear functionals, by applying nonlinear response theory in a path integral formalism, where the emerging kernels are shown to be expressed in terms of connected equilibrium correlation functions. The first cumulant is the mean force, the second cumulant characterizes the non-equilibrium force fluctuations (noise), and higher order cumulants quantify non-Gaussian fluctuations. We discuss the interpretation of this formalism in relation to Langevin dynamics. We highlight two example scenarios of this formalism: i) For a particle driven with prescribed trajectory, the formalism yields the non-equilibrium statistics of the interaction force with the fluid. ii) For a particle confined in a moving trapping potential, the formalism yields the non-equilibrium statistics of the trapping force. In simulations of a model of nonlinearly interacting Brownian particles, we find that nonlinear phenomena, such as shear-thinning and oscillating noise covariance, appear in third or second order response, respectively.

</details>


### [324] [Continuous Dimer Angles on the Silicon Surface: Critical Properties and the Kibble-Zurek Mechanism](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.06412)
*Andreas Weitzel,Gernot Schaller,Friedemann Queisser,Ralf Schützhold*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 本文利用Langevin动力学模拟，结合GPU高性能并行计算，分析了Si(001)表面二聚体XY模型的静态与动态性质，确定了临界指数ν=1.04、z=2.13，属于Ising普适类，并发现淬火指数显著大于Kibble-Zurek理论预测值，且对阻尼和对称破缺场不敏感。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究Si(001)表面二聚体形成的XY模型的静态和动态临界性质，并通过时间依赖温度下的畴冻结行为检验Kibble-Zurek理论的适用性。

Method: 采用Langevin动力学模拟，利用GPU进行高性能并行计算，分析对称破缺XY模型的静态临界指数ν和动态临界指数z，并研究时间依赖温度下的畴尺寸分布。

Result: 静态指数ν=1.04，动态指数z=2.13，属于Ising普适类；淬火指数显著大于Kibble-Zurek理论预测，且对阻尼和对称破缺场变化不敏感。

Conclusion: 该XY模型在对称破缺下表现出Ising普适类行为；Kibble-Zurek理论在描述该系统的畴尺寸分布时存在偏差，淬火指数偏离理论预期。

Abstract: Langevin dynamics simulations are used to analyze the static and dynamic properties of an {XY} model adapted to dimers forming on Si(001) surfaces. The numerics utilise high-performance parallel computation methods on GPUs. The static exponent $ν$ of the symmetry-broken XY model is determined to $ν= 1.04$. The dynamic critical exponent $z$ is determined to $z = 2.13$ and, together with $ν$, shows the behavior of the Ising universality class. For time-dependent temperatures, we observe frozen domains and compare their size distribution with predictions from Kibble-Zurek theory. We determine a significantly larger quench exponent that shows little dependence on the damping or the symmetry-breaking field.

</details>


### [325] [Explosive percolation on the Bethe lattice is ordinary](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.08579)
*Young Sul Cho*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 本文报道在Bethe格点上，由于有限尺寸效应（表面位点数量与系统大小成比例），Achlioptas过程失效，导致爆炸性渗流（EP）的序参量临界指数与普通键渗流相同，从而出现一种新型EP。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 已知爆炸性渗流（EP）伴随异常小的序参量临界指数，本文旨在探究Bethe格点上是否因有限尺寸效应而出现序参量临界指数与普通渗流相同的EP类型。

Method: 在有限Bethe格点上进行数值分析，考虑表面位点沿其支路所属簇的近似大小，从而在模拟中近似大量簇的尺寸，并测量序参量及其他临界指数。

Result: 在Bethe格点上，Achlioptas过程失效，序参量在阈值处的行为与普通渗流相同，且序参量临界指数与普通键渗流一致。

Conclusion: Bethe格点上的有限尺寸效应（表面位点数量具广延性）导致Achlioptas过程无法有效抑制大簇聚集，从而产生一种序参量临界指数与普通渗流相同的新型爆炸性渗流。

Abstract: The Achlioptas process, which suppresses the aggregation of large-sized clusters, can exhibit an explosive percolation (EP) where the order parameter emerges abruptly yet continuously in the thermodynamic limit. It is known that EP is accompanied by an abnormally small critical exponent of the order parameter. In this paper, we report that a novel type of EP occurs on a Bethe lattice, where the critical exponent of the order parameter is the same as in ordinary bond percolation based on numerical analysis. This is likely due to the property of a finite Bethe lattice that the number of sites on the surface with only one neighbor is extensive to the system size. To overcome this finite size effect, we consider an approximate size of the cluster that each site on the surface along its branch belongs to, and accordingly approximate the sizes of an extensive number of clusters during simulation. As a result, the Achlioptas process becomes ineffective and the order parameter behaves like that of ordinary percolation at the threshold. We support this result by measuring other critical exponents as well.

</details>


### [326] [Tailoring the first law of thermodynamics for convective flows](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.08649)
*Karol Makuch*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 本文探讨了非平衡系统（如Rayleigh-Bénard对流）在状态转变过程中的全局能量交换，发现其能量交换公式与平衡热力学具有相同形式，为使用类似平衡热力学的简单定律描述非平衡系统开辟了可能性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 受平衡热力学简洁描述能力的启发，希望为远离平衡的系统建立类似的、直观的热力学描述框架。

Method: 研究存在热流和外力场（重力场）并展现宏观运动的系统（Rayleigh-Bénard对流），分析其在非平衡状态转变过程中的全局能量交换。

Result: 发现非平衡状态转变中系统能量交换的公式与平衡热力学具有相同形式。

Conclusion: 这一发现为使用少数简单定律（类似平衡热力学）描述非平衡系统提供了可能性。

Abstract: Equilibrium thermodynamics is grounded in the law of energy conservation, with a specific focus on how systems exchange energy with their environment during transitions between equilibrium states. These transitions are typically characterized by quantities such as heat absorption and the work needed to alter the system's volume. This study is inspired by the potential to develop an analogous, straightforward thermodynamic description for systems that are out of equilibrium. Here, we explore the global energy exchanges that occur during transitions between these nonequilibrium states. We study a system with heat flow and an external (gravity) field that exhibits macroscopic motion, such as Rayleigh-Bénard convection. We show that the formula for system's energy exchange has the same form as in equilibrium. It opens the possibility of describing out-of-equilibrium systems using a few simple laws similar to equilibrium thermodynamics.

</details>


### [327] [Thermalization is typical in large classical and quantum harmonic systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.06489)
*Marco Cattaneo,Marco Baldovin,Dario Lucente,Paolo Muratore-Ginanneschi,Angelo Vulpiani*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 本文建立了谐波系统中动力学热化分析准则，证明了在随机二次哈密顿量中，对于大系统且初始条件取自微正则分布时，粒子能量等可观测量会典型地热化；即使只有有限比例的正规模被激发，热化也可能发生。而能量局域在单个粒子时会导致能量均分但非热化。该研究为无需混沌和遍历性的热化提供了动力学基础，并连接了经典与量子热化理论。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究谐波系统中热化的动力学机制，特别是无需混沌和遍历性即可实现热化的条件，以及连接经典与量子热化理论。

Method: 通过解析分析建立热化判据，考虑随机二次哈密顿量，基于微正则分布和非典型初始条件（有限比例正规模激发、单粒子能量局域）进行理论研究。

Result: 1）大系统下，微正则初始条件可典型地实现热化；2）非典型初始条件（有限比例正规模激发）也可导致热化；3）单粒子能量局域化初始条件只导致能量均分而非热化。

Conclusion: 可积谐波系统无需混沌和遍历性即可实现热化，关键在于热力学可观测量依赖于大量正规模，这为经典与量子热化理论建立了桥梁。

Abstract: We establish an analytical criterion for dynamical thermalization within harmonic systems, applicable to both classical and quantum models. Specifically, we prove that thermalization of various observables, such as particle energies in physically relevant random quadratic Hamiltonians, is typical for large systems ($N \gg 1$) with initial conditions drawn from the microcanonical distribution. Moreover, we show that thermalization can also arise from non-typical initial conditions, where only a finite fraction of the normal modes is excited. A different choice of initial conditions, such as all the initial energy localized in a single particle, instead leads to energy equipartition without thermalization. Since the models we consider are integrable, our findings provide a general dynamical basis for an approach to thermalization that bypasses chaos and ergodicity, focusing instead on the physical requirement that thermodynamic observables depend on a large number of normal modes, and build a bridge between the classical and quantum theories of thermalization.

</details>


### [328] [Extensive Composable Entropy for the Analysis of Cosmological Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.08820)
*Constantino Tsallis,Henrik Jeldtoft Jensen*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 本文基于群论基础，提出了一种同时满足热力学广延性和逻辑一致性可组合性的熵泛函 $S_{\alpha,\gamma}=k \left[ \frac{\ln \sum_i p_i^\alpha}{1-\alpha} \right]^{1/\gamma}$，并发现 $(\alpha,\gamma)=(1,2/3)$ 参数组合与中微子、大爆炸核合成、冷暗物质丰度及宇宙学观测数据高度吻合。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准Bekenstein-Hawking熵 $S_{BH}\propto A/l_P^2$ 虽在黑洞和宇宙学中扮演重要角色，但其违背三维热力学广延性；同时，其面积依赖关系暗示需考虑 $W(N)\sim \mu^{N^\gamma}$ 形式的微观状态数增长，这超出了标准Boltzmann-Gibbs统计力学 ($\gamma=1$) 的范畴。因此需要构造一种既广延又可组合的新熵函数。

Method: 从群论出发，基于 $W(N)\sim \mu^{N^\gamma}$ 的渐近行为，推广标准Rényi熵和Tsallis熵，构造双参数 $(\alpha,\gamma)$ 熵泛函 $S_{\alpha,\gamma}=k \left[ \frac{\ln \sum_i p_i^\alpha}{1-\alpha} \right]^{1/\gamma}$，其中 $S_{1,1}=S_{BG}$。该泛函对所有 $(\alpha,\gamma)$ 均满足广延性和可组合性。

Result: 1) 构建的 $S_{\alpha,\gamma}$ 同时满足热力学要求的广延性和逻辑一致性要求的可组合性。2) 特定参数 $(\alpha,\gamma)=(1,2/3)$ 与多项宇宙学观测数据一致，包括中微子数据、大爆炸核合成、冷暗物质粒子遗迹丰度以及动力学和几何学宇宙学数据集。

Conclusion: 提出的双参数熵泛函为处理非广延系统（如黑洞和宇宙学）提供了统一的理论框架；$(\alpha,\gamma)=(1,2/3)$ 与当前宇宙学观测的吻合表明该形式可能描述宇宙的微观统计性质。

Abstract: Along recent decades, an intensive worldwide research activity is focusing both black holes and cosmos (e.g. the dark-energy phenomenon) on the basis of entropic approaches. The Boltzmann-Gibbs-based Bekenstein-Hawking entropy $S_{BH}\propto A/l_P^2$ ($A \equiv$ area; $l_P \equiv$ Planck length) systematically plays a crucial theoretical role although it has a serious drawback, namely that it violates the thermodynamic extensivity of spatially-three-dimensional systems. Still, its intriguing area dependence points out the relevance of considering the form $W(N)\sim μ^{N^γ}\;\;(μ>1;γ>0)$, $W$ and $N$ respectively being the total number of microscopic possibilities and the number of components; $γ=1$ corresponds to standard Boltzmann-Gibbs (BG) statistical mechanics. For this $W(N)$ asymptotic behavior, we introduce here, on a group-theory basis, the entropic functional $S_{α,γ}=k \Bigl[ \frac{\ln Σ_{i=1}^W p_i^α}{1-α} \Bigr]^{\frac{1}γ} \;(α\in \mathbb{R};\,S_{1,1}=S_{BG}\equiv-k\sum_{i=1}^W p_i \ln p_i)$. This functional simultaneously is {\it extensive} (as required by thermodynamics) and {\it composable} (as required for logic consistency), $\forall (α,γ)$. We further show that $(α,γ)=(1,2/3)$ satisfactorily agrees with cosmological data measuring neutrinos, Big Bang nucleosynthesis and the relic abundance of cold dark matter particles, as well as dynamical and geometrical cosmological data sets.

</details>


### [329] [Typicality, entropy and the generalization of statistical mechanics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.06537)
*Bernat Corominas-Murtra,Rudolf Hanel,Petr Jizba*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 本文探讨了典型性（typicality）概念在平衡态热力学中的核心作用，展示了其如何通过测度集中现象简化系统统计描述，并将其推广至更一般的复杂系统。通过"热化硬币"玩具模型说明典型性如何自然导出香农熵，并揭示了用Renyi熵和Tsallis熵刻画典型集可分别导出自由能和配分函数。最后提出了将典型性推广至不满足标准微观假设的系统的方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究平衡态热力学中典型性概念及测度集中现象能否推广至更一般的复杂系统，以及在此推广下广义热力学应具有何种数学结构。

Method: 通过"热化硬币"玩具模型阐释典型性概念及香农熵的自然导出；利用Renyi熵和Tsallis熵对典型集进行刻画，分别建立与自由能和配分函数的显式联系；提出将典型性推广至非标准微观假设系统的潜在方式。

Result: 典型性概念可自然导出香农熵；Renyi熵和Tsallis熵对典型集的刻画分别对应于自由能和配分函数，并揭示了二者之间的显式关系。

Conclusion: 典型性概念有望从平衡态热力学推广至更一般的复杂系统，为建立广义热力学提供数学基础。

Abstract: When at equilibrium, large-scale systems obey conventional thermodynamics because they belong to microscopic configurations (or states) that are typical. Crucially, the typical states usually represent only a small fraction of the total number of possible states, and yet the characterization of the set of typical states -- the typical set -- alone is sufficient to describe the macroscopic behavior of a given system. Consequently, the concept of typicality, and the associated Asymptotic Equipartition Property allow for a drastic reduction of the degrees of freedom needed for system's statistical description. The mathematical rationale for such a simplification in the description is due to the phenomenon of concentration of measure. The later emerges for equilibrium configurations thanks to very strict constraints on the underlying dynamics, such as weekly interacting and (almost) independent system constituents. The question naturally arises as to whether the concentration of measure and related typicality considerations can be extended and applied to more general complex systems, and if so, what mathematical structure can be expected in the ensuing generalized thermodynamics. In this paper we illustrate the relevance of the concept of typicality in the toy model context of the "thermalized" coin and show how this leads naturally to Shannon entropy. We also show an intriguing connection: The characterization of typical sets in terms of Renyi and Tsallis entropies naturally leads to the free energy and partition function, respectively, and makes their relationship explicit. Finally, we propose potential ways to generalize the concept of typicality to systems where the standard microscopic assumptions do not hold.

</details>


### [330] [Sine-Gordon model at finite temperature: the method of random surfaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.08828)
*M. Tóth,J. H. Pixley,D. Szász-Schagrin,G. Takács,M. Kormos*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 本文通过推广随机表面方法，非微扰地计算了sine-Gordon量子场论在有限温度下的自由能和指数算符的单点函数，并在有能隙相中与其他方法及精确结果进行了对比验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的解析方法在处理sine-Gordon模型有限温度下的非微扰性质时存在局限，需要一种能够准确描述强关联一维量子系统热力学性质的新方法。

Method: 将随机表面方法从零温推广到有限温度情形，用于非微扰计算sine-Gordon量子场论的自由能和指数算符单点函数。

Result: 在温度不低于质量间隙的情况下，随机表面方法的计算结果与其他方法及热力学极限下的精确结果高度吻合。

Conclusion: 随机表面方法在有限温度sine-Gordon模型中表现优异，并可推广至更一般的强关联一维量子系统问题。

Abstract: We study the sine-Gordon quantum field theory at finite temperature by generalizing the method of random surfaces to compute the free energy and one-point functions of exponential operators non-perturbatively. Focusing on the gapped phase of the sine-Gordon model, we demonstrate the method's accuracy by comparing our results to the predictions of other methods and to exact results in the thermodynamic limit. We find excellent agreement between the method of random surfaces and other approaches when the temperature is not too small with respect to the mass gap. Extending the method to more general problems in strongly interacting one-dimensional quantum systems is discussed.

</details>


<div id='cs.LG'></div>

# cs.LG [[Back]](#toc)

### [331] [Adaptive Transit Signal Priority based on Deep Reinforcement Learning and Connected Vehicles in a Traffic Microsimulation Environment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00098)
*Dickness Kwesiga,Angshuman Guin,Michael Hunter*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本研究提出了一种基于无模型强化学习的事件驱动型公交信号优先（TSP）控制算法，在微观仿真环境中利用网联车数据，当公交车辆进入DSRC通信区域时接管RL通用信号控制器。结果显示该TSP智能体可减少约21%的公交行程时间，且在高饱和度（0.95）下对普通交通影响很小，表现略优于传统感应控制+ TSP方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统基于数学规划的公交信号优先算法需要复杂非线性目标函数，而无模型强化学习提供了一种更简洁的替代方案，因此研究旨在将RL扩展到公交信号优先控制领域。

Method: 采用微观仿真环境与网联车数据，开发了一个事件驱动的TSP-RL智能体，该智能体在公交车进入交叉口DSRC通信区域时从已有RL通用信号控制器接管控制权，并针对仿真运行效率进行了架构优化。

Result: TSP智能体将公交行程时间减少约21%，在0.95饱和度下对普通交通影响极小；相比传统感应控制+ TSP方案，公交行程时间略有改善。

Conclusion: 无模型强化学习能够有效实现公交信号优先控制，在显著提升公交运行效率的同时对普通交通影响较小，且性能略优于传统TSP方法。

Abstract: Model free reinforcement learning (RL) provides a potential alternative to earlier formulations of adaptive transit signal priority (TSP) algorithms based on mathematical programming that require complex and nonlinear objective functions. This study extends RL - based traffic control to include TSP. Using a microscopic simulation environment and connected vehicle data, the study develops and tests a TSP event-based RL agent that assumes control from another developed RL - based general traffic signal controller. The TSP agent assumes control when transit buses enter the dedicated short-range communication (DSRC) zone of the intersection. This agent is shown to reduce the bus travel time by about 21%, with marginal impacts to general traffic at a saturation rate of 0.95. The TSP agent also shows slightly better bus travel time compared to actuated signal control with TSP. The architecture of the agent and simulation is selected considering the need to improve simulation run time efficiency.

</details>


### [332] [Curriculum Learning with Quality-Driven Data Selection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00102)
*Biao Wu,Ling Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种基于图像-文本相关性和模型困惑度的二维数据质量评估方法，用于多模态大语言模型的指令数据筛选，通过课程学习构建多阶段子集，在五个评估能力上显著超越完整数据集效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MLLM数据选择方法存在两个主要问题：(1) 依赖单一不可靠的评分指标；(2) 使用下游任务进行选择耗时长且易导致对评估数据集的过拟合。因此需要一种更高效、更可靠的数据质量筛选方法。

Method: 提出基于图像-文本相关性（image-text correlation）和模型困惑度（perplexity）的二维数据质量评估空间。利用这两个指标的不同分布特性，将数据质量映射到二维空间中，根据数据在此分布中的位置进行筛选。同时利用该空间分析任务类型提示对数据质量的影响，并构建多阶段子集以支持课程学习（curriculum learning）。

Result: 在多个数据集上的综合实验表明，所提出的数据选择方法在五个常用评估能力上相比使用完整数据集取得了显著提升。

Conclusion: 通过图像-文本相关性和模型困惑度的二维联合评估，能够有效控制MLLM指令数据质量，避免单一指标不可靠和下游任务过拟合问题，课程学习策略进一步提升了模型性能。

Abstract: The impressive multimodal capabilities demonstrated by OpenAI's GPT-4 have generated significant interest in the development of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs). Visual instruction tuning of MLLMs with machine-generated instruction-following data has shown to enhance zero-shot capabilities across various tasks. However, there has been limited exploration into controlling the quality of the instruction data.Current methodologies for data selection in MLLMs often rely on single, unreliable scores or use downstream tasks for selection, which is time-consuming and can lead to potential overfitting on the chosen evaluation datasets. To mitigate these limitations, we propose a novel data selection methodology that utilizes image-text correlation and model perplexity to evaluate and select data of varying quality. This approach leverages the distinct distribution of these two attributes, mapping data quality into a two-dimensional space that allows for the selection of data based on their location within this distribution. By utilizing this space, we can analyze the impact of task type settings, used as prompts, on data quality. Additionally, this space can be used to construct multi-stage subsets of varying quality to facilitate curriculum learning. Our research includes comprehensive experiments conducted on various datasets. The results emphasize substantial enhancements in five commonly assessed capabilities compared to using the complete dataset. Our codes, data, and models are publicly available at: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/EHIT-31B4

</details>


### [333] [3-in-1: 2D Rotary Adaptation for Efficient Finetuning, Efficient Batching and Composability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00119)
*Baohao Liao,Christof Monz*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出RoAd方法，通过简单的2D旋转适配LLM，在不到0.1%可训练参数下达到最优性能，支持批量请求中不同适配器的高效服务（开销接近逐元素乘法而非批量矩阵乘法），并通过分布式互换干预框架增强模型可解释性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有PEFT方法虽节省参数，但面临多适配器批量部署效率低和模型可解释性不足两大挑战，亟需一种同时解决参数效率、批量服务效率和可解释性的统一方法。

Method: 提出RoAd方法，采用简单的2D旋转变换对LLM进行适配，通过旋转操作替代传统低秩矩阵分解，实现参数高效微调。

Result: 在GLUE、8个常识推理和4个算术推理任务上，以<0.1%可训练参数达到最优性能；批量请求处理开销从批量矩阵乘法降至逐元素乘法水平；通过组合实验展示了在分布式互换干预框架下的可解释性提升。

Conclusion: RoAd以极简的2D旋转操作同时解决了PEFT领域的参数效率、多适配器批量部署效率和模型可解释性三个关键问题，为LLM高效适配提供了新范式。

Abstract: Parameter-efficient finetuning (PEFT) methods effectively adapt large language models (LLMs) to diverse downstream tasks, reducing storage and GPU memory demands. Despite these advantages, several applications pose new challenges to PEFT beyond mere parameter efficiency. One notable challenge involves the efficient deployment of LLMs equipped with multiple task- or user-specific adapters, particularly when different adapters are needed for distinct requests within the same batch. Another challenge is the interpretability of LLMs, which is crucial for understanding how LLMs function. Previous studies introduced various approaches to address different challenges. In this paper, we introduce a novel method, RoAd, which employs a straightforward 2D rotation to adapt LLMs and addresses all the above challenges: (1) RoAd is remarkably parameter-efficient, delivering optimal performance on GLUE, eight commonsense reasoning tasks and four arithmetic reasoning tasks with $<0.1\%$ trainable parameters; (2) RoAd facilitates the efficient serving of requests requiring different adapters within a batch, with an overhead comparable to element-wise multiplication instead of batch matrix multiplication; (3) RoAd enhances LLM's interpretability through integration within a framework of distributed interchange intervention, demonstrated via composition experiments.

</details>


### [334] [Measuring Progress in Dictionary Learning for Language Model Interpretability with Board Game Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00113)
*Adam Karvonen,Benjamin Wright,Can Rager,Rico Angell,Jannik Brinkmann,Logan Smith,Claudio Mayrink Verdun,David Bau,Samuel Marks*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出在象棋和奥赛罗游戏转录训练的语言模型中，利用游戏状态的可解释特征（如“F3位置有马”）作为监督信号，评估稀疏自编码器（SAE）的解码质量，并引入p-annealing训练技术提升SAE在无监督和有监督指标上的表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有SAE评估缺乏真实可解释特征的ground-truth，难以衡量SAE是否真正恢复出有意义的潜在特征。

Method: 利用象棋和奥赛罗游戏中天然存在的可解释特征（如棋子位置）作为监督指标，提出p-annealing训练技术改进SAE。

Result: p-annealing在现有无监督指标和新提出的有监督指标上均取得更好表现。

Conclusion: 游戏转录场景能提供可解释特征的ground-truth，为字典学习提供可靠的评估基准，p-annealing是有效的SAE训练改进方法。

Abstract: What latent features are encoded in language model (LM) representations? Recent work on training sparse autoencoders (SAEs) to disentangle interpretable features in LM representations has shown significant promise. However, evaluating the quality of these SAEs is difficult because we lack a ground-truth collection of interpretable features that we expect good SAEs to recover. We thus propose to measure progress in interpretable dictionary learning by working in the setting of LMs trained on chess and Othello transcripts. These settings carry natural collections of interpretable features -- for example, "there is a knight on F3" -- which we leverage into $\textit{supervised}$ metrics for SAE quality. To guide progress in interpretable dictionary learning, we introduce a new SAE training technique, $\textit{p-annealing}$, which improves performance on prior unsupervised metrics as well as our new metrics.

</details>


### [335] [MultiTask Learning AI system to assist BCC diagnosis with dual explanation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00104)
*Iván Matas,Carmen Serrano,Francisca Silva,Amalia Serrano,Tomás Toledo-Pastrana,Begoña Acha*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于MobileNet-V2的多任务学习AI系统，用于从皮肤镜图像中检测基底细胞癌（BCC），并整合了皮肤科医生的诊断标准（七种BCC模式）。系统使用EM共识算法构建统一标准，并借助Grad-CAM提供可视化解释，在BCC分类上达到90%准确率，且99%的阳性病例中正确检测到临床相关模式，95%的非BCC病例满足色素网络排除标准。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 西班牙公立医院远程皮肤病学协议的采用增加了皮肤科医生的工作量，而现有AI系统透明度不足，阻碍了临床接受度。因此需要开发一个既能准确检测BCC又能提供透明解释的AI工具，以辅助病变优先级排序。
