Method: 收集60个初级保健中心的1559张皮肤镜图像，由四名皮肤科医生对七种BCC模式进行标注；采用期望最大化（EM）共识算法构建统一标准参考；基于MobileNet-V2开发多任务学习模型，同时进行病变分类和临床相关模式识别；使用Grad-CAM生成可视化解释。

Result: BCC分类准确率90%（精确率0.90，召回率0.89）；99%的阳性病例中正确检测到临床相关BCC模式；95%的非BCC病例满足色素网络排除标准；Grad-CAM热图与皮肤科医生定义的区域在空间上具有强一致性。

Conclusion: 该系统将准确的BCC检测与基于模式的透明解释相结合，有助于弥合AI性能与临床信任之间的差距，在远程皮肤病学中具有应用价值。

Abstract: Basal cell carcinoma (BCC) accounts for about 75% of skin cancers. The adoption of teledermatology protocols in Spanish public hospitals has increased dermatologists' workload, motivating the development of AI tools for lesion prioritization. However, limited transparency in current systems hinders clinical acceptance. This study proposes an AI system for BCC detection from dermoscopic images that integrates dermatologist diagnostic criteria based on specific dermoscopic patterns.
  We analyzed 1559 dermoscopic images from 60 primary care centers annotated by four dermatologists for seven BCC patterns. An Expectation-Maximization consensus algorithm was used to build a unified standard reference. A multitask learning model based on MobileNet-V2 was developed to classify lesions and identify clinically relevant patterns, supported by Grad-CAM visual explanations.
  The system achieved 90% accuracy in BCC classification (precision 0.90, recall 0.89). Clinically relevant BCC patterns were correctly detected in 99% of positive cases, and the pigment network exclusion criterion was satisfied in 95% of non-BCC cases. Grad-CAM maps showed strong spatial agreement with dermatologist-defined regions.
  The proposed system combines accurate BCC detection with transparent pattern-based explanations, helping bridge the gap between AI performance and clinical trust in teledermatology.

</details>


### [336] [A Hybrid Framework for Spatial Interpolation: Merging Data-driven with Domain Knowledge](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00125)
*Cong Zhang,Shuyi Du,Hongqing Song,Yuhe Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种混合框架，将数据驱动的空间依赖特征提取与规则辅助的空间依赖函数映射相结合，以增强领域知识，在空间信息估计中实现更优的局部特征捕获、非线性估计能力和不确定性量化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统空间插值方法忽略了领域知识在理解空间依赖关系中的关键作用，且特征通常局限于空间坐标，缺乏对领域知识的有效融合。

Method: 提出数据驱动空间依赖特征提取与规则辅助空间依赖函数映射相结合的混合框架，利用转换模糊规则增强非线性估计能力。

Result: 在两个对比应用场景中表现出更优性能，能够捕获更局部的空间特征，提升了非线性估计能力，并实现了观测数据固有不确定性的量化。

Conclusion: 该框架通过协同结合观测数据与规则辅助的领域知识，为空间信息估计提供了一种创新方法。

Abstract: Estimating spatially distributed information through the interpolation of scattered observation datasets often overlooks the critical role of domain knowledge in understanding spatial dependencies. Additionally, the features of these data sets are typically limited to the spatial coordinates of the scattered observation locations. In this paper, we propose a hybrid framework that integrates data-driven spatial dependency feature extraction with rule-assisted spatial dependency function mapping to augment domain knowledge. We demonstrate the superior performance of our framework in two comparative application scenarios, highlighting its ability to capture more localized spatial features in the reconstructed distribution fields. Furthermore, we underscore its potential to enhance nonlinear estimation capabilities through the application of transformed fuzzy rules and to quantify the inherent uncertainties associated with the observation data sets. Our framework introduces an innovative approach to spatial information estimation by synergistically combining observational data with rule-assisted domain knowledge.

</details>


### [337] [Generative Learning of the Solution of Parametric Partial Differential Equations Using Guided Diffusion Models and Virtual Observations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00157)
*Han Gao,Sebastian Kaltenbach,Petros Koumoutsakos*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于梯度引导和虚拟观测的生成式学习框架，用于建模高维参数化系统（如偏微分方程离散化的物理系统），能够高效生成高保真时间序列，并在不可压缩圆柱绕流和湍流槽道流两个案例中验证了其准确性和计算效率优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统数值求解参数化偏微分方程系统计算成本高昂，特别是在高维网格和不同参数设置下进行预测和重建时缺乏高效且鲁棒的方法，因此需要一种能够显著降低计算开销同时保持高精度的生成式建模框架。

Method: 构建一个生成式学习框架，核心包括梯度引导（gradient guidance）和虚拟观测（virtual observations）机制，能够融合多层级信息；适用于结构化与非结构化网格离散的PDE系统，生成系统动力学的高保真时间序列。

Result: 在基于非结构化网格的不可压缩低雷诺数圆柱绕流和基于结构化网格的不可压缩湍流槽道流两个案例中，以雷诺数为参数，实验表明框架具有鲁棒性，能够在不同参数设置下生成准确的流场序列，并显著降低计算成本。

Conclusion: 该生成式框架能够高效且准确地进行高维参数化系统的流场预测和重建，在计算效率上有显著优势，适用于多种网格类型和复杂物理系统。

Abstract: We introduce a generative learning framework to model high-dimensional parametric systems using gradient guidance and virtual observations. We consider systems described by Partial Differential Equations (PDEs) discretized with structured or unstructured grids. The framework integrates multi-level information to generate high fidelity time sequences of the system dynamics. We demonstrate the effectiveness and versatility of our framework with two case studies in incompressible, two dimensional, low Reynolds cylinder flow on an unstructured mesh and incompressible turbulent channel flow on a structured mesh, both parameterized by the Reynolds number. Our results illustrate the framework's robustness and ability to generate accurate flow sequences across various parameter settings, significantly reducing computational costs allowing for efficient forecasting and reconstruction of flow dynamics.

</details>


### [338] [Multiple Kronecker RLS fusion-based link propagation for drug-side effect prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00105)
*Yuqing Qian,Ziyu Zheng,Prayag Tiwari,Yijie Ding,Quan Zou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为MKronRLSF-LP的多视图方法，通过扩展Kron-RLS算法，结合共识分区和多图拉普拉斯约束，用于药物-副作用链接预测，实验证明该方法有效且鲁棒。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 药物副作用预测是药理学的重要研究领域，随着药物使用量增加，理解和减轻潜在风险变得越发重要。现有方法需要处理来自多种视角的数据，因此需要一种能够融合多视图信息的高质量预测方法。

Method: 提出MKronRLSF-LP方法，扩展了Kron-RLS算法，通过在多视图设置中寻找共识分区并施加多个图拉普拉斯约束来实现多视图融合，从而进行链接传播预测。

Result: 在药物-副作用数据集上进行了大量实验，实验结果表明该方法有效且鲁棒。

Conclusion: 多视图设置中的共识分区和多图拉普拉斯约束共同提升了预测质量，MKronRLSF-LP是一种有效的药物副作用预测方法。

Abstract: Drug-side effect prediction has become an essential area of research in the field of pharmacology. As the use of medications continues to rise, so does the importance of understanding and mitigating the potential risks associated with them. At present, researchers have turned to data-driven methods to predict drug-side effects. Drug-side effect prediction is a link prediction problem, and the related data can be described from various perspectives. To process these kinds of data, a multi-view method, called Multiple Kronecker RLS fusion-based link propagation (MKronRLSF-LP), is proposed. MKronRLSF-LP extends the Kron-RLS by finding the consensus partitions and multiple graph Laplacian constraints in the multi-view setting. Both of these multi-view settings contribute to a higher quality result. Extensive experiments have been conducted on drug-side effect datasets, and our empirical results provide evidence that our approach is effective and robust.

</details>


### [339] [Latent-EnSF: A Latent Ensemble Score Filter for High-Dimensional Data Assimilation with Sparse Observation Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00127)
*Phillip Si,Peng Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Latent-EnSF方法，通过耦合变分自编码器将高维状态和稀疏观测映射到一致的潜空间，结合集成得分滤波器进行非线性贝叶斯滤波，在浅水波传播和中期天气预报任务中相比传统方法展现出更高精度、更快收敛和更高效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统数据同化方法（如EnKF、EnSF）在处理高维状态和稀疏观测的非线性贝叶斯滤波问题时面临严峻挑战，而这类问题在真实世界应用中普遍存在，亟需一种能同时应对状态高维性和观测高稀疏性的新方法。

Method: 提出Latent-EnSF方法，核心是耦合变分自编码器（VAE），包含两个编码器分别对全状态和稀疏观测进行编码，通过潜分布匹配与正则化以及一致的状态重构保证编码一致性，然后在一致的潜空间上应用EnSF进行贝叶斯滤波。

Result: 在浅水波传播和中期天气预报两个复杂应用中，Latent-EnSF相比多种对比方法，在时空高度稀疏观测条件下实现了更高的同化精度、更快的收敛速度和更高的计算效率。

Conclusion: Latent-EnSF通过潜空间降维与一致性编码策略，有效解决了高维状态与稀疏观测并存的非线性滤波难题，为复杂物理系统的数据同化提供了一种高效且精确的新范式。

Abstract: Accurate modeling and prediction of complex physical systems often rely on data assimilation techniques to correct errors inherent in model simulations. Traditional methods like the Ensemble Kalman Filter (EnKF) and its variants as well as the recently developed Ensemble Score Filters (EnSF) face significant challenges when dealing with high-dimensional and nonlinear Bayesian filtering problems with sparse observations, which are ubiquitous in real-world applications. In this paper, we propose a novel data assimilation method, Latent-EnSF, which leverages EnSF with efficient and consistent latent representations of the full states and sparse observations to address the joint challenges of high dimensionlity in states and high sparsity in observations for nonlinear Bayesian filtering. We introduce a coupled Variational Autoencoder (VAE) with two encoders to encode the full states and sparse observations in a consistent way guaranteed by a latent distribution matching and regularization as well as a consistent state reconstruction. With comparison to several methods, we demonstrate the higher accuracy, faster convergence, and higher efficiency of Latent-EnSF for two challenging applications with complex models in shallow water wave propagation and medium-range weather forecasting, for highly sparse observations in both space and time.

</details>


### [340] [UnUnlearning: Unlearning is not sufficient for content regulation in advanced generative AI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00106)
*Ilia Shumailov,Jamie Hayes,Eleni Triantafillou,Guillermo Ortiz-Jimenez,Nicolas Papernot,Matthew Jagielski,Itay Yona,Heidi Howard,Eugene Bagdasaryan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文揭示了在大型语言模型（LLM）中，即使经过精确遗忘（exact unlearning）处理的知识，仍可通过上下文学习（in-context learning）在推理阶段被重新引入，即"反遗忘"（ununlearning）现象。研究表明，遗忘机制无法有效阻止模型在推理时执行不许可行为，因此必须结合内容过滤等其他手段。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 重新审视遗忘机制在LLM中的有效性，指出现有遗忘范式存在根本性的不一致问题：遗忘可以控制训练阶段，但无法阻止模型在推理阶段通过上下文学习重新获取被遗忘的不许可知识。

Method: 提出"反遗忘"（ununlearning）概念，通过理论分析和可行性讨论，论证被遗忘知识如何通过上下文学习在推理阶段被重新引入模型，使模型表现出仿佛拥有被遗忘知识的行为能力。

Result: 证明即使采用精确遗忘方案，不许可知识仍可通过上下文学习在推理阶段被恢复，遗忘机制不足以实现有效的内容管控。

Conclusion: 仅靠遗忘机制无法保证LLM在推理阶段不执行不许可行为，必须辅以内容过滤等额外管控手段才能实现有效的内容监管。

Abstract: Exact unlearning was first introduced as a privacy mechanism that allowed a user to retract their data from machine learning models on request. Shortly after, inexact schemes were proposed to mitigate the impractical costs associated with exact unlearning. More recently unlearning is often discussed as an approach for removal of impermissible knowledge i.e. knowledge that the model should not possess such as unlicensed copyrighted, inaccurate, or malicious information. The promise is that if the model does not have a certain malicious capability, then it cannot be used for the associated malicious purpose. In this paper we revisit the paradigm in which unlearning is used for in Large Language Models (LLMs) and highlight an underlying inconsistency arising from in-context learning. Unlearning can be an effective control mechanism for the training phase, yet it does not prevent the model from performing an impermissible act during inference. We introduce a concept of ununlearning, where unlearned knowledge gets reintroduced in-context, effectively rendering the model capable of behaving as if it knows the forgotten knowledge. As a result, we argue that content filtering for impermissible knowledge will be required and even exact unlearning schemes are not enough for effective content regulation. We discuss feasibility of ununlearning for modern LLMs and examine broader implications.

</details>


### [341] [Statistical Analysis of the Impact of Quaternion Components in Convolutional Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00140)
*Gerardo Altamirano-Gómez,Carlos Gershenson*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文对四元数卷积神经网络（QCNN）中不同组件的选择（池化层、激活函数、全连接层等）进行了统计分析，并基于图像分类任务比较了现有组件的性能。此外，提出了一种利用四元数代数特性的新型全四元数ReLU激活函数以提升模型性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管已有多种QCNN模型被提出，但不同四元数域组件（池化层、激活函数、全连接层等）的选择及其交互作用对模型性能的影响尚不明确。理解这些选择的影响对于有效利用QCNN至关重要。

Method: 对实验数据进行统计分析，比较现有四元数域组件在图像分类问题上的性能。同时提出一种新型的Fully Quaternion ReLU激活函数，该函数利用四元数代数的独特性质来改善模型性能。

Result: 通过统计分析明确了不同组件选择对QCNN性能的影响，新提出的全四元数ReLU激活函数在图像分类任务上表现更优。

Conclusion: 组件选择的差异会显著影响QCNN模型的性能，所提出的全四元数ReLU激活函数能够更有效地利用四元数代数特性，为QCNN的设计提供了指导性结论。

Abstract: In recent years, several models using Quaternion-Valued Convolutional Neural Networks (QCNNs) for different problems have been proposed. Although the definition of the quaternion convolution layer is the same, there are different adaptations of other atomic components to the quaternion domain, e.g., pooling layers, activation functions, fully connected layers, etc. However, the effect of selecting a specific type of these components and the way in which their interactions affect the performance of the model still unclear. Understanding the impact of these choices on model performance is vital for effectively utilizing QCNNs. This paper presents a statistical analysis carried out on experimental data to compare the performance of existing components for the image classification problem. In addition, we introduce a novel Fully Quaternion ReLU activation function, which exploits the unique properties of quaternion algebra to improve model performance.

</details>


### [342] [UnPaSt: unsupervised patient stratification by biclustering of omics data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00200)
*Michael Hartung,Andreas Maier,Yuliya Burankova,Fernando Delgado-Chaves,Olga I. Isaeva,Alexey Savchik,Fábio Malta de Sá Patroni,Jens J. G. Lohmann,Daniel He,Casey Shannon,Jan-Ole Schulze,Katharina Kaufmann,Zoe Chervontseva,Farzaneh Firoozbakht,Anne Hartebrodt,Niklas Probul,Olga Tsoy,Alexandra Abisheva,Evgenia Zotova,Kavya Singh,Kristel Van Steen,Malte Kuehl,Victor G. Puelles,David B. Blumenthal,Martin Ester,Tanja Laske,Jan Baumbach,Olga Zolotareva*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 现有无监督患者分层方法主要针对癌症的互斥分子亚型设计，在处理非互斥亚型或仅有少数生物标志物区分的亚型时效率低下。为此，作者开发了UnPaSt——一种基于差异表达双聚类的无监督患者分层算法，在乳腺癌和哮喘亚型识别中优于传统方法，并在多种组学数据中检测到有生物学意义的模式，提供了更细粒度、可解释的数据异质性视图。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管非肿瘤疾病存在分子异质性，但现有无监督分层方法主要基于互斥分子亚型且由大量生物标志物良好区分的癌症数据集进行基准测试，导致在非互斥亚型或仅由少数生物标志物区分的亚型场景中效率低下，亟需更通用的分层方法以推动精准医学发展。

Method: 提出UnPaSt（Unsupervised Patient Stratification），一种基于差异表达双聚类（differentially expressed biclusters）的新型双聚类算法，用于无监督患者分层。在模拟数据和真实转录组数据上评估了22种无监督方法（包括聚类与双聚类方法）。

Result: UnPaSt在乳腺癌和哮喘已知亚型的从头识别中优于广泛使用的患者分层方法；在批量转录组、蛋白质组、单细胞、空间转录组及多组学数据中检测到许多具有生物学洞察力的模式，提供了比传统方法更细致、可解释的高通量数据异质性视图。

Conclusion: UnPaSt克服了现有方法在非互斥亚型和少标志物亚型场景下的局限性，是一种更通用、更具生物学可解释性的无监督患者分层工具，适用于多种组学数据类型，有助于推动非肿瘤疾病和复杂疾病的亚型发现。

Abstract: Unsupervised patient stratification is essential for disease subtype discovery, yet, despite growing evidence of molecular heterogeneity of non-oncological diseases, popular methods are benchmarked primarily using cancers with mutually exclusive molecular subtypes well-differentiated by numerous biomarkers. Evaluating 22 unsupervised methods, including clustering and biclustering, using simulated and real transcriptomics data revealed their inefficiency in scenarios with non-mutually exclusive subtypes or subtypes discriminated only by few biomarkers. To address these limitations and advance precision medicine, we developed UnPaSt, a novel biclustering algorithm for unsupervised patient stratification based on differentially expressed biclusters. UnPaSt outperformed widely used patient stratification approaches in the de novo identification of known subtypes of breast cancer and asthma. In addition, it detected many biologically insightful patterns across bulk transcriptomics, proteomics, single-cell, spatial transcriptomics, and multi-omics datasets, enabling a more nuanced and interpretable view of high-throughput data heterogeneity than traditionally used methods.

</details>


### [343] [WineGraph: A Graph Representation For Food-Wine Pairing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00107)
*Zuzanna Gawrysiak,Agata Żywot,Agnieszka Ławrynowicz*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: WineGraph 扩展了 FlavorGraph，通过整合葡萄酒数据和异构图技术，基于味觉描述符和侍酒师规则实现了食物与葡萄酒的配对。利用50万条食物评论和13万条葡萄酒评论数据，计算味觉描述符并增强图结构，实验证明异构图能有效获取补充信息以辅助葡萄酒配对。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有食物-葡萄酒配对方法主要依赖传统规则或简单特征匹配，缺乏利用大规模异构数据（如评论中的味觉描述）和异构图结构来捕获食物与葡萄酒之间复杂关系的能力。作者旨在通过扩展 FlavorGraph 并整合葡萄酒数据，构建一个能基于味觉和侍酒师规则进行智能配对的异构图系统。

Method: 提出 WineGraph，在 FlavorGraph 异构图基础上融入葡萄酒数据；利用50万条食物评论和13万条葡萄酒评论计算食物和葡萄酒的味觉描述符；基于味觉描述符和侍酒师规则进行食物与葡萄酒的配对，并将配对结果增强到 FlavorGraph 中。

Result: 成功构建了 WineGraph 异构图，实现了基于味觉和侍酒师规则的食物-葡萄酒配对；实验表明异构图能够有效获取额外信息，对葡萄酒配对任务具有积极效果。

Conclusion: 异构图（如 WineGraph）在食物-葡萄酒配对任务中展现出获取和整合补充信息的潜力，能够有效提升配对效果，为智能葡萄酒推荐和美食搭配提供了可行的技术路径。

Abstract: We present WineGraph, an extended version of FlavorGraph, a heterogeneous graph incorporating wine data into its structure. This integration enables food-wine pairing based on taste and sommelier-defined rules. Leveraging a food dataset comprising 500,000 reviews and a wine reviews dataset with over 130,000 entries, we computed taste descriptors for both food and wine. This information was then utilised to pair food items with wine and augment FlavorGraph with additional data. The results demonstrate the potential of heterogeneous graphs to acquire supplementary information, proving beneficial for wine pairing.

</details>


### [344] [Invariant Representation Guided Multimodal Sentiment Decoding with Sequential Variation Regularization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00143)
*Guoyang Xu,Zhenxi Song,Junqi Xue,Yuxin Liu,Zirui Wang,Zhiguo Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种鲁棒情感表示双增强策略，通过前向和后向传播中的目标机制同时增强时间和模态维度，以解决多模态情感分析中情感快速波动导致的不稳定性问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多模态情感分析中，情感随时间快速波动会引入不稳定性，导致预测性能下降，亟需一种能同时处理时间和模态维度不稳定性的鲁棒表示方法。

Method: 1) 模态维度：引入模态不变融合机制，捕获跨模态的共性和稳定表示；2) 时间维度：在后向传播中施加序列变化正则化项（本质上是退化为一维线性差异的全变分正则化），调控模型学习轨迹。

Result: 在三个标准公开数据集上的大量实验验证了该方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 所提出的双增强策略能有效提升多模态情感分析中情感表示的鲁棒性和预测性能。

Abstract: Achieving consistent sentiment representation across diverse modalities remains a key challenge in multimodal sentiment analysis. However, rapid emotional fluctuations over time often introduce instability, leading to compromised prediction performance. To address this challenge, we propose a robust sentiment representation dual enhancement strategy that simultaneously enhances the temporal and modality dimensions, guided by targeted mechanisms in both forward and backward propagation. Specifically, in the modality dimension, we introduce a modality invariant fusion mechanism that fosters stable cross-modal representations, which aim to capture the common and stable representations shared across different modalities. In the temporal dimension, we impose a specialized sequential variation regularization term that regulates the model's learning trajectory during backward propagation, which is essentially total variation regularization degenerated into one-dimensional linear differences. Extensive experiments on three standard public datasets validate the effectiveness of our proposed approach.

</details>


### [345] [Load Balancing in Federated Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00217)
*Alireza Javani,Zhiying Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出基于信息年龄（Age of Information）的负载度量指标，并通过最小化客户端间负载度量方差来优化联邦学习的调度策略。同时提出一种去中心化马尔可夫调度策略，实现独立客户端决策下的负载均衡，无需网络规模管理开销。实验证明降低负载度量方差能提升公平性、运行效率及模型收敛速度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 联邦学习调度策略面临公平工作负载分配、高效资源利用、大规模边缘设备场景下的可扩展性以及客户端数据统计异质性等挑战，现有方法难以同时兼顾这些方面。

Method: 提出基于信息年龄（Age of Information）的负载度量指标，通过最小化客户端间负载度量方差来优化调度。设计了一种去中心化马尔可夫调度策略，使每个客户端独立决策，消除中心化管理开销。

Result: 仿真验证表明，降低负载度量方差不仅提升了公平性和运行效率，还加速了学习模型的收敛速度。

Conclusion: 基于信息年龄的负载度量与去中心化马尔可夫调度策略能有效解决联邦学习调度中的公平性、资源效率和可扩展性问题，并同时改善模型收敛性能。

Abstract: Federated Learning (FL) is a decentralized machine learning framework that enables learning from data distributed across multiple remote devices, enhancing communication efficiency and data privacy. Due to limited communication resources, a scheduling policy is often applied to select a subset of devices for participation in each FL round. The scheduling process confronts significant challenges due to the need for fair workload distribution, efficient resource utilization, scalability in environments with numerous edge devices, and statistically heterogeneous data across devices. This paper proposes a load metric for scheduling policies based on the Age of Information and addresses the above challenges by minimizing the load metric variance across the clients. Furthermore, a decentralized Markov scheduling policy is presented, that ensures a balanced workload distribution while eliminating the management overhead irrespective of the network size due to independent client decision-making. We establish the optimal parameters of the Markov chain model and validate our approach through simulations. The results demonstrate that reducing the load metric variance not only promotes fairness and improves operational efficiency, but also enhances the convergence rate of the learning models.

</details>


### [346] [Accurate Prediction of Ligand-Protein Interaction Affinities with Fine-Tuned Small Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00111)
*Ben Fauber*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出使用指令微调的预训练生成式小型语言模型（SLMs），仅以配体的SMILES字符串和蛋白质的氨基酸序列为输入，在零样本设置下准确预测配体-蛋白质相互作用（LPI）亲和力，结果优于传统机器学习方法和自由能微扰（FEP+）方法，有望加速药物发现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于机器学习（ML）和自由能微扰（FEP+）的方法在预测配体-蛋白质相互作用亲和力方面存在精度不足的问题，亟需更准确的预测方法来加速针对具有挑战性治疗靶点的药物发现。

Method: 采用指令微调（instruction fine-tuning）的预训练生成式小型语言模型（SLMs），以配体SMILES字符串和蛋白质氨基酸序列作为输入，在零样本（zero-shot）设置下对未见样本进行亲和力预测。

Result: 在零样本设置下，该方法在未见样本上准确预测了配体-蛋白质相互作用的一系列亲和力值，性能明显优于基于机器学习（ML）和自由能微扰（FEP+）的方法。

Conclusion: 指令微调的预训练生成式小型语言模型可有效预测配体-蛋白质相互作用亲和力，优于传统方法，可进一步用于加速针对挑战性治疗靶点的药物发现活动。

Abstract: We describe the accurate prediction of ligand-protein interaction (LPI) affinities, also known as drug-target interactions (DTI), with instruction fine-tuned pretrained generative small language models (SLMs). We achieved accurate predictions for a range of affinity values associated with ligand-protein interactions on out-of-sample data in a zero-shot setting. Only the SMILES string of the ligand and the amino acid sequence of the protein were used as the model inputs. Our results demonstrate a clear improvement over machine learning (ML) and free-energy perturbation (FEP+) based methods in accurately predicting a range of ligand-protein interaction affinities, which can be leveraged to further accelerate drug discovery campaigns against challenging therapeutic targets.

</details>


### [347] [Common Steps in Machine Learning Might Hinder The Explainability Aims in Medicine](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00155)
*Ahmed M Salih*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文系统讨论机器学习数据预处理步骤（缺失值处理、异常值检测、数据增强、降维、归一化、混杂变量控制等）对模型可解释性的影响，指出不当预处理可能阻碍医学新发现、导致模型不公平、使特征失去临床意义，并提出兼顾性能与可解释性的解决方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 数据预处理虽能提升模型性能，但可能损害模型的可解释性和可理解性，尤其在医学领域，不当预处理会掩盖新发现、引发不公平、使特征失去临床意义，因此需要深入分析其影响并寻求平衡方案。

Method: 系统性梳理机器学习中常见的数据预处理步骤，从可解释性角度分析每一步骤可能带来的负面影响，并探讨改进方案。

Result: 指出缺失值与异常值的不当移除会阻碍新发现；数据归一化使特征变为无量纲、临床无意义的数值，降低可解释性；预处理不当还会导致模型对部分群体不公平。提出了在提升性能的同时保持可解释性的可能解决方案。

Conclusion: 数据预处理需要谨慎设计，平衡模型性能与可解释性，尤其在医学等高风险领域，应避免因预处理不当而牺牲模型的透明度和公平性。

Abstract: Data pre-processing is a significant step in machine learning to improve the performance of the model and decreases the running time. This might include dealing with missing values, outliers detection and removing, data augmentation, dimensionality reduction, data normalization and handling the impact of confounding variables. Although it is found the steps improve the accuracy of the model, but they might hinder the explainability of the model if they are not carefully considered especially in medicine. They might block new findings when missing values and outliers removal are implemented inappropriately. In addition, they might make the model unfair against all the groups in the model when making the decision. Moreover, they turn the features into unitless and clinically meaningless and consequently not explainable. This paper discusses the common steps of the data preprocessing in machine learning and their impacts on the explainability and interpretability of the model. Finally, the paper discusses some possible solutions that improve the performance of the model while not decreasing its explainability.

</details>


### [348] [Discovering Car-following Dynamics from Trajectory Data through Deep Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00251)
*Ohay Angah,James Enouen,Xuegang,Ban,Yan Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于深度符号回归（DSR）与变量交集选择（VIS）方法的框架，用于从轨迹数据中直接发现跟车动力学的主导数学表达式，通过添加复杂度惩罚和变量交互惩罚来鼓励生成简洁且可解释的表达式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有跟车模型通常依赖人工预设的数学形式，难以从数据中自动发现潜在的动力学表达式，缺乏自动化和可解释性。

Method: 采用深度符号回归（DSR）结合变量交集选择（VIS）方法，在奖励函数中引入复杂度惩罚项和变量交互惩罚项，以平衡表达式的简洁性与数据拟合度。

Result: 该方法成功学习了多种跟车动力学模型，展示了从轨迹数据中自动发现数学表达式的可行性。

Conclusion: 提出的DSR-VIS框架能够有效发现可解释且简洁的跟车动力学表达式，但仍存在局限性，需在未来研究中进一步改进。

Abstract: This study aims to discover the governing mathematical expressions of car-following dynamics from trajectory data directly using deep learning techniques. We propose an expression exploration framework based on deep symbolic regression (DSR) integrated with a variable intersection selection (VIS) method to find variable combinations that encourage interpretable and parsimonious mathematical expressions. In the exploration learning process, two penalty terms are added to improve the reward function: (i) a complexity penalty to regulate the complexity of the explored expressions to be parsimonious, and (ii) a variable interaction penalty to encourage the expression exploration to focus on variable combinations that can best describe the data. We show the performance of the proposed method to learn several car-following dynamics models and discuss its limitations and future research directions.

</details>


### [349] [Mobility-Aware Federated Self-supervised Learning in Vehicular Network](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00256)
*Xueying Gu,Qiong Wu,Pingyi Fan,Qiang Fan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出FLSimCo算法，一种基于图像模糊度聚合的无标签联邦学习算法，面向车载网络环境中的自监督预训练，能够在不依赖标签的情况下实现快速稳定的收敛。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 联邦学习在车载网络和移动物联网中面临两大挑战：一是标注成本高昂，依赖标签的模型难以适应新数据不断涌现的动态环境；二是高速移动车辆产生的模糊图像会导致简单聚合策略降低模型精度和收敛速度。

Method: 提出FLSimCo算法，将图像模糊度作为聚合权重依据，在无需标签的条件下执行自监督学习预训练阶段，适用于车载网络环境。

Result: 仿真结果表明，该算法在收敛速度和稳定性方面表现优异。

Conclusion: FLSimCo通过融合模糊度感知聚合与无标签自监督学习，有效解决了车载联邦学习中的标注成本高、图像模糊影响聚合质量的问题，实现了快速稳定的训练。

Abstract: Federated Learning (FL) is an advanced distributed machine learning approach, that protects the privacy of each vehicle by allowing the model to be trained on multiple devices simultaneously without the need to upload all data to a road side unit (RSU). This enables FL to handle scenarios with sensitive or widely distributed data. However, in these fields, it is well known that the labeling costs can be a significant expense, and models relying on labels are not suitable for these rapidly evolving fields especially in vehicular networks, or mobile internet of things (MIoT), where new data emerges constantly. To handle this issue, the self-supervised learning paves the way for training without labels. Additionally, for vehicles with high velocity, owing to blurred images, simple aggregation not only impacts the accuracy of the aggregated model but also reduces the convergence speed of FL. This paper proposes a FL algorithm based on image blur level to aggregation, called FLSimCo, which does not require labels and serves as a pre-training stage for self-supervised learning in the vehicular environment. Simulation results demonstrate that the proposed algorithm exhibits fast and stable convergence.

</details>


### [350] [OmniJARVIS: Unified Vision-Language-Action Tokenization Enables Open-World Instruction Following Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00114)
*Zihao Wang,Shaofei Cai,Zhancun Mu,Haowei Lin,Ceyao Zhang,Xuejie Liu,Qing Li,Anji Liu,Xiaojian Ma,Yitao Liang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: OmniJARVIS是一种新型视觉-语言-动作(VLA)模型，通过将行为轨迹编码为离散token并集成到多模态语言模型词汇表中，实现开放世界Minecraft中指令跟随代理的强推理与高效决策。该模型通过统一token化处理任务指令、记忆、思考、观察、文本响应和行为轨迹等多模态交互数据，能够进行推理、规划、问答和行动，在原子任务、程序化任务和开放任务上表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法要么将文本目标传递给独立控制器，要么直接输出控制命令，难以同时兼顾强推理能力和高效决策能力。本文旨在探索一条统一的多模态交互数据token化路径，使VLA模型同时具备推理、规划、问答和行动能力。

Method: 1) 自监督学习行为编码器，将行为轨迹(观测和动作序列)转化为离散行为token；2) 将这些行为token扩充到预训练多模态语言模型的词汇表中；3) 将任务指令、记忆、思考、观察、文本响应、行为轨迹等长程多模态交互数据打包为统一token序列；4) 使用自回归Transformer建模，行为token通过模仿学习策略解码器生成具体动作。

Result: 在Minecraft开放世界中的原子任务、程序化任务和开放任务上均表现出色。分析揭示了交互数据形成、统一token化及其扩展潜力的关键设计原则。

Conclusion: 语义上有意义的行为token是VLA模型同时具备推理、规划、问答和行动能力的关键。统一token化是平衡推理与决策的有效范式，具有良好的扩展潜力。

Abstract: This paper presents OmniJARVIS, a novel Vision-Language-Action (VLA) model for open-world instruction-following agents in Minecraft. Compared to prior works that either emit textual goals to separate controllers or produce the control command directly, OmniJARVIS seeks a different path to ensure both strong reasoning and efficient decision-making capabilities via unified tokenization of multimodal interaction data. First, we introduce a self-supervised approach to learn a behavior encoder that produces discretized tokens for behavior trajectories $τ= \{o_0, a_0, \dots\}$ and an imitation learning policy decoder conditioned on these tokens. These additional behavior tokens will be augmented to the vocabulary of pretrained Multimodal Language Models. With this encoder, we then pack long-term multimodal interactions involving task instructions, memories, thoughts, observations, textual responses, behavior trajectories, etc into unified token sequences and model them with autoregressive transformers. Thanks to the semantically meaningful behavior tokens, the resulting VLA model, OmniJARVIS, can reason (by producing chain-of-thoughts), plan, answer questions, and act (by producing behavior tokens for the imitation learning policy decoder). OmniJARVIS demonstrates excellent performances on a comprehensive collection of atomic, programmatic, and open-ended tasks in open-world Minecraft. Our analysis further unveils the crucial design principles in interaction data formation, unified tokenization, and its scaling potentials. The dataset, models, and code will be released at https://craftjarvis.org/OmniJARVIS.

</details>


### [351] [Deep Neural Networks for Predicting Recurrence and Survival in Patients with Esophageal Cancer After Surgery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00163)
*Yuhan Zheng,Jessie A Elliott,John V Reynolds,Sheraz R Markar,Bartłomiej W. Papież,ENSURE study group*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究利用ENSURE大型多中心国际数据集，评估了CoxPH、DeepSurv和DeepHit三种模型在食管癌无病生存期和总生存期上的预测性能。术后病理特征是显著预后因素，DeepSurv略微优于CoxPH（C-index分别为0.735和0.74），但CoxPH在本数据集中仍表现良好。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 食管癌复发率高、生存率低，即使在接受根治性手术的患者中也是如此。探究预后因素并预测预后有助于术后临床决策，改善患者结局。

Method: 使用ENSURE大型多中心国际数据集，采用CoxPH模型评估各特征对预后的影响，并使用CoxPH、DeepSurv和DeepHit三种模型预测DFS和OS。

Result: 术后病理特征比临床分期特征具有更高的显著性。DeepSurv和DeepHit的判别准确性与CoxPH相当，DeepSurv略优，DFS和OS的C-index分别为0.735和0.74。

Conclusion: DNN具有作为预后工具改进预测准确性和提供个性化风险分层的潜力，但在本研究数据中CoxPH仍是一个足够好的预测模型。

Abstract: Esophageal cancer is a major cause of cancer-related mortality internationally, with high recurrence rates and poor survival even among patients treated with curative-intent surgery. Investigating relevant prognostic factors and predicting prognosis can enhance post-operative clinical decision-making and potentially improve patients' outcomes. In this work, we assessed prognostic factor identification and discriminative performances of three models for Disease-Free Survival (DFS) and Overall Survival (OS) using a large multicenter international dataset from ENSURE study. We first employed Cox Proportional Hazards (CoxPH) model to assess the impact of each feature on outcomes. Subsequently, we utilised CoxPH and two deep neural network (DNN)-based models, DeepSurv and DeepHit, to predict DFS and OS. The significant prognostic factors identified by our models were consistent with clinical literature, with post-operative pathologic features showing higher significance than clinical stage features. DeepSurv and DeepHit demonstrated comparable discriminative accuracy to CoxPH, with DeepSurv slightly outperforming in both DFS and OS prediction tasks, achieving C-index of 0.735 and 0.74, respectively. While these results suggested the potential of DNNs as prognostic tools for improving predictive accuracy and providing personalised guidance with respect to risk stratification, CoxPH still remains an adequately good prediction model, with the data used in this study.

</details>


### [352] [High Performance Im2win and Direct Convolutions using Three Tensor Layouts on SIMD Architectures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00278)
*Xiang Fu,Xinpeng Zhang,Jixiang Ma,Peng Zhao,Shuai Lu,Xu T. Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对SIMD架构下卷积运算中的数据布局问题，提出了三种新的数据布局（NHWC、CHWN、CHWN8）用于im2win卷积，并引入了直接卷积和im2win卷积的通用优化技术。实验表明，NHWC布局的im2win卷积相比NCHW布局最高提速355%，优化后的im2win和直接卷积分别达到机器理论峰值的95%和94%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 卷积是深度神经网络中计算密集且耗时的核心组件，张量数据布局对卷积的内存访问和计算效率有显著影响，但目前SIMD架构下不同卷积方法的数据布局缺乏全面的性能表征。

Method: 提出了三种新的数据布局（NHWC、CHWN、CHWN8）用于im2win卷积，并引入了一组通用优化技术，适用于直接卷积和im2win卷积两种方法。

Result: im2win卷积采用NHWC布局相比NCHW布局最高获得355%的性能加速；优化后的im2win卷积达到机器理论峰值的95%，优化后的直接卷积达到94%。

Conclusion: 所提出的新数据布局和通用优化技术能显著提升SIMD架构下卷积运算的性能，使im2win和直接卷积均接近机器理论峰值性能。

Abstract: Convolution is the core component within deep neural networks and it is computationally intensive and time consuming. Tensor data layouts significantly impact convolution operations in terms of memory access and computational efficiency. Yet, there is still a lack of comprehensive performance characterization on data layouts on SIMD architectures concerning convolution methods. This paper proposes three novel data layouts for im2win convolution: NHWC, CHWN, and CHWN8, and introduces a set of general optimization techniques for both direct and im2win convolutions. We compare the optimized im2win convolution with the direct convolution and PyTorch's im2col-based convolution across the aforementioned layouts on SIMD machines. The experiments demonstrated that the im2win convolution with the new NHWC layout achieved up to 355% performance speedup over NCHW layout. Our optimizations also significantly improve the performance of both im2win and direct convolutions. Our optimized im2win and direct convolutions achieved up to 95% and 94% of machine's theoretical peak performance, respectively.

</details>


### [353] [Contrastive Graph Representation Learning with Adversarial Cross-view Reconstruction and Information Bottleneck](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00295)
*Yuntao Shou,Haozhi Lan,Xiangyong Cao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出CGRL方法，通过对抗性交叉视图重建和信息瓶颈理论改进图对比学习，解决节点分类中图神经网络的流行性偏差和标签噪声问题，在真实数据集上优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有GNNs存在流行性偏差（少数流行类别主导）和错误节点标签问题，而图对比学习虽能缓解这些问题，但现有方法随机移除边/节点并最大化互信息，导致模型学到与节点分类任务无关的冗余信息。

Method: 提出CGRL框架：1) 自适应学习掩码节点和边以获取最优图结构表示；2) 引入信息瓶颈理论去除多对比视图中的冗余信息，同时保留与节点分类相关的重要信息；3) 向原始视图添加噪声扰动，通过构建对抗性视图进行交叉视图重建，提升节点特征表示的鲁棒性。

Result: 在真实世界公开数据集上的大量实验表明，CGRL方法显著优于现有最先进算法。

Conclusion: 通过信息瓶颈理论与对抗性交叉视图重建的结合，能有效去除冗余信息并提升模型鲁棒性，为图对比学习在节点分类任务中的应用提供了新的有效范式。

Abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have received extensive research attention due to their powerful information aggregation capabilities. Despite the success of GNNs, most of them suffer from the popularity bias issue in a graph caused by a small number of popular categories. Additionally, real graph datasets always contain incorrect node labels, which hinders GNNs from learning effective node representations. Graph contrastive learning (GCL) has been shown to be effective in solving the above problems for node classification tasks. Most existing GCL methods are implemented by randomly removing edges and nodes to create multiple contrasting views, and then maximizing the mutual information (MI) between these contrasting views to improve the node feature representation. However, maximizing the mutual information between multiple contrasting views may lead the model to learn some redundant information irrelevant to the node classification task. To tackle this issue, we propose an effective Contrastive Graph Representation Learning with Adversarial Cross-view Reconstruction and Information Bottleneck (CGRL) for node classification, which can adaptively learn to mask the nodes and edges in the graph to obtain the optimal graph structure representation. Furthermore, we innovatively introduce the information bottleneck theory into GCLs to remove redundant information in multiple contrasting views while retaining as much information as possible about node classification. Moreover, we add noise perturbations to the original views and reconstruct the augmented views by constructing adversarial views to improve the robustness of node feature representation. Extensive experiments on real-world public datasets demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms existing state-of-the-art algorithms.

</details>


### [354] [Generative AI for Synthetic Data Across Multiple Medical Modalities: A Systematic Review of Recent Developments and Challenges](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00116)
*Mahmoud Ibrahim,Yasmina Al Khalil,Sina Amirrajab,Chang Sun,Marcel Breeuwer,Josien Pluim,Bart Elen,Gokhan Ertaylan,Michel Dumontier*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文对2017-2023年间用于合成多种医疗数据（影像、文本、时序、表格）的生成模型（GAN、VAE、DM、LLM）进行了系统性综述，从合成应用、生成技术和评估方法三个维度揭示了当前研究现状与不足，指出缺乏个性化合成、临床AI验证用途及标准化评估方法是主要障碍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 以往综述过于聚焦单一模态或模型类型，缺乏跨模态、跨模型的系统性视角，本研究旨在填补这一空白，全面审视生成模型在医疗数据合成中的最新进展。

Method: 在Scopus、PubMed、ArXiv数据库中检索2021年1月至2023年11月的相关文献，排除综述和观点文章，从（1）合成应用与目的、（2）生成技术、（3）评估方法三个关键维度进行分析。

Result: 发现：（1）条件生成模型（类标签、分割掩码、图像翻译）占主导；（2）缺乏利用临床先验知识和患者个性化上下文的合成方法；（3）合成数据主要用于数据增强，在验证和评估下游医疗AI模型方面应用不足；（4）缺乏针对医疗图像的标准化评估方法。

Conclusion: 需要发展更个性化的生成方法以适应医疗数据特性，拓展合成数据在AI模型验证评估中的应用，并建立标准化评估基准以促进临床转化。

Abstract: This paper presents a comprehensive systematic review of generative models (GANs, VAEs, DMs, and LLMs) used to synthesize various medical data types, including imaging (dermoscopic, mammographic, ultrasound, CT, MRI, and X-ray), text, time-series, and tabular data (EHR). Unlike previous narrowly focused reviews, our study encompasses a broad array of medical data modalities and explores various generative models. Our search strategy queries databases such as Scopus, PubMed, and ArXiv, focusing on recent works from January 2021 to November 2023, excluding reviews and perspectives. This period emphasizes recent advancements beyond GANs, which have been extensively covered previously.
  The survey reveals insights from three key aspects: (1) Synthesis applications and purpose of synthesis, (2) generation techniques, and (3) evaluation methods. It highlights clinically valid synthesis applications, demonstrating the potential of synthetic data to tackle diverse clinical requirements. While conditional models incorporating class labels, segmentation masks and image translations are prevalent, there is a gap in utilizing prior clinical knowledge and patient-specific context, suggesting a need for more personalized synthesis approaches and emphasizing the importance of tailoring generative approaches to the unique characteristics of medical data. Additionally, there is a significant gap in using synthetic data beyond augmentation, such as for validation and evaluation of downstream medical AI models. The survey uncovers that the lack of standardized evaluation methodologies tailored to medical images is a barrier to clinical application, underscoring the need for in-depth evaluation approaches, benchmarking, and comparative studies to promote openness and collaboration.

</details>


### [355] [Deep learning surrogate models of JULES-INFERNO for wildfire prediction on a global scale](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00237)
*Sibo Cheng,Hector Chassagnon,Matthew Kasoar,Yike Guo,Rossella Arcucci*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对JULES-INFERNO全球植被与火灾模拟模型计算成本高、运行时间长（HPC上需数小时）的瓶颈，提出了两种基于深度学习的代理模型，将30年预测时间从数小时缩短至20秒以内（普通笔记本电脑CPU），同时保持高精度（AEP低于0.3%，SSIM超过98%）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: JULES-INFERNO全球火灾模型虽然预测能力强，但因数据维度高、系统复杂，计算成本极高（30年预测需HPC数小时），难以应用于需要快速响应的火灾风险预测场景，尤其是面对未见过的初始条件时。

Method: 构建两种基于深度学习的代理模型，以全球温度、植被密度、土壤湿度和历史预测作为输入，迭代预测全球燃烧面积。采用平均每像素误差（AEP）和结构相似性指数（SSIM）作为评价指标，并提出了针对未见场景的微调策略以提升算法性能。

Result: 代理模型在保持高预测精度的前提下（AEP低于0.3%，SSIM超过98%），将30年全球火灾预测的计算时间从HPC数小时缩短至笔记本电脑CPU上的20秒以内，计算效率提升超过三个数量级。

Conclusion: 基于深度学习的代理模型能够有效替代JULES-INFERNO进行全球火灾预测，在保证足够精度的同时实现了质的计算效率提升，为火灾风险快速预测提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Global wildfire models play a crucial role in anticipating and responding to changing wildfire regimes. JULES-INFERNO is a global vegetation and fire model simulating wildfire emissions and area burnt on a global scale. However, because of the high data dimensionality and system complexity, JULES-INFERNO's computational costs make it challenging to apply to fire risk forecasting with unseen initial conditions. Typically, running JULES-INFERNO for 30 years of prediction will take several hours on High Performance Computing (HPC) clusters. To tackle this bottleneck, two data-driven models are built in this work based on Deep Learning techniques to surrogate the JULES-INFERNO model and speed up global wildfire forecasting. More precisely, these machine learning models take global temperature, vegetation density, soil moisture and previous forecasts as inputs to predict the subsequent global area burnt on an iterative basis. Average Error per Pixel (AEP) and Structural Similarity Index Measure (SSIM) are used as metrics to evaluate the performance of the proposed surrogate models. A fine tuning strategy is also proposed in this work to improve the algorithm performance for unseen scenarios. Numerical results show a strong performance of the proposed models, in terms of both computational efficiency (less than 20 seconds for 30 years of prediction on a laptop CPU) and prediction accuracy (with AEP under 0.3\% and SSIM over 98\% compared to the outputs of JULES-INFERNO).

</details>


### [356] [Discretizing Continuous Action Space with Unimodal Probability Distributions for On-Policy Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00309)
*Yuanyang Zhu,Zhi Wang,Yuanheng Zhu,Chunlin Chen,Dongbin Zhao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对on-policy强化学习中连续动作空间离散化带来的动作数量爆炸和策略梯度高方差问题，提出使用泊松概率分布约束离散策略为单峰结构，从而利用动作间的连续性，在复杂控制任务（如Humanoid）中实现更快的收敛和更高的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 连续控制中离散化动作空间虽然易于表达多模态和优化，但忽略了离散原子动作之间的固有顺序，导致离散动作数量爆炸，并使得策略梯度估计器方差增大，影响学习稳定性。

Method: 提出一种简单的架构，通过泊松概率分布约束离散策略为单峰（unimodal），显式利用底层连续动作空间的连续性，将有序信息注入离散策略中。

Result: 在具有挑战性的连续控制任务（尤其是Humanoid等复杂任务）上，单峰离散策略显著加快收敛速度并提升性能；理论分析表明该设计可保持较低的策略梯度估计方差，实现稳定学习。

Conclusion: 精心设计的单峰离散策略能够保留低方差特性，在on-policy强化学习中取得更优效果，有效解决了离散化动作空间的核心弊端。

Abstract: For on-policy reinforcement learning, discretizing action space for continuous control can easily express multiple modes and is straightforward to optimize. However, without considering the inherent ordering between the discrete atomic actions, the explosion in the number of discrete actions can possess undesired properties and induce a higher variance for the policy gradient estimator. In this paper, we introduce a straightforward architecture that addresses this issue by constraining the discrete policy to be unimodal using Poisson probability distributions. This unimodal architecture can better leverage the continuity in the underlying continuous action space using explicit unimodal probability distributions. We conduct extensive experiments to show that the discrete policy with the unimodal probability distribution provides significantly faster convergence and higher performance for on-policy reinforcement learning algorithms in challenging control tasks, especially in highly complex tasks such as Humanoid. We provide theoretical analysis on the variance of the policy gradient estimator, which suggests that our attentively designed unimodal discrete policy can retain a lower variance and yield a stable learning process.

</details>


### [357] [Efficient Long-distance Latent Relation-aware Graph Neural Network for Multi-modal Emotion Recognition in Conversations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00119)
*Yuntao Shou,Wei Ai,Jiayi Du,Tao Meng,Haiyan Liu,Nan Yin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出ELR-GNN模型，通过膨胀广义前向推送算法预计算全局话语间的情绪传播，并设计情绪关系感知算子捕获长距离话语间的潜在依赖关系，在多模态对话情感识别任务上达到SOTA，同时分别减少52%和35%的运行时间。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于GNN的多模态对话情感识别方法因图神经网络复杂性，无法高效捕获长距离话语间的潜在依赖关系，限制了模型性能。

Method: 1) 使用Bi-LSTM提取文本、视频、音频特征获得低层话语特征；2) 构建对话情感交互图；3) 采用膨胀广义前向推送算法预计算全局话语间情绪传播；4) 设计情绪关系感知算子捕获话语间潜在语义关联；5) 结合早期融合与自适应晚期融合机制融合说话人关系与上下文信息；6) 通过MLP进行情感预测。

Result: 在IEMOCAP和MELD基准数据集上达到SOTA性能，运行时间分别降低52%和35%。

Conclusion: ELR-GNN有效解决了长距离话语依赖捕获效率问题，在提升情感识别性能的同时大幅降低了计算开销。

Abstract: The task of multi-modal emotion recognition in conversation (MERC) aims to analyze the genuine emotional state of each utterance based on the multi-modal information in the conversation, which is crucial for conversation understanding. Existing methods focus on using graph neural networks (GNN) to model conversational relationships and capture contextual latent semantic relationships. However, due to the complexity of GNN, existing methods cannot efficiently capture the potential dependencies between long-distance utterances, which limits the performance of MERC. In this paper, we propose an Efficient Long-distance Latent Relation-aware Graph Neural Network (ELR-GNN) for multi-modal emotion recognition in conversations. Specifically, we first use pre-extracted text, video and audio features as input to Bi-LSTM to capture contextual semantic information and obtain low-level utterance features. Then, we use low-level utterance features to construct a conversational emotion interaction graph. To efficiently capture the potential dependencies between long-distance utterances, we use the dilated generalized forward push algorithm to precompute the emotional propagation between global utterances and design an emotional relation-aware operator to capture the potential semantic associations between different utterances. Furthermore, we combine early fusion and adaptive late fusion mechanisms to fuse latent dependency information between speaker relationship information and context. Finally, we obtain high-level discourse features and feed them into MLP for emotion prediction. Extensive experimental results show that ELR-GNN achieves state-of-the-art performance on the benchmark datasets IEMOCAP and MELD, with running times reduced by 52\% and 35\%, respectively.

</details>


### [358] [Building Better Datasets: Seven Recommendations for Responsible Design from Dataset Creators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00252)
*Will Orr,Kate Crawford*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 通过对18位顶级数据集创建者的质性访谈，本文揭示了数据集创建过程中的挑战与考量，并提出了七项促进负责任数据集创建的核心建议，涵盖数据质量、文档记录、隐私与同意以及减轻潜在危害等方面。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器学习领域对高质量数据集的需求日益增长，但数据集创建的伦理与责任问题尚未得到充分关注，现有文献缺乏对数据集创建者视角与专业经验的系统研究。

Method: 采用质性研究方法，对18位领先的数据集创建者进行深度访谈，通过分析他们的观点和经验提炼出核心发现。

Result: 揭示了数据集创建者面临的多方面挑战与考量，并基于其经验提出了七项核心建议，涵盖数据质量、文档记录、隐私与同意、缓解误用危害等关键议题。

Conclusion: 强调数据集创建者在推动负责任的机器学习实践中具有未被充分认识的宝贵价值，呼吁加强协作、知识共享与集体发展，以促进负责任的数据集创建实践。

Abstract: The increasing demand for high-quality datasets in machine learning has raised concerns about the ethical and responsible creation of these datasets. Dataset creators play a crucial role in developing responsible practices, yet their perspectives and expertise have not yet been highlighted in the current literature. In this paper, we bridge this gap by presenting insights from a qualitative study that included interviewing 18 leading dataset creators about the current state of the field. We shed light on the challenges and considerations faced by dataset creators, and our findings underscore the potential for deeper collaboration, knowledge sharing, and collective development. Through a close analysis of their perspectives, we share seven central recommendations for improving responsible dataset creation, including issues such as data quality, documentation, privacy and consent, and how to mitigate potential harms from unintended use cases. By fostering critical reflection and sharing the experiences of dataset creators, we aim to promote responsible dataset creation practices and develop a nuanced understanding of this crucial but often undervalued aspect of machine learning research.

</details>


### [359] [Granite-Function Calling Model: Introducing Function Calling Abilities via Multi-task Learning of Granular Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00121)
*Ibrahim Abdelaziz,Kinjal Basu,Mayank Agarwal,Sadhana Kumaravel,Matthew Stallone,Rameswar Panda,Yara Rizk,GP Bhargav,Maxwell Crouse,Chulaka Gunasekara,Shajith Ikbal,Sachin Joshi,Hima Karanam,Vineet Kumar,Asim Munawar,Sumit Neelam,Dinesh Raghu,Udit Sharma,Adriana Meza Soria,Dheeraj Sreedhar,Praveen Venkateswaran,Merve Unuvar,David Cox,Salim Roukos,Luis Lastras,Pavan Kapanipathi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文介绍了GRANITE-20B-FUNCTIONCALLING模型，这是一个基于Apache 2.0开源协议的大语言模型，专为函数调用任务设计。该模型采用多任务训练方法，覆盖嵌套函数调用、函数链式调用、并行函数、函数名检测、参数-值对检测、最佳下一函数和响应生成七大基础任务。在Berkeley函数调用排行榜上，该模型在所有开源模型中表现最佳，综合排名第四，超越15+个对比模型，展现出良好的泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管大语言模型在智能体系统中展现出巨大潜力，但需要具备函数调用能力才能与外部工具和API交互完成复杂任务。目前开源模型在函数调用性能上仍落后于GPT、Claude、Gemini等专有模型，因此亟需开发一个性能优异且开源可用的函数调用模型。

Method: 采用多任务训练方法，在七个函数调用基础任务（嵌套函数调用、函数链式调用、并行函数、函数名检测、参数-值对检测、最佳下一函数、响应生成）上联合训练GRANITE-20B-FUNCTIONCALLING模型。

Result: 在Berkeley函数调用排行榜上，该模型在所有开源模型中表现最佳，综合排名第四；在七个不同的域外评估数据集上展现出更好的泛化能力，性能超过15+个专有和开源对比模型。

Conclusion: GRANITE-20B-FUNCTIONCALLING作为开源模型，在函数调用任务上达到了与专有模型竞争的性能水平，证明了多任务训练方法能有效提升LLM的函数调用能力与泛化性。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have recently shown tremendous promise in serving as the backbone to agentic systems, as demonstrated by their performance in multi-faceted, challenging benchmarks like SWE-Bench and Agent-Bench. However, to realize the true potential of LLMs as autonomous agents, they must learn to identify, call, and interact with external tools and application program interfaces (APIs) to complete complex tasks. These tasks together are termed function calling. Endowing LLMs with function calling abilities leads to a myriad of advantages, such as access to current and domain-specific information in databases and knowledge sources, and the ability to outsource tasks that can be reliably performed by tools, e.g., a Python interpreter or calculator. While there has been significant progress in function calling with LLMs, there is still a dearth of open models that perform on par with proprietary LLMs like GPT, Claude, and Gemini. Therefore, in this work, we introduce the GRANITE-20B-FUNCTIONCALLING model under an Apache 2.0 license. The model is trained using a multi-task training approach on seven fundamental tasks encompassed in function calling, those being Nested Function Calling, Function Chaining, Parallel Functions, Function Name Detection, Parameter-Value Pair Detection, Next-Best Function, and Response Generation. We present a comprehensive evaluation on multiple out-of-domain datasets comparing GRANITE-20B-FUNCTIONCALLING to more than 15 other best proprietary and open models. GRANITE-20B-FUNCTIONCALLING provides the best performance among all open models on the Berkeley Function Calling Leaderboard and fourth overall. As a result of the diverse tasks and datasets used for training our model, we show that GRANITE-20B-FUNCTIONCALLING has better generalizability on multiple tasks in seven different evaluation datasets.

</details>


### [360] [Reframing Data Value for Large Language Models Through the Lens of Plausibility](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00284)
*Mohamad Rida Rammal,Ruida Zhou,Suhas Diggavi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种以数据可生成性（plausibility）为核心的新颖数据估值方法，用于评估语言模型中数据的价值，该方法避免了对昂贵训练的依赖，具有计算高效性和理论可证明的性质。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数据估值方法主要针对判别式模型，依赖于模型训练来评估数据价值。随着语言模型规模不断增大，基于训练的估值方法变得极其昂贵且依赖特定技术。因此，需要一种不依赖训练、计算高效的替代方案来评估语言模型中数据的价值。

Method: 作者提出以数据"可生成性"（plausibility）为核心的新视角，认为如果数据能够被模型本身合理地生成，则其价值较低。从符合直觉的若干准则出发，推导出一种基于第一性原理、具有可证明性质且计算高效的价值函数。

Result: 对所提出的价值函数进行了理论分析，并在多个场景和数据集上进行了实验评估。

Conclusion: 该工作为语言模型的数据估值提供了一种全新的、不依赖训练的替代方案，以数据可生成性为衡量标准，具有理论保障和实际可行性。

Abstract: Data valuation seeks to answer the important question, "How much is this data worth?" Existing data valuation methods have largely focused on discriminative models, primarily examining data value through the lens of its utility in training. However, with the push for ever-larger language models, relying on valuation methods that require training becomes increasingly expensive and dependent on specific techniques. We propose an alternative perspective on the data value problem for language models, centering around the plausibility of the data. We posit that data holds lesser value if it can be plausibly generated by the model itself. Starting from some intuitive criteria that align with our notions of valuable data, we develop a novel value function that is computationally tractable and derived from first principles with provable properties. We conduct a theoretical analysis of our value function and evaluate it across multiple scenarios and datasets.

</details>


### [361] [ADBM: Adversarial diffusion bridge model for reliable adversarial purification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00315)
*Xiao Li,Wenxuan Sun,Huanran Chen,Qiongxiu Li,Yining Liu,Yingzhe He,Jie Shi,Xiaolin Hu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出对抗扩散桥模型(ADBM)，通过构建从带噪对抗样本到干净样本的反向桥接，解决了传统扩散净化方法中噪声净化与数据恢复之间的权衡问题，并在多种场景下验证了其优越的鲁棒防御性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有DiffPure方法直接使用预训练扩散模型进行对抗净化存在两个问题：(1) 噪声净化性能与数据恢复质量之间存在固有权衡；(2) 现有评估依赖弱自适应攻击，结果不可靠。因此需要设计更优的净化机制。

Method: 提出对抗扩散桥模型(ADBM)，直接构建从扩散后的对抗数据回到原始干净样本的反向桥接过程，以增强原始扩散模型的净化能力。

Result: 通过理论分析和多种场景下的实验验证，ADBM被证明是一种优越且鲁棒的防御机制。

Conclusion: ADBM有效解决了DiffPure的固有权衡问题，具有显著的实用应用前景，是一种更强的对抗防御方法。

Abstract: Recently Diffusion-based Purification (DiffPure) has been recognized as an effective defense method against adversarial examples. However, we find DiffPure which directly employs the original pre-trained diffusion models for adversarial purification, to be suboptimal. This is due to an inherent trade-off between noise purification performance and data recovery quality. Additionally, the reliability of existing evaluations for DiffPure is questionable, as they rely on weak adaptive attacks. In this work, we propose a novel Adversarial Diffusion Bridge Model, termed ADBM. ADBM directly constructs a reverse bridge from the diffused adversarial data back to its original clean examples, enhancing the purification capabilities of the original diffusion models. Through theoretical analysis and experimental validation across various scenarios, ADBM has proven to be a superior and robust defense mechanism, offering significant promise for practical applications.

</details>


### [362] [How more data can hurt: Instability and regularization in next-generation reservoir computing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.08641)
*Yuanzhao Zhang,Edmilson Roque dos Santos,Huixin Zhang,Sean P. Cornelius*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文发现数据驱动动力学模型中存在“更多数据反而降低性能”的极端现象：以NGRC为例，更多训练数据虽能学习更优流形映射，但会导致模型成为病态“积分器”并丧失稳定性。该不稳定性源于NGRC延迟状态产生的辅助维度。通过随数据量增大而增强正则化或引入噪声可缓解问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 揭示数据驱动动力学模型中“更多数据反而有害”这一反直觉现象的极端表现及其背后机制，为数据驱动建模中的正则化提供理论指导。

Method: 以NGRC为研究对象，分析训练数据量增加对模型稳定性的影响；通过关联延迟状态引入的辅助维度解释不稳定性来源；提出两种缓解策略：按数据规模增大正则化强度，或在训练中引入噪声。

Result: 更多训练数据导致NGRC学习到病态条件的“积分器”并失去稳定性；该不稳定性与延迟状态引入的辅助维度有关；增大正则化或引入噪声能有效缓解数据诱导的不稳定性。

Conclusion: 数据驱动动力学建模中，适当正则化至关重要，简单增加数据量可能适得其反，需根据数据规模相应调整正则化策略。

Abstract: It has been found recently that more data can, counter-intuitively, hurt the performance of deep neural networks. Here, we show that a more extreme version of the phenomenon occurs in data-driven models of dynamical systems. To elucidate the underlying mechanism, we focus on next-generation reservoir computing (NGRC) -- a popular framework for learning dynamics from data. We find that, despite learning a better representation of the flow map with more training data, NGRC can adopt an ill-conditioned ``integrator'' and lose stability. We link this data-induced instability to the auxiliary dimensions created by the delayed states in NGRC. Based on these findings, we propose simple strategies to mitigate the instability, either by increasing regularization strength in tandem with data size, or by carefully introducing noise during training. Our results highlight the importance of proper regularization in data-driven modeling of dynamical systems.

</details>


### [363] [Exploiting Preferences in Loss Functions for Sequential Recommendation via Weak Transitivity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00326)
*Hyunsoo Chung,Jungtaek Kim,Hyungeun Jo,Hyungwon Choi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 现有推荐系统损失函数（pairwise、pointwise、setwise）将下一个观测项视为唯一正样本，其余项均视为负样本，这种二元标签分配忽略了未观测项之间的偏好结构差异。本文提出一种新方法，通过利用不同偏好水平作为分数间的相对顺序来扩展原始目标函数，并展示了相比基线目标的优越性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有推荐系统的损失函数（pairwise、pointwise、setwise）将下一个观测项视为唯一正样本，其余所有未观测项均视为等价的负样本。这种二元标签分配方式忽略了未观测项之间存在的不同偏好程度和潜在结构，限制了模型对用户细粒度意图的建模能力。

Method: 提出一种扩展原始目标函数的新方法，通过显式利用不同偏好水平作为分数间的相对顺序，将未观测项之间的相对偏好结构纳入优化目标中，从而突破传统二元标签分配的局限。

Result: 所提方法在性能上优于基线目标函数。

Conclusion: 通过引入未观测项之间的相对偏好顺序，可以更充分地利用用户交互数据中的潜在结构信息，从而提升推荐系统的建模效果。

Abstract: A choice of optimization objective is immensely pivotal in the design of a recommender system as it affects the general modeling process of a user's intent from previous interactions. Existing approaches mainly adhere to three categories of loss functions: pairwise, pointwise, and setwise loss functions. Despite their effectiveness, a critical and common drawback of such objectives is viewing the next observed item as a unique positive while considering all remaining items equally negative. Such a binary label assignment is generally limited to assuring a higher recommendation score of the positive item, neglecting potential structures induced by varying preferences between other unobserved items. To alleviate this issue, we propose a novel method that extends original objectives to explicitly leverage the different levels of preferences as relative orders between their scores. Finally, we demonstrate the superior performance of our method compared to baseline objectives.

</details>


### [364] [A Simple Attention-Based Mechanism for Bimodal Emotion Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00134)
*Mazen Elabd,Sardar Jaf*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于注意机制的双模态深度学习架构，结合文本和语音数据进行情感分类，实验证明该架构优于仅使用单模态数据的模型，并在多个基准测试中达到最优性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统情感分类多依赖单一模态（如文本），未能充分利用多模态数据中的互补信息。大数据时代下，文本和语音公共数据集已足够丰富，却缺乏有效融合两者的深度学习架构。

Method: 构建了多种基于注意机制的双模态深度学习架构，分别提取文本和语音特征后进行特征融合，利用注意力机制动态加权重要特征，最终进行情感分类。

Result: 双模态（文本+语音）深度学习架构在情感分类任务上显著优于单一模态（仅文本或仅语音）架构；所提出的基于注意机制的双模态模型在多个基准上超越了现有最优系统。

Conclusion: 融合文本与语音的双模态学习范式能够有效提升情感分类性能，注意力机制在多模态融合中起到了关键作用，为情感计算领域提供了新的技术路径。

Abstract: Big data contain rich information for machine learning algorithms to utilize when learning important features during classification tasks. Human beings express their emotion using certain words, speech (tone, pitch, speed) or facial expression. Artificial Intelligence approach to emotion classification are largely based on learning from textual information. However, public datasets containing text and speech data provide sufficient resources to train machine learning algorithms for the tack of emotion classification. In this paper, we present novel bimodal deep learning-based architectures enhanced with attention mechanism trained and tested on text and speech data for emotion classification. We report details of different deep learning based architectures and show the performance of each architecture including rigorous error analyses. Our finding suggests that deep learning based architectures trained on different types of data (text and speech) outperform architectures trained only on text or speech. Our proposed attention-based bimodal architecture outperforms several state-of-the-art systems in emotion classification.

</details>


### [365] [Objective Features Extracted from Motor Activity Time Series for Food Addiction Analysis Using Machine Learning -- A Pilot Study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00310)
*Mikhail Borisenkov,Maksim Belyaev,Nithya Rekha Sivakumar,Murugappan Murugappan,Andrei Velichko,Dmitry Korzun,Tatyana Tserne,Larisa Bakutova,Denis Gubin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本研究基于78名参与者（平均年龄22.1岁，73.1%女性）的非优势手腕活动描记数据，结合机器学习（KNN）和熵特征提取，发现白天活动段特征对食物成瘾（FA）的二分类诊断表现优异（MCC=0.78，准确率~95.3%），优于主客观联合特征（MCC=0.69）和仅静息段特征（MCC=0.50），而症状计数四分类任务中主客观特征稍优于活动描记。研究支持腕戴式活动描记作为食物成瘾的数字化生物标志物。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管可穿戴传感器和IoT/IoMT平台能够实现连续实时监测，但针对进食障碍的客观数字化标志物仍然十分有限。本研究旨在探究活动描记和机器学习能否为食物成瘾（FA）及其症状计数（SC）提供客观的诊断标准。

Method: 收集78名参与者（平均年龄22.1岁，73.1%女性）一周的非优势手腕活动描记数据及心理测量数据（YFAS、DEBQ、ZSDS）。将时间序列分割为白天活动和夜间静息两段，计算256个特征（统计特征和模糊熵、距离熵、SVD熵、排列熵、相位熵等熵描述符）。采用K近邻（KNN）管道配合五折分层交叉验证（100次重复，500次评估），以平均马修斯相关系数（MCC）为主要指标，并使用SHAP进行模型解释。

Result: 对于食物成瘾（FA）二分类，活动段特征表现最佳（MCC=0.78±0.02，准确率~95.3%，灵敏度~0.77，特异性~0.98），超越主客观联合特征（MCC=0.69）和仅静息段特征（MCC=0.50）。对于症状计数四分类，主客观特征略优于活动描记（MCC=0.40 vs 0.38，准确率~58.1% vs 56.9%）。情绪性进食和限制性进食与活动描记特征存在相关性。

Conclusion: 腕戴式活动描记可作为食物成瘾的数字生物标志物，能够补充问卷评估并促进隐私保护的临床转化应用。

Abstract: Wearable sensors and IoT/IoMT platforms enable continuous, real-time monitoring, but objective digital markers for eating disorders are limited. In this study, we examined whether actimetry and machine learning (ML) could provide objective criteria for food addiction (FA) and symptom counts (SC). In 78 participants (mean age 22.1 +/- 9.5 y; 73.1% women), one week of non-dominant wrist actimetry and psychometric data (YFAS, DEBQ, ZSDS) were collected. The time series were segmented into daytime activity and nighttime rest, and statistical and entropy descriptors (FuzzyEn, DistEn, SVDEn, PermEn, PhaseEn; 256 features) were calculated. The mean Matthews correlation coefficient (MCC) was used as the primary metric in a K-nearest neighbors (KNN) pipeline with five-fold stratified cross-validation (one hundred repetitions; 500 evaluations); SHAP was used to assist in interpretation. For binary FA, activity-segment features performed best (MCC = 0.78 +/- 0.02; Accuracy ~ 95.3% +/- 0.5; Sensitivity ~ 0.77 +/- 0.03; Specificity ~ 0.98 +/- 0.004), exceeding OaS (Objective and Subjective Features) (MCC = 0.69 +/- 0.03) and rest-only (MCC = 0.50 +/- 0.03). For SC (four classes), OaS slightly surpassed actimetry (MCC = 0.40 +/- 0.01 vs 0.38 +/- 0.01; Accuracy ~ 58.1% vs 56.9%). Emotional and restrained eating were correlated with actimetric features. These findings support wrist-worn actimetry as a digital biomarker of FA that complements questionnaires and may facilitate privacy-preserving clinical translation.

</details>


### [366] ["Patriarchy Hurts Men Too." Does Your Model Agree? A Discussion on Fairness Assumptions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00330)
*Marco Favier,Toon Calders*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文揭示了公平机器学习管线中隐含的假设：在群体公平性背景下，选择表现最优且公平的模型实际上预设了数据偏差引入过程是仅依赖于敏感属性的单调函数。作者证明了这一说法，并指出要么偏差过程更复杂，需要识别并摒弃隐含假设以开发更强大的模型；要么偏差行为可预测，则许多现有模型是多余的。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 作者指出现有公平ML实践中，从业者通常分三步走：选择公平度量、选择最小化该度量的模型、最大化模型性能。这种看似合理的流程隐含了对偏差引入过程的特定假设（即偏差是公平分数的单调函数且仅依赖于敏感属性），而这些假设未被明确讨论或验证。

Method: 通过形式化证明的方式，作者论证了公平ML管线中关于偏差引入过程的隐含假设（特别是单调性假设）是普遍存在的，并分析了这些假设对模型选择和实践的影响。

Result: 证明了在群体公平性背景下，选择"同等公平下表现更好"的模型实际上已经假设偏差引入过程是公平分数的单调函数且仅依赖于敏感属性。

Conclusion: 两种可能的结论：如果偏差过程更复杂（非单调），则需要识别并拒绝隐含假设以开发更强大的模型；如果偏差行为可预测，则许多现有公平模型是多余的。这迫使研究者重新审视公平ML中的基本假设。

Abstract: The pipeline of a fair ML practitioner is generally divided into three phases: 1) Selecting a fairness measure. 2) Choosing a model that minimizes this measure. 3) Maximizing the model's performance on the data. In the context of group fairness, this approach often obscures implicit assumptions about how bias is introduced into the data. For instance, in binary classification, it is often assumed that the best model, with equal fairness, is the one with better performance. However, this belief already imposes specific properties on the process that introduced bias. More precisely, we are already assuming that the biasing process is a monotonic function of the fair scores, dependent solely on the sensitive attribute. We formally prove this claim regarding several implicit fairness assumptions. This leads, in our view, to two possible conclusions: either the behavior of the biasing process is more complex than mere monotonicity, which means we need to identify and reject our implicit assumptions in order to develop models capable of tackling more complex situations; or the bias introduced in the data behaves predictably, implying that many of the developed models are superfluous.

</details>


### [367] [Towards Secure and Efficient Data Scheduling for Vehicular Social Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00141)
*Youhua Xia,Tiehua Zhang,Jiong Jin,Ying He,Fei Yu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于Q学习与差分隐私的车辆社交网络数据调度算法，通过神经网络增强数据处理，利用Q-learning优化传输，并引入差分隐私保护通信安全，实验证明其优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 车辆社交网络中，由于节点高速移动，数据调度面临效率与安全双重挑战，现有调度算法难以同时兼顾有效性与效率。

Method: 1) 构建专用神经网络增强数据处理能力；2) 在数据传输阶段采用Q-learning范式优化信息交换；3) 通过差分隐私技术保障通信过程中的隐私安全。

Result: 对比实验表明，所提Q-learning增强调度算法在车辆社交网络场景下优于现有最先进调度算法。

Conclusion: 该算法在车辆社交网络中兼顾了数据传输效率与安全性，为高效安全的调度问题提供了可行解决方案。

Abstract: Efficient data transmission scheduling within vehicular environments poses a significant challenge due to the high mobility of such networks. Contemporary research predominantly centers on crafting cooperative scheduling algorithms tailored for vehicular networks. Notwithstanding, the intricacies of orchestrating scheduling in vehicular social networks both effectively and efficiently remain formidable. This paper introduces an innovative learning-based algorithm for scheduling data transmission that prioritizes efficiency and security within vehicular social networks. The algorithm first uses a specifically constructed neural network to enhance data processing capabilities. After this, it incorporates a Q-learning paradigm during the data transmission phase to optimize the information exchange, the privacy of which is safeguarded by differential privacy through the communication process. Comparative experiments demonstrate the superior performance of the proposed Q-learning enhanced scheduling algorithm relative to existing state-of-the-art scheduling algorithms in the context of vehicular social networks.

</details>


### [368] [GSpect: Spectral Filtering for Cross-Scale Graph Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00338)
*Xiaoyu Zhang,Wenchuan Yang,Jiawei Feng,Bitao Dai,Tianci Bu,Xin Lu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出GSpect模型，一种基于谱图滤波的跨尺度图分类方法。通过图小波神经网络卷积层聚合多尺度信息，并设计谱池化层将不同尺寸图统一为相同大小。在公开数据集上平均提升1.62%分类准确率，在自建跨尺度数据集MSG上提升15.55%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 真实世界中的图结构往往具有不同大小（跨尺度图），传统图分类方法在处理这类变尺寸图时准确率较低，现有研究缺乏针对跨尺度图分类的有效方法。

Method: 提出GSpect模型：(1) 使用图小波神经网络作为卷积层，聚合多尺度信息生成图表示；(2) 设计谱池化层，将节点聚合成一个节点，从而将不同尺度的图统一到相同尺寸；(3) 构建了跨尺度基准数据集MSG（多尺度图）。

Result: 在公开数据集上，GSpect的分类准确率平均提升1.62%，在PROTEINS上最高提升3.33%；在自建MSG数据集上，分类准确率平均提升15.55%。

Conclusion: GSpect填补了跨尺度图分类研究的空白，可应用于脑部疾病诊断（预测脑网络标签）和基于分子结构的新药开发等实际场景。

Abstract: Identifying structures in common forms the basis for networked systems design and optimization. However, real structures represented by graphs are often of varying sizes, leading to the low accuracy of traditional graph classification methods. These graphs are called cross-scale graphs. To overcome this limitation, in this study, we propose GSpect, an advanced spectral graph filtering model for cross-scale graph classification tasks. Compared with other methods, we use graph wavelet neural networks for the convolution layer of the model, which aggregates multi-scale messages to generate graph representations. We design a spectral-pooling layer which aggregates nodes to one node to reduce the cross-scale graphs to the same size. We collect and construct the cross-scale benchmark data set, MSG (Multi Scale Graphs). Experiments reveal that, on open data sets, GSpect improves the performance of classification accuracy by 1.62% on average, and for a maximum of 3.33% on PROTEINS. On MSG, GSpect improves the performance of classification accuracy by 15.55% on average. GSpect fills the gap in cross-scale graph classification studies and has potential to provide assistance in application research like diagnosis of brain disease by predicting the brain network's label and developing new drugs with molecular structures learned from their counterparts in other systems.

</details>


### [369] [Memorization Capacity for Additive Fine-Tuning with Small ReLU Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00359)
*Jy-yong Sohn,Dohyun Kwon,Seoyeon An,Kangwook Lee*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出微调容量（FTC）概念，量化神经网络在冻结预训练模型基础上通过附加网络进行微调时能任意改变标签的最大样本数。对于2层和3层ReLU附加网络，分别得到$m=Θ(N)$和$m=Θ(\sqrt{N})$的紧界，且与总样本数$K$无关，当$N=K$时退化为经典记忆容量结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 微调大规模预训练模型是机器学习中的常见实践，但其数学分析尚未充分探索。本文旨在通过记忆容量的视角，对微调过程进行严格的理论分析，填补这一空白。

Method: 定义微调容量（FTC）为神经网络在微调过程中能任意改变标签的最大样本数，等价于最小神经元数。针对加性微调场景（冻结预训练网络$f$加上含$m$个神经元的微调网络$g$），分析2层和3层ReLU网络下FTC的紧上下界。

Result: 对于2层ReLU附加网络，$m=Θ(N)$个神经元可微调$N$个样本；对于3层ReLU附加网络，$m=Θ(\sqrt{N})$个神经元即可，且与总样本数$K$无关。当$N=K$时，结果退化为经典的记忆容量结论。

Conclusion: 本文通过FTC建立了微调与记忆容量之间的理论联系，揭示了网络深度在微调效率中的关键作用：3层网络相比2层网络可显著降低所需神经元数量。该框架为理解微调过程的表达能力提供了新的理论工具。

Abstract: Fine-tuning large pre-trained models is a common practice in machine learning applications, yet its mathematical analysis remains largely unexplored. In this paper, we study fine-tuning through the lens of memorization capacity. Our new measure, the Fine-Tuning Capacity (FTC), is defined as the maximum number of samples a neural network can fine-tune, or equivalently, as the minimum number of neurons ($m$) needed to arbitrarily change $N$ labels among $K$ samples considered in the fine-tuning process. In essence, FTC extends the memorization capacity concept to the fine-tuning scenario. We analyze FTC for the additive fine-tuning scenario where the fine-tuned network is defined as the summation of the frozen pre-trained network $f$ and a neural network $g$ (with $m$ neurons) designed for fine-tuning. When $g$ is a ReLU network with either 2 or 3 layers, we obtain tight upper and lower bounds on FTC; we show that $N$ samples can be fine-tuned with $m=Θ(N)$ neurons for 2-layer networks, and with $m=Θ(\sqrt{N})$ neurons for 3-layer networks, no matter how large $K$ is. Our results recover the known memorization capacity results when $N = K$ as a special case.

</details>


### [370] [InfoNCE: Identifying the Gap Between Theory and Practice](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00143)
*Evgenia Rusak,Patrik Reizinger,Attila Juhos,Oliver Bringmann,Roland S. Zimmermann,Wieland Brendel*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文指出现有对比学习InfoNCE理论假设（潜变量等方差或某些变量不变）与实际应用（如图像强裁剪导致各潜变量各向异性变化）不匹配，提出AnInfoNCE损失函数，能在各向异性设置下可证明地恢复潜因子，并通过实验验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有对比学习InfoNCE的理论可识别性结果依赖于不现实的假设（潜变量等方差或某些潜变量保持不变），而实践中数据增强（如强裁剪）会导致所有潜因子发生不同程度的变化，存在理论与实践的鸿沟。

Method: 提出AnInfoNCE，作为InfoNCE的推广，通过引入各向异性建模（即每个潜因子允许不同的变化量），在更一般的条件下证明其能够可识别地恢复潜因子。

Result: 在可控实验中验证了可识别性结果；在CIFAR10和ImageNet上，AnInfoNCE能够恢复更多之前被压缩丢失的信息，但下游任务准确率有所下降。

Conclusion: AnInfoNCE弥合了对比学习理论与实际应用之间的部分差距，但仍存在剩余不匹配之处需要进一步研究。

Abstract: Prior theory work on Contrastive Learning via the InfoNCE loss showed that, under certain assumptions, the learned representations recover the ground-truth latent factors. We argue that these theories overlook crucial aspects of how CL is deployed in practice. Specifically, they either assume equal variance across all latents or that certain latents are kept invariant. However, in practice, positive pairs are often generated using augmentations such as strong cropping to just a few pixels. Hence, a more realistic assumption is that all latent factors change with a continuum of variability across all factors. We introduce AnInfoNCE, a generalization of InfoNCE that can provably uncover the latent factors in this anisotropic setting, broadly generalizing previous identifiability results in CL. We validate our identifiability results in controlled experiments and show that AnInfoNCE increases the recovery of previously collapsed information in CIFAR10 and ImageNet, albeit at the cost of downstream accuracy. Finally, we discuss the remaining mismatches between theoretical assumptions and practical implementations.

</details>


### [371] [Towards understanding Diffusion Models (on Graphs)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00374)
*Solveig Klepper*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文综述了扩散模型的不同理论视角，发现它们虽然在方法论上各异，但核心数学形式惊人地相似。通过在简单设置下的实验，作者探究了噪声的作用、采样方法的影响以及神经网络所需的功能与复杂度三个关键问题，旨在深化对扩散模型的理解，并最终应用于图机器学习。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散模型存在多种理论与方法论视角，各自提供对基本原理的不同见解。作者旨在揭示这些看似多样的方法论如何收敛到相似的数学表述，并通过实验探究核心问题，为最终将扩散模型应用于图机器学习奠定基础。

Method: 作者首先综述了扩散模型的几种主流理论方法，指出它们在数学形式上的类比性。随后在简化设置下进行实证研究，通过对比不同的扩散与采样技术，系统探究噪声角色、采样方法影响及神经网络近似功能与复杂度需求三个关键问题。

Result: 实验揭示了不同扩散与采样方法在简化设置下的表现差异与共性，阐明了噪声在模型中的具体作用、采样方法选择对结果的影响程度，以及神经网络所需近似函数的性质及其对复杂度的需求。

Conclusion: 本文的研究加深了对扩散模型底层原理的理解，为后续在图机器学习中应用扩散模型提供了理论指导与实验依据。

Abstract: Diffusion models have emerged from various theoretical and methodological perspectives, each offering unique insights into their underlying principles. In this work, we provide an overview of the most prominent approaches, drawing attention to their striking analogies -- namely, how seemingly diverse methodologies converge to a similar mathematical formulation of the core problem. While our ultimate goal is to understand these models in the context of graphs, we begin by conducting experiments in a simpler setting to build foundational insights. Through an empirical investigation of different diffusion and sampling techniques, we explore three critical questions: (1) What role does noise play in these models? (2) How significantly does the choice of the sampling method affect outcomes? (3) What function is the neural network approximating, and is high complexity necessary for optimal performance? Our findings aim to enhance the understanding of diffusion models and in the long run their application in graph machine learning.

</details>


### [372] [EXAONEPath 1.0 Patch-level Foundation Model for Pathology](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00380)
*Juseung Yun,Yi Hu,Jinhyung Kim,Jongseong Jang,Soonyoung Lee*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: EXAONEPath是一个数字病理学基础模型，通过染色归一化技术解决自监督学习中出现的"WSI特异性特征坍缩"问题，在285,153,903个切片（来自34,795张WSI）上训练，在六个下游任务数据集上达到SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自监督学习的数字病理学基础模型在提取特征时会出现"WSI特异性特征坍缩"现象——特征按单个WSI聚类，这限制了模型的泛化能力和下游任务性能。作者希望通过染色归一化来缓解这一问题。

Method: 提出EXAONEPath基础模型，在训练前对从WSI提取的patch进行染色归一化预处理，以消除不同实验室和扫描仪造成的颜色变异，使模型学习到更一致的特征。模型在285,153,903个patch（来自34,795张WSI）上训练。

Result: EXAONEPath显著缓解了特征坍缩问题，表明模型学到了更通用的特征而非过拟合到单个WSI特征。在六个下游任务数据集上，与SOTA模型相比，EXAONEPath在使用的WSI数量和参数量方面均实现了更优的性能。

Conclusion: 染色归一化的应用显著提升了模型效率和泛化能力，为解决数字病理学基础模型中的特征坍缩问题提供了有效方案。

Abstract: Recent advancements in digital pathology have led to the development of numerous foundational models that utilize self-supervised learning on patches extracted from gigapixel whole slide images (WSIs). While this approach leverages vast amounts of unlabeled data, we have discovered a significant issue: features extracted from these self-supervised models tend to cluster by individual WSIs, a phenomenon we term WSI-specific feature collapse. This problem can potentially limit the model's generalization ability and performance on various downstream tasks. To address this issue, we introduce EXAONEPath, a novel foundational model trained on patches that have undergone stain normalization. Stain normalization helps reduce color variability arising from different laboratories and scanners, enabling the model to learn more consistent features. EXAONEPath is trained using 285,153,903 patches extracted from a total of 34,795 WSIs. Our experiments demonstrate that EXAONEPath significantly mitigates the feature collapse problem, indicating that the model has learned more generalized features rather than overfitting to individual WSI characteristics. We compared EXAONEPath with state-of-the-art models across six downstream task datasets, and our results show that EXAONEPath achieves superior performance relative to the number of WSIs used and the model's parameter count. This suggests that the application of stain normalization has substantially improved the model's efficiency and generalization capabilities.

</details>


### [373] [Dataset Representativeness and Downstream Task Fairness](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00170)
*Victor Borza,Andrew Estornell,Chien-Ju Ho,Bradley Malin,Yevgeniy Vorobeychik*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了数据集代表性（representativeness）与下游分类器群体公平性（group-fairness）之间的关系，发现两者存在天然矛盾：更具代表性的训练数据集反而常导致分类器出现更高的不公平性。过采样少数群体可能加剧对该群体的偏见，而公平感知采样策略则倾向于过采样多数群体。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前数据采样过程常采用机会性采样（opportunistic sampling），导致数据集存在偏差，不能准确反映真实人口分布。这引发了群体代表性不足或过度代表的问题，进而影响下游任务（如医疗决策算法）的泛化性和公平性。作者旨在评估数据集代表性与分类器公平性之间的具体关系。

Method: 通过实证观察分析代表性数据集与分类器公平性之间的张力；在单变量分类器场景下提供理论分析结果；实验比较过采样少数群体和公平感知采样策略对分类器公平性的影响。

Result: 1）代表性更好的训练集反而常导致分类器更高的不公平性；2）过采样少数群体会使分类器对该群体表现出更大偏见；3）公平感知采样策略往往过采样多数群体成员。

Conclusion: 数据集代表性与下游分类器公平性之间存在复杂关系，两者需要模型设计者和数据集设计者共同谨慎权衡。

Abstract: Our society collects data on people for a wide range of applications, from building a census for policy evaluation to running meaningful clinical trials. To collect data, we typically sample individuals with the goal of accurately representing a population of interest. However, current sampling processes often collect data opportunistically from data sources, which can lead to datasets that are biased and not representative, i.e., the collected dataset does not accurately reflect the distribution of demographics of the true population. This is a concern because subgroups within the population can be under- or over-represented in a dataset, which may harm generalizability and lead to an unequal distribution of benefits and harms from downstream tasks that use such datasets (e.g., algorithmic bias in medical decision-making algorithms). In this paper, we assess the relationship between dataset representativeness and group-fairness of classifiers trained on that dataset. We demonstrate that there is a natural tension between dataset representativeness and classifier fairness; empirically we observe that training datasets with better representativeness can frequently result in classifiers with higher rates of unfairness. We provide some intuition as to why this occurs via a set of theoretical results in the case of univariate classifiers. We also find that over-sampling underrepresented groups can result in classifiers which exhibit greater bias to those groups. Lastly, we observe that fairness-aware sampling strategies (i.e., those which are specifically designed to select data with high downstream fairness) will often over-sample members of majority groups. These results demonstrate that the relationship between dataset representativeness and downstream classifier fairness is complex; balancing these two quantities requires special care from both model- and dataset-designers.

</details>


### [374] [Learning linear acyclic causal model including Gaussian noise using ancestral relationships](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00417)
*Ming Cai,Penggang Gao,Hisayuki Hara*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种学习线性因果模型分布等价模式的新算法，其时间复杂度低于PC-LiNGAM，通过扩展Maeda和Shimizu的因果祖先查找算法来处理高斯扰动。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: PC-LiNGAM算法在最坏情况下具有阶乘时间复杂度（关于变量数），需要更高效的算法来学习线性因果模型的分布等价模式。

Method: 将Maeda和Shimizu的因果祖先查找算法进行推广，使其能够处理高斯扰动，从而更高效地识别线性因果模型的分布等价模式。

Result: 新算法在时间复杂度上低于PC-LiNGAM，能够学习线性因果模型的分布等价模式。

Conclusion: 提出了一种比PC-LiNGAM更高效的算法，用于学习线性因果模型的分布等价模式，扩大了可处理问题的规模。

Abstract: This paper discusses algorithms for learning causal DAGs.
