The PC algorithm makes no assumptions other than the faithfulness to the causal model and can identify only up to the Markov equivalence class. LiNGAM assumes linearity and continuous non-Gaussian disturbances for the causal model, and the causal DAG defining LiNGAM is shown to be fully identifiable. The PC-LiNGAM, a hybrid of the PC algorithm and LiNGAM, can identify up to the distribution-equivalence pattern of a linear causal model, even in the presence of Gaussian disturbances. However, in the worst case, the PC-LiNGAM has factorial time complexity for the number of variables. In this paper, we propose an algorithm for learning the distribution-equivalence patterns of a linear causal model with a lower time complexity than PC-LiNGAM, using the causal ancestor finding algorithm in Maeda and Shimizu, which is generalized to account for Gaussian disturbances.

</details>


### [375] [Robust off-policy Reinforcement Learning via Soft Constrained Adversary](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00418)
*Kosuke Nakanishi,Akihiro Kubo,Yuji Yasui,Shin Ishii*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于f-散度约束的对抗强化学习新视角，解决了现有方法中策略与最优对手相互依赖（限制离策略算法发展）以及仅假设Lp范数扰动（忽略先验分布知识）两个问题，并推导出两种典型攻击及其鲁棒学习框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有对抗强化学习方法存在两个局限：1）策略与最优对手存在相互依赖关系，限制了离策略RL算法的应用；2）仅考虑Lp范数约束的扰动，未能利用环境中已知的扰动先验分布知识。

Method: 提出基于f-散度约束的对抗RL视角，利用先验分布知识构建约束问题，据此推导出两种典型攻击方法及其对应的鲁棒学习框架。

Result: 所提方法在样本高效的离策略RL中取得了优异的鲁棒性性能。

Conclusion: f-散度约束框架能有效解决现有对抗RL方法中策略-对手依赖性和扰动假设局限问题，在离策略场景下实现高效鲁棒学习。

Abstract: Recently, robust reinforcement learning (RL) methods against input observation have garnered significant attention and undergone rapid evolution due to RL's potential vulnerability. Although these advanced methods have achieved reasonable success, there have been two limitations when considering adversary in terms of long-term horizons. First, the mutual dependency between the policy and its corresponding optimal adversary limits the development of off-policy RL algorithms; although obtaining optimal adversary should depend on the current policy, this has restricted applications to off-policy RL. Second, these methods generally assume perturbations based only on the $L_p$-norm, even when prior knowledge of the perturbation distribution in the environment is available. We here introduce another perspective on adversarial RL: an f-divergence constrained problem with the prior knowledge distribution. From this, we derive two typical attacks and their corresponding robust learning frameworks. The evaluation of robustness is conducted and the results demonstrate that our proposed methods achieve excellent performance in sample-efficient off-policy RL.

</details>


### [376] [Towards Evolutionary-based Automated Machine Learning for Small Molecule Pharmacokinetic Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00421)
*Alex G. C. de Sá,David B. Ascher*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于进化策略的自动化机器学习方法（AutoML），利用语法引导的遗传编程自动选择和设计预测管道，用于药物发现中小分子性质（尤其是药代动力学）的预测，性能与传统方法相当或更优。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有小分子性质预测方法缺乏个性化，依赖人工设计的ML算法或管道，导致效率低下且引入偏差，无法满足药物早期开发中对药代动力学（ADME）准确预测的需求。

Method: 提出一种基于进化策略的AutoML方法，利用语法引导的遗传编程（grammar-based genetic programming）自动选择ML算法并设计预测管道，使管道能够根据输入分子数据的特征进行个性化适配。

Result: 该方法能够有效选择多样化的ML算法，在预测性能上达到与传统方法相当或更优的效果。

Conclusion: 该AutoML方法通过提供个性化的ML驱动管道，能够加速药物发现中的小分子研究，为研究人员开发新型治疗药物提供了有价值的工具。

Abstract: Machine learning (ML) is revolutionising drug discovery by expediting the prediction of small molecule properties essential for developing new drugs. These properties -- including absorption, distribution, metabolism and excretion (ADME)-- are crucial in the early stages of drug development since they provide an understanding of the course of the drug in the organism, i.e., the drug's pharmacokinetics. However, existing methods lack personalisation and rely on manually crafted ML algorithms or pipelines, which can introduce inefficiencies and biases into the process. To address these challenges, we propose a novel evolutionary-based automated ML method (AutoML) specifically designed for predicting small molecule properties, with a particular focus on pharmacokinetics. Leveraging the advantages of grammar-based genetic programming, our AutoML method streamlines the process by automatically selecting algorithms and designing predictive pipelines tailored to the particular characteristics of input molecular data. Results demonstrate AutoML's effectiveness in selecting diverse ML algorithms, resulting in comparable or even improved predictive performances compared to conventional approaches. By offering personalised ML-driven pipelines, our method promises to enhance small molecule research in drug discovery, providing researchers with a valuable tool for accelerating the development of novel therapeutic drugs.

</details>


### [377] [Closed-Form Test Functions for Biophysical Sequence Optimization Algorithms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00236)
*Samuel Stanton,Robert Alberstein,Nathan Frey,Andrew Watkins,Kyunghyun Cho*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文提出了一种名为Ehrlich函数的新型闭式测试函数，用于生物物理序列优化，通过将生物物理问题抽象为具有关键几何相似性的简化问题来弥补该领域缺乏优秀基准的不足，实验表明这些函数对标准遗传优化基线具有非平凡挑战性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器学习和计算机视觉、自然语言处理等领域的成功很大程度上依赖于高质量的基准测试，但生物物理数据领域缺乏这样的基准。现有的基准往往过于关注模拟真实的生物物理数据，而作者认为应当将生物物理问题抽象为具有关键几何相似性的简化问题，从而创建更有价值的测试函数。

Method: 提出了一类名为Ehrlich函数的闭式测试函数，用于生物物理序列优化。这些函数通过抽象生物物理问题的关键几何特征来构建，而不是直接模拟真实的生物物理数据。采用标准遗传优化算法作为基线来评估这些函数的难度。

Result: 实验表明Ehrlich函数是值得研究的有趣对象，并且对于标准遗传优化基线来说具有一定的非平凡难度，不能轻易求解。

Conclusion: Ehrlich函数可以作为生物物理序列优化领域的有价值的基准测试工具，填补了该领域缺乏好基准的空白。通过抽象而非模拟的方法来构建基准是可行的，并且能够产生具有挑战性的测试问题。

Abstract: There is a growing body of work seeking to replicate the success of machine learning (ML) on domains like computer vision (CV) and natural language processing (NLP) to applications involving biophysical data. One of the key ingredients of prior successes in CV and NLP was the broad acceptance of difficult benchmarks that distilled key subproblems into approachable tasks that any junior researcher could investigate, but good benchmarks for biophysical domains are rare. This scarcity is partially due to a narrow focus on benchmarks which simulate biophysical data; we propose instead to carefully abstract biophysical problems into simpler ones with key geometric similarities. In particular we propose a new class of closed-form test functions for biophysical sequence optimization, which we call Ehrlich functions. We provide empirical results demonstrating these functions are interesting objects of study and can be non-trivial to solve with a standard genetic optimization baseline.

</details>


### [378] [Reproducibility Study Of Learning Fair Graph Representations Via Automated Data Augmentations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00421)
*Thijmen Nijdam,Juell Sprott,Taiki Papandreou-Lazos,Jurgen de Heus*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文对Ling等人(2022)提出的Graphair框架进行了可重复性分析，部分复现了其三个原始声明中的一个，完全验证了另外两个，并将Graphair从节点分类任务扩展到链接预测任务，发现在混合二元级公平性方面表现相当，但在子组二元级公平性方面具有更优的公平-准确率权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 验证Ling等人(2022)提出的'Learning Fair Graph Representations Via Automated Data Augmentations'中关于节点分类任务的核心声明的可重复性，并探索Graphair框架在链接预测任务中的性能表现，以评估其更广泛的应用潜力。

Method: 对Graphair框架进行可重复性分析，在节点分类任务中复现原始声明的三个核心主张；同时将Graphair扩展应用于链接预测任务，在多个数据集上评估其在混合二元级公平性和子组二元级公平性两个维度上的公平-准确率权衡表现。

Result: 部分复现了原始三个声明中的一个，完全验证了另外两个；在链接预测任务中，Graphair在混合二元级公平性上达到与基线模型相当的公平-准确率权衡，在子组二元级公平性上则表现出更优的权衡性能。

Conclusion: Graphair框架在节点分类任务中的核心声明基本可重复，且该框架可成功扩展至链接预测任务，尤其在子组二元级公平性方面具有优势，展现了其在图学习领域更广泛应用的潜力。

Abstract: In this study, we undertake a reproducibility analysis of 'Learning Fair Graph Representations Via Automated Data Augmentations' by Ling et al. (2022). We assess the validity of the original claims focused on node classification tasks and explore the performance of the Graphair framework in link prediction tasks. Our investigation reveals that we can partially reproduce one of the original three claims and fully substantiate the other two. Additionally, we broaden the application of Graphair from node classification to link prediction across various datasets. Our findings indicate that, while Graphair demonstrates a comparable fairness-accuracy trade-off to baseline models for mixed dyadic-level fairness, it has a superior trade-off for subgroup dyadic-level fairness. These findings underscore Graphair's potential for wider adoption in graph-based learning. Our code base can be found on GitHub at https://github.com/juellsprott/graphair-reproducibility.

</details>


### [379] [Enhancing Accuracy and Parameter-Efficiency of Neural Representations for Network Parameterization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00356)
*Hongjun Choi,Jayaraman J. Thiagarajan,Ruben Glatt,Shusen Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了利用预测网络对神经网络权重进行参数化时，准确率与参数效率之间的基本权衡。发现仅通过权重重建目标即可有效恢复原始模型准确率，并提出了一种将重建目标与辅助目标（如知识蒸馏）解耦的新型训练方案，在准确率和参数效率上均优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究神经网络权重参数化中预测网络的准确率与参数效率之间的基本权衡关系。

Method: 通过权重重建目标恢复模型准确率，并提出将重建目标与知识蒸馏等辅助目标解耦的新型训练方案。

Result: 仅权重重建目标即可有效恢复原始模型准确率；解耦训练方案在准确率和参数效率上均显著优于现有方法。

Conclusion: 为同时提升模型准确率和预测网络参数效率的实际场景铺平了道路。

Abstract: In this work, we investigate the fundamental trade-off regarding accuracy and parameter efficiency in the parameterization of neural network weights using predictor networks. We present a surprising finding that, when recovering the original model accuracy is the sole objective, it can be achieved effectively through the weight reconstruction objective alone. Additionally, we explore the underlying factors for improving weight reconstruction under parameter-efficiency constraints, and propose a novel training scheme that decouples the reconstruction objective from auxiliary objectives such as knowledge distillation that leads to significant improvements compared to state-of-the-art approaches. Finally, these results pave way for more practical scenarios, where one needs to achieve improvements on both model accuracy and predictor network parameter-efficiency simultaneously.

</details>


### [380] [Breaking Down Financial News Impact: A Novel AI Approach with Geometric Hypergraphs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00438)
*Anoushka Harit,Zhongtian Sun,Jongmin Yu,Noura Al Moubayed*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于几何超图注意力网络（GHAN）的可解释人工智能方法，通过捕捉金融新闻与市场行为之间的高阶关系，结合BERT语义嵌入和注意力机制，实现了比传统模型更优的股票市场预测性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统模型难以捕捉金融新闻与市场反应之间复杂、动态的高阶关系（如一条新闻同时影响多只股票或多个行业），且缺乏可解释性，限制了其提供可操作洞察的能力。

Method: 提出几何超图注意力网络（GHAN），利用超图（超边连接多个节点）建模高阶关系，结合注意力机制聚焦关键信息，采用BERT嵌入提取新闻文本语义，并引入SHAP值增强模型可解释性。

Result: 实证验证表明，GHAN在股票市场预测性能上优于传统情感分析和时间序列模型。

Conclusion: GHAN通过超图结构和高阶关系建模，结合可解释性技术，有效解决了金融新闻影响分析中的关键挑战，为金融市场预测提供了更准确、透明的解决方案。

Abstract: In the fast-paced and volatile financial markets, accurately predicting stock movements based on financial news is critical for investors and analysts. Traditional models often struggle to capture the intricate and dynamic relationships between news events and market reactions, limiting their ability to provide actionable insights. This paper introduces a novel approach leveraging Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) through the development of a Geometric Hypergraph Attention Network (GHAN) to analyze the impact of financial news on market behaviours. Geometric hypergraphs extend traditional graph structures by allowing edges to connect multiple nodes, effectively modelling high-order relationships and interactions among financial entities and news events. This unique capability enables the capture of complex dependencies, such as the simultaneous impact of a single news event on multiple stocks or sectors, which traditional models frequently overlook.
  By incorporating attention mechanisms within hypergraphs, GHAN enhances the model's ability to focus on the most relevant information, ensuring more accurate predictions and better interpretability. Additionally, we employ BERT-based embeddings to capture the semantic richness of financial news texts, providing a nuanced understanding of the content. Using a comprehensive financial news dataset, our GHAN model addresses key challenges in financial news impact analysis, including the complexity of high-order interactions, the necessity for model interpretability, and the dynamic nature of financial markets. Integrating attention mechanisms and SHAP values within GHAN ensures transparency, highlighting the most influential factors driving market predictions.
  Empirical validation demonstrates the superior effectiveness of our approach over traditional sentiment analysis and time-series models.

</details>


### [381] [A Systematic Review on Long-Tailed Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00483)
*Chongsheng Zhang,George Almpanidis,Gaojuan Fan,Binquan Deng,Yanbo Zhang,Ji Liu,Aouaidjia Kamel,Paolo Soda,João Gama*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文对长尾视觉学习进行了全面综述，提出了包含数据平衡、神经架构、特征增强、logits调整、损失函数、技巧性改进、网络优化和事后处理技术八个维度的分类体系，系统回顾了各类方法，并讨论了未来研究方向。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长尾数据是特殊的多元不平衡数据，其中少量头部类别占据大部分样本，大量尾部类别样本稀疏但总体影响显著。构建能在长尾分布数据上对所有类别（尤其是尾部类别）实现高精度识别的模型是重要的研究挑战，近年来吸引了大量研究关注，因此需要系统性的综述来梳理进展。

Method: 提出八维分类体系（数据平衡、神经架构、特征增强、logits调整、损失函数、技巧性改进、网络优化、事后处理技术），基于此分类法对现有长尾学习方法进行系统性回顾，分析各方法的共性与差异，并对比不平衡学习与长尾学习的区别。

Result: 构建了一个涵盖八维度的长尾学习分类法，对各类方法进行了系统梳理与对比分析，揭示了方法间的共性和差异。

Conclusion: 长尾视觉学习是前沿研究领域，现有方法可从八个维度系统归类；不平衡学习与长尾学习存在本质差异；未来仍有诸多值得探索的方向。

Abstract: Long-tailed data is a special type of multi-class imbalanced data with a very large amount of minority/tail classes that have a very significant combined influence. Long-tailed learning aims to build high-performance models on datasets with long-tailed distributions, which can identify all the classes with high accuracy, in particular the minority/tail classes. It is a cutting-edge research direction that has attracted a remarkable amount of research effort in the past few years. In this paper, we present a comprehensive survey of latest advances in long-tailed visual learning. We first propose a new taxonomy for long-tailed learning, which consists of eight different dimensions, including data balancing, neural architecture, feature enrichment, logits adjustment, loss function, bells and whistles, network optimization, and post hoc processing techniques. Based on our proposed taxonomy, we present a systematic review of long-tailed learning methods, discussing their commonalities and alignable differences. We also analyze the differences between imbalance learning and long-tailed learning approaches. Finally, we discuss prospects and future directions in this field.

</details>


### [382] [Axiomatization of Gradient Smoothing in Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00371)
*Linjiang Zhou,Xiaochuan Shi,Chao Ma,Zepeng Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于函数磨光（mollification）和蒙特卡洛积分的梯度平滑理论框架，从本质上公理化地解释了神经网络中梯度平滑的原理，并揭示了现有方法的理论基础。基于该框架，作者还设计了新的平滑方法，实验验证了其研究潜力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 神经网络原始梯度包含大量噪声，虽然已有多种平滑方法被提出，但缺乏对梯度平滑背后原理的系统性讨论和理论解释。

Method: 基于函数磨光（function mollification）和蒙特卡洛积分（Monte Carlo integration）构建梯度平滑理论框架，从公理化角度揭示梯度平滑的本质，并基于该框架设计新的平滑方法。

Result: 通过实验测量多种新设计的平滑方法，验证了所提出框架的研究潜力和有效性。

Conclusion: 该理论框架不仅公理化地解释了现有梯度平滑方法的内在原理，还为设计新的梯度平滑方法提供了系统性的指导路径，具有重要的研究价值。

Abstract: Gradients play a pivotal role in neural networks explanation. The inherent high dimensionality and structural complexity of neural networks result in the original gradients containing a significant amount of noise. While several approaches were proposed to reduce noise with smoothing, there is little discussion of the rationale behind smoothing gradients in neural networks. In this work, we proposed a gradient smooth theoretical framework for neural networks based on the function mollification and Monte Carlo integration. The framework intrinsically axiomatized gradient smoothing and reveals the rationale of existing methods. Furthermore, we provided an approach to design new smooth methods derived from the framework. By experimental measurement of several newly designed smooth methods, we demonstrated the research potential of our framework.

</details>


### [383] [PSLF: A PID Controller-incorporated Second-order Latent Factor Analysis Model for Recommender System](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00448)
*Jialiang Wang,Yan Xia,Ye Yuan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 针对二阶潜因子模型收敛慢的问题，本文提出融合PID控制器原理的PSLF模型，通过改进学习误差估计和利用Hessian-向量积获取二阶信息，在多个高维不完全交互数据上实现了更优的收敛速度和泛化性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 二阶潜因子模型在HDI数据上表现优异，但其双线性非凸目标函数导致收敛速度慢，需提升优化效率。

Method: a) 引入PID控制器原理优化学习误差估计；b) 通过Hessian-向量积获取二阶信息。

Result: 在多个HDI数据集上，PSLF在收敛速度和泛化性能上均优于四种基于先进优化器的SOTA潜因子模型。

Conclusion: PID控制器与二阶信息的结合能有效加速SLF模型的收敛并提升泛化能力。

Abstract: A second-order-based latent factor (SLF) analysis model demonstrates superior performance in graph representation learning, particularly for high-dimensional and incomplete (HDI) interaction data, by incorporating the curvature information of the loss landscape. However, its objective function is commonly bi-linear and non-convex, causing the SLF model to suffer from a low convergence rate. To address this issue, this paper proposes a PID controller-incorporated SLF (PSLF) model, leveraging two key strategies: a) refining learning error estimation by incorporating the PID controller principles, and b) acquiring second-order information insights through Hessian-vector products. Experimental results on multiple HDI datasets indicate that the proposed PSLF model outperforms four state-of-the-art latent factor models based on advanced optimizers regarding convergence rates and generalization performance.

</details>


### [384] [Block-Operations: Using Modular Routing to Improve Compositional Generalization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00508)
*Florian Dietz,Dietrich Klakow*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出块操作（block-operations）概念，通过将网络中的激活张量均匀分块并引入归纳偏置促进模块化路由与修改，以此解决神经网络组合泛化能力差的问题。基于此设计了Multiplexer组件增强前馈神经网络，实验表明其在合成与真实任务上均能学习底层过程，而FNN和Transformer仅学到启发式近似。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 神经网络的组合泛化能力差，作者推测根本原因在于网络难以学习有效的路由机制。

Method: 提出块操作概念：将所有激活张量均匀分块，通过归纳偏置鼓励模块化路由与修改；基于此设计Multiplexer组件来增强FNN。

Result: 在合成任务和真实任务上，Multiplexer均能学习任务背后的底层过程，而FNN和Transformer仅学到启发式近似，证明了其强大的组合泛化能力。

Conclusion: 块操作原理可用于改进其他现有架构，提升组合泛化能力。

Abstract: We explore the hypothesis that poor compositional generalization in neural networks is caused by difficulties with learning effective routing. To solve this problem, we propose the concept of block-operations, which is based on splitting all activation tensors in the network into uniformly sized blocks and using an inductive bias to encourage modular routing and modification of these blocks. Based on this concept we introduce the Multiplexer, a new architectural component that enhances the Feed Forward Neural Network (FNN). We experimentally confirm that Multiplexers exhibit strong compositional generalization. On both a synthetic and a realistic task our model was able to learn the underlying process behind the task, whereas both FNNs and Transformers were only able to learn heuristic approximations. We propose as future work to use the principles of block-operations to improve other existing architectures.

</details>


### [385] [Learning Time-Varying Multi-Region Brain Communications via Scalable Markovian Gaussian Processes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00397)
*Weihan Li,Yule Wang,Chengrui Li,Anqi Wu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于马尔可夫高斯过程的自适应延迟模型（ADM），用于从多区域神经记录中学习具有时变时间延迟的脑通信，能够高效扩展到大数据集并捕捉认知过程中脑区交互的动态变化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前方法难以捕捉多脑区之间随时间变化的通信模式，也无法扩展到长时程、大规模的神经记录数据集，亟需一种既能发现时变区域级通信又具备可扩展性的方法。

Method: 将高斯过程与状态空间模型相结合，采用并行扫描推理算法实现高效推理，构建自适应延迟模型（ADM）来学习具有时变时间延迟的多区域神经通信。

Result: 在合成数据集和多区域神经记录数据集上验证，该方法成功发现了神经通信的方向性和时间动态特性。

Conclusion: 该工作推进了对分布式神经计算的理解，并为分析动态脑网络提供了可扩展的工具。

Abstract: Understanding and constructing brain communications that capture dynamic communications across multiple regions is fundamental to modern system neuroscience, yet current methods struggle to find time-varying region-level communications or scale to large neural datasets with long recording durations. We present a novel framework using Markovian Gaussian Processes to learn brain communications with time-varying temporal delays from multi-region neural recordings, named Adaptive Delay Model (ADM). Our method combines Gaussian Processes with State Space Models and employs parallel scan inference algorithms, enabling efficient scaling to large datasets while identifying concurrent communication patterns that evolve over time. This time-varying approach captures how brain region interactions shift dynamically during cognitive processes. Validated on synthetic and multi-region neural recordings datasets, our approach discovers both the directionality and temporal dynamics of neural communication. This work advances our understanding of distributed neural computation and provides a scalable tool for analyzing dynamic brain networks.

</details>


### [386] [Advancing Machine Learning in Industry 4.0: Benchmark Framework for Rare-event Prediction in Chemical Processes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00485)
*Vikram Sudarshan,Warren D. Seider*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种用于稀有事件预测的新型基准框架，系统比较了从线性SVR到深度神经网络等多种机器学习算法，通过综合性能指标（RMSE、计算时间、报警效率等）评估各算法在基于前向通量采样的多变量报警系统中的表现，旨在提升工业过程安全性与可靠性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在工业过程中，罕见异常事件的预测对安全运营至关重要。此前已利用前向通量采样（FFS）和机器学习开发了多变量报警系统，但缺乏对不同ML算法在该场景下性能的系统比较。本文旨在填补这一空白，建立一个全面的基准框架，以识别最优ML策略。

Method: 构建了一个综合基准框架，比较了多种ML算法：线性支持向量回归（Linear SVR）、k近邻（KNN）、随机森林（RF）、XGBoost、LightGBM、CatBoost、密集神经网络（DNN）和TabNet。使用RMSE、模型训练/测试/超参数调优时间、部署时间以及报警数量和效率等指标进行评估，平衡模型精度、计算效率和报警系统效率。

Result: 通过多维度性能指标系统评估了各ML算法在稀有事件预测中的表现，识别出了平衡精度与计算效率的最优策略，为工业安全应用提供了指导。

Conclusion: 该基准框架能够有效评估不同复杂度的ML算法在基于FFS的稀有事件预测中的表现，帮助选择最佳ML策略，从而提高工业过程的安全性和可靠性，减少未假设的异常事件风险。

Abstract: Previously, using forward-flux sampling (FFS) and machine learning (ML), we developed multivariate alarm systems to counter rare un-postulated abnormal events. Our alarm systems utilized ML-based predictive models to quantify committer probabilities as functions of key process variables (e.g., temperature, concentrations, and the like), with these data obtained in FFS simulations. Herein, we introduce a novel and comprehensive benchmark framework for rare-event prediction, comparing ML algorithms of varying complexity, including Linear Support-Vector Regressor and k-Nearest Neighbors, to more sophisticated algorithms, such as Random Forests, XGBoost, LightGBM, CatBoost, Dense Neural Networks, and TabNet. This evaluation uses comprehensive performance metrics, such as: $\textit{RMSE}$, model training, testing, hyperparameter tuning and deployment times, and number and efficiency of alarms. These balance model accuracy, computational efficiency, and alarm-system efficiency, identifying optimal ML strategies for predicting abnormal rare events, enabling operators to obtain safer and more reliable plant operations.

</details>


### [387] [VecAug: Unveiling Camouflaged Frauds with Cohort Augmentation for Enhanced Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00513)
*Fei Xiao,Shaofeng Cai,Gang Chen,H. V. Jagadish,Beng Chin Ooi,Meihui Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: VecAug是一种新颖的队列增强学习框架，通过向量老化技术自动识别任务特定队列，并利用注意力机制聚合队列信息，结合标签感知的队列邻居分离机制，增强目标用户表示，从而提高欺诈检测性能。在电商平台上，该方法将AUC提升高达2.48%，R@P0.9提升22.5%，显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 欺诈检测面临欺诈模式不断演变和标注数据稀缺的挑战。现有图方法易受欺诈者操纵连接，序列方法虽鲁棒但忽略用户间交互。受留存分析和医疗领域队列分析启发，本文提出队列增强学习框架VecAug，旨在结合两种方法的优势，提升欺诈检测性能。

Method: 1) 提出向量老化技术（vector burn-in）自动为每个目标用户识别任务特定队列；2) 引入注意力队列聚合技术增强目标用户表示；3) 提出标签感知的队列邻居分离机制，拉远负样本队列邻居，校准聚合的队列信息；4) 将增强后的队列信息与目标用户表示集成，提升模型的建模能力和泛化能力。

Result: 在电商平台的三个欺诈检测数据集上，VecAug将基线的AUC提升最多2.48%，R@P0.9提升最多22.5%，显著优于现有最先进方法。

Conclusion: VecAug是一种灵活、可无缝集成到现有欺诈检测模型的队列增强框架，通过队列信息增强目标用户表示，有效提升了模型的建模能力和泛化能力，在欺诈检测任务上取得了显著性能提升。

Abstract: Fraud detection presents a challenging task characterized by ever-evolving fraud patterns and scarce labeled data. Existing methods predominantly rely on graph-based or sequence-based approaches. While graph-based approaches connect users through shared entities to capture structural information, they remain vulnerable to fraudsters who can disrupt or manipulate these connections. In contrast, sequence-based approaches analyze users' behavioral patterns, offering robustness against tampering but overlooking the interactions between similar users. Inspired by cohort analysis in retention and healthcare, this paper introduces VecAug, a novel cohort-augmented learning framework that addresses these challenges by enhancing the representation learning of target users with personalized cohort information. To this end, we first propose a vector burn-in technique for automatic cohort identification, which retrieves a task-specific cohort for each target user. Then, to fully exploit the cohort information, we introduce an attentive cohort aggregation technique for augmenting target user representations. To improve the robustness of such cohort augmentation, we also propose a novel label-aware cohort neighbor separation mechanism to distance negative cohort neighbors and calibrate the aggregated cohort information. By integrating this cohort information with target user representations, VecAug enhances the modeling capacity and generalization capabilities of the model to be augmented. Our framework is flexible and can be seamlessly integrated with existing fraud detection models. We deploy our framework on e-commerce platforms and evaluate it on three fraud detection datasets, and results show that VecAug improves the detection performance of base models by up to 2.48\% in AUC and 22.5\% in R@P$_{0.9}$, outperforming state-of-the-art methods significantly.

</details>


### [388] [Low-Power Vibration-Based Predictive Maintenance for Industry 4.0 using Neural Networks: A Survey](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00516)
*Alexandru Vasilache,Sven Nitzsche,Daniel Floegel,Tobias Schuermann,Stefan von Dosky,Thomas Bierweiler,Marvin Mußler,Florian Kälber,Soeren Hohmann,Juergen Becker*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文综述了SNN和ANN在基于振动传感器的预测性维护中的应用，发现缺乏标准基准数据集，SNN多采用浅层前馈架构，ANN则探索更广泛的模型和更深网络，并指出了低功耗硬件实现和标准化数据集方面的研究空白。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 工业4.0中智能传感器为低功耗预测性维护提供了机会，但传统的云端处理方法在能耗和存储方面成本高昂，因此需要探索适用于设备端低功耗计算的神经网络方法。

Method: 通过文献综述的方式，分析SNN和ANN在振动预测性维护中的应用，涵盖数据集、数据预处理、网络架构和硬件实现四个方面。

Result: 1) 缺乏满意的标准基准数据集；2) 频域变换是常用的预处理手段；3) SNN主要使用浅层前馈架构，ANN则探索更广泛的模型和更深网络；4) 硬件实现方面的研究不足。

Conclusion: 未来研究需要关注神经网络在低功耗预测性维护中的硬件实现，以及开发标准化的基准数据集。

Abstract: The advancements in smart sensors for Industry 4.0 offer ample opportunities for low-powered predictive maintenance and condition monitoring. However, traditional approaches in this field rely on processing in the cloud, which incurs high costs in energy and storage. This paper investigates the potential of neural networks for low-power on-device computation of vibration sensor data for predictive maintenance. We review the literature on Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) and Artificial Neuronal Networks (ANNs) for vibration-based predictive maintenance by analyzing datasets, data preprocessing, network architectures, and hardware implementations. Our findings suggest that no satisfactory standard benchmark dataset exists for evaluating neural networks in predictive maintenance tasks. Furthermore frequency domain transformations are commonly employed for preprocessing. SNNs mainly use shallow feed forward architectures, whereas ANNs explore a wider range of models and deeper networks. Finally, we highlight the need for future research on hardware implementations of neural networks for low-power predictive maintenance applications and the development of a standardized benchmark dataset.

</details>


### [389] [Explainability of Machine Learning Models under Missing Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00411)
*Tuan L. Vo,Thu Nguyen,Luis M. Lopez-Ramos,Hugo L. Hammer,Michael A. Riegler,Pal Halvorsen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文系统研究了缺失数据插补方法对SHAP可解释性的影响，发现插补方法的选择会引入偏差并改变Shapley值，且测试集MSE与Shapley值MSE并不一致；XGBoost直接处理缺失数据会严重损害可解释性，而数据预处理后的插补效果更好。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 缺失数据会显著影响模型性能与可解释性，但现有研究对插补方法如何影响基于Shapley值的模型解释缺乏系统评估，因此需要填补这一空白。

Method: 通过实验对比多种插补策略在SHAP上的影响，结合理论分析缺失值对Shapley值的作用机制，并评估插补方法对特征重要性和特征交互的影响。

Result: 插补方法的选择会引入偏差导致Shapley值改变；测试预测MSE与Shapley值MSE无正相关关系；XGBoost直接处理缺失数据会严重影响可解释性。

Conclusion: 研究强调了在模型解释中考虑插补效应的重要性，为基于数据集特征和分析目标选择合适插补技术提供了实践指导。

Abstract: Missing data is a prevalent issue that can significantly impair model performance and explainability. This paper briefly summarizes the development of the field of missing data with respect to Explainable Artificial Intelligence and experimentally investigates the effects of various imputation methods on SHAP (SHapley Additive exPlanations), a popular technique for explaining the output of complex machine learning models. Next, we compare different imputation strategies and assess their impact on feature importance and interaction as determined by Shapley values. Moreover, we also theoretically analyze the effects of missing values on Shapley values. Importantly, our findings reveal that the choice of imputation method can introduce biases that could lead to changes in the Shapley values, thereby affecting the explainability of the model. Moreover, we also show that a lower test prediction MSE (Mean Square Error) does not necessarily imply a lower MSE in Shapley values and vice versa. Also, while XGBoost (eXtreme Gradient Boosting) is a method that could handle missing data directly, using XGBoost directly on missing data can seriously affect explainability compared to imputing the data before training XGBoost. This study provides a comprehensive evaluation of imputation methods in the context of model explanations, offering practical guidance for selecting appropriate techniques based on dataset characteristics and analysis objectives. The results underscore the importance of considering imputation effects to ensure robust and reliable insights from machine learning models.

</details>


### [390] [Multi-Output Distributional Fairness via Post-Processing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00553)
*Gang Li,Qihang Lin,Ayush Ghosh,Tianbao Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种针对多输出模型（多任务/多类分类和表示学习）的后处理公平性方法，通过最优传输将不同组的模型输出映射到Wasserstein重心，实现分布奇偶性，并采用近似技术和核回归方法处理计算复杂度和样本外扩展问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有后处理方法大多针对单输出模型和特定任务的公平性度量，无法适用于多输出模型（如多任务分类、表示学习）的分布奇偶性这一任务无关的公平性度量。

Method: 利用最优传输映射将不同组的模型输出移动到经验Wasserstein重心，采用近似技术降低精确重心计算复杂度，并引入核回归方法将过程扩展到样本外数据。

Result: 在多任务分类、多类分类和表示学习任务上的实验表明，该方法优于多种基线方法，有效实现了公平性提升。

Conclusion: 提出的后处理方法成功将分布奇偶性公平性度量扩展到多输出模型，具有良好的有效性和可扩展性。

Abstract: The post-processing approaches are becoming prominent techniques to enhance machine learning models' fairness because of their intuitiveness, low computational cost, and excellent scalability. However, most existing post-processing methods are designed for task-specific fairness measures and are limited to single-output models. In this paper, we introduce a post-processing method for multi-output models, such as the ones used for multi-task/multi-class classification and representation learning, to enhance a model's distributional parity, a task-agnostic fairness measure. Existing methods for achieving distributional parity rely on the (inverse) cumulative density function of a model's output, restricting their applicability to single-output models. Extending previous works, we propose to employ optimal transport mappings to move a model's outputs across different groups towards their empirical Wasserstein barycenter. An approximation technique is applied to reduce the complexity of computing the exact barycenter and a kernel regression method is proposed to extend this process to out-of-sample data. Our empirical studies evaluate the proposed approach against various baselines on multi-task/multi-class classification and representation learning tasks, demonstrating the effectiveness of the proposed approach.

</details>


### [391] [Hilbert curves for efficient exploratory landscape analysis neighbourhood sampling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00526)
*Johannes J. Pienaar,Anna S. Bosman,Katherine M. Malan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出使用希尔伯特空间填充曲线作为高效获取有序样本的方法，用于计算优化问题的信息内容景观特征。相比拉丁超立方采样加最近邻排序，希尔伯特曲线能以更低计算成本提取显著特征，且在排序速度上显著优于最近邻算法而不损失特征显著性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 景观分析需要空间相关且覆盖良好的有序样本，但现有方法（如最近邻排序）在高维空间中计算成本过高，亟需更高效的替代方案。

Method: 采用希尔伯特空间填充曲线（一种分形曲线）作为采样器和排序策略，与拉丁超立方采样加最近邻后处理排序进行对比，评估计算效率和特征提取质量。

Result: 希尔伯特曲线作为采样器能以极低计算开销提取显著景观特征；作为排序策略，其排序速度显著快于最近邻排序，且不牺牲特征的显著性。

Conclusion: 希尔伯特空间填充曲线是高效且有效的景观分析工具，可用于生成有序样本，在高维优化问题中具有实用价值。

Abstract: Landscape analysis aims to characterise optimisation problems based on their objective (or fitness) function landscape properties. The problem search space is typically sampled, and various landscape features are estimated based on the samples. One particularly salient set of features is information content, which requires the samples to be sequences of neighbouring solutions, such that the local relationships between consecutive sample points are preserved. Generating such spatially correlated samples that also provide good search space coverage is challenging. It is therefore common to first obtain an unordered sample with good search space coverage, and then apply an ordering algorithm such as the nearest neighbour to minimise the distance between consecutive points in the sample. However, the nearest neighbour algorithm becomes computationally prohibitive in higher dimensions, thus there is a need for more efficient alternatives. In this study, Hilbert space-filling curves are proposed as a method to efficiently obtain high-quality ordered samples. Hilbert curves are a special case of fractal curves, and guarantee uniform coverage of a bounded search space while providing a spatially correlated sample. We study the effectiveness of Hilbert curves as samplers, and discover that they are capable of extracting salient features at a fraction of the computational cost compared to Latin hypercube sampling with post-factum ordering. Further, we investigate the use of Hilbert curves as an ordering strategy, and find that they order the sample significantly faster than the nearest neighbour ordering, without sacrificing the saliency of the extracted features.

</details>


### [392] [Contrastive Learning with Adaptive Neighborhoods for Brain Age Prediction on 3D Stiffness Maps](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00527)
*Jakob Träuble,Lucy Hiscox,Curtis Johnson,Carola-Bibiane Schönlieb,Gabriele Kaminski Schierle,Angelica Aviles-Rivero*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种动态局部对比损失函数，并首次将脑刚度（机械特性）引入自监督学习，用于脑年龄预测，在多个临床数据集上优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自监督学习方法在处理医学影像中非均匀分布数据时泛化能力不足，且传统方法仅利用结构特征，忽略了脑刚度这一对年龄变化敏感的机械特性。

Method: 提出一种在训练过程中动态调整的局部对比损失，聚焦样本的邻域信息；同时首次将脑刚度图（机械属性）作为输入特征，结合自监督学习进行脑年龄预测。

Result: 在多个临床研究的脑刚度图数据集上，该方法持续优于现有最先进方法，表现出更优越的预测性能。

Conclusion: 动态局部对比损失结合脑刚度特征为脑年龄预测提供了新方向，展示了自监督学习应用于脑机械属性的潜力。

Abstract: In the field of neuroimaging, accurate brain age prediction is pivotal for uncovering the complexities of brain aging and pinpointing early indicators of neurodegenerative conditions. Recent advancements in self-supervised learning, particularly in contrastive learning, have demonstrated greater robustness when dealing with complex datasets. However, current approaches often fall short in generalizing across non-uniformly distributed data, prevalent in medical imaging scenarios. To bridge this gap, we introduce a novel contrastive loss that adapts dynamically during the training process, focusing on the localized neighborhoods of samples. Moreover, we expand beyond traditional structural features by incorporating brain stiffness - a mechanical property previously underexplored yet promising due to its sensitivity to age-related changes. This work presents the first application of self-supervised learning to brain mechanical properties, using compiled stiffness maps from various clinical studies to predict brain age. Our approach, featuring dynamic localized loss, consistently outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods, demonstrating superior performance and paving the way for new directions in brain aging research.

</details>


### [393] [Time Series Clustering with General State Space Models via Stochastic Variational Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00429)
*Ryoichi Ishizuka,Takashi Imai,Kaoru Kawamoto*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于混合一般状态空间模型（MSSMs）的模型驱动时间序列聚类方法，利用随机变分推断和归一化流神经网络进行参数估计，并通过熵退火等优化技巧避免局部最优，首次实现了对一般（非线性、非高斯）状态空间模型的计算可行性聚类。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有时间序列聚类方法大多局限于特定类型的状态空间模型（如线性、高斯），缺乏对一般状态空间模型的通用且计算可行的聚类方案。作者旨在填补这一空白，提出一种能适用于任意状态空间模型（包括非线性、非高斯）的聚类方法，同时兼顾聚类精度、预测准确性和参数可解释性。

Method: 采用混合一般状态空间模型（MSSMs），每个分量对应一个聚类簇；使用随机变分推断（SVI）估计参数，并以归一化流神经网络作为变分估计器来估计任意状态空间模型的潜在变量；通过贝叶斯信息准则（BIC）估计聚类数量；引入熵退火等优化技巧防止收敛到局部最优。

Result: 在模拟数据集上的实验表明，所提方法在聚类、参数估计以及聚类数量估计方面均表现有效。

Conclusion: 该方法是首个计算可行的一般状态空间模型时间序列聚类方法，能够处理非线性、非高斯情况，为模型驱动的时间序列聚类提供了新的通用框架。

Abstract: In this paper, we propose a novel method of model-based time series clustering with mixtures of general state space models (MSSMs). Each component of MSSMs is associated with each cluster. An advantage of the proposed method is that it enables the use of time series models appropriate to the specific time series. This not only improves clustering and prediction accuracy but also enhances the interpretability of the estimated parameters. The parameters of the MSSMs are estimated using stochastic variational inference, a subtype of variational inference. The proposed method estimates the latent variables of an arbitrary state space model by using neural networks with a normalizing flow as a variational estimator. The number of clusters can be estimated using the Bayesian information criterion. In addition, to prevent MSSMs from converging to the local optimum, we propose several optimization tricks, including an additional penalty term called entropy annealing. To our best knowledge, the proposed method is the first computationally feasible one for time series clustering based on general (possibly nonlinear, non-Gaussian) state space models. Experiments on simulated datasets show that the proposed method is effective for clustering, parameter estimation, and estimating the number of clusters.

</details>


### [394] [Two-Stage Hierarchical and Explainable Feature Selection Framework for Dimensionality Reduction in Sleep Staging](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00565)
*Yangfan Deng,Hamad Albidah,Ahmed Dallal,Jijun Yin,Zhi-Hong Mao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种两阶段层次化可解释特征选择框架，结合拓扑数据分析提取EEG信号的拓扑特征，解决了睡眠阶段数据的高维可视化与聚类难题。实验表明，拓扑特征是对传统频谱时域特征的有效补充，并在三种降维算法比较中，UMAP在计算资源与指标综合表现上最优，t-SNE准确率最高（79.8%）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: EEG信号数据序列具有高维特性，导致不同睡眠阶段的数据可视化和聚类成为挑战。传统频谱时域分析方法存在结构信息丢失的问题，亟需一种能够保留高维数据结构的特征提取与降维方法。

Method: 提出两阶段层次化可解释特征选择框架，结合特征选择算法提升降维性能；引入拓扑数据分析（TDA）从EEG信号中提取拓扑特征，补偿传统频谱时域分析中的结构信息损失；对比PCA、t-SNE和UMAP三种降维算法的性能。

Result: 拓扑特征被证明是传统特征的有效补充；t-SNE分类准确率最高（79.8%）；但综合考虑计算资源与各项指标，UMAP为最优选择。

Conclusion: 拓扑特征能有效补偿传统频谱时域分析的信息损失，提升睡眠阶段分类性能；UMAP在整体性能权衡上优于t-SNE和PCA，是更实用的降维方案。

Abstract: Sleep is crucial for human health, and EEG signals play a significant role in sleep research. Due to the high-dimensional nature of EEG signal data sequences, data visualization and clustering of different sleep stages have been challenges. To address these issues, we propose a two-stage hierarchical and explainable feature selection framework by incorporating a feature selection algorithm to improve the performance of dimensionality reduction. Inspired by topological data analysis, which can analyze the structure of high-dimensional data, we extract topological features from the EEG signals to compensate for the structural information loss that happens in traditional spectro-temporal data analysis. Supported by the topological visualization of the data from different sleep stages and the classification results, the proposed features are proven to be effective supplements to traditional features. Finally, we compare the performances of three dimensionality reduction algorithms: Principal Component Analysis (PCA), t-Distributed Stochastic Neighbor Embedding (t-SNE), and Uniform Manifold Approximation and Projection (UMAP). Among them, t-SNE achieved the highest accuracy of 79.8%, but considering the overall performance in terms of computational resources and metrics, UMAP is the optimal choice.

</details>


### [395] [ReSi: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Representational Similarity Measures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00531)
*Max Klabunde,Tassilo Wald,Tobias Schumacher,Klaus Maier-Hein,Markus Strohmaier,Florian Lemmerich*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了首个基于严格相似性定义的表示相似性综合基准（ReSi benchmark），包含6项测试、24种相似性度量、14种神经网络架构和7个数据集，覆盖图、语言和视觉领域，旨在系统评估和促进神经架构表示相似性研究。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 测量不同神经架构表示的相似性是机器学习领域的基础任务和开放挑战，但目前缺乏一个基于严格相似性定义的综合评估基准。

Method: 构建了ReSi基准，包含六项精心设计的相似性度量测试、24种相似性度量方法、14种神经网络架构和7个跨图/语言/视觉领域的数据集。

Result: 通过在不同神经网络架构、真实世界数据集和相似性度量上的实验，验证了ReSi基准的实用性。

Conclusion: ReSi基准为系统评估现有和探索新的神经架构表示比较方法提供了一个可靠的平台，所有组件已公开，支持可扩展和可复现的研究。

Abstract: Measuring the similarity of different representations of neural architectures is a fundamental task and an open research challenge for the machine learning community. This paper presents the first comprehensive benchmark for evaluating representational similarity measures based on well-defined groundings of similarity. The representational similarity (ReSi) benchmark consists of (i) six carefully designed tests for similarity measures, (ii) 24 similarity measures, (iii) 14 neural network architectures, and (iv) seven datasets, spanning over the graph, language, and vision domains. The benchmark opens up several important avenues of research on representational similarity that enable novel explorations and applications of neural architectures. We demonstrate the utility of the ReSi benchmark by conducting experiments on various neural network architectures, real world datasets and similarity measures. All components of the benchmark are publicly available and thereby facilitate systematic reproduction and production of research results. The benchmark is extensible, future research can build on and further expand it. We believe that the ReSi benchmark can serve as a sound platform catalyzing future research that aims to systematically evaluate existing and explore novel ways of comparing representations of neural architectures.

</details>


### [396] [Fully tensorial approach to hypercomplex-valued neural networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00449)
*Agnieszka Niemczynowicz,Radosław Antoni Kycia*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个全张量理论框架，用于超复数神经网络。核心思想是将代数乘法表示为秩三张量，从而通过标准张量操作统一描述任意有限维代数上的神经网络层（包括全连接和卷积层）。该框架与现有深度学习库兼容，并通过建立通用逼近定理为超复数感知器提供了理论基础。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有超复数神经网络（如四元数、八元数网络）通常针对特定代数设计，缺乏统一的理论框架。本文旨在提出一个通用的张量形式化方法，使得神经网络架构能够自然地处理任意有限维代数上的数据，从而扩展超复数神经网络的设计空间并建立严格的理论基础。

Method: 1) 将代数乘法表示为秩三张量，将神经网络层中的所有代数运算转化为标准张量收缩、置换和重塑操作。2) 基于此张量形式化，统一描述超复数密集层和卷积层，并与现代深度学习库兼容。3) 在温和的非退化假设下，证明了基于张量的单层超复数感知器的通用逼近定理。

Result: 1) 提出的张量框架统一了超复数密度层和卷积层的描述，且与现有深度学习库兼容。2) 该框架将四维代数的现有构造作为特例恢复。3) 在温和非退化假设下，建立了单层超复数感知器的张量版本通用逼近定理。

Conclusion: 该工作为超复数神经网络提供了统一的张量理论框架，使得网络架构可适用于任意有限维代数，并通过通用逼近定理提供了严格的理论保证。该框架具有维度无关性和计算兼容性，有望推动超复数神经网络在更广泛领域的应用。

Abstract: A fully tensorial theoretical framework for hypercomplex-valued neural networks is presented. The proposed approach enables neural network architectures to operate on data defined over arbitrary finite-dimensional algebras. The central observation is that algebra multiplication can be represented by a rank-three tensor, which allows all algebraic operations in neural network layers to be formulated in terms of standard tensor contractions, permutations, and reshaping operations.
  This tensor-based formulation provides a unified and dimension-independent description of hypercomplex-valued dense and convolutional layers and is directly compatible with modern deep learning libraries supporting optimized tensor operations. The proposed framework recovers existing constructions for four-dimensional algebras as a special case.
  Within this setting, a tensor-based version of the universal approximation theorem for single-layer hypercomplex-valued perceptrons is established under mild non-degeneracy assumptions on the underlying algebra, thereby providing a rigorous theoretical foundation for the considered class of neural networks.

</details>


### [397] [Online Optimization for Learning to Communicate over Time-Correlated Channels](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00575)
*Zheshun Wu,Junfan Li,Zenglin Xu,Sumei Sun,Jie Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了在时间相关信道（非I.I.D.）下的在线通信学习问题，提出了基于乐观在线镜像下降的两种优化算法，分别用于信道解码器优化和码本选择，理论推导出次线性遗憾界，实验验证了比基线方法更低的平均符号错误率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于学习的通信系统理论保证多基于I.I.D.信道假设，这与实际场景中信道的时间相关性不符，缺乏在非I.I.D.信道下的在线优化理论分析。

Method: 1) 放弃I.I.D.信道假设，将学习通信建模为在线优化问题；2) 聚焦两个任务：时间相关衰落信道的解码器优化、时间相关加性噪声信道的码本选择；3) 基于乐观在线镜像下降框架设计两种在线优化算法，利用信道的时间依赖性进行学习。

Result: 推导了所提算法的次线性遗憾界（关于期望错误概率），实验表明利用信道相关性可取得比基线方法更低的平均符号错误率，与理论结果一致。

Conclusion: 在非I.I.D.时间相关信道下，通过在线优化方法可以有效利用信道的时间依赖性进行通信学习，算法具有理论保证且实验性能优于基线。

Abstract: Machine learning techniques have garnered great interest in designing communication systems owing to their capacity in tackling with channel uncertainty. To provide theoretical guarantees for learning-based communication systems, some recent works analyze generalization bounds for devised methods based on the assumption of Independently and Identically Distributed (I.I.D.) channels, a condition rarely met in practical scenarios. In this paper, we drop the I.I.D. channel assumption and study an online optimization problem of learning to communicate over time-correlated channels. To address this issue, we further focus on two specific tasks: optimizing channel decoders for time-correlated fading channels and selecting optimal codebooks for time-correlated additive noise channels. For utilizing temporal dependence of considered channels to better learn communication systems, we develop two online optimization algorithms based on the optimistic online mirror descent framework. Furthermore, we provide theoretical guarantees for proposed algorithms via deriving sub-linear regret bound on the expected error probability of learned systems. Extensive simulation experiments have been conducted to validate that our presented approaches can leverage the channel correlation to achieve a lower average symbol error rate compared to baseline methods, consistent with our theoretical findings.

</details>


### [398] [Convergence Analysis of Natural Gradient Descent for Over-parameterized Physics-Informed Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00573)
*Xianliang Xu,Ting Du,Wang Kong,Bin Shan,Ye Li,Zhongyi Huang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了过参数化下两层ReLU³物理信息神经网络（PINNs）的训练收敛性。证明了梯度下降（GD）的学习率可从传统的𝒪(λ₀)提升至𝒪(1/‖H^∞‖₂)，从而加速收敛。进一步，针对一般平滑激活函数证明了Gram矩阵的正定性，并提出了自然梯度下降（NGD）的收敛分析，表明其学习率可达𝒪(1)且收敛率与Gram矩阵无关，对于平滑激活函数收敛率为二次的。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究表明随机初始化的梯度下降在过参数化下能以线性速率收敛到全局最优，但两层神经网络训练中学习率对样本量和Gram矩阵的依赖较差，导致训练缓慢。本文旨在改进PINNs训练的学习率，并探索自然梯度下降方法以实现更优的收敛性能。

Method: 理论分析了两层ReLU³ PINNs中GD的学习率改进（从𝒪(λ₀)到𝒪(1/‖H^∞‖₂)）；证明了平滑激活函数下Gram矩阵的正定性；提出了NGD的收敛性分析框架，展示其学习率为𝒪(1)且收敛率与Gram矩阵解耦；辅以数值实验验证。

Result: GD的学习率从𝒪(λ₀)提升至𝒪(1/‖H^∞‖₂)；NGD的学习率可达𝒪(1)，收敛率与Gram矩阵无关；对于平滑激活函数，NGD的收敛率为二次的。

Conclusion: 通过改进GD学习率并引入NGD，显著提升了PINNs的训练效率，NGD在平滑激活函数下可实现与Gram矩阵无关的二次收敛速率。

Abstract: In the context of over-parameterization, there is a line of work demonstrating that randomly initialized (stochastic) gradient descent (GD) converges to a globally optimal solution at a linear convergence rate for the quadratic loss function. However, the learning rate of GD for training two-layer neural networks exhibits poor dependence on the sample size and the Gram matrix, leading to a slow training process. In this paper, we show that for training two-layer $\text{ReLU}^3$ Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs), the learning rate can be improved from $\mathcal{O}(λ_0)$ to $\mathcal{O}(1/\|\bm{H}^{\infty}\|_2)$, implying that GD actually enjoys a faster convergence rate. Despite such improvements, the convergence rate is still tied to the least eigenvalue of the Gram matrix, leading to slow convergence. We then develop the positive definiteness of Gram matrices with general smooth activation functions and provide the convergence analysis of natural gradient descent (NGD) in training two-layer PINNs, demonstrating that the learning rate can be $\mathcal{O}(1)$ and at this rate, the convergence rate is independent of the Gram matrix. In particular, for smooth activation functions, the convergence rate of NGD is quadratic. Numerical experiments are conducted to verify our theoretical results.

</details>


### [399] [Open-Source Conversational AI with SpeechBrain 1.0](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00463)
*Mirco Ravanelli,Titouan Parcollet,Adel Moumen,Sylvain de Langen,Cem Subakan,Peter Plantinga,Yingzhi Wang,Pooneh Mousavi,Luca Della Libera,Artem Ploujnikov,Francesco Paissan,Davide Borra,Salah Zaiem,Zeyu Zhao,Shucong Zhang,Georgios Karakasidis,Sung-Lin Yeh,Pierre Champion,Aku Rouhe,Rudolf Braun,Florian Mai,Juan Zuluaga-Gomez,Seyed Mahed Mousavi,Andreas Nautsch,Ha Nguyen,Xuechen Liu,Sangeet Sagar,Jarod Duret,Salima Mdhaffar,Gaelle Laperriere,Mickael Rouvier,Renato De Mori,Yannick Esteve*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SpeechBrain 1.0是一个基于PyTorch的开源对话式AI工具包，专注于语音处理任务，提供200+训练配方和100+预训练模型，支持多种学习模态、LLM集成和高级解码策略，并包含新的基准测试平台。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 促进语音处理领域的透明度和可复现性，通过开源预训练模型和完整的训练配方，降低研究门槛，推动对话式AI发展。

Method: 基于PyTorch构建开源工具包，集成多种语音处理任务的训练配方，支持LLM集成、多模态学习和高级解码策略，提供基准测试平台。

Result: SpeechBrain 1.0包含200+训练配方和100+预训练模型，支持语音识别、语音增强、说话人识别、文本转语音等多种任务，并引入新基准测试平台。

Conclusion: SpeechBrain 1.0是对话式AI工具包的重要里程碑，通过丰富的配方和模型资源，结合LLM集成和多模态支持，为语音处理研究提供了统一且可复现的平台。

Abstract: SpeechBrain is an open-source Conversational AI toolkit based on PyTorch, focused particularly on speech processing tasks such as speech recognition, speech enhancement, speaker recognition, text-to-speech, and much more. It promotes transparency and replicability by releasing both the pre-trained models and the complete "recipes" of code and algorithms required for training them. This paper presents SpeechBrain 1.0, a significant milestone in the evolution of the toolkit, which now has over 200 recipes for speech, audio, and language processing tasks, and more than 100 models available on Hugging Face. SpeechBrain 1.0 introduces new technologies to support diverse learning modalities, Large Language Model (LLM) integration, and advanced decoding strategies, along with novel models, tasks, and modalities. It also includes a new benchmark repository, offering researchers a unified platform for evaluating models across diverse tasks.

</details>


### [400] [Hyper-Compression: Model Compression via Hyperfunction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00592)
*Fenglei Fan,Juntong Fan,Dayang Wang,Jingbo Zhang,Zelin Dong,Shijun Zhang,Ge Wang,Tieyong Zeng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Hyper-Compression方法，通过超函数（利用低维动力系统的轨迹填充高维空间）将模型压缩转化为参数表示问题，在LLaMA、Qwen等NLP模型及视觉模型上实现了无需重训练、压缩比优、推理时间可接受、压缩时间短的压缩效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大模型规模的快速增长远超计算资源的增长，受大脑发育中基因型与表现型之间简约关系的启发，旨在弥补这一差距。

Method: 利用低维动力系统（以无理缠绕作为超函数）的轨迹可以填充高维空间的性质，将目标网络参数表示为对应的组合数或轨迹长度，从理论上推导误差界，并设计工程优化使其实用化。

Result: 在LLaMA2-7B上1小时内完成压缩，达到接近int4量化的性能，性能下降低于1%，无需重训练；在LLaMA、Qwen系列及视觉模型上验证了PNAS（压缩比优、无需重训练、推理时间可接受、压缩时间短）优势。

Conclusion: Hyper-Compression作为一种与剪枝、量化、蒸馏、分解等现有方法截然不同的新型压缩机制，在多个模型上展示了优异的压缩效果和实用性。

Abstract: The rapid growth of large models' size has far outpaced that of computing resources. To bridge this gap, encouraged by the parsimonious relationship between genotype and phenotype in the brain's growth and development, we propose the so-called Hyper-Compression that turns the model compression into the issue of parameter representation via a hyperfunction. Specifically, it is known that the trajectory of some low-dimensional dynamic systems can fill the high-dimensional space eventually. Thus, Hyper-Compression, using these dynamic systems as the hyperfunctions, represents the parameters of the target network by their corresponding composition number or trajectory length. This suggests a novel mechanism for model compression, substantially different from the existing pruning, quantization, distillation, and decomposition. Along this direction, we methodologically identify a suitable dynamic system with the irrational winding as the hyperfunction and theoretically derive its associated error bound. Next, guided by our theoretical insights, we propose several engineering twists to make the Hyper-Compression pragmatic and effective. Lastly, systematic and comprehensive experiments on \textcolor{black}{NLP models such as LLaMA and Qwen series and vision models} confirm that Hyper-Compression enjoys the following \textbf{PNAS} merits: 1) \textbf{P}referable compression ratio; 2) \textbf{N}o post-hoc retraining; 3) \textbf{A}ffordable inference time; and 4) \textbf{S}hort compression time. It compresses LLaMA2-7B in an hour and achieves close-to-int4-quantization performance, without retraining and with a performance drop of less than 1\%. We have open-sourced our code in https://github.com/Juntongkuki/Hyper-Compression.git for free download and evaluation.

</details>


### [401] [AutoPV: Automatically Design Your Photovoltaic Power Forecasting Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00601)
*Dayin Chen,Xiaodan Shi,Mingkun Jiang,Haoran Zhang,Dongxiao Zhang,Yuntian Chen,Jinyue Yan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了AutoPV框架，基于神经架构搜索(NAS)技术自动构建光伏功率预测模型，在短时间内构建的预测架构优于现有最先进预定义模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为特定PVPF任务构建最优预测架构需要跨领域知识和大量人力成本，现有方法难以高效完成这一工作。

Method: 开发了全新的NAS搜索空间，融合了SOTA时间序列预测模型和典型PVPF深度学习模型中的多种数据处理技术；通过自动搜索构建预测架构。

Result: 在大庆光伏电站数据集上的实验表明，AutoPV能在较短时间内完成预测架构构建，且新构建的架构优于SOTA预定义模型。

Conclusion: AutoPV填补了NAS在时间序列预测问题中应用的空白，帮助非专家用户和工业界自动设计有效的PVPF模型。

Abstract: Photovoltaic power forecasting (PVPF) is a critical area in time series forecasting (TSF), enabling the efficient utilization of solar energy. With advancements in machine learning and deep learning, various models have been applied to PVPF tasks. However, constructing an optimal predictive architecture for specific PVPF tasks remains challenging, as it requires cross-domain knowledge and significant labor costs. To address this challenge, we introduce AutoPV, a novel framework for the automated search and construction of PVPF models based on neural architecture search (NAS) technology. We develop a brand new NAS search space that incorporates various data processing techniques from state-of-the-art (SOTA) TSF models and typical PVPF deep learning models. The effectiveness of AutoPV is evaluated on diverse PVPF tasks using a dataset from the Daqing Photovoltaic Station in China. Experimental results demonstrate that AutoPV can complete the predictive architecture construction process in a relatively short time, and the newly constructed architecture is superior to SOTA predefined models. This work bridges the gap in applying NAS to TSF problems, assisting non-experts and industries in automatically designing effective PVPF models.

</details>


### [402] [VcLLM: Video Codecs are Secretly Tensor Codecs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00467)
*Ceyu Xu,Yongji Wu,Xinyu Yang,Beidi Chen,Matthew Lentz,Danyang Zhuo,Lisa Wu Wills*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文发现视频编解码器可被重新用作通用张量编解码器，在各类任务中达到最先进的压缩效率，并利用GPU上的硬件编解码模块构建了支持大模型训练和推理的框架，显著降低内存和通信带宽需求，使消费级GPU也能运行大模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型参数规模持续增长，导致训练和推理时需要巨大的内存占用和高通信带宽，成为主要瓶颈。

Method: 研究发现视频编解码器对多种张量类型具有优秀的压缩效率；利用GPU上的硬件视频编码/解码模块，构建支持训练和推理的框架，将视频编解码器重新用作张量编解码器。

Result: 视频编解码器在各类任务中达到最先进的张量压缩效率；所构建的框架大幅降低内存容量和通信带宽需求，使大模型可在消费级GPU上进行训练和推理。

Conclusion: 视频编解码器可成为通用张量编解码器，结合GPU硬件编解码模块，能有效缓解大模型训练和推理中的内存与通信瓶颈。

Abstract: As the parameter size of large language models (LLMs) continues to expand, the need for a large memory footprint and high communication bandwidth have become significant bottlenecks for the training and inference of LLMs. To mitigate these bottlenecks, various tensor compression techniques have been proposed to reduce the data size, thereby alleviating memory requirements and communication pressure.
  Our research found that video codecs, despite being originally designed for compressing videos, show excellent efficiency when compressing various types of tensors. We demonstrate that video codecs can be versatile and general-purpose tensor codecs while achieving the state-of-the-art compression efficiency in various tasks. We further make use of the hardware video encoding and decoding module available on GPUs to create a framework capable of both inference and training with video codecs repurposed as tensor codecs. This greatly reduces the requirement for memory capacity and communication bandwidth, enabling training and inference of large models on consumer-grade GPUs.

</details>


### [403] [Spatio-spectral graph neural operator for solving computational mechanics problems on irregular domain and unstructured grid](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00604)
*Subhankar Sarkar,Souvik Chakraborty*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为Sp²GNO的时空-谱图神经算子框架，通过融合空间图神经网络（局部卷积）和谱图神经网络（全局卷积）的优势，解决了现有算子学习方法在不规则网格和复杂域上计算成本高、过平滑/过压缩等问题，在规则与不规则域上的偏微分方程求解任务中表现出色。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有算子学习方法在不规则网格和复杂几何域上存在困难：空间图神经网络易出现深度架构中的过平滑和过压缩问题；谱图神经网络虽能捕获全局特征，但特征值分解导致高计算成本。亟需一种能兼顾局部和全局信息、适用于任意几何结构且计算高效的算子学习框架。

Method: 提出Spatio-Spectral Graph Neural Operator (Sp²GNO)，将空间GNN的局部邻域卷积与谱GNN的全局卷积有效整合，通过混合架构同时捕获局部细节和长程依赖，避免各自方法的局限性，适用于任意几何结构的解算子学习。

Result: 在规则与不规则域上的时间相关和稳态偏微分方程求解任务中，Sp²GNO均表现优异，在计算力学和科学计算文献中的多个基准测试和实际应用中得到了验证。

Conclusion: Sp²GNO有效融合了空间与谱图神经网络的互补优势，克服了单一方法的缺陷，为任意几何域上的算子学习提供了一种性能优越、通用性强的解决方案。

Abstract: Scientific machine learning has seen significant progress with the emergence of operator learning. However, existing methods encounter difficulties when applied to problems on unstructured grids and irregular domains. Spatial graph neural networks utilize local convolution in a neighborhood to potentially address these challenges, yet they often suffer from issues such as over-smoothing and over-squashing in deep architectures. Conversely, spectral graph neural networks leverage global convolution to capture extensive features and long-range dependencies in domain graphs, albeit at a high computational cost due to Eigenvalue decomposition. In this paper, we introduce a novel approach, referred to as Spatio-Spectral Graph Neural Operator (Sp$^2$GNO) that integrates spatial and spectral GNNs effectively. This framework mitigates the limitations of individual methods and enables the learning of solution operators across arbitrary geometries, thus catering to a wide range of real-world problems. Sp$^2$GNO demonstrates exceptional performance in solving both time-dependent and time-independent partial differential equations on regular and irregular domains. Our approach is validated through comprehensive benchmarks and practical applications drawn from computational mechanics and scientific computing literature.

</details>


### [404] [Privacy-preserving datasets by capturing feature distributions with Conditional VAEs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00639)
*Francesco Di Salvo,David Tafler,Sebastian Doerrich,Christian Ledig*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于条件变分自编码器（CVAE）和预训练视觉基础模型的方法，用于生成多样化、保护隐私的合成特征向量，在医疗和自然图像领域优于传统k-匿名化方法，提升了数据多样性和模型鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度学习依赖大规模高质量标注数据集，但获取成本高且单一实体难以收集；数据共享虽能扩大规模但引发隐私担忧；传统k-匿名化方法在保护隐私时破坏了数据多样性，影响模型鲁棒性。因此需要一种既能保护隐私又能保持数据多样性的方法。

Method: 利用预训练的大型视觉基础模型提取特征向量，在其嵌入空间上训练条件变分自编码器（CVAE），生成多样、隐私友好且数量无限的合成特征向量。

Result: 在医疗和自然图像领域，该方法在数据集多样性、对抗扰动的鲁棒性和样本隐私保护方面均显著优于传统匿名化方法。

Conclusion: 生成模型在数据稀缺和隐私敏感环境下的深度学习中具有巨大潜力，可作为传统数据匿名化的有效替代方案。

Abstract: Large and well-annotated datasets are essential for advancing deep learning applications, however often costly or impossible to obtain by a single entity. In many areas, including the medical domain, approaches relying on data sharing have become critical to address those challenges. While effective in increasing dataset size and diversity, data sharing raises significant privacy concerns. Commonly employed anonymization methods based on the k-anonymity paradigm often fail to preserve data diversity, affecting model robustness. This work introduces a novel approach using Conditional Variational Autoencoders (CVAEs) trained on feature vectors extracted from large pre-trained vision foundation models. Foundation models effectively detect and represent complex patterns across diverse domains, allowing the CVAE to faithfully capture the embedding space of a given data distribution to generate (sample) a diverse, privacy-respecting, and potentially unbounded set of synthetic feature vectors. Our method notably outperforms traditional approaches in both medical and natural image domains, exhibiting greater dataset diversity and higher robustness against perturbations while preserving sample privacy. These results underscore the potential of generative models to significantly impact deep learning applications in data-scarce and privacy-sensitive environments. The source code is available at https://github.com/francescodisalvo05/cvae-anonymization .

</details>


### [405] [MH-pFLGB: Model Heterogeneous personalized Federated Learning via Global Bypass for Medical Image Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00474)
*Luyuan Xie,Manqing Lin,ChenMing Xu,Tianyu Luan,Zhipeng Zeng,Wenjun Qian,Cong Li,Yuejian Fang,Qingni Shen,Zhonghai Wu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种名为MH-pFLGB的联邦学习方法，通过全局旁路策略和特征融合模块，解决医疗AI中跨机构数据非独立同分布和系统异构性问题，在多个医疗任务上表现优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 医疗AI应用中，联邦学习虽能保护数据隐私，但医疗机构间的统计异质性（非IID数据分布）和系统异质性严重影响了联邦学习的有效性，阻碍了客户端之间的信息交换。现有方法往往依赖公共数据集，这在实际医疗场景中难以保证。

Method: 提出MH-pFLGB方法，包含两个核心组件：(1) 全局旁路策略（global bypass strategy），在客户端之间共享信息的同时作为网络的一部分提升各客户端性能，减少对公共数据集的依赖；(2) 特征融合模块（feature fusion module），用于更好地结合局部特征与全局特征。

Result: 通过在不同医疗任务上的大量实验验证，MH-pFLGB在有效性和适应性方面均优于现有的最先进方法。

Conclusion: MH-pFLGB通过全局旁路和特征融合机制，有效缓解了联邦学习中的统计与系统异构性问题，为医疗场景下保护隐私的协作模型开发提供了更优的解决方案。

Abstract: In the evolving application of medical artificial intelligence, federated learning is notable for its ability to protect training data privacy. Federated learning facilitates collaborative model development without the need to share local data from healthcare institutions. Yet, the statistical and system heterogeneity among these institutions poses substantial challenges, which affects the effectiveness of federated learning and hampers the exchange of information between clients. To address these issues, we introduce a novel approach, MH-pFLGB, which employs a global bypass strategy to mitigate the reliance on public datasets and navigate the complexities of non-IID data distributions. Our method enhances traditional federated learning by integrating a global bypass model, which would share the information among the clients, but also serves as part of the network to enhance the performance on each client. Additionally, MH-pFLGB provides a feature fusion module to better combine the local and global features. We validate \model{}'s effectiveness and adaptability through extensive testing on different medical tasks, demonstrating superior performance compared to existing state-of-the-art methods.

</details>


### [406] [Flight Delay Prediction using Hybrid Machine Learning Approach: A Case Study of Major Airlines in the United States](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00607)
*Rajesh Kumar Jha,Shashi Bhushan Jha,Vijay Pandey,Radu F. Babiceanu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 针对美国航空业航班延误问题，提出了一种融合深度学习与经典机器学习特征的混合方法，在航班数据上进行了多模型验证，并通过准确率、精确率、召回率、F1-score及ROC/AUC曲线评估性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 1978年美国航空业放松管制后航空交通持续增长，航班延误成为航空公司和旅客的主要关切，导致燃料、劳动力、资本等有限资源消耗增加，且预计未来延误将进一步加剧，因此需要有效的延误预测模型。

Method: 提出一种结合深度学习与经典机器学习特征的混合方法，并在航班数据上应用多种机器学习算法进行对比验证；使用准确率、精确率、召回率、F1-score评估性能，并生成ROC和AUC曲线。

Result: 通过多指标（准确率、精确率、召回率、F1-score）和ROC/AUC曲线对模型性能进行了全面评估，并对美国航空公司的航班数据及各模型进行了深入分析。

Conclusion: 所提出的混合方法能有效预测航班延误，为航空公司和旅客提供有价值的决策支持，有助于缓解延误带来的资源消耗问题。

Abstract: The aviation industry has experienced constant growth in air traffic since the deregulation of the U.S. airline industry in 1978. As a result, flight delays have become a major concern for airlines and passengers, leading to significant research on factors affecting flight delays such as departure, arrival, and total delays. Flight delays result in increased consumption of limited resources such as fuel, labor, and capital, and are expected to increase in the coming decades. To address the flight delay problem, this research proposes a hybrid approach that combines the feature of deep learning and classic machine learning techniques. In addition, several machine learning algorithms are applied on flight data to validate the results of proposed model. To measure the performance of the model, accuracy, precision, recall, and F1-score are calculated, and ROC and AUC curves are generated. The study also includes an extensive analysis of the flight data and each model to obtain insightful results for U.S. airlines.

</details>


### [407] [Enhancing Ethereum Fraud Detection via Generative and Contrastive Self-supervision](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00641)
*Chenxiang Jin,Jiajun Zhou,Chenxuan Xie,Shanqing Yu,Qi Xuan,Xiaoniu Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 针对以太坊交易环境中账户交互频率和类型的不平衡问题，提出基于元交互概念的双重自监督增强欺诈检测框架Meta-IFD，通过生成式自监督增强交互特征、对比式自监督区分行为模式，并结合多视图交互特征学习，在庞氏骗局和钓鱼诈骗检测中取得优异效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 以太坊上的欺诈活动猖獗，亟需加强监管，但交易环境中存在的账户交互频率和交互类型多重不平衡问题，对基于数据挖掘的欺诈检测研究构成重大挑战。

Method: 提出元交互(Meta-interaction)概念细化交互行为；构建双重自监督增强框架Meta-IFD：1)生成式自监督机制增强账户交互特征；2)对比式自监督机制区分不同行为模式；3)多视图交互特征学习刻画账户行为表征并挖掘潜在欺诈风险。

Result: 在真实以太坊数据集上的大量实验表明，该框架在检测庞氏骗局和钓鱼诈骗等常见欺诈行为中有效且优越；生成模块可缓解交互分布不平衡问题，对比模块显著增强区分不同行为模式的能力。

Conclusion: Meta-IFD框架有效解决了以太坊欺诈检测中的数据不平衡问题，提升了欺诈检测性能，代码将开源。

Abstract: The rampant fraudulent activities on Ethereum hinder the healthy development of the blockchain ecosystem, necessitating the reinforcement of regulations. However, multiple imbalances involving account interaction frequencies and interaction types in the Ethereum transaction environment pose significant challenges to data mining-based fraud detection research. To address this, we first propose the concept of meta-interactions to refine interaction behaviors in Ethereum, and based on this, we present a dual self-supervision enhanced Ethereum fraud detection framework, named Meta-IFD. This framework initially introduces a generative self-supervision mechanism to augment the interaction features of accounts, followed by a contrastive self-supervision mechanism to differentiate various behavior patterns, and ultimately characterizes the behavioral representations of accounts and mines potential fraud risks through multi-view interaction feature learning. Extensive experiments on real Ethereum datasets demonstrate the effectiveness and superiority of our framework in detecting common Ethereum fraud behaviors such as Ponzi schemes and phishing scams. Additionally, the generative module can effectively alleviate the interaction distribution imbalance in Ethereum data, while the contrastive module significantly enhances the framework's ability to distinguish different behavior patterns. The source code will be available in https://github.com/GISec-Team/Meta-IFD.

</details>


### [408] [Beyond Scaleup: Knowledge-aware Parsimony Learning from Deep Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00478)
*Quanming Yao,Yongqi Zhang,Yaqing Wang,Nan Yin,James Kwok,Qiang Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种利用领域特定知识（符号、逻辑、公式）替代暴力规模扩展的简约框架，在模型设计、训练和解释上实现高效，在药物相互作用预测等任务中超越遵循缩放定律的方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 暴力扩展训练数据、参数和算力的策略面临数据、计算和信任三方面的瓶颈，其可持续性存在严重问题，亟需探索替代路径。

Method: 以领域知识（符号、逻辑、公式）为"构建块"驱动模型，建立涵盖模型设计、训练和解释的简约框架，而非依赖规模化扩展。

Result: 所提方法在实证中超越了遵循缩放定律的典型方法，并在AI for Science领域（药物-药物相互作用预测）中验证了有效性。

Conclusion: 该研究倡导在基础模型时代发展更多元化的技术路线，以知识驱动替代规模驱动实现可持续的模型发展。

Abstract: The brute-force scaleup of training datasets, learnable parameters and computation power, has become a prevalent strategy for developing more robust learning models. However, due to bottlenecks in data, computation, and trust, the sustainability of this strategy is a serious concern. In this paper, we attempt to address this issue in a parsimonious manner (i.e., achieving greater potential with simpler models). The key is to drive models using domain-specific knowledge, such as symbols, logic, and formulas, instead of purely relying on scaleup. This approach allows us to build a framework that uses this knowledge as "building blocks" to achieve parsimony in model design, training, and interpretation. Empirical results show that our methods surpass those that typically follow the scaling law. We also demonstrate our framework in AI for science, specifically in the problem of drug-drug interaction prediction. We hope our research can foster more diverse technical roadmaps in the era of foundation models.

</details>


### [409] [Assessing the Impact of Upselling in Online Fantasy Sports](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00629)
*Aayush Chaudhary*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本研究探讨了在梦幻体育平台Dream11上，追加销售强度对用户参与度的影响。通过建模用户存款行为并设计实验框架，发现增加追加销售强度虽能提升用户存款指标，但会降低用户召回率、满意度和转化率。通过反事实分析和因果元学习器，研究实现了用户追加销售强度的个性化最优平衡点。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究追加销售策略对用户参与度的双重影响（积极 vs. 消极），寻找最优的追加销售强度平衡点。

Method: 基于Dream11平台的用户存款行为建模，设计包含强度参数的实验框架；进行在线实验；采用反事实分析，训练因果元学习器（causal meta-learners）实现个性化强度优化。

Result: 追加销售强度增加会提升用户存款指标，但降低用户召回率、满意度和转化率。

Conclusion: 需要在追加销售带来的短期收益（存款提升）与长期代价（满意度、召回率、转化率下降）之间取得平衡，可通过个性化的强度设置实现最优折衷。

Abstract: This study explores the impact of upselling on user engagement. We model users' deposit behaviour on the fantasy sports platform Dream11. Subsequently, we develop an experimental framework to evaluate the effect of upselling using an intensity parameter. Our live experiments on user deposit behaviour reveal decreased user recall with heightened upselling intensity. Our findings indicate that increased upselling intensity improves user deposit metrics and concurrently diminishes user satisfaction and conversion rates. We conduct robust counterfactual analysis and train causal meta-learners to personalise users' upselling intensity levels to reach an optimal trade-off point.

</details>


### [410] [Enhancing Multistep Prediction of Multivariate Market Indices Using Weighted Optical Reservoir Computing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00652)
*Fang Wang,Ting Bu,Yuping Huang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出并实验验证了一种基于加权光学储备池计算系统的股票指数预测方法，该方法整合基础市场数据、宏观经济数据和技术指标，在捕捉市场高波动性和非线性行为方面显著优于线性回归、决策树和LSTM等现有方法，展现出实时并行多维数据处理的潜力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 股票市场具有高波动性和非线性特征，传统预测方法难以有效捕捉这些复杂动态；同时现有方法在有限数据条件下表现不佳，亟需一种能够实时处理多维数据的新型预测框架。

Method: 采用加权光学储备池计算系统，将基础市场数据、宏观经济数据和技术指标三类特征进行融合构建，利用光学系统的并行处理能力实现高效预测。

Result: 该方法在股票指数预测任务上显著优于线性回归、决策树、LSTM等现有方法，尤其在捕捉市场高波动性和非线性行为方面表现突出，且对数据量需求较低。

Conclusion: 加权光学储备池计算系统在金融时间序列预测领域具有巨大潜力，尤其适用于实时、并行、多维数据处理场景，为智能金融预测提供了新的技术路径。

Abstract: We propose and experimentally demonstrate an innovative stock index prediction method using a weighted optical reservoir computing system. We construct fundamental market data combined with macroeconomic data and technical indicators to capture the broader behavior of the stock market. Our approach shows significant higher performance than state-of-the-art methods such as linear regression, decision trees, and neural network architectures including long short-term memory. It captures well the market's high volatility and nonlinear behaviors despite limited data, demonstrating great potential for real-time, parallel, multi-dimensional data processing and predictions.

</details>


### [411] [Towards Formalizing Spuriousness of Biased Datasets Using Partial Information Decomposition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00482)
*Barproda Halder,Faisal Hamman,Pasan Dissanayake,Qiuyi Zhang,Ilia Sucholutsky,Sanghamitra Dutta*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于部分信息分解（PID）的可解释性框架Spurious Disentangler，用于在模型训练前预先解耦数据集中的虚假关联，将目标总信息分解为独特信息（核心特征和虚假特征）、冗余信息和协同信息四个非负分量，并基于此提出了一种新的数据集虚假性度量方法。在6个基准数据集上的实验表明，该预训练虚假性度量与后训练的模型最差组准确率等泛化指标具有一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 数据集中存在非因果关联的虚假关联（Spuriousness），这些问题会在模型训练后导致泛化能力下降。现有的可解释性方法多在模型训练后分析，缺乏在训练前预先识别和量化数据集中虚假关联的手段。

Method: 利用部分信息分解（PID）将关于目标的总信息分解为四个非负分量：核心特征的独特信息、虚假特征的独特信息、冗余信息和协同信息。基于这些分量系统性地提出了一种新的数据集虚假性度量指标。框架包含分割、降维和估计三个模块，专门处理高维图像数据。

Result: 在6个基准数据集上展示了独特信息、冗余信息、协同信息以及提出的虚假性度量在不同实验设置下的变化趋势，发现预训练的虚假性度量与后训练的最差组准确率等泛化指标一致。

Conclusion: 提出的框架能够在训练前有效揭示数据集的虚假关联结构，其虚假性度量可作为预测模型泛化能力的早期指标，为数据诊断和模型鲁棒性提升提供了新的理论工具。

Abstract: Spuriousness arises when there is an association between two or more variables in a dataset that are not causally related. In this work, we propose an explainability framework to preemptively disentangle the nature of such spurious associations in a dataset before model training. We leverage a body of work in information theory called Partial Information Decomposition (PID) to decompose the total information about the target into four non-negative quantities, namely unique information (in core and spurious features, respectively), redundant information, and synergistic information. Our framework helps anticipate when the core or spurious feature is indispensable, when either suffices, and when both are jointly needed for an optimal classifier trained on the dataset. Next, we leverage this decomposition to propose a novel measure of the spuriousness of a dataset. We arrive at this measure systematically by examining several candidate measures, and demonstrating what they capture and miss through intuitive canonical examples and counterexamples. Our framework Spurious Disentangler consists of segmentation, dimensionality reduction, and estimation modules, with capabilities to specifically handle high-dimensional image data efficiently. Finally, we also perform empirical evaluation to demonstrate the trends of unique, redundant, and synergistic information, as well as our proposed spuriousness measure across $6$ benchmark datasets under various experimental settings. We observe an agreement between our preemptive measure of dataset spuriousness and post-training model generalization metrics such as worst-group accuracy, further supporting our proposition. The code is available at https://github.com/Barproda/spuriousness-disentangler.

</details>


### [412] [Time-series Crime Prediction Across the United States Based on Socioeconomic and Political Factors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00640)
*Patricia Dao,Jashmitha Sappa,Saanvi Terala,Tyson Wong,Michael Lam,Kevin Zhu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结合LSTM和GRU的犯罪预测模型，使用性别比例、高中毕业率、政治状态、失业率和中位收入等多维数据集，平均总损失值为70.79±2.30，平均百分比误差为9.74%，但受极端异常值影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统犯罪预测技术在处理快速增长的犯罪数据时速度慢、效率低，需要更高效的预测方法来辅助政策制定和资源配置。

Method: 构建了长短期记忆网络（LSTM）和门控循环单元（GRU）模型，使用多年跨度的多维度数据集，包括性别比例、高中毕业率、政治状态、失业率和按州划分的中位收入等因素进行个性化建模。

Result: 模型平均总损失值为70.79±2.30，平均百分比误差为9.74%，但两者均受极端异常值影响，需进一步优化。

Conclusion: 该模型可帮助政策制定者在受犯罪影响的地理区域策略性地分配资源和立法，对刑事司法研究领域有贡献，但需通过优化处理异常值以提升性能。

Abstract: Traditional crime prediction techniques are slow and inefficient when generating predictions as crime increases rapidly \cite{r15}. To enhance traditional crime prediction methods, a Long Short-Term Memory and Gated Recurrent Unit model was constructed using datasets involving gender ratios, high school graduation rates, political status, unemployment rates, and median income by state over multiple years. While there may be other crime prediction tools, personalizing the model with hand picked factors allows a unique gap for the project. Producing an effective model would allow policymakers to strategically allocate specific resources and legislation in geographic areas that are impacted by crime, contributing to the criminal justice field of research \cite{r2A}. The model has an average total loss value of 70.792.30, and a average percent error of 9.74 percent, however both of these values are impacted by extreme outliers and with the correct optimization may be corrected.

</details>


### [413] [Disentangling Dense Embeddings with Sparse Autoencoders](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00657)
*Charles O'Neill,Christine Ye,Kartheik Iyer,John F. Wu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文首次将稀疏自编码器应用于大型语言模型的稠密文本嵌入，通过在42万+科学论文摘要上训练，实现了语义保真与可解释性的平衡，并提出"特征家族"方法和语义搜索调控应用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 稠密文本嵌入语义丰富但缺乏可解释性，现有方法难以在保真度和可解释性之间取得平衡，需要一种能够从稠密嵌入中提取可解释语义概念的方法。

Method: 在超过42万篇计算机科学和天文学论文摘要的稠密嵌入上训练稀疏自编码器，提出"特征家族"方法来识别不同抽象层次的相关概念，并利用学习到的稀疏特征进行语义搜索调控。

Result: 稀疏自编码器能够从稠密嵌入中有效解耦语义概念，保持语义保真度的同时提供可解释性；特征家族方法可识别不同抽象层次的相关概念；稀疏特征可用于精确调控语义搜索。

Conclusion: 这项工作弥合了稠密嵌入的语义丰富性与稀疏表示的可解释性之间的差距，并开源了嵌入、模型和交互式探索工具，为可解释语义搜索提供了实用方案。

Abstract: Sparse autoencoders (SAEs) have shown promise in extracting interpretable features from complex neural networks. We present one of the first applications of SAEs to dense text embeddings from large language models, demonstrating their effectiveness in disentangling semantic concepts. By training SAEs on embeddings of over 420,000 scientific paper abstracts from computer science and astronomy, we show that the resulting sparse representations maintain semantic fidelity while offering interpretability. We analyse these learned features, exploring their behaviour across different model capacities and introducing a novel method for identifying ``feature families'' that represent related concepts at varying levels of abstraction. To demonstrate the practical utility of our approach, we show how these interpretable features can be used to precisely steer semantic search, allowing for fine-grained control over query semantics. This work bridges the gap between the semantic richness of dense embeddings and the interpretability of sparse representations. We open source our embeddings, trained sparse autoencoders, and interpreted features, as well as a web app for exploring them.

</details>


### [414] [Toward Global Convergence of Gradient EM for Over-Parameterized Gaussian Mixture Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00490)
*Weihang Xu,Maryam Fazel,Simon S. Du*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了梯度EM算法在过参数化高斯混合模型（GMM）中的全局收敛性，其中包含n>1个分量的GMM学习由单个真实高斯分布生成的数据。针对n≥2的通用情形，提出了一种基于似然的收敛分析框架，证明了梯度EM以O(1/√t)的次线性速率全局收敛，这是首个针对多于2个分量的高斯混合模型的全局收敛结果。同时，发现了一个新的技术挑战：存在不良局部区域，可能使梯度EM陷入指数级步数的困境。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究仅解决了2个分量高斯混合的特殊情形，对于任意n个分量的通用全局收敛分析仍存在空白，面临收敛次线性且非单调等新的技术障碍。

Method: 构建了一种新颖的基于似然的收敛分析框架，用于分析过参数化设置下梯度EM算法的收敛行为。

Result: 严格证明了梯度EM算法全局收敛，收敛速率为O(1/√t)；同时发现了不良局部区域的存在，可能导致算法陷入指数级步数的困境。

Conclusion: 这是首个针对多于2个分量的高斯混合模型的全局收敛结果，揭示了过参数化GMM学习中的新挑战。

Abstract: We study the gradient Expectation-Maximization (EM) algorithm for Gaussian Mixture Models (GMM) in the over-parameterized setting, where a general GMM with $n>1$ components learns from data that are generated by a single ground truth Gaussian distribution. While results for the special case of 2-Gaussian mixtures are well-known, a general global convergence analysis for arbitrary $n$ remains unresolved and faces several new technical barriers since the convergence becomes sub-linear and non-monotonic. To address these challenges, we construct a novel likelihood-based convergence analysis framework and rigorously prove that gradient EM converges globally with a sublinear rate $O(1/\sqrt{t})$. This is the first global convergence result for Gaussian mixtures with more than $2$ components.
