The sublinear convergence rate is due to the algorithmic nature of learning over-parameterized GMM with gradient EM. We also identify a new emerging technical challenge for learning general over-parameterized GMM: the existence of bad local regions that can trap gradient EM for an exponential number of steps.

</details>


### [415] [Knowledge-data fusion oriented traffic state estimation: A stochastic physics-informed deep learning approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00644)
*Ting Wang,Ye Li,Rongjun Cheng,Guojian Zou,Takao Dantsujic,Dong Ngoduy*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文首次提出随机物理信息深度学习（SPIDL）用于交通状态估计，通过引入随机基本图（百分位基本图和分布基本图）替代传统确定性物理模型，解决了确定性模型无法捕捉交通流动态散射效应的问题。实验表明，SPIDL在稀疏数据场景下能准确估计交通状态，并有效复现实测数据的散射特性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于物理信息深度学习的交通状态估计方法均采用确定性物理模型进行正则化训练，而确定性模型无法捕捉交通流中普遍存在的动态散射效应（即同一密度下对应多种可能速度），导致交通控制结果不可靠。因此，需要引入随机物理知识来解决确定性模型在神经网络训练中造成的"过度集中引导"问题。

Method: 提出两种SPIDL模型：α-SPIDL（基于百分位基本图）和B-SPIDL（基于分布基本图），分别选取对应的随机基本图作为随机物理知识，并设计相应的物理非知情神经网络进行有效融合，实现随机物理知识与深度学习框架的结合。

Result: 在真实数据集上的实验表明，SPIDL模型在稀疏数据场景下实现了准确的交通状态估计，并且成功复现了现场观测数据的散射效应。

Conclusion: SPIDL通过引入随机物理模型知识，有效解决了确定性模型中一对一的速-密关系造成的"过度集中引导"问题，使网络能够消化更可靠的知识约束，验证了随机物理模型与深度学习框架融合的有效性。

Abstract: Physics-informed deep learning (PIDL)-based models have recently garnered remarkable success in traffic state estimation (TSE). However, the prior knowledge used to guide regularization training in current mainstream architectures is based on deterministic physical models. The drawback is that a solely deterministic model fails to capture the universally observed traffic flow dynamic scattering effect, thereby yielding unreliable outcomes for traffic control. This study, for the first time, proposes stochastic physics-informed deep learning (SPIDL) for traffic state estimation. The idea behind such SPIDL is simple and is based on the fact that a stochastic fundamental diagram provides the entire range of possible speeds for any given density with associated probabilities. Specifically, we select percentile-based fundamental diagram and distribution-based fundamental diagram as stochastic physics knowledge, and design corresponding physics-uninformed neural networks for effective fusion, thereby realizing two specific SPIDL models, namely \text{$α$}-SPIDL and \text{$\cal B$}-SPIDL. The main contribution of SPIDL lies in addressing the "overly centralized guidance" caused by the one-to-one speed-density relationship in deterministic models during neural network training, enabling the network to digest more reliable knowledge-based constraints.Experiments on the real-world dataset indicate that proposed SPIDL models achieve accurate traffic state estimation in sparse data scenarios. More importantly, as expected, SPIDL models reproduce well the scattering effect of field observations, demonstrating the effectiveness of fusing stochastic physics model knowledge with deep learning frameworks.

</details>


### [416] [Fast Gibbs sampling for the local and global trend Bayesian exponential smoothing model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00492)
*Xueying Long,Daniel F. Schmidt,Christoph Bergmeir,Slawek Smyl*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对Smyl等人提出的广义指数平滑模型计算成本过高的问题，提出了多种模型改进和定制化Gibbs采样器，将采样速度提升一个数量级，同时在M3数据集上保持或超越原始方法的预测精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Smyl等人的广义指数平滑模型虽在多项预测任务中取得最先进性能，但其基于NUTS采样器的拟合过程计算成本极高，严重限制了模型的实用价值。因此需要降低计算开销，使模型更具实践可行性。

Method: 对原始模型提出多种修改方案，并设计了一个定制化的Gibbs采样器替代原有NUTS采样器，用于后验探索。

Result: 改进后的模型和采样器在M3数据集上的预测精度与原始方法相当或更优，同时采样速度提升了一个数量级。

Conclusion: 通过模型修改和定制化Gibbs采样器，成功在保持预测精度的前提下大幅提升计算效率，使该模型更具实际应用价值。

Abstract: In Smyl et al. [Local and global trend Bayesian exponential smoothing models. International Journal of Forecasting, 2024.], a generalised exponential smoothing model was proposed that is able to capture strong trends and volatility in time series. This method achieved state-of-the-art performance in many forecasting tasks, but its fitting procedure, which is based on the NUTS sampler, is very computationally expensive. In this work, we propose several modifications to the original model, as well as a bespoke Gibbs sampler for posterior exploration; these changes improve sampling time by an order of magnitude, thus rendering the model much more practically relevant. The new model, and sampler, are evaluated on the M3 dataset and are shown to be competitive, or superior, in terms of accuracy to the original method, while being substantially faster to run.

</details>


### [417] [Towards Faster Graph Partitioning via Pre-training and Inductive Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00670)
*Meng Qin,Chaorui Zhang,Yu Gao,Yibin Ding,Weipeng Jiang,Weixi Zhang,Wei Han,Bo Bai*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: PR-GPT提出了一种基于预训练与精化范式的图分割方法：先在小型合成图上离线预训练深度图学习模型，再直接泛化到大图上得到初始分割，最后用InfoMap等高效方法进一步精化。该方法在保证分割质量的同时显著提升了大图分割效率，并支持流式图分割。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 经典图分割问题在大规模图上计算开销大，现有方法难以兼顾分割质量与推理效率；同时预训练技术（如大语言模型）的进展为图任务提供了新的范式迁移机会。

Method: 1) 离线阶段：在具有多样拓扑性质的小型合成图上预训练深度图学习（DGL）模型；2) 在线泛化：冻结模型参数，利用DGL的归纳推理能力直接对大图进行推理得到可行分割；3) 精化阶段：将预训练得到的分割作为高效GP方法（如InfoMap）的良好初始化，进一步优化分割质量；4) 通过缩减精化方法处理图的规模，支持流式图分割。

Result: 在Graph Challenge基准测试上，PR-GPT相比从头运行精化方法，能在大规模图上实现更快的图分割，且分割质量无明显下降。

Conclusion: 预训练+精化范式能有效迁移小图上的学习能力到大图分割任务，兼顾分割质量与推理效率，并具备流式处理潜力。

Abstract: Graph partitioning (GP) is a classic problem that divides the node set of a graph into densely-connected blocks. Following the IEEE HPEC Graph Challenge and recent advances in pre-training techniques (e.g., large-language models), we propose PR-GPT (Pre-trained & Refined Graph ParTitioning) based on a novel pre-training & refinement paradigm. We first conduct the offline pre-training of a deep graph learning (DGL) model on small synthetic graphs with various topology properties. By using the inductive inference of DGL, one can directly generalize the pre-trained model (with frozen model parameters) to large graphs and derive feasible GP results. We also use the derived partition as a good initialization of an efficient GP method (e.g., InfoMap) to further refine the quality of partitioning. In this setting, the online generalization and refinement of PR-GPT can not only benefit from the transfer ability regarding quality but also ensure high inference efficiency without re-training. Based on a mechanism of reducing the scale of a graph to be processed by the refinement method, PR-GPT also has the potential to support streaming GP. Experiments on the Graph Challenge benchmark demonstrate that PR-GPT can ensure faster GP on large-scale graphs without significant quality degradation, compared with running a refinement method from scratch. We will make our code public at https://github.com/KuroginQin/PRGPT.

</details>


### [418] [Granular-Balls based Fuzzy Twin Support Vector Machine for Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00699)
*Lixi Zhao,Weiping Ding,Duoqian Miao,Guangming Lang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出基于粒度球计算的双支持向量机（GBTWSVM）和模糊双支持向量机（GBFTSVM）分类器，通过将传统点输入替换为粒度球，并利用毕达哥拉斯模糊集设计隶属/非隶属函数，在20个基准数据集上验证了其相比现有方法在噪声鲁棒性、分类性能和计算效率方面的优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: TWSVM分类器计算复杂度低但受噪声影响性能下降；GBFSVM虽部分缓解噪声问题，但其隶属度函数仅依赖于粒度球中心与类中心的距离，设计过于简单。

Method: 1) 将粒度球计算（GBC）与TWSVM结合，提出GBTWSVM，通过求解二次规划问题推导一对非平行超平面；2) 利用毕达哥拉斯模糊集设计粒度球的隶属度和非隶属度函数，区分不同区域粒度球的贡献；3) 进一步将GBC与FTSVM结合，提出GBFTSVM；4) 设计了两种分类器对应的学习算法。

Result: 在20个基准数据集上的实验表明，GBTWSVM和GBFTSVM在可扩展性、效率和鲁棒性方面均优于现有方法，分类性能显著提升。

Conclusion: 所提出的GBTWSVM和GBFTSVM通过粒度球计算和模糊集设计有效增强了噪声鲁棒性，验证了该方法在大规模分类任务中的实用价值。

Abstract: The twin support vector machine (TWSVM) classifier has attracted increasing attention because of its low computational complexity. However, its performance tends to degrade when samples are affected by noise. The granular-ball fuzzy support vector machine (GBFSVM) classifier partly alleviates the adverse effects of noise, but it relies solely on the distance between the granular-ball's center and the class center to design the granular-ball membership function. In this paper, we first introduce the granular-ball twin support vector machine (GBTWSVM) classifier, which integrates granular-ball computing (GBC) with the twin support vector machine (TWSVM) classifier. By replacing traditional point inputs with granular-balls, we demonstrate how to derive a pair of non-parallel hyperplanes for the GBTWSVM classifier by solving a quadratic programming problem. Subsequently, we design the membership and non-membership functions of granular-balls using Pythagorean fuzzy sets to differentiate the contributions of granular-balls in various regions. Additionally, we develop the granular-ball fuzzy twin support vector machine (GBFTSVM) classifier by incorporating GBC with the fuzzy twin support vector machine (FTSVM) classifier. We demonstrate how to derive a pair of non-parallel hyperplanes for the GBFTSVM classifier by solving a quadratic programming problem. We also design algorithms for the GBTSVM classifier and the GBFTSVM classifier. Finally, the superior classification performance of the GBTWSVM classifier and the GBFTSVM classifier on 20 benchmark datasets underscores their scalability, efficiency, and robustness in tackling classification tasks.

</details>


### [419] [A Two-stage Reinforcement Learning-based Approach for Multi-entity Task Allocation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00496)
*Aicheng Gong,Kai Yang,Jiafei Lyu,Xiu Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于相似性的两阶段任务分配算法，利用强化学习、预分配策略、注意力机制和超参数网络结构，解决动态变化环境中实体与任务属性和数量可变的任务分配问题，实现了零样本泛化并优于遗传算法等启发式方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统任务分配方法假设任务和实体的属性及数量是静态的，依赖动态规划和启发式算法求解。然而实际场景中任务分配类似马尔可夫决策过程，任务和实体属性动态变化，现有算法无法有效处理这种动态性。

Method: 提出基于相似性的两阶段任务分配算法：1）采用预分配策略（pre-assign）让实体预先选择合适的任务，避免局部最优；2）引入注意力机制和超参数网络结构（hyperparameter network），适应实体和任务数量及属性的动态变化；3）利用强化学习学习分配策略。

Result: 在多个环境下的实验结果表明，该算法能有效解决实际应用中的动态任务分配挑战。相比遗传算法等启发式方法，强化学习方法更好地解决了动态分配问题，并在新任务上实现了零样本泛化，性能良好。

Conclusion: 基于相似性和强化学习的两阶段动态任务分配算法有效解决了传统方法无法处理的动态属性变化问题，且具有良好的泛化能力。

Abstract: Task allocation is a key combinatorial optimization problem, crucial for modern applications such as multi-robot cooperation and resource scheduling. Decision makers must allocate entities to tasks reasonably across different scenarios. However, traditional methods assume static attributes and numbers of tasks and entities, often relying on dynamic programming and heuristic algorithms for solutions. In reality, task allocation resembles Markov decision processes, with dynamically changing task and entity attributes. Thus, algorithms must dynamically allocate tasks based on their states. To address this issue, we propose a two-stage task allocation algorithm based on similarity, utilizing reinforcement learning to learn allocation strategies. The proposed pre-assign strategy allows entities to preselect appropriate tasks, effectively avoiding local optima and thereby better finding the optimal allocation. We also introduce an attention mechanism and a hyperparameter network structure to adapt to the changing number and attributes of entities and tasks, enabling our network structure to generalize to new tasks. Experimental results across multiple environments demonstrate that our algorithm effectively addresses the challenges of dynamic task allocation in practical applications. Compared to heuristic algorithms like genetic algorithms, our reinforcement learning approach better solves dynamic allocation problems and achieves zero-shot generalization to new tasks with good performance. The code is available at https://github.com/yk7333/TaskAllocation.

</details>


### [420] [ContextCite: Attributing Model Generation to Context](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00729)
*Benjamin Cohen-Wang,Harshay Shah,Kristian Georgiev,Aleksander Madry*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出上下文归因问题——定位语言模型生成特定语句时所使用的上下文来源，并开发了ContextCite方法，可用于验证生成内容、优化上下文质量和检测投毒攻击。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 语言模型在生成回复时如何利用上下文信息尚不明确，难以判断生成内容是真正基于上下文、误解还是凭空捏造，因此需要一种方法来追溯生成语句与上下文之间的因果关系。

Method: 提出ContextCite，一种简单且可扩展的上下文归因方法，可应用于任意现有语言模型之上，通过定位上下文中导致模型生成特定语句的部分来实现归因。

Result: 在三个应用场景中展示了ContextCite的有效性：(1) 验证生成语句的可靠性；(2) 通过精简上下文提升回复质量；(3) 检测投毒攻击。

Conclusion: ContextCite为理解语言模型的上下文利用行为提供了可行工具，有助于提升生成内容的安全性和可靠性。

Abstract: How do language models use information provided as context when generating a response? Can we infer whether a particular generated statement is actually grounded in the context, a misinterpretation, or fabricated? To help answer these questions, we introduce the problem of context attribution: pinpointing the parts of the context (if any) that led a model to generate a particular statement. We then present ContextCite, a simple and scalable method for context attribution that can be applied on top of any existing language model. Finally, we showcase the utility of ContextCite through three applications: (1) helping verify generated statements (2) improving response quality by pruning the context and (3) detecting poisoning attacks. We provide code for ContextCite at https://github.com/MadryLab/context-cite.

</details>


### [421] [You Can't Ignore Either: Unifying Structure and Feature Denoising for Robust Graph Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00700)
*Tianmeng Yang,Jiahao Meng,Min Zhou,Yaming Yang,Yujing Wang,Xiangtai Li,Yunhai Tong*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出统一图去噪框架（UGD），通过高阶邻域邻近性评估识别噪声边，结合图自编码器重构噪声特征，采用迭代优化算法获得干净图，实现鲁棒的图表示学习。该框架自监督且即插即用，实验证明其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有图神经网络鲁棒性研究多针对单一噪声源（结构或特征），然而实际场景中噪声可能同时来自图的结构和特征，导致图去噪面临两难困境。本文旨在解决结构和特征联合去噪的死锁问题。

Method: 提出统一图去噪（UGD）框架，包含三部分：(1) 高阶邻域邻近性评估方法，在特征可能被扰动的情况下识别噪声边；(2) 基于图自编码器的噪声特征重构；(3) 迭代更新算法优化框架，获得干净图。框架为自监督方式，可即插即用。

Result: 大量实验证明了UGD方法的有效性和优越性，在鲁棒图学习任务上表现优异。

Conclusion: UGD框架有效解决了结构和特征联合去噪的难题，是一种自监督、即插即用的通用去噪方案，能为下游任务提供鲁棒的图表示学习能力。

Abstract: Recent research on the robustness of Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) under noises or attacks has attracted great attention due to its importance in real-world applications. Most previous methods explore a single noise source, recovering corrupt node embedding by reliable structures bias or developing structure learning with reliable node features. However, the noises and attacks may come from both structures and features in graphs, making the graph denoising a dilemma and challenging problem. In this paper, we develop a unified graph denoising (UGD) framework to unravel the deadlock between structure and feature denoising. Specifically, a high-order neighborhood proximity evaluation method is proposed to recognize noisy edges, considering features may be perturbed simultaneously. Moreover, we propose to refine noisy features with reconstruction based on a graph auto-encoder. An iterative updating algorithm is further designed to optimize the framework and acquire a clean graph, thus enabling robust graph learning for downstream tasks. Our UGD framework is self-supervised and can be easily implemented as a plug-and-play module. We carry out extensive experiments, which proves the effectiveness and advantages of our method. Code is avalaible at https://github.com/YoungTimmy/UGD.

</details>


### [422] [Aeroengine performance prediction using a physical-embedded data-driven method](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00501)
*Tong Mo,Shiran Dai,An Fu,Xiaomeng Zhu,Shuxiao Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种融合航空发动机领域知识与神经网络领域知识的策略，用于航空发动机性能参数的实时预测。通过领域知识指导网络结构设计和信息流调控，设计四种特征融合方法和创新损失函数，在两个数据集上验证了该策略在精度、效率、参数效率、数据依赖性和可解释性方面的优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有航空发动机性能预测方法难以在预测精度、计算效率、建模复杂度和数据依赖性之间取得理想平衡。

Method: 融合航空发动机与神经网络双领域知识：利用发动机领域知识设计网络结构并调控内部信息流；利用神经网络领域知识设计四种特征融合方法和创新损失函数。

Result: (1)定制化损失函数具有明显优势；(2)模型在参数更少的情况下性能持平或更优；(3)相比通用神经网络架构，数据依赖性更低；(4)相比传统黑箱机器学习方法更具可解释性。

Conclusion: 所提策略有效平衡了预测精度、计算效率、建模复杂度和数据依赖性，在航空发动机性能实时预测任务中优于现有方法。

Abstract: Accurate and efficient prediction of aeroengine performance is of paramount importance for engine design, maintenance, and optimization endeavours. However, existing methodologies often struggle to strike an optimal balance among predictive accuracy, computational efficiency, modelling complexity, and data dependency. To address these challenges, we propose a strategy that synergistically combines domain knowledge from both the aeroengine and neural network realms to enable real-time prediction of engine performance parameters. Leveraging aeroengine domain knowledge, we judiciously design the network structure and regulate the internal information flow. Concurrently, drawing upon neural network domain expertise, we devise four distinct feature fusion methods and introduce an innovative loss function formulation. To rigorously evaluate the effectiveness and robustness of our proposed strategy, we conduct comprehensive validation across two distinct datasets. The empirical results demonstrate :(1) the evident advantages of our tailored loss function; (2) our model's ability to maintain equal or superior performance with a reduced parameter count; (3) our model's reduced data dependency compared to generalized neural network architectures; (4)Our model is more interpretable than traditional black box machine learning methods.

</details>


### [423] [Generating Physical Dynamics under Priors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00730)
*Zihan Zhou,Xiaoxue Wang,Tianshu Yu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种将物理先验（分布先验和物理可行性先验）融入扩散生成模型的框架，用于生成符合物理规律的高质量动力学数据（轨迹和流），在多种物理现象上展现出鲁棒性和优异性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数据驱动的动力学生成方法往往忽略物理先验的融合，导致生成结果违反基本物理定律（如能量守恒、动量守恒）且性能欠佳。因此，需要一种既能利用数据驱动灵活性又能严格遵循物理约束的生成框架。

Method: 将两类物理先验嵌入扩散模型：1) 分布先验，如旋转-平移不变性；2) 物理可行性先验，包括能量守恒、动量守恒定律以及偏微分方程约束。通过将这些先验约束融入扩散生成过程，确保输出动力学数据的物理一致性。

Result: 在多种物理现象的动力学生成任务上，该方法生成了高质量、物理真实的轨迹和流，表现出显著的鲁棒性，优于忽略物理先验的基线方法。

Conclusion: 该工作为AI4Physics中的数据驱动研究提供了有力工具，标志着生成建模领域在生成准确且物理一致的动力学数据方面取得了实质性进展。

Abstract: Generating physically feasible dynamics in a data-driven context is challenging, especially when adhering to physical priors expressed in specific equations or formulas. Existing methodologies often overlook the integration of physical priors, resulting in violation of basic physical laws and suboptimal performance. In this paper, we introduce a novel framework that seamlessly incorporates physical priors into diffusion-based generative models to address this limitation. Our approach leverages two categories of priors: 1) distributional priors, such as roto-translational invariance, and 2) physical feasibility priors, including energy and momentum conservation laws and PDE constraints. By embedding these priors into the generative process, our method can efficiently generate physically realistic dynamics, encompassing trajectories and flows. Empirical evaluations demonstrate that our method produces high-quality dynamics across a diverse array of physical phenomena with remarkable robustness, underscoring its potential to advance data-driven studies in AI4Physics. Our contributions signify a substantial advancement in the field of generative modeling, offering a robust solution to generate accurate and physically consistent dynamics.

</details>


### [424] [A Natural Language Processing Framework for Hotel Recommendation Based on Users' Text Reviews](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00716)
*Lavrentia Aravani,Emmanuel Pintelas,Christos Pierrakeas,Panagiotis Pintelas*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于BERT的NLP框架，通过分析用户文本评论将酒店推荐分类为“差”、“好”或“极好”，从而提供个性化酒店推荐系统。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 利用深度学习尤其是NLP技术从用户文本评论中提取语义知识，构建更高效的酒店推荐系统，以提升用户预订住宿的体验。

Method: 基于BERT（双向编码器表示变换器）的NLP框架，结合微调/验证流水线，将客户酒店评论文本分类为“差”、“好”或“极好”三个推荐类别。

Result: 所提出的酒店推荐系统能够显著提升用户预订住宿的体验，通过基于用户偏好和历史预订记录提供个性化推荐。

Conclusion: 基于BERT的NLP框架能够有效利用用户文本评论进行情感分类，从而实现个性化的酒店推荐，改善用户体验。

Abstract: Recently, the application of Artificial Intelligence algorithms in hotel recommendation systems has become an increasingly popular topic. One such method that has proven to be effective in this field is Deep Learning, especially Natural Language processing models, which are able to extract semantic knowledge from user's text reviews to create more efficient recommendation systems. This can lead to the development of intelligent models that can classify a user's preferences and emotions based on their feedback in the form of text reviews about their hotel stay experience. In this study, we propose a Natural Language Processing framework that utilizes customer text reviews to provide personalized recommendations for the most appropriate hotel based on their preferences. The framework is based on Bidirectional Encoder Representations from Transformers (BERT) and a fine-tuning/validation pipeline that categorizes customer hotel review texts into "Bad," "Good," or "Excellent" recommended hotels. Our findings indicate that the hotel recommendation system we propose can significantly enhance the user experience of booking accommodations by providing personalized recommendations based on user preferences and previous booking history.

</details>


### [425] [Stochastic stem bucking using mixture density neural networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00510)
*Simon Schmiedel*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于LSTM神经网络的随机造材方法，通过预测未测量树干部分的概率分布并生成多个样本，优化森林采伐机的造材决策。在四种针叶树种上的实验表明，随机LSTM模型优于确定性LSTM和多项式基准模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 森林采伐机在造材时需要预测未测量部分的树干轮廓，但现有方法难以做出最优决策。本研究旨在通过随机造材方法改善采伐机的决策质量，减少因错误造材造成的木材产品价值损失。

Method: 使用LSTM神经网络预测树干未测量部分的高斯分布参数，基于已知树干部分的条件生成多个轮廓样本；然后通过随机造材算法利用所有生成的轮廓样本来优化造材决策。

Result: 在加拿大东部四种针叶树种的树干轮廓数据上，随机LSTM模型总体上取得了最好的造材决策结果，确定性LSTM模型次之，多项式模型最差。

Conclusion: 随机LSTM造材方法能够有效提升造材决策质量，验证了基于多个测量值进行树干曲线条件预测的实用价值。

Abstract: Poor bucking decisions made by forest harvesters can have a negative effect on the products that are generated from the logs. Making the right bucking decisions is not an easy task because harvesters must rely on predictions of the stem profile for the part of the stems that is not yet measured. The goal of this project is to improve the bucking decisions made by forest harvesters with a stochastic bucking method. We developed a Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) neural network that predicted the parameters of a Gaussian distribution conditioned on the known part of the stem, enabling the creation of multiple samples of stem profile predictions for the unknown part of the stem. The bucking decisions could then be optimized using a novel stochastic bucking algorithm which used all the stem profiles generated to choose the logs to generate from the stem. The stochastic bucking algorithm was compared to two benchmark models: A polynomial model that could not condition its predictions on more than one diameter measurement, and a deterministic LSTM neural network. All models were evaluated on stem profiles of four coniferous species prevalent in eastern Canada. In general, the best bucking decisions were taken by the stochastic LSTM models, demonstrating the usefulness of the method. The second-best results were mostly obtained by the deterministic LSTM model and the worst results by the polynomial model, corroborating the usefulness of conditioning the stem curve predictions on multiple measurements.

</details>


### [426] [Interpretable Clustering: A Survey](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00743)
*Lianyu Hu,Mudi Jiang,Junjie Dong,Xinying Liu,Zengyou He*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文综述了可解释聚类算法的现状，提出了一套区分不同方法的分类标准，并建立了开源资源库以促进透明且高效聚类算法的开发与应用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有聚类研究过分追求准确率和效率，忽视了可解释性。然而在高风险领域（如医疗、金融、自动驾驶）中，透明且可解释的聚类结果对于赢得用户信任、满足伦理与法规要求至关重要。

Method: 本文采用系统性文献综述方法，对当前可解释聚类算法进行全面梳理，并基于关键区分标准建立了分类体系（taxonomy），同时构建了开源仓库对代表性方法进行分类整理。

Result: 提出了一套区分不同可解释聚类方法的关键标准，构建了系统的分类学框架，并建立了开放资源库（https://hulianyu.xyz/Interpretable-Clustering-Repository）以方便研究者查阅和比较各类方法。

Conclusion: 本文的综述和分类体系能够帮助研究人员针对具体应用场景选择最合适的可解释聚类方法，同时推动兼具高效性与透明性的聚类算法的发展与采纳。

Abstract: In recent years, much of the research on clustering algorithms has primarily focused on enhancing their accuracy and efficiency, frequently at the expense of interpretability. However, as these methods are increasingly being applied in high-stakes domains such as healthcare, finance, and autonomous systems, the need of transparent and interpretable clustering outcomes has become a critical concern. This is not only necessary for gaining user trust but also for satisfying the growing ethical and regulatory demands in these fields. Ensuring that decisions derived from clustering algorithms can be clearly understood and justified is now a fundamental requirement. To address this need, this paper provides a comprehensive and structured review of the current state of explainable clustering algorithms, identifying key criteria to distinguish between various methods. These insights can effectively assist researchers in making informed decisions about the most suitable explainable clustering methods for specific application contexts, while also promoting the development and adoption of clustering algorithms that are both efficient and transparent. For convenient access and reference, an open repository organizes representative and emerging interpretable clustering methods under the taxonomy proposed in this survey, available at https://hulianyu.xyz/Interpretable-Clustering-Repository

</details>


### [427] [Tamper-Resistant Safeguards for Open-Weight LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00761)
*Rishub Tamirisa,Bhrugu Bharathi,Long Phan,Andy Zhou,Alice Gatti,Tarun Suresh,Maxwell Lin,Justin Wang,Rowan Wang,Ron Arel,Andy Zou,Dawn Song,Bo Li,Dan Hendrycks,Mantas Mazeika*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出TAR方法，通过将防篡改保护机制嵌入开放权重的大型语言模型中，使得即使经过数百步微调，攻击者也无法移除安全护栏，从而实现在保持模型良性能力的同时显著提升防篡改能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 开放权重LLM面临独特的安全挑战：现有的拒绝机制和遗忘保护等安全措施极易被攻击者通过少量微调步骤移除，缺乏对权重篡改攻击的鲁棒性，亟需新的方法来实现开放权重LLM的安全发布。

Method: 提出TAR（Tamper-Resistant Safeguards）方法，将防篡改机制直接构建到开放权重LLM中，使安全护栏在数百步微调后仍难以被移除。

Result: 在广泛的评估和红队分析中，TAR方法大幅提升了模型的防篡改能力，同时保持了模型的良性能力不受影响。

Conclusion: 防篡改技术的进步是可行的，这为提升开放权重LLM的安全性和可靠性开辟了新的有前景的方向。

Abstract: Rapid advances in the capabilities of large language models (LLMs) have raised widespread concerns regarding their potential for malicious use. Open-weight LLMs present unique challenges, as existing safeguards lack robustness to tampering attacks that modify model weights. For example, recent works have demonstrated that refusal and unlearning safeguards can be trivially removed with a few steps of fine-tuning. These vulnerabilities necessitate new approaches for enabling the safe release of open-weight LLMs. We develop a method, called TAR, for building tamper-resistant safeguards into open-weight LLMs such that adversaries cannot remove the safeguards even after hundreds of steps of fine-tuning. In extensive evaluations and red teaming analyses, we find that our method greatly improves tamper-resistance while preserving benign capabilities. Our results demonstrate that progress on tamper-resistance is possible, opening up a promising new avenue to improve the safety and security of open-weight LLMs.

</details>


### [428] [A Medical Low-Back Pain Physical Rehabilitation Dataset for Human Body Movement Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00521)
*Sao Mai Nguyen,Maxime Devanne,Olivier Remy-Neris,Mathieu Lempereur,André Thepaut*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对物理康复智能辅导系统的开发与评估，提出了四个待解决挑战，并构建了一个包含3D Kinect骨架、RGB视频、2D骨架数据及医疗标注的低背痛康复练习临床数据集。通过GMM和LSTM两个基线算法进行基准测试，展示了该数据集在临床环境、成本效益和康复相关性方面的价值，同时指出当前算法仍有改进空间。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 虽然非医疗领域中的自动监测和练习辅导已取得令人鼓舞的成果，但仍存在误差和适用场景有限等局限。为了支持智能辅导系统在物理康复领域的发展与评估，需要解决相关挑战并构建高质量的医疗数据集。

Method: 文章识别了四个关键挑战，构建了包含低背痛患者康复练习的临床数据集，涵盖3D Kinect骨架位置与朝向、RGB视频、2D骨架数据以及正确性评估、错误分类与定位（身体部位和时间跨度）的医疗标注。在此基础上，从数据采集到处理完成了完整研究流程，并采用概率方法（GMM）和深度学习方法（LSTM）两种基线算法进行了基准测试。

Result: 在数据集上对两种基线运动识别算法进行了评估，GMM代表概率方法，LSTM代表深度学习方法，结果表明数据集在临床康复环境、使用成本效益高的便携传感器以及包含康复相关动作方面具有价值，同时也显示了在这些挑战上存在改进潜力。

Conclusion: 该数据集的价值在于：在临床环境中采集真实康复患者的动作数据，使用经济、便携且方便的传感器，包含康复相关动作，并且实验表明在这些挑战上仍有改进空间，可为物理康复智能辅导系统的发展提供支持。

Abstract: While automatic monitoring and coaching of exercises are showing encouraging results in non-medical applications, they still have limitations such as errors and limited use contexts. To allow the development and assessment of physical rehabilitation by an intelligent tutoring system, we identify in this article four challenges to address and propose a medical dataset of clinical patients carrying out low back-pain rehabilitation exercises. The dataset includes 3D Kinect skeleton positions and orientations, RGB videos, 2D skeleton data, and medical annotations to assess the correctness, and error classification and localisation of body part and timespan. Along this dataset, we perform a complete research path, from data collection to processing, and finally a small benchmark. We evaluated on the dataset two baseline movement recognition algorithms, pertaining to two different approaches: the probabilistic approach with a Gaussian Mixture Model (GMM), and the deep learning approach with a Long-Short Term Memory (LSTM).
  This dataset is valuable because it includes rehabilitation relevant motions in a clinical setting with patients in their rehabilitation program, using a cost-effective, portable, and convenient sensor, and because it shows the potential for improvement on these challenges.

</details>


### [429] [Generalized Multi-hop Traffic Pressure for Heterogeneous Traffic Perimeter Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00753)
*Xiaocan Li,Xiaoyu Wang,Ilia Smirnov,Scott Sanner,Baher Abdulhai*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出基于多跳交通压力的异质边界控制方法，通过马尔可夫链理论深入感知保护区内部拥堵状态，采用两阶段分层控制框架重新分配深度强化学习同质控制策略的准入流量，在高度空间异质场景下显著优于传统同质控制方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 同质边界控制在保护区内部拥堵呈现空间异质（如OD流量失衡）时表现不佳，因其未考虑各边界交叉口的局部交通状态。简单采用1跳交通压力指标过于短视，无法有效感知保护区内部深层拥堵信息。

Method: 基于马尔可夫链理论构建多跳下游交通压力指标，实现"更深层"的保护区内部拥堵感知；提出两阶段分层控制方案，利用该多跳压力对预训练的深度强化学习同质控制策略提供的总准入流量进行异质再分配。

Result: 在OD流量高度失衡且空间异质性强的场景下，基于多跳压力的异质边界控制显著优于同质控制；通过敏感性分析验证了方法对转向比不确定性的鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 多跳压力指标能有效捕捉保护区内部的空间异质拥堵状态，所提出的异质边界控制方法在复杂交通场景下具有显著优势且鲁棒性强。

Abstract: Perimeter control (PC) prevents loss of traffic network capacity due to congestion in urban areas. Homogeneous PC allows all access points to a protected region to have identical permitted inflow. However, homogeneous PC performs poorly when the congestion in the protected region is heterogeneous (e.g., imbalanced demand) since the homogeneous PC does not consider specific traffic conditions around each perimeter intersection. When the protected region has spatially heterogeneous congestion, one needs to modulate the perimeter inflow rate to be higher near low-density regions and vice versa for high-density regions. A naïve approach is to leverage 1-hop traffic pressure to measure traffic condition around perimeter intersections, but such metric is too spatially myopic for PC. To address this issue, we formulate multi-hop downstream pressure grounded on Markov chain theory, which ``looks deeper'' into the protected region beyond perimeter intersections. In addition, we formulate a two-stage hierarchical control scheme that can leverage this novel multi-hop pressure to redistribute the total permitted inflow provided by a pre-trained deep reinforcement learning homogeneous control policy. Experimental results show that our heterogeneous PC approaches leveraging multi-hop pressure significantly outperform homogeneous PC in scenarios where the origin-destination flows are highly imbalanced with high spatial heterogeneity. Moveover, our approach is shown to be robust against turning ratio uncertainties by a sensitivity analysis.

</details>


<div id='physics.flu-dyn'></div>

# physics.flu-dyn [[Back]](#toc)

### [430] [Modeling film flows down a rotating slippery cylinder](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00589)
*Souradip Chattopadhyay,Amar K. Gaonkar,Hangjie Ji*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文研究了含滑移边界条件下垂直旋转圆柱内外表面重力驱动黏性液膜的非线性稳定性与动力学行为，发现壁面滑移增强不稳定性，旋转对外表面和内表面流动具有相反的影响，并揭示了滑移长度和旋转对液膜破碎及节流现象的调控机制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究旋转和壁面滑移对垂直圆柱内外表面重力驱动黏性液膜稳定性的联合影响，超越线性范围，揭示非线性动力学行为及液膜演化规律。

Method: 建立考虑旋转与壁面滑移联合效应的渐近模型；进行线性稳定性分析；开展弱非线性稳定性分析，研究分岔行为；分析行波解及其稳定性；通过数值模拟非线性自由表面演化。

Result: 壁面滑移增强内外表面不稳定性；旋转对外表面放大滑移导致的不稳定性，对内表面则抑制；滑移长度增加加剧内表面节流现象，旋转可延缓该效应；外表面流动中旋转导致液膜破碎为液滴。

Conclusion: 旋转和滑移对液膜稳定性具有复杂的耦合作用，表现为内外表面不同的调控机制；滑移促进节流和液滴形成，而旋转可部分抵消滑移的不稳定效应。

Abstract: This study investigates the nonlinear stability and dynamics of gravity-driven viscous films on a vertical rotating cylinder, considering both outer and inner surface flows with slip conditions at the cylinder wall. We develop an asymptotic model for the combined effects of rotation and wall slippage. Linear stability analysis indicates that wall slippage enhances instability on both surfaces, while rotation has differing impacts: it amplifies instability due to slip for outer surface flow but reduces it for inner surface flow. A weakly nonlinear stability analysis is then conducted to explore the combined impact of rotation and wall slip on flow stability beyond the linear regime, including the bifurcation of the nonlinear evolution equation for both surfaces. The traveling wave solution of the model is analyzed, showing how rotation affects nonlinear wave speed with a slippery wall. A stability analysis of the traveling wave solutions is also performed. Numerical simulations of the nonlinear evolution of the free surface reveal that increasing slip length enhances the choke phenomenon in inner surface flow, while rotation can delay this effect. Additionally, simulations show that for flow along the outer surface of a slippery rotating cylinder, the film tends to break up into droplets in the presence of rotation.

</details>


### [431] [Modelling aerodynamic forces and torques of spheroid particles in compressible flows](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00333)
*Yibin Du,Ming Yu,Chongwen Jiang,Xianxu Yuan*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本研究通过对约1000个数值模拟案例（涵盖宽范围马赫数、雷诺数和颗粒长径比）进行斯皮尔曼相关性分析，改进了可压缩流中椭球颗粒的阻力、升力和俯仰力矩系数的经验公式。新公式在低马赫数极限下与不可压缩流公式一致，平均相对误差小于5%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有可压缩流中椭球颗粒的气动载荷（阻力、升力、俯仰力矩）经验公式不够精确，需要基于大量数值模拟数据进行细化改进。

Method: 采用数值模拟计算约1000个案例（涵盖宽范围马赫数、雷诺数和颗粒长径比），通过斯皮尔曼相关性分析识别与力和力矩强相关的关键参数，据此细化经验公式。

Result: 新公式在低马赫数极限下与不可压缩流对应公式一致，预测平均相对误差小于5%，表明其准确性和鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 改进后的经验公式能够在可压缩流条件下可靠预测椭球颗粒的气动载荷，提升了现有经验模型的精度。

Abstract: In the present study, we conduct numerical simulations of compressible flows around spheroid particles, for the purpose of refining empirical formulas for drag force, lift force, and pitching torque acting on them. Through an analysis of approximately a thousand numerical simulation cases spanning a wide range of Mach numbers, Reynolds numbers and particle aspect ratios, we first identify the crucial parameters that are strongly correlated with the forces and torques via Spearman correlation analysis, based on which the empirical formulas for the drag force, lift force and pitching torque coefficients are refined. The novel formulas developed for compressible flows exhibit consistency with their incompressible counterparts at low Mach number limits and, moreover, yield accurate predictions with average relative errors of less than 5%. This underscores their robustness and reliability in predicting aerodynamic loads on spheroidal particles under various flow conditions.

</details>


### [432] [Developing a Model-Consistent Reduced-Dimensionality training approach to quantify and reduce epistemic uncertainty in separated flows](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00120)
*Minghan Chu*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种数据同化辅助的模型一致性训练方法，通过集成集合卡尔曼方法训练自编码器，以降低分离流状态估计中的认知不确定性，输入特征直接来自RANS湍流模型等物理模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 降低分离流状态估计中的认知不确定性（epistemic uncertainty），提高湍流预测的准确性。

Method: 采用数据同化（ensemble Kalman method）辅助训练自编码器（autoencoders），确保输入特征直接来自基于物理的模型（如RANS湍流模型），实现模型一致性训练（model-consistent training）。

Result: 该方法能够有效处理高维时空离散化数据，为提升湍流预测的模型准确性和性能提供了稳健框架。

Conclusion: 数据同化辅助的模型一致性训练方法能够有效降低分离流中认知不确定性，自编码器结合集合卡尔曼方法为高维湍流预测提供了可行的解决方案。

Abstract: This proposed work introduces a data-assimilation-assisted approach to train neural networks, aimed at effectively reducing epistemic uncertainty in state estimates of separated flows. This method, referred to as model-consistent training, ensures that input features are derived directly from physics-based models, such as Reynolds Averaged Navier Stokes (RANS) turbulence models, to accurately represent the current state of the flow. Autoencoders have been selected for this task due to their capability to capture essential information from large datasets, making them particularly suitable for handling high-dimensional data with numerous discretization points in both spatial and temporal dimensions. This innovative approach integrates the ensemble Kalman method to enhance the training process, providing a robust framework for improving model accuracy and performance in turbulent flow predictions.

</details>


### [433] [Generative prediction of flow fields around an obstacle using the diffusion model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00735)
*Jiajun Hu,Zhen Lu,Yue Yang*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 提出一种几何到流场的扩散模型，利用障碍物形状作为输入预测周围流场，通过条件化马尔可夫过程（U-Net+交叉注意力）实现，在简单和复杂几何体上优于CNN和VAE模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 利用障碍物几何形状直接预测流场，解决传统CFD计算成本高的问题，以及现有深度学习方法在处理复杂几何形状时泛化能力不足的问题。

Method: 基于可学习的马尔可夫转移核构建扩散模型，以障碍物几何为条件进行去噪；采用U-Net实现每一步的噪声估计，并通过交叉注意力机制将几何信息作为提示融入模型。

Result: 在简单几何（圆、椭圆、矩形、三角形）和复杂几何（交叉形状、"PKU"字符）测试中，该模型在瞬时流场预测和复杂几何处理上均优于CNN和VAE基线，定量分析验证了准确性和鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 几何到流场扩散模型能有效预测绕流流场，尤其在复杂几何条件下表现出较强的泛化能力和鲁棒性。

Abstract: We propose a geometry-to-flow diffusion model that utilizes obstacle shape as input to predict a flow field around an obstacle. The model is based on a learnable Markov transition kernel to recover the data distribution from the Gaussian distribution. The Markov process is conditioned on the obstacle geometry, estimating the noise to be removed at each step, implemented via a U-Net. A cross-attention mechanism incorporates the geometry as a prompt. We train the geometry-to-flow diffusion model using a dataset of flows around simple obstacles, including circles, ellipses, rectangles, and triangles. For comparison, two CNN-based models and a VAE model are trained on the same dataset. Tests are carried out on flows around obstacles with simple and complex geometries, representing interpolation and generalization on the geometry condition, respectively. To evaluate performance under demanding conditions, the test set incorporates scenarios including crosses and the characters `PKU.' Generated flow fields show that the geometry-to-flow diffusion model is superior to the CNN-based models and the VAE model in predicting instantaneous flow fields and handling complex geometries. Quantitative analysis of the accuracy and divergence demonstrates the model's robustness.

</details>


### [434] [Freezing receding contact lines](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00385)
*Rodolphe Grivet,Axel Huerre,Thomas Séon,Laurent Duchemin,Christophe Josserand*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 实验研究Peltier模块从水中拉出时接触线的后退现象，同时冰层以恒定速度生长，达到动态稳定弯月面。通过弯月面高度推导流动特性，高拉速时与Landau-Levich薄膜有关，低拉速时与水在冰上的接触角直接相关，数值模拟得出接触角约6°。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究冰层生长条件下接触线后退的动力学特性，揭示弯月面高度与流动参数之间的定量关系，并确定水在冰上的接触角。

Method: 实验上以恒定速度将Peltier模块从水浴中拉出，同时在模块表面以恒定速度生长冰层，测量不同参数下的稳态弯月面高度；数值求解考虑水凝固的弯月面方程。

Result: 弯月面高度主导流动特性；高拉速时与Landau-Levich薄膜冻结相关；低拉速时弯月面高度由水在冰上的接触角决定；数值拟合得出水在冰上的接触角约为6°。

Conclusion: 在冰层生长与基板拉出同时进行的条件下，弯月面高度是描述流动的关键参数，并可通过数值模拟反推出水在冰上的接触角约为6°。

Abstract: We investigate experimentally the receding of a contact line when a Peltier module is pulled out of a water bath at constant speed, while a ice layer is also growing at constant speed on the Peltier module. A steady regime is therefore reached for all the parameters used in this studied, corresponding to a dynamical stationnary meniscus. We show that the height of the meniscus provides most of the properties of the flow. For high pulling rate, it is related to the amount of liquid of the equivalent Landau-Levich (LL) film that would be extracted from the bath, which is eventually freezing as the plate is lifted upward. For smaller velocity, so that no LL film would be formed without freezing, the meniscus height is directly linked to the contact angle of water on ice in these conditions. Solving numerically the meniscus equation taking into account the solidifcation of water, our results suggest that the contact angle of water on ice should be around $6^\circ$.

</details>


### [435] [Investigation of Surfactant-Laden Bubble Migration Dynamics in Self-Rewetting Fluids using Lattice Boltzmann Method](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00146)
*Bashir Elbousefi,William Schupbach,Kannan N. Premnath,Samuel W. J. Welch*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文利用基于中心矩的格子玻尔兹曼方法，系统研究了表面活性剂对自润湿流体中气泡迁移行为的影响。结果表明，与普通流体中气泡持续迁移不同，自润湿流体中气泡会达到平衡位置；添加表面活性剂会使平衡位置向上游移动，其移动幅度受吉布斯弹性参数和表面张力对温度的二次敏感性系数共同调控。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自润湿流体中表面张力随温度呈非线性（二次）变化，导致其热毛细对流行为与普通流体截然不同；同时表面活性剂通过吸附改变界面动力学。然而，温度和表面活性剂共同诱导的马兰戈尼应力对自润湿流体中气泡迁移的耦合效应尚未被探索。

Method: 采用基于中心矩的鲁棒格子玻尔兹曼方法，模拟两相流体运动、捕捉界面，并计算能量和表面活性剂浓度场的输运过程，系统研究自润湿流体中表面活性剂负载气泡的动力学行为。

Result: 1) 自润湿流体中气泡向最低温度位置迁移并达到平衡位置，而非像普通流体中持续迁移；2) 无表面活性剂时平衡位置在域中心（最低参考温度处）；3) 添加表面活性剂使平衡位置上移，受吉布斯弹性参数控制；4) 表面张力对温度的二次敏感性系数越低，表面活性剂对平衡位置的调节作用越显著。

Conclusion: 揭示了自润湿流体中温度和表面活性剂诱导马兰戈尼应力的耦合机制，为调控气泡动力学行为、特别是平衡状态的调节提供了新手段。

Abstract: Self-rewetting fluids (SRFs) (e.g., aqueous solutions of long-chain alcohols) show anomalous nonlinear (quadratic) variations of surface tension with temperature involving a positive gradient, leading to different thermocapillary convection compared to normal fluids (NFs). Moreover, surface-active materials or surfactants can significantly alter interfacial dynamics by their adsorption on fluid interfaces. The coupled effects of temperature- and surfactant-induced Marangoni stresses on migration bubbles in SRFs remain unexplored. We use a robust lattice Boltzmann (LB) method based on central moments to simulate the two-fluid motions, capture interfaces, and compute the transport of energy and surfactant concentration fields, and systematically study the surfactant-laden bubble dynamics in SRFs. When compared to motion of bubbles in normal fluids, in which they continuously migrate without a stationary behavior, our results show that they exhibit dramatically different characteristics in SRFs. Not only is the bubble motion directed towards the minimum temperature location in SRFs, but, more importantly, the bubble attains an equilibrium position. In the absence of surfactants, such an equilibrium position arises at the minimum reference temperature occurring at the center of the domain. The addition of surfactants moves the equilibrium location further upstream, which is controlled by the magnitude of the Gibbs elasticity parameter that determines the magnitude of the surface tension variation with surfactants. The quadratic sensitivity coefficient of surface tension on temperature associated with the SRF modulates this behavior. The lower this quantity, the greater is the role of surfactants modifying the equilibrium position of the bubble in SRF. These findings provide new means to potentially manipulate the bubble dynamics, and especially to tune its equilibrium states.

</details>


### [436] [Influence of fluid rheology on multistability in the unstable flow of polymer solutions through pore constriction arrays](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00778)
*Emily Y. Chen,Sujit S. Datta*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文研究了聚合物溶液在多孔介质中流动时，由弹性应力积累和耗散引起的弹性流动不稳定性及其多稳态现象。通过实验发现，多稳态性的出现可以用一个无量纲参数——流向Deborah数来描述，该参数比较了聚合物溶液的应力松弛时间与流体在孔隙收缩间对流的时间。研究揭示了流体流变性（剪切变稀和弹性）对弹性不稳定性的影响，为设计具有理想流动行为的聚合物流体提供了指导。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 聚合物溶液在多孔介质中的流动广泛存在于化学、能源、环境和工业过程中。在低雷诺数条件下（Re ≪ 1），弹性应力积累可导致复杂的弹性流动不稳定性，在1D有序孔隙收缩阵列中表现为多稳态（不同孔隙呈现不同不稳定流动状态）。然而，流体流变性（如剪切变稀和弹性）如何影响这种多稳态行为尚不清楚，本文旨在揭示这一影响机制。

Method: 通过实验方法，使用多种具有系统性剪切变稀或弹性变化的聚合物溶液，在不同几何形状的孔隙收缩阵列中进行流动实验，观察多稳态行为的onset（起始点）。

Result: 发现多稳态性的onset可以用一个单一的无量纲参数——流向Deborah数（De_streamwise）来描述。该参数定义为聚合物溶液的应力松弛时间与流体在相邻孔隙收缩之间被对流输送所需时间之比。

Conclusion: 本文深化了对流体流变性影响弹性不稳定性的理解，为合理设计具有理想流动行为的聚合物流体建立了指导原则。

Abstract: Diverse chemical, energy, environmental, and industrial processes involve the flow of polymer solutions in porous media. The accumulation and dissipation of elastic stresses as the polymers are transported through the tortuous, confined pore space can lead to the development of an elastic flow instability above a threshold flow rate. This flow instability can generate complex flows with strong spatiotemporal fluctuations, despite the low Reynolds number ($\mathrm{Re} \ll 1$); for example, in 1D ordered arrays of pore constrictions, this unstable flow can be multistable, with distinct pores exhibiting distinct unstable flow states. Here, we examine how this multistability is influenced by fluid rheology. Through experiments using diverse polymer solutions having systematic variations in fluid shear-thinning or elasticity, in pore constriction arrays of varying geometries, we show that the onset of multistability can be described using a single dimensionless parameter. This parameter, the streamwise Deborah number, compares the stress relaxation time of the polymer solution to the time required for the fluid to be advected between pore constrictions. Our work thus helps to deepen understanding of the influence of fluid rheology on elastic instabilities, helping to establish guidelines for the rational design of polymeric fluids with desirable flow behaviors.

</details>


### [437] [Inertial Particle Dynamics in Traveling Wave Flow](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00484)
*P. Swaathi,Sanjit Das,N. Nirmal Thyagu*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文利用有限时间李雅普诺夫指数（FTLE）和惯性有限时间李雅普诺夫指数（iFTLE）研究了行波流中惯性粒子的拉格朗日动力学，发现重粒子被FTLE场脊吸引而轻粒子被排斥，揭示了惯性粒子在混沌流中的混合、 segregation 和拉格朗日相干结构形成机制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 此前研究虽利用Maxey-Riley方程研究了气溶胶和气泡在标准系统中的动力学，但尚未探索它们在行波流中的动力学行为。行波流中惯性粒子的混合、 segregation 及拉格朗日相干结构形成机制仍属空白。

Method: 首先利用柯西-格林变形张量计算基流体行波流的FTLE；进而将计算扩展到惯性粒子，得到iFTLE，通过比较两者的差异来刻画轻重粒子的不同动力学行为。

Result: 较重惯性粒子倾向于被FTLE场的脊（拉伸区域）吸引，而较轻粒子则被排斥；行波流中惯性粒子表现出明显的混合与相空间 segregation，并形成拉格朗日相干结构。

Conclusion: 该研究为理解惯性粒子在混沌流体流动中的复杂非直观行为提供了新见解，对大气和海洋科学等广泛领域的污染物输运预测、混合过程优化及流体环境导航跟踪具有潜在应用价值。

Abstract: The dynamics of inertial particles in fluid flows have been the focus of extensive research due to their relevance in a wide range of industrial and environmental processes. Earlier studies have examined the dynamics of aerosols and bubbles using the Maxey-Riley equation in some standard systems but their dynamics within the traveling wave flow remain unexplored. In this paper, we study the Lagrangian dynamics of inertial particles in the traveling wave flow which shows mixing, and segregation in phase space as well as the formation of Lagrangian Coherent Structures (LCS). We first obtain the finite-time Lyapunov exponent (FTLEs) for the base fluid flow defined by the traveling wave flow using the Cauchy-Green deformation tensor. Further, we extend our calculations to the inertial particles to get the inertial finite-time Lyapunov exponent (iFTLEs). Our findings reveal that heavier inertial particles tend to be attracted to the ridges of the FTLE fields, while lighter particles are repelled. By understanding how material elements in a flow separate and stretch, one can predict pollutant dispersion, optimize the mixing process, and improve navigation and tracking in fluid environments. This provides insights into the complex and non-intuitive behavior of inertial particles in chaotic fluid flows, and may have implications for pollutant transport in wide-ranging fields such as atmospheric and oceanic sciences.

</details>


### [438] [Turbulence modulation in liquid-liquid two-phase Taylor-Couette turbulence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00992)
*Jinghong Su,Cheng Wang,Yi-bao Zhang,Fan Xu,Junwu Wang,Chao Sun*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文通过界面分辨的直接数值模拟，研究了在系统雷诺数6000和韦伯数10下，两相泰勒-库埃特湍流中两相界面、粘度比和密度比对流动统计量的耦合效应。发现中性液滴和低粘度液滴主要通过两相界面增强阻力，而轻液滴通过降低雷诺应力减少阻力；低粘度轻液滴通过进一步减弱近内筒动量输运和隐式降低雷诺应力实现更大的减阻效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究两相泰勒-库埃特湍流中两相界面、粘度比和密度比对流动统计量的耦合效应，揭示不同性质液滴对湍流调制的作用机制。

Method: 采用界面分辨的三维直接数值模拟（DNS），结合流体体积法（VOF），在系统雷诺数6000和韦伯数10条件下，对比研究了中性液滴、低粘度液滴、轻液滴和低粘度轻液滴四种工况。

Result: 中性液滴和低粘度液滴通过两相界面增强阻力；轻液滴通过密度依赖性降低雷诺应力从而减阻；低粘度轻液滴通过进一步降低近内筒动量输运和隐式降低雷诺应力实现更大减阻。界面张力增强湍动能输运，但阻力增强与湍动能输运无强相关。减阻主要由湍流产生项减少导致耗散率降低所引起。

Conclusion: 为两相流中湍流调制提供了新的见解，揭示了密度比和粘度比在液滴诱导阻力增减中的关键耦合作用机制。

Abstract: We investigate the coupling effects of the two-phase interface, viscosity ratio, and density ratio of the dispersed phase to the continuous phase on the flow statistics in two-phase Taylor-Couette turbulence at a system Reynolds number of 6000 and a system Weber number of 10 using interface-resolved three-dimensional direct numerical simulations with the volume-of-fluid method. Our study focuses on four different scenarios: neutral droplets, low-viscosity droplets, light droplets, and low-viscosity light droplets. We find that neutral droplets and low-viscosity droplets primarily contribute to drag enhancement through the two-phase interface, while light droplets reduce the system's drag by explicitly reducing Reynolds stress due to the density dependence of Reynolds stress. Additionally, low-viscosity light droplets contribute to greater drag reduction by further reducing momentum transport near the inner cylinder and implicitly reducing Reynolds stress. While interfacial tension enhances turbulent kinetic energy (TKE) transport, drag enhancement is not strongly correlated with TKE transport for both neutral droplets and low-viscosity droplets. Light droplets primarily reduce the production term by diminishing Reynolds stress, whereas the density contrast between the phases boosts TKE transport near the inner wall. Therefore, the reduction in the dissipation rate is predominantly attributed to decreased turbulence production, causing drag reduction. For low-viscosity light droplets, the production term diminishes further, primarily due to their greater reduction in Reynolds stress, while reduced viscosity weakens the density difference's contribution to TKE transport near the inner cylinder, resulting in a more pronounced reduction in the dissipation rate and consequently stronger drag reduction. Our findings provide new insights into the turbulence modulation in two-phase flow.

</details>


### [439] [Electrolyte spraying within H$_2$ bubbles during water electrolysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00515)
*Aleksandr Bashkatov,Florian Bürkle,Çayan Demirkır,Wei Ding,Vatsal Sanjay,Alexander Babich,Xuegeng Yang,Gerd Mutschke,Jürgen Czarske,Detlef Lohse,Dominik Krug,Lars Büttner,Kerstin Eckert*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文发现电解产生的氢气气泡在析氢反应中会通过微气泡聚并驱动Worthington射流破碎形成的电解液液滴进入气相，导致气泡内不仅含有氢气和蒸汽，还包含电解液组分；这一行为受Marangoni对流影响，并在电极附着气泡情况下促进气泡脱离。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 电解过程中产生的气泡会显著降低电解效率，因此理解气泡动力学对优化水电解器系统至关重要。

Method: 通过正常和微重力环境下的实验，观察析氢反应中气泡的传输机制，分析微气泡聚并引发的Worthington射流破碎及其导致的液滴喷射现象。

Result: 发现H₂气泡并非仅由氢气和蒸汽组成，还包含电解液组分；微气泡聚并驱动电解液液滴进入气相；气泡内部存在流动，受Marangoni对流影响；在电极附着气泡上，喷溅液滴在气泡-电极接触区域形成电解液水坑，影响三相接触线动力学并促进气泡脱离。

Conclusion: 本研究揭示了电解气泡的物理化学特性关键见解，对优化析气电化学系统具有重要意义，同时为电解冶金中酸雾形成、海盐气溶胶生成等相关领域提供了基础认识。

Abstract: Electrolytically generated gas bubbles can significantly hamper the overall electrolysis efficiency. Therefore it is crucial to understand their dynamics in order to optimise water electrolyzer systems. Here we demonstrate a distinct transport mechanism where coalescence with microbubbles drives electrolyte droplets, resulting from the fragmentation of the Worthington jet, into the gas phase during hydrogen evolution reaction, both in normal and microgravity environments. This indicates that the H$_2$ bubble is not only composed of hydrogen gas and vapor but also includes electrolyte fractions. Reminiscent of bursting bubbles on a liquid-gas interface, this behavior results in a flow inside the bubble, which is further affected by Marangoni convection at the gas-electrolyte interface, highlighting interface mobility. In the case of electrode-attached bubbles, the sprayed droplets form electrolyte puddles at the bubble-electrode contact area, affecting the dynamics near the three-phase contact line and favoring bubble detachment from the electrode. The results of this work unravel important insights into the physicochemical aspects of electrolytic gas bubbles, integral for optimizing gas-evolving electrochemical systems. Besides, our findings are essential for studying the limits of jet formation and rupture relevant to acid mist formation in electrowinning, generation of sea spray aerosols, impact of droplets on liquid surfaces, etc.

</details>


### [440] [Lack of self-similarity in transverse velocity increments and circulation statistics in two-dimensional turbulence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00631)
*Nicolás Pablo Müller,Giorgio Krstulovic*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 该论文通过直接数值模拟研究了二维湍流逆能量级联中纵向和横向结构函数以及速度环流的统计特性，发现横向结构函数呈现异常标度行为，而纵向结构函数表现自相似性，并推导出两者标度指数之间的解析关系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理解二维湍流逆能量级联中的统计特性，特别是纵向与横向结构函数的不同标度行为，以及它们与速度环流之间的关系。

Method: 采用不可压缩Navier-Stokes方程的直接数值模拟，分析纵向和横向结构函数以及速度环流的统计特性，并推导解析关系。

Result: 横向结构函数表现出异常标度（非自相似性），而纵向结构函数呈现自相似行为；推导出二维湍流中横向结构函数与速度环流的标度指数之间的解析关系。

Conclusion: 二维湍流逆能量级联中，横向与纵向结构函数表现出不同的标度特性，且横向结构函数与速度环流之间存在解析可推导的标度关系。

Abstract: We study the statistics of longitudinal and transverse structure functions, as well as velocity circulation in the inverse energy cascade of two-dimensional turbulence. By means of direct numerical simulations of the incompressible Navier-Stokes equations, we show that transverse structure functions exhibit an anomalous scaling, in contrast to the self-similar behavior of longitudinal ones. We derive an analytical relation that shows that the scaling exponents of transverse structure functions and velocity circulation are related in two-dimensional turbulence.

</details>


### [441] [2.5D turbulence in shear-thinning jets](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.01038)
*Christian Amor,Giovanni Soligo,Andrea Mazzino,Marco Edoardo Rosti*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 通过直接数值模拟研究剪切稀化流体湍流射流在垂直受限条件下的维度转变，发现了混合维度（2.5D）状态，其中大尺度二维和小尺度三维结构共存，并揭示了多级联过程。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究剪切稀化流体在垂直受限条件下湍流射流的维度转变机制，理解受限程度如何影响流动从三维向二维的演化。

Method: 采用直接数值模拟（DNS）方法对剪切稀化流体的湍流射流进行研究，通过改变垂直受限程度观察流动维度的变化。

Result: 发现了混合维度（2.5D）状态，其中大尺度二维和小尺度三维结构共存；弱受限保持三维湍流，强受限迫使向二维转变，中等受限出现混合维度状态；混合维度状态能量更高，且存在多级联过程（小尺度能量直接级联与大尺度涡量直接级联共存）。

Conclusion: 受限程度决定了剪切稀化流体湍流射流的维度转变行为，混合维度状态揭示了复杂湍流动力学的新机制，对自然和工业中的受限湍流有重要启示。

Abstract: The dimensional transition in turbulent jets of a shear-thinning fluid is studied via direct numerical simulations. Our findings reveal that under vertical confinement, the flow exhibits a unique mixed-dimensional (or 2.5D) state, where large-scale two-dimensional and small-scale three-dimensional structures coexist. This transition from three-dimensional turbulence near the inlet to two-dimensional dynamics downstream is dictated by the level of confinement: weak confinement guarantees turbulence to remain three-dimensional, whereas strong confinement forces the transition to two-dimensions; the mixed-dimensional state is observed for moderate confinement and it emerges as soon as flow scales are larger than the vertical length. In this scenario, we observed that the mixed-dimensional state is an overall more energetic state and it shows a multi-cascade process, where the direct cascade of energy at small scales and the direct cascade of enstrophy at large scales coexist. The results provide insights into the complex dynamics of confined turbulent flows, relevant in both natural and industrial settings.

</details>


### [442] [Direct numerical simulation of two boundary layers with the same pressure distribution but different surface curvatures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00555)
*Philippe Spalart,Kenneth Jansen,Gary Coleman*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文通过两组直接数值模拟（DNS）对比研究了曲率效应与压力梯度效应。一组采用高斯测试凸块与直对壁，另一组采用直测试壁与多孔边界上的吹吸分布（通过势流计算产生相同压力分布）。研究发现，在附着流区域，压力梯度主导物理机理，曲率效应符合预期（凹曲率适度增摩、凸曲率减摩），但常用湍流模型在峰值摩阻附近预测过高，且即使包含曲率修正仍低估曲率效应。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 区分弯曲壁面引起的曲率效应与压力梯度效应在湍流边界层中的独立影响，因为实际流动中二者往往耦合，难以分离。

Method: 采用两组DNS对比：一组为真实凸壁（高斯凸块），另一组为直壁但通过对面多孔边界吹吸产生相同压力分布（势流计算，忽略边界层）。比较限于分离前的附着流区域，并确保入口湍流边界层厚度一致。

Result: 凸曲率强烈使应变率张量在凸顶近零；顺压梯度中形成内层（厚度比入口边界层薄一个量级）；凹曲率适度增摩（无Görtler涡），凸曲率减摩；压力梯度主导物理；常用湍流模型在峰值摩阻附近高估，且低估曲率效应。

Conclusion: 在附着流中压力梯度效应占主导，曲率效应虽可观测但相对次要；现有湍流模型对曲率-压力梯度耦合流动的预测精度不足，需要改进。

Abstract: A pair of Direct Numerical Simulations is used to investigate curvature and pressure effects. One has a Gaussian test bump and a straight opposite wall, while the other has a straight test wall and a blowing/suction distribution on an opposite porous boundary, adjusted to produce the same pressure distribution. The calculation of the transpiration distribution is made in potential flow, ignoring the boundary layer. This problem of specifying a pressure distribution is known to be ill-posed for short waves. We address this issue by considering a pressure distribution that is very smooth compared with the distance from wall to opposite boundary. It is also ill-posed once separation occurs. The pressure distribution of the viscous flow nevertheless ended up very close to the specified one, upstream of separation, and comparisons are confined to that region. In the entry region the boundary layers have essentially the same thicknesses and are well-developed turbulence-wise, which is essential for a valid comparison. The focus is on the attached flow in the favorable and adverse gradients. The convex curvature is strong enough compared with the boundary-layer thickness to make the strain-rate tensor drop to near zero over the top of the bump. An intense internal layer forms in the favorable gradient, an order of magnitude thinner than the incoming boundary layer. The effect of curvature follows expectations: concave curvature moderately raises the skin friction, although without creating Gortler vortices, and convex curvature reduces it. The pressure gradient still dominates the physics. Common turbulence models unfortunately over-predict the skin friction in both flows near its peak, and under-predict the curvature effect even when curvature corrections are included.

</details>


### [443] [Relevance of the Basset history term for Lagrangian particle dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.01041)
*Julio Urizarna-Carasa,Daniel Ruprecht,Alexandra von Kameke,Kathrin Padberg-Gehle*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文研究Maxey-Riley方程中历史项对颗粒拉格朗日动力学的影响，发现忽略该项会导致聚类模式和标量场出现显著差异，尤其在湍流中。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Maxey-Riley方程中的历史项（尾迹效应）常被忽略，但数值和实验证据表明其影响不可忽略，需系统评估其在大尺度拉格朗日动力学中的作用。

Method: 通过数值计算大量颗粒在不同流场中有无历史项的轨迹，对比聚类模式，并计算有限时间李雅普诺夫指数来定量分析标量场差异。

Result: 中等到大斯托克斯数下忽略历史项会导致聚类模式显著差异；即使小颗粒，忽略历史项也会导致标量场差异显著，尤其在湍流中。

Conclusion: Maxey-Riley方程中的历史项对颗粒动力学有重要影响，不能随意忽略，特别是在湍流或中高斯托克斯数条件下。

Abstract: The movement of small but finite spherical particles in a fluid can be described by the Maxey-Riley equation (MRE) if they are too large to be considered passive tracers. The MRE contains an integral "history term" modeling wake effects, which causes the force acting on a particle at some given time to depend on its full past trajectory. The history term causes complications in the numerical solution of the MRE and is therefore often neglected, despite both numerical and experimental evidence that its effects are generally not negligible. By numerically computing trajectories with and without the history term of a large number of particles in different flow fields, we investigate its impact on the large-scale Lagrangian dynamics of simulated particles. We show that for moderate to large Stokes numbers, ignoring the history term leads to significant differences in clustering patterns. Furthermore, we compute finite-time Lyapunov exponents and show that, even for small particles, the differences in the resulting scalar field from ignoring the BHT can be significant, in particular if the underlying flow is turbulent.

</details>


### [444] [Continuous generation of confined bubbles: viscous effect on the gravito-capillary pinch off](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00637)
*Haruka Hitomi,Ko Okumura*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文研究了在受限几何结构中，粘性液体中空气浴连续生成气泡的现象。通过设置门控结构（类似倒置漏斗） trapping 空气，利用浮力在尖端连续产生气泡。研究发现气泡生成动力学由 trapped 空气下方的粘性耗散与浮力引起的重力能变化之间的平衡主导，并揭示了一种新型的 pinch-off 机制，其中粘度起关键作用，区别于传统的 Tate 机制（重力与毛细力竞争）。该研究为低雷诺数下气泡生成与 pinch-off 提供了基础性理解，在微流控等领域有重要应用前景。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索受限几何结构中粘性液体中气泡的连续生成机制，理解低雷诺数下气泡 pinch-off 的物理原理，并展示尺度分析在复杂情况下的应用潜力。

Method: 实验上采用包含门控结构的受限几何装置，通过浮力 trapping 空气并连续生成气泡；通过改变参数测量气泡生成周期和尺寸；利用尺度分析方法分析粘性耗散与重力能变化的平衡关系。

Result: 气泡形成动力学由 trapped 空气下方的粘性耗散与浮力引起的重力能变化之间的平衡决定；发现了新型 pinch-off 条件，粘度起主导作用，不同于传统 Tate 机制中重力与毛细力的竞争。

Conclusion: 本研究显著推进了对气泡生成和 pinch-off 机制的基础理解，揭示了低雷诺数下粘性主导的通用 pinch-off 机制；同时展示了通过尺度放大系统来理解微流控中物理原理的可行途径。

Abstract: We investigate continuous generation of bubbles from a bath of air in viscous liquid in a confined geometry. In our original setup, bubbles are spontaneously generated by virtue of buoyancy and a gate placed in the cell: the gate acts like an inverted funnel trapping air beneath it before continuously generating bubbles at the tip. The dynamics is characterized by the bubble-formation period and the bubble size as a function of the amount of air under the gate. By analyzing the data obtained for various parameters, we clearly identified that the dynamics of the bubble formation is governed by dissipation in the viscous fluid beneath the trapped air balanced by a gravitational energy change due to buoyancy, after examining numerous possibilities of dissipation, which demonstrates the potential of scaling analysis even in complex cases. Furthermore, we uncover a novel type of pinch-off condition, which convincingly explains the bubble size: in the present case viscosity plays a vital role, different from the conventional mechanism of Tate, in which gravity competes with capillarity, revealing a general mechanism of pinching-off at low Reynolds number. Accordingly, the present study significantly and fundamentally advances our knowledge of generation and pinch-off of bubbles, with the results relevant for a wide variety of applications in many fields. In particular, the present study demonstrates a promising avenue in microfluidics for understanding physical principles by scaling up the system, without losing the characteristics of the flow at low Reynolds numbers.

</details>


### [445] [Unveiling the bi-stable character of stealthy hydrogen-air flames](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00893)
*Ruben Palomeque-Santiago,Alba Dominguez-Gonzalez,Daniel Martinez-Ruiz,Mariano Rubio-Rubio Eduardo Fernandez-Tarrazo,Mario Sanchez-Sanz*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 超贫燃氢气-空气火焰在窄间隙中受冷壁和高优先扩散影响，可形成圆形或双胞两种孤立火焰结构，二者传播速度与尺寸相差约一倍。实验首次证实在相同条件下两种稳定结构可共存，数值模拟表明点火瞬态中的对称性破缺导致多解出现，对氢燃料系统的安全设计提出新要求。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 前期实验（Veiga et al., PRL 2020）在垂直腔体中发现了两种不同的火焰结构，但尚未明确（1）在水平通道中两种结构是否能在完全相同实验条件下同时出现；（2）这种多重稳态共存现象的物理机制是什么。本研究旨在通过水平通道实验与数值模拟回答上述问题。

Method: 采用水平通道实验观测超贫燃氢气-空气火焰在窄间隙中的传播行为，对比垂直腔体中的前期结果；结合简化模型进行数值模拟，重点分析点火瞬态过程中的对称性破缺细节如何导致两种稳定构型的并发涌现。

Result: 在水平通道中首次观察到圆形与双胞两种稳定火焰结构在完全相同实验条件下同时出现；数值模拟揭示了点火瞬态的对称性破缺是多重稳态共存的关键原因。

Conclusion: 本研究首次证实了实际器件中氢燃料火焰存在多重稳定解共存现象，这迫使工程设计中必须引入额外工具来预估和控制不同传播速度的孤立火焰核的形成与演化，以确保氢燃料系统的安全可靠性。

Abstract: Ultra-lean hydrogen-air flames propagating in narrow gaps, under the influence of cold walls and high preferential diffusion, can form two distinct isolated structures. They exhibit either circular or double-cell shapes and propagate at different speeds, with the latter roughly doubling in size and traveling speed to the former. Hydrogen mass diffusivity, convective effects and conductive heat losses are the physical mechanisms that explain the alterations in morphology and propagation speed. In previous experiments, Veiga et al. Phys. Rev. Lett. 124, 174501 (2020) found these clearly distinguished flame structures for different combinations of equivalence ratio, channel gap and the effect of gravity on the dynamics of upwards and downwards propagating flames in a vertical chamber. Present observations in horizontal channels show the simultaneous appearance of these two stable structures, which arise under identical experimental conditions and conform the first evidence that multiplicity of stable solutions coexists in real devices. To explain the observations, we performed numerical simulations using the simplified model, which show that symmetry-breaking details during the ignition transient explain the concurrent emergence of the two stable configurations. This discovery urges the need to implement additional engineering tools to account for the possibility of formation and propagation of isolated flame kernels at different speeds in hydrogen-fueled systems.

</details>


### [446] [Orbital cluster-based network modelling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.01109)
*Antonio Colanera,Nan Deng,Matteo Chiatto,Luigi de Luca,Bernd R. Noack*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文提出轨道聚类网络模型(oCNM)，通过将快照状态替换为短期轨迹(轨道)来改进传统聚类网络模型(CNM)，从而更准确地描述多频流体动力学中的簇间转移，避免非物理的簇内扩散。该方法在Stuart-Landau振荡器和fluidic pinball系统上验证了其捕捉多频行为的能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的聚类网络模型(CNM)在描述多频流体动力学时，存在非物理的簇内扩散问题，导致动态重构不准确。需要一种能更精确建模簇间转移的方法，同时保持自动化开发和人类可解释性的优势。

Method: 提出轨道聚类网络模型(oCNM)：1) 将快照状态替换为覆盖多个簇的短期轨迹(轨道)；2) 采用函数聚类对短期轨迹进行粗粒化；3) 结合不同滤波技术和时间基展开以适应不同流动现象。

Result: 在Stuart-Landau振荡器(含时变参数)上验证了捕捉振幅选择机制和多频行为的能力；在fluidic pinball系统上应用于周期、准周期和混沌等不同流态和Reynolds数范围，证明了方法的通用性。

Conclusion: oCNM从分析时域局部状态推进到考察分段短期轨迹(轨道)，类比于谱本征正交分解(SPOD)从纯空间模态到时空模态的转变。通过融合短期轨迹的函数表示与CNM，为解析湍流系统的复杂动力学开辟了新途径。

Abstract: We propose a novel reduced-order methodology to describe complex multi-frequency fluid dynamics from time-resolved snapshot data. Starting point is the Cluster-based Network Model (CNM) thanks to its fully automatable development and human interpretability. Our key innovation is to model the transitions from cluster to cluster much more accurately by replacing snapshot states with short-term trajectories ("orbits") over multiple clusters, thus avoiding nonphysical intra-cluster diffusion in the dynamic reconstruction. The proposed orbital CNM (oCNM) employs functional clustering to coarse-grain the short-term trajectories. Specifically, different filtering techniques, resulting in different temporal basis expansions, demonstrate the versatility and capability of the oCNM to adapt to diverse flow phenomena. The oCNM is illustrated on the Stuart-Landau oscillator and its post-transient solution with time-varying parameters to test its ability to capture the amplitude selection mechanism and multi-frequency behaviours. Then, the oCNM is applied to the fluidic pinball across varying flow regimes at different Reynolds numbers, including the periodic, quasi-periodic, and chaotic dynamics. This orbital-focused perspective enhances the understanding of complex temporal behaviours by incorporating high-frequency behaviour into the kinematics of short-time trajectories while modelling the dynamics of the lower frequencies. In analogy to Spectral Proper Orthogonal Decomposition, which marked the transition from spatial-only modes to spatio-temporal ones, this work advances from analysing temporal local states to examining piecewise short-term trajectories, or orbits. By merging advanced analytical methods, such as the functional representation of short-time trajectories with CNM, this study paves the way for new approaches to dissect the complex dynamics characterising turbulent systems.

</details>


### [447] [A revisit of the development of viscoplastic flow in pipes and channels](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00842)
*Alexandros Syrakos,Evgenios Gryparis,Georgios C. Georgiou*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文通过有限元模拟和Papanastasiou正则化方法，重新研究了宾汉塑性体在管道和通道中的粘塑性流动发展问题，重点基于壁面剪切应力定义了发展长度，并探索了不同雷诺数定义以统一发展长度曲线，同时分析了屈服/未屈服区域模式及正则化参数的影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有文献对宾汉塑性体流动发展长度的研究尚不充分，尤其是缺乏基于壁面剪切应力的发展长度定义，以及不同雷诺数定义下发展长度曲线的统一性分析。本文旨在填补这些空白，提供更全面的理解。

Method: 采用有限元数值模拟方法，结合Papanastasiou正则化处理宾汉塑性体的本构关系，在广泛的雷诺数和宾汉数范围内进行参数化研究。

Result: (1) 提出了基于壁面剪切应力的发展长度定义；(2) 探索了多种雷诺数定义以使不同宾汉数下的发展长度曲线 collapse 为单一主曲线；(3) 揭示了流场内屈服区与未屈服区的分布模式；(4) 评估了正则化参数对计算结果精度的影响。

Conclusion: 本文的发现丰富了现有文献，为这一经典流动问题提供了更全面的理解，特别是关于发展长度的定义和流动区域特征。

Abstract: This study revisits the development of viscoplastic flow in pipes and channels, focusing on the flow of a Bingham plastic. Using finite element simulations and the Papanastasiou regularisation, results are obtained across a range of Reynolds and Bingham numbers. The novel contributions of this work include: (a) investigating a definition of the development length based on wall shear stress, a critical parameter in numerous applications; (b) considering alternative definitions of the Reynolds number in an effort to collapse the development length curves into a single master curve, independent of the Bingham number; (c) examining the patterns of yielded and unyielded regions within the flow domain; and (d) assessing the impact of the regularisation parameter on the accuracy of the results. The findings enhance the existing literature, providing a more comprehensive understanding of this classic flow problem.

</details>


### [448] [Gaussian Integral Method for Void Fraction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00909)
*Alireza Kianimoqadam,Justin L. Lapp*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 提出了一种用于CFD-DEM模拟中空隙率计算的高斯积分方法(GIM)，适用于多种网格类型，通过优化技术使其独立于网格分辨率，并在流化床实验中验证了其准确性和优于传统结构网格的表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有空隙率计算方法在复杂几何和多类型网格（特别是非结构化多面体网格）中精度不足或需要特殊边界处理，限制了CFD-DEM模拟在工业应用中的适用性。

Method: 提出高斯积分方法(GIM)计算空隙率，引入优化技术消除网格分辨率和类型依赖，将空隙率梯度在CFD求解器中计算并传递至DEM求解器以精确定位颗粒位置。

Result: 在流化床实验中验证了GIM能生成与实验观测高度吻合的仿真结果；使用GIM的非结构化多面体网格在相同分辨率下比结构化网格更接近实验数据。

Conclusion: GIM为复杂几何颗粒介质模拟中的空隙率计算提供了有效方案，提升了CFD-DEM模拟在工业应用中的精度和适用性。

Abstract: A novel method, the Gaussian Integral Method (GIM), is presented for calculating void fractions in Computational Fluid Dynamics-Discrete Element Method (CFD-DEM) simulations. GIM is versatile and applicable to various grid types, including structured and unstructured polyhedral meshes, without requiring special boundary treatments. An optimization technique is introduced to make GIM independent of grid resolution and type. The method is validated against experimental data from a fluidized bed, demonstrating that GIM produces realistic simulations closely resembling experimental observations. Additionally, unstructured polyhedral grids using GIM outperform structured grids of equivalent resolution, yielding results more aligned with experimental data. The gradient of the void fraction is computed in the CFD solver and utilized in the DEM solver for precise estimation at particle locations. Overall, GIM provides an effective solution for void fraction calculations in particulate media simulations with complex geometries, enhancing the accuracy and applicability of CFD-DEM simulations in industrial applications.

</details>


### [449] [Instabilities in strongly shear-thinning viscoelastic flows through channels and tubes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.01004)
*Ramkarn Patne,Shraddha Mandloi,V. Shankar,Ganesh Subramanian*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文分析了剪切变稀粘弹性流体在三种经典直线剪切流动（平面Couette流、通道压力驱动流、管流）中的线性稳定性。采用White-Metzner模型与幂律粘度描述，发现在蠕流极限下，当剪切变稀指数小于0.3时，所有流场均存在相同的短波失稳；同时存在依赖于几何边界条件的有限波长失稳。短波失稳局域于壁面附近，而有限波长失稳中蜿蜒模态比脉动模态更不稳定，与实验观察一致。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理解剪切变稀粘弹性流体在壁面约束剪切流动中的失稳机制，解释实验中观察到的弹性不稳定现象，并探讨其普适性。

Method: 采用White-Metzner本构模型结合幂律剪切变稀粘度，在蠕流极限下对三种几何构型（平面Couette流、通道流、管流）进行线性稳定性分析，分别考虑二维扰动和轴对称扰动，求解特征值问题得到失稳条件。

Result: 1）剪切变稀指数n<0.3时，三种流场均存在相同的短波失稳；2）存在依赖于几何边界的有限波长失稳；3）通道流中蜿蜒模态比脉动模态更不稳定；4）短波失稳局域于壁面，对中心线对称条件不敏感；5）理论预测与聚合物溶液实验吻合良好。

Conclusion: 短波失稳是强剪切变稀粘弹性流体在壁面约束剪切流中的普适特征；有限波长失稳受几何细节影响，蜿蜒模态主导失稳；White-Metzner模型能有效预测该类流体的弹性不稳定性。

Abstract: The linear stability of a shear-thinning, viscoelastic fluid undergoing any of the canonical rectilinear shear flows, viz., plane Couette flow and pressure-driven flow through a channel or a tube is analyzed in the creeping-flow limit using the White--Metzner model with a power-law variation of the viscosity with shear rate. While two-dimensional disturbances are considered for plane Couette and channel flows, axisymmetric disturbances are considered for pressure-driven flow in a tube. For all these flows, when the shear-thinning exponent is less than $0.3$, there exists an identical instability at wavelengths much smaller than the relevant geometric length scale (gap between the plates or tube radius). There is also a finite-wavelength instability in these configurations governed by the details of the geometry and boundary conditions at the centerline of the channel or tube. The most unstable mode could be either of the short-wave or finite-wavelength instabilities depending on model parameters. For pressure-driven channel flow, it is possible to have sinuous or varicose unstable modes depending on the symmetry of the normal velocity eigenfunction about the channel centerline. This difference in symmetry is relevant only for the finite wavelength instability, in which case sinuous modes turn out to be more unstable, in accordance with experimental observations. In all the three configurations, the short wavelength unstable modes are localized near the walls, and are insensitive to symmetry conditions at the centerline. It is argued that this instability should be a generic feature in any wall-bounded shear flow of strongly shear-thinning viscoelastic fluids. Our predictions for the finite-wavelength instability in pressure-driven channel and pipe flows are in good agreement with experimental observations for the flow of concentrated polymer solutions in these geometries.

</details>


### [450] [Improving Computational Efficiency in DSMC Simulations of Vacuum Gas Dynamics with a Fixed Number of Particles per Cell](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.01589)
*Moslem Sabouri,Ramin Zakeri,Amin Ebrahimi*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为“固定每单元粒子数（FPPC）”的技术，通过强制所有计算单元保持固定数量的模拟粒子，消除了模拟过程中实时调整粒子权重的需要，从而在DSMC方法中提升计算效率。在SPARTA求解器上对微混合器稀薄气体流和圆柱绕流超音速流的验证表明，FPPC技术在降低计算成本的同时，结果与传统DSMC相当；结合局部网格细化后，能准确预测大梯度区域的流动行为。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在真空气体动力学的DSMC数值模拟中，计算效率与精度之间存在权衡。传统DSMC方法需要实时调整粒子权重，增加了计算开销。本研究旨在通过FPPC技术消除这一调整过程，从而在不牺牲精度的前提下提升计算效率。

Method: 采用固定每单元粒子数（FPPC）技术，强制每个计算单元内维持固定数量的模拟粒子，从而避免粒子权重的实时调整。使用SPARTA求解器，对微混合器中的稀薄气体流和圆柱绕流的稀薄超音速气流进行模拟验证。此外，还研究了FPPC与局部网格细化的结合应用。

Result: FPPC技术有效降低了计算成本，模拟结果与传统DSMC实现方法相当。将局部网格细化与FPPC技术结合后，能够在具有显著梯度的区域准确预测流动行为。

Conclusion: FPPC技术能够在降低计算成本的同时提高复杂真空气体动力学数值模拟的准确性和效率，是一种有效的改进方案。

Abstract: The present study addresses the challenge of enhancing computational efficiency without compromising accuracy in numerical simulations of vacuum gas dynamics using the direct simulation Monte Carlo (DSMC) method. A technique termed "fixed particle per cell (FPPC)" was employed, which enforces a fixed number of simulator particles across all computational cells. The proposed technique eliminates the need for real-time adjustment of particle weights during simulation, reducing calculation time. Using the SPARTA solver, simulations of rarefied gas flow in a micromixer and rarefied supersonic airflow around a cylinder were conducted to validate the proposed technique. Results demonstrate that applying the FPPC technique effectively reduces computational costs while yielding results comparable to conventional DSMC implementations. Additionally, the application of local grid refinement coupled with the FPPC technique was investigated. The results show that integrating local grid refinement with the FPPC technique enables accurate prediction of flow behaviour in regions with significant gradients. These findings highlight the efficacy of the proposed technique in improving the accuracy and efficiency of numerical simulations of complex vacuum gas dynamics at a reduced computational cost.

</details>


### [451] [Flux scaling in Rayleigh Bénard convection: a local boundary layer analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00930)
*Prafulla P. Shevkar,Baburaj A. Puthenveettil*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文研究了大尺度流动（LSF）产生的剪切力对Rayleigh-Bénard对流中热通量的影响，通过分析局部边界层在LSF外部强迫下的行为，推导出局部边界层厚度的五阶代数方程。数值求解发现，尽管随Rayleigh数增加剪切力增强，但由于剪切强迫在局部边界层内始终弱于自然对流速度，热通量仍保持经典的1/3标度律（Nu∼Ra_w^{1/3}），适用范围达Ra_w≤5×10¹⁴。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究大尺度流动（LSF）产生的剪切力对Rayleigh-Bénard对流中热通量的影响机制，特别是剪切力作用于局部边界层时对经典1/3标度律的修正效应。

Method: 将局部边界层视为受LSF外部强迫，推导出局部边界层厚度的五阶代数方程；利用宽高比Γ=1和0.5的Re关系进行数值求解，分析局部边界层厚度随纵向距离的变化；计算平均局部热边界层厚度以推导全局Nusselt数。

Result: 局部边界层边缘的平均剪切速度在Γ=1时呈∼Ra_w^{1/3}标度（8×10⁷≤Ra_w≤10¹²），在Γ=0.5时呈∼Ra_w^{0.38}标度（10¹¹≤Ra_w≤5×10¹⁴）；全局Nu∼Ra_w^m，m≈0.327（Γ=1）和m=0.33（Γ=0.5），即经典1/3标度律成立。

Conclusion: 尽管随Ra_w增大局部边界层所受剪切力增强，但由于剪切强迫在边界层内部始终弱于自然对流速度（V_bl），故直至Ra_w≤5×10¹⁴，剪切作用仍为亚主导，热通量保持经典1/3标度律。

Abstract: We study the effect of shear due to the large scale flow (LSF) on the heat flux in Rayleigh B'enard convection for a range of near-plate Rayleigh numbers $8\times 10^7 \leq Ra_w \leq 5\times 10^{14}$, by studying its effect on the local boundary layers (BLs) on either sides of the plumes, which are much thinner than the global shear BL created by the LSF velocity $V_F$. Considering these local BLs forced externally by the LSF, we obtain a fifth order algebraic equation for the local boundary layer thicknesses. Solving these equations numerically using $Re$ relations for aspect ratios $Γ=1$ and 0.5, we obtain the variation of the local BL thicknesses with the longitudinal distance for various $Ra_w$. We find that the average shear acting on the edges of these local BLs ($\overline{u|}_{z=δ}$) increases as $\overline{u|}_{z=δ} \sim Ra_w^{1/3}$ for $8\times 10^7\leq Ra_w \leq 10^{12}$ at $Γ=1$, and as $\overline{u|}_{z=δ} \sim Ra_w^{0.38}$ for $1\times 10^{11}\leq Ra_w \leq 5\times 10^{14}$ at $Γ=0.5$. We then estimate the average local thermal BL thickness to find the global Nusselt number $Nu$.We find that $Nu\sim Ra_w^m$, where $m\approx 0.327$ for $8\times 10^7 \leq Ra_w \leq 1\times 10^{12}$ at $Γ=1$, and $m=0.33$ for $1\times10^{11}\leq Ra_w \leq 5\times10^{14}$ at $Γ=0.5$. Inspite of the increasing shear on these BLs with increasing $Ra_w$, we then surprisingly obtain the classical 1/3 scaling of flux since the shear forcing acting on those BLs remains sub-dominant compared to the NCBL velocities ($V_{bl}$) within these BLs, upto $Ra_w\leq 5\times10^{14}$.

</details>


### [452] [Modelling the three-dimensional, diagnostic anisotropy field of an ice rise](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.01069)
*A. Clara J. Henry,Carlos Martín,Reinhard Drews*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文通过三维模拟研究了Derwael Ice Rise及其周围冰架的晶体取向组构演化，使用半拉格朗日数值方法求解晶体取向张量演化方程，分析了不同模型参数对晶体各向异性演化的影响，并提出了与雷达观测对比的框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 极地冰在变形下会发展出各向异性的晶体取向组构，但大多数冰流模型仍将其视为各向同性流体，这种简化导致模型与实际情况存在差异。

Method: 采用晶体取向张量演化方程结合固定速度场进行三维模拟；使用半拉格朗日数值方法约束晶体取向演化程度；基于先前研究设置四组模拟，改变晶体各向异性演化速率及其对应变率和偏应力张量的依赖关系。

Result: 识别出流动分水岭末端的高水平散度区域是进行观测对比的关键区域；这些区域中参数约束不足导致织物类型差异最大；提出了一个与雷达各向异性观测对比的框架，指出了垂直特征向量假设可能不成立的区域及其导致的测量特征值误差。

Conclusion: 研究结果对未来观测数据采集活动规划以及连接观测与计算高效的简化各向异性模型具有重要意义。

Abstract: Polar ice develops anisotropic crystal orientation fabrics under deformation, yet ice is most often modelled as an isotropic fluid. We present three-dimensional simulations of the crystal orientation fabric of Derwael Ice Rise including the surrounding ice shelf using a crystal orientation tensor evolution equation corresponding to a fixed velocity field.
