We use a semi-Lagrangian numerical method that constrains the degree of crystal orientation evolution to solve the equations in complex flow areas. We perform four simulations based on previous studies, altering the rate of evolution of the crystal anisotropy and its dependence on a combination of the strain rate and deviatoric stress tensors. We provide a framework for comparison with radar observations of the anisotropy field, outlining areas where the assumption of one vertical eigenvector may not hold and provide resulting errors in measured eigenvalues. We recognise the areas of high horizontal divergence at the ends of the flow divide as important areas to make comparisons with observations. Here, poorly constrained model parameters result in the largest difference in fabric type. These results are important in the planning of future campaigns for gathering data to constrain model parameters and as a link between observations and computationally-efficient, simplified models of anisotropy.

</details>


### [453] [Entropy conservative discretization of compressible Euler equations with an arbitrary equation of state](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.01235)
*Alessandro Aiello,Carlo De Michele,Gennaro Coppola*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种针对可压缩欧拉方程的新型空间离散化方法，该方法在任意状态方程假设下保证离散层面的熵守恒，基于局部守恒离散化，同时保证质量、动量、总能量的空间守恒以及动能守恒。通过全局熵守恒约束和求和分步规则，推导出内部能量数值通量的一般形式（非线性函数），并保留质量通量作为残差自由度。数值实验采用多种立方状态方程验证了方法的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有熵守恒离散格式大多局限于理想气体状态方程，缺乏适用于任意状态方程（如非理想气体、立方型状态方程）的通用离散框架。本文旨在填补这一空白，发展一种可处理任意状态方程的熵守恒空间离散方法。

Method: 基于局部守恒离散化框架，通过施加全局熵守恒约束并利用求和分步（SBP）规则，操作离散平衡方程，推导出内部能量数值通量的一般形式。该通量为热力学和动力学变量的非线性函数，质量通量作为残差自由度保留。方法可推广至任意精度阶。

Result: 成功构建了适用于任意状态方程的熵守恒离散格式，数值测试采用多种立方状态方程验证了方法在质量、动量、总能量、动能及熵守恒方面的有效性。

Conclusion: 所提方法为任意状态方程下的可压缩欧拉方程提供了一种通用的熵守恒空间离散策略，突破了传统格式仅限于理想气体的局限，具有重要的理论意义和工程应用价值。

Abstract: This study proposes a novel spatial discretization procedure for the compressible Euler equations which guarantees entropy conservation at a discrete level when an arbitrary equation of state is assumed. The proposed method, based on a locally-conservative discretization, guarantees also the spatial conservation of mass, momentum, and total energy and is kinetic energy-preserving. In order to achieve the entropy-conservation property for an arbitrary non-ideal gas, a general strategy is adopted based on the manipulation of discrete balance equations through the imposition of global entropy conservation and the use of a summation by parts rule. The procedure, which is extended to an arbitrary order of accuracy, conducts to a general form of the internal-energy numerical flux which results in a nonlinear function of thermodynamic and dynamic variables and still admits the mass flux as a residual degree of freedom. The effectiveness of the novel entropy-conservative formulation is demonstrated through numerical tests making use of some of the most popular cubic equations of state.

</details>


### [454] [Stability of diffusion flames under shear flow: Taylor dispersion and the formation of flame streets](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.01610)
*Prabakaran Rajamanickam,Aiden Kelly,Joel Daou*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文揭示泰勒色散与扩散-热不稳定的耦合机制是非预混微燃烧器中扩散火焰街（平行于剪切流排列）形成的根本原因。通过线性稳定性分析和数值模拟发现，当燃料具有高Lewis数且Peclet数超过临界值时，泰勒色散导致流向有效Lewis数与1/Le成正比，从而引发有限波长细胞状失稳；低于临界Pe时则出现长波失稳（可伴随时间振荡），长波失稳最终导致火焰熄灭。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 非预混微燃烧装置中观察到扩散火焰街平行于剪切流排列的现象，且仅在高Lewis数燃料且Peclet数超过临界值时发生，其背后的物理机制尚未被完全理解。

Method: 构建平面Poiseuille流中平行扩散火焰的简化模型，通过线性稳定性分析（求解特征值问题）研究扰动增长，并结合时间依赖数值模拟验证线性结果并探索非线性演化。

Result: 高Le燃料且Pe超临界时出现细胞状（有限波长）失稳；低于临界Pe时出现长波失稳（含振荡模式）；数值模拟显示细胞状结构可稳定存在，长波失稳导致火焰熄灭。

Conclusion: 泰勒色散增强流向扩散产生有效各向异性扩散，使流向有效Lewis数∝1/Le，从而造成高Le燃料在高Pe下的失稳现象，该机制完整解释了实验观测。

Abstract: Diffusion flame streets, observed in non-premixed micro-combustion devices, align parallel to a shear flow. They are observed to occur in mixtures with high Lewis number ($Le$) fuels, provided that the flow Reynolds number, or the Peclet number $Pe$, exceeds a critical value. The underlying mechanisms behind these observations have not yet been fully understood. In the present paper, we identify the coupling between diffusive-thermal instabilities and Taylor dispersion as a mechanism which is able to explain the experimental observations above. The explanation is largely based on the fact that Taylor dispersion enhances all diffusion processes in the flow direction, leading effectively to anisotropic diffusion with an effective (flow-dependent) Lewis number in the flow direction which is proportional to $1/Le$ for $Pe\gg 1$. Validation of the identified mechanism is demonstrated within a simple model by investigating the stability of a planar diffusion flame established parallel to a plane Poiseuille flow in a narrow channel. A linear stability analysis, leading to an eigenvalue problem solved numerically, shows that cellular (or finite wavelength) instabilities emerge for high Lewis number fuels when the Peclet number exceeds a critical value. Furthermore, for Peclet numbers below this critical value, longwave instabilities with or without time oscillations are obtained. Stability regime diagrams are presented for illustrative cases in a $Le$-$Pe$ plane where various instability domains are identified. Finally, the linear analysis is supported and complemented by time dependent numerical simulations, describing the evolution of unstable diffusion flames. The simulations demonstrate the existence of stable cellular structures and show that the longwave instabilities are conducive to flame extinction.

</details>


### [455] [Rapidly yawing spheroids in viscous shear flow: Emergent loss of symmetry](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.01273)
*Mohit P. Dalwadi*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 研究快速偏航旋转的椭球游泳者在粘性剪切流中的三维涌现动力学，发现快速偏航会产生非轴对称效应，使主动游泳者表现为具有两个正交对称平面的有效被动粒子，并可能导致混沌行为。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究快速偏航（yawing）运动对非轴对称游泳者在剪切流中涌现动力学的影响，揭示其与快速旋转（spinning）情形不同的物理机制。

Method: 采用多尺度分析方法推导涌现游泳者行为，求解非自治非线性三维动力系统，并通过数值模拟验证理论分析。

Result: 快速偏航生成非轴对称涌现效应，主动游泳者等效于具有两个正交对称平面的被动粒子；快速偏航可导致混沌行为，而快速旋转不会；等效被动粒子的形状通常不同于主动粒子的平均形状，且一般不是椭球体，仅在特定情况下为球体并可解析计算等效纵横比。

Conclusion: 快速偏航与快速旋转导致的涌现动力学有本质差异，前者可产生混沌行为且等效粒子形状更复杂，揭示了主动粒子周期运动对涌现行为的深刻影响。

Abstract: We investigate the emergent three-dimensional (3D) dynamics of a rapidly yawing spheroidal swimmer interacting with a viscous shear flow. We show that the rapid yawing generates non-axisymmetric emergent effects, with the active swimmer behaving as an effective passive particle with two orthogonal planes of symmetry. We also demonstrate that this effective asymmetry generated by the rapid yawing can cause chaotic behaviour in the emergent dynamics, in stark contrast to the emergent dynamics generated by rapidly rotating spheroids, which are equivalent to those of effective passive spheroids. In general, we find that the shape of the equivalent effective particle under rapid yawing is different to the average shape of the active particle. Moreover, despite having two planes of symmetry, the equivalent passive particle is not an ellipsoid in general, except for specific scenarios in which the effective shape is a spheroid. In these scenarios, we calculate analytically the equivalent aspect ratio of the effective spheroid. We use a multiple scales analysis for systems to derive the emergent swimmer behaviour, which requires solving a nonautonomous nonlinear 3D dynamical system, and we validate our analysis via comparison to numerical simulations.

</details>


### [456] [Metamorphosis of transition to periodic oscillations in a turbulent reactive flow system](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.13044)
*Beeraiah Thonti,Sivakumar Sudarsanan,Ramesh S. Bhavi,Anaswara Bhaskaran,Manikandan Raghunathan,R. I. Sujith*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文通过实验研究了湍流反应流系统中从非振荡状态到周期振荡的五种不同类型转变，揭示了从连续到不连续分岔的转变机制，并分析了当量比、热功率和火焰稳定器位置等参数对振荡行为的影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 热声振荡在湍流反应流系统中普遍存在且通常是不期望的，但目前对其从非振荡到周期振荡的转变类型及其随参数变化的连续性/不连续性理解尚不充分，有必要系统研究这种转变的多样性及其演化规律。

Method: 以当量比作为分岔参数，热功率输入和火焰稳定器位置作为次要参数，在湍流反应流实验平台上系统性地改变这些参数，观测并分类了从非振荡状态到周期振荡的动力学转变过程。

Result: 发现了五种不同类型的转变：两种连续型转变、两种包含连续与不连续分岔的多重转变、以及一种突变为高幅值周期振荡的不连续型转变。

Conclusion: 揭示了转变从连续到不连续性质的演变规律，这对理解湍流反应流系统的动力学行为至关重要，并为管理和控制工程系统中振荡行为提供了设计依据。

Abstract: The emergence of periodic oscillations is observed in various complex systems in nature and engineering. Thermoacoustic oscillations in systems comprising turbulent reactive flow exemplify such complexity in the engineering context, where the emergence of oscillatory dynamics is often undesirable. In this work, we experimentally study the transition to periodic oscillations within a turbulent flow reactive system, with varying fuel-to-air ratio, represented by equivalence ratio as a bifurcation parameter. Further, we explore the change in the nature of the transition by varying a secondary parameter. In our system, we vary the thermal power input and the location of the flame stabilizer position individually as a secondary parameter. Our findings reveal five qualitatively distinct types of transitions to periodic oscillations. Two types of these transitions exhibit a continuous nature. Another two types of transitions involve multiple shifts in the dynamical states consisting of both continuous and discontinuous bifurcations. The last type of transition is characterized by an abrupt bifurcation to high-amplitude periodic oscillations. Understanding this metamorphosis of the transition - from continuous to discontinuous nature - is critical for advancing our comprehension of the dynamic behavior in turbulent reactive flow systems. The insights gained from this study have the potential to inform the design and control of similar engineering systems where managing oscillatory behavior is crucial.

</details>


### [457] [Flow Reconstruction Using Spatially Restricted Domains Based on Enhanced Super-Resolution Generative Adversarial Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.01658)
*Mustafa Z. Yousif,Dan Zhou,Linqi Yu,Meng Zhang,Arash Mohammadikarachi,Jung Sub Lee,Hee-Chang Lim*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本研究利用增强型超分辨率生成对抗网络（ESRGAN）模型，从空间受限的局部流场数据中重建完整流场。通过层流钝体绕流、湍流槽道流（Re_τ=180）以及PIV实验数据验证，模型能够准确重建全局流场，湍流统计特性与原始数据高度吻合，有效克服PIV视场限制并节省计算成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 流场重建的困难在于非线性、多尺度、复杂流动下大量数据的精确捕捉与重建，同时需保证物理一致性和高计算效率。现有方法在局部观测数据重建全局流场方面存在不足，亟需一种高效可靠的数据驱动方法。

Method: 采用增强型超分辨率生成对抗网络（ESRGAN）模型，从不同几何形状和大小的局部流场中捕捉波动特征，实现全流域流场重建。通过DNS层流钝体绕流、Re_τ=180湍流槽道流以及PIV实验测量数据进行验证，比较瞬时速度场、流场统计特性和概率密度分布。

Result: 在层流钝体绕流中，从三个非重叠局部区域成功重建完整流场，统计特性与原始数据完美匹配；功率谱密度验证表明模型能符合真实流场的时间行为。在湍流槽道流中，重建质量取决于局部区域包含的流动特征数量。在PIV实验中，重建的大视场湍流统计量与实验数据高度吻合。

Conclusion: ESRGAN模型可作为可靠的数据驱动方法，克服PIV视场限制，同时节省计算成本。该方法能有效重建复杂流动的全局流场，并保持物理一致性。

Abstract: This study aims to reconstruct the complete flow field from spatially restricted domain data by utilizing an Enhanced Super-Resolution Generative Adversarial Network (ESRGAN) model. The difficulty in flow field reconstruction lies in accurately capturing and reconstructing large amounts of data under nonlinear, multi-scale, and complex flow while ensuring physical consistency and high computational efficiency. The ESRGAN model has a strong information mapping capability, capturing fluctuating features from local flow fields of varying geometries and sizes. The model effectiveness in reconstructing the whole domain flow field is validated by comparing instantaneous velocity fields, flow statistical properties, and probability density distributions. Using laminar bluff body flow from Direct Numerical Simulation (DNS) as a priori case, the model successfully reconstructs the complete flow field from three non-overlapping limited regions, with flow statistical properties perfectly matching the original data. Validation of the power spectrum density (PSD) for the reconstruction results also proves that the model could conform to the temporal behavior of the real complete flow field. Additionally, tests using DNS turbulent channel flow with a friction Reynolds number ($Re_τ= 180$) demonstrate the model ability to reconstruct turbulent fields, though the quality of results depends on the number of flow features in the local regions. Finally, the model is applied to reconstruct turbulence flow fields from Particle Image Velocimetry (PIV) experimental measurements, using limited data from the near-wake region to reconstruct a larger field of view. The turbulence statistics closely match the experimental data, indicating that the model can serve as a reliable data-driven method to overcome PIV field-of-view limitations while saving computational costs.

</details>


### [458] [Phase-field modeling of dendritic growth with gas bubbles in the solidification of binary alloys](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.01651)
*Chengjie Zhan,Zhenhua Chai,Dongke Sun,Baochang Shi,Shaoning Geng,Ping Jiang*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文开发了一个用于二元合金凝固过程中含气泡枝晶生长的相场模型，通过构建气-液-枝晶复杂系统的总自由能，并修改控制方程以提高气泡守恒相场方程和溶质对流传质方程的能力，最终利用格子玻尔兹曼方法验证了模型在气液流动、枝晶生长及含气泡凝固问题中的良好表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的相场模型难以同时处理合金凝固过程中的枝晶生长和气泡演化，缺乏能够统一描述气-液-固三相复杂相互作用的模型框架。

Method: 提出包含气-液-固三相相互作用的总自由能泛函；修改保守相场方程和对流-扩散方程以增强模型能力；通过薄界面极限渐近分析匹配自由边界问题；采用不可压缩Navier-Stokes方程结合扩散界面方法处理流固耦合；使用格子玻尔兹曼方法进行数值求解。

Result: 模型在气液流动、枝晶生长及含气泡凝固等多个复杂问题中均表现出良好的性能。

Conclusion: 所提出的相场模型能够有效模拟二元合金凝固过程中含气泡的枝晶生长，为多相凝固问题的数值模拟提供了统一的框架。

Abstract: In this work, a phase-field model is developed for the dendritic growth with gas bubbles in the solidification of binary alloys. In this model, a total free energy for the complex gas-liquid-dendrite system is proposed through considering the interactions of gas bubbles, liquid melt and solid dendrites, and it can reduce to the energy for gas-liquid flows in the region far from the solid phase, while degenerate to the energy for thermosolutal dendritic growth when the gas bubble disappears. The governing equations are usually obtained by minimizing the total free energy, but here some modifications are made to improve the capacity of the conservative phase-field equation for gas bubbles and convection-diffusion equation for solute transfer. Additionally, through the asymptotic analysis of the thin-interface limit, the present general phase-field model for alloy solidification can match the corresponding free boundary problem, and it is identical to the commonly used models under a specific choice of model parameters. Furthermore, to describe the fluid flow, the incompressible Navier-Stokes equations are adopted in the entire domain including gas, liquid, and solid regions, where the fluid-structure interaction is considered by a simple diffuse-interface method. To test the present phase-field model, the lattice Boltzmann method is used to study several problems of gas-liquid flows, dendritic growth as well as the solidification in presence of gas bubbles, and a good performance of the present model for such complex problems is observed.

</details>


### [459] [Dynamic Wall Shear Stress Measurement using Event-based 3D Particle Tracking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.01757)
*Christian E. Willert,Joachim Klinner*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文介绍了一种基于事件视觉（EBV）的三维拉格朗日粒子追踪（LPT）系统，并将其应用于湍流边界层（TBL）近壁面特征的测量。该系统使用三台同步事件相机，在距壁面400μm范围内重建粒子轨迹，进而估算非定常壁面剪切应力（WSS）及其时空演化特性，结果与DNS数据吻合。该方法在数据质量上与昂贵的高速相机相当，但硬件成本更低。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有近壁面湍流测量依赖昂贵的高速相机，需要更低成本且能获得同等数据质量的替代方案。

Method: 采用三台同步事件相机（EBV）结合3D拉格朗日粒子追踪算法，通过薄光片照亮粘性底层，在距壁面400μm内追踪粒子运动，假设粒子速度与WSS呈线性关系以估算非定常WSS，并通过bin-averaging方法获得随机间隔WSS数据的两点相关。

Result: 成功获得了与DNS数据匹配的非定常WSS时空演化图和高阶统计量；近壁粒子加速度（即WSS变化率）呈现完全对称的对数正态超统计分布；两点相关性揭示了近壁条带结构的间距信息。

Conclusion: 基于事件视觉的紧凑型硬件配合LPT算法，能够达到与更昂贵的高速相机相当的数据质量，为近壁湍流测量提供了低成本、高性能的新方案。

Abstract: We describe the implementation of a 3d Lagrangian particle tracking (LPT) system based on event-based vision (EBV) and demonstrate its application for the near-wall characterization of a turbulent boundary layer (TBL) in air. The viscous sublayer of the TBL is illuminated by a thin light sheet that grazes the surface of a thin glass window inserted into the wind tunnel wall. The data simultaneously captured by three synchronized event-cameras is used to reconstruct the 3d particle tracks within 400 $μ$m of the wall on a field of view of 12.0 mm x 7.5 mm. The velocity and position of particles within the viscous sublayer permit the estimation of the local vector of the unsteady wall shear stress (WSS) under the assumption of linearity between particle velocity and WSS. Thereby, time-evolving maps of the unsteady WSS and higher order statistics are obtained that are in agreement with DNS data at matching Reynolds number. Near-wall particle acceleration provide the rate of change of the WSS which exhibits fully symmetric log-normal superstatistics. Two-point correlations of the randomly spaced WSS data are obtained by a bin-averaging approach and reveal information on the spacing of near-wall streaks. The employed compact EBV hardware coupled with suited LPT tracking algorithms provide data quality on par with currently used, considerably more expensive, high-speed framing cameras.

</details>


### [460] [Dynamic Triad Interactions and Evolving Turbulence -- Part 2: Implications for Practical Signals](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.01652)
*Preben Buchhave,Clara Velte*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文通过实验观测，研究了实测湍流场中傅里叶分量之间的三波相互作用，发现有限时间和空间分辨率会导致时间与空间解耦，拓宽相位匹配条件，引入有限时间延迟和频率窗口展宽，并显著影响湍流功率谱的形状与发展，进而影响非平衡湍流的测量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究在实测（离散采样、有限时空域）湍流场中，动量与动能如何在傅里叶分量之间（即三波相互作用）传递，以及有限测量分辨率对湍流物理机制的影响。

Method: 通过对实测湍流速度场数据进行经验观测分析，比较有限时空域与无穷域积分条件下的傅里叶分量相互作用特性，包括相位匹配条件、时间延迟、频率窗口展宽等。

Result: 实验发现：1）有限分辨率导致时间与空间解耦，相位匹配条件同时包含时空频率（如Part 1预测）；2）傅里叶分量间存在有限时间延迟和展宽的频率窗口（有限重叠宽度），而非理想Dirac delta函数重叠；3）有限测量域显著影响三波相互作用效率，进而改变测量功率谱的形状与发展。

Conclusion: 有限时空测量域会影响湍流的时空发展测量结果、非局域相互作用的可能性，以及非平衡湍流（如分形网格生成湍流）的行为，表明实验条件在湍流分析中不可忽略。

Abstract: We investigate how momentum and kinetic energy is transferred between Fourier components (the so-called triad interactions) in measured turbulent flow fields, i.e. in practical, discretely sampled signals with limited temporal and spatial domains. We empirically observe that the finite resolution in experimental investigations causes a decoupling between time and space, which broadens the phase match condition to include both spatial and temporal frequencies as predicted in Part 1. It is also empirically observed that the Fourier components may interact with a finite time delay and within a broadened frequency window (finite overlap widths) in both time and space, as compared to the usual integrals over infinite ranges where Fourier components interact by overlapping Dirac delta functions. Furthermore, it is empirically observed how the finite temporal and spatial measurement domains of velocity records can have a significant effect on the efficiency of the triad interactions and thereby on the shape and development of measured velocity power spectra. These finite spatial/temporal domains thus influence the measured spatial and temporal development of turbulence, the possibility for non-local interactions and hence also non-equilibrium turbulence, e.g. fractal grid generated turbulence.

</details>


### [461] [Capillary-driven migration of droplets on conical fibers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.01822)
*Yixiao Mao,Chengxi Zhao,Kai Mu,Kai Li,Ting Si*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文实验和理论研究了液滴在亲水性锥形纤维上的迁移动力学，发现液滴先加速后减速，锥角越大加速阶段越长，干燥纤维上迁移更慢且残留液膜导致体积损失，并据此改进了动态模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究多基于平衡态标度律，缺乏对液滴在锥形纤维上迁移动力学的深入理解，尤其是粘性、体积、纤维几何及重力等因素的动态影响尚未被系统探究。

Method: 通过实验观测不同粘度、体积的液滴在不同锥角纤维上的迁移行为，并建立动态模型描述液滴运动，针对干燥纤维引入更高的摩擦系数和可变体积来修正模型。

Result: 液滴先加速后减速；锥角越大加速阶段越长；重力在小锥角纤维上影响显著；干燥纤维上迁移速度更慢且残留液膜导致体积损失。

Conclusion: 所提出的动态模型能更准确描述液滴在锥形纤维上的迁移行为，修正后的模型考虑了干燥纤维上的摩擦增强和体积变化，更全面地揭示了其物理机制。

Abstract: A droplet placed on a hydrophilic conical fiber tends to move toward the end of larger radii due to capillary action. Experimental investigations are performed to explore the dynamics of droplets with varying viscosities and volumes on different fibers at the microscale. Droplets are found to accelerate initially and subsequently decelerate during migration. A dynamic model is developed to capture dynamics of the droplet migration, addressing the limitations of previous equilibrium-based scaling laws. Both experimental results and theoretical predictions indicate that droplets on more divergent fibers experience a longer acceleration phase. Additionally, gravitational effects are pronounced on fibers with small cone angles, exerting a substantial influence on droplet migration even below the capillary scale. Moreover, droplets move more slowly on dry fibers compared to those prewetted with the same liquid, primarily attributed to the increased friction. The experiments reveal the formation of a residual liquid film after droplet migration on dry fibers, leading to considerable volume loss in the droplets. To encompass the intricacies of migration on dry fibers, the model is refined to incorporate a higher friction coefficient and variable droplet volumes, providing a more comprehensive depiction of the underlying physics.

</details>


### [462] [Breakup of viscous liquid bridges on solid surfaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.01790)
*Salar Farokhi,Peyman Rostami,Günter K. Auernhammer,Steffen Hardt*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文通过实验研究了固体表面粘性液桥的断裂动力学，发现其与自由液桥的粘性断裂相似，但受固体表面润湿性显著影响。低断裂速度且疏水表面时，能量耗散主要由分子动力学理论中的热激活分子跳跃主导；长液桥中轴向流动的粘性耗散也重要。推导了最小宽度随时间变化的标度关系，高粘度下拟合良好。外部几何约束对高低粘度液桥的影响不同，通过主导力解释。最后定性比较了沉积卫星液滴与自由液桥的形态。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究对自由液桥断裂动力学已有较充分认识，但对固体表面上液桥断裂中固液相互作用（尤其是三相接触线处润湿性）的影响理解不足，需要系统实验研究来揭示其机理。

Method: 采用实验方法研究固体表面粘性液桥的断裂动力学，通过控制表面润湿性（亲水/疏水）、液桥长度、粘度以及断裂速度等参数，观测最小宽度的时间演化及卫星液滴形态，并与自由液桥进行对比。

Result: 1) 表面液桥断裂与自由液桥在粘性 regime 有相似性，但润湿性显著影响动力学；2) 低断裂速度+疏水表面时，能量耗散主由热激活分子跳跃（MKT理论）主导，长液桥时轴向流动粘性耗散也重要；3) 推导了最小宽度标度关系，高粘度下与实验吻合良好；4) 外部几何约束对高低粘度液桥影响不同，由各自主导力解释；5) 卫星液滴形态与自由液桥有定性差异。

Conclusion: 固体表面液桥断裂必须考虑固液界面相互作用，尤其是三相线处的润湿性和分子尺度的能量耗散机制；所提标度关系可有效预测高粘度液桥的断裂动力学；不同粘度 regime 对外部几何约束的响应差异由主导力的转变决定。

Abstract: The breakup dynamics of viscous liquid bridges on solid surfaces is studied experimentally. It is found that the dynamics bears similarities to the breakup of free liquid bridges in the viscous regime. Nevertheless, the dynamics is significantly influenced by the wettability of the solid substrate. Therefore, it is essential to take into account the interaction between the solid and the liquid, especially at the three-phase contact line. It is shown that when the breakup velocity is low and the solid surface is hydrophobic, the dominant channel of energy dissipation is likely due to thermally activated jumping of molecules, as described by the Molecular Kinetic Theory. Nevertheless, the viscous dissipation in the bulk due to axial flow along the bridge can be of importance for long bridges. In view of this, a scaling relation for the time dependence of the minimum width of the liquid bridge is derived. For high viscosities, the scaling relation captures the time evolution of the minimum width very well. Furthermore, it is found that external geometrical constraints alter the dynamic behavior of low and high viscosity liquid bridges in a different fashion. This discrepancy is explained by considering the dominant forces in each regime. Lastly, the morphology of the satellite droplets deposited on the surface is qualitatively compared to that of free liquid bridges.

</details>


### [463] [Effect of Uniform and Non-uniform wall heating on Three-Dimensional Magneto-Hydrodynamics Natural Convection and Entropy Generation: A computational study using New Higher Order Super Compact Scheme](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.01853)
*Ashwani Punia,Rajendra K. Ray*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文采用新型高阶超紧致（HOSC）有限差分格式，研究了均匀与非均匀壁面加热对三维方腔内熔融锂的磁流体动力学（MHD）自然对流的影响。结果表明，Hartmann数（Ha）增加会抑制传热，Rayleigh数（Ra）增加会增强传热，均匀加热场景下总熵产最大，Bejan数随Ra增加而减小。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究均匀与非均匀壁面加热条件下，磁场（通过Hartmann数）和浮力（通过Rayleigh数）对三维方腔内熔融锂的MHD自然对流及熵产特性的影响，以优化相关工程系统的热管理设计。

Method: 采用新型高阶超紧致（HOSC）有限差分格式，对三维方腔内熔融锂（Pr=0.065）的MHD自然对流进行数值模拟。考虑三种加热场景：均匀加热（Th=1）、y方向非均匀加热（Th=sin(πy)）以及y-z方向联合非均匀加热（Th=sin(πy)sin(πz)），变化Hartmann数（25-150）和Rayleigh数（10^3-10^5）。

Result: Ha增加降低传热速率，Ra增加增强传热；均匀加热场景总熵产最大；Bejan数随Ra增加而降低，导致总熵产增加；HOSC格式有效捕捉了三维MHD自然对流的复杂性。

Conclusion: HOSC格式在分析三维MHD自然对流和熵产方面具有优越性；研究结果为涉及熔融锂的工程系统（如聚变反应堆冷却系统）的热设计和优化提供了有价值的参考。

Abstract: Current research work deals with the effect of uniform and non-uniform wall heating on magnetohydrodynamic (MHD) natural convection within a three-dimensional (3D) cavity filled with molten lithium. A new Higher-Order Super Compact (HOSC) finite difference scheme is used to analyze the thermal behavior under both heating scenarios. After the quantitative and qualitative validations, the computed results are analyzed for a range of Hartman number ($Ha = 25, 50, 100, 150$) and Rayleigh number ($Ra = 10^3, 10^4, 10^5$) with fixed $Pr=0.065$ (molten lithium). Three distinct heating scenarios, i.e., uniform heating ($T_h = 1$), $y$-dependent non-uniform heating ($T_h = sin(πy$)), and a combination of $y$ and $z$-dependent non-uniform heating ($T_h = sin(πy)sin(πz)$) are investigated on the left wall ($x=0$) of the cubic cavity. It is found that variations in the $Ha$ and $Ra$, along with distinct thermal boundary conditions, exert significant effects on both the temperature distribution and flow field inside the 3D cubical cavity. Specifically, an increase in $Ra$ corresponds to enhanced heat transfer, highlighting the dominance of convection. Conversely, an increase in $Ha$ leads to a reduction in heat transfer due to the deceleration of fluid velocity. The scenario in which walls are uniformly heated exhibits the most significant total entropy generation. It is observed that with an increase in the $Ra$, the Bejan number ($Be$) decreases, which ultimately leads to an increase in total entropy generation. The implementation of the new HOSC scheme in this analysis showcases its effectiveness in capturing the complexities of 3D MHD-driven natural convection and entropy generation. This study offers significant information that might help improve the optimization and design of relevant engineering systems. Thus, our work stands out as genuinely novel and pioneering in its approach.

</details>


### [464] [Application of the thin-film equations in modelling of Marangoni flow patterns amongst surfactant source and drain locations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.11868)
*Julio Careaga,Peter A. Korevaar,Vanja Nikolić,Laura Scarabosio*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文提出基于薄膜方程的数学模型，模拟表面活性剂在液膜上因表面张力梯度驱动产生的Marangoni流动，并给出数值求解方案与数值特性分析。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 表面活性剂在气-液界面沉积可产生表面张力梯度并诱导Marangoni流，非平衡态的表面张力梯度可驱动两亲性髓鞘组装体的自组织等流动模式，但缺乏有效的数学模型来描述这一过程。

Method: 基于薄膜方程（thin-film equations）建立数学模型，模型变量包括表面活性剂源/汇浓度、液膜高度和表面活性剂体相浓度，并设计了相应的数值格式进行近似求解。

Result: 提出了模型方程的数值方案，并通过数值实验观察并讨论了模型在数值上的性质与行为特征。

Conclusion: 该模型能够有效模拟表面活性剂驱动的Marangoni流动模式，为理解非平衡态表面张力梯度驱动的自组织现象提供了理论工具。

Abstract: Surfactants that are deposited at aqueous liquid films have the ability to generate surface tension gradients at the air-water interface, and thereby induce Marangoni flow. Combined with the production and depletion of surfactants at different locations of source and drains, out-of-equilibrium surface tension gradients can be sustained, resulting in Marangoni flow patterns that drive e.g., self-organization of amphiphile myelin assemblies. Here, a mathematical model based on the thin-film equations is proposed to simulate these flow patterns. The model equations are based on the surfactant source and drain concentrations, film-height and surfactant bulk concentration. We present a numerical scheme for approximating the model equations and discuss the numerically observed properties of the model.

</details>


### [465] [Unification theory of instabilities of visco-diffusive swirling flows](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.01706)
*Oleg N. Kirillov,Innocent Mutabazi*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个适用于旋转流中线性不稳定性的统一理论，涵盖自然和工业环境中的各种开放与受限流动，通过短波长局部分析导出了一个考虑粘性和热扩散的通用不稳定性判据，统一并扩展了现有的离心力和剪切驱动扰动的判据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 旋转流中的线性不稳定性广泛存在于自然和工业场景中，但现有研究多针对特定流动（如螺旋Couette流、螺旋Poiseuille流、斜压Couette流）进行数值模拟或线性稳定性分析，缺乏一个统一的、考虑粘性和热扩散效应的通用理论框架。

Method: 采用短波长局部分析（short-wavelength local analysis）方法，研究涵盖螺旋等温流和由径向温度梯度及自然重力驱动的斜压流等多种流动类型，推导出统一的不稳定性判据。

Result: 推导出一个通用判据，统一并扩展了现有的离心力和剪切驱动不稳定性判据，将粘性和热扩散纳入考虑，适用于以往难以用解析手段处理的参数区间。

Conclusion: 该统一理论为实验和数值研究提供了指导，使研究者能够探索之前无法触及的参数空间，深化对旋转流中线性不稳定性机制的理解。

Abstract: A universal theory of linear instabilities in swirling flows, occurring in both natural settings and industrial applications, is formulated. The theory encompasses a wide range of open and confined flows, including spiral isothermal flows and baroclinic flows driven by radial temperature gradients and natural gravity in rotating fluids. By employing short-wavelength local analysis, the theory generalizes previous findings from numerical simulations and linear stability analyses of specific swirling flows, such as spiral Couette flow, spiral Poiseuille flow, and baroclinic Couette flow. A general criterion, extending and unifying existing criteria for instability to both centrifugal and shear-driven perturbations in swirling flows is derived, taking into account viscosity and thermal diffusion, and guiding experimental and numerical investigations in the otherwise inaccessible parameter regimes.

</details>


### [466] [Personalized and uncertainty-aware coronary hemodynamics simulations: From Bayesian estimation to improved multi-fidelity uncertainty quantification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.02247)
*Karthik Menon,Andrea Zanoni,Owais Khan,Gianluca Geraci,Koen Nieman,Daniele E. Schiavazzi,Alison L. Marsden*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种端到端的不确定性感知流水线，通过整合CT心肌灌注成像的个性化测量数据，结合自适应MCMC采样和多保真度蒙特卡洛估计与非线性降维技术，在考虑临床数据不确定性的同时个性化冠状动脉血流模拟，显著缩小了感兴趣量的置信区间并降低了计算成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统冠状动脉血流模拟采用经验性方法分配总冠脉流量，忽略了患者个体差异、疾病状态及其他临床因素，且未考虑临床数据中的不确定性，导致模拟精度受限。

Method: (1) 利用CT心肌灌注成像的个体化心肌血流量测量估计分支特异性冠脉血流；(2) 采用自适应马尔可夫链蒙特卡洛（MCMC）采样估计模型参数的后验联合分布，并加入模拟噪声以反映临床数据不确定性；(3) 结合多保真度蒙特卡洛估计与非线性数据驱动降维方法，确定感兴趣量的后验预测分布。

Result: 该框架能够在测量不确定性下复现临床测量的心功能及分支特异性冠脉血流；相比单保真度和现有最先进的多保真度蒙特卡洛方法，显著缩小了感兴趣量的置信区间，尤其在低/高保真度模型预测相关性较弱的量上表现突出；且在指定置信水平或方差下计算成本更低。

Conclusion: 不确定性感知的个性化冠脉血流模拟能够更精确地预测临床和生物力学感兴趣量，同时更高效地处理临床数据中的不确定性，具有提升临床风险分层和治疗决策的潜力。

Abstract: Simulations of coronary hemodynamics have improved non-invasive clinical risk stratification and treatment outcomes for coronary artery disease, compared to relying on anatomical imaging alone. However, simulations typically use empirical approaches to distribute total coronary flow amongst the arteries in the coronary tree. This ignores patient variability, the presence of disease, and other clinical factors. Further, uncertainty in the clinical data often remains unaccounted for in the modeling pipeline. We present an end-to-end uncertainty-aware pipeline to (1) personalize coronary flow simulations by incorporating branch-specific coronary flows as well as cardiac function; and (2) predict clinical and biomechanical quantities of interest with improved precision, while accounting for uncertainty in the clinical data. We assimilate patient-specific measurements of myocardial blood flow from CT myocardial perfusion imaging to estimate branch-specific coronary flows. We use adaptive Markov Chain Monte Carlo sampling to estimate the joint posterior distributions of model parameters with simulated noise in the clinical data. Additionally, we determine the posterior predictive distribution for relevant quantities of interest using a new approach combining multi-fidelity Monte Carlo estimation with non-linear, data-driven dimensionality reduction. Our framework recapitulates clinically measured cardiac function as well as branch-specific coronary flows under measurement uncertainty. We substantially shrink the confidence intervals for estimated quantities of interest compared to single-fidelity and state-of-the-art multi-fidelity Monte Carlo methods. This is especially true for quantities that showed limited correlation between the low- and high-fidelity model predictions. Moreover, the proposed estimators are significantly cheaper to compute for a specified confidence level or variance.

</details>


### [467] [Examination of ventilated cavities in the wake of a two-dimensional bluff body](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.02026)
*Udhav U. Gawandalkar,Nicholas A. Lucido,Prachet Jain,Christian Poelma,Steven L. Ceccio,Harish Ganesh*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本研究通过时间分辨X射线密度测量技术，实验研究了二维钝体尾流中的通气空泡。通过系统变化流速（弗劳德数Fr）和气体注入率（通气系数C_qs），识别出四种具有不同闭合方式的稳定空泡。构建了由Fr和C_qs控制的流型图，用于估计各空泡闭合类型的流动条件。研究发现：3D空泡闭合存在于低Fr超空泡中，而高Fr时闭合为2D；低C_qs时闭合受尾流主导，高C_qs时则表现为波型闭合；过渡性闭合的特征是液体回流，其强度取决于流动惯性；通气策略影响空泡形成与维持，形成滞后现象，维持超空泡所需气体通量远低于形成所需。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深入理解通气空泡在不同流动条件下的闭合机制及气体喷射特性，揭示空泡形成与维持过程中的气体动力学行为，为相关工程应用提供理论基础。

Method: 采用时间分辨X射线密度测量技术进行实验研究，系统变化弗劳德数Fr和通气系数C_qs，通过构建流型图识别空泡闭合类型，结合气体分数测量和气体平衡分析量化气体喷射率。

Result: 识别出四种稳定空泡闭合方式；构建了Fr与C_qs的流型图；发现低Fr超空泡为3D闭合，高Fr为2D闭合；低C_qs为尾流主导闭合，高C_qs为波型闭合；过渡性闭合由液体回流表征，回流强度由流动惯性决定；空泡形成与维持存在通气滞后，维持所需气体通量远小于形成所需。

Conclusion: 通气空泡的闭合方式由Fr和C_qs共同决定，不同闭合机制对应不同的气体喷射方式；空泡形成过程受尾流与气体注入的相互作用主导，而维持过程则受限于气体泄漏，因此维持超空泡更为节能。

Abstract: Ventilated cavities in the wake of a two-dimensional bluff body are studied experimentally via time-resolved X-ray densitometry. With a systematic variation of flow velocity and gas injection rate, expressed as Froude number ($Fr$) and ventilation coefficient ($C_{qs}$), four stable cavities with different closures are identified. A regime map governed by $Fr$ and $C_{qs}$ is constructed to estimate flow conditions associated with each cavity closure type. Each closure exhibits a different gas ejection mechanism, which in turn dictates the cavity geometry and the pressure inside the cavity. Three-dimensional cavity closure is seen to exist for the supercavities at low $Fr$. However, closure is nominally two-dimensional for supercavities at higher $Fr$. At low $C_{qs}$, cavity closure is seen to be wake-dominated, while supercavities are seen to have wave-type closure at higher $C_{qs}$, irrespective of $Fr$. With the measured gas fraction, a simple gas balance analysis is performed to quantify the gas ejection rate at the transitional cavity closure during its formation. For a range of $Fr$, the transitional cavity closure is seen to be characterised by liquid re-entrant flow, whose intensity depends on the flow inertia, dictating the gas ejection rates. Two different ventilation strategies were employed to systematically investigate the formation and maintenance gas fluxes. The interaction of wake and gas injection is suspected to dominate the cavity formation process and not the maintenance, resulting in ventilation hysteresis. Consequently, the ventilation gas flux required to maintain the supercavity is significantly less than the gas flux required to form the supercavity.

</details>


### [468] [Nonlinear dynamics of vortex pairing in transitional jets](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.16851)
*Akhil Nekkanti,Tim Colonius,Oliver T. Schmidt*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本研究结合稳定性分析与高保真流动模拟数据，全面揭示了初始层流射流剪切层中从线性失稳到非线性涡配对（vortex pairing）的完整过程。研究发现，基频（fundamental frequency）尽管能量低（仅第四大谱峰），但通过逆能量级联向次谐波（subharmonic）供能，是动力学主导频率，证实了Kelly (1967)关于基频与次谐波共振机制的假说。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 已有研究对射流剪切层转捩过程中基频与次谐波之间的能量传递机制存在模糊认识，尤其在多音调对流主导流动中，基频的动力学定义不明确。本文旨在厘清基频的本质作用，验证Kelly (1967)的共振假说，并为涡配对过程提供完整的物理图像。

Method: 采用线性稳定性分析与高保真数值模拟数据相结合的方法，追踪基频和次谐波从线性增长到非线性饱和的演化过程，分析能量获取路径（来自平均流的线性增长 vs. 来自基频的非线性逆级联）。

Result: （1）基频先指数增长并从平均流获得能量，饱和后开始衰减，同时触发涡配对；（2）次谐波通过两条路径获取能量：线性地从平均流获取，以及通过逆级联非线性地从基频获取；（3）基频在能量上仅排第四大谱峰，但在动力学上起主导作用，决定所有其他谱峰并主导次谐波供能；（4）验证了Kelly (1967)的共振机制假说。

Conclusion: 在多音调对流主导流动中，基频不应由谱能量峰值定义，而应由空间最放大频率（spatially most amplified frequency）定义。尽管基频能量低，但其动力学主导地位决定了整个转捩过程的能量级联方向，这为理解剪切层转捩机理提供了新的视角。

Abstract: This study investigates the onset of linear instabilities and their later nonlinear interactions in the shear layer of an initially-laminar jet using a combination of stability analysis and data from high-fidelity flow simulations. We provide a complete picture of the vortex-pairing process. Hydrodynamic instabilities initiate the transition to turbulence, causing the shear layer to spread rapidly. In this process, the shear layer rolls up to form vortices, accompanied by the exponential growth of the fundamental frequency. As the fundamental frequency grows, it gains energy from the mean flow. Subsequently, as it saturates and begins to decay, the fundamental vortices start to pair. During this vortex pairing process, the subharmonic vortex acquires energy both linearly from the mean flow and nonlinearly through a reverse cascade from the fundamental. The process concludes when the subharmonic vortex eventually saturates. Similarly, two subharmonic vortices merge to form a second subharmonic vortex. Our results confirm Kelly's (1967) hypothesis of a resonance mechanism between the fundamental and subharmonic, which supplies energy to the subharmonic. In this multi-tonal, convective-dominated flow, we clarify the ambiguity surrounding the fundamental frequency by demonstrating that the spatially most amplified frequency should be considered fundamental, rather than the structure associated with the spectral energy peak. For the initially-laminar jet considered here, the fundamental frequency corresponds to the fourth largest spectral peak, highlighting the important distinction between the energetically and dynamical significance of a tone. Despite its low energy, the fundamental frequency is dynamically dominant as it determines all other spectral peaks and supplies energy to the subharmonics through a reverse energy cascade.

</details>


### [469] [Mass crystals and cage effect in vorticity crystals](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.02001)
*Jean-Régis Angilella*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文研究了由规则排列在环上的N个相同点涡构成的二维无粘流体中，微小平动惯性重粒子的运动。在弱惯性极限下，发现晶体参考系中存在N个位于晶体外部的渐近稳定平衡位置（“卫星”吸引点），且对于N≥3，环中心是一个虽退化但稳定的平衡位置，形成“笼效应”，使内含物在涡旋作用下缓慢向中心漂移。笼效应在大斯托克斯数下仍然存在，而卫星吸引点则在斯托克斯数超过临界值时消失。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理解在点涡晶体形成的流场中，惯性粒子的运动行为与稳定平衡位置的存在性，特别是揭示涡旋对粒子的约束机制（笼效应）以及不同参数条件下的稳定性变化规律。

Method: 采用弱惯性极限下的渐近分析方法，在点涡晶体的参考系中推导惯性粒子的运动方程，分析平衡点的存在性与稳定性；同时通过数值模拟验证理论结果，并考察斯托克斯数变化对卫星吸引点和笼效应的影响。

Result: (1) 弱惯性极限下，晶体外存在N个渐近稳定的卫星平衡点；(2) 对于N≥3，环中心是稳定平衡位置，形成笼效应；(3) 卫星吸引点在斯托克斯数超过临界值时消失，但笼效应在大斯托克斯数下仍然持续存在。

Conclusion: 点涡晶体结构对惯性粒子同时具有外围吸引（卫星点）和中心约束（笼效应）双重稳定机制，其中中心笼效应更为鲁棒，对斯托克斯数变化不敏感，这为理解涡旋流场中粒子聚集行为提供了理论依据。

Abstract: We study the motion of tiny heavy inertial particles advected by a two dimensional inviscid fluid flow composed of $N$ identical point vortices regularly placed on a ring, and forming a crystal. In the limit of weak particle inertia, we show asymptotically that, in the reference frame of the crystal, inertial particles have $N$ asymptotically stable equilibrium positions located outside the crystal, in agreement with numerical observations by Ravichandran et al. (Sadhana 42, 2017). In addition to these "satellite" attracting points, we observe that for $N \ge 3$ the center of the ring, though degenerate, is a stable equilibrium position for inertial particles. This creates a kind of cage effect, where inclusions slowly drift towards the center under the effect of the surrounding vortices. This cage effect is observed to persist even at larger Stokes numbers, in contrast with the satellite attracting points that vanish when the Stokes number is above some critical value.

</details>


### [470] [Investigation of cloud cavitating flow in a venturi using Adaptive Mesh Refinement (AMR)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.02369)
*Dhruv Apte,Mingming Ge,Olivier Coutier-Delgosha*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文采用DES模型结合Merkle模型计算文丘里管中的云状空化流动，并应用自适应网格细化（AMR）方法加速计算。结果表明AMR能较好地预测喉部附近时均速度和湍流特性，但在下游区域因网格较粗而存在偏差，且无法准确再现空腔宽度。研究为AMR在空化湍流模拟中的应用提供了参考。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 非稳态云状空化流动会导致水力机械振动、噪声和侵蚀损坏，而模拟这类非稳态高湍流流动仍具挑战性。本研究旨在探索AMR方法在加速空化流动计算中的可行性及其对湍流-空化耦合作用模拟的准确性。

Method: 采用Detached Eddy Simulation (DES)湍流模型结合Merkle空化模型，并引入Adaptive Mesh Refinement (AMR)方法对文丘里管中的云状空化流动进行数值模拟，通过与高保真实验数据及传统网格计算的对比分析评估AMR性能。

Result: AMR计算能较好预测喉部附近时均速度和湍流特性；但下游因网格粗糙导致偏差，且AMR在空腔宽度再现上不如传统网格模拟；速度梯度和广义流体单元对涡旋形成有显著影响。

Conclusion: AMR虽能通过仅细化感兴趣区域网格显著加速计算，但在空化流动模拟中与传统计算性能相当，存在下游精度不足的问题。本研究为AMR作为加速工具准确模拟湍流-空化相互作用提供了参考依据。

Abstract: Unsteady cloud cavitating flow is detrimental to the efficiency of hydraulic machinery like pumps and propellers due to the resulting side-effects of vibration, noise and erosion damage. Modelling such a unsteady and highly turbulent flow remains a challenging issue. In this paper, cloud cavitating flow in a venturi is calculated using the Detached Eddy Simulation (DES) model combined with the Merkle model. The Adaptive Mesh Refinement (AMR) method is employed to speed up the calculation and investigate the mechanisms for vortex development in the venturi. The results indicate the velocity gradients and the generalized fluid element strongly influence the formation of vortices throughout a cavitation cycle. In addition, the cavitation-turbulence coupling is investigated on the local scale by comparing with high-fidelity experimental data and using profile stations. While the AMR calculation is able to predict well the time-averaged velocities and turbulence-related aspects near the throat, it displays discrepancies further downstream owing to a coarser grid refinement downstream and under-performs compared to a traditional grid simulation . Additionally, the AMR calculations is unable to reproduce the cavity width as observed in the experiments. Therefore, while AMR promises to speed the process significantly by refining grid only in regions of interest, it is comparatively in line with a traditional calculation for cavitating flows. Thus, this study intends to provide a reference to employing AMR as a tool to speed up calculations and be able to simulate turbulence-cavitation interactions accurately.

</details>


### [471] [Study of Turbulence and Pressure Recovery in the Heat Pipe Vapor Flow Using the Spectral-Element Method](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.02234)
*Carolina Bourdot Dutra,Tri Nguyen,Elia Merzari,Joshua E. Hansel*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文通过二维（RANS湍流模型）和三维（大涡模拟LES）数值模拟，研究了核微反应器中热管蒸汽芯的压力恢复现象，旨在改进一维热管代码的相关性模型，并最终优化热管设计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 热管在核微反应器中能高效被动散热，但其内部的流动动力学给核能应用中的设计与优化带来显著挑战，亟需深入理解蒸汽芯的流动特性。

Method: 采用开源谱元法代码Nek5000进行二维RANS湍流模拟，以及NekRS进行三维大涡模拟（LES），并与文献中的蒸汽管实验数据验证，建立模拟框架来分析热管蒸汽芯的压力恢复。

Result: 二维RANS模型以较低计算成本提供了压力恢复的见解；三维LES捕捉了从层流到湍流过渡对压力恢复的影响，二者共同为改进一维热管代码的相关性提供了数据支持。

Conclusion: 建立的模拟框架增强了对热管蒸汽芯行为的理解，有助于优化核反应堆中热管的设计，并为验证低保真度方法提供基准数据。

Abstract: Heat pipes can efficiently and passively remove heat in nuclear microreactors. Nevertheless, the flow dynamics within heat pipes present a significant challenge in designing and optimizing them for nuclear energy applications. This work aims to explore the vapor core of heat pipes through comprehensive two- and three-dimensional simulations, with a primary focus on modeling the pressure recovery observed in the condenser section. The goal is to establish improved correlations for one-dimensional heat pipe codes. The simulations are validated against experimental data from a vapor pipe documented in the literature. The turbulence model is employed in the two-dimensional simulations through the open-source spectral-element code Nek5000. This model provides insights into pressure recovery within heat pipes with low computational cost. In addition, Large Eddy Simulations (LES) are used to capture turbulent flow features in a three-dimensional vapor pipe model, utilizing the code NekRS. Using LES is crucial for comprehending the impact of laminar-to-turbulent transition on pressure recovery. A simulation framework is created to model the heat pipe's vapor core, laying the foundation for an enhanced understanding of heat pipe behavior. The ultimate goal is to improve and optimize heat pipe designs, provide data to validate lower-fidelity approaches and enhance their performance in nuclear reactors.

</details>


### [472] [How turbulence increases the bubble-particle collision rate](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.02234)
*Linfeng Jiang,Dominik Krug*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 基于界面解析模拟，研究了湍流中有限尺寸气泡与小惯性颗粒之间的碰撞机制。结果表明气泡周围流场主导碰撞过程，非线性效应可使碰撞率相比静止流场提升高达100%，气泡滑移速度的波动进一步增加碰撞率。提出了冻结湍流模型，为湍流中惯性颗粒与有限尺寸物体的碰撞建模提供了物理一致的框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究湍流对有限尺寸气泡与小惯性颗粒之间碰撞的影响机制，理解非线性效应和气泡滑移速度波动对碰撞率的贡献。

Method: 采用界面解析模拟（interface-resolved simulations）研究气泡与颗粒的碰撞过程，并提出了一个冻结湍流模型（frozen-turbulence model）来捕获相关效应。

Result: 气泡周围流场对碰撞起主导作用；非线性效应可使湍流碰撞率相较于静止流场提升高达100%；气泡滑移速度的波动进一步增加了碰撞率。

Conclusion: 所提出的冻结湍流模型能够物理一致地描述湍流中小惯性颗粒与有限尺寸物体的碰撞过程。

Abstract: We study the effect of turbulence on collisions between a finite-size bubble and small inertial particles based on interface-resolved simulations. Our results show that the interaction with the flow field around the bubble remains the dominant effect. Nonlinear dependencies in this process can enhance the turbulent collision rate by up to 100\% compared to quiescent flow. Fluctuations in the bubble slip velocity during the interaction with the particle additionally increase the collision rate. We present a frozen-turbulence model that captures the relevant effects providing a physically consistent framework to model collisions of small inertial particles with finite-sized objects in turbulence.

</details>


### [473] [Diffusion-limited settling of highly porous particles in density-stratified fluids](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.02419)
*Robert Hunt,Roberto Camassa,Richard M. McLaughlin,Daniel M. Harris*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文通过实验、分析和数值模拟，研究了高孔隙颗粒在密度分层流体中受扩散限制的沉降行为，推导了稳态沉降速度的简化表达式，发现小颗粒沉降更快（与传统流体阻力机制相反），并建立了任意形状物体沉降速度的通用数学框架，最后验证了预测并展示了如何利用颗粒轨迹重构背景密度分布。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 分层介质中固体材料的垂向输运对碳循环和海洋生态系统营养盐输运等环境问题至关重要，而高孔隙颗粒在这类介质中的沉降机制尚不清晰，特别是当质量适应引起的浮力效应主导流体动力阻力时的扩散限制沉降行为。

Method: 结合实验、理论分析和数值模拟，首先定义并利用扩散限制沉降机制（质量适应引起的浮力效应主导流体动力阻力），推导球体稳态沉降速度表达式；然后建立任意形状物体的通用数学框架，并导出椭球体的精确解；最后以高孔隙水凝胶作为模型系统进行实验验证。

Result: 推导出球体稳态沉降速度与颗粒密度、尺寸、扩散率及背景流体密度梯度的简单关系；发现小颗粒沉降更快，与常规流体阻力机制相反；建立了任意形状物体的通用数学框架并给出椭球体的精确解；水凝胶实验在宽参数范围内验证了理论预测。

Conclusion: 该理论可推广到任意缓慢变化的背景密度剖面，并可通过颗粒位置时间序列反演背景密度分布。

Abstract: The vertical transport of solid material in a stratified medium is fundamental to a number of environmental applications, with implications for the carbon cycle and nutrient transport in marine ecosystems. In this work, we study the diffusion-limited settling of highly porous particles in a density-stratified fluid through a combination of experiment, analysis, and numerical simulation. By delineating and appealing to the diffusion-limited regime wherein buoyancy effects due to mass adaptation dominate hydrodynamic drag, we derive a simple expression for the steady settling velocity of a sphere as a function of the density, size, and diffusivity of the solid, as well as the density gradient of the background fluid. In this regime, smaller particles settle faster, in contrast with most conventional hydrodynamic drag mechanisms. Furthermore, we outline a general mathematical framework for computing the steady settling speed of a body of arbitrary shape in this regime and compute exact results for the case of general ellipsoids. Using hydrogels as a highly porous model system, we validate the predictions with laboratory experiments in linear stratification for a wide range of parameters. Lastly, we show how the predictions can be applied to arbitrary slowly varying background density profiles and demonstrate how a measured particle position over time can be used to reconstruct the background density profile.

</details>


### [474] [Rayleigh-Bénard convective motion of stratified fluids in the Earth's troposphere](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.02441)
*A. P. Misra,T. D. Kaladze,D. T. Kaladze,L. Tsamalashvili*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文重新审视了Rayleigh-Bénard对流不稳定性，比较了无界与有界对流层中热对流波的色散关系、临界瑞利数及不稳定性增长率的差异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Kaladze和Misra [Phys. Scr. 99 (2024) 085013] 的研究表明，负温度梯度和热膨胀引起的密度不均匀性可能导致对流层分层流体不稳定，并预测密度不均匀性对Brunt–Väisälä频率的修正可引发Rayleigh-Bénard对流不稳定性。本文旨在更详细地重新审视这一不稳定性，同时考虑无界和有界对流层情形。

Method: 从不可压缩中性流体方程组出发，引入温度梯度和Boussinesq近似，推导无界和有界对流层中Rayleigh-Bénard对流波的广义色散关系，并针对特定情形进行解析与数值分析。

Result: 无界与有界两种情形下的不稳定性条件存在显著差异；给出了两种情形下的临界瑞利数表达式及热波不稳定性增长率；在有界情形下推导了必要的边界条件，垂直波数被量化，特征值问题得以适定。

Conclusion: 对流层有界与无界条件下的Rayleigh-Bénard不稳定性具有本质不同的特征，有界情形下垂直波数的量子化使得特征值问题适定，为对流层热对流不稳定性的精确分析提供了理论基础。

Abstract: Recently, Kaladze and Misra [Phys. Scr. 99 (2024) 085013] showed that the tropospheric stratified fluid flows may be unstable by the effects of the negative temperature gradient and the temperature-dependent density inhomogeneity arising from the thermal expansion. They also predicted that the modification in the Brunt-V{ä}is{ä}l{ä} frequency by the density inhomogeneity can lead to Rayleigh-B{é}nard convective instability in the tropospheric unbounded layers. The purpose of the present work is to revisit the Rayleigh-B{é}nard convective instability in more detail by considering both unbounded and bounded tropospheric layers. Starting from a set of fluid equations for incompressible neutral fluids with temperature gradients and using the Boussinesq approximation, we derive the general dispersion relations for Rayleigh-B{é}nard convective waves in unbounded and bounded tropospheric domains and analyze them with some particular cases both analytically and numerically. We show that the conditions for instability in these two cases significantly differ. Furthermore, we obtain and analyze the critical values of the Raleigh numbers and the expressions for the instability growth rates of thermal waves in the two cases. In the case of the bounded region, we also derive the necessary boundary conditions and note that the vertical wave number is quantified, and the corresponding eigenvalue problem is well-set.

</details>


### [475] [Thermoelectric magnetohydrodynamic flow in a liquid metal-infused trench](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.02470)
*Oliver George Bond,Peter Denis Howell*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文建立了液态锂在固态金属槽内稳态单向热电耦合磁流体力学(TEMHD)流动的数学模型，采用COMSOL有限元方法数值求解，并通过匹配渐近展开法在大哈特曼数和薄壁极限下解析阐明流动物理机制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究受热流作用的液态锂在金属槽中的热电耦合磁流体力学行为，理解其速度场、感应磁场和温度场的耦合演化规律。

Method: 基于数学模型推导，采用COMSOL Multiphysics有限元方法进行数值求解，同时利用匹配渐近展开法在大哈特曼数和槽壁薄壁极限条件下获得近似解析解。

Result: 揭示了流体速度、感应磁场和温度随关键物理及几何参数的变化规律，并通过渐近分析阐明了观测到的流动结构。

Conclusion: 大哈特曼数和薄壁极限下的匹配渐近展开能有效解释TEMHD流动的结构特征，数值与解析方法互补验证了模型的合理性。

Abstract: We derive a mathematical model for steady, unidirectional, thermoelectric magnetohydrodynamic (TEMHD) flow of liquid lithium along a solid metal trench, subject to an imposed heat flux. We use a finite-element method implemented in COMSOL Multiphysics to solve the problem numerically, demonstrating how the fluid velocity, induced magnetic field and temperature change depending on the key physical and geometrical parameters. The observed flow structures are elucidated by using the method of matched asymptotic expansions to obtain approximate solutions in the limit where the Hartmann number is large and the trench walls are thin.

</details>


### [476] [Thermoelectricity at a gallium-mercury liquid metal interface](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.02507)
*Marlone Vernet,Stephan Fauve,Christophe Gissinger*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文通过汞和镓的液态金属界面实验，首次直接测量了液-液界面的热电效应，发现温度梯度产生的电流密度显著高于传统固态热电效应，施加磁场后产生反向环流，并验证了两种流态的理论模型，最后讨论了液态金属电池等应用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索液态金属界面处是否存在热电效应，以及该效应与固态热电效应的差异，填补液-液界面热电现象的实验空白。

Method: 在室温圆柱形容器中叠加汞和镓层，沿液-液界面施加温度梯度，直接测量产生的电流；施加磁场观察流动行为，并与基于热电电流空间分布的理论模型进行对比。

Result: 成功测量到液-液界面热电效应产生的电流；发现边界处电流密度显著高于固态热电系统；施加磁场后产生两个方向相反的方位角剪切流，识别出两种不同磁场强度下的流动 regime，与理论模型吻合。

Conclusion: 液-液界面热电效应具有不同于固态系统的独特特性（高电流密度、无等效流的流动 regime），在液态金属电池等领域具有应用潜力。

Abstract: We present experimental evidence of a thermoelectric effect at the interface between two liquid metals. Using superimposed layers of mercury and gallium in a cylindrical vessel operating at room temperature, we provide a direct measurement of the electric current generated by the presence of a thermal gradient along a liquid-liquid interface. At the interface between two liquids, temperature gradients induced by thermal convection lead to a complex geometry of electric currents, ultimately generating current densities near boundaries that are significantly higher than those observed in conventional solid-state thermoelectricity. When a magnetic field is applied to the experiment, an azimuthal shear flow, exhibiting opposite circulation in each layer, is generated. Depending on the value of the magnetic field, two different flow regimes are identified, in good agreement with a model based on the spatial distribution of thermoelectric currents, which has no equivalent in solid systems. Finally, we discuss various applications of this new effect, such as the efficiency of liquid metal batteries.

</details>


### [477] [Validation of Theoretical Estimation Methods and Maximum Value Distribution Calculation for Parametric Roll Amplitude in Long-Crested Irregular Waves](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.02728)
*Keiji Katsumura,Leo Dostal,Taiga Kono,Yuuki Maruyama,Masahiro Sakai,Atsuo Maki*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本研究通过模型实验与理论方法对比，验证并改进了不规则波中参数横摇幅值的理论估算方法，修正GM变化后可提高精度，并成功实现了最大幅值概率分布的定性估算。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 不规则波中参数横摇幅值的理论估算方法缺乏充分的实验验证，本文旨在通过水池模型实验验证现有理论方法并提升其估算精度。

Method: 1) 将不规则波中模型船运动实验获得的参数横摇幅值概率密度函数(PDF)与理论估算结果进行对比；2) 提出修正不规则波中横摇恢复力变化的方法以提高估算精度；3) 利用矩方程理论估算最大参数横摇幅值的分布。

Result: 实验得到的横摇幅值PDF与理论估算结果存在差异；通过修正GM变化，理论估算结果更接近实验值；采用矩方程理论方法成功实现了最大横摇幅值PDF的定性估算。

Conclusion: 修正GM变化能有效提高不规则波中参数横摇幅值的理论估算精度，矩方程方法可用于最大幅值分布的定性估计。

Abstract: Parametric rolling is a parametric excitation phenomenon caused by GM variation in waves. There are a lot of studies of the estimation the conditions, the occurrence, and the amplitude of parametric rolling. On the other hand, there are relatively few cases in which theoretical methods for estimating parametric roll amplitudes in irregular waves have been validated in tank tests. The primary objective of this study is to validate theoretical estimation methods for the parametric roll amplitude in irregular waves and improve their accuracy. First, the probability density functions (PDF) of the parametric roll amplitude obtained from the model ship motion experiment in irregular waves are compared with that obtained from theoretical estimation methods. Second, the method to improve the accuracy of estimation of the roll restoring variation in irregular waves is suggested. Third, the method to estimate the distribution of the maximum amplitude of parametric rolling in irregular waves. As a result, the PDFs of the roll amplitude obtained from the experiments differ from the results of theoretical estimation. After that, by correcting GM variation, the results of theoretical estimation are closer to the experimental results. Moreover, by the theoretical estimation method using the moment equation, the qualitative estimation for the PDF of the maximum roll amplitude is succeeded.

</details>


### [478] [Generation Model of a Spatially Limited Vortex in a Stratified Unstable Atmosphere](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.02539)
*O. G. Onishchenko,S. N. Artekha,F. Z. Feygin,N. M. Astafieva*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个用于轴对称集中涡旋生成的新非线性解析模型，在非稳定分层大气中求解了内重力波的非线性方程，分析了涡旋的径向和垂直结构，发现涡旋在高度上受限，径向流在某一高度以下向轴汇聚、以上向外发散，速度分量随时间呈双曲正弦增长并转为指数增长，方位角速度呈超指数增长。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为了研究非稳定分层大气中轴对称集中涡旋的生成机制和非线性动力学行为，填补现有模型在解析描述涡旋结构方面的不足。

Method: 在理想流体力学框架下，求解内重力波的非线性方程，采用贝塞尔函数和修正贝塞尔函数的组合来表达径向和垂直速度分量对半径的依赖关系，构建了涡旋内外区域的解析模型。

Result: 涡旋在高度上受限，最大垂直速度分量出现在特定高度；该高度以下径向流汇聚，以上则向外发散；不稳定分层大气导致速度分量按双曲正弦规律增长并转为指数增长，方位角速度呈超指数增长。

Conclusion: 该非线性解析模型能够有效研究涡旋在径向和垂直区域的结构与非线性动力学，为理解分层大气中涡旋的演化提供了理论工具。

Abstract: This paper presents a new model for the generation of axisymmetric concentrated vortices. The solution of a nonlinear equation for internal gravity waves in an unstable stratified atmosphere is obtained and analyzed within the framework of ideal hydrodynamics. The corresponding expressions describing the dependences on the radius for the radial and vertical velocity components in the inner and outer regions of the vortex include combinations of Bessel functions and modified Bessel functions. The proposed new nonlinear analytical model makes it possible to study the structure and nonlinear dynamics of vortices in the radial and vertical regions. The vortex is limited in height. The maximum vertical velocity component is reached at a certain height. Below this height, radial flows converge towards the axis, and above it, an outflow occurs. The resulting instability in the stratified atmosphere leads to an increase in the radial and vertical velocity components according to the hyperbolic sine law, which turns into exponential growth. The characteristic growth time is determined by the inverse growth rate of the instability. The formation of vortices with finite velocity components, which increase with time, is analyzed. The radial structure of the azimuthal velocity is determined by the structure of the initial perturbation and can change with height. The maximum rotation is reached at a certain height. The growth of the azimuth velocity occurs according to a super-exponential law.

</details>


### [479] [Learning rheological parameters of non-Newtonian fluids from velocimetry data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.02604)
*Alexandros Kontogiannis,Richard Hodgkinson,Emily L. Manchester*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种贝叶斯逆纳维-斯托克斯（N-S）算法，通过同化测速数据来联合重建流场并学习未知的N-S参数（尤其是Carreau剪切稀化粘度模型参数）。在针对血模拟流体的轴对称层流射流（FDA喷嘴）的flow-MRI实验中，该算法成功重建流场，学习的Carreau参数与流变仪测量结果高度一致。该算法可接受任何可微的有效粘度模型，并可推广至更复杂的非牛顿流体（如Oldroyd-B流体）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 从测速数据中同时重建流场和学习非牛顿流体的未知流变参数（特别是Carreau剪切稀化模型的参数），并量化参数的不确定性，避免依赖传统的流变仪测量。

Method: 将Carreau剪切稀化粘度模型嵌入N-S方程，构建贝叶斯逆问题框架，通过同化flow-MRI实验获得的轴对称层流射流测速数据，联合推断流场和Carreau参数，并估计参数不确定性。

Result: 算法成功重建了流场；学习得到的Carreau参数与流变仪测量结果非常吻合；验证了算法对可微有效粘度模型的通用性。

Conclusion: 该贝叶斯逆N-S方法能仅凭测速数据有效学习非牛顿流体的流变参数和重构流场，且具有很好的泛化能力，可扩展至更复杂的非牛顿流体模型（如粘弹性Oldroyd-B流体）。

Abstract: We solve a Bayesian inverse Navier-Stokes (N-S) problem that assimilates velocimetry data in order to jointly reconstruct the flow field and learn the unknown N-S parameters. By incorporating a Carreau shear-thinning viscosity model into the N-S problem, we devise an algorithm that learns the most likely Carreau parameters of a shear-thinning fluid, and estimates their uncertainties, from velocimetry data alone. We then conduct a flow-MRI experiment to obtain velocimetry data of an axisymmetric laminar jet through an idealised medical device (FDA nozzle) for a blood analogue fluid. We show that the algorithm can successfully reconstruct the flow field by learning the most likely Carreau parameters, and that the learned parameters are in very good agreement with rheometry measurements. The algorithm accepts any algebraic effective viscosity model, as long as the model is differentiable, and it can be extended to more complicated non-Newtonian fluids (e.g. Oldroyd-B fluid) if a viscoelastic model is incorporated into the N-S problem.

</details>


### [480] [Manipulating liquid-liquid phase separation using patterned flow](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.02792)
*Yulin Li,Tong Zhou,Yanyu Li,Qi Zhang,Zhihong You*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文提出利用图案化流动（patterned flow）作为通用工具来精确控制液-液相分离（LLPS），通过理论建模和数值模拟展示了流动结构可实现对液滴捕获、尺寸调控、周期性阵列组装以及相分离动力学重塑等多种操作，其机制基于结构化流动对化学势的再分布。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 流体流动已被证明能够控制LLPS的结构和有效温度，但控制的程度和精度尚不理想，因此需要更有效的操控方法。

Method: 结合理论建模与数值模拟，设计具有定制结构的图案化流动，研究其对LLPS的调控效果。

Result: 图案化流动能够实现液滴捕获与钉扎、液滴尺寸精细调节、周期性液滴阵列的强制组装，以及相分离动力学和结构的重塑。

Conclusion: 图案化流动通过重新分布化学势来调控LLPS，不仅为基于LLPS的技术提供了新途径，也揭示了图案化流动引入的丰富相分离行为。

Abstract: The precise control of liquid-liquid phase separation (LLPS) is the key to developing cutting-edge technologies that benefit diverse disciplines. Fluid flow was found to be capable of controlling the structure and effective temperature of LLPS, but the extent and precision of control were less than optimal. In this article, we propose that patterned flow can be employed as a generic tool to manipulate LLPS effectively. By combining theoretical modeling and numerical simulations, we demonstrate that flows with tailor-made structures can become functional, allowing us to control diverse aspects of LLPS. Typical examples include the capture and pinning of droplets, fine-tuning of droplet sizes, forced assembly of periodic droplet arrays, and the remodeling of the kinetics and structure of phase separation. These manipulations are grounded on the redistribution of chemical potential by the structured flow. Our results not only can lead to potential LLPS-based technologies, but also highlight the rich behavior of LLPS introduced by the patterned flow.

</details>


### [481] [Development of the Multichannel Pulsed Ultrasonic Doppler Velocimeter for the measurement of liquid metal flow](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.02815)
*Ding-Yi Pan,Yi-Fei Huang,Ze Lyu,Juan-Cheng Yang,Ming-Jiu Ni*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文开发了一种多通道脉冲超声多普勒测速（MPUDV）系统，用于测量液态金属的二维二维速度场。系统时空分辨率达50 Hz和3 mm。通过水-粒子图像测速（PIV）对比验证，两者速度场差异小于3%；进一步在GaInSn液态金属合金中成功测量了不同雷诺数（9103-24123）下的回流流场结构，包括主循环涡和两个次级涡，证明了MPUDV在 opaque 液态金属流场测量中的可靠性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 液态金属流动广泛存在于冶金、核能等领域，但由于其不透明性，传统的基于光学的方法（如PIV）无法直接应用。因此，亟需一种能够测量 opaque 液态金属二维速度场的非光学测量技术。

Method: 采用超声技术开发多通道脉冲超声多普勒测速（MPUDV）系统，通过特制的超声主机和后处理方案实现高时空分辨率（50 Hz, 3 mm）。首先以水为介质、PIV为基准进行验证，随后在GaInSn液态金属回路中测试不同雷诺数下的流场。

Result: MPUDV与PIV同时测量的二维速度场差异小于3%；在液态金属中成功解析出主循环涡和两个次级涡结构；涡心位置和次级涡尺寸随雷诺数显著变化，揭示了惯性力对回流特性的影响。

Conclusion: MPUDV方法能够准确测量 opaque 液态金属的二维二维速度场，为液态金属流动研究提供了一种有效的实验手段。

Abstract: In the present study, by adopting the advantage of ultrasonic techniques, we developed a Multichannel Pulsed Ultrasonic Doppler Velocimetry (MPUDV) to measure the 2D2C velocity fields of liquid metal flow. Due to the specially designed Ultrasonic host and post-processing scheme, the MPUDV system can reach a high spatiotemporal resolution of 50 Hz and 3 mm. The flow loop contains a cavity test section to ensure a classical recirculating flow was built to validate the accuracy of MPUDV in velocity field measurement. In the initial phase of the study, water with tracer particles was selected as the working liquid to ensure the velocity field measurements by the well-developed Particle Image Velocimetry (PIV). A comparison of the data obtained from the PIV and MPUDV methods revealed less than 3 differences in the 2D2C velocity field between the two techniques during simultaneous measurements of the same flow field. This finding strongly demonstrates the reliability of the MPUDV method developed in this paper. Moreover, the ternary alloy GaInSn was selected as the working liquid in the flow loop to validate the efficacy of the MPUDV in measuring 2D-2C velocity fields. A series of tests were conducted in the cavity at varying Reynolds numbers, ranging from 9103 to 24123. The measurements demonstrated that the MPUDV could accurately measure the flow structures characterized by a central primary circulation eddy and two secondary eddies in the opaque liquid metal. Furthermore, it was found that the vortex center of the primary circulating eddy and the size of the secondary eddies undergo significant alterations with varying Reynolds numbers, indicating the influence of inertial force on the flow characteristics in the recirculating flow. It is therefore demonstrated that the current MPUDV methodology is applicable for measuring a 2D2C velocity field in opaque liquid metal flows.

</details>


### [482] [Investigation of injector-coupled combustion dynamics in a methane-oxygen combustor using large eddy simulation and dynamic mode decomposition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.03055)
*Abhishek Sharma,Ashoke De,Sunil Kumar*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文采用反应流大涡模拟（LES）与模态分解技术（DMD），通过CVRC基准算例和多单元火箭燃烧室两个案例，系统研究了甲烷-氧气燃烧室中喷注器-燃烧室频率耦合引发热声不稳定性的机理，揭示了纵向与横向压力波相互作用对燃烧动力学的增强作用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 阐明喷注器-燃烧室频率耦合作为热声不稳定性成因的重要性，并验证高保真LES框架结合模态分解技术能否有效确定火箭燃烧室中燃烧不稳定的主导原因。

Method: 采用反应流大涡模拟（LES）进行高保真数值模拟；结合动态模态分解（DMD）技术揭示喷注器和燃烧室中声学模式的演化；通过CVRC连续可变共振燃烧室基准算例和多单元火箭燃烧室两个案例进行分析。

Result: 在CVRC中识别了潜在的不稳定性机制及喷注器-燃烧室频率耦合的作用；在多单元燃烧室中确定了关键共振模式；发现氧化剂供应管纵向压力振荡与燃烧室横向压力波之间的相互作用是压力动力学增强的原因；DMD分析揭示了主导压力模态形式并展示了频率耦合在放大燃烧动力学中的作用。

Conclusion: 高保真LES框架结合模态分解技术能够有效确定火箭燃烧室中燃烧不稳定的主导原因，喷注器-燃烧室频率耦合是引发热声不稳定性的关键因素。

Abstract: This paper uses a reactive flow large eddy simulation (LES) and decomposition techniques to study combustion instabilities in a methane-oxygen combustor. This work examines two case scenarios to elucidate the significance of injector-chamber frequency coupling as the cause of thermo-acoustic instability. Initial investigation in a well-known benchmark case of the continuously variable resonance combustor (CVRC) reports the potential instability mechanisms and the role of injector-chamber frequency coupling in thermo-acoustic instability. Subsequently, the multi-element rocket combustor case study identifies the critical resonant modes and highlights potential frequency coupling between the injector and the chamber region. The interplay between longitudinal pressure oscillations in the oxidizer post and transverse pressure waves in the chamber is responsible for the enhanced pressure dynamics in the combustor. The present work uses the dynamic mode decomposition (DMD) technique to reveal the evolution of acoustic modes in injector and chamber for CVRC and multi-element combustor. The dominant pressure mode forms found by DMD analysis also showcase the role of injector-chamber frequency coupling in amplified combustion dynamics. The results demonstrate how the predominant cause of combustion instability in rocket combustors can be effectively determined using the high-fidelity LES framework in conjunction with the modal decomposition technique.

</details>


### [483] [A generalized three-dimensional hybrid contact method for smoothed particle hydrodynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.02923)
*Wenbin Liu,Zhuoping Duan,Yan Liu,Fenglei Huang*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种适用于SPH方法的通用三维混合接触方法，通过改进自由面粒子检测、三维局部表面重构以及结合面-面接触与粒子-粒子接触，能够准确稳定地处理小变形、大变形及极端变形情况下的接触问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有SPH方法中缺乏能够良好适用于各种变形情况（尤其是极端变形）的三维接触方法。

Method: 1) 改进的高精度自由面粒子检测方法（优化检测流程、考虑材料可压缩性扩展滤波参数适用范围）；2) 基于自由面粒子和区域生长法的三维局部表面重构方法（含初始边选取、三角形扩展原则和评价函数）；3) 面-面接触检测及基于罚函数法和库仑摩擦定律的法向惩罚力与切向摩擦力施加；4) 补充粒子-粒子接触机制以处理面-面接触失效的极端变形情况。

Result: 多个数值测试验证表明，该方法能准确稳定地处理小变形、大变形和极端变形等多种接触问题。

Conclusion: 提出的广义三维混合接触方法能够有效弥补现有SPH三维接触方法的不足，在处理各种变形程度的接触问题时具有良好的精度和稳定性。

Abstract: When the effects of relative motion at the solid object interfaces are not negligible, the contact method is required in the smoothed particle hydrodynamics (SPH) method to prevent virtual shear and tensile stresses. However, there is still a lack of a three-dimensional (3D) contact method that can be well applied to various deformation situations, especially for extreme deformation. In this study, we propose a generalized 3D hybrid contact method for SPH. First, an improved high accuracy free-surface particle detection method is developed, including optimization of the detection process to reduce the detection time and consideration of the effect of material compressibility on the filtering parameters to extend the existing semi-geometric method from the incompressible (weakly-compressible) field to the compressible field. Then, a novel 3D local surface reconstruction method is developed based on the free-surface particles and region growing method, including the selection of the initial edge, the principle of triangle expansion, and the evaluation function, followed by the surface-surface contact detection and enforcement of normal penalty and tangential friction forces according to the penalty function method and Coulomb friction law. Finally, the particle-particle contact method is added to deal with cases where surface-surface contact fails, e.g., some particles are unable to reconstruct the local surface when the material undergoes extreme deformations. The proposed method is validated by several numerical tests, and the results show that the proposed method is capable of handling various contact problems with accuracy and stability, including small, large, and extreme deformation problems.

</details>


### [484] [Learning the Latent dynamics of Fluid flows from High-Fidelity Numerical Simulations using Parsimonious Diffusion Maps](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.02630)
*Alessandro Della Pia,Dimitris Patsatzis,Lucia Russo,Constantinos Siettos*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文采用简约扩散映射（PDMs）对高保真Navier-Stokes模拟的潜在动力学进行降维分析，以2D流体弹球问题为对象。研究表明，与传统POD/PCA相比，PDMs能更清晰地识别不同雷诺数下流态的内在维度（振荡态2维、混沌态3维），且重构误差更低，有望发展更精确的降阶模型以缓解数值分析中的维度灾难。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高保真流体动力学模拟面临维度灾难问题，传统线性降维方法（如POD/PCA）无法清晰区分流态演变中的主导模态，亟需一种能更精确捕捉非线性流态内在维度的流形学习方法，以支撑分岔分析、优化与控制等任务。

Method: 采用简约扩散映射（Parsimonious Diffusion Maps, PDMs）这一非线性流形学习框架，对2D流体弹球问题的Navier-Stokes仿真数据进行降维；使用Geometric Harmonics构建解码器以计算重构误差，并与POD/PCA方法进行对比。

Result: PDMs清晰识别出：振荡流态的内在维度为2维，混沌流态为3维（与规范形式理论一致）；而POD/PCA无法提供如此清晰的主导模态分离。在整个雷诺数范围内，PDMs的重构误差均低于POD/PCA。

Conclusion: PDMs作为一种非线性降维方案，在流体动力学高维仿真数据的潜在流态识别和重构精度上优于传统POD/PCA方法，有望为分岔分析、优化与控制等数值任务提供更精确的降阶模型，缓解维度灾难问题。

Abstract: We use parsimonious diffusion maps (PDMs) to discover the latent dynamics of high-fidelity Navier-Stokes simulations with a focus on the 2D fluidic pinball problem. By varying the Reynolds number, different flow regimes emerge, ranging from steady symmetric flows to quasi-periodic asymmetric and turbulence. We show, that the proposed non-linear manifold learning scheme, identifies in a crisp manner the expected intrinsic dimension of the underlying emerging dynamics over the parameter space. In particular, PDMs, estimate that the emergent dynamics in the oscillatory regime can be captured by just two variables, while in the chaotic regime, the dominant modes are three as anticipated by the normal form theory. On the other hand, proper orthogonal decomposition (POD)/PCA, most commonly used for dimensionality reduction in fluid mechanics, does not provide such a crisp separation between the dominant modes. To validate the performance of PDMs, we also computed the reconstruction error, by constructing a decoder using Geometric Harmonics. We show that the proposed scheme outperforms the POD/PCA over the whole Reynolds number range. Thus, we believe that the proposed scheme will allow for the development of more accurate reduced order models for high-fidelity fluid dynamics simulators, thus relaxing the curse of dimensionality in numerical analysis tasks such as bifurcation analysis, optimization and control.

</details>


### [485] [Towards High Resolution Real-Time Optical Flow Particle Image Velocimetry](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.03057)
*Juan Pimienta,Jean-Luc Aider*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于光流法的实时高分辨率PIV技术，通过将示踪粒子浓度从适用于互相关PIV调整为适用于光流算法，实现了每像素一个速度矢量的实时密集速度场测量，并引入"Active Pixels"概念作为优化判据，在圆柱绕流实验中验证了该方法可达到单像素级空间分辨率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统PIV技术在瞬时速度场的空间分辨率和实时性方面存在局限，光流法有望解决这些问题，但需要探索适合光流算法的示踪粒子浓度条件。

Method: 采用光流法替代传统互相关PIV；调整示踪粒子浓度以适应光流算法而非互相关算法；通过Rankine涡合成图像验证浓度对速度场质量的影响；引入"Active Pixels"概念作为示踪优化的判据。

Result: 在合适的示踪浓度下，光流法可实现每像素一个矢量的实时密集速度场测量；成功应用于圆柱下游绕流实验，达到单像素级空间分辨率。

Conclusion: 光流法配合适当优化的示踪浓度，能够突破传统PIV在空间分辨率和实时性方面的限制，实现高精度的小尺度涡旋测量。

Abstract: Particle Image Velocimetry (PIV) is the most commonly used optical technique for measuring 2D velocity fields. However, improving the spatial resolution of instantaneous velocity fields and having access to the velocity field in real time remains a challenge. Optical Flow veolcimetry makes it possible to meet these challenges. In this study, we show that it is possible to access dense velocity fields (1 vector per pixel) in real-time using an appropriate seeding concentration adapted to optical flow algorithms and no longer to cross-correlation PIV algorithms. The influence of concentration on the quality of velocity fields is demonstrated using synthetic images generated for a Rankine vortex. We thus demonstrate that it is possible to precisely measure small vortices using optical flow provided that the seeding is suitable. The notion of "Active Pixels" is also introduced in order to define a seeding optimization criterion adapted to experimental measurements. This criterion is finally successfully applied to the flow downstream of a cylinder leading to a spatial resolution down to one vector per pixel.

</details>


### [486] [Mean field lattice Boltzmann model for reactive mixtures in porous media](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.02930)
*Nilesh Sawant,Ilya Karlin*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新的格子玻尔兹曼模型，用于描述均质化多孔介质中的化学反应多组分流体流动。该模型在REV尺度上扩展了多组分反应性LBM，通过引入Knudsen扩散、修改动力学方程以适应孔隙率影响，并通过Chapman--Enskog分析验证了宏观方程的恢复。模型经Dusty Gas Model验证，并成功应用于SOFC多孔电极的详细化学模拟，预测了极化曲线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有反应性多组分格子玻尔兹曼模型在处理多孔介质中REV尺度的计算时仍存在局限，尤其是缺乏对Knudsen扩散和孔隙率影响的系统处理。作者旨在进一步推广该模型，使其能够有效描述多孔介质中化学反应多组分流动的宏观行为。

Method: 1) 将种间扩散子模型升级以包含Knudsen扩散；2) 重新改写物种、动量和能量的动力学方程，通过平衡分布函数的精心选择适应多孔介质体积分数效应；3) 通过Chapman--Enskog分析验证介观动力学系统在宏观尺度恢复均质化的可压缩多组分反应流Navier--Stokes方程；4) 提出维持能量和质量平衡的源项以处理非均相反应。

Result: 1) Chapman--Enskog分析证明模型宏观上恢复均质化Navier--Stokes方程；2) Dusty Gas Model在宽压力范围内通过与毛细管逆扩散实验流量对比得到验证；3) 模型成功应用于SOFC多孔电极的详细化学动力学模拟，预测了具有实际意义的极化曲线。

Conclusion: 该LBM模型成功扩展至REV尺度多孔介质反应流，整合了Knudsen扩散和孔隙率效应，并通过SOFC极化曲线预测证明了其工程实用性。该工作为多孔介质中复杂反应输运过程的高效模拟提供了新工具。

Abstract: A new lattice Boltzmann model (LBM) is presented to describe chemically reacting multicomponent fluid flow in homogenised porous media. In this work, towards further generalizing the multicomponent reactive lattice Boltzmann model, we propose a formulation which is capable of performing reactive multicomponent flow computation in porous media at the representative elementary volume (REV) scale. To that end, the submodel responsible for interspecies diffusion has been upgraded to include Knudsen diffusion, whereas the kinetic equations for the species, the momentum and the energy have been rewritten to accommodate the effects of volume fraction of a porous media though careful choice of the equilibrium distribution functions. Verification of the mesoscale kinetic system of equations by a Chapman--Enskog analysis reveals that at the macroscopic scale, the homogenized Navier--Stokes equations for compressible multicomponent reactive flows are recovered. The Dusty Gas Model (DGM) capability hence formulated is validated over a wide pressure range by comparison of experimental flow rates of component species counter diffusing through capillary tubes. Next, for developing a capability to compute heterogeneous reactions, source terms for maintaining energy and mass balance across the fluid phase species and the surface adsorbed phase species are proposed. The complete model is then used to perform detailed chemistry simulations in porous electrodes of a Solid Oxide Fuel Cell (SOFC), thereby predicting polarization curves which are of practical interest.

</details>


### [487] [Phase Transitions in Anisotropic Turbulence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.02844)
*Adrian van Kan*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文综述了高度各向异性湍流（如薄层湍流、快速旋转湍流）中不同湍流“相”之间转变的最新研究，包括能量级联方向的转变、大尺度结构（涡旋与射流）的随机反转等非线性现象。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 湍流在不同物理系统中表现出截然不同的行为（如3D正向能量级联 vs. 2D反向能量级联），控制参数跨越临界值时会发生湍流相之间的转变，这些转变点附近的行为异常丰富但尚未被系统理解。

Method: 以综述形式系统梳理了各向异性湍流（薄层、快速旋转）中相变现象的研究进展，涵盖能量级联方向转变、湍流涨落诱导的随机反转、大尺度涡旋与射流之间的转变等。

Result: 揭示了各向异性湍流中相变行为的丰富性和复杂性，包括临界点附近的标度律、对称性破缺、大尺度结构竞争等。

Conclusion: 这些发现对理解天体物理、地球物理（如行星大气、海洋）及工程系统中的湍流有重要意义，并指出了未来研究的关键方向。

Abstract: Turbulence is a widely observed state of fluid flows, characterized by complex, nonlinear interactions between motions across a broad spectrum of length and time scales. While turbulence is ubiquitous, from teacups to planetary atmospheres, oceans and stars, its manifestations can vary considerably between different physical systems. For instance, three-dimensional (3D) turbulent flows display a forward energy cascade from large to small scales, while in two-dimensional (2D) turbulence, energy cascades from small to large scales. In a given physical system, a transition between such disparate regimes of turbulence can occur when a control parameter reaches a critical value. The behavior of flows close to such transition points, which separate qualitatively distinct \textit{phases} of turbulence, has been found to be unexpectedly rich. Here, we survey recent findings on such transitions in highly anisotropic turbulent fluid flows, including turbulence in thin layers and under the influence of rapid rotation. We also review recent work on transitions induced by turbulent fluctuations, such as random reversals and transitions between large-scale vortices and jets, among others. The relevance of these results and their ramifications for future investigations are discussed.

</details>


### [488] [Novel Pressure-Equilibrium and Kinetic-Energy Preserving fluxes for compressible flows based on the harmonic mean](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.03299)
*Carlo De Michele,Gennaro Coppola*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文研究了可压缩流动数值离散中保持压力平衡性质（PEP）的条件，提出了将PEP赋予现有离散格式的方法，并通过经典格式的微小修改引入了新的PEP数值格式。数值实验验证了理论，并表明这些修改在保证PEP性质的同时，通常能提升原始格式的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在可压缩流动的数值模拟中，除了像不可压缩情形那样在离散层面保持动能守恒外，还需要保持接触界面处压力平衡的稳定性。现有格式在这一性质（PEP）上的理论分析尚不充分，本文旨在系统研究实现PEP的离散条件，并改进现有格式。

Method: 理论分析空间数值离散达到PEP的一般条件；对文献中的现有格式进行PEP分析；提出将PEP赋予现有离散化的程序；通过对经典格式的微小修改引入新的PEP数值格式。

Result: 理论分析揭示了实现PEP所需的一般离散条件；通过修改经典格式成功构造了新的PEP格式；数值实验验证了理论结果，并表明PEP修改不仅保证了压力平衡保持，而且通常对原始格式的性能有积极影响。

Conclusion: 实现PEP的可压缩数值格式可以提升模拟的鲁棒性和准确性，通过系统的理论分析和格式改进，可以有效地将PEP性质引入现有离散化方案中，并在不牺牲性能的前提下增强数值稳定性。

Abstract: Employing physically-consistent numerical methods is an important step towards attaining robust and accurate numerical simulations. When addressing compressible flows, in addition to preserving kinetic energy at a discrete level, as done in the incompressible case, additional properties are sought after, such as the ability to preserve the equilibrium of pressure that can be found at contact interfaces. This paper investigates the general conditions of the spatial numerical discretizations to achieve the pressure equilibrium preserving property (PEP). Schemes from the literature are analyzed in this respect, and procedures to impart the PEP property to existing discretizations are proposed. Additionally, new PEP numerical schemes are introduced through minor modifications of classical ones. Numerical tests confirmed the theory hereby presented and showed that the modifications, beyond the enforcement of the PEP property, have a generally positive impact on the performances of the original schemes.

</details>


### [489] [Parameter Analysis in Continuous Data Assimilation for Various Turbulence Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.03042)
*Debora A. F. Albanez,Maicon Jose Benvenutti,Samuel Little,Jing Tian*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn
