TL;DR: 本文对简化Bardina模型和Navier-Stokes-α模型两种湍流模型的数据同化算法进行参数估计分析，通过基于观测数据的插值算子构建近似解，并给出数值模拟验证理论结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 对两种湍流模型（简化Bardina模型和Navier-Stokes-α模型）的数据同化算法进行参数估计分析，以提升湍流模拟的精度和可靠性。

Method: 采用基于系统观测数据的插值算子为湍流模型构造近似解，分析估计结果对模型中参数α的依赖性，并通过数值模拟验证理论分析的正确性。

Result: 成功建立了参数估计的理论结果，并通过数值模拟验证了所提方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 所提出的基于观测数据插值算子的参数估计方法对于两种湍流模型是有效的，参数α对估计精度有重要影响。

Abstract: In this study, we conduct parameter estimation analysis on a data assimilation algorithm for two turbulence models: the simplified Bardina model and the Navier-Stokes-α model. Our approach involves creating an approximate solution for the turbulence models by employing an interpolant operator based on the observational data of the systems. The estimation depends on the parameter alpha in the models. Additionally, numerical simulations are presented to validate our theoretical results

</details>


### [490] [Unsteady separation and oscillations in a compressible wake of a cylinder](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.02933)
*Sudhir Gai,Krishna Talluru,Akshay Nandhan*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文重新分析了马赫数4和6条件下圆柱近尾迹振荡现象，发现该振荡强烈依赖于雷诺数，存在一个阈值雷诺数，低于该值时尾迹非定常性和振荡不出现。提出基于总尾迹动量厚度θ的斯特劳哈尔数St_θ是关联高超声速/高超声速尾迹的通用相似参数，而仅基于单一几何体（圆柱）的通用斯特劳哈尔数过于局限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 已有研究对高超声速圆柱尾迹振荡现象的解释尚不充分，且Schmidt和Thasu提出的"通用斯特劳哈尔数"仅基于圆柱单一几何体和有限雷诺数范围，缺乏普适性。作者希望通过重新分析实验数据，揭示振荡现象的雷诺数依赖性，并寻找更合理的相似参数。

Method: 基于Schmidt(2015)和Thasu(2022)在马赫数4和6、雷诺数2×10^4至5×10^5范围内的圆柱近尾迹振荡实验数据，结合Kendall(1962)的超音速圆柱/球体尾迹实验以及Goldburg(1965)的高超声速球体/锥体尾迹研究，进行对比分析和参数关联。

Result: (1) 尾迹振荡现象强烈依赖于雷诺数，存在一个阈值雷诺数；(2) 基于总尾迹动量厚度θ定义的斯特劳哈尔数St_θ能够关联球体、锥体和圆柱等多种几何体的高超声速/高超声速尾迹数据，具有"通用性"；(3) 仅基于圆柱单一几何体和有限雷诺数范围定义的通用斯特劳哈尔数过于局限。

Conclusion: St_θ（基于总尾迹动量厚度）是比St_d（基于直径）更合适的通用相似参数，可用于关联不同几何体（球体、锥体、圆柱）的高超声速尾迹振荡数据；Schmidt等人提出的单一几何体通用斯特劳哈尔数适用范围有限。

Abstract: The paper presents a new analysis and a new interpretation of oscillations observed in the experiments of near wakes of cylinders at Mach 4 and Mach 6 and Reynolds number range 2 $\times$ 10$^4$ to 5 $\times$ 10$^5$ by \cite{schmidt2015oscillations} and \cite{thasu2022strouhal}. It is shown that the presence of such oscillations is strongly Reynolds number dependent. It is further shown that there is a threshold Reynolds number below which wake unsteadiness and oscillations do not appear. Attention is drawn to the earlier experimental investigation of supersonic wakes behind cylinders and spheres by \cite{kendall1962exp} which discusses cylinder oscillations and confirms the concept of threshold Reynolds number. Following the earlier work of \cite{goldburg1965strouhal} on hypersonic wakes of spheres and cones, a Strouhal number($St_θ$) based on total wake momentum thickness ($θ$) is shown to be the relevant similarity parameter for correlating the hypersonic and high supersonic wakes of spheres, cones, as well as cylinders. In this limited sense, $St_θ$ can be said to be `universal'. A universal Strouhal number based on only one geometry (\textit{i.e.,} a circular cylinder) and over a limited Reynolds number range as proposed by \cite{schmidt2015oscillations} is much too restrictive.

</details>


### [491] [A unified transition mechanism from shock to detonation waves](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.03042)
*Hao Yan,Haochen Xiong,Xin Han,Chongguang Shi,Yancheng You*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文针对斜爆轰问题，从气动分析角度总结提出了激波-爆轰转变的影响方程。该方程综合了化学反应、激波强度、壁面条件等参数的影响，以数学表达式定量解释了激波-爆轰转变的物理机制。通过数值模拟结果及其梯度的对比验证了该方程的可靠性。该方程还可用于预测激波-爆轰转变的临界条件，且除斜爆轰外，也兼容于正常爆轰中的爆燃-爆轰转变问题，具有广泛的适用性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 激波-爆轰转变对于超新星形成、灾害防治及超音速推进技术研究具有重要意义，但目前缺乏能够综合多种物理参数、定量解释其物理机制的数学表达形式。

Method: 从气动分析角度出发，推导并总结了激波-爆轰转变的影响方程，该方程整合了化学反应、激波强度和壁面条件等参数的影响，并通过数值模拟结果及其梯度对比进行验证。

Result: 所提出的影响方程与数值模拟结果及其梯度吻合良好，验证了方程的可靠性；该方程能够预测激波-爆轰转变的临界条件，并兼容于正常爆轰中的爆燃-爆轰转变问题。

Conclusion: 提出的影响方程以数学表达式定量解释了激波-爆轰转变的物理机制，具有良好的可靠性和广泛的适用性，可用于预测转变临界条件。

Abstract: The transition of shock-to-detonation is of great significance for the investigation of supernova formation, disaster prevention and supersonic propulsion technology. In this paper, the influence Equation of shock-to-detonation transition is summarized for the oblique detonation problem from aerodynamic analysis. The Equation integrates the effects of parameters such as chemical reaction, shock intensity and wall conditions, which quantitatively explains the physical mechanism of shock-to-detonation transition in the form of mathematical expression. Comparison with numerical simulation results as well as their gradients verified the reliability of the influence Equation. Further, the influence Equation can also be used to predict the critical conditions for the transition from shock to detonation transition form. In addition to oblique detonation, the influence Equation is compatible with the deflagration-to-detonation problem for normal detonation, which shows a wide applicability.

</details>


### [492] [Lagrangian vs Eulerian view on the mean drift and streaming flows in orbital sloshing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.03438)
*Alessandro Bongarzone,François Gallaire*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文通过弱非线性渐近逼近方法，数值求解了高黏性流体中轨道晃动（orbital sloshing）的流动结构，揭示了斯托克斯漂移（Stokes drift）的黏性修正对拉格朗日平均流（尤其是接触线附近的极向涡旋）的关键贡献，并成功与实验观测取得了高度一致。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 轨道晃动引起的拉格朗日平均流包含欧拉流（黏性流）和斯托克斯漂移两种成分，但两者在实验中对力幅和频率的标度相似，难以区分；且高黏性流体中基于无黏假设的分析失效，现有研究未能定量评估两者的相对贡献。

Method: 构建截断渐近逼近解，各阶数值求解以准确描述接触线区域；进行弱非线性分析：一阶波动和二阶平均流；与Bouvard等人（2017）的实验数据系统对比。

Result: 离共振频率下，理论预测与实验高度吻合；高黏性条件下，极向涡旋不能仅归因于欧拉流，斯托克斯漂移的黏性修正同样重要。

Conclusion: 黏性流体的拉格朗日平均流中，斯托克斯漂移的黏性修正是描述极向涡旋不可或缺的组成部分，不可忽略。

Abstract: Orbital sloshing is a technique to gently mix a container's liquid content and it is commonly used in fermentation and cell cultivation processes. Besides the rich wave dynamics observed at the interface, Bouvard et al. (2017) [1] unveiled the structure of the Lagrangian mean flow hiding in the fluid bulk. The latter flow shows a global toroidal (azimuthal) rotation co-directed with the wave and nontrivial poloidal vortices near the contact line. Rotating sloshing waves are known to induce a net motion of fluid particles and hence a wave-averaged difference between the Eulerian flow - viscous streaming - and the Lagrangian flow, that is commonly referred to as Stokes drift. Nevertheless, discerning these two components in an experiment is challenging as they scale similarly with the forcing amplitude and frequency. Their relative contributions remain therefore unquantified, particularly for highly viscous fluids, for which prior analysis, based on inviscid arguments, fails. In this work, we construct a truncated asymptotic approximation of the problem, where the solution at each order is computed numerically to describe as accurately as possible the contact line region, otherwise analytically untractable. The results of this weakly nonlinear analysis in terms of first-order wave and second-order mean flow are then thoroughly compared with the experiments by Bouvard et al. (2017) [1], showing a remarkable agreement for off-resonance frequencies. When viscosity matters, our findings suggest that it is incorrect to attribute the poloidal patterns solely to the Eulerian streaming flow and that viscous corrections to the Stokes drift are equally important in the resulting mean Lagrangian flow.

</details>


### [493] [Demonstration of Scalability and Accuracy of Variational Quantum Linear Solver for Computational Fluid Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.03241)
*Ferdin Sagai Don Bosco,Dhamotharan S,Rut Lineswala,Abhishek Chopra*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文探索了利用量子算法（QLSA和变分算法）在混合量子-经典框架下求解大规模CFD问题（以二维非稳态Burgers方程为测试案例）的可行性，证明其精度可与经典GMRES方法媲美，并估算了求解近20亿网格点系统所需的量子资源。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统CFD中高保真数值模拟依赖HPC扩展，但网格分辨率增大导致线性系统求解的计算复杂度急剧上升，HPC扩展能力存在局限性，亟需范式转变。

Method: 采用量子线性求解器算法（QLSA）和适用于HPC量子模拟的变分算法，在混合量子-经典框架下求解二维瞬态不可压缩粘性非线性耦合Burgers方程，并与经典GMRES方法进行精度对比。

Result: 量子方法在精度上与经典GMRES方法相当；展示了量子方法的准确性、可扩展性和一致性；估算了求解近20亿网格点系统所需的量子资源。

Conclusion: 量子方法能够以与经典方法相当的精度求解CFD相关的大规模线性系统，为突破传统HPC计算瓶颈提供了潜在的范式转变路径。

Abstract: The solution for non-linear, complex partial differential Equations (PDEs) is achieved through numerical approximations, which yield a linear system of equations. This approach is prevalent in Computational Fluid Dynamics (CFD), but it restricts the mesh size since the solution of the linear system becomes computationally intractable when the mesh resolution increases. The reliance on the ability of High-Performance Computers (HPC) to scale up and meet these requirements is myopic; such very high-fidelity simulations require a paradigm shift in computing. This paper presents an exploration of quantum methodologies aimed at achieving high accuracy in solving such a large system of equations.
  Leveraging recent works in Quantum Linear Solver Algorithms (QLSA) and variational algorithms suitable for Quantum Simulation in HPC, we aspire to push the boundaries of CFD-relevant problems that can be solved on hybrid quantum-classical framework. To this end, we consider the 2D, transient, incompressible, viscous, non-linear coupled Burgers equation as a test problem and investigate the accuracy of our approach by comparing results with a classical linear system of equation solvers, such as the Generalized Minimal RESidual method (GMRES). Through rigorous testing, our findings demonstrate that our quantum methods yield results comparable in accuracy to traditional approaches. Additionally, we demonstrate the accuracy, scalability, and consistency of our quantum method. Lastly, we present an insightful estimation of the resources our quantum algorithm needs to solve systems with nearly 2 billion mesh points.

</details>


### [494] [Surface detachment and bed entrainment of fluvial plastics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.03081)
*Matthias Kramer*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文基于第一性原理，推导了河流塑料的自由表面脱离临界速度公式，并建立了塑料Shields参数与天然泥沙的关联框架，填补了塑料分层输运物理机制的认知空白。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 河流塑料污染对水生环境和人类健康构成重大威胁，但现有研究缺乏对塑料颗粒层特异性输运物理机制（尤其是自由表面脱离和河床挟带）的基本理解，制约了数值模拟能力的提升和缓解策略的制定。

Method: 应用第一性原理，推导临界表面脱离速度的新关系式；开发将塑料Shields参数与天然沉积物Shields参数相关联的理论框架。

Result: 得到了塑料颗粒自由表面脱离的临界速度表达式，以及塑料与天然泥沙之间Shields参数的关联关系。

Conclusion: 这些理论进展有望推动塑料研究领域的新探索，并为拉格朗日粒子追踪软件中塑料输运模块的实现提供理论基础。

Abstract: Over the last decade, fluvial plastics have been identified as major threat to aquatic environments and human health. In order to develop adequate mitigation strategies for plastic pollution, a fundamental process understanding of riverine plastic transport is of significant importance. In this context, the implementation of research findings into numerical simulation environments is anticipated to enhance modelling capabilities and to support a rigorous decision making. Recent experimental research has focused on the incipient motion of plastic particles, as well as on the effects of surface tension on plastic concentration profiles. While these investigations have advanced the state-of-the-art knowledge, current literature still displays a lack of basic insights into layer-specific plastic transport physics. In this study, first principles are applied to advance knowledge on free-surface detachment and bed entrainment of fluvial plastics. A novel relationship for the critical surface detachment velocity is derived, followed by the development of a framework that allows to relate plastic Shields parameters to those of natural sediments. Overall, it is anticipated that these developments will trigger new research within the plastics community, and it is hoped that present findings will be implemented into Lagrangian particle tracking software.

</details>


### [495] [Motion of a floating sphere pulled by a string and induced flows](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.03811)
*Benjamin Apffel,Romain Fleury*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文实验和理论研究了软绳牵引浮球在旋转运动中的丰富动力学行为，发现低速时球轨迹随转速增加而收缩（反直觉），高速时出现吸引/排斥分岔，并测量了马格努斯力与惯性力之比。系统表现出强滞后效应，球可自陷于自身产生流场中心，并揭示了“茶叶悖论”中存在最大转速导致输送突然停止的现象。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管软绳浮球旋转系统看似简单，但其背后涉及反直觉的动力学行为（如低速时轨迹收缩违背离心力常识）以及丰富的非线性现象（吸引/排斥分岔、滞后、自陷），同时与经典的“茶叶悖论”相关联，值得深入研究以揭示流固耦合与升力机制。

Method: 实验测量浮球在不同旋转速度下的轨迹变化及流场分布，结合理论分析引入马格努斯力（Magnus force）来解释观测现象，并测量升力与惯性力之比。通过可变形系统研究滞后行为及球体自陷现象。

Result: 1) 低速时球轨迹随转速增加而收缩，反直觉；2) 高速时球被吸引向中心或排斥远离，取决于绳长；3) 马格努斯力是解释全部观测的关键；4) 测得升力与惯性力之比；5) 系统存在强滞后效应，球可自陷于自身流场中心；6) 发现茶叶悖论中存在最大转速，超过后茶叶输送突然停止。

Conclusion: 软绳浮球旋转系统展现出丰富的非线性动力学行为，马格努斯力在解释这些现象中起核心作用。该系统为测量升力系数提供了新途径，并为理解茶叶悖论等经典现象提供了可变形边界条件下的新见解。

Abstract: We study in this article the motion of a floating ball attached to a soft string set in circular motion through its other end. Although simple, the system exhibits rich dynamics that we investigate experimentally and theoretically. At low rotation speeds, we show that the circular trajectory of the ball shrinks when we stir faster, which challenges common intuition based on centrifugal force. For higher rotation rates, the ball is either suddenly attracted toward the center, or is repulsed away from it, depending on the string length. Experimental measurements of the generated flow show that a Magnus force must be taken into account to correctly explain all the observations. In particular, our deformable system allows to measure the ratio of the lift force over the inertial force. Interestingly, the system exhibits strong hysteretic behavior, showing that the ball can robustly trap itself at the center of the flow generated by its past motion. The present experiment also revisits the famous 'tea-leaf paradox', which refers to the unexpected migration of tea leaves toward the center of a tea cup when the latter is mixed with a rigid spoon. The ball attached to the string plays the role of a deformable spoon, and we show that there exists a maximum rotation speed above which the tea-leaves transport brutally stops.

</details>


### [496] [Data-driven turbulent heat flux modeling with inputs of multiple fidelity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.03395)
*Matilde Fiore,Enrico Saccaggi,Lilla Koloszar,Yann Bartosiewicz,Miguel Alfonso Mendez*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文研究数据驱动RANS建模中动量建模不一致性对热湍流封闭模型的影响，提出利用多保真度（DNS和RANS）数据训练的方法，使模型能根据输入数据的保真度水平自适应调整预测，从而提升鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 数据驱动RANS建模在泛化性和对变保真度数据不一致性的鲁棒性方面存在挑战，尤其是热湍流封闭模型依赖于不同保真度的动量统计量，现有方法难以有效处理这些不一致性。

Method: 采用多保真度数据集（DNS和RANS）训练热封闭模型；通过分析输入空间发现两保真度数据在输入空间中分离；利用这一分离特性使模型学习区分保真度水平并相应调整预测；结合敏感性分析和CFD仿真验证。

Result: 不同保真度数据在输入空间中形成分离区域；模型能利用这种分离检测输入数据的保真度水平；数据不一致性可以被利用来增强模型鲁棒性；CFD仿真验证了该方法在动量统计存在模型不确定性时的潜力。

Conclusion: 多保真度训练方法能有效应对动量建模不一致性问题，提高数据驱动热封闭模型的鲁棒性和泛化能力，尤其适用于传统动量模型存在不确定性的流动场景。

Abstract: Data-driven RANS modeling is emerging as a promising methodology to exploit the information provided by high-fidelity data. However, its widespread application is limited by challenges in generalization and robustness to inconsistencies between input data of varying fidelity levels. This is especially true for thermal turbulent closures, which inherently depend on momentum statistics provided by low or high fidelity turbulence momentum models. This work investigates the impact of momentum modeling inconsistencies on a data-driven thermal closure trained with a dataset with multiple fidelity (DNS and RANS). The analysis of the model inputs shows that the two fidelity levels correspond to separate regions in the input space. It is here shown that such separation can be exploited by a training with heterogeneous data, allowing the model to detect the level of fidelity in its inputs and adjust its prediction accordingly. In particular, a sensitivity analysis and verification shows that such a model can leverage the data inconsistencies to increase its robustness. Finally, the verification with a CFD simulation shows the potential of this multi-fidelity training approach for flows in which momentum statistics provided by traditional models are affected by model uncertainties.

</details>


### [497] [The impact of transience in the interaction between orographic gravity waves and mean flow](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.03139)
*Felix Jochum,Ray Chew,François Lott,Georg S. Voelker,Jan Weinkaemmerer,Ulrich Achatz*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文首次将允许完全瞬态波-流相互作用和水平传播的拉格朗日重力波参数化方案（MS-GWaM）应用于地形重力波。在伪不可压缩流求解器PincFlow中进行理想化模拟，对比波解析模拟与粗分辨率模拟，发现瞬态效应能更准确地再现地形波的加速过程，捕捉波破碎导致的风向反转，而稳态参数化因临界层假设无法实现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 经典的地形重力波参数化通常假设稳态，无法准确描述波的瞬态传播、波破碎及波-流相互作用的时变过程，导致对平均流强迫的刻画存在显著误差。因此需要发展能够处理全瞬态波-流相互作用和水平传播的参数化方案。

Method: 使用多尺度重力波模型（MS-GWaM），在伪不可压缩流求解器PincFlow中，对具有单色地形的二维流动进行全瞬态和稳态两种实现方式的理想化模拟，并与波解析模拟（不使用MS-GWaM）进行对比分析。

Result: 1. 瞬态实现能显著更准确地再现地形波对解析平均流的强迫；2. 瞬态模型能再现缓慢向上传播的线性地形波的瞬态强迫，而经典参数化中波能量瞬时分布；3. 高空波破碎导致的风向反转在瞬态模型中被捕获，但在稳态模拟中因临界层假设被抑制。

Conclusion: 瞬态效应在地形波与平均流的相互作用中具有重要影响，全瞬态MS-GWaM相比经典稳态参数化方法能更真实地模拟地形重力波的传播、破碎及其对平均流的动力强迫。

Abstract: A Lagrangian gravity-wave parameterization (MS-GWaM, Multi-Scale Gravity-Wave Model) that allows for fully transient wave-mean-flow interaction and horizontal propagation is applied to orographic gravity waves for the first time. Both linear and nonlinear mountain waves are modeled in idealized simulations within the pseudo-incompressible flow solver PincFlow. Two-dimensional flows over monochromatic orographies are considered, using MS-GWaM either in its fully transient implementation or in a steady-state implementation that represents classic mountain-wave parameterizations. Comparisons of wave-resolving simulations (not using MS-GWaM) and coarse-resolution simulations (using MS-GWaM) show that allowing for transience leads to a significantly more accurate forcing of the resolved mean flow. The model is able to reproduce the transient forcing of linearly generated mountain waves that slowly propagate upwards, in contrast to the instantaneous distribution of wave energy in classic parameterizations. At high altitudes, wave breaking induces a wind reversal that is captured by the transient model but inhibited in steady-state simulations, due to the assumption of critical level formation. This shows that transience can have a substantial impact in the interaction between mountain waves and mean flow.

</details>


### [498] [The interplay of shape and catalyst distribution in the yield of compressible flow microreactors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.03944)
*G. C. Antunes,M. Jiménez-Sánchez,P. Malgaretti,J. Bachmann,J. Harting*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文开发了一个用于结构化催化微反应器中可压缩流体传输的半解析模型，通过润滑和Fick-Jacobs近似将三维控制方程降维为一维有效方程，研究了反应器壁面波纹形状和非均匀催化涂层对产率的影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有催化微反应器模型多针对不可压缩流体或理想几何结构，缺乏同时考虑流体可压缩性、反应器壁面波纹形状和非均匀催化涂层分布三者耦合效应的理论框架。

Method: 采用润滑近似和Fick-Jacobs近似方法，将三维控制方程降维为一维有效方程；通过弱可压缩极限下的理论分析与实验验证相结合；在超越弱可压缩极限时研究非均匀催化和壁面波纹的协同效应。

Result: 在弱可压缩极限下（如液相反应器），催化剂分布不影响产率并得到实验验证；超越该极限时，引入非均匀催化涂层和壁面波纹可提高产率。

Conclusion: 流体可压缩性是非均匀催化设计影响反应器性能的关键阈值条件，通过合理设计几何波纹和催化涂层分布可以优化反应器产率。

Abstract: We develop a semi-analytical model for transport in structured catalytic microreactors, where both reactant and product are compressible fluids. Making use of the lubrication and Fick-Jacobs approximations, we reduce the three-dimensional governing equations to an effective one-dimensional set of equations. Our model captures the effect of compressibility, of corrugations in the shape of the reactor, as well as of an inhomogeneous catalytic coating of the reactor walls. We show that in the weakly compressible limit (e.g., liquid-phase reactors), the distribution of catalyst does not influence the reactor yield, which we verify experimentally. Beyond this limit, we show that introducing inhomogeneities in the catalytic coating and corrugations to the reactor walls can improve the yield.

</details>


### [499] [Active grid turbulence anomalies through the lens of physics informed neural networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.03919)
*Sofía Angriman,Sarah E. Smith,Patricio Clark di Leoni,Pablo J. Cobelli,Pablo D. Mininni,Martín Obligado*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 主动网格湍流实验中存在衰减和标度律异常，通过结合实验测量、机器学习和数值模拟发现，网格附近的统计异常会引入持久的相关性，从而影响下游湍流演化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 主动网格湍流实验中出现衰减和二阶/三阶标度律异常，但原因尚不明确。本文旨在探究这些异常背后的物理机制。

Method: 在风洞中联合使用激光多普勒测速仪和热线风速仪进行实验测量，结合机器学习技术分析数据，并进行数值模拟——在模拟中将实验观测到的近网格统计异常作为初始条件。

Result: 数值模拟能够复现实验中在衰减阶段观测到的异常现象。实验近网格区域的异常会在流场中引入相关性，这些相关性可以长时间持续存在。

Conclusion: 主动网格湍流实验中的异常源于网格附近引入的统计相关性，这些相关性在湍流演化中持续存在，导致下游衰减和标度律偏离经典预期。

Abstract: Active grids operated with random protocols are a standard way to generate large Reynolds number turbulence in wind and water tunnels. But anomalies in the decay and third-order scaling of active-grid turbulence have been reported. We combine Laser Doppler Velocimetry and hot-wire anemometry measurements in a wind tunnel, with machine learning techniques and numerical simulations, to gain further understanding on the reasons behind these anomalies. Numerical simulations that incorporate the statistical anomalies observed in the experimental velocity field near the active grid can reproduce the experimental anomalies observed later in the decay. The results indicate that anomalies in experiments near the active grid introduce correlations in the flow that can persist for long times.

</details>


### [500] [Flame Transfer Function Measurement of a Hydrogen-Blended Sequential Combustor](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.03357)
*Bayu Dharmaputra,Pushkin Nagpure,Matteo Impagnatiello,Nicolas Noiray*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本研究在大气压常压顺序燃烧器（CPSC）中实验测量了顺序火焰的火焰传递函数（FTF），分析了第一级和第二级燃料中掺氢对顺序FTF的影响，并使用双脉冲分布时间延迟（DTD）模型对FTF进行拟合，模型参数趋势与OH*化学发光结果一致。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 火焰传递函数（FTF）决定了燃烧室的热声稳定性，对预测实际燃烧室与压气机、涡轮连接后的稳定性具有重要意义。然而顺序火焰的FTF特性尚不明确，需通过实验测量并分析氢气掺混对其影响。

Method: 在大气压常压顺序燃烧器（CPSC）上进行实验，保持第一级和第二级火焰热功率恒定且比例固定为1:1；通过改变第一级和第二级燃料中的氢掺混比例，实验测量顺序火焰的FTF；采用双脉冲分布时间延迟（DTD）模型对FTF进行拟合。

Result: 双脉冲DTD模型能够有效拟合顺序火焰的FTF，模型参数的变化趋势与顺序火焰的OH*化学发光测量结果具有一致性。

Conclusion: 顺序火焰的FTF可通过双脉冲DTD模型描述，氢气掺混对FTF有显著影响，模型参数与火焰化学发光特征相关联，为预测实际燃烧室热声稳定性提供了依据。

Abstract: The flame transfer function (FTF) relates acoustic perturbations and the coherent heat release rate response. This frequency-dependent function governs the thermoacoustic stability of a combustor. The FTF measurement is therefore of great interest for predicting the stability of the a practical combustor connected to the engine's compressor and turbine. In this study, the flame transfer function of the sequential flame of an atmospheric constant pressure sequential combustor (CPSC) is experimentally measured. The thermal power of both the first- and second-stage flames is kept constant and their ratio is fixed at 1:1. The effects of hydrogen blending in the first and second stage fuel mixture on the sequential FTF are analyzed. The FTF of the sequential flame is fitted with a distributed time delay (DTD) model with two pulses. The trends of the model parameters obtained are consistent with the chemiluminescence OH* of the sequential flame.

</details>


### [501] [Time-resolved phase-lock pressure-sensitive paint measurement of trailing edge noise dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.04233)
*M. Imai,K. Konishi,K. Ogura,K. Nakakita,M. Kameda*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文采用压力敏感涂料（PSP）结合新型时间分辨锁相技术，在NACA0012翼型上成功测量了与尾缘噪声相关的微弱压力波动（679 Hz, 50 Pa），并通过激光脉冲暴露翼面探索了尾缘噪声抑制的可行性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尾缘噪声伴随的弱压力波动在高速相机中常被图像传感器噪声掩盖，现有的测量手段难以分辨；此外，探索利用激光脉冲暴露翼面来抑制尾缘噪声的可行性。

Method: 提出一种新型时间分辨锁相技术，以尾缘处的半导体压力传感器信号作为锁相触发源，进行1150次重复锁相测量，对PSP发射图像进行时间序列系综平均，从而从强噪声中提取微弱压力信号。

Result: 在19.2 kHz的记录速率下，成功分辨出主频679 Hz、振幅50 Pa的压力波动，测量精度约为15 Pa；并观察到尾缘噪声压力场的抑制与后续重新发展的完整动态过程。

Conclusion: 提出的锁相PSP方法能够有效解析尾缘噪声相关的弱压力波动，实验揭示了噪声抑制与重建的动态机制，为气动声学中的目标降噪策略提供了新途径。

Abstract: Pressure-sensitive paint (PSP) was applied to the surface of a NACA0012 airfoil to investigate pressure fluctuations associated with trailing edge (TE) noise under low-velocity flow conditions. The primary focus is to assess the feasibility of employing laser pulses exposed at the airfoil surface to mitigate TE noise. However, the weak pressure fluctuations accompanying TE noise pose a challenge, as they are overshadowed by image sensor noise in high-speed cameras capturing PSP emission changes. A novel time-resolved phase-locking technique was introduced to address this issue, utilizing the signal from a semiconductor pressure transducer at the trailing edge as a phase-lock trigger source. By repetitively conducting phase-locked measurements (1150 times), time series ensemble-averaged data based on PSP emission images were obtained, enabling the capture of these subtle pressure fluctuations. Quantitatively, fluctuations with a dominant frequency of 679 Hz and an amplitude of 50 Pa are resolved within an accuracy of about 15 Pa, achieved at a recording rate of 19.2 kHz. Both the suppression and subsequent redevelopment of the pressure field with the TE noise offer valuable insights into the dynamics of TE noise and open avenues for targeted noise reduction strategies in aerodynamic applications.

</details>


### [502] [Stochastic identities for random isotropic fields](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.04131)
*A. S. Il'yn,A. V. Kopyev,V. A. Sirota,K. P. Zybin*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文提出了随机各向同性二阶张量场的新非平凡随机恒等式，可作为湍流统计各向同性的标记，并考虑了轴对称情况，通过直接数值模拟验证了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为湍流统计各向同性提供数学上严格的标记（恒等式），从而区分各向同性与轴对称湍流。

Method: 推导随机各向同性二阶张量场的非平凡随机恒等式，并扩展至轴对称情形；通过直接数值模拟（DNS）验证恒等式的有效性。

Result: 成功推导出新的恒等式，并在不同湍流直接数值模拟中得到验证。

Conclusion: 所提出的恒等式可作为湍流统计各向同性的可靠标记，适用于任意性质的湍流。

Abstract: This letter presents new nontrivial stochastic identities for random isotropic second rank tensor fields. They can be considered as markers of statistical isotropy in turbulent flows of any nature. The case of axial symmetry is also considered. We confirm the validity of the identities using different direct numerical simulations of turbulent flows.

</details>


### [503] [Next-order balanced model captures submesoscale physics and statistics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.03422)
*Ryan Shìjié Dù,K. Shafer Smith,Oliver Bühler*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: QG⁺¹模型是一种基于位涡的罗斯贝数下一阶平衡模型，能够捕捉海洋亚中尺度物理的多个方面，包括长气旋尾流、快速增强的地转流锋面、锋面不对称性和有限时间爆破，且反演过程为线性泊松问题，计算简便，有望成为研究上层海洋亚中尺度动力学的实用工具。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有亚中尺度模型（如半地转方程）涉及坐标变换，计算复杂；而QG⁺¹模型提供了一种更简洁的替代方案，通过线性泊松反演重构流场，同时保持对亚中尺度过程（如锋面不对称性和有限时间爆破）的刻画能力。

Method: 在两种设置下进行非线性模拟：(1) 强迫耗散三维Eady型斜压不稳定背景下的湍流统计平衡；(2) 经典应变诱导锋生过程。比较QG⁺¹模型与半地转方程模拟结果。

Result: (1) 湍流呈现长气旋尾流和快速增强的地转流锋面，涡度和辐散值超过局地科里奥利频率；(2) 锋生模拟显示锋面不对称性和可证明的有限时间爆破，与半地转方程结果定量可比。

Conclusion: QG⁺¹模型尽管需要固定小尺度罗斯比数，但能再现上层海洋亚中尺度流的关键特征，且反演计算简单（线性泊松问题），是研究亚中尺度动力学的有前景工具。

Abstract: Using nonlinear simulations in two settings, we demonstrate that QG$^\mathrm{+1}$, a potential-vorticity based next-order-in-Rossby balanced model, captures several aspects of ocean submesoscale physics. In forced-dissipative 3D simulations under baroclinically unstable Eady-type background states, the statistical equilibrium turbulence exhibits long cyclonic tails and a plethora of rapidly-intensifying ageostrophic fronts. Despite that the model requires setting an explicit, small value for the fixed scaling Rossby number, the emergent flows are nevertheless characterized by vorticity and convergence values larger than the local Coriolis frequency, as observed in upper-ocean submesoscale flows. Simulations of QG$^\mathrm{+1}$ under the classic strain-induced frontogenesis set-up show realistic frontal asymmetry and a provable finite time blow-up, quantitatively comparable to simulations of the semigeostrophic equations. The inversions in the QG$^\mathrm{+1}$ model are straightforward linear Poisson problems, allowing for the reconstruction of all flow fields from the PV and surface buoyancy, while avoiding the semigeostrophic coordinate transformation. Taken together, these results suggest QG$^\mathrm{+1}$ might be a useful tool for studying upper-ocean submesoscale dynamics.

</details>


### [504] [A nonlinear room mode determines the operating conditions of a large-cavity synthetic jet actuator at low frequencies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.04574)
*L. F. Olivera-Reyes,E. S. Palacios de Paz,S. Sánchez,J. F. Hernández-Sánchez*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文发现合成射流（SJ）致动器中存在由大空腔引起的第三种共振模式（低频），该模式与已知的膜片/压电共振和亥姆霍兹共振共同影响致动器性能。通过障碍物可调控该模式，其在高声强下主导动力学行为，且射流速度与声压曲线在低频段高度吻合。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: SJ致动器通常被简化为耦合阻尼谐振子（DHO），已有研究证实存在膜片/压电共振和亥姆霍兹共振两种模式。本文旨在探索并证实第三种共振模式（大空腔动力学）的存在及其对SJ性能的影响，为优化频率响应提供新设计依据。

Method: 采用标准频率分析比较大空腔共振与房间声学模式（室内声模态）的强度分布；通过放置障碍物调控该共振模式；测量射流与涡旋速度并与声压曲线对比；利用雷诺数与斯托克斯数的固定关系表征高频段的衰减效应。

Result: 发现大空腔共振模式频率极低且能量集中；障碍物可在低声强下削弱并聚焦该模态；高声强下该模式超越亥姆霍兹共振主导动力学；低频段射流速度与声压曲线一致，高频段因冲程长度减小而效应减弱。

Conclusion: 大空腔动力学是SJ致动器设计中的额外关键因素，将其集成可扩展SJ的最佳频率响应范围。

Abstract: Synthetic Jet (SJ) actuators are an intrinsically complex combination of electronics, electric and mechanical systems. When studied theoretically, these elements are often simplified to coupled damped harmonic oscillators (DHO) that induce a pressure field within the cavity and drive momentum exchange. Thus, the performance of an SJ actuator results from coupling these DHOs, naturally leading to a few resonant modes. There is good evidence in the specialized literature of two resonant modes developing in SJ actuators: the membrane/piezoelectric mode and the Helmholtz resonance. In this work, we report on the effect of a third resonant mode that develops at very low frequencies due to a cavity much larger than the volume displaced by the actuator. We present evidence that the large-cavity dynamics determine the SJ performance in combination with the well-described formation criteria. We compare the intensity of this resonant mode with the first room modes using standard frequency analysis. Unlike typical room modes, the distribution of this resonant mode is very biased to lower frequencies. We also show that the resonant mode may be dimmed and focused by adding an obstacle in different cavity positions for the lower sound intensities. This mode overcomes the Helmholtz resonance, dominating the dynamics for higher sound intensities. We show that jet and vortex velocities mimic the sound pressure curve for the low-frequency range. Its effect mitigates for the higher range due to a delve through smaller stroke lengths, characterized as a fixed relation between the Reynolds and the Stokes numbers. We consider that the large-cavity dynamics is an additional element that, if integrated as design criteria, could extend the optimum frequency response of SJs.

</details>


### [505] [An efficient hp-Variational PINNs framework for incompressible Navier-Stokes equations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.04143)
*Thivin Anandh,Divij Ghose,Ankit Tyagi,Abhineet Gupta,Suranjan Sarkar,Sashikumaar Ganesan*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文扩展FastVPINNs框架以处理向量值问题，专注于求解二维不可压缩Navier-Stokes方程的正向和逆向问题，在保持精度的同时实现2倍训练加速，并能处理复杂几何形状。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: hp-VPINNs虽在传统PINNs基础上有所改进，但存在训练时间长、缺乏处理复杂几何形状框架的问题，尚未应用于Navier-Stokes方程等CFD问题。FastVPINNs虽通过张量损失计算和双线性变换解决了上述部分挑战，但尚未扩展到向量值问题。

Method: 将FastVPINNs框架扩展到向量值问题，采用张量基的损失计算提高训练效率，利用双线性变换处理复杂几何形状，针对不可压缩Navier-Stokes方程求解二维正向和逆向问题。

Result: 在lid-driven cavity流、Kovasznay流和backward-facing step流（Re≤200）上，训练时间比文献中PINNs算法提升2倍，精度保持相同水平；成功通过逆向问题准确识别流动的雷诺数。

Conclusion: FastVPINNs向量值扩展有效解决了hp-VPINNs的训练效率和复杂几何处理问题，为hp-VPINNs在更复杂CFD问题中的应用开辟了新途径。

Abstract: Physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) are able to solve partial differential equations (PDEs) by incorporating the residuals of the PDEs into their loss functions. Variational Physics-Informed Neural Networks (VPINNs) and hp-VPINNs use the variational form of the PDE residuals in their loss function. Although hp-VPINNs have shown promise over traditional PINNs, they suffer from higher training times and lack a framework capable of handling complex geometries, which limits their application to more complex PDEs. As such, hp-VPINNs have not been applied in solving the Navier-Stokes equations, amongst other problems in CFD, thus far. FastVPINNs was introduced to address these challenges by incorporating tensor-based loss computations, significantly improving the training efficiency. Moreover, by using the bilinear transformation, the FastVPINNs framework was able to solve PDEs on complex geometries. In the present work, we extend the FastVPINNs framework to vector-valued problems, with a particular focus on solving the incompressible Navier-Stokes equations for two-dimensional forward and inverse problems, including problems such as the lid-driven cavity flow, the Kovasznay flow, and flow past a backward-facing step for Reynolds numbers up to 200. Our results demonstrate a 2x improvement in training time while maintaining the same order of accuracy compared to PINNs algorithms documented in the literature. We further showcase the framework's efficiency in solving inverse problems for the incompressible Navier-Stokes equations by accurately identifying the Reynolds number of the underlying flow. Additionally, the framework's ability to handle complex geometries highlights its potential for broader applications in computational fluid dynamics. This implementation opens new avenues for research on hp-VPINNs, potentially extending their applicability to more complex problems.

</details>


### [506] [Bubble collapse near a wall. Part 1: An experimental study on the impact of shock waves and microjet on the wall pressure](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.03479)
*Roshan Kumar Subramanian,Zhidian Yang,Francesco Romanò,Olivier Coutier-Delgosha*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 研究刚性壁附近空化气泡坍塌的压力效应，通过激光生成气泡实验，结合高速成像和压力测量，分析不同距离参数γ下微射流和冲击波对壁面压力的影响及侵蚀机制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 空化气泡在刚性壁附近坍塌产生的冲击波和微射流是导致材料侵蚀的关键因素，但不同距离参数下各种压力机制的相对贡献尚不明确，需要系统量化研究。

Method: 在水池中用激光生成空化气泡，利用高速摄像和纹影成像可视化微射流和冲击波，结合壁面传感器和针式水听器同步测量压力，分析不同无量纲距离γ下的压力演化规律。

Result: 揭示了不同γ值下尖端坍塌或环状坍塌等冲击波机制，追踪了微射流演化过程，获取了冲击波速度和作用时间等定量数据，明确了不同γ下各压力成分对总压力的主导贡献关系。

Conclusion: 壁面附近空化气泡坍塌产生的压力由冲击波和微射流共同主导，其相对重要性随γ变化，为理解空化侵蚀机理提供了定量依据。

Abstract: This study examines the pressure exerted by a cavitation bubble collapsing near a rigid wall. A laser-generated bubble in a water basin undergoes growth, collapse, second growth, and final collapse. Shock waves and liquid jets from non-spherical collapses are influenced by the stand-off ratio $γ$, defined as the bubble centroid distance from the wall divided by the bubble radius. We detail shock mechanisms, such as tip or torus collapse, for various $γ$ values. High-speed and Schlieren imaging visualize the microjet and shock waves. The microjet's evolution is tracked for large $γ$, while shock waves are captured in composite images showing multiple shock positions. Quantitative analyses of the microjet interface, shock wave velocities, and impact times are reported. Wall-mounted sensors and a needle hydrophone measure pressure and compare with high-speed observations to assess the dominant contributions to pressure changes with $γ$, revealing implications for cavitation erosion mechanisms.

</details>


### [507] [Direction Symmetry of Wave Field Modulation by Tidal Current](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.04723)
*Ina Teutsch,Saulo Mendes,Jerome Kasparian*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 基于多年数据集的研究表明，在宽谱高方向扩散的海况下，海况变量随潮汐流调制的渐近行为高度非平凡，且不遵循传统理论预测，尤其是在潮汐流与群速度比值较高时。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统理论认为流对海浪的调制存在非对称性——逆流增加有效波高，顺流减小有效波高。现有短时观测部分支持这一预测，但缺乏长时间尺度、宽谱海况下的验证，因此需要检验理论在复杂海况下的适用性。

Method: 基于多年（多年度）数据集，分析宽频带、高方向扩散海况下，潮汐流与群速度比值变化时有效波高等关键海况变量的实际响应，并与传统理论预测进行对比。

Result: 在宽谱高方向扩散的海况中，当潮汐流与群速度比值较高时，海况变量的渐近行为显著偏离传统理论预测，表现出高度非平凡的行为。

Conclusion: 传统基于单向规则波和窄谱假设的理论模型在宽带高方向扩散的真实海况中存在局限性，需要发展更复杂的模型来描述流-浪相互作用。

Abstract: Theoretical studies on the modulation of unidimensional regular waves over a flat bottom due to a current typically assign an asymmetry between the effects of opposing/following streams on the evolution of major sea variables, such as significant wave height. The significant wave height is expected to monotonically increase with opposing streams and to decrease with following streams. To some extent, observations on data sets containing a few thousand of waves or over a continuous series of about a day confirm this prediction. Here, based on a multi-year dataset, we show that in very broad-banded seas with high directional spread, the asymptotic behavior of sea variables is highly non-trivial and does not follow the theoretical predictions, especially at high values of the ratio between tidal stream and group speed.

</details>


### [508] [Numerical Study of Flow Past a Wall-Mounted Dolphin Dorsal Fin at Low Reynolds Numbers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.04147)
*Zhonglu Lin,An-Kang Gao,Yu Zhang*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文通过对真实海豚背鳍进行三维数值模拟，研究了不同攻角和雷诺数下的水动力学特性，发现阻力与升力随攻角显著增加，且大攻角下出现复杂涡旋结构，为水下机器人、换热器和潜艇设计提供参考。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 海豚游泳的水动力学研究虽广受关注，但背鳍的流体动力学机制尚未充分探索。

Method: 采用NEK5000（谱元法）配合二阶Hex20网格，对真实海豚扫描获取的壁挂式背鳍进行三维流场模拟，共13个工况（攻角0°–60°，雷诺数691–2000）。

Result: 阻力与升力随攻角显著增大；0°攻角几乎无涡旋，30°及以上攻角出现半马蹄涡、发夹涡、拱形涡和尾涡等复杂涡结构。

Conclusion: 该研究揭示了海豚背鳍的涡动力学机理，可为下一代水下机器人、换热器及潜艇指挥台围壳的设计提供仿生学启示。

Abstract: Dolphin swimming has been a captivating area of study, yet the hydrodynamics of the dorsal fin remain underexplored. In this study, we present three-dimensional simulations of flow around a wall-mounted dolphin dorsal fin, derived from a real dolphin scan. The NEK5000 (spectral element method) is employed with a second-order hex20 mesh to ensure high accuracy and computational efficiency in the simulations. A total of 13 cases were simulated, covering angles of attack (AoA) ranging from $0^\circ$ to $60^\circ$ and Reynolds numbers ($\text{Re}$) between 691 and 2000. Our results show that both drag and lift increase significantly with the AoA. Almost no vortex is observed at $\text{AoA} = 0^\circ$, whereas complex vortex structures emerge for $\text{AoA} \geq 30^\circ$, including half-horseshoe, hairpin, arch, and wake vortices. This study offers insights that could inform the design of next-generation underwater robots, heat exchangers, and submarine sails.

</details>


### [509] [Proper orthogonal decomposition analysis of square lid driven cavity flows containing particle suspensions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.04047)
*John Shelton,Nitin Katiki,Morakinyo Adesemowo*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本研究通过CFD模拟了方形顶盖驱动空腔中悬浮颗粒对流场稳定性和动态特性的影响，利用本征正交分解（POD）分析速度差流场，在颗粒面积分数10%-50%和雷诺数100-1000条件下识别了主导流动结构及其演化规律，探讨了关键流动 regime 和颗粒悬浮面积分数对系统稳定性的影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理解连续扰动对方形顶盖驱动空腔流场稳定性和动态特性的影响机制，特别是悬浮颗粒引起的流场变化及其对系统稳定性的作用。

Method: 采用计算流体动力学（CFD）模拟二维方形顶盖驱动空腔中悬浮颗粒的流场，对不同颗粒面积分数（10%-50%）和雷诺数（100, 400, 700, 1000）进行仿真；利用本征正交分解（POD）分析速度差流场，提取特征向量和特征值以识别主导流动结构及其主导性。

Result: 获得了不同颗粒悬浮面积分数和雷诺数下速度差流场的POD特征向量和特征值，揭示了主导流动结构随时间演化的规律，确定了关键流动 regime 和颗粒悬浮面积分数范围。

Conclusion: 颗粒悬浮引起的二维扰动速度变化显著影响流场稳定性，POD分析能有效识别主导流动结构，颗粒面积分数和雷诺数是决定该颗粒-流体系统稳定性的关键参数。

Abstract: Continual perturbations to the flow field in the square lid driven cavity can significantly impact both its stability and the dynamic characteristics of the system. In this study, the effect of these perturbations are analyzed via computational fluid dynamics simulations of a square, two-dimensional, lid driven cavity containing varying area fractions of suspended particles. The evolution over time of these particle-particle and particle-fluid interactions generate two-dimensional disturbance velocity changes in the flow field. In order to better understand the characteristics and effects of these changes, proper orthogonal decomposition analysis is performed on the velocity difference flow field to determine the dominant flow structures over the simulation time domain. The resulting eigenvectors and eigenvalues represent the varying dominant flow structures and their respective dominance over the simulation time, respectively. This is carried out at particle suspension area fractions from 10\% - 50\% and for Reynolds numbers of 100, 400, 700, and 1000. Critical flow regimes and particle suspension area fractions are discussed in order to characterize the stability of this particle-in-fluid system.

</details>


### [510] [Minimal droplet shape representation in experimental microfluidics using Fourier series and autoencoders](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.04863)
*Mihir Durve,Jean-Michel Tucny,Sibilla Orsini,Adriano Tiribocchi,Andrea Montessori,Marco Lauricella,Andrea Camposeo,Dario Pisignano,Sauro Succi*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文提出一个两步可逆过程：先将液滴形状表示为傅里叶级数，再通过自编码器将傅里叶系数降至2维空间（相比传统自编码器的8维减少了6维），用于液滴形状的低维表示与分析。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自编码器方法只能将液滴形状降至最低8维空间，维度仍然较高，限制了在强化学习、形状演化分析、破碎预测等下游任务中的应用。作者希望通过引入领域知识（液滴形状的傅里叶表示）进一步降低表征维度。

Method: 采用两步可逆降维流程：(1) 将液滴轮廓表示为傅里叶级数，获得傅里叶系数；(2) 将傅里叶系数输入自编码器模型，进一步压缩为低维向量。整个过程完全可逆，支持从低维向量重建原始液滴形状。

Result: 该方法将液滴形状的表征维度从传统自编码器方法的8维降低至2维，实现了6维的降维提升，同时保持了形状信息的可逆重建能力。

Conclusion: 融入领域知识（傅里叶表示）能够显著提升自编码器的降维效率，为液滴自动化生成（如强化学习）、形状演化动力学分析及破碎预测等应用开辟了新可能，并展示了在更广泛的科学领域中结合领域知识与自编码器模型的价值。

Abstract: We introduce a two-step, fully reversible process designed to project the outer shape of a generic droplet onto a lower-dimensional space. The initial step involves representing the droplet's shape as a Fourier series. Subsequently, the Fourier coefficients are reduced to lower-dimensional vectors by using autoencoder models. The exploitation of the domain knowledge of the droplet shapes allows us to map generic droplet shapes to just 2D space in contrast to previous direct methods involving autoencoders that could map it on minimum 8D space. This 6D reduction in the dimensionality of the droplet's description opens new possibilities for applications, such as automated droplet generation via reinforcement learning, the analysis of droplet shape evolution dynamics and the prediction of droplet breakup. Our findings underscore the benefits of incorporating domain knowledge into autoencoder models, highlighting the potential for increased accuracy in various other scientific disciplines.

</details>


### [511] [Dissipative Collisions of Impinging Liquid Jets Having Uniform Velocity Profiles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.04856)
*Robert Demyanovich*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本研究通过对比撞击射流与撞击液片的能量耗散，修正了均匀速度剖面下撞击射流的质量与动量平衡方程，引入非弹性碰撞的恢复系数(COR<1)，并基于文献数据建立了COR与撞击角度及驻点位置的经验关联式，同时推导了耗散碰撞对液片厚度分布影响的理论方程。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 以往分析研究多假设撞击射流碰撞无能量损失(COR=1)，且认为射流速度等于液片速度，这与实际物理过程存在偏差。本研究旨在修正这一假设，将非弹性碰撞的能量耗散纳入理论框架。

Method: 通过质量与动量平衡分析，引入恢复系数(COR)描述非弹性碰撞的能量损失；利用文献中射流与液片速度数据及驻点位置数据计算COR；建立COR与撞击角度的经验关联式，以及驻点位置与COR的关系式；推导耗散碰撞下液片厚度分布的理论方程。

Result: 建立了修正后的质量动量平衡方程；得到了COR关于撞击角度的经验关联式；建立了驻点位置与COR之间的关系；推导了考虑耗散碰撞的液片厚度分布理论公式。

Conclusion: 撞击射流碰撞中存在可测量的能量耗散，需通过COR<1进行描述；所建立的经验关联式和理论方程可更准确地预测撞击射流碰撞后的液片速度、驻点位置及厚度分布。

Abstract: The dissipation of energy in the impingement zone from the collision of impinging, free, equal jets of liquids was investigated by comparison with studies on the energy dissipation from the collision of impinging, free, equal sheets of liquids. Loss of energy was studied in terms of the coefficient of restitution (COR) of the collision. With few exceptions, previous analytical studies have assumed that there is no loss of energy resulting from the collision of the jets (COR = 1), and for jets with uniform velocity profiles, the sheet velocity (velocity after the collision) is equal to the jet velocity (velocity before the collision). In this study, mass and momentum balances of impinging jets with uniform velocity profiles are revised to include the impact of non-equal velocities (COR < 1). After development of the applicable theory, the COR for impinging jets is calculated from available data in the literature on jet and sheet velocities as well as the location of the stagnation point in the impingement zone. Simple empirical correlations were developed for 1) the COR of impinging jets as a function of impingement angle and 2) the relationship of the location of the stagnation point to the COR. A theoretical equation was also derived for the impact of dissipative collisions on the thickness distribution in the liquid sheet.

</details>


### [512] [Swimming Cylinder Wake Control with Plasma Actuator](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.04876)
*Javad Omidi*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本研究采用先进静电模型，数值模拟了微等离子体致动器对二维圆柱绕流的影响。在Re=20,000的湍流条件下，致动器对称安装在45°和90°位置。结果显示：90°位置致动器性能更优，可使下游流动质量提升8%-15%，升力系数波动改善40%-55%，阻力系数改善75%-90%。当应用于串联圆柱时，下游流动质量提升20%-26%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究微等离子体致动器在圆柱绕流控制中的有效性，特别是致动器安装角度对控制效果的影响机制，以及该技术在串联圆柱结构中的适用性。

Method: 采用先进静电模型求解两个椭圆方程确定电势和等离子体分布，生成体积力作为动量方程源项；设置Re=20,000的湍流非定常流动；在圆柱表面45°和90°位置对称安装等离子体致动器；对串联圆柱结构，在90°位置施加10、13、16 kV电压进行对比研究。

Result: 下游流动质量提升8%-15%；升力系数波动改善40%-55%；阻力系数改善75%-90%；90°位置致动器性能优于45°；串联圆柱结构中下游流动质量提升20%-26%。

Conclusion: 微等离子体致动器能有效控制圆柱绕流，90°安装位置因更接近边界层分离起始点而性能更优；该技术在串联圆柱结构中同样表现出良好的流动控制能力。

Abstract: In this research, the effect of utilizing a micro plasma actuator on controlling the flow through a two-dimensional cylinder is investigated using an advanced electrostatic model. Within this model, by solving two elliptic equations, the potential distribution and plasma distribution in the solution domain are determined, leading to the generation of a volumetric force. This force is added to the momentum equations as a source term. The Reynolds number of the flow is set at 20,000, and the plasma actuator operates in a steady manner. Due to the high Reynolds number, the flow is turbulent, and its time-dependent nature is modeled as unsteady. Plasma actuators are symmetrically mounted at 45 and 90 degrees with respect to the free stream, both above and below the cylinder surfaces. The influence of the actuator placement angle on the flow quality downstream of the cylinder is examined. The results indicate an enhancement of flow quality by 8% to 15% downstream of the cylinder. Moreover, improvements of 40% to 55% in the variation of the lift coefficient and 75% to 90% in the drag coefficient are reported. The findings reveal superior performance of the actuator positioned at 90 degrees compared to the 45-degree orientation. This can be attributed to the proximity of the 90-degree actuator position to the point of boundary layer separation initiation. Furthermore, using the actuator positioned at 90 degrees and applying three different voltages of 10, 13, and 16 kV, the impact of flow control on the first cylinder in a tandem arrangement on the downstream flow of the second cylinder is examined. The results demonstrate an enhancement in downstream flow quality of 20% to 26%.

</details>


### [513] [Annular Newtonian Poiseuille flow with pressure-dependent wall slip](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.04890)
*Kostas D. Housiadas,Evgenios Gryparis,Georgios C. Georgiou*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文研究了压力依赖壁面滑移对牛顿流体环形泊肃叶流动的影响，采用指数型压力依赖滑移定律，通过正则摄动方法得到二阶解析解，并推导了恒定流量下的平均压降公式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 揭示压力依赖壁面滑移对环形泊肃叶流动特性的影响规律，特别是在不同滑移强度、雷诺数和环形间隙条件下的流动行为。

Method: 采用Navier滑移定律（滑移参数随压力指数变化），通过正则摄动展开得到二阶解析解，并应用收敛加速技术提高扰动级数精度。

Result: 压力依赖壁面滑移在弱滑移条件下效应显著；随滑移系数增大效应减弱直至完全滑移时消失；平均压降在雷诺数足够大前保持恒定；环形间隙减小会放大所有压力依赖滑移现象。

Conclusion: 压力依赖壁面滑移对环形流动的影响受滑移强度、雷诺数和环形间隙尺寸共同调控，间隙越小效应越显著。

Abstract: We investigate the effect of pressure-dependent wall slip on the steady Newtonian annular Poiseuille flow employing Navier's slip law with a slip parameter that varies exponentially with pressure. The dimensionless governing equations and accompanying auxiliary conditions are solved analytically up to second order by implementing a regular perturbation scheme in terms of the small dimensionless pressure-dependence slip parameter. An explicit formula for the average pressure drop, required to maintain a constant volumetric flowrate, is also derived. This is suitably post-processed by applying a convergence acceleration technique to increase the accuracy of the original perturbation series. The effects of pressure-dependent wall slip are more pronounced when wall slip is weak. However, as the slip coefficient increases, these effects are moderated and eventually eliminated as the perfect slip case is approached. The results show that the average pressure drop remains practically constant until the Reynolds number becomes sufficiently large. It is worth noting that all phenomena associated with pressure-dependent wall slip are amplified as the annular gap is reduced.

</details>


### [514] [Contact angle hysteresis and static friction for two-dimensional droplets](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.04240)
*Jong-In Yang,Jooyoo Hong*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文从静摩擦角度研究液滴在固体表面的接触角滞后现象，定义了二维液滴的静摩擦系数并将其与前进/后退接触角关联，统一分析了倾斜平面上液滴和倒置天花板悬挂液滴的构型，揭示了悬挂液滴存在双稳态分岔现象，并研究了液滴脱落体积与邦德数的关系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将固体-固体界面摩擦的概念类比到液滴-固体界面的接触角滞后现象，建立统一的静摩擦系数框架来理解液滴在倾斜表面及倒置表面的行为，特别是揭示悬挂液滴的独特物理现象（如双稳态和脱落）并量化其条件。

Method: 定义二维液滴的静摩擦系数，将其与前进接触角和后退接触角相关联；以倾角为自由参数，在统一框架内分析倾斜平面上的液滴和倒置天花板上的悬挂液滴；通过绝热改变倾角观察液滴构型变化；分析悬挂液滴的参数范围及脱落体积与邦德数的关系。

Result: 发现悬挂液滴在同一物理条件下存在两种不同的稳定构型（分岔现象）；确定了悬挂液滴发生脱落（pinch-off）的参数范围；发现了脱落体积与邦德数之间有趣的关系。

Conclusion: 液滴的接触角滞后可类比为静摩擦现象，统一框架可描述液滴从倾斜平面到倒置天花板的全构型变化；悬挂液滴的双稳态分岔及脱落行为具有明确的物理规律，表明该框架能够捕捉液滴摩擦/粘附行为的关键特征。

Abstract: Contact angle hysteresis of droplets will be examined in light of static friction between liquid drop and solid surface. Unlike frictions in solid-solid interfaces, pinning forces at contact points or contact lines would be the cause of friction. We will define coefficients of static friction and relate them with advancing and receding contact angles for the case of two-dimensional droplets. In our work sessile drops in an inclined plane, and pendent drops in a slanted ceiling will all be analyzed within a single framework with the inclination angle as a free parameter. We can then visualize the gradual change of shapes of a droplet put on a plane as the inclination angle changes adiabatically to make a complete turn. We point out that there could be two distinct stable configurations of pendent droplets for the same physical conditions, hence dubbed the bifurcation. And in the case of pendent droplets we investigate at what ranges of parameters pinch-offs occur, and find an interesting relation between the fallen-out volume and the Bond number.

</details>


### [515] [Effect of sweep angle on three-dimensional vortex dynamics over plunging wings](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.04972)
*Alex Cavanagh,Chandan Bose,Kiran Ramesh*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文通过高保真IDDES数值模拟，研究了后掠角（0°、30°、60°）和折合频率（0.05、0.4）对扑动后掠翼前缘涡（LEV）结构及气动特性的影响，发现高折合频率下升力系数出现明显尖峰，LEV破裂机制从涡破裂转变为LEV腿诱导的不稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管仿生微型飞行器（MAVs）设计对扑动翼前缘涡动力学有迫切需求，但后掠角和折合频率在Re~O(10^4)范围内对LEV结构的影响尚未被完全理解。

Method: 采用高保真改进延迟脱体涡模拟（IDDES）对三种后掠角（Λ=0°,30°,60°）的扑动翼进行数值模拟，结合两种折合频率（k=0.05,0.4）的俯冲斜坡运动；引入前缘吸力参数（LESP）判定LEV起始，采用力分配方法（FPM）分析展向升力分布。

Result: 高折合频率下脉冲式俯冲加速导致升力系数出现明显尖峰，LEV更快从前缘脱离并加速对流；LEV破裂机制随折合频率升高从涡破裂转变为LEV腿诱导的不稳定性；后掠角对LEV动力学有显著影响。

Conclusion: 研究揭示了Re=20,000下后掠翼周围复杂涡结构及其对升力贡献的规律，阐明了后掠角和折合频率对LEV动力学的影响机制，为仿生MAVs设计提供了重要理论依据。

Abstract: The effects of sweep angle and reduced frequency on the leading-edge vortex (LEV) structure over flapping swept wings in the Reynolds number ($Re$) range of $\mathbf{O}(10^4)$ are yet to be completely understood. With increasing interest in designing bio-inspired micro-air-vehicles (MAVs), understanding LEV dynamics in such scenarios is imperative. This study investigates the effects of three different sweep angles ($Λ= 0^\circ$, $30^\circ$ and $60^\circ$) on LEV dynamics through high-fidelity improved delayed detached eddy simulation (IDDES) to analyze the underlying flow physics. Plunge ramp kinematics at two different reduced frequencies ($k = 0.05$ and $0.4$) are studied to investigate the unsteady motion effects on LEV characteristics. The leading-edge suction parameter (LESP) concept is applied to determine LEV initiation, and the results are verified against flow field visualization for swept-wing geometries. The force partitioning method (FPM) is used to investigate the spanwise lift distribution resulting from the LEV. Distinct peaks in the lift coefficient occur for the high reduced frequency case due to the impulse-like plunging acceleration. This causes the LEV to detach from the leading edge more quickly and convect faster, significantly affecting the lift generated by the wing. As reduced frequency increases, the LEV breakdown mechanism switches from vortex bursting to LEV leg-induced instabilities. These results provide insights into the complex vortex structures surrounding swept wings at $Re = 20,000$, and the impact both sweep angle and reduced frequency have on the lift contribution of these flow features.

</details>


### [516] [Localized performance of riblets with curved cross-sectional profiles in boundary layers past finite length bodies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.04895)
*Shuangjiu Fu,Shabnam Raayai-Ardakani*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文研究了肋条（riblets）在有限尺寸翼型（流线型前缘+平板）上的减阻效果，发现其不仅能减少摩擦阻力，还能降低压差阻力，累计减阻可达6%。研究通过高分辨率粒子图像测速技术，揭示了局部剪切应力分布、速度廓线和压力分布之间的相互作用关系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究多关注肋条在大尺度飞行器上的减阻效果（摩擦阻力）及其周期性/渐近边界层假设，但对于中小型水/空航行器，其边界层不再满足周期性和渐近性假设，且体型会产生中等程度的压差阻力，肋条对压差阻力的影响尚不明确。

Method: 采用高分辨率二维两分量粒子图像测速（PIV），结合双照明和连续重叠成像技术，同时测量边界层和远场速度场，进而获取局部速度廓线、剪切应力分布以及摩擦阻力和压差阻力分量。

Result: 肋条能够在减少摩擦阻力的同时，也降低压差阻力分量，累计减阻率可达6%。展示了展向平均剪切应力分布、速度廓线特性和物体表面压力分布之间的相互影响关系。

Conclusion: 肋条的局部参数分布存在相互协同或拮抗的复杂关系，共同决定了整体减阻能力。肋条对有限尺寸非周期性边界层物体同样具有减阻潜力，且能同时影响摩擦和压差两种阻力成分。

Abstract: Riblets are a well-known passive drag reduction technique with the potential for as much as 9% reduction in the frictional drag force in laboratory settings, and proven benefits for large scale aircraft. However, less information is available on the applicability of these textures for smaller air/waterborne vehicles where assumptions such as periodicity and/or asymptotic nature of the boundary layer no longer apply and the shape of the bodies of these vehicles can give rise to moderate levels of pressure drag. Here, we explore the effect of riblets on both sides of a finite-size foil consisting of a streamlined leading edge and a flat body. We use high resolution two-dimensional, two-component particle image velocimetry, with a double illumination and consecutive-overlapping imaging technique to capture the velocity field in both the boundary layer and the far field. We find the local velocity profiles and shear stress distribution, as well as the frictional and pressure components of the drag force and show the possibility of achieving reduction in both the fictional and pressure components of the drag force and record cumulative drag reduction as much as 6%. We present the intertwined relationship between the distribution of the spanwise-averaged shear stress distribution, the characteristics of the velocity profiles, and the pressure distribution around the body, and how the local distribution of these parameters work together or against each other in enhancing or diminishing the drag-reducing ability of the riblets for the entirety of the body of interest.

</details>


### [517] [Laminar-Turbulent Patterns in Shear Flows : Evasion of Tipping, Saddle-Loop Bifurcation and Log scaling of the Turbulent Fraction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.04993)
*Pavan V. Kashyap,Juan F. Marìn,Yohann Duguet,Olivier Dauchot*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文分析了一维双标量场反应-平流-扩散模型，研究全局亚临界湍流转捩。该模型中，均匀湍流态与层流态断开连接，并通过倾覆灾难场景消失。模型表现出均匀湍流态的线性不稳定性，模拟了壁剪切流过渡区观察到的层流-湍流斑图的起始。通过数值延续大雷诺数解，构建了与不稳定性产生的非线性解的多稳定性相关的Busse气球。在气球核心，湍流涨落（编码为乘性噪声）选择斑图波长。在气球的低雷诺数侧，斑图经历一串失稳，波长趋向越来越大直至无穷。在此极限下，与空间斑图相关的周期极限环撞击层流不动点，导致鞍环全局分岔，并出现孤立脉冲解。该鞍环场景预测波长的对数发散，捕捉了两个代表性剪切流中的实验和数值数据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理解亚临界转捩中层流-湍流斑图的形成机制及其全局分岔行为。

Method: 采用一维双标量场反应-平流-扩散模型，结合数值延续、Busse气球构建及乘性噪声分析。

Result: 构建了Busse气球，揭示了噪声选择的斑图波长、波长失稳级联、鞍环全局分岔及孤立脉冲解的出现，并预测了波长的对数发散。

Conclusion: 模型预测的对数发散波长与代表性剪切流的实验和数值数据吻合，为理解亚临界湍流转捩提供了统一框架。

Abstract: We analyze a one-dimensional two-scalar fields reaction advection diffusion model for the globally subcritical transition to turbulence. In this model, the homogeneous turbulent state is disconnected from the laminar one and disappears in a tipping catastrophe scenario. The model however exhibits a linear instability of the turbulent homogeneous state, mimicking the onset of the laminar-turbulent patterns observed in the transitional regime of wall shear flows. Numerically continuing the solutions obtained at large Reynolds numbers, we construct the Busse balloon associated with the multistability of the nonlinear solutions emerging from the instability. In the core of the balloon, the turbulent fluctuations, encoded into a multiplicative noise, select the pattern wavelength. On the lower Reynolds number side of the balloon, the pattern follows a cascade of destabilizations towards larger and larger, eventually infinite wavelengths. In that limit, the periodic limit cycle associated with the spatial pattern hits the laminar fixed point, resulting in a saddle-loop global bifurcation and the emergence of solitary pulse solutions. This saddle-loop scenario predicts a logarithmic divergence of the wavelength, which captures experimental and numerical data in two representative shear flows.

</details>


### [518] [Single-snapshot machine learning for super-resolution of turbulence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.04923)
*Kai Fukami,Kunihiko Taira*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文研究了是否可以利用单次湍流快照，通过精心设计的机器学习模型（超分辨率分析）有效提取物理信息。研究表明，从单次快照中采样的流场块训练的模型，能够成功重构二维各向同性湍流和三维湍流通道流的高分辨率场，证明了非线性机器学习可以利用尺度不变性学习湍流，且通过考虑旋转张量和剪切张量的特征可以巧妙地从单次快照中收集训练数据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统观点认为机器学习技术需要大量数据，但湍流快照包含的信息密度远高于一般数据文件。本文旨在探究能否仅用单次湍流快照，通过非线性机器学习技术有效提取物理洞见，从而避免数据浪费。

Method: 采用基于机器学习的超分辨率分析，从低分辨率数据重建高分辨率场。针对二维各向同性衰减湍流和三维湍流通道流，从单次快照中采样的流场块（tiles）训练模型。在数据收集策略上，利用旋转张量和剪切张量的特性优化采样。

Result: 1) 仅用单次快照训练的模型能成功重构二维各向同性湍流中不同雷诺数下的涡旋结构，表明模型学习了尺度不变性。2) 对三维湍流通道流，单次快照样能实现超分辨率重建，即使在非均匀流动中也有效。

Conclusion: 在模型设计和数据收集过程中嵌入物理先验知识对于数据驱动的湍流分析至关重要。本文希望促使机器学习从业者避免浪费湍流数据，证明单次快照即可提供足够的物理信息。

Abstract: Modern machine-learning techniques are generally considered data-hungry. However, this may not be the case for turbulence as each of its snapshots can hold more information than a single data file in general machine-learning settings. This study asks the question of whether nonlinear machine-learning techniques can effectively extract physical insights even from as little as a {\it single} snapshot of turbulent flow. As an example, we consider machine-learning-based super-resolution analysis that reconstructs a high-resolution field from low-resolution data for two examples of two-dimensional isotropic turbulence and three-dimensional turbulent channel flow. First, we reveal that a carefully designed machine-learning model trained with flow tiles sampled from only a single snapshot can reconstruct vortical structures across a range of Reynolds numbers for two-dimensional decaying turbulence. Successful flow reconstruction indicates that nonlinear machine-learning techniques can leverage scale-invariance properties to learn turbulent flows. We also show that training data of turbulent flows can be cleverly collected from a single snapshot by considering characteristics of rotation and shear tensors. Second, we perform the single-snapshot super-resolution analysis for turbulent channel flow, showing that it is possible to extract physical insights from a single flow snapshot even with inhomogeneity. The present findings suggest that embedding prior knowledge in designing a model and collecting data is important for a range of data-driven analyses for turbulent flows. More broadly, this work hopes to stop machine-learning practitioners from being wasteful with turbulent flow data.

</details>


### [519] [Robust pore-resolved CFD through porous monoliths reconstructed by micro-computed tomography: From digitization to flow prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.04711)
*Olivier Guévremont,Lucka Barbeau,Vaiana Moreau,Federico Galli,Nick Virgilio,Bruno Blais*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于尖锐浸入边界法的并行有限元框架，结合径向基函数固体表示和自适应网格细化，实现了对复杂多孔介质中孔隙级流动的高效高精度模拟，通过X射线显微CT数字化硅单体验证，揭示了孔隙网络结构是压力演化的主要因素。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多孔介质的复杂结构使得优化设计参数极具挑战性，而传统孔隙级CFD受限于复杂几何的网格生成算法性能，亟需一种能避免复杂网格生成、保持高阶精度且可扩展的方法。

Method: 采用尖锐浸入边界法在笛卡尔非贴体网格上求解流动；使用径向基函数表示固体几何；结合自适应网格细化（AMR）；在大规模并行有限元框架（8k核）中实现200M单元网格的模拟。

Result: 通过制造解方法验证了方法的阶收敛性；利用X射线显微CT数字化多孔硅单体的压降测量进行验证（Re≤30）；AMR使网格量减少16倍；发现孔隙网络结构是压力演化的主要因素，优先通道在孔隙尺度占主导。

Conclusion: 该工作建立了一套鲁棒高效的孔隙级多孔介质模拟工作流，弥合了亚毫米流动与宏观性质之间的差距，为基于物理数字孪生的复杂多孔介质设计与优化开辟了道路。

Abstract: Porous media are ubiquitous in energy storage and conversion, catalysis, biomechanics, hydrogeology, as well as many other fields. These materials possess high surface-to-volume ratios and their complex channels can restrict and guide the flow. However, optimizing design parameters for specific applications remains challenging due to the intricate structure of porous media. Pore-resolved CFD reveals the effects of their structure on flow characteristics, but is limited by the performance of mesh generation algorithms for such complex geometries. To alleviate this issue, we use a sharp immersed boundary method which enables usage of Cartesian, non-conformal grids, within a massively parallel finite element framework. This method preserves the order convergence of the scheme and allows for adaptive mesh refinement (AMR). We introduce a radial basis function-based representation of solids that allows to solve the flow through complex geometries with precision. We verify the method using the method of manufactured solutions. We validate it using pressure drop measurements through porous silicone monoliths digitized by X-ray computed microtomography, for pore Reynolds numbers up to 30. Simulations are conducted using grids of 200M cells distributed over 8k cores, which would require 16 times more cells without AMR. Results reveal that pore network structure is the principal factor describing pressure evolution and that preferential channels are dominant at this scale. In this work, we demonstrate a robust and efficient workflow for pore-resolved simulations of porous monoliths. This work bridges the gap between sub-millimetric flow and macroscopic properties, which will open the door to design and optimize processes through the usage of physics-based digital twins of complex porous media.

</details>


### [520] [Shock-induced drop size and distributions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.05367)
*J. E. Park,T. -W. Lee*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文通过质量和能量守恒方程的积分分析，确定了激波诱导液滴破碎过程中的液滴尺寸与分布，给出了液滴尺寸与其最终速度的更新关系式，并通过实验数据验证了该方法的有效性和实用性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为了准确预测激波诱导液滴破碎后的液滴尺寸与分布，理解动能向表面张力能转化的动态过程，并解释液滴尺寸分布偏斜的非线性依赖关系。

Method: 采用质量和能量守恒方程的积分分析方法，结合多种雾化几何构型下的做功序列，推导液滴尺寸作为其最终速度函数的更新形式。

Result: 激波诱导的液滴尺寸与分布可通过液滴速度比和流体性质在合理精度内预测；揭示了动能亏损向表面张力能转化的动态过程；液滴尺寸分布因对速度比的非线性依赖而产生偏斜。

Conclusion: 所提出的积分守恒分析方法能够合理准确地预测激波诱导液滴破碎的尺寸与分布，实验数据验证了该方法的有效性和实用性。

Abstract: We use an integral analysis of conservation equations of mass and energy, to determine the drop size and distributions during shock-induced drop break-up. The result is an updated form for the drop size as a function of its final velocity, from a series of work applied to various atomization geometries. Comparisons with experimental data demonstrate the validity and utility of this method. The shock-induced drop size and distributions can be predicted within reasonable accuracy as a function of the drop velocity ratio and fluid properties. The result also illustrates the dynamical process of kinetic energy deficit transferred to the surface tension energy, and the skewing of the drop size distribution due to the non-linear dependence on velocity ratio.

</details>


### [521] [Air jet impact craters on granular surfaces: a universal scaling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.04988)
*Prasad Sonar,Hiroaki Katsuragi*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文通过系统实验研究了湍流空气射流冲击颗粒表面形成的陨石坑形态，发现了一个通用标度定律，该定律通过无量纲变量（包含喷嘴速度、声速、喷嘴直径、喷嘴距表面距离、颗粒直径、颗粒密度和空气密度）来表征陨石坑的宽深比，揭示了控制陨石坑宽深比的长度尺度交叉现象，为安全着陆提供了指导准则。此外，还报告了一种新颖的泪滴状地下陨石坑形成现象。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 着陆器排气与行星表面相互作用会形成陨石坑，理解这一现象对确保安全着陆至关重要。现有研究缺乏对射流-颗粒相互作用中陨石坑形态的统一标度规律的认识，因此需要通过系统实验揭示其基本物理机制。

Method: 采用系统实验方法，改变空气射流速度、喷嘴位置和颗粒特性（直径、密度），通过测量陨石坑的宽深比（aspect ratio）来表征形态，并寻找该比值与各物理参数之间的标度关系。

Result: 发现陨石坑宽深比存在通用标度律，由包含喷嘴出口空气速度、空气中声速、喷嘴直径、喷嘴距表面距离、颗粒直径、颗粒密度和空气密度的无量纲变量所标度。该标度揭示了控制宽深比的长度尺度交叉现象，并观察到一种新颖的泪滴状地下陨石坑。

Conclusion: 所获得的通用标度律为预测不同条件下射流冲击颗粒表面形成的陨石坑形态提供了理论依据，揭示了不同长度尺度的竞争机制，可指导安全着陆设计。泪滴状陨石坑的发现为 subsurface cratering 现象提供了新认识。

Abstract: Craters form as the lander's exhaust interacts with the planetary surfaces. Understanding this phenomenon is imperative to ensure safe landings. We investigate crater morphology, where a turbulent air jet impinges on the granular surfaces. To reveal the fundamental aspect of this phenomenon, systematic experiments are performed with various air jet velocities, nozzle positions, and grain properties. The resultant crater morphology is characterized by an aspect ratio. We find a universal scaling law in which the aspect ratio is scaled by the dimensionless variable consisting of air velocity at the nozzle, speed of sound in air, nozzle diameter, nozzle tip distance from the surface, grain diameter, the density of grains, and density of air. The obtained scaling reveals the crossover of the length scales governing crater aspect ratio, providing a useful guideline for ensuring safe landings. Moreover, we report a novel drop shaped subsurface cratering phenomenon.

</details>


### [522] [The effect of Reynolds number on the separated flow over a low-aspect-ratio wing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.04801)
*Luke Smith,Kunihiko Taira*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文研究了低展弦比机翼在雷诺数600-10,000范围内前缘分离流与翼尖涡的相互作用，发现雷诺数增加导致周期性破坏和小尺度涡增强（Re=600→2,500），而超过Re=2,500后气动力等流动诊断量对雷诺数敏感性显著降低，这归因于翼尖涡的稳定作用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 填补低雷诺数有限翼分离流研究（Re≈10²）与高雷诺数湍流研究（Re≈10⁴）之间的认知空白，探索翼尖涡如何主导低展弦比机翼流动并影响高雷诺数应用的理解。

Method: 在雷诺数600至10,000范围内，对低展弦比机翼的前缘分离流与翼尖涡相互作用进行数值或实验研究，分析时均气动力等流动诊断量随雷诺数的变化规律。

Result: 1）从Re=600到2,500，流动周期性被破坏，小尺度涡强度与浓度急剧增加；2）超过Re=2,500后，时均气动力等流动诊断量对雷诺数敏感性降低，翼尖涡起稳定作用。

Conclusion: 翼尖涡对低展弦比机翼流动起主导稳定作用，该发现可指导将现有流动认知调整适用于更高雷诺数应用场景。

Abstract: At high incidence, low-aspect-ratio wings present a unique set of aerodynamic characteristics, including flow separation, vortex shedding, and unsteady force production. Furthermore, low-aspect ratio wings exhibit a highly impactful tip vortex, which introduces strong spanwise gradients into an already complex flow. In this work, we explore the interaction between leading edge flow separation and a strong, persistent tip vortex over a Reynolds number range of $600 \leq Re \leq 10,000$. In performing this study, we aim to bridge the insight gained from existing low Reynolds number studies of separated flow on finite wings ($Re \approx 10^2$) and turbulent flows at higher Reynolds numbers ($Re \approx 10^4$). Our study suggests two primary effects of Reynolds number. First, we observe a break from periodicity, along with a dramatic increase in the intensity and concentration of small-scale eddies, as we shift from $Re = 600$ to $Re = 2,500$. Second, we observe that many of our flow diagnostics, including the time-averaged aerodynamic force, exhibit reduced sensitivity to Reynolds number beyond $Re = 2,500$, an observation attributed to the stabilizing impact of the wing tip vortex. This latter point illustrates the manner by which the tip vortex drives flow over low-aspect-ratio wings, and provides insight into how our existing understanding of this flowfield may be adjusted for higher Reynolds number applications.

</details>


### [523] [Effect of a shear flow on the Darrieus-Landau instability in a Hele-Shaw channel](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.05409)
*Prabakaran Rajamanickam,Joel Daou*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文研究了强剪切流作用下Hele-Shaw窄通道中预混火焰的Darrieus-Landau不稳定性，同时考虑了Rayleigh-Taylor和扩散-热不稳定性。剪切流引起流向的Taylor弥散，导致各向异性扩散和火焰传播。研究发现Taylor弥散可抑制流向传播火焰的Darrieus-Landau不稳定性，而对展向传播火焰则在Le<1时稳定、Le>1时失稳。关键发现是即使无重力，当Pe≠0时弯曲火焰也可在Hele-Shaw通道中产生涡量，且涡量局限于火焰预热区和反应区。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究强剪切流引起的各向异性扩散（Taylor弥散）对预混火焰稳定性的影响机制，特别是不同传播方向下火焰不稳定性的变化规律。

Method: 采用渐近方法推导二维模型并进行数值求解，计算不同Péclet数、Lewis数和Rayleigh数下的色散曲线，分析扰动增长率。

Result: Taylor弥散抑制流向传播火焰的Darrieus-Landau不稳定性；展向传播时Le<1混合物火焰稳定、Le>1时失稳；发现无重力条件下弯曲火焰产生涡量的新现象。

Conclusion: Taylor弥散对火焰稳定性具有方向依赖性，且在各向异性扩散条件下火焰可产生局域化涡量，丰富了火焰不稳定性的理论认识。

Abstract: The Darrieus--Landau instability of premixed flames propagating in a narrow Hele-Shaw channel in the presence of a strong shear flow is investigated, incorporating also the Rayleigh--Taylor and diffusive-thermal instabilities. The flow induces shear-enhanced diffusion (Taylor dispersion) in the streamwise direction, but not in the spanwise direction and this leads to anisotropic diffusion and flame propagation. To understand how such anisotropies affect flame stability, two important cases are considered. These correspond to initial unperturbed conditions pertaining to a planar flame propagating in the streamwise or spanwise directions. The analysis is based on a two-dimensional model derived by asymptotic methods and solved numerically. These address the influence of the shear-flow strength (or Peclet number $Pe$), preferential diffusion (or Lewis number $Le$) and gravity (or Rayleigh number $Ra$). Dispersion curves characterizing the perturbation growth rate are computed for selected values of $Pe$, $Le$ and $Ra$. Taylor dispersion induced by strong shear flows is found to suppress the Darrieus--Landau instability and to weaken the flame wrinkling when the flame propagates in the streamwise direction. In contrast, when the flame propagates in the spanwise direction, the flame is stabilized in $Le<1$ mixtures, but destabilized in $Le>1$ mixtures. In the latter case, Taylor dispersion coupled with gas expansion facilitates flame wrinkling in an unusual manner. Specifically, stagnation points and counter-rotating vortices are encountered in the flame close to the unburnt gas side. More generally, an original finding is the demonstration that vorticity can be produced by a curved flame in a Hele-Shaw channel even in the absence of gravity, whenever $Pe \neq 0$, and that the vorticity remains confined to the flame preheat and reaction zones.

</details>


### [524] [Particle resuspension from complex multilayer deposits by laminar flows: statistical analysis and modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.05094)
*Hao Liu,Mireille Bossy,Bernhard Vowinckel,Christophe Henry*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文通过高分辨率数值模拟研究了层流剪切流作用下大重型球形颗粒沉积床的颗粒再悬浮动力学，揭示了颗粒在床面峰值处更易脱离、脱离后经历短跳跃并快速沉降的特性，并提出了基于床面形貌特征（坡度和高程）的脱离率预测模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究层流剪切流作用下大重型球形颗粒沉积床的再悬浮动力学机制，理解颗粒脱离、夹带和再沉积的物理过程。

Method: 采用全解析数值模拟方法，精确求解单个颗粒周围的流场并显式追踪颗粒运动，结合统计工具分析床层整体动力学、顶面形貌演化以及单个颗粒的脱离/再附着事件。

Result: 颗粒在沉积床顶面峰值处脱离频率更高，脱离后经历短距离跳跃并快速沉降回床面；提出了基于床面坡度和高程的脱离率预测模型。

Conclusion: 成功表征了层流剪切流下大重型颗粒沉积床的再悬浮动力学，验证了床面形貌对颗粒脱离行为的关键影响，并提出了简化的物理模型。

Abstract: Particle resuspension refers to the physical process by which solid particles deposited on a surface are, first, detached and, then, entrained away by the action of a fluid flow. In this study, we explore the dynamics of large and heavy spherical particles forming a complex sediment bed which is exposed to a laminar shear flow. For that purpose, we rely on fine-scale simulations based on a fully-resolved flow field around individual particles whose motion is explicitly tracked. Using statistical tools, we characterize several features: (a) the overall bed dynamics (e.g. the average particle velocity as a function of the elevation), (b) the evolution of the top surface of the sediment bed (e.g. distribution of the surface elevation or of the surface slope) and (c) the dynamics of individual particles as they detach from or re-attach to the sediment bed (including the frequency of these events, and the velocity difference / surface angle for each event). These results show that particles detach more frequently around the peaks in the top surface of the sediment bed and that, once detached, they undergo short hops as particles quickly sediment towards the sediment bed. A simple model based on the surface characteristics (including its slope and elevation) is proposed to reproduce the detachment ratio.

</details>


### [525] [Weak-inertial effects on destabilized receding contact lines](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.05045)
*Akhil Varma*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 该论文在粘性 regime 中已知的部分润湿液体接触线失稳成角现象基础上，引入了惯性效应的主导阶修正，发现惯性会使界面变为尖点形状并增加膜厚，且在考虑接触线动力学时惯性贡献仍随速度增加而增大。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 以往的理论工作（Limat & Stone, 2004）在粘性 regime 下研究了接触线失稳成角现象，但忽略了惯性效应。对于许多常见液体，接触线速度接近或超过临界值时惯性不可忽略，因此需要提供惯性修正。

Method: 在 Limat & Stone 自相似锥形界面解的基础上，引入主导阶惯性修正，求解界面形状和流场的自相似修正项，并确定其随毛细数的标度关系。

Result: 惯性修正使界面变为尖点（cusp-like）形状并导致膜厚增加；在考虑接触线动力学导致角落随速度增加而变窄的情况下，惯性贡献仍随速度增大而整体增加。

Conclusion: 惯性效应在高速接触线问题中不可忽略，它会显著改变界面形态和膜厚分布，且其影响在考虑接触线动力学时仍然显著。

Abstract: It is known that beyond a critical speed, the straight contact line of a partially-wetting liquid destabilizes into a corner. In one of the earliest theoretical works exploring this phenomenon, [L. Limat and H. A. Stone, Europhys. Lett. 65(3), 2004] elicited a self-similar conical structure of the interface in the viscous regime. However, noting that inertia is not expected to be negligible at contact line speeds close to, and beyond the critical value for many common liquids, we provide the leading-order inertial correction to their solution. In particular, we find the self-similar corrections to the interface shape as well as the flow-field, and also determine their scaling with the capillary number. We find that inertia invariably modifies the interface into a cusp-like shape with an increased film thickness. Furthermore, when incorporating contact line dynamics into the model, resulting in a narrowing of the corner as the contact line speed increases, we still observe an overall increase in the inertial contribution with speed despite the increased confinement.

</details>


### [526] [Shear-Layer Perturbation Responses from Time-Resolved Schlieren Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.05438)
*Spencer L. Stahl,Chandan Kumar,Datta V. Gaitonde*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 提出了一种物理驱动与数据驱动相结合的后处理方法，从纹影视频中提取剪切层声学扰动响应。物理部分基于动量势理论扩展提取无旋（声学/热学）信息，数据部分采用动态模态分解降阶模型（DMD-ROM）量化受迫扰动的增长率。在Ma_c=0.88的双流剪切层中验证，成功揭示了隐藏的声学结构和音调，发现了主激波与波分散产生的第二慢声波，并识别出超声速流外侧边界层区域为最敏感激励位置（响应比亚声速流大一个数量级）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统纹影图像无法直接区分声学波动与涡量/熵波动，且缺乏从实验数据中定量提取声学扰动响应的有效方法，难以进行高效的参数化声学特性研究。

Method: 1) 物理阶段：基于动量势理论扩展，从纹影像素强度中的密度梯度提取无旋（声学+热学）信息；2) 数据驱动阶段：对滤波后的声学数据应用DMD-ROM，学习线性模型并量化扰动增长率；3) 分别在壁面法向整体激励和逐像素局部激励（脉冲/谐波）下进行感受性研究。

Result: 1) 成功提取了被涡流噪声掩盖的声学结构和音调；2) 整体脉冲响应揭示了对流波包、声学爆发以及激波-波分散产生的第二慢声波；3) 谐波激励显示超声速流外侧边界层区域最敏感，响应比亚声速流大一个数量级；4) 某些激励输入不产生显著声波，可指导低噪声影响激励设计。

Conclusion: 所提物理-数据混合方法能有效从纹影视频中分离并量化声学扰动响应，适用于高速剪切层的声学参数化研究，且能识别低噪声影响的激励位置，为流动控制和噪声抑制提供指导。

Abstract: A novel combination of physics-based and data-driven post-processing techniques is proposed to extract acoustic-related shear-layer perturbation responses directly from spatio-temporally resolved schlieren video. The physics-based component is derived from a momentum potential theory extension that extracts irrotational (acoustic and thermal) information from density gradients embedded in schlieren pixel intensities. For the unheated shear layer, the method spotlights acoustic structures and tones otherwise hidden. The filtered data is then subjected to a data-driven Dynamic Mode Decomposition Reduced Order Model (DMD-ROM), which provides the response to forced perturbations. This method applies a learned linear model to isolate and quantify growth rates of acoustic phenomena suited for efficient parametric studies. A shear-layer comprised of two streams at Mach 2.461 and 0.175, corresponding to a convective Mach number 0.88 and containing shocks, is adopted for illustration. The overall perturbation response is first obtained using an impulse forcing in the wall normal direction of the splitter plate, extending in both subsonic and supersonic streams. Subsequently, impulse and harmonic forcings are independently applied in a local pixel-by-pixel manner for a precise receptivity study. The acoustic response shows a convective wavepacket and an acoustic burst from the splitter plate. The interaction with the primary shock and associated wave dispersion emits a second, slower, acoustic wave. Harmonic forcing indicates higher frequency-dependent sensitivity in the supersonic stream, with the most sensitive location near the outer boundary layer region. Excitation here yields an order of magnitude larger acoustic response compared to disturbances in the subsonic stream. Some receptive forcing inputs do not generate significant acoustic waves, which may guide excitation with low noise impact.

</details>


### [527] [Inverse cascade in zonal flows](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.05127)
*Siddhant Mishra,Anikesh Pal*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文通过大涡模拟研究旋转瑞利-贝纳尔对流中木星类行星纬向流的形成机制，发现在三维深对流系统中存在由浮力驱动的自然强迫和逆级联过程，从而从混沌中产生强平均流。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理解木星类气态巨行星上纬向流（带状风）的演化与维持机制至关重要。虽然二维β平面研究认为纬向流通过斜压不稳定在中尺度被强迫，再经逆级联将能量传递至大尺度，但这一过程是否存在于三维深对流系统中仍是一个悬而未决的挑战性问题。

Method: 在水平旋转瑞利-贝纳尔对流装置中，对地球物理感兴趣的参数区间（Ra=10¹²，Ek=10⁻⁶、10⁻⁷、10⁻⁸）进行大涡模拟（LES），并结合湍流动能（TKE）收支分析与谱空间评估来验证结果。

Result: 发现三维深对流系统中存在通过浮力产生的自然强迫以及逆级联过程，湍流动能收支分析和谱空间评估结果证实了从混沌中涌现出强平均流。

Conclusion: 三维深对流系统中确实存在类似二维系统的纬向流形成机制，即浮力提供的自然强迫和逆级联过程能够从混沌中产生并维持大尺度纬向流，这为理解木星类行星的大气动力学提供了重要依据。

Abstract: Zonal winds on Jovian planets play an important role in governing the cloud dynamics, transport of momentum, scalars, and weather patterns. Therefore, it is crucial to understand the evolution of the zonal flows and their sustainability. Based on studies in two-dimensional (2D) $β$ plane setups, zonal flow is believed to be forced at the intermediate scale via baroclinic instabilities, and the inverse cascade leads to the transfer of energy to large scales. However, whether such a process exists in three-dimensional (3D) deep convection systems remains an open and challenging question. To explore a possible answer, we perform Large Eddy Simulations at the geophysically interesting regime of $Ra=$$10^{12}$, $Ek=$$10^{-6}$,$10^{-7}$ and $10^{-8}$ in horizontally rotating Rayleigh-Bénard convection setup and discover the existence of natural forcing through buoyancy and inverse cascade. The turbulent kinetic energy budget analysis and the spectral space assessment of the results corroborate the emanation of a strong mean flow from chaos.

</details>


### [528] [Numerical simulation and analysis of mixing enhancement due to chaotic advection using an adaptive approach for approximating the dilution index](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.05055)
*Carla Feistner,Mónica Basilio Hazas,Barbara Wohlmuth,Gabriele Chiogna*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于稀释指数和代表性单元体积理论的新方法，用于在拉格朗日粒子追踪框架下选择合适的网格尺寸来量化混沌对流系统中的混合增强效果，并应用于源-汇偶极子和旋转势混合两种混沌注入-抽取系统，验证了设计参数对工程混沌混合的影响以及扩散在填充KAM岛实现完全混合中的关键作用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 拉格朗日粒子追踪方法在描述混沌对流中的拉伸、折叠及KAM岛等结构方面具有优势，但在量化混合过程时受限于离散粒子的有限数量，难以准确描述粒子密度或浓度梯度。因此，需要一种新的方法来实现混合过程的精确量化。

Method: 采用稀释指数作为混合量化指标，引入基于代表性单元体积（REV）理论的新方法选择合适网格尺寸来近似密度函数，确保稀释指数随时间单调递增；将该方法应用于源-汇偶极子和旋转势混合两种混沌注入-抽取系统，分析设计参数对混合增强的影响。

Result: 新的网格尺寸选择方法有效保持了稀释指数的单调递增特性；在两种混沌系统中验证了混合增强效果；揭示了扩散在填充KAM岛、实现完全混合中的关键作用，同时强调了避免欧拉方法中数值扩散的重要性。
