Conclusion: 提出的基于REV理论的网格尺寸选择方法能够有效量化混沌混合过程，为工程设计中优化注入-抽取系统参数以实现高效混沌混合提供了理论依据；扩散对完全混合至关重要，应避免数值扩散的影响。

Abstract: Lagrangian particle-tracking methods are particularly suitable to study solute transport in velocity fields displaying chaotic advection. They can accurately resolve stretching and folding processes, the increase in the solute-solvent interface available for diffusion as well as Kolmogorov-Arnold-Moser (KAM) islands, non-mixing regions that limit the chaotic area in the domain and, thereby, the mixing enhancement. However, they also display limitations due to the finite number of discrete particles, particularly if we are interested in the quantification of mixing processes, which require an accurate description of the particle density or concentration gradients. In this work, we use the dilution index to quantify the temporal increase in mixing of a solute within its solvent. We introduce a new approach to select a suitable grid size for the approximation of the density function, motivated by the theory of representative elementary volumes. It preserves the central feature of the dilution index, which is monotonically increasing in time, highlighting the importance of a suitable choice for the grid size in the dilution index approximation. We use this approach to demonstrate the mixing enhancement for two chaotic injection-extraction systems that exhibit chaotic structures: a source-sink dipole and a rotated potential mixing. Using our new approach, we assess the choice of design parameters of the injection-extraction systems to effectively engineer chaotic mixing. We demonstrate the important role of diffusion in filling the KAM islands and reaching complete mixing and, consequently, the importance of avoiding numerical diffusion, which often affects Eulerian methods applied on the advection-diffusion equation.

</details>


### [529] [A consistent, volume preserving, and adaptive mesh refinement-based framework for modeling non-isothermal gas-liquid-solid flows with phase change](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.05588)
*Ramakrishnan Thirumalaisamy,Amneet Pal Singh Bhalla*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文对低马赫数焓法进行了改进，提出了相容时间积分方案以增强稳定性，展示了系统在无外力热源下能守恒质量、动量、焓和相组成，并能准确模拟热毛细流动且不产生虚假相变。提出了用于验证金属制造过程（焊接、3D打印）多物理场仿解析模型，并展示了该方法在模拟金属凝固过程中气孔缺陷（气泡捕获）的实际应用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有低马赫数焓法在模拟PCM熔化凝固及伴随气相时存在稳定性不足的问题，且缺乏简单有效的验证方案用于金属制造过程的多物理场仿真。传统验证依赖操控材料属性来匹配复杂实验，难以推广。

Method: 提出了相容时间积分方案（consistent time integration schemes）用于质量、动量和焓方程；引入解析模型（基于含密度跳跃的Stefan问题）用于验证；采用场延拓技术（field extension technique）在三相流中精确施加表面张力以模拟气泡捕获。

Result: 改进后的方法能使无外力热源系统从非等温非平衡相变状态过渡到等温平衡态而不出现非物理行为；准确模拟热毛细流动且无虚假相变；成功模拟金属凝固过程中气孔缺陷的形成。

Conclusion: 改进后的低马赫数焓法在稳定性、准确性及实用性方面均有显著提升，为焊接、3D打印等金属制造工艺中的多相流-相变耦合仿真提供了可靠且可验证的数值框架。

Abstract: This work expands on our recently introduced low Mach enthalpy method [1] for simulating the melting and solidification of a phase change material (PCM) alongside (or without) an ambient gas phase. The method captures PCM's volume change (shrinkage or expansion) by accounting for density change-induced flows. We present several improvements to the original work. First, we introduce consistent time integration schemes for the mass, momentum, and enthalpy equations, which enhance the method stability. Demonstrating the effectiveness of this scheme, we show that a system free of external forces and heat sources can conserve its initial mass, momentum, enthalpy, and phase composition. This allows the system to transition from a non-isothermal, non-equilibrium, phase-changing state to an isothermal, equilibrium state without exhibiting unrealistic behavior. Furthermore, we show that the low Mach enthalpy method accurately simulates thermocapillary flows without introducing spurious phase changes. We propose an analytical model to validate advanced CFD codes for simulating metal manufacturing processes like welding and 3D printing. These processes involve a heat source melting metal or alloy in an inert gas environment. Traditionally, validation relied on manipulating material properties to match complex experiments. Our model uses the Stefan problem with a density jump to provide a straightforward method for validating multiphysics simulations involving heat sources and phase changes in three-phase flows.Lastly, we demonstrate the practical utility of the method in modeling porosity defects (gas bubble trapping) during metal solidification. A field extension technique is used to accurately apply surface tension forces in a three-phase flow situation. This is where part of the bubble surface is trapped within the (moving) solidification front.

</details>


### [530] [Reynolds stress decay modeling informed by anisotropically forced homogeneous turbulence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.05179)
*Ty Homan,Omkar B. Shende,Ali Mani*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文通过各向异性强迫方法生成更广泛的各向异性湍流数据，用于Reynolds应力输运方程中衰减项的建模与系数选择，开发出优于现有模型的立方项衰减模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: RANS模型中未封闭项的处理对预测精度至关重要，现有衰减模型多基于有限数据，缺乏对广泛各向异性湍流状态的系统评估与校准。

Method: 在均匀湍流中采用各向异性动量强迫，生成传统三周期域无法访问的湍流状态；基于生成数据对衰减项模型进行系数选择与模型形式优化，扩展到主坐标Reynolds应力的立方项。

Result: 新方法产生的数据覆盖了比现有文献更全面的各向异性湍流行为；所选最优模型（含立方项）在精度上显著优于文献中的经典模型。

Conclusion: 该框架（各向异性强迫数据生成+模型选择与调优）能有效提升Reynolds应力衰减模型的准确性，为二阶矩湍流封闭建模提供了有前景的路径。

Abstract: Models for solving the Reynolds-averaged Navier-Stokes equations are popular tools for predicting complex turbulent flows due to their computational affordability and ability to provide or estimate quantities of engineering interest. However, results depend on a proper treatment of unclosed terms, which require progress in the development and assessment of model forms. In this study, we consider the Reynolds stress transport equations as a framework for second-moment turbulence closure modeling. We specifically focus on the terms responsible for decay of the Reynolds stresses, which can be isolated and evaluated separately from other terms in a canonical setup of homogeneous turbulence. We show that by using anisotropic forcing of the momentum equation, we can access states of turbulence traditionally not probed in a triply-periodic domain. The resulting data span a wide range of anisotropic turbulent behavior in a more comprehensive manner than extant literature. We then consider a variety of model forms for which these data allow us to perform a robust selection of model coefficients and select an optimal model that extends to cubic terms when expressed in terms of the principal coordinate Reynolds stresses. Performance of the selected decay model is then examined relative to the simulation data and popular models from the literature, demonstrating the superior accuracy of the developed model and, in turn, the efficacy of this framework for model selection and tuning.

</details>


### [531] [Mode-to-mode nonlinear energy transfer in turbulent channel flows](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.05062)
*Jitong Ding,Daniel Chung,Simon J. Illingworth*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文研究了摩擦雷诺数Re_τ=180和590的槽道流中非线性能量转移现象。通过引入新变量量化傅里叶模式间的非线性三波相互作用能量传递，分析了三种结构（流向条带、斜波和T-S波）的能量转移预算，并探讨了尺度间的正向与逆向级串，发现净正向级串曲线形状类似于Smagorinsky涡粘模型的预测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统湍动能方程无法直接获得单个傅里叶模式的非线性能量传递增益与损失，需要引入新方法来显式量化三波相互作用中的能量转移，以深入理解壁面湍流中不同结构之间的能量交换机制。

Method: 在流向-展向波数空间中引入新变量，显式考察非线性三波相互作用，量化源模态到接收模态的能量传递。分别对流向条带、斜波和T-S波三种结构进行能量转移预算分析，并在大涡模拟框架下量化可解尺度与亚格子尺度之间的正向和逆向级串。

Result: (1) 三种结构均存在从流向拉长模态向展向拉长模态的横向级串；(2) 在考虑的截止波长范围内，可解尺度与亚格子尺度之间的净能量传递为正向级串（从可解尺度向亚格子尺度）；(3) 净正向级串曲线随截止波长的变化形状与Smagorinsky涡粘模型的预测相似。

Conclusion: 新变量能够有效量化非线性能量传递机制，揭示了壁面湍流中普遍存在的横向级串现象，并为亚格子模型的验证提供了直接的物理依据。

Abstract: We investigate nonlinear energy transfer for channel flows at friction Reynolds numbers of $Re_τ=180$ and $590$. The key feature of the analysis is that we introduce a new variable, which quantifies the energy transferred from a source mode to a recipient mode through explicit examination of nonlinear triadic interactions in streamwise-spanwise wavenumber space. First, we use this variable to quantify the nonlinear energy transfer gain and loss for individual Fourier modes. The nonlinear energy transfer gain and loss cannot be directly obtained from the turbulent kinetic energy (TKE) equation. Second, we quantify the nonlinear energy transfer budgets for three types of structures: streamwise streaks, oblique waves and Tollmien-Schlichting waves. We found that a transverse cascade from streamwise-elongated modes to spanwise-elongated modes exists in all three structures. Third, we quantify the forward and inverse cascades between resolved scales and subgrid scales in the spirit of large-eddy simulation. For the cutoff wavelength range we consider, the forward and inverse cascades between the resolved scales and subgrid scales result in a net forward cascade from the resolved scales to the subgrid scales. The shape of the net forward cascade curve with respect to the cutoff wavelength resembles the net forward cascade predicted by the Smagorinsky eddy viscosity.

</details>


### [532] [Dynamically relevant recurrent flows obtained via a nonlinear recurrence function from two-dimensional turbulence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.05079)
*Edward M. Redfern,Andrei L. Lazer,Dan Lucas*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文通过非线性三元组诊断二维湍流中的不稳定循环流，利用Newton-GMRES-hookstep方法收敛准循环事件，成功识别出涵盖极端爆发事件的大耗散率范围的不稳定周期轨道与相对周期轨道。三元组变量相比复数傅里叶幅度的欧几里得范数能更自然地加权空间模态，并内建了连续对称性的约化，避免了搜索平移的需要。基于这些轨道，发现基于解不稳定性的简单启发式加权能很好预测湍流统计量，前提是包含足够多的动力学相关轨道。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统"循环流分析"方法在二维湍流中仅能识别有限多样性的不稳定循环流，且受限于对称性和加权方式，无法有效捕捉极端爆发事件（大耗散率）对应的轨道。本文旨在解决这一问题，通过引入非线性三元组变量实现更高效、更多样化的不稳定循环流提取。

Method: 1. 使用非线性三元组变量诊断直接数值模拟中的近循环事件；2. 采用Newton-GMRES-hookstep方法将准循环事件收敛为精确的周期或相对周期轨道；3. 利用三元组变量天然约化连续平移对称性，避免额外搜索；4. 基于收敛的轨道分析最优加权策略，提出基于解不稳定性的启发式加权方法。

Result: 成功识别出比先前研究更多样化的不稳定周期轨道和相对周期轨道，覆盖更大耗散率范围（对应极端爆发事件）。三元组变量提供了比标准复数傅里叶幅度欧几里得范数更自然的空间模态加权方式。基于解不稳定性的简单启发式加权能够很好预测湍流统计量。

Conclusion: 非线性三元组是提取二维湍流中不稳定循环流的有效工具，其内建的对称性约化简化了计算。在包含足够多动力学相关轨道的前提下，基于不稳定性的加权策略足以准确重构湍流统计特性，为湍流的轨道展开理论提供了实用方案。

Abstract: This paper demonstrates the efficient extraction of unstable recurrent flows from two-dimensional turbulence by using nonlinear triads to diagnose recurrence in direct numerical simulations. Nearly recurrent episodes are identified from simulations and then converged using a standard Newton- GMRES-hookstep method, however with much greater diversity than previous studies which performed this 'recurrent flow analysis'. Unstable periodic and relative periodic orbits are able to be identified which span larger values of dissipation rate, i.e. corresponding to extreme bursting events. The triad variables are found to provide a more natural way to weight the greater variety of spatial modes active in such orbits than a standard Euclidian norm of complex Fourier amplitudes. Moreover the triad variables build in a reduction of the continuous symmetry of the system which avoids the need to search over translations when obtaining relative periodic orbits. Armed with these orbits we investigate optimal weightings when reconstructing the statistics of turbulence and suggest that, in fact, a simple heuristic weighting based on the solution instability provides a very good prediction, provided enough dynamically relevant orbits are included in the expansion.

</details>


### [533] [Viscoelastic Worthington jets & droplets produced by bursting bubbles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.05089)
*Ayush K. Dixit,Alexandros Oratis,Konstantinos Zinelis,Detlef Lohse,Vatsal Sanjay*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文通过直接数值模拟研究了粘弹性流体（如聚合物溶液）中气泡空腔塌缩的动力学过程，发现射流和液滴形成由弹性毛细数Ec和德博拉数De两个无量纲参数决定。低Ec和De时流体表现为牛顿流体特性；高Ec和De时弹性应力完全抑制射流形成；中等参数下可产生比牛顿流体更小的液滴。研究揭示了三种流动状态，对病原体传播和工业过程具有重要启示。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 气泡破裂及随后污染液体自由表面开放空腔的塌缩可产生气溶胶液滴，促进病原体传播。虽然牛顿流体中的这一过程已被广泛研究，但非牛顿流变学对其的影响仍知之甚少，因此本文旨在揭示粘弹性介质中气泡空腔塌缩的机理。

Method: 采用直接数值模拟方法，研究粘弹性介质（如聚合物溶液）中气泡空腔塌缩过程，通过改变弹性毛细数Ec、德博拉数De和溶剂奥内佐格数Oh_s等无量纲参数，系统分析射流和液滴形成的动力学行为。

Result: 发现射流和液滴形成由Ec和De两个参数决定：低Ec和De时粘弹性流体呈现类牛顿流体行为；高Ec和De时弹性应力完全抑制射流形成；中等Ec和De时可产生比牛顿流体更小的液滴。通过参数空间映射，揭示了三种流动状态：射流形成液滴、射流无液滴形成、无射流形成。

Conclusion: 研究阐明了聚合物液体中气溶胶抑制与细雾形成的机制，对病原体传播和涉及粘弹性流体的工业过程具有重要启示意义。

Abstract: Bubble bursting and subsequent collapse of the open cavity at free surfaces of contaminated liquids can generate aerosol droplets, facilitating pathogen transport. After film rupture, capillary waves focus at the cavity base, potentially generating fast Worthington jets that are responsible for ejecting the droplets away from the source. While extensively studied for Newtonian fluids, the influence of non-Newtonian rheology on this process remains poorly understood. Here, we employ direct numerical simulations to investigate the bubble cavity collapse in viscoelastic media, such as polymeric liquids. We find that the jet and drop formation are dictated by two dimensionless parameters: the elastocapillary number $Ec$ (the ratio of the elastic modulus and the Laplace pressure) and the Deborah number $De$ (the ratio of the relaxation time and the inertio-capillary timescale). We show that for low values of $Ec$ and $De$, the viscoelastic liquid adopts a Newtonian-like behavior, where the dynamics are governed by the solvent Ohnesorge number $Oh_s$ (the ratio of visco-capillary and inertio-capillary timescales). In contrast, for large values $Ec$ and $De$, the enhanced elastic stresses completely suppress the formation of the jet. For some cases with intermediate values of $Ec$ and $De$, smaller droplets are produced compared to Newtonian fluids, potentially enhancing aerosol dispersal. By mapping the phase space spanned by $Ec$, $De$, and $Oh_s$, we reveal three distinct flow regimes: (i) jets forming droplets, (ii) jets without droplet formation, and (iii) absence of jet formation. Our results elucidate the mechanisms underlying aerosol suppression versus fine spray formation in polymeric liquids, with implications for pathogen transmission and industrial processes involving viscoelastic fluids.

</details>


<div id='math.NA'></div>

# math.NA [[Back]](#toc)

### [534] [Quasi-Steady-State Approach for Efficient Multiscale Simulation and Optimization of mAb Glycosylation in CHO Cell Culture](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00281)
*Yingjie Ma,Jing Guo,Andrew Maloney,Richard Braatz*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种准稳态（QSS）方法，用于高效求解从生物反应器到高尔基体的多尺度糖基化模型。通过引入QSS假设并忽略核苷酸糖供体通量，将大规模偏微分代数方程组转化为一系列独立的微分代数方程组，并开发了三步QSS模拟方法，结合并行计算和非均匀时间网格策略，实现了300倍以上的加速，相对误差小于1.6%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多尺度机理模型在单克隆抗体糖基化分析中具有重要价值，但传统方法求解计算强度大，难以支持优化与控制。为克服这一瓶颈，亟需开发高效的数值求解方法。

Method: 提出准稳态（QSS）假设，忽略高尔基体中核苷酸糖供体通量，将大规模偏微分代数方程组（PDAEs）转化为一系列独立的微分代数方程组（DAEs），进而开发三步QSS模拟方法，并采用并行计算和非均匀时间网格策略进一步加速。

Result: 在模拟、参数估计和动态优化案例中，QSS方法相比传统方法（method of lines）实现了300倍以上的加速，且相对误差小于1.6%。

Conclusion: 该工作为基于多尺度模型的糖基化过程优化与控制奠定了坚实基础，有力支持了质量源于设计（QbD）的实施。

Abstract: Glycosylation is a critical quality attribute for monoclonal antibody (mAb) production, influenced by both process conditions and cellular mechanisms. Multiscale mechanistic models, spanning from the bioreactor to the Golgi apparatus, have been proposed for analyzing the glycosylation process. However, these models are computationally intensive to solve when using traditional methods, making optimization and control challenging. In this work, we propose a quasi-steady-state (QSS) approach for efficiently solving the multiscale glycosylation model. By introducing the QSS assumption and assuming negligible nucleotide sugar donor (NSD) flux for glycosylation in the Golgi, the large-scale partial differential algebraic equation system is converted into a series of independent differential algebraic equation systems. Based on that representation, we develop a three-step QSS simulation method and further reduce computational time through parallel computing and nonuniform time grid strategies. Case studies in simulation, parameter estimation, and dynamic optimization demonstrate that the QSS approach can be more than 300-fold faster than the method of lines, with less than 1.6% relative errors. This work establishes a solid foundation for multiscale model-based optimization and control of the glycosylation process, supporting the implementation of quality by design.

</details>


### [535] [Well-conditioned dipole-type method of fundamental solutions: derivation and its mathematical analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00212)
*Koya Sakakibara*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文研究偶极型基本解法，将其视为去除奇异性的双层势的离散化。提出了一种解决此前被认为是重大挑战的病态性问题的方法，并在圆盘区域上进行了数学分析。此外，通过共形映射将所提方法推广到一般约当区域，并通过数值实验验证了方法的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 偶极型基本解法此前存在严重的病态性问题，被视为该方法的主要挑战，本文旨在解决这一病态性问题，并建立其数学理论基础。

Method: 首先在圆盘区域上对偶极型基本解法的病态性进行数学分析，提出去除病态性的方法；然后利用共形映射将圆盘区域的结果推广到一般约当区域。

Result: 成功解决了偶极型基本解法的病态性问题，并通过共形映射将其推广到一般约当区域，数值实验验证了方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 所提方法有效克服了偶极型基本解法的病态性难题，且可通过共形映射适用于一般区域，具有较好的普适性和实用性。

Abstract: In this paper, we examine the dipole-type method of fundamental solutions, which can be conceptualized as a discretization of the "singularity-removed" double-layer potential. We present a method for removing the ill-conditionality, which was previously considered a significant challenge, and provide a mathematical analysis in the context of disk regions. Moreover, we extend the proposed method to the general Jordan region using conformal mapping, demonstrating the efficacy of the proposed method through numerical experiments.

</details>


### [536] [Towards Universal Mesh Movement Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00382)
*Mingrui Zhang,Chunyang Wang,Stephan Kramer,Joseph G. Wallwork,Siyi Li,Jiancheng Liu,Xiang Chen,Matthew D. Piggott*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文提出通用网格移动网络（UM2N），采用图变换器编码器与图注意力网络解码器架构，无需重新训练即可零样本迁移至不同PDE类型、边界几何和网格分布的场景，在平流、Navier-Stokes及真实海啸模拟中优于现有学习方法，且相比传统Monge-Ampère方法大幅加速并在传统方法失效场景下仍有效。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统网格移动方法计算昂贵且难以处理复杂边界几何；现有学习方法针对不同PDE类型或边界几何需从头训练，泛化性差且常出现网格反转等鲁棒性问题。亟需一种通用、零样本、鲁棒的网格移动方法。

Method: UM2N由两部分组成：特征提取采用图变换器（Graph Transformer, GT）编码器；网格移动采用基于图注意力网络（Graph Attention Network, GAT）的解码器。训练后的模型可以零样本、非侵入式地应用于不同网格尺寸分布、结构、PDE类型和边界几何的场景。

Result: 在平流、Navier-Stokes示例及真实海啸模拟案例上，UM2N在多个基准上超越现有基于学习的网格移动方法；相比传统Monge-Ampère PDE求解方法，UM2N不仅大幅加速网格移动，还能在传统方法失效的场景下有效工作。

Conclusion: UM2N提出了一种通用的、可零样本迁移的网格移动学习框架，解决了现有方法泛化性差和鲁棒性不足的关键问题，在效率和适用性上均优于传统数值方法，为复杂PDE求解中的网格自适应提供了新范式。

Abstract: Solving complex Partial Differential Equations (PDEs) accurately and efficiently is an essential and challenging problem in all scientific and engineering disciplines. Mesh movement methods provide the capability to improve the accuracy of the numerical solution without increasing the overall mesh degree of freedom count. Conventional sophisticated mesh movement methods are extremely expensive and struggle to handle scenarios with complex boundary geometries. However, existing learning-based methods require re-training from scratch given a different PDE type or boundary geometry, which limits their applicability, and also often suffer from robustness issues in the form of inverted elements. In this paper, we introduce the Universal Mesh Movement Network (UM2N), which -- once trained -- can be applied in a non-intrusive, zero-shot manner to move meshes with different size distributions and structures, for solvers applicable to different PDE types and boundary geometries. UM2N consists of a Graph Transformer (GT) encoder for extracting features and a Graph Attention Network (GAT) based decoder for moving the mesh. We evaluate our method on advection and Navier-Stokes based examples, as well as a real-world tsunami simulation case. Our method outperforms existing learning-based mesh movement methods in terms of the benchmarks described above. In comparison to the conventional sophisticated Monge-Ampère PDE-solver based method, our approach not only significantly accelerates mesh movement, but also proves effective in scenarios where the conventional method fails. Our project page is at https://erizmr.github.io/UM2N/.

</details>


### [537] [A Hybrid Algorithm for Systems of Non-interacting Particles with an External Potential](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00299)
*Ana Djurdjevac,Ann Almgren,John Bell*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文针对Dean-Kawasaki方程在低粒子密度下的数值模拟挑战，提出了一种混合算法：当粒子密度低于阈值时，从有限体积法切换至基于粒子的方法，并利用高阶统计量比较确定切换准则，在二维和三维空间中验证了该方法的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Dean-Kawasaki方程的有限体积法数值求解在粒子数较少时面临解的正性保持和随机通量精确近似两大挑战，需要发展适用于低密度场景的混合算法。

Method: 提出混合算法，在低粒子密度区域从有限体积法切换至粒子方法；通过比较有限体积法与粒子模拟的高阶统计量来制定密度阈值判据；在二维和三维空间中进行动态自适应验证，并进一步考虑含外势的动力学情形。

Result: 在二维和三维空间中，无外势情况下成功演示了基于所提判据的动态自适应切换；进一步展示了含外势动力学下的算法表现。

Conclusion: 所提出的混合算法能够有效处理Dean-Kawasaki方程在低密度区域的数值模拟问题，通过密度阈值判据实现有限体积法与粒子方法间的自适应切换。

Abstract: Our focus is on simulating the dynamics of non-interacting particles including the effects of an external potential, which, under certain assumptions, can be formally described by the Dean-Kawasaki equation. The Dean-Kawasaki equation can be solved numerically using standard finite volume methods. However, the numerical approximation implicitly requires a sufficiently large number of particles to ensure the positivity of the solution and accurate approximation of the stochastic flux. To address this challenge, we extend hybrid algorithms for particle systems to scenarios where the density is low. The aim is to create a hybrid algorithm that switches from a finite volume discretization to a particle-based method when the particle density falls below a certain threshold. We develop criteria for determining this threshold by comparing higher-order statistics obtained from the finite volume method with particle simulations. We then demonstrate the use of the resulting criteria for dynamic adaptation in both two- and three-dimensional spatial settings in the absence of an external potential. Finally we consider the dynamics when an external potential is included.

</details>


### [538] [Constraint Energy Minimizing Generalized Multiscale Finite Element Method for Convection Diffusion Equations with Inhomogeneous Boundary Conditions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00304)
*Po Chai Wong,Eric T. Chung,Changqing Ye,Lina Zhao*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文提出了约束能量最小化广义多尺度有限元法(CEM-GMsFEM)，用于处理具有非齐次Dirichlet、Neumann和Robin边界条件及高对比系数的对流扩散方程。针对时间无关问题设计了边界校正器，针对时间相关问题提出了边界校正器的更新方案，给出了能量范数一阶收敛和L²范数二阶收敛的误差分析，并通过数值算例验证，同时结合Strang分裂展示了非线性问题的处理能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有GMsFEM在处理复杂边界条件（特别是非齐次Dirichlet、Neumann和Robin边界）时存在局限性，且高对比系数下的对流扩散方程对数值方法提出更高要求，因此需要发展一种能够有效处理这些边界条件并保证收敛性的多尺度方法。

Method: 基于CEM-GMsFEM框架，针对时间无关问题分别设计Dirichlet、Neumann和Robin边界的校正算子D^m和N^{m}；针对时间相关问题，建立边界的校正算子更新方案。在理论分析上证明了能量范数一阶收敛和L²范数二阶收敛，数值实验中对比了不同有限差分格式的时间离散化效果，并将Strang分裂用于处理非线性问题。

Result: 理论分析表明该方法在能量范数下达到关于粗网格尺寸H的一阶收敛，在L²范数下达到二阶收敛；数值算例验证了这一收敛阶，不同有限差分格式在时间离散化中的表现得到了对比，非线性问题结合Strang分裂也得到了有效求解。

Conclusion: CEM-GMsFEM能有效处理具有多种非齐次边界条件和高对比系数的对流扩散方程，边界校正算子设计合理，收敛性理论完整，且可推广至时间相关和非线性问题，具有良好的适用性和理论保障。

Abstract: In this paper, we develop the constraint energy minimizing generalized multiscale finite element method (CEM-GMsFEM) for convection-diffusion equations with inhomogeneous Dirichlet, Neumann and Robin boundary conditions, along with high-contrast coefficients. For time independent problems, boundary correctors $\mathcal{D}^m$ and $\mathcal{N}^{m}$ for Dirichlet, Neumann, and Robin conditions are designed. For time dependent problems, a scheme to update the boundary correctors is formulated. Error analysis in both cases is given to show the first-order convergence in energy norm with respect to the coarse mesh size $H$ and second-order convergence in $L^2-$norm, as verified by numerical examples, with which different finite difference schemes are compared for temporal discretization. Nonlinear problems are also demonstrated in combination with Strang splitting.

</details>


### [539] [On the injectivity of mean value mappings between quadrilaterals](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00422)
*Michael S. Floater,Georg Muntingh*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文证明了当源多边形和目标多边形均为四边形且目标四边形为凸时，均值坐标映射是单射。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 均值坐标被广泛应用于多边形映射，但其单射性尚未得到充分理论保证，特别是在四边形情形下。

Method: 通过理论分析，针对四边形情形，在目标四边形为凸的条件下，证明均值坐标映射的注入性。

Result: 证明了若四边形为目标且凸，则均值坐标映射是单射（即一一映射）。

Conclusion: 该结果为均值坐标在四边形映射中的单射性提供了理论依据，保障了其在图形学和曲面建模中应用的有效性。

Abstract: Mean value coordinates can be used to map one polygon into another, with application to computer graphics and curve and surface modelling. In this paper we show that if the polygons are quadrilaterals, and if the target quadrilateral is convex, then the mapping is injective.

</details>


### [540] [A parameter uniform hybrid approach for singularly perturbed two-parameter parabolic problem with discontinuous data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00354)
*Nirmali Roy,Anuradha Jha*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文针对二维反应-对流-扩散型奇异摄动双参数抛物问题，提出了一种在空间方向采用混合单调差分格式（基于Shishkin网格）与时间方向采用Crank-Nicolson方法相结合的数值方案，实现了空间方向几乎二阶、时间方向二阶的一致收敛，并通过数值实验验证了相比现有方法的优越性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 源项和对流系数在特定域点存在不连续性导致内层形成，且双摄动参数导致边界层宽度各异，需要一种能够处理这些复杂层结构且一致收敛的数值方案。

Method: 空间方向采用混合单调差分格式，在分段均匀Shishkin网格上实现；时间方向采用均匀网格上的Crank-Nicolson方法。两者结合形成完整数值格式。

Result: 所提方案在空间方向达到几乎二阶（almost two）收敛阶，时间方向达到精确二阶收敛阶，均为一致收敛。数值实验证明了理论收敛阶，且精度和收敛性优于现有文献方法。

Conclusion: 提出的混合差分方案能有效处理二维双参数奇异摄动抛物问题中的边界层和内层，实现高阶一致收敛，是一种优于现有方法的数值求解策略。

Abstract: In this article, we address singularly perturbed two-parameter parabolic problem of the reaction-convection-diffusion type in two dimensions. These problems exhibit discontinuities in the source term and convection coefficient at particular domain points, which result in the formation of interior layers. The presence of two perturbation parameters leads to the formation of boundary layers with varying widths. Our primary focus is to address these layers and develop a scheme that is uniformly convergent. So we propose a hybrid monotone difference scheme for the spatial direction, implemented on a specially designed piece-wise uniform Shishkin mesh, combined with the Crank-Nicolson method on a uniform mesh for the temporal direction. The resulting scheme is proven to be uniformly convergent, with an order of almost two in the spatial direction and exactly two in the temporal direction. Numerical experiments support the theoretically proven higher order of convergence and shows that our approach results in better accuracy and convergence compared to other existing methods in the literature.

</details>


### [541] [Polynomial quasi-Trefftz DG for PDEs with smooth coefficients: elliptic problems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00392)
*Lise-Marie Imbert-Gérard,Andrea Moiola,Chiara Perinati,Paul Stocker*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文针对变系数线性PDE，提出了拟Trefftz多项式空间的一般构造方法，并基于此发展了拟Trefftz DG格式，在扩散主导和对流主导问题中均展示了高精度和高阶收敛性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统Trefftz方法要求基函数为PDE的精确解，但对于变系数问题精确解通常无法获得。拟Trefftz方法通过使用局部Taylor多项式近似解来克服这一局限，但缺乏一般性构造理论和算法。

Method: 定义了适用于光滑系数和源项的一般线性PDE的拟Trefftz多项式空间，给出了逼近性质分析，并在非退化条件下提供了简单基函数算法。针对变系数椭圆扩散-对流-反应问题构造了拟Trefftz DG格式，对非齐次问题采用局部拟Trefftz特解+齐次解的求解策略。

Result: 证明了拟Trefftz DG格式的稳定性和高阶收敛性。二维和三维数值实验表明，与标准DG相比，在相同自由度下该方法精度更高，在扩散主导和对流主导问题中均表现优异。

Conclusion: 拟Trefftz DG方法是一类有效处理变系数PDE的高阶数值方法，兼具Trefftz方法的高精度优势和DG框架的灵活性，特别适用于需要高精度且计算资源受限的场景。

Abstract: Trefftz schemes are high-order Galerkin methods whose discrete spaces are made of elementwise exact solutions of the underlying PDE. Trefftz basis functions can be easily computed for many PDEs that are linear, homogeneous, and have piecewise-constant coefficients. However, if the equation has variable coefficients, exact solutions are generally unavailable. Quasi-Trefftz methods overcome this limitation relying on elementwise "approximate solutions" of the PDE, in the sense of Taylor polynomials.
  We define polynomial quasi-Trefftz spaces for general linear PDEs with smooth coefficients and source term, describe their approximation properties and, under a non-degeneracy condition, provide a simple algorithm to compute a basis. We then focus on a quasi-Trefftz DG method for variable-coefficient elliptic diffusion-advection-reaction problems, showing stability and high-order convergence of the scheme. The main advantage over standard DG schemes is the higher accuracy for comparable numbers of degrees of freedom. For non-homogeneous problems with piecewise-smooth source term we propose to construct a local quasi-Trefftz particular solution and then solve for the difference. Numerical experiments in 2 and 3 space dimensions show the excellent properties of the method both in diffusion-dominated and advection-dominated problems.

</details>


### [542] [Stability and Convergence Analysis of an Exact Finite Difference Scheme for Fredholm Integro-Differential Equations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00425)
*Mehebub Alam,Rajni Kant Pandey*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文针对二阶线性奇异摄动FIDE的边值问题，提出了一种精确有限差分方法，解决了传统方法在小扰动参数下的不稳定性问题，验证了其ε-一致收敛性及一阶收敛阶。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的求解方法在处理小扰动参数时存在稳定性问题，因此需要一种能够有效处理摄动效应的数值方法。

Method: 提出了一种精确有限差分方法（exact finite difference method）来求解二阶线性奇异摄动FIDE的边值问题。

Result: 该方法具有ε-一致收敛性，收敛阶为1，通过算例验证了其均匀收敛性和适用性。

Conclusion: 该精确有限差分方法在处理摄动效应方面表现出鲁棒性和高效性，能有效克服传统方法的不稳定性问题。

Abstract: This report addresses the boundary value problem for a second-order linear singularly perturbed FIDE. Traditional methods for solving these equations often face stability issues when dealing with small perturbation parameters. We propose an exact finite difference method to solve these equations and provide a detailed stability and $\varepsilon$-uniform convergence analysis. Our approach is validated with an example, demonstrating its uniform convergence and applicability, with a convergence order of 1. The results illustrate the method's robustness in handling perturbation effects efficiently.

</details>


### [543] [New $C^0$ interior penalty method for Monge-Ampère equations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00434)
*Tianyang Chu,Hailong Guo,Zhimin Zhang*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于离散Miranda-Talenti估计的C0内部惩罚方法，用于近似Monge-Ampère方程的粘性解。通过消失矩表示将原方程逼近为四阶半线性方程并附加边界条件，利用离散Miranda-Talenti估计确保数值格式的适定性并推导误差估计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Monge-Ampère方程是二阶完全非线性偏微分方程的典型代表，其粘性解的数值逼近具有挑战性。现有方法在处理该方程时存在数值稳定性或精度方面的问题，需要设计新的数值格式来更好地近似其粘性解。

Method: 提出C0内部惩罚方法，基于离散Miranda-Talenti估计进行设计和分析。利用消失矩表示将Monge-Ampère方程转化为四阶半线性方程并附加边界条件，通过离散Miranda-Talenti估计保证数值格式的适定性。

Result: 通过离散Miranda-Talenti估计确保了所提数值格式的适定性，并成功推导了误差估计。

Conclusion: 所提出的C0内部惩罚方法基于离散Miranda-Talenti估计，能够有效地近似Monge-Ampère方程的粘性解，并具有良好的数值稳定性和收敛性。

Abstract: Monge-Ampère equation is a prototype second-order fully nonlinear partial differential equation. In this paper, we propose a new idea to design and analyze the $C^0$ interior penalty method to approximation the viscosity solution of the Monge-Ampère equation. The new methods is inspired from the discrete Miranda-Talenti estimate. Based on the vanishing moment representation, we approximate the Monge-Ampère equation by the fourth order semi-linear equation with some additional boundary conditions. We will use the discrete Miranda-Talenti estimates to ensure the well-posedness of the numerical scheme and derive the error estimates.

</details>


### [544] [Analysis of continuous data assimilation with large (or even infinite) nudging parameters](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00396)
*Amanda Diegel,Xuejian Li,Leo G. Rebholz*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文研究了偏微分方程离散化中连续数据同化（CDA）的 nudging 参数可任意大的情形，证明在隐式时间步进方法下，热方程和Navier-Stokes方程能获得长时间最优精度解，且误差界不随 nudging 参数增大而增长。关键创新在于基于加权内积分解误差，该内积包含了对称构造的 nudging 项，并证明该加权内积下的投影误差是最优且独立于 nudging 参数的。将这一思想应用于BDF2-有限元离散格式，证明了当 nudging 参数足够大时，CDA能长时间保持最优精度。附有热方程、流体输运方程、Navier-Stokes和Cahn-Hilliard方程的数值验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有理论结果要么证明最优精度但误差随 nudging 参数缩放，要么证明与 nudging 参数无关但精度次优。本文试图填补这一空白，即在 nudging 参数可任意大时，同时实现最优精度和与 nudging 参数无关的误差界。

Method: 提出基于加权内积的误差分解方法——该内积通过对称构造的方式融入 nudging 项，证明该加权内积下的投影误差具有最优性和 nudging 参数无关性。并将该方法应用于BDF2-有限元离散的热方程和Navier-Stokes方程。

Result: 证明对于热方程和Navier-Stokes方程（使用隐式时间步进），当 nudging 参数足够大时，CDA能获得长时间最优精度解，且误差界不随 nudging 参数增大而增长。数值实验在热方程、流体输运方程、Navier-Stokes和Cahn-Hilliard方程上验证了理论。

Conclusion: 本文提出的加权内积误差分解方法成功解决了 nudging 参数可任意大时连续数据同化的最优精度问题，为CDA理论提供了更优的分析框架。

Abstract: This paper considers continuous data assimilation (CDA) in partial differential equation (PDE) discretizations where nudging parameters can be taken arbitrarily large. We prove that long-time optimally accurate solutions are obtained for such parameters for the heat and Navier-Stokes equations (using implicit time stepping methods), with error bounds that do not grow as the nudging parameter gets large. Existing theoretical results either prove optimal accuracy but with the error scaled by the nudging parameter, or suboptimal accuracy that is independent of it. The key idea to the improved analysis is to decompose the error based on a weighted inner product that incorporates the (symmetric by construction) nudging term, and prove that the projection error from this weighted inner product is optimal and independent of the nudging parameter. We apply the idea to BDF2 - finite element discretizations of the heat equation and Navier-Stokes equations to show that with CDA, they will admit optimal long-time accurate solutions independent of the nudging parameter, for nudging parameters large enough. Several numerical tests are given for the heat equation, fluid transport equation, Navier-Stokes, and Cahn-Hilliard that illustrate the theory.

</details>


### [545] [A time-adaptive algorithm for pressure dominated flows: a heuristic estimator](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00428)
*Ivan Prusak,Davide Torlo,Monica Nonino,Gianluigi Rozza*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种针对压力主导的CFD和FSI问题的启发式时间步长自适应算法，利用BDF2与BDF3解之间的差异作为时间误差估计器，并通过牛顿型非线性求解器单步修正来近似BDF3解，数值实验验证了该方法在背向阶梯流和二维血流动力学FSI基准测试中的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在压力主导的CFD和FSI问题中，许多基于隐式-显式时间格式交替的时间自适应算法无法捕捉压力场的快速瞬态动力学特性，需要一种能够准确估计时间离散误差的自适应算法。

Method: 提出一种基于BDF2和BDF3时间离散格式的时间误差估计器：通过单步牛顿型非线性求解器修正BDF2解来近似隐式BDF3解，将两者之差作为自适应时间步长的误差估计指标。

Result: 在雷诺数300的背向阶梯流CFD算例和二维血流动力学FSI基准测试中，数值实验验证了该方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 该方法能够有效捕捉压力主导流动中的快速瞬态动力学，为CFD和FSI问题提供可靠的时间自适应求解策略。

Abstract: This work aims to introduce a heuristic timestep-adaptive algorithm for Computational Fluid Dynamics (CFD) and Fluid-Structure Interaction (FSI) problems where the flow is dominated by the pressure. In such scenarios, many time-adaptive algorithms based on the interplay of implicit and explicit time schemes fail to capture the fast transient dynamics of pressure fields. We present an algorithm that relies on a temporal error estimator using Backward Differentiation Formulae (BDF$k$) of order $k=2,3$. Specifically, we demonstrate that the implicit BDF$3$ solution can be well approximated by applying a single Newton-type nonlinear solver correction to the implicit BDF$2$ solution. The difference between these solutions determines our adaptive temporal error estimator. The effectiveness of our approach is confirmed by numerical experiments conducted on a backward-facing step flow CFD test case with Reynolds number $300$ and on a two-dimensional haemodynamics FSI benchmark.

</details>


### [546] [Randomized methods for computing joint eigenvalues, with applications to multiparameter eigenvalue problems and root finding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00500)
*Haoze He,Daniel Kressner,Bor Plestenjak*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文针对一族（近似）交换矩阵的联合特征值数值计算问题，提出了一种基于随机线性组合的特征向量来计算单侧或双侧瑞利商的简单方法，并通过理论和数值实验验证了该方法能够准确计算半单联合特征值，并提升现有求解器的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 该任务主要源自多参数特征值问题和多元多项式系统的求解需求，这两类问题中需要计算一族交换矩阵的联合特征值。

Method: 对一族矩阵构造随机线性组合，计算该随机组合的特征向量，然后利用这些特征向量通过单侧或双侧瑞利商来逼近联合特征值。

Result: 数值实验表明该随机化方法能够准确计算半单联合特征值，并改进现有求解器的性能。

Conclusion: 所提出的基于随机线性组合与瑞利商的简单方法能够有效且准确地计算（近似）交换矩阵族的联合特征值。

Abstract: It is well known that a family of $n\times n$ commuting matrices can be simultaneously triangularized by a unitary similarity transformation. The diagonal entries of the triangular matrices define the $n$ joint eigenvalues of the family. In this work, we consider the task of numerically computing approximations to such joint eigenvalues for a family of (nearly) commuting matrices. This task arises, for example, in solvers for multiparameter eigenvalue problems and systems of multivariate polynomials, which are our main motivations. We propose and analyze a simple approach that computes eigenvalues as one-sided or two-sided Rayleigh quotients from eigenvectors of a random linear combination of the matrices in the family. We provide some analysis and numerous numerical examples, showing that such randomized approaches can compute semisimple joint eigenvalues accurately and lead to improved performance of existing solvers.

</details>


### [547] [Space-Time Isogeometric Method for a Nonlocal Parabolic Problem](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00450)
*Sudhakar Chaudhary,Shreya Chauhan,Monica Montardini*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文针对含非局部扩散系数的抛物问题，提出了时空等几何离散化方法，证明了连续和离散变分格式解的存在唯一性，建立了先验误差估计，采用Picard方法线性化并设计预条件子，通过数值实验验证了理论结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决含非局部扩散系数的抛物问题在时空等几何框架下的数值求解需求，需要建立严格的理论基础（解的存在唯一性、误差估计）并设计高效数值算法。

Method: 采用时空等几何离散化方法处理抛物问题；利用泛函分析证明连续与离散变分格式解的存在唯一性；建立先验误差估计；使用Picard迭代法对非线性系统进行线性化；设计适用于线性化系统的预条件子。

Result: 证明了连续和离散时空变分格式解的存在唯一性；建立了时空等几何格式的先验误差估计；数值实验结果验证了理论分析的正确性。

Conclusion: 时空等几何方法能有效求解含非局部扩散系数的抛物问题，所建立的理论保证和数值算法具备可靠性和有效性。

Abstract: In the present work, we focus on the space-time isogeometric discretization of a parabolic problem with a nonlocal diffusion coefficient. The existence and uniqueness of the solution for the continuous space-time variational formulation are proven. We prove the existence of the discrete solution and also establish the a priori error estimate for the space-time isogeometric scheme. The non-linear system is linearized through Picards method and a suitable preconditioner for the linearized system is provided. Finally, to confirm the theoretical findings, results of some numerical experiments are presented.

</details>


### [548] [The weak form of the SDOF and MDOF equation of motion, part I: Theory](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00441)
*Nikolaos Karaliolios,Dimitrios L. Karabalis*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种将初始条件问题转化为边值问题，使用任意数量线性无关逼近函数求解SDOF和MDOF运动方程弱形式的通用数值方法，是该系列三篇论文的第一部分。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为单自由度（SDOF）和多自由度（MDOF）系统的运动方程开发一种通用的数值求解框架，通过将初始条件问题转化为边值问题来简化求解过程。

Method: 首先获得SDOF和MDOF运动方程的弱形式；然后将原始初始条件问题转化为边值问题；求解边值问题后再转换回初始条件问题；最后概述了使用任意数量线性无关逼近函数构造数值方法的一般框架。

Result: 论文为该系列的第一部分，尚未呈现具体数值结果；后续第二部分将使用任意高阶Bernstein多项式得到具体数值方法，第三部分展示收敛性的数值证据。

Conclusion: 建立了一种通用的数值方法框架，该框架可通过任意线性无关函数族（如后续将使用的Bernstein多项式）构造求解动力系统运动方程的高阶数值方法。

Abstract: The weak form of the SDOF and MDOF equations of motion are obtained. The original initial conditions problem is transformed into a boundary value problem. The boundary value problem is then solved and transformed back to the initial conditions one. Subsequently, a general method for obtaining numerical methods using an arbitrary number of linearly independent approximating functions is outlined.
  This is part one of a series of three papers, in the second of which a numerical method is obtained, using Bernstein polynomials of arbitrarily high order. The numerical evidence for the convergence of the method will be presented in the third part paper.

</details>


### [549] [An extended Milstein scheme for effective weak approximation of diffusions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00524)
*Yuga Iguchi,Toshihiro Yamada*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新的多维扩散过程离散化方案，作为Milstein格式的扩展。该方案显式给出，使用与Euler-Maruyama（EM）方案相同数量的随机变量（高斯变量），且弱收敛阶为1。与EM/Milstein等经典一阶方案相比，新方案包含更少的主导误差项，因而预期提供更精确的估计。当扩散系数包含小参数时，新方案的弱误差显著降低。在金融亚洲期权定价的模拟中，新方案显著优于EM/Milstein方案，而EM与Milstein之间则无性能差异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的Euler-Maruyama和Milstein等一阶弱收敛方案虽然广泛应用，但存在较大的主导误差项，影响数值精度。特别是在扩散系数包含小参数的多维扩散过程中，误差累积更为显著。因此，需要设计一种减少误差项、计算效率与EM方案相当但精度更高的离散化方法，以提升多维扩散过程的模拟准确性。

Method: 提出一种作为Milstein格式扩展的新型显式离散化方案。该方案使用与EM方案相同数量的高斯随机变量进行模拟，避免了Milstein方案中处理双重随机积分的复杂性。通过理论分析证明其弱收敛阶为1，并对比了与EM/Milstein方案的前导误差项结构。

Result: 理论分析表明，新方案的弱收敛阶为1，但前导误差项数量少于经典EM/Milstein方案。当扩散系数包含小参数时，新方案的弱误差显著减小。在亚洲期权定价的数值实验中，新方案在精度上显著优于EM和Milstein方案；有趣的是，EM和Milstein方案之间未观察到性能差异。

Conclusion: 新提出的离散化方案在保持一阶弱收敛和相同随机变量数量的前提下，通过减少误差项实现了更高的精度，特别适用于扩散系数含小参数的多维扩散过程。亚洲期权定价的数值结果表明该方案具有良好的实际应用价值。

Abstract: We propose a straightforward and effective method for discretizing multi-dimensional diffusion processes as an extension of Milstein scheme. The new scheme is explicitly given and can be simulated using Gaussian variates, requiring the same number of random variables as Euler-Maruyama (EM) scheme. We show that the proposed scheme has a weak convergence rate of one, which is consistent with other classical schemes like EM/Milstein schemes but involves fewer leading-order error terms. Due to the reduction of the error terms, the proposed scheme is expected to provide a more accurate estimation than alternative first-order schemes. We demonstrate that the weak error of the new scheme is effectively reduced compared with EM/Milstein schemes when the diffusion coefficients involve a small parameter. We conduct simulation studies on Asian option pricing in finance to showcase that our proposed scheme significantly outperforms EM/Milstein schemes, while interestingly, we find no differences in the performance between EM and Milstein schemes.

</details>


### [550] [Absolute-value based preconditioner for complex-shifted Laplacian systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00488)
*Xuelei Lin,Congcong Li,Sean Hon*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于绝对值预条件子的方法，用于高效求解复位移拉普拉斯系统。该方法将复位移拉普拉斯系统等价重写为2×2块实线性系统，利用均匀网格离散化下常系数拉普拉斯算子的Toeplitz结构，通过快速正弦变换实现块实矩阵绝对值的快速求逆。对于变系数情形，采用系数函数平均化后取其绝对值作为预条件子。理论证明了在复位移满足一定假设时，预条件矩阵的特征值绝对值具有与矩阵规模无关的上下界，从而保证MINRES求解器具有与规模无关的线性收敛率。数值实验表明即使假设不满足时该方法依然高效。整体算法复杂度为线性对数（近最优）复杂度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 复位移拉普拉斯系统在众多科学计算与工程应用中广泛出现，其高效求解具有重要的实际意义。现有求解方法在收敛性和计算复杂度方面仍存在改进空间，因此需要设计一种兼具快速可逆性和鲁棒收敛率的预条件子。

Method: (1) 将复位移拉普拉斯系统等价转化为2×2块实线性系统；(2) 利用Toeplitz结构，通过快速正弦变换实现块实矩阵绝对值的快速求逆；(3) 对变系数情形，采用系数平均化后取绝对值构造预条件子；(4) 理论分析在复位移满足一定假设下预条件矩阵的特征值性质；(5) 采用MINRES求解器进行迭代求解。

Result: 理论证明了在复位移满足一定假设时，预条件矩阵特征值绝对值具有与矩阵规模无关的上下界，确保MINRES的线性收敛率与矩阵规模无关。数值实验表明，即使不满足理论假设，所提预条件子依然保持高效。与多种先进预条件子的对比验证了其优越性。算法整体达到线性对数（近最优）复杂度。

Conclusion: 提出的基于绝对值的预条件子能够高效求解复位移拉普拉斯系统，具有良好的理论保证和数值表现，且算法复杂度接近最优，是一种具有竞争力的求解方案。

Abstract: The complex-shifted Laplacian systems arising in a wide range of applications. In this work, we propose an absolute-value based preconditioner for solving the complex-shifted Laplacian system. In our approach, the complex-shifted Laplacian system is equivalently rewritten as a $2\times 2$ block real linear system. With the Toeplitz structure of uniform-grid discretization of the constant-coefficient Laplacian operator, the absolute value of the block real matrix is fast invertible by means of fast sine transforms. For more general coefficient function, we then average the coefficient function and take the absolute value of the averaged matrix as our preconditioner. With assumptions on the complex shift, we theoretically prove that the eigenvalues of the preconditioned matrix in absolute value are upper and lower bounded by constants independent of matrix size, indicating a matrix-size independent linear convergence rate of MINRES solver. Interestingly, numerical results show that the proposed preconditioner is still efficient even if the assumptions on the complex shift are not met. The fast invertibility of the proposed preconditioner and the robust convergence rate of the preconditioned MINRES solver lead to a linearithmic (nearly optimal) complexity of the proposed solver. The proposed preconditioner is compared with several state-of-the-art preconditioners via several numerical examples to demonstrate the efficiency of the proposed preconditioner.

</details>


### [551] [A Review of Neural Network Solvers for Second-order Boundary Value Problems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00442)
*Ramesh Chandra Sau,Luowei Yin*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文综述了基于深度学习的偏微分方程求解器（PINN、WAN、DRM、VPINN），通过数值实验比较了损失函数形式和优化方法的重要性，给出了PINN的严格误差分析，并讨论了当前方法的局限性和瓶颈。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度学习求解PDE的方法近年来受到广泛关注，但缺乏对这些方法系统性的比较、损失函数与优化策略影响的深入理解，以及严格的误差分析，因此需要一篇综述性工作来厘清这些关键问题。

Method: 综述了PINN、WAN、DRM、VPINN四种深度学习PDE求解器，提供数值实验结果进行对比，分析损失函数形式和优化方法的影响，并对PINN进行了严格的误差分析。

Result: 数值实验表明损失函数的构造和优化方法对求解精度有显著影响；PINN的严格误差分析揭示了其收敛性和误差界。

Conclusion: 深度学习PDE求解器虽具有高精度和广泛适用性，但当前仍受限于损失函数设计、优化困难等瓶颈，需进一步发展以克服这些局限性。

Abstract: Deep learning-based partial differential equation(PDE) solvers have received much attention in the past few years. Methods of this category can solve a wide range of PDEs with high accuracy, typically by transforming the problems into highly nonlinear optimization problems of neural network parameters. This work reviews several deep learning solvers proposed a few years ago, including PINN, WAN, DRM, and VPINN. Numerical results are provided to make comparisons amongst them and address the importance of loss formulation and the optimization method. A rigorous error analysis for PINN is also presented. Finally, we discuss the current limitations and bottlenecks of these methods.

</details>


### [552] [A Priori Error Bounds for POD-ROMs for Fluids: A Brief Survey](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00621)
*Francesco Ballarin,Traian Iliescu*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文综述了基于POD的Galerkin降阶模型（ROM）在流体数值模拟中的先验误差界，概述了其主要组成部分、实际重要性及重要贡献。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: ROM的数值分析尚在发展中，本文旨在推进该方向，系统总结先验误差界的研究进展，以指导ROM的理论分析与实际应用。

Method: 采用综述方法，聚焦于POD-based ROM，梳理先验误差界的主要组成部分，并讨论其实际意义与关键文献贡献。

Result: 系统归纳了ROM先验误差界的核心要素，明确了其在实际计算中的指导价值，并总结了流体ROM先验误差界的重要研究成果。

Conclusion: 该综述为ROM数值分析提供了系统化的理论框架，有助于进一步推动降阶模型在流体力学中的可靠应用与发展。

Abstract: Galerkin reduced order models (ROMs), e.g., based on proper orthogonal decomposition (POD) or reduced basis methods, have achieved significant success in the numerical simulation of fluid flows. The ROM numerical analysis, however, is still being developed. In this paper, we take a step in this direction and present a survey of a priori error bounds, with a particular focus on POD-based ROMs. Specifically, we outline the main components of ROM a priori error bounds, emphasize their practical importance, and discuss significant contributions to a priori error bounds for ROMs for fluids.

</details>


### [553] [A note about high-order semi-implicit differentiation: application to a numerical integration scheme with Taylor-based compensated error](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00497)
*Loïc Michel,Jean-Pierre Barbot*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种三阶半隐式微分器作为互连半隐式欧拉双微分器算法的补充，通过泰勒展开改进实现实时处理中的灵活调参与应用，并用数值结果验证了方法的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为互连半隐式欧拉双微分器算法提供一种替代的灵活实现方案，以满足实时处理中对可调性与灵活性的需求。

Method: 基于泰勒展开细化，实现了一种三阶半隐式微分器，该算法与互连方法对偶，可灵活调参并适用于实时过程。

Result: 通过数值积分方案的示例展示了泰勒细化在改善全局收敛性方面的价值，数值结果支持了所提方法的正确性。

Conclusion: 提出的三阶半隐式微分器是对现有互连方法的有效补充，提供了更灵活的调参与实现方式，且在数值积分中表现出良好的全局收敛性。

Abstract: In this brief, we discuss the implementation of a third order semi-implicit differentiator as a complement of the recent work by the author that proposes an interconnected semi-implicit Euler double differentiators algorithm through Taylor expansion refinement. The proposed algorithm is dual to the interconnected approach since it offers alternative flexibility to be tuned and to be implemented in real-time processes. In particular, an application to a numerical integration scheme is presented as the Taylor refinement can be of interest to improve the global convergence. Numerical results are presented to support the rightness of the proposed method.

</details>


### [554] [A note on the relationship between PDE-based precision operators and Matérn covariances](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00471)
*Umberto Villa,Thomas O'Leary-Roseberry*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 该技术笔记总结了具有Matérn协方差的高斯随机场的边缘方差和相关长度与对应偏微分方程精度算子系数之间的关系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 建立随机场协方差参数（边缘方差、相关长度）与PDE精度算子系数之间的解析关系，以便更直观地参数化基于SPDE的随机场模型。

Method: 通过数学推导，分析Matérn协方差的高斯随机场及其对应的PDE精度算子的系数映射关系。

Result: 给出了边缘方差和相关长度到PDE精度算子系数的明确解析表达式。

Conclusion: 为实际应用中基于PDE的随机场建模提供了参数化的理论依据，便于将协方差参数直接转换为PDE系数。

Abstract: The purpose of this technical note is to summarize the relationship between the marginal variance and correlation length of a Gaussian random field with Matérn covariance and the coefficients of the corresponding partial-differential-equation (PDE)-based precision operator.

</details>


### [555] [A modified FC-Gram approximation algorithm with provable error bounds](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00722)
*Akash Anand,Prakash Nainwal*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文针对FC-Gram三角多项式逼近非周期函数的收敛性分析空白，提出了一种基于两点Hermite多项式显式延拓的改进算法，消除了预计算依赖，建立了可证明的误差界，并通过数值实验验证了理论与实际收敛率的一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: FC-Gram逼近算法在PDE数值求解中取得显著成功，但长期以来缺乏严格的收敛性理论分析，这一理论空白阻碍了算法的进一步优化与可靠性保障。

Method: 将原算法中基于隐式最小二乘的Gram多项式周期延拓替换为基于两点Hermite多项式的显式延拓，从而得到已知形式的延拓表达式，并基于此推导出可证明的误差界。

Result: 新算法消除了对昂贵预计算延拓数据的依赖，支持灵活调整延拓长度；建立了理论误差界限；数值实验表明数值收敛率与理论预测一致。

Conclusion: 改进的FC-Gram算法在保持原算法高效性的同时，获得了显式延拓和可证明收敛性的优势，为后续理论分析和实际应用提供了更坚实的数学基础。

Abstract: The FC-Gram trigonometric polynomial approximation of a non-periodic function that interpolates the function on equispaced grids was introduced in 2010 by Bruno and Lyon [J. Comput. Phys, 229(6):2009-2033, 2010]. Since then, the approximation algorithm and its further refinements have been used extensively in numerical solutions of various PDE-based problems, and it has had impressive success in handling challenging configurations. While much computational evidence exists in the literature confirming the rapid convergence of FC-Gram approximations, a theoretical convergence analysis has remained open. In this paper, we study a modified FC-Gram algorithm where the implicit least-squares-based periodic extensions of the Gram polynomials are replaced with an explicit extension utilizing two-point Hermite polynomials. This modification brings in two significant advantages - (i) as the extensions are known explicitly, the need to use computationally expensive precomputed extension data is eliminated, which, in turn, facilitates seamlessly changing the extension length, and (ii) allows for establishing provable error bounds for the modified approximations. We show that the numerical convergence rates are consistent with those predicted by the theory through a variety of computational experiments.

</details>


### [556] [Predicting nonlinear-flow regions in highly heterogeneous porous media using adaptive constitutive laws and neural networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00533)
*Chiara Giovannini,Alessio Fumagalli,Francesco Patacchini*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文利用FP23自适应模型生成数据，训练神经网络对多孔介质中的网格单元进行分类，判断其应使用Darcy定律还是Darcy-Forchheimer定律，从而加速高低速流区域划分，避免全局使用高成本非线性模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在多孔介质中，渗透率不均导致流速差异大，高速区需用Darcy-Forchheimer非线性定律，但全局使用计算成本高。需要一种方法先验地确定哪些区域需使用非线性模型，以降低计算开销。

Method: 利用FP23中的自适应模型，针对不同输入参数（如边界条件、惯性系数）生成域划分数据；然后训练神经网络对每个网格单元进行分类（Darcy或Darcy-Forchheimer），替代直接求解非线性自适应模型。

Result: 通过两个测试案例，分析了代价函数、奇偶图、精确率-召回率曲线和ROC曲线，验证了神经网络分类的有效性。

Conclusion: 训练神经网络可以高效地预测高低速流区域的划分，加速自适应模型的计算过程，降低数值模拟成本。

Abstract: In a porous medium featuring heterogeneous permeabilities, a wide range of fluid velocities may be recorded, so that significant inertial and frictional effects may arise in high-speed regions. In such parts, the link between pressure gradient and velocity is typically made via Darcy's law, which may fail to account for these effects; instead, the Darcy Forchheimer law, which introduces a nonlinear term, may be more adequate. Applying the Darcy Forchheimer law globally in the domain is very costly numerically and, rather, should only be done where strictly necessary. The question of finding a prori the subdomain where to restrict the use of the Darcy Forchheimer law was recently answered in FP23 by using an adaptive model: given a threshold on the flow velocity, the model locally selects the more appropriate law as it is being solved. At the end of the resolution, each mesh cell is flagged as being in the Darcy or Darcy Forchheimer subdomain. Still, this model is nonlinear itself and thus relatively expensive to run. In this paper, to accelerate the subdivision of the domain into low and high speed regions, we instead exploit the adaptive model from FP23 to generate partitioning data given an array of different input parameters, such as boundary conditions and inertial coefficients, and then train neural networks on these data classifying each mesh cell as Darcy or not. Two test cases are studied to illustrate the results, where cost functions, parity plots, precision-recall plots and receiver operating characteristic curves are analyzed.

</details>


### [557] [Error Analysis and Parallel Scaling Study of A Parareal Parallel-in-Time Integration Algorithm for Particle-in-Fourier Schemes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00485)
*Sriramkrishnan Muralikrishnan,Robert Speck*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于parareal的相空间时间并行化方案，用于Vlasov-Poisson系统的粒子-傅里叶（PIF）离散格式，通过粗粒度的非均匀快速傅里叶变换或标准PIC方案结合时间粗化作为粗传播器，实现了3D-3V算例中高达4-6倍的加速，并在JUWELS booster超算上达到约10亿粒子/秒的推送速率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的parareal方法依赖于空间粗化（粗化粒子或傅里叶模态），但这对于PIF方案并不适用或有效。因此需要一种新的时间并行化策略，在相空间中实现parareal算法以提升PIF方案的并行效率。

Method: 采用PIF结合宽松容差的非均匀快速傅里叶变换（或标准PIC方案）与时间粗化作为粗传播器，替代传统的空间粗化策略；在开源的性能可移植库IPPL中实现了时空并行化，并在高达1536块A100 GPU上进行了扩展性研究。

Result: 在Landau阻尼、双流不稳定性、Penning阱三个3D-3V测试算例中验证了算法的准确性；与纯空间并行化相比，时空并行化提供了4-6倍的加速；在基准等离子体小型应用中达到约10亿粒子/秒的推送速率。

Conclusion: 所提出的相空间时间并行化方案有效克服了PIF格式下传统parareal空间粗化的局限，在保持精度的同时显著提升了并行效率，为大规模等离子体动力学模拟提供了一种高效的时空并行策略。

Abstract: We propose a parareal based time parallelization scheme in the phase-space for the particle-in-Fourier (PIF) discretization of the Vlasov-Poisson system used in kinetic plasma simulations. We use PIF with a coarse tolerance for the nonuniform fast Fourier transforms, or the standard particle-in-cell scheme, combined with temporal coarsening, as coarse propagators. This is different from the typical spatial coarsening of particles and/or Fourier modes for parareal, which are not possible or effective for PIF schemes. We perform an error analysis of the algorithm and verify the results numerically with Landau damping, two-stream instability, and Penning trap test cases in 3D-3V. We also implement the space-time parallelization of the PIF schemes in the open-source, performance-portable library IPPL and conduct scaling studies up to 1536 A100 GPUs on the JUWELS booster supercomputer. The space-time parallelization utilizing the parareal algorithm for the time parallelization provides up to $4-6$ times speedup compared to spatial parallelization alone and achieves a push rate of around 1 billion particles per second for the benchmark plasma mini-apps considered.

</details>


### [558] [AMFR-W numerical methods for solving high dimensional SABR/LIBOR PDE models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00559)
*J. G. López-Salas,S. Pérez-Rodríguez,C. Vázquez*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文针对利率衍生品定价的PDE模型，提出了基于高阶时间AMFR-W方法的数值求解方案，并引入稀疏网格组合技术处理高维空间问题，同时采用改进的齐次Neumann边界条件以避免边界层困难。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为利率衍生品定价的PDE模型开发高效、高精度的数值求解方法，以应对混合空间导数、高维空间（多远期利率）及边界层效应等挑战。

Method: 采用基于近似矩阵分解（AMF）的高阶时间AMFR-W方法处理混合空间导数；结合稀疏网格组合技术缓解高维空间计算负担；引入改进的齐次Neumann边界条件替代Dirichlet边界条件，并为此设计了修改的组合技术以保持精度。

Result: 高阶时间收敛允许使用更大时间步长，算子分裂大幅减少计算时间；稀疏网格组合技术相比全网格显著提升AMFR-W效率并支持并行化；修改的组合技术克服了标准组合技术在Neumann边界条件下精度下降的问题。

Conclusion: AMFR-W方法与稀疏网格组合技术及改进Neumann边界条件的结合，为高维利率衍生品定价PDE模型提供了一种高效、高精度且可并行化的数值方案。

Abstract: In this work we mainly develop a new numerical methodology to solve a PDE model recently proposed in the literature for pricing interest rate derivatives. More precisely, we use high order in time AMFR-W methods, which belong to a class of W-methods based on Approximate Matrix Factorization (AMF) and are especially suitable in the presence of mixed spatial derivatives. High-order convergence in time allows larger time steps which combined with the splitting of the involved operators, highly reduces the computational time for a given accuracy. Moreover, the consideration of a large number of underlying forward rates makes the PDE problem high dimensional in space, so the use of AMFR-W methods with a sparse grids combination technique represents another innovative aspect, making AMFR-W more efficient than with full grids and opening the possibility of parallelization. Also the consideration of new homogeneous Neumann boundary conditions provides another original feature to avoid the difficulties associated to the presence of boundary layers when using Dirichlet ones, especially in advection-dominated regimes. These Neumann boundary conditions motivate the introduction of a modified combination technique to overcome a decrease in the accuracy of the standard combination technique.

</details>


### [559] [Fully discrete energy-dissipative and conservative discrete gradient particle methods for a class of continuity equations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00533)
*Jingwei Hu,Samuel Q. Van Fleet,Andy T. S. Wan*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文针对一类具有变分结构的非线性连续性方程（如聚集扩散方程和Landau方程），提出了一种保结构的粒子方法。通过引入与能量泛函变分导数相关的密度依赖双线性形式，证明了适当的粒子方法满足与正则化能量的相容性条件。在此基础上，结合离散梯度时间积分器，实现了全离散层面的能量耗散和质量守恒。对于Landau方程，该方法还能同时守恒动量和动能。数值实验验证了方法的耗散与守恒性质。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 已有保结构粒子方法分别针对聚集扩散方程和Landau方程提出，但缺乏一个统一的框架来系统处理这类具有变分结构的非线性连续性方程，并实现在全离散层面同时保持能量耗散与多个守恒量（质量、动量、动能等）的目标。

Method: 1) 将连续性方程表述为与能量泛函变分导数相关的密度依赖双线性形式；2) 证明适当的粒子方法满足与正则化能量的相容性条件；3) 引入离散梯度时间积分器，实现全离散层面的能量耗散和质量守恒；4) 针对Landau方程，额外证明动量与动能的守恒性。

Result: 所提出的方法在全离散层面实现了能量的单调耗散和质量的精确守恒；针对Landau方程，还实现了动量和动能的同时守恒；数值算例验证了这些守恒和耗散性质。

Conclusion: 本文建立了统一的保结构粒子方法框架，适用于一类具有变分结构的非线性连续性方程，能够在全离散层面同时保持能量耗散与多个不变量守恒，为相关问题的数值求解提供了可靠工具。

Abstract: Structure-preserving particle methods have recently been proposed for a class of nonlinear continuity equations, including aggregation-diffusion equation in [J. Carrillo, K. Craig, F. Patacchini, Calc. Var., 58 (2019), pp. 53] and the Landau equation in [J. Carrillo, J. Hu., L. Wang, J. Wu, J. Comput. Phys. X, 7 (2020), pp. 100066]. One common feature to these equations is that they both admit some variational formulation, which upon proper regularization, leads to particle approximations dissipating the energy and conserving some quantities simultaneously at the semi-discrete level. In this paper, we formulate continuity equations with a density dependent bilinear form associated with the variational derivative of the energy functional and prove that appropriate particle methods satisfy a compatibility condition with its regularized energy. This enables us to utilize discrete gradient time integrators and show that the energy can be dissipated and the mass conserved simultaneously at the fully discrete level. In the case of the Landau equation, we prove that our approach also conserves the momentum and kinetic energy at the fully discrete level. Several numerical examples are presented to demonstrate the dissipative and conservative properties of our proposed method.

</details>


### [560] [Numerical Analysis of the Parallel Orbital-Updating Approach for Eigenvalue Problems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00767)
*Xiaoying Dai,Yan Li,Bin Yang,Aihui Zhou*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文对并行轨道更新方法（一种用于求解大规模特征值问题的轨道/特征函数迭代方法）进行了数值分析，基于拟正交性的研究，给出了线性特征值问题的收敛性和误差估计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 并行轨道更新方法在电子结构计算等需要大量特征对的场景中已被证明高效，但缺乏严格的数值分析理论支撑，因此需要对其收敛性和误差进行理论分析。

Method: 通过研究拟正交性（quasi-orthogonality），对并行轨道更新方法求解线性特征值问题进行数值分析，推导收敛性和误差估计。

Result: 给出了并行轨道更新方法在线性特征值问题中的收敛性证明和数值近似的误差估计。

Conclusion: 该研究为并行轨道更新方法提供了坚实的数值分析基础，验证了其在求解线性特征值问题时的理论可靠性。

Abstract: The parallel orbital-updating approach is an orbital/eigenfunction iteration based approach for solving eigenvalue problems when many eigenpairs are required. It has been proven to be efficient, for instance, in electronic structure calculations. In this paper, based on the investigation of a quasi-orthogonality, we present the numerical analysis of the parallel orbital-updating approach for linear eigenvalue problems, including convergence and error estimates of the numerical approximations.

</details>


### [561] [Dimension reduction for large-scale stochastic systems with non-zero initial states and controlled diffusion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00581)
*Martin Redmann*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文针对非零初始状态的大规模受控随机微分方程，提出了两种新的降维策略：第一种方法通过将系统转化为零初始状态并分析受控扩散框架下的主导子空间与误差界；第二种方法分别对控制与初始状态动力学进行独立降维，并给出基于两类Hankel奇异值的后验误差界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有大规模随机微分方程的模型降维方法多针对零初始状态设计，而对于非零初始状态的受控系统缺乏有效的降维策略。本文旨在填补这一空白，为非零初始状态下的大规模受控随机微分方程建立系统性的降维框架。

Method: 方法一：将非零初始状态系统转化为零初始状态的受控扩散系统，在受控扩散框架下分析主导子空间并推导降维误差界，误差界与基于新定义Gramians的Hankel奇异值相关。方法二：分别对控制动力学和初始状态动力学进行独立降维，利用不同的Gramians构建降阶模型，并指出其与主导子空间的关系。

Result: 为第一种方法推导了包含Hankel奇异值的先验误差界；为第二种方法推导了涉及两类Hankel奇异值的后验误差界；明确了两种方法中Gramians与主导子空间的关联。

Conclusion: 本文为非零初始状态的受控随机微分方程提供了两种可行的降维方案，分别具有先验和后验误差保证，拓展了随机系统模型降阶的理论边界。

Abstract: In this paper, we establish new strategies to reduce the dimension of large-scale controlled stochastic differential equations with non-zero initial states. The first approach transforms the original setting into a stochastic system with zero initial states. This transformation naturally leads to equations with controlled diffusion. A detailed analysis of dominant subspaces and bounds for the reduction error is provided in this controlled diffusion framework. Subsequently, we introduce a reduced system for the original framework and prove an a-priori error bound for the first ansatz. This bound involves so-called Hankel singular values that are linked to a new pair of Gramians. A second strategy is presented that is based on the idea of reducing control and initial state dynamics separately. Here, different Gramians are used in order to derive a reduced model and their relation to dominant subspaces are pointed out. We also show an a posteriori error bound for the second approach involving two types of Hankel singular values.

</details>


### [562] [Convergence analysis of exponential time differencing scheme for the nonlocal Cahn-Hilliard equation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00572)
*Danni Zhang,Dongling Wang*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文对非局部Cahn-Hilliard方程的一阶和二阶指数时间差分格式进行了严格的收敛性证明，通过引入新的误差分解公式和高阶一致性分析，在自然约束条件下建立了数值解的ℓ∞有界性，并推导出了最优收敛速率，数值实验验证了所提格式的精度和效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 非局部Cahn-Hilliard方程缺少高阶扩散项，这给其收敛性分析带来了显著挑战。现有方法难以直接适用于该方程的ETD格式收敛性证明，因此需要发展新的分析技术来填补这一理论空白。

Method: 空间上采用Fourier谱配置法离散，时间上使用基于ETD的多步格式。引入新的误差分解公式，并结合高阶一致性分析技术，将数值解视为精确解的扰动，在自然约束条件下建立数值解的ℓ∞有界性，进而推导最优收敛速率。

Result: 在ℓ∞(0,T;H_h^{-1})∩ℓ^2(0,T;ℓ^2)范数下获得了最优收敛速率。数值实验验证了格式的精度和效率，包括收敛性测试和长期粗化动力学观测。

Conclusion: 所提出的ETD格式对于非局部Cahn-Hilliard方程是收敛且高效的，理论分析框架克服了缺少高阶扩散项带来的困难，为更广泛的非局部模型数值分析提供了新途径。

Abstract: In this paper, we present a rigorous proof of the convergence of first order and second order exponential time differencing (ETD) schemes for solving the nonlocal Cahn-Hilliard (NCH) equation. The spatial discretization employs the Fourier spectral collocation method, while the time discretization is implemented using ETD-based multistep schemes. The absence of a higher-order diffusion term in the NCH equation poses a significant challenge to its convergence analysis. To tackle this, we introduce new error decomposition formulas and employ the higher-order consistency analysis. These techniques enable us to establish the $\ell^\infty$ bound of numerical solutions under some natural constraints. By treating the numerical solution as a perturbation of the exact solution, we derive optimal convergence rates in $\ell^\infty(0,T;H_h^{-1})\cap \ell^2(0,T; \ell^2)$. We conduct several numerical experiments to validate the accuracy and efficiency of the proposed schemes, including convergence tests and the observation of long-term coarsening dynamics.

</details>


### [563] [Constructing stable, high-order finite-difference operators on point clouds over complex geometries](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00809)
*Jason Hicken,Ge Yan,Sharanjeet Kaur*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 提出了一种在点云上构建高阶、对角范数、第一导数SBP（求和-by-部分）算子的算法，利用笛卡尔切割网格自动生成中间网格来定义稀疏模式和提供积分规则，通过求解稀疏线性不等式系统计算对角范数，并验证了在线性对流方程中的精度和稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大多数高阶SBP算子需要符合高阶网格结构，这限制了其在复杂几何上的应用；为了摆脱这一限制，本文旨在开发一种无需高质量结构化网格、能在点云上构建稳定高阶SBP算子的方法。

Method: 使用笛卡尔切割网格自动生成临时网格来定义算子稀疏模式和中间积分规则；构建基于单元的局部SBP差分算子并组装成全局算子；通过内点算法求解稀疏线性不等式系统来计算正定对角质量矩阵（对角范数）；补充人工耗散算子以用于双曲问题求解。

Result: 确认了对角范数存在的条件，研究了对角范数项的分布规律，数值实验验证了点云SBP算子在线性对流方程上的精度和稳定性。

Conclusion: 该算法成功构建了适用于点云的高阶SBP算子，虽然使用了中间网格但可自动生成并丢弃，无需人工高质量网格，为复杂几何上的稳定高阶差分格式提供了可行方案。

Abstract: High-order difference operators with the summation-by-parts (SBP) property can be used to build stable discretizations of hyperbolic conservation laws; however, most high-order SBP operators require a conforming, high-order mesh for the domain of interest. To circumvent this requirement, we present an algorithm for building high-order, diagonal-norm, first-derivative SBP operators on point clouds over level-set geometries. The algorithm is not mesh-free, since it uses a Cartesian cut-cell mesh to define the sparsity pattern of the operators and to provide intermediate quadrature rules; however, the mesh is generated automatically and can be discarded once the SBP operators have been constructed. Using this temporary mesh, we construct local, cell-based SBP difference operators that are assembled into global SBP operators. We identify conditions for the existence of a positive-definite diagonal mass matrix, and we compute the diagonal norm by solving a sparse system of linear inequalities using an interior-point algorithm. We also describe an artificial dissipation operator that complements the first-derivative operators when solving hyperbolic problems, although the dissipation is not required for stability. The numerical results confirm the conditions under which a diagonal norm exists and study the distribution of the norm's entries. In addition, the results verify the accuracy and stability of the point-cloud SBP operators using the linear advection equation.

</details>


### [564] [Factorization of a prime matrix in even blocks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00627)
*Haoming Wang*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文定义“素数矩阵”为行数和列数均为素数的矩阵，研究了将矩阵分解为素数矩阵张量积之和的充要条件，并证明当矩阵分块对角线上块两两交换时可实现此类分解。算法复杂度为O(n^{5/2})，且第5节证明该分解成立当且仅当哥德巴赫猜想成立。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索素数矩阵张量积分解的充要条件，以及该分解与经典数论问题（哥德巴赫猜想）之间的深层联系。

Method: 定义了“素数矩阵”（行数和列数均为素数的矩阵），通过分块对角线上块的交换性条件，建立了矩阵分解为素数矩阵张量积之和的充要条件，并分析了算法的计算复杂度。

Result: 给出了矩阵可分解为素数矩阵张量积之和的若干充要条件（如均匀分块对角线上块两两交换），算法复杂度为O(n^{5/2})，并且第5节的分解等价于哥德巴赫猜想（每个大于2的偶数可表示为两个素数之和）。

Conclusion: 该研究建立了矩阵分解理论与哥德巴赫猜想之间的等价关系，表明该分解问题的可解性本质上等价于一个未解决的数论猜想，具有理论深度。

Abstract: In this paper, a matrix is said to be prime if the row and column of this matrix are both prime numbers. We establish various necessary and sufficient conditions for developing matrices into the sum of tensor products of prime matrices. For example, if the diagonal of a matrix blocked evenly are pairwise commutative, it yields such a decomposition. The computational complexity of multiplication of these algorithms is shown to be $O(n^{5/2})$. In the section 5, a decomposition is proved to hold if and only if every even natural number greater than 2 is the sum of two prime numbers.

</details>


### [565] [A Nonconforming Virtual Element Method for Advection-Diffusion-Reaction Problems with CIP Stabilization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00612)
*Carlo Lovadina,Ilaria Perugia,Manuel Trezzi*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文针对对流-扩散-反应问题，提出了一种采用连续内罚（CIP）稳定化的非协调虚拟元方法（VEM）。该方法基于标准变分公式（无斜对称化），通过Nitsche技术施加边界条件，并使用增强型VEM及“DoFi-DoFi”稳定化。证明了方法的稳定性并推导了h版本误差估计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为对流-扩散-反应问题设计一种稳定、精确且能处理复杂网格的数值方法，克服传统有限元方法在非协调或高雷诺数情况下的数值不稳定性。

Method: 采用非协调虚拟元方法（VEM），结合连续内罚（CIP）稳定化处理对流主导项；使用标准变分公式（避免斜对称化）并利用Nitsche方法弱施加边界条件；采用增强型VEM框架及“DoFi-DoFi”稳定化处理扩散和反应项。

Result: 证明了所提方法的稳定性，并推导了h版本（网格尺寸相关）的误差估计，表明方法在理论上的收敛性和可靠性。

Conclusion: 所提出的非协调VEM结合CIP稳定化能有效求解对流-扩散-反应问题，理论分析验证了方法的稳定性和收敛性，为实际应用提供了理论支撑。

Abstract: We study a nonconforming virtual element method (VEM) for advection-diffusion-reaction problems with continuous interior penalty (CIP) stabilization. The design of the method is based on a standard variational formulation of the problem (no skew-symmetrization), and boundary conditions are imposed with a Nitsche technique. We use the enhanced version of VEM, with a ``DoFi-DoFi'' stabilization in the diffusion and reaction terms. We prove stability of the proposed method and derive $h$-version error estimates.

</details>


### [566] [hp-discontinuous Galerkin method for the generalized Burgers-Huxley equation with weakly singular kernels](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00818)
*Sumit Mahajan,Arbaz Khan*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文研究了带记忆项的广义Burgers-Huxley方程的hp-间断Galerkin时间步进方法，推导了半离散和全离散格式的先验误差估计，并通过数值实验验证了方法的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 广义Burgers-Huxley方程是一类非线性对流-扩散-反应问题，带有弱奇异核的记忆项增加了数值求解的难度。现有方法在处理此类问题的hp-自适应框架下的收敛性分析尚不充分，有必要建立严格的误差估计理论。

Method: 采用hp-间断Galerkin时间步进方法进行半离散化，推导了依赖于局部网格尺寸、多项式次数和解正则性的先验误差估计，在能量范数下达到最优收敛阶。全离散格式先采用hp-有限元方法（协调元），再采用hp-间断Galerkin方法。

Result: 建立了全离散格式的适定性和稳定性，给出了相应的先验误差估计。通过一系列数值测试问题验证了所提方法的有效性。

Conclusion: hp-DG时间步进方法能有效求解带记忆项的非线性Burgers-Huxley方程，理论分析与数值实验一致，证明了该方法的最优收敛性和可靠性。

Abstract: In this work, we investigate the $hp$-discontinuous Galerkin (DG) time-stepping method for the generalized Burgers-Huxley equation with memory, a non-linear advection-diffusion-reaction problem featuring weakly singular kernels. We derive a priori error estimates for the semi-discrete scheme using $hp$-DG time-stepping, with explicit dependence on the local mesh size, polynomial degree, and solution regularity, achieving optimal convergence in the energy norm. For the fully-discrete scheme, we initially implement the $hp$-finite element method (conforming), followed by the $hp$-discontinuous Galerkin method. We establish the well-posedness and stability of the fully-discrete scheme and provide corresponding a priori estimates. The effectiveness of the proposed method is demonstrated through numerical validation on a series of test problems.

</details>


### [567] [Absorbing Boundary Conditions for Variable Potential Schrödinger Equations via Titchmarsh-Weyl Theory](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00671)
*Matthias Ehrhardt,Chunxiong Zheng*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文提出一种新方法，通过有理函数逼近Titchmarsh-Weyl m函数（精确Dirichlet-to-Neumann算子）来模拟含一般变势的含时薛定谔方程，该方法克服了传统吸收边界条件的高频限制，实现了全频段精确的快速算法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的吸收边界条件在处理一般变势问题时存在高频限制，导致低频区域精度不足，需要一种能够覆盖全频段且计算高效的边界条件处理方法。

Method: 利用有理函数逼近Titchmarsh-Weyl m函数（即精确的Dirichlet-to-Neumann算子），其中有理逼近针对适当的谱参数进行构造。

Result: 所提方法克服了通常变势问题中吸收边界条件的高频限制，实现了全频段范围内的计算精度。

Conclusion: 该算法为含一般变势的含时薛定谔方程提供了一种快速、全频段精确的吸收边界条件计算方法。

Abstract: We propose a novel approach to simulate the solution of the time-dependent Schrödinger equation with a general variable potential. The key idea is to approximate the Titchmarsh-Weyl m-function (exact Dirichlet-to-Neumann operator) by a rational function with respect to an appropriate spectral parameter. By using this method, we overcome the usual high-frequency restriction associated with absorbing boundary conditions in general variable potential problems. The resulting fast computational algorithm for absorbing boundary conditions ensures accuracy over the entire frequency range.

</details>


### [568] [Damage evaluation in a concrete gravity dam using Smoothed particle hydrodynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00619)
*Tapan Jana,Amit Shaw,L. S. Ramachandra*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文采用基于粒子的计算框架，对印度Koyna混凝土重力坝在地震荷载下的失效行为进行了数值模拟，考虑了坝-地基系统，并将数值裂纹结果与实验数据进行了对比验证，结果吻合良好。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 混凝土重力坝在地震等动荷载下的失效可能导致巨大的人员伤亡和经济损失，因此需要深入研究其断裂和损伤演化机制，以提高大坝抗震安全性。

Method: 采用基于粒子的计算框架（无网格/粒子方法），对Koyna混凝土重力坝-地基系统在地震动荷载下的失效过程进行数值模拟。

Result: 数值模拟得到的混凝土大坝裂纹扩展结果与已有实验数据吻合良好，验证了所提计算框架的有效性。

Conclusion: 所开发的基于粒子的计算框架能够有效模拟混凝土重力坝在地震荷载下的断裂与失效过程，为重力坝抗震安全评估提供了一种可靠的数值工具。

Abstract: An unexpected failure of a concrete gravity dam may cause unimaginable human suffering and massive economic losses. An earthquake is the main factor contributing to the concrete gravity dam's failure. In recent years, there has been a rise in efforts globally to make dams safe under dynamic loading. Numerical modeling of dams under earthquake loading yields substantial insights into dams' fracture and damage progression. In the present work, a particle-based computational framework is developed to investigate the failure of the Koyna dam, a concrete gravity dam in India exposed to dynamic loading. The dam-foundation system is considered here. The numerically obtained crack results in the concrete dam are compared with the available experimental results. The findings are consistent with one another.

</details>


### [569] [Efficient Decomposition-Based Algorithms for $\ell_1$-Regularized Inverse Problems with Column-Orthogonal and Kronecker Product Matrices](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00883)
*Brian Sweeney,Malena I. Español,Rosemary Renaut*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文针对具有Kronecker乘积结构的前向算子和正则化算子的ℓ1正则化逆问题，利用广义奇异值分解实现联合分解，并将其集成到Split Bregman和Majorization-Minimization方法中。对于列正交正则化矩阵，证明了联合分解可直接从系统矩阵的奇异值分解导出，进而证明小波和框架let算子在该类分解算法中具有高效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有ℓ1正则化逆问题求解方法在处理具有Kronecker乘积结构的大规模问题时计算效率有限，缺乏有效利用该结构的联合分解策略。

Method: 利用广义奇异值分解（GSVD）对Kronecker乘积结构的前向和正则化算子进行联合分解，并将该分解嵌入Split Bregman和Majorization-Minimization迭代框架中；针对列正交正则化矩阵，证明联合分解可简化为系统矩阵的SVD分解。

Result: 在图像去模糊问题中，框架let和小波算子在该类基于分解的算法中表现出高效性。

Conclusion: 所提联合分解策略能有效提升Kronecker乘积结构下ℓ1正则化逆问题的求解效率，且列正交正则化矩阵的SVD简化方案进一步降低了计算复杂度。

Abstract: We consider an $\ell_1$-regularized inverse problem where both the forward and regularization operators have a Kronecker product structure. By leveraging this structure, a joint decomposition can be obtained using generalized singular value decompositions. We show how this joint decomposition can be effectively integrated into the Split Bregman and Majorization-Minimization methods to solve the $\ell_1$-regularized inverse problem. Furthermore, for cases involving column-orthogonal regularization matrices, we prove that the joint decomposition can be derived directly from the singular value decomposition of the system matrix. As a result, we show that framelet and wavelet operators are efficient for these decomposition-based algorithms in the context of $\ell_1$-regularized image deblurring problems.

</details>


### [570] [Superlinear Convergence of GMRES for clustered eigenvalues and its application to least squares problems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00693)
*Zeyu Liao,Ken Hayami*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文研究了GMRES方法在系数矩阵特征值聚类时的超线性收敛行为，通过Vandermonde矩阵分析，证明了在可对角化条件下，特征值聚类时残差上界呈超线性收敛，并将该分析应用于内迭代预条件GMRES求解最小二乘问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理解GMRES方法在系数矩阵特征值聚类时表现出的超线性收敛现象背后的机理。

Method: 利用由系数矩阵特征值定义的Vandermonde矩阵分析收敛性，推导当矩阵可对角化且特征值聚类时残差上界的超线性收敛性质，并考虑右端向量在特征向量分量上的分解。

Result: 当系数矩阵可对角化、特征值聚类且右端向量在特征向量分量上分解得到的矩阵范数不过大时，残差上界呈超线性收敛。

Conclusion: 该分析可用于解释内迭代预条件GMRES求解最小二乘问题的收敛行为。

Abstract: The objective of this paper is to understand the superlinear convergence behavior of the GMRES method when the coefficient matrix has clustered eigenvalues. In order to understand the phenomenon, we analyze the convergence using the Vandermonde matrix which is defined using the eigenvalues of the coefficient matrix. Although eigenvalues alone cannot explain the convergence, they may provide an upper bound of the residual, together with the right hand side vector and the eigenvectors of the coefficient matrix. We show that when the coefficient matrix is diagonalizable, if the eigenvalues of the coefficient matrix are clustered, the upper bound of the convergence curve shows superlinear convergence, when the norm of the matrix obtained by decomposing the right hand side vector into the eigenvector components is not so large. We apply the analysis to explain the convergence of inner-iteration preconditioned GMRES for least squares problems.

</details>


### [571] [Multiple-GPU accelerated high-order gas-kinetic scheme on three-dimensional unstructured meshes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00656)
*Yuhang Wang,Waixiang Cao,Liang Pan*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文实现了基于CUDA的GPU加速高阶气体动理学格式(HGKS)在非结构网格上的可压缩流计算。单GPU相比CPU OpenMP并行代码获得5-9倍加速，多GPU通过METIS区域分解和MPI通信实现良好扩展性，在RTX A5000和Tesla V100上验证了精度和性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为加速非结构网格上HGKS的可压缩流计算，利用GPU并行计算能力突破CPU计算瓶颈，解决单GPU数据局部性与多GPU区域分解及通信问题。

Method: (1) 基于单元级并行性，生成几何连接信息实现数据局部化与独立性；(2) 建立CUDA线程与网格单元的一一映射，设置对应kernel与grid；(3) 多GPU采用METIS进行区域分解，通过MPI进程控制各GPU并管理幽灵单元的数据交换；(4) 重构连接信息使得单GPU配置可被每个GPU继承。

Result: 单GPU：RTX A5000相比Intel Xeon Gold 5120 CPU OpenMP并行获得5倍加速，Tesla V100获得9倍加速。多GPU：随GPU数量增加程序扩展性良好。数值测试包括精度测试和球体绕流。

Conclusion: 基于CUDA的GPU加速HGKS在非结构网格上性能优异，单GPU显著超越CPU并行，多GPU扩展性良好，验证了该加速框架的有效性和高效性。

Abstract: Recently, successes have been achieved for the high-order gas-kinetic schemes (HGKS) on unstructured meshes for compressible flows. In this paper, to accelerate the computation, HGKS is implemented with the graphical processing unit (GPU) using the compute unified device architecture (CUDA). HGKS on unstructured meshes is a fully explicit scheme, and the acceleration framework can be developed based on the cell-level parallelism. For single-GPU computation, the connectivity of geometric information is generated for the requirement of data localization and independence. Based on such data structure, the kernels and corresponding girds of CUDA are set. With the one-to-one mapping between the indices of cells and CUDA threads, the single-GPU computation using CUDA can be implemented for HGKS. For multiple-GPU computation, the domain decomposition and data exchange need to be taken into account. The domain is decomposed into subdomains by METIS, and the MPI processes are created for the control of each process and communication among GPUs. With reconstruction of connectivity and adding ghost cells, the main configuration of CUDA for single-GPU can be inherited by each GPU. The benchmark cases for compressible flows, including accuracy test and flow passing through a sphere, are presented to assess the numerical performance of HGKS with Nvidia RTX A5000 and Tesla V100 GPUs. For single-GPU computation, compared with the parallel central processing unit (CPU) code running on the Intel Xeon Gold 5120 CPU with open multi-processing (OpenMP) directives, 5x speedup is achieved by RTX A5000 and 9x speedup is achieved by Tesla V100. For multiple-GPU computation, HGKS code scales properly with the increasing number of GPU. Numerical results confirm the excellent performance of multiple-GPU accelerated HGKS on unstructured meshes.

</details>


### [572] [A potential energy conserving finite element method for turbulent variable density flow: application to glacier-fjord circulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00972)
*Lukas Lundgren,Christian Helanow,Jonathan Wiskandt,Inga Monika Koszalka,Josefin Ahlkrona*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种用于非静水Boussinesq近似Navier-Stokes方程的连续Galerkin有限元离散格式，通过一致修改重力项增强守恒性，并引入对称张量基黏性算子模拟湍流，在Ryder冰川冰舌下方海洋环流和基底融化模拟中验证了方法的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有Galerkin方法在不严格满足散度自由条件下，重力项的离散会导致能量守恒性不佳，且传统黏性模型在分层流湍流模拟中存在局限性，需要开发更精确的数值方法。

Method: (1) 对非静水Boussinesq近似中的重力项进行一致修改，增强Galerkin方法的守恒性质；(2) 提出对称张量基黏性算子，基于残差的激波捕捉方法构建黏性系数，实现角动量守恒和动能耗散。
