Result: 在Ryder冰川冰舌及Sherard Osborn峡湾的二维非结构化网格模拟中，与标准海洋模型相比，该方法解析了更清晰的湍流特征，减少了人工扩散，结果更优。

Conclusion: 该连续Galerkin有限元格式在保持锐利能量估计的同时，提升了分层流湍流模拟的精度，适用于海岸海洋动力学和冰-海洋相互作用等应用场景。

Abstract: We introduce a continuous Galerkin finite element discretization of the non-hydrostatic Boussinesq approximation of the Navier-Stokes equations, suitable for various applications such as coastal ocean dynamics and ice-ocean interactions, among others. In particular, we introduce a consistent modification of the gravity force term which enhances conservation properties for Galerkin methods without strictly enforcing the divergence-free condition. We show that this modification results in a sharp energy estimate, including both kinetic and potential energy. Additionally, we propose a new, symmetric, tensor-based viscosity operator that is especially suitable for modeling turbulence in stratified flow. The viscosity coefficients are constructed using a residual-based shock-capturing method and the method conserves angular momentum and dissipates kinetic energy. We validate our proposed method through numerical tests and use it to model the ocean circulation and basal melting beneath the ice tongue of the Ryder Glacier and the adjacent Sherard Osborn fjord in two dimensions on a fully unstructured mesh. Our results compare favorably with a standard numerical ocean model, showing better resolved turbulent flow features and reduced artificial diffusion.

</details>


### [573] [Strong convergence of an explicit full-discrete scheme for stochastic Burgers-Huxley equation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00947)
*Yibo Wang,Wanrong Cao,Yanzhao Cao*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文研究了由加性时空白噪声驱动的随机Burgers-Huxley方程的全显式格式的强收敛性，采用谱Galerkin方法进行空间离散化，并引入非线性驯化指数积分器方案构建全离散格式。在算子半群理论框架下，给出了温和解及其半离散和全离散近似在Sobolev正则性、空间L∞正则性及时间Hölder连续性方面的精确估计，建立了数值解的矩有界性，并获得了空间和时间维度的强收敛率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随机Burgers-Huxley方程同时包含Burgers型非线性项和三次非线性项，其数值求解面临非线性刚性等挑战，现有显式格式往往需要严格的步长限制，而隐式格式计算成本高昂。因此，发展高效的显式全离散格式并建立其强收敛理论具有重要理论意义和应用价值。

Method: 采用谱Galerkin方法进行空间离散化（半离散化），然后引入非线性驯化(nonlinear-tamed)指数积分器方案构建时间离散化，形成全显式全离散格式。在算子半群理论框架下，对温和解及其近似解进行Sobolev正则性、空间L∞正则性和时间Hölder连续性估计。

Result: 建立了数值解的矩有界性，获得了空间和时间维度上的强收敛率，并通过数值算例验证了理论结果。

Conclusion: 所提出的非线性驯化指数积分器结合谱Galerkin方法构成的全显式离散格式能有效求解随机Burgers-Huxley方程，并具有严格的理论收敛性保证。

Abstract: The strong convergence of an explicit full-discrete scheme is investigated for the stochastic Burgers-Huxley equation driven by additive space-time white noise, which possesses both Burgers-type and cubic nonlinearities. To discretize the continuous problem in space, we utilize a spectral Galerkin method. Subsequently, we introduce a nonlinear-tamed exponential integrator scheme, resulting in a fully discrete scheme. Within the framework of semigroup theory, this study provides precise estimations of the Sobolev regularity, $L^\infty$ regularity in space, and Hölder continuity in time for the mild solution, as well as for its semi-discrete and full-discrete approximations. Building upon these results, we establish moment boundedness for the numerical solution and obtain strong convergence rates in both spatial and temporal dimensions. A numerical example is presented to validate the theoretical findings.

</details>


### [574] [Structured Sketching for Linear Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00746)
*Johannes J Brust,Michael A Saunders*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文针对线性系统Ax=b，基于草图-投影方法开发了迭代算法。通过巧妙选择草图（如残差历史），设计了加权策略实现短递推公式。新算法相比常规草图-投影方法具有更低的内存占用和迭代复杂度。数值实验表明，新方法在性能上与GMRES、SYMMLQ及最先进的随机求解器相比表现良好。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的草图-投影方法虽然能有效求解线性系统，但存在内存占用高和迭代复杂度大的问题。作者希望设计一种既能保持草图-投影方法优势，又能降低计算资源消耗的新型迭代算法。

Method: 基于草图-投影框架，利用残差历史等作为草图（sketch）的选取依据，设计加权策略从而导出短递推公式，避免长递推带来的高内存和计算开销。

Result: 新算法相比常规草图-投影方法具有更低的内存占用和迭代复杂度；数值实验表明在性能上与GMRES、SYMMLQ及最先进的随机求解器相当或更优。

Conclusion: 通过合理的草图选择（如利用残差历史）和加权策略，可以在保持求解精度的同时显著降低内存和迭代成本，为大规模线性系统的求解提供了一种高效的新途径。

Abstract: For linear systems $Ax=b$ we develop iterative algorithms based on a sketch-and-project approach. By using judicious choices for the sketch, such as the history of residuals, we develop weighting strategies that enable short recursive formulas. The proposed algorithms have a low memory footprint and iteration complexity compared to regular sketch-and-project methods. In a set of numerical experiments the new methods compare well to GMRES, SYMMLQ and state-of-the-art randomized solvers.

</details>


### [575] [On nonlinear magnetic field solvers using local Quasi-Newton updates](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.01015)
*Herbert Egger,Felix Engertsberger,Lukas Domenig,Klaus Roppert,Manfred Kaltenbacher*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于局部拟牛顿更新的非线性迭代策略，用于求解磁场问题中的非线性系统。该方法兼具牛顿法的快速收敛性和不动点法无需导数信息的优点，尤其适用于含迟滞的非光滑材料行为。建立了三种方法的全局网格无关收敛性分析，并通过基准问题验证了性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统求解非线性磁场问题的方法中，牛顿法收敛快但需要导数信息，不适用于非光滑材料（如迟滞模型）；不动点法无需导数但收敛慢。本文旨在提出一种兼顾两者优点的新方法。

Method: 采用局部拟牛顿（Quasi-Newton）更新策略，在非线性迭代过程中构造材料行为的适当线性化，无需材料本构关系的导数信息。该方法可与不动点法和牛顿法并行实现在标准有限元代码中。

Result: 理论分析证明了三种方法（不动点法、牛顿法、拟牛顿法）的全局网格无关收敛性；数值实验表明所提拟牛顿方法收敛速度与牛顿法相近，且适用于含迟滞的非光滑问题。

Conclusion: 所提局部拟牛顿更新策略是求解非线性磁场问题的一种有效替代方案，兼具快速收敛与无需导数信息的优势，特别适用于迟滞等非光滑材料模型。

Abstract: Fixed-point or Newton-methods are typically employed for the numerical solution of nonlinear systems arising from discretization of nonlinear magnetic field problems. We here discuss an alternative strategy which uses local Quasi-Newton updates to construct appropriate linearizations of the material behavior during the nonlinear iteration. The resulting scheme shows similar fast convergence as the Newton-method but, like the fixed-point methods, does not require derivative information of the underlying material law. As a consequence, the method can be used for the efficient solution of models with hysteresis which involve nonsmooth material behavior. The implementation of the proposed scheme can be realized in standard finite-element codes in parallel to the fixed-point and the Newton method. A full convergence analysis of all three methods is established proving global mesh-independent convergence. The theoretical results and the performance of the nonlinear iterative schemes are evaluated by computational tests for a typical benchmark problem.

</details>


### [576] [Approximation of the invariant measure for stochastic Allen-Cahn equation via an explicit fully discrete scheme](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00953)
*Yibo Wang,Wanrong Cao*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种显式全离散格式用于数值求解随机Allen-Cahn方程，采用谱Galerkin方法进行空间离散，并利用驯服加速指数欧拉方案进行时间离散。基于数值解矩的时间无关有界性，通过Malliavin演算在无限时间区间上进行了弱误差分析，从而为随机Allen-Cahn方程的不变测度数值逼近提供了方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随机Allen-Cahn方程的不变测度在理论分析中具有重要意义，但通常难以解析求解。现有数值方法在处理该方程时存在长时间积分的稳定性与收敛性问题，特别是在无限时间区间上的弱误差分析尚未得到充分解决。本文旨在提出一种能够有效逼近不变测度的数值格式。

Method: 1) 空间离散采用谱Galerkin方法；2) 时间离散采用驯服加速指数欧拉方案；3) 证明数值解矩的时间无关有界性；4) 利用Malliavin演算进行无限时间区间上的弱误差分析。

Result: 成功建立了数值格式在无限时间区间上的弱误差估计，证明了该格式能够有效逼近随机Allen-Cahn方程的平稳分布（不变测度）。

Conclusion: 该显式全离散格式为随机Allen-Cahn方程不变测度的数值逼近提供了一种可行且理论严谨的途径，驯服加速指数欧拉方案结合谱Galerkin方法在长时间数值模拟中表现出良好的稳定性。

Abstract: In this paper we propose an explicit fully discrete scheme to numerically solve the stochastic Allen-Cahn equation. The spatial discretization is done by a spectral Galerkin method, followed by the temporal discretization by a tamed accelerated exponential Euler scheme. Based on the time-independent boundedness of moments of numerical solutions, we present the weak error analysis in an infinite time interval by using Malliavin calculus. This provides a way to numerically approximate the invariant measure for the stochastic Allen-Cahn equation.

</details>


### [577] [A note on eigenvalues and singular values of variable Toeplitz matrices and matrix-sequences, with application to variable two-step BDF approximations to parabolic equations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00792)
*Nikos Barakitis,Valerio Loi,Stefano Serra-Capizzano*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文证明了一类更一般的矩阵序列属于最大广义局部Toeplitz (GLT) *-代数，并确定了其GLT符号和瞬时符号，进而对BDF矩阵序列在非均匀网格下的特征值与奇异值渐近行为进行了谱分析，最后给出了数值示例和开放问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将GLT理论推广到更广泛的矩阵序列类别，以分析BDF方法在非均匀网格离散化下产生的矩阵序列的渐近谱性质。

Method: 利用最大GLT *-代数的代数框架，证明所考虑的矩阵序列属于该代数；随后在一般设定和特定情形下识别对应的GLT符号与瞬时符号，并基于此进行特征值与奇异值的渐近分析。

Result: 成功将所研究的矩阵序列纳入GLT代数框架，给出了其GLT符号和瞬时符号的显式表达式，完成了谱与奇异值的渐近分析。

Conclusion: GLT工具可有效分析BDF矩阵序列在非均匀网格下的渐近谱行为，数值实验验证了理论结果，同时提出了若干开放问题供后续研究。

Abstract: Here, we consider a more general class of matrix-sequences and we prove that they belong to the maximal $*$-algebra of generalized locally Toeplitz (GLT) matrix-sequences. Then, we identify the associated GLT symbols and GLT momentary symbols in the general setting and in the specific case, by providing in both cases a spectral and singular value analysis. More specifically, we use the GLT tools in order to study the asymptotic behaviour of the eigenvalues and singular values of the considered BDF matrix-sequences, in connection with the given non-uniform grids. Numerical examples, visualizations, and open problems end the present work.

</details>


### [578] [Nonlinear Schwarz methods to compute geodesics on manifolds](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.01023)
*Marco Sutti,Tommaso Vanzan*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文提出将Noakes的leapfrog算法（用于计算黎曼流形上的测地线）从区域分解视角重新解释为经典Schwarz交替方法，并借助非线性预处理技术改进其收敛性，初步数值实验验证了该方法的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Leapfrog算法通过将全局端点测地线问题分解为多个局部子问题来迭代求解，但其收敛性质尚未从区域分解理论角度得到充分理解和优化，本文旨在建立该算法与经典Schwarz交替方法的联系并改进其性能。

Method: 1. 将leapfrog算法从区域分解视角重新形式化为Schwarz交替方法；2. 利用非线性预处理技术（如RAS、ORAS等）改进原始算法的收敛特性；3. 通过初步数值实验验证所提方法的有效性。

Result: 数值实验表明，引入非线性预处理的leapfrog算法在收敛速度上优于原始版本，证实了该理论视角的实用价值。

Conclusion: Leapfrog算法可视为Schwarz交替方法在黎曼流形测地线计算中的特例，非线性预处理是提升其收敛性的有效途径，后续可进一步研究更优的预处理策略及理论收敛性分析。

Abstract: We consider the leapfrog algorithm by Noakes for computing geodesics on Riemannian manifolds. The main idea behind this algorithm is to subdivide the original endpoint geodesic problem into several local problems, for which the endpoint geodesic problem can be solved more easily by any local method (e.g., the single shooting method). The algorithm then iteratively updates a piecewise geodesic to obtain a global geodesic between the original endpoints. From a domain decomposition perspective, we show that the leapfrog algorithm can be viewed as a classical Schwarz alternating method. Thanks to this analogy, we use techniques from nonlinear preconditioning to improve the convergence properties of the method. Preliminary numerical experiments suggest that this is a promising approach.

</details>


### [579] [A Numerical Technique for Coupling the Momentum and the Continuity Equations for Semi-Implicit 3D Ocean Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00990)
*Ali Shahabi,Reza Ghiassi*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种用于3D静水力原始方程的半隐式有限差分方法，通过隐式处理斜压梯度与垂直粘性项，并利用递归公式将水平速度表示为相邻自由面高程的函数，实现了O(N)复杂度的动量-连续性方程高效耦合。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 半隐式方法是三维海岸与海洋过程建模中的强大高效工具，但现有方法在耦合动量方程与连续性方程时计算复杂度较高，需要更高效的求解策略。

Method: 对控制方程进行时间离散化，隐式处理斜压压力梯度与垂直粘性；将沿水柱离散的动量方程与深度积分的连续性方程耦合，构建关于自由面高程的线性系统；通过简单递归公式将水平速度分量表示为相邻自由面高程的函数，代入积分后的连续性方程求解。

Result: 实现了复杂度为O(N)的高效耦合方法，显著降低了求解动量方程与连续性方程耦合系统的计算量。

Conclusion: 该半隐式有限差分方法能够高效求解三维静水力海洋/海岸模型，其O(N)复杂度使其适用于大规模实际应用场景。

Abstract: Semi-implicit methods are powerful and efficient tools for the three-dimensional modeling of coastal and oceanic processes. A semi-implicit finite difference method for 3D hydrostatic primitive equations is presented in this paper. The governing equations are time-discretized with an implicit treatment of barotropic pressure gradient and vertical viscosity. The discretized momentum equations along a water column are coupled with the depth-integrated continuity equation of the column to construct a linear system for free-surface elevations. The novelty of this work lies in formulating an efficient method with the order of complexity O(N) for coupling the momentum and the continuity equations. In this method, the horizontal velocity components are expressed in terms of neighbor free-surface elevations by some simple recursive formulas and then are substituted in the integrated continuity equation.

</details>


### [580] [ROM inversion of monostatic data lifted to full MIMO](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00822)
*V. Druskin,S. Moskow,M. Zaslavsky*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 针对LSL算法在单基地SAR成像中因缺失MIMO传输函数非对角元导致成像伪影的问题，提出基于ROM的数据补全算法：通过LSL初始重建估计内场，利用Lippmann-Schwinger积分填补缺失的MIMO数据，再基于补全数据更新重建，并可迭代优化。2D/2.5D数值实验证明了方法的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LSL算法在处理单输入单输出(SISO)雷达数据时，由于缺失多输入多输出(MIMO)矩阵值传输函数的非对角线元素，导致内场近似误差较大，进而引起成像中出现多重回波伪影。本文旨在解决这一数据不完备性问题。

Method: 提出基于ROM的数据补全算法：(1) 对SISO数据应用LSL算法获得初始重建和内场估计；(2) 利用估计的内场计算前向Lippmann-Schwinger积分，填补缺失的MIMO非对角数据（提升步骤）；(3) 利用原始SISO数据求解Lippmann-Schwinger方程，其中内场由补全后的MIMO数据构建；(4) 对复杂模型可迭代上述步骤以进一步改善成像质量。

Result: 在2D和2.5D数值算例中，该方法显著改善了重建质量，有效消除了多重回波伪影。

Conclusion: 所提出的ROM数据补全算法能够有效弥补SISO数据缺失MIMO信息的不足，提升LSL算法在多散射环境下的成像精度，且可通过迭代进一步优化。

Abstract: The Lippmann--Schwinger--Lanczos (LSL) algorithm has recently been shown to provide an efficient tool for imaging and direct inversion of synthetic aperture radar data in multi-scattering environments [17], where the data set is limited to the monostatic, a.k.a. single input/single output (SISO) measurements. The approach is based on constructing data-driven estimates of internal fields via a reduced-order model (ROM) framework and then plugging them into the Lippmann-Schwinger integral equation. However, the approximations of the internal solutions may have more error due to missing the off diagonal elements of the multiple input/multiple output (MIMO) matrix valued transfer function. This, in turn, may result in multiple echoes in the image. Here we present a ROM-based data completion algorithm to mitigate this problem. First, we apply the LSL algorithm to the SISO data as in [17] to obtain approximate reconstructions as well as the estimate of internal field. Next, we use these estimates to calculate a forward Lippmann-Schwinger integral to populate the missing off-diagonal data (the lifting step). Finally, to update the reconstructions, we solve the Lippmann-Schwinger equation using the original SISO data, where the internal fields are constructed from the lifted MIMO data. The steps of obtaining the approximate reconstructions and internal fields and populating the missing MIMO data entries can be repeated for complex models to improve the images even further. Efficiency of the proposed approach is demonstrated on 2D and 2.5D numerical examples, where we see reconstructions are improved substantially.

</details>


### [581] [Variable reduction as a nonlinear preconditioning approach for optimization problems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.01032)
*Gabriele Ciaremalla,Tommaso Vanzan*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文提出将非线性消除技术用于无约束最小化问题，通过人为约束部分变量满足最优性条件来减少优化变量，从而得到简化的目标函数，并使用右预处理梯度下降法进行优化，理论分析和数值结果均验证了该方法的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准牛顿法求解无约束最小化问题的最优性系统时，可能需要非线性消除等预处理技术。本文旨在利用非线性消除来减少优化变量数量，提高简化后优化问题的条件数，从而改善优化效率。

Method: 通过人为约束部分变量使其满足最优性条件的子集，从而减少优化变量，得到一个简化的目标函数；随后可应用任意优化算法进行最小化。本文特别关注右预处理梯度下降法。

Result: 理论分析和数值结果均支持所提出方法的有效性，表明通过选择合适的变量进行消除，可以显著改善简化优化问题的条件数。

Conclusion: 非线性消除不仅可以作为牛顿法的预处理手段，还可以用于减少优化变量、改善问题条件数，且与右预处理梯度下降法结合效果良好。

Abstract: When considering an unconstrained minimization problem, a standard approach is to solve the optimality system with a Newton method possibly preconditioned by, e.g., nonlinear elimination. In this contribution, we argue that nonlinear elimination could be used to reduce the number of optimization variables by artificially constraining them to satisfy a subset of the optimality conditions. Consequently, a reduced objective function is derived which can now be minimized with any optimization algorithm. By choosing suitable variables to eliminate, the conditioning of the reduced optimization problem is largely improved. We here focus in particular on a right preconditioned gradient descent and show theoretical and numerical results supporting the validity of the presented approach.

</details>


### [582] [Unexpected fault activation due to underground gas storage in produced reservoirs. Part II: Definition of safe operational bandwidths](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.01049)
*Selena Baldan,Massimiliano Ferronato,Andrea Franceschini,Carlo Janna,Claudia Zoccarato,Matteo Frigo,Giovanni Isotton,Cristiano Collettini,Chiara Deangeli,Vera Rocca,Francesca Verga,Pietro Teatini*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文通过两部分的建模框架，研究了荷兰上罗特列根德组断层储层中地下气体储存（UGS）操作导致断层重新激活的物理机制，分析了不同存储气体（CO2、CH4、H2、N2）在不同操作阶段对断层稳定性的影响，并确定了安全孔隙压力变化范围。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在荷兰的UGS站点中观察到断层重新激活会"意外"发生，即使应力条件本不应导致破坏，这引发了安全担忧。需要理解这种意外断层激活的物理机制，以确定安全操作范围。

Method: 使用Part I中描述的数学模型和数值模型，考虑存储气体对储层和盖层力学性质（特别是杨氏模量）的影响，模拟CO2长期封存、CH4和H2注入/提取循环、N2作为垫底气注入等不同场景下的断层激活风险。

Result: 地质构造、地质力学性质和储层操作条件均可能增加断层重新激活的风险。不同存储流体和操作方式（长期封存、循环注入/提取等）对断层稳定性的影响存在差异。

Conclusion: 需要综合考虑地质构造、力学性质和操作条件来定义UGS操作的安全孔隙压力变化范围，以预防断层重新激活和微地震事件。

Abstract: Underground gas storage is a versatile tool for managing energy resources and addressing pressing environmental concerns. While natural gas is stored in geological formations since the early 20th century, hydrogen has recently been considered as a potential candidate toward a more flexible and sustainable energy infrastructure. Furthermore, these formations can additionally capture gases that contribute to climate change, such as CO2. When such operations are implemented in faulted basins, however, safety concerns may arise due to the potential reactivation of pre-existing faults, which could trigger (micro)-seismicity events. In the Netherlands, it has been recently noted that fault reactivation can occur "unexpectedly" during the life of an underground gas storage (UGS) site, even when stress conditions are not expected to cause a failure. The present two-part work aims to develop a modeling framework to investigate the physical mechanisms causing such occurrences in previously produced gas reservoirs and define a safe operational bandwidth for pore pressure variation for UGS operations in the faulted reservoirs of the Upper Rotliegend Group, the Netherlands. This paper investigates in detail the mechanisms and crucial factors that result in fault reactivation at various stages of a UGS. The mathematical and numerical model described in Part I is used, also considering how the presence of stored gases may influence the mechanical properties of the reservoir and caprock, in particular the Young modulus. The study investigates the hazard of fault activation caused by the storage of different fluids for various purposes, such as long-term CO2 sequestration, CH4 and H2 injection and extraction cycles, and N2 injection as cushion gas. The results show how geological configuration, geomechanical properties, and reservoir operating conditions may increase the hazard of fault reactivation.

</details>


### [583] [Semi-implicit hybrid finite volume/finite element method for the GPR model of continuum mechanics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00823)
*Saray Busto,Laura Río-Martín*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 提出了一种混合半隐式有限体积/有限元数值方案，用于求解不可压缩和弱可压缩介质（基于GPR模型），通过系统分裂为三个子系统（对流、源项、压力），结合显式有限体积和隐式有限元方法，实现了二阶空间精度，并在固体和流体介质的多场景基准测试中验证了方案的鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩展Godunov等人提出的GPR连续介质力学模型，使其能够处理不可压缩和弱可压缩介质，并设计高效的数值求解方案，以统一描述从弹塑性固体到粘性流体的多种介质。

Method: 将原始系统分裂为三个子系统：1）对流部分和非守恒乘积（显式有限体积法）；2）畸变张量和热通量方程的源项（隐式求解）；3）压力子系统（隐式有限元法）。采用非结构化网格，压力定义在原始网格上，其余变量定义在对偶网格上。

Result: 数值收敛分析确认了空间二阶精度；在不可压缩和弱可压缩情况下，针对固体和流体介质的大范围基准测试均表现出良好的行为和鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 所提出的混合半隐式方案能够准确且鲁棒地处理不可压缩/弱可压缩GPR模型，统一描述了从固体到流体的多种介质行为，为工程和物理应用提供了有效的数值工具。

Abstract: We present a new hybrid semi-implicit finite volume / finite element numerical scheme for the solution of incompressible and weakly compressible media. From the continuum mechanics model proposed by Godunov, Peshkov and Romenski (GPR), we derive the incompressible GPR formulation as well as a weakly compressible GPR system. As for the original GPR model, the new formulations are able to describe different media, from elastoplastic solids to viscous fluids, depending on the values set for the model's relaxation parameters. Then, we propose a new numerical method for the solution of both models based on the splitting of the original systems into three subsystems: one containing the convective part and non-conservative products, a second subsystem for the source terms of the distortion tensor and heat flux equations and, finally, a pressure subsystem. In the first stage of the algorithm, the transport subsystem is solved by employing an explicit finite volume method, while the source terms are solved implicitly. Next, the pressure subsystem is implicitly discretised using finite elements. Within this methodology, unstructured grids are employed, with the pressure defined in the primal grid and the rest of the variables computed in the dual grid. To evaluate the performance of the proposed scheme, a numerical convergence analysis is carried out, which confirms the second order of accuracy in space. A wide range of benchmarks is reproduced for the incompressible and weakly compressible cases, considering both solid and fluid media. These results demonstrate the good behaviour and robustness of the proposed scheme in a variety of scenarios and conditions.

</details>


### [584] [Fourth-order compact finite difference schemes for solving biharmonic equations with Dirichlet boundary conditions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.01064)
*Kejia Pan,Jin Li,Zhilin Li,Kang Fu*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种适用于二维和三维双调和方程Dirichlet边界条件的真正四阶紧致有限差分格式，该格式保持了全局四阶收敛性和紧致性，且未知量不随维度增加，条件数以O(h^{-2})增长。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法（如Stephenson方法）在处理双调和方程时，未知量会随维度增加而增长，且缺乏同时适用于2D和3D的高阶紧致格式。因此，本文旨在构造一种真正的四阶紧致有限差分格式来解决这一问题。

Method: 在2D情况下，基于Li和Pan提出的通量型边界条件的高阶紧致（HOC）格式，构建耦合边界条件的高阶紧致离散化；在3D情况下，修改Li和Pan的待定系数法，推导耦合边界条件的有限差分近似。

Result: 所提出的有限差分离散化保持了全局四阶收敛性和紧致性；未知量不随维度增加；在2D和3D中系数矩阵的条件数以O(h^{-2})增长；通过非平凡算例验证了方法的性能。

Conclusion: 本文提出的真正高阶紧致方法在2D和3D双调和方程求解中具有高效性和良好的数值性质，优于传统的Stephenson方法。

Abstract: In this study, we propose a genuine fourth-order compact finite difference scheme for solving biharmonic equations with Dirichlet boundary conditions in both two and three dimensions. In the 2D case, we build upon the high-order compact (HOC) schemes for flux-type boundary conditions originally developed by Zhilin Li and Kejia Pan [SIAM J. Sci. Comput., 45 (2023), pp. A646-A674] to construct a high order compact discretization for coupled boundary conditions. When considering the 3D case, we modify carefully designed undetermined coefficient methods of Li and Pan to derive the finite difference approximations of coupled boundary conditions. The resultant FD discretization maintains the global fourth order convergence and compactness. Unlike the very popular Stephenson method, the number of unknows do not increase with dimensions. Besides, it is noteworthy that the condition number of the coefficient matrix increases at a rate of $O(h^{-2})$ in both 2D and 3D. We also validate the performance of the proposed genuine HOC methods through nontrivial examples.

</details>


### [585] [Numerical and Lyapunov-Based Investigation of the Effect of Stenosis on Blood Transport Stability Using a Control-Theoretic PDE Model of Cardiovascular Flow](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.01058)
*Shantanu Singh,Nikolaos Bekiaris-Liberis*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文通过数值模拟和Lyapunov稳定性分析，研究了动脉狭窄对血流稳定性的影响。采用二阶有限体积格式求解非线性双曲型偏微分方程组，利用临床参数模拟狭窄引起的出口压降，发现参考轨迹（如心跳周期）的渐近稳定衰减率随狭窄程度加重而降低。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究动脉狭窄（边界狭窄）对血流稳定性的定量影响，为临床评估狭窄严重程度导致的血流动力学不稳定提供理论依据。

Method: 采用二阶有限体积格式数值实现由2×2异向非线性双曲型PDE描述的血流模型，通过出口压降刻画狭窄效应；对参考轨迹（时变入流对应周期解）进行线性化，构造Lyapunov泛函，并通过数值验证时变参数下的稳定性条件。

Result: 数值实验与Lyapunov稳定性分析均表明：参考轨迹是渐近稳定的，且其衰减率随狭窄程度加重而降低。

Conclusion: 动脉狭窄会削弱血流系统的稳定性恢复能力（衰减率下降），狭窄越严重，系统在扰动后回到参考轨迹的速度越慢，为理解狭窄导致的血流动力学风险提供了理论支撑。

Abstract: We perform various numerical tests to study the effect of (boundary) stenosis on blood flow stability, employing a detailed and accurate, second-order finite-volume scheme for numerically implementing a partial differential equation (PDE) model, using clinically realistic values for the artery's parameters and the blood inflow. The model consists of a baseline $2\times 2$ hetero-directional, nonlinear hyperbolic PDE system, in which, the stenosis' effect is described by a pressure drop at the outlet of an arterial segment considered. We then study the stability properties (observed in our numerical tests) of a reference trajectory, corresponding to a given time-varying inflow (e.g., a periodic trajectory with period equal to the time interval between two consecutive heartbeats) and stenosis severity, deriving the respective linearized system and constructing a Lyapunov functional. Due to the fact that the linearized system is time varying, with time-varying parameters depending on the reference trajectories themselves (that, in turn, depend in an implicit manner on the stenosis degree), which cannot be derived analytically, we verify the Lyapunov-based stability conditions obtained, numerically. Both the numerical tests and the Lyapunov-based stability analysis show that a reference trajectory is asymptotically stable with a decay rate that decreases as the stenosis severity deteriorates.

</details>


### [586] [Interprecision transfers in iterative refinement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00827)
*C. T. Kelley*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文通过显式描述迭代精化算法中的精度间转移过程，揭示了该算法的新特性。经典变体中，矩阵和分解以工作精度存储，残差以更高精度计算。研究发现该算法实际上求解了原始问题的提升形式，从而以新方式刻画了极限行为，并得到了经典收敛分析的不同版本。文章还讨论了三角求解中两种精度间转移方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 通过显式化迭代精化算法中的精度间转移过程，获得对该算法的新理解，特别是经典变体中矩阵和分解以工作精度存储、残差以更高精度计算的情况。

Method: 将精度间转移在迭代精化的算法描述中显式化，从而分析算法行为；讨论三角求解中的两种精度间转移方法。

Result: 发现经典迭代精化算法实际上求解了原始问题的提升形式，从而以新方式刻画极限行为，得到了经典收敛分析的不同版本。

Conclusion: 通过显式化精度间转移，提供了对迭代精化算法的新理解，特别是关于其极限行为和收敛分析的新视角。

Abstract: We make the interprecision transfers explicit in an algorithmic description of iterative refinement and obtain new insights into the algorithm. One example is the classic variant of iterative refinement where the matrix and the factorization are stored in a working precision and the residual is evaluated in a higher precision. In that case we make the observation that this algorithm will solve a promoted form of the original problem and thereby characterize the limiting behavior in a novel way and obtain a different version of the classic convergence analysis. We also discuss two approaches for interprecision transfer in the triangular solves.

</details>


### [587] [Nested Bregman Iterations for Decomposition Problems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.01097)
*Tobias Wolf,Derek Driggs,Kostas Papafitsoros,Elena Resmerita,Carola-Bibiane Schönlieb*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种称为"嵌套Bregman迭代"的方法，用于在图像重建的同时将图像分解为具有不同特征的组件。该方法通过将权重选择问题转化为基于归一化互相关的有意义停止准则，改进了传统Bregman迭代中正则化权重难以选择的缺陷，并证明了方法的良定义性和收敛性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统变分方法使用下确界卷积作为正则化器进行图像分解时，虽然Bregman迭代能通过早停获得好的整体近似，但各组分的质量高度依赖于下确界卷积泛函中正则化权重的恰当选择，而权重的选择本身是一个困难问题。

Method: 提出嵌套Bregman迭代方法，通过结构化方式改进分解过程，将正则化权重的选择问题转化为基于归一化互相关的迭代停止准则问题。

Result: 证明了所提方法的良定义性和收敛行为，并通过多种使用下确界卷积泛函的图像分解任务数值实验展示了方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 嵌套Bregman迭代能够有效解决传统方法中正则化权重难以选择的问题，为图像分解提供了一种更鲁棒、更实用的方案。

Abstract: We consider the task of image reconstruction while simultaneously decomposing the reconstructed image into components with different features. A commonly used tool for this is a variational approach with an infimal convolution of appropriate functions as a regularizer. Especially for noise corrupted observations, incorporating these functionals into the classical method of Bregman iterations provides a robust method for obtaining an overall good approximation of the true image, by stopping early the iteration according to a discrepancy principle. However, crucially, the quality of the separate components depends further on the proper choice of the regularization weights associated to the infimally convoluted functionals. Here, we propose the method of Nested Bregman iterations to improve a decomposition in a structured way. This allows to transform the task of choosing the weights into the problem of stopping the iteration according to a meaningful criterion based on normalized cross-correlation. We discuss the well-definedness and the convergence behavior of the proposed method, and illustrate its strength numerically with various image decomposition tasks employing infimal convolution functionals.

</details>


### [588] [Lattice Boltzmann for linear elastodynamics: periodic problems and Dirichlet boundary conditions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.01081)
*Oliver Boolakee,Martin Geier,Laura De Lorenzis*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于格子玻尔兹曼方法的新方案，用于求解线性弹性动力学问题，该方案在CFL条件下对任意材料参数组合保持稳定，具有二阶精度，并通过向量值种群保留了传统LBM的计算优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LBM方案在处理弹性动力学问题时，材料参数组合的稳定性受限，需要一种对任意材料参数组合都稳定的二阶精度数值格式。

Method: 将弹性动力学方程转化为等价的一阶双曲系统，引入向量值种群的格子玻尔兹曼格式；利用渐近展开技术和预稳定性结构建立二阶一致性和稳定性分析；设计了二阶一致的初始化和Dirichlet边界条件处理方案。

Result: 通过人造解的收敛性研究和长期稳定性测试，数值验证了所有理论推导的正确性。

Conclusion: 所提出的向量值种群LBM方案在保持传统LBM计算优势的同时，实现了对任意材料参数组合稳定的二阶精度弹性动力学求解。

Abstract: We propose a new second-order accurate lattice Boltzmann formulation for linear elastodynamics that is stable for arbitrary combinations of material parameters under a CFL-like condition. The construction of the numerical scheme uses an equivalent first-order hyperbolic system of equations as an intermediate step, for which a vectorial lattice Boltzmann formulation is introduced. The only difference to conventional lattice Boltzmann formulations is the usage of vector-valued populations, so that all computational benefits of the algorithm are preserved. Using the asymptotic expansion technique and the notion of pre-stability structures we further establish second-order consistency as well as analytical stability estimates. Lastly, we introduce a second-order consistent initialization of the populations as well as a boundary formulation for Dirichlet boundary conditions on 2D rectangular domains. All theoretical derivations are numerically verified by convergence studies using manufactured solutions and long-term stability tests.

</details>


### [589] [PhoTOS: Topology Optimization of Photonic Components using a Shape Library](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00845)
*Rahul Kumar Padhy,Aaditya Chandrasekhar*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于卷积隐式变分自编码器的拓扑优化框架，通过将离散形状库编码为可微空间，确保光子器件设计满足最小特征尺寸和间距等制造约束。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 拓扑优化有望设计下一代紧凑高效的光子器件，但如何确保优化后的设计满足半导体代工厂的制造约束（尤其是最小特征尺寸和间距）仍是一个挑战。

Method: 提出一种拓扑优化框架，利用机器学习和特征映射方法的最新进展，通过从预定义形状库中变换形状来构建器件组件，从而简化约束实施。具体引入卷积隐式变分自编码器（Convo-implicit VAE）将离散形状库编码为可微空间，支持梯度优化。

Result: 通过多种常见光子器件的设计验证了该框架的有效性。

Conclusion: 该框架能够保证设计满足制造准则，为光子器件的可制造性优化提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Topology Optimization (TO) holds the promise of designing next-generation compact and efficient photonic components. However, ensuring the optimized designs comply with fabrication constraints imposed by semiconductor foundries remains a challenge. This work presents a TO framework that guarantees designs satisfy fabrication criteria, particularly minimum feature size and separation. Leveraging recent advancements in machine learning and feature mapping methods, our approach constructs components by transforming shapes from a predefined library, simplifying constraint enforcement. Specifically, we introduce a Convo-implicit Variational Autoencoder to encode the discrete shape library into a differentiable space, enabling gradient-based optimization. The efficacy of our framework is demonstrated through the design of several common photonic components.

</details>


### [590] [IMEX-RK finite volume methods for nonlinear 1d parabolic PDEs. Application to option pricing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.01125)
*J. G. López-Salas,M. Suárez-Taboada,M. J. Castro,A. M. Ferreiro-Ferreiro,J. A. García-Rodríguez*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文针对期权定价中一维抛物型偏微分方程（含非线性源项和对流项），开发了二阶隐式-显式龙格-库塔（IMEX-RK）有限体积格式，通过对流项显式处理、扩散项隐式离散，实现了高效计算、二阶精度（含非线性与非正则初值条件）及可扩展至高阶的特性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在期权定价中， parabolic PDEs 的数值求解面临时间步长限制（显式格式因扩散项需严格CFL条件）和计算效率问题。现有方法在同时处理非线性源项/对流项与扩散项时，难以兼顾精度与效率，因此需要开发一种兼具二阶精度、计算高效且可扩展的数值格式。

Method: 采用有限体积方法结合二阶状态重构对对流项进行空间半离散，扩散项使用二阶有限差分离散；时间积分采用IMEX-RK时间积分器（对流项显式处理，扩散项隐式处理）。

Result: 该数值方案具有以下优势：1）计算效率高（IMEX-RK中扩散项的隐式离散克服了严格时间步长限制）；2）对于非线性问题和非正则初始条件均能达到二阶精度；3）可扩展至更高阶格式。

Conclusion: 本文提出的二阶IMEX-RK有限体积格式在期权定价PDE求解中表现出高效性和二阶精度，尤其适用于含非线性的问题，且具备向高阶扩展的潜力。

Abstract: The goal of this paper is to develop 2nd order Implicit-Explicit Runge-Kutta (IMEX-RK) finite volume (FV) schemes for solving 1d parabolic PDEs for option pricing, with possible nonlinearities in the source and advection terms. The spatial semi-discretization of the advection is carried out by combining finite volume methods with 2nd order state reconstructions; while the diffusive terms are discretized using second-order finite differences. The time integration is performed by means of IMEX-RK time integrators: the advection is treated explicitly, and the diffusion, implicitly. The obtained numerical schemes have several advantages: they are computationally very efficient, thanks to the implicit discretization of the diffusion in the IMEX-RK time integrators, which allows to overcome the strict time step restriction; they yield second-order accuracy for even nonlinear problems and with non-regular initial conditions; and they can be extended to higher order.

</details>


### [591] [Uniform approximation of vectors using adaptive randomized information](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.01098)
*Robert J. Kunsch,Marcin Wnuk*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文研究了从ℓ_p^m到ℓ_∞^m（1≤p≤2）的嵌入逼近问题，基于使用任意线性泛函的随机自适应算法。结果表明复杂度n仅具有(log log m)依赖关系。对于p=1的情况，自适应与非自适应蒙特卡洛方法之间存在高达n阶（对数因子内）的误差差距，这是线性问题中可能的最大差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索随机自适应算法在ℓ_p^m → ℓ_∞^m嵌入逼近问题中的复杂度上界，特别是揭示自适应与非自适应蒙特卡洛方法之间可能存在的最大误差差距。

Method: 采用基于任意线性泛函作为问题实例信息的随机自适应算法，对1≤p≤2范围内的ℓ_p^m到ℓ_∞^m嵌入进行逼近分析。

Result: 对于p=1的情况，发现自适应与非自适应蒙特卡洛方法之间存在高达n阶（对数因子内）的误差差距，这是线性问题中可能存在的最大差距。

Conclusion: 复杂度n仅显示(log log m)依赖关系，且自适应方法在p=1时相比非自适应方法具有显著优势，达到了线性问题的理论极限差距。

Abstract: We study approximation of the embedding $\ell_p^m \rightarrow \ell_{\infty}^m$, $1 \leq p \leq 2$, based on randomized adaptive algorithms that use arbitrary linear functionals as information on a problem instance. We show upper bounds for which the complexity $n$ exhibits only a $(\log\log m)$-dependence. Our results for $p=1$ lead to an example of a gap of order $n$ (up to logarithmic factors) for the error between best adaptive and non-adaptive Monte Carlo methods. This is the largest possible gap for linear problems.

</details>


### [592] [Mittag-Leffler stability of complete monotonicity-preserving schemes for time-dependent coefficients sub-diffusion equations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00893)
*Wen Dong,Dongling Wang*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文针对变系数幂非线性次扩散模型，证明了其解具有Mittag-Leffler型稳定性（代数衰减率），并发展了保持该结构特性的数值算法，使数值解在长时间上获得与理论解完全一致的衰减率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 次扩散方程的解在长时间区间上呈现代数衰减率（Mittag-Leffler型稳定性），这是该类模型的关键特征。现有研究缺乏对变系数幂非线性情形下该稳定性的理论保证，以及能够保持此长时间衰减结构的数值算法。

Method: 1) 理论分析：在源函数满足自然衰减假设下，证明变系数幂非线性次扩散模型的解具有Mittag-Leffler稳定性，即$\|u(t)\|_{L^s}=O(t^{-(α+β)/γ})$；2) 数值算法：基于Li和Wang发展的完全单调性保持（$\mathcal{CM}$-preserving）格式，证明其满足变系数时间分数阶微分方程的离散比较原理；3) 通过精细构造离散上解和下解，得到数值解$\|u_n\|_{L^s}=O(t_n^{-(α+β)/γ})$的长时间最优衰减率。

Result: 理论解与数值解在长时间上具有完全一致的衰减率$\|u(t)\|_{L^s}=O(t^{-(α+β)/γ})$和$\|u_n\|_{L^s}=O(t_n^{-(α+β)/γ})$，数值实验验证了分析结果。

Conclusion: 本文为变系数幂非线性次扩散模型建立了Mittag-Leffler稳定性的理论结果，并证明了$\mathcal{CM}$-preserving格式能够精确保持该长时间衰减结构，所发展的结构保持算法是有效的。

Abstract: A key characteristic of the anomalous sub-solution equation is that the solution exhibits algebraic decay rate over long time intervals, which is often refered to the Mittag-Leffler type stability. For a class of power nonlinear sub-diffusion models with variable coefficients, we prove that their solutions have Mittag-Leffler stability when the source functions satisfy natural decay assumptions. That is the solutions have the decay rate $\|u(t)\|_{L^{s}(Ω)}=O\left( t^{-(α+β)/γ} \right)$ as $t\rightarrow\infty$, where $α$, $γ$ are positive constants, $β\in(-α,\infty)$ and $s\in (1,\infty)$. Then we develop the structure preserving algorithm for this type of model. For the complete monotonicity-preserving ($\mathcal{CM}$-preserving) schemes developed by Li and Wang (Commun. Math. Sci., 19(5):1301-1336, 2021), we prove that they satisfy the discrete comparison principle for time fractional differential equations with variable coefficients. Then, by carefully constructing the fine the discrete supsolution and subsolution, we obtain the long time optimal decay rate of the numerical solution $\|u_{n}\|_{L^{s}(Ω)}=O\left( t_n^{-(α+β)/γ} \right)$ as $t_{n}\rightarrow\infty$, which is fully agree with the theoretical solution. Finally, we validated the analysis results through numerical experiments.

</details>


### [593] [Second order finite volume IMEX Runge-Kutta schemes for two dimensional parabolic PDEs in finance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.01131)
*J. G. López-Salas,M. Suárez-Taboada,M. J. Castro,A. M. Ferreiro-Ferreiro,J. A. García-Rodríguez*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 提出了一种用于求解含混合导数的二维金融抛物型偏微分方程的二阶有限体积隐式-显式Runge-Kutta数值格式，该方法在非正则初始条件下仍能保持二阶收敛，通过IMEX时间积分克服显式格式中扩散项导致的时间步长限制，并准确无振荡地逼近Greeks。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数值方法在处理含混合导数的二维金融偏微分方程时，面临显式格式时间步长受扩散项限制过小、非正则初始条件下精度下降等问题，亟需一种兼具精度与稳定性的通用数值框架。

Method: 采用有限体积法进行空间离散，结合二阶隐式-显式Runge-Kutta（IMEX-RK）时间推进格式，对扩散项隐式处理以放宽时间步长约束，对对流项显式处理以保持计算效率。

Result: 该方法在含混合导数的二维问题中实现二阶收敛，即使初始条件非正则也能保持精度；有效克服了显式格式因扩散项导致的极小时间步长限制；Greeks逼近准确且无振荡。

Conclusion: 所提出的二阶有限体积IMEX-RK格式是一种通用、高效且精确的数值工具，适用于含混合导数的二维金融偏微分方程求解，在精度、稳定性和Greeks计算方面均表现出优越性。

Abstract: We present a novel and general methodology for building second-order finite volume implicit-explicit Runge-Kutta numerical schemes for solving two-dimensional financial parabolic PDEs with mixed derivatives. The methods achieve second-order convergence even in the presence of non-regular initial conditions. The IMEX time integrator allows to overcome the tiny time-step induced by the diffusive term in the explicit schemes, also providing accurate and non-oscillatory approximations of the Greeks.

</details>


### [594] [Discrete Laplacians on the hyperbolic space -- a comparative study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.01211)
*Mihai Bucataru,Dragoş Manea*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文针对双曲空间 $\mathbb{H}^2$ 构造了两类离散有限差分 Laplace-Beltrami 算子，证明了其离散热方程在 $\mathrm{L}^2$ 框架下的稳定性与收敛性，并验证了离散解具有与连续情形一致的指数衰减率。其中，几何适配的离散算子逼近精度更高，并可推广至三维双曲空间。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有离散 Laplace-Beltrami 算子要么缺乏严格的收敛性保证，要么计算代价过高。作者希望在保证计算可行性的同时，提供具有严格收敛性理论支撑的离散算子。

Method: 以二维双曲空间 $\mathbb{H}^2$（恒定负曲率）为出发点，设计了两类离散有限差分算子作为连续 Laplace-Beltrami 算子的 $\mathrm{L}^2$ 逼近；通过离散泛函不等式分析技术证明离散热方程的稳定性与收敛性，并利用 Poincaré 不等式分析解的指数衰减行为。

Result: 两类离散算子对应的离散热方程均稳定且收敛到连续热-Beltrami Cauchy 问题；离散解具有与连续情形相同的指数衰减率；几何特化的离散 Laplacian 逼近精度更高，并可推广到三维双曲空间 $\mathbb{H}^3$。

Conclusion: 为双曲空间上的数值 PDE 求解提供了兼具计算可行性与严格收敛保证的离散算子构造方案，特别地，几何适配算子在实际计算和理论分析上均更具优势。

Abstract: This paper is concerned with the construction of discrete counterparts of the Laplace-Beltrami operator on Riemannian manifolds that can be effectively used in the numerical solution of partial differential equations. Since existing constructions often lack rigorous convergence guarantees or imply a significant computational effort, we focus on designing operators that are both computationally feasible and supported by convergence results. We consider as a starting point the two-dimensional hyperbolic space $\mathbb{H}^2$, one of the simplest non-Euclidean settings, and develop two variants of discrete finite-difference operator tailored to this constant negatively curved space, both serving as approximations to the (continuous) Laplace-Beltrami operator within the $\mathrm{L}^2$ framework. We prove that the discrete heat equation associated with both operators mentioned above exhibits stability and converges towards the continuous heat-Beltrami Cauchy problem on $\mathbb{H}^2$. Moreover, using techniques inspired from the sharp analysis of discrete functional inequalities, we prove that the solutions of the discrete heat equations corresponding to both variants of discrete Laplacian exhibit an exponential decay asymptotically equal to the one induced by the Poincaré inequality on $\mathbb{H}^2$. Eventually, we illustrate that a discrete Laplacian specifically designed for the geometry of the hyperbolic space yields a more precise approximation and offers advantages from both theoretical and computational perspectives. Furthermore, this discrete operator can be effectively generalized to the three-dimensional hyperbolic space.

</details>


### [595] [A unified concept of the degree of ill-posedness for compact and non-compact linear operator equations in Hilbert spaces under the auspices of the spectral theorem](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.01148)
*Frank Werner,Bernd Hofmann*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文利用谱定理，通过乘法算子的分布函数在零点处的增长行为来刻画病态程度，并证明该新概念与基于奇异值的经典定义在紧算子情形下等价，通过Hausdorff矩算子和卷积等例子进行了验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 紧算子和非紧算子的病态程度刻画问题在反问题文献中已被广泛讨论，但现有方法主要针对紧算子（通过奇异值）。本文试图利用谱定理，为自伴有界算子（包括非紧算子）提供一个统一的病态程度刻画框架，填补非紧算子病态程度量化的空白。

Method: 基于谱定理：自伴有界算子酉等价于某个（半有限）测度空间上的乘法算子。从相应的乘子构造分布函数，通过该分布函数在零点处的增长行为来定义病态程度。对于紧算子，证明该定义与奇异值定义的经典病态程度一致。

Result: 证明了基于乘法算子分布函数的新病态程度定义与基于奇异值的经典定义在紧算子情形下等价；通过Hausdorff矩算子和卷积算子等非紧算子的例子，展示了新概念的应用和有效性。

Conclusion: 该工作为自伴有界算子（无论紧与非紧）提供了统一的病态程度刻画方法，拓展了病态性理论的应用范围，尤其适用于非紧算子的情形。

Abstract: Covering ill-posed problems with compact and non-compact operators regarding the degree of ill-posedness is a never ending story written by many authors in the inverse problems literature. This paper tries to add a new narrative and some new facets with respect to this story under the auspices of the spectral theorem. The latter states that any self-adjoint and bounded operator is unitarily equivalent to a multiplication operator on some (semi-finite) measure space. We will exploit this fact and derive a distribution function from the corresponding multiplier, the growth behavior of which at zero allows us to characterize the degree of ill-posedness. We prove that this new concept coincides with the well-known one for compact operators (by means of their singular values), and illustrate the implications along examples including the Hausdorff moment operator and convolutions.

</details>


### [596] [An Abstract Lyapunov Control Optimizer: Local Stabilization and Global Convergence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.01019)
*Bilel Bensaid,Gaël Poëtte,Rodolphe Turpault*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于连续动力系统离散化的自适应步长优化器框架，利用一般拓扑学中的连续选择理论，首次证明了对任意超参数选择，该类自适应优化器（如动量/重球法、p-GD）均具有Lyapunov稳定性和收敛性保证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有文献中多数研究将机器学习优化器视为常步长下连续动力系统的有限差分近似，但缺乏对自适应步长算法的理论保证。本文旨在填补这一空白，从动力系统视角设计步长更新规则，并证明其稳定性与收敛性。

Method: 将优化器视为连续动力系统的离散化，通过保持系统最相关特征的方式设计自适应步长更新规则；引入一般拓扑学中的连续选择理论，克服非恒定、非规则步长策略带来的固有困难，建立统一的Lyapunov稳定性分析框架。

Result: 首次证明了对任意超参数选择，所提出的自适应步长优化器具有Lyapunov稳定性与收敛性保证；该框架为动量/重球算法和p-GD算法（包括自适应和常步长变体）提供了大量新结果。

Conclusion: 基于动力系统离散化的视角，结合连续选择理论，可以有效设计并严格保证自适应步长优化器的稳定性与收敛性，为自适应优化算法的理论分析开辟了新路径。

Abstract: Recently, many machine learning optimizers have been analysed considering them as the asymptotic limit of some differential equations when the step size goes to zero. In other words, the optimizers can be seen as a finite difference scheme applied to a continuous dynamical system. But the major part of the results in the literature concerns constant step size algorithms. The main aim of this paper is to investigate the guarantees of the adaptive step size counterpart. In fact, this dynamical point of view can be used to design step size update rules, by choosing a discretization of the continuous equation that preserves its most relevant features. In this work, we analyse this kind of adaptive optimizers and prove their Lyapunov stability and convergence properties for any choice of hyperparameters. At the best of our knowledge, this paper introduces for the first time the use of continuous selection theory from general topology to overcome some of the intrinsic difficulties due to the non constant and non regular step size policies. The general framework developed gives many new results on adaptive and constant step size Momentum/Heavy-Ball and p-GD algorithms.

</details>


### [597] [A deep learning-based surrogate model for seismic data assimilation in fault activation modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.01215)
*Caterina Millevoi,Claudia Zoccarato,Massimiliano Ferronato*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的代理模型（SurMoDeL），用于地震数据同化中的断层激活建模，以解决传统地质力学建模中计算成本高、不确定性大等挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 地下资源开采与管理需要可靠的地质力学建模，但模型假设、参数固有变异性及数据误差带来的不确定性严重挑战了预测的可靠性。直接观测缺失时，逆建模和随机数据同化方法虽能提供可靠解，但在复杂大规模场景下计算成本过高。

Method: 提出了深度学习的代理模型SurMoDeL，利用神经网络构建复杂地球物理系统的简化但精确表示。设计了两种将断层行为理解融入模型的方法以提升预测精度，并应用该代理模型通过有效的数据同化技术整合地震数据，约束不确定参数。

Result: SurMoDeL实现了更快的模拟与分析，支持不确定性量化；两种断层行为集成方法提升了预测准确性；数据同化技术有效缩小了理论模型与实际观测之间的差距。

Conclusion: 基于深度学习的代理模型能够在保持精度的同时大幅降低计算成本，为大规模复杂地质力学问题中的不确定性量化和数据融合提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Assessing the safety and environmental impacts of subsurface resource exploitation and management is critical and requires robust geomechanical modeling. However, uncertainties stemming from model assumptions, intrinsic variability of governing parameters, and data errors challenge the reliability of predictions. In the absence of direct measurements, inverse modeling and stochastic data assimilation methods can offer reliable solutions, but in complex and large-scale settings, the computational expense can become prohibitive.
  To address these challenges, this paper presents a deep learning-based surrogate model (SurMoDeL) designed for seismic data assimilation in fault activation modeling. The surrogate model leverages neural networks to provide simplified yet accurate representations of complex geophysical systems, enabling faster simulations and analyses essential for uncertainty quantification. The work proposes two different methods to integrate an understanding of fault behavior into the model, thereby enhancing the accuracy of its predictions. The application of the proxy model to integrate seismic data through effective data assimilation techniques efficiently constrains the uncertain parameters, thus bridging the gap between theoretical models and real-world observations.

</details>


### [598] [Domain Decomposition-based coupling of Operator Inference reduced order models via the Schwarz alternating method](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.01433)
*Ian Moore,Christopher Wentland,Anthony Gruber,Irina Tezaur*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文提出并评估了一种基于重叠Schwarz交替方法的非侵入式算子推断（OpInf）降阶模型（ROM）耦合方法（OpInf-Schwarz），可将子域局部ROM与全阶模型（FOM）灵活耦合，并在二维热方程算例中验证了其精度与效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有非侵入式OpInf ROM通常针对整体区域构建，难以灵活处理多尺度或异构子域问题。需要一种最小侵入性的耦合技术，使得不同子域可采用不同保真度模型（ROM或FOM），并在联合仿真中保持精度与效率。

Method: 采用重叠Schwarz交替方法作为耦合框架，将整体问题分解为一系列子域局部问题，子域间通过传输边界条件进行信息交换。各子域可独立选择OpInf ROM或FOM，形成OpInf-Schwarz方法。

Result: 在二维热方程测试中，方法能够成功耦合任意组合的OpInf ROM与FOM；相较于整体FOM，使用OpInf ROM耦合可实现加速。

Conclusion: OpInf-Schwarz是一种有效的多保真度耦合方法，兼具非侵入性、灵活性和计算效率，适用于大规模或异构多尺度PDE问题。

Abstract: This paper presents and evaluates an approach for coupling together subdomain-local reduced order models (ROMs) constructed via non-intrusive operator inference (OpInf) with each other and with subdomain-local full order models (FOMs), following a domain decomposition of the spatial geometry on which a given partial differential equation (PDE) is posed. Joining subdomain-local models is accomplished using the overlapping Schwarz alternating method, a minimally-intrusive multiscale coupling technique that works by transforming a monolithic problem into a sequence of subdomain-local problems, which communicate through transmission boundary conditions imposed on the subdomain interfaces. After formulating the overlapping Schwarz alternating method for OpInf ROMs, termed OpInf-Schwarz, we evaluate the method's accuracy and efficiency on several test cases involving the heat equation in two spatial dimensions. We demonstrate that the method is capable of coupling together arbitrary combinations of OpInf ROMs and FOMs, and that speed-ups over a monolithic FOM are possible when performing OpInf ROM coupling.

</details>


### [599] [Parametric holomorphy of elliptic eigenvalue problems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.01227)
*Byeong-Ho Bahn*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文针对带可数无限个参数的偏微分方程（参数化PDE），提出了一种验证参数全纯性的通用框架，通过参数导数的边界来建立全纯性，并将其应用于线性和半线性参数化椭圆特征值问题（EVP），证明了基态特征对具有所需的全纯性，并导出了混合导数的边界，这对拟蒙特卡洛方法的误差分析至关重要。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 已有研究表明，特定类型的参数全纯性能够使深度神经网络在求解参数化PDE时避免维数灾难，但如何系统性地验证这种全纯性仍缺乏通用框架。本文旨在填补这一空白，提供一种基于参数导数边界的验证方法。

Method: 提出了一种通用框架，通过建立参数偏导数的上界来证明参数化PDE解的解析全纯性。具体以线性和半线性参数化椭圆特征值问题为例，验证了基态特征对（最小特征值和对应特征函数）的参数全纯性，并在此基础上推导了混合导数的边界估计。

Result: 成功证明了在椭圆特征值问题中，基态特征对具有所需的参数全纯性；同时推导出了基态特征对的混合导数边界，这些边界是拟蒙特卡洛方法误差分析的关键前提条件。

Conclusion: 该通用框架可以系统性地验证参数化PDE解的参数全纯性，不仅适用于椭圆特征值问题，也具有扩展到其他类型参数化PDE的潜力。所导出的混合导数边界为后续采用拟蒙特卡洛方法进行高效数值求解提供了理论保障。

Abstract: The study of parameter-dependent partial differential equations (parametric PDEs) with countably many parameters has been actively studied for the last few decades. In particular, it has been well known that a certain type of parametric holomorphy of the PDE solutions allows the application of deep neural networks without encountering the curse of dimensionality. This paper aims to propose a general framework for verifying the desired parametric holomorphy by utilizing the bounds on parametric derivatives. The framework is illustrated with examples of parametric elliptic eigenvalue problems (EVPs), encompassing both linear and semilinear cases. As the results, it will be shown that the ground eigenpairs have the desired holomorphy. Furthermore, under the same conditions, the bounds for the mixed derivatives of the ground eigenpairs are derived. These bounds are well known to take a crucial role in the error analysis of quasi-Monte Carlo methods.

</details>


### [600] [Mixed finite element methods for the Landau--Lifshitz--Baryakhtar and the regularised Landau--Lifshitz--Bloch equations in micromagnetics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.01125)
*Agus L. Soenjaya*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文针对LLBar和正则化LLBloch方程，提出了半离散混合有限元格式及基于半隐式Euler和Crank-Nicolson方法的全离散格式，证明了无条件能量稳定性和最优收敛率，并通过数值实验验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高温下铁磁体磁自旋场动力学由LLBar和LLBloch方程描述，但现有数值方法缺乏统一处理框架，且需要保证能量耗散性和最优收敛精度。

Method: 采用统一框架处理LLBar和正则化LLBloch方程；提出半离散混合有限元格式；分别基于半隐式Euler法和半隐式Crank-Nicolson法构建两种全离散格式。

Result: 格式无条件能量稳定且在离散层面保持能量耗散性；误差分析表明在L²、L∞和H¹范数下达到最优收敛率；数值实验验证了理论结果。

Conclusion: 所提混合有限元方案能精确逼近磁化矢量和有效磁场，兼具理论严谨性和计算可靠性，为高温微磁学模拟提供了有效数值工具。

Abstract: The Landau--Lifshitz--Baryakhtar (LLBar) and the Landau--Lifshitz--Bloch (LLBloch) equations are nonlinear vector-valued PDEs which arise in the theory of micromagnetics to describe the dynamics of magnetic spin field in a ferromagnet at elevated temperatures. We consider the LLBar and the regularised LLBloch equations in a unified manner, thus allowing us to treat the numerical approximations for both problems at once. In this paper, we propose a semi-discrete mixed finite element scheme and two fully discrete mixed finite element schemes based on a semi-implicit Euler method and a semi-implicit Crank--Nicolson method to solve the problems. These numerical schemes provide accurate approximations to both the magnetisation vector and the effective magnetic field. Moreover, they are proven to be unconditionally energy-stable and preserve energy dissipativity of the system at the discrete level. Error analysis is performed which shows optimal rates of convergence in $\mathbb{L}^2$, $\mathbb{L}^\infty$, and $\mathbb{H}^1$ norms. These theoretical results are further corroborated by several numerical experiments.

</details>


### [601] [On the convergence of the pseudospectral approximation of reproduction numbers for age-structured models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.01520)
*Simone De Reggi,Francesca Scarabel,Rossana Vermiglio*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文严格证明了作者近期提出的一种基于伪谱离散化的数值方法在逼近有限年龄跨度结构种群模型再生数时的收敛性，并给出了收敛阶与模型系数正则性的关系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为有限年龄跨度结构种群模型的再生数（如R0）提供一种可严格证明收敛性的数值逼近方法，填补该领域理论分析的空白。

Method: 通过积分映射将问题重新表述在绝对连续函数空间上；基于出生与转移过程的拆分定义世代映射算子（对应下一代算子）；采用伪谱离散化将无穷维算子逼近为矩阵；证明矩阵谱半径收敛到真实再生数，且特征向量（插值后）收敛到特征函数。

Result: 证明了数值方法的收敛性，收敛阶取决于模型系数的正则性；实验结果验证了理论发现。

Conclusion: 该数值方法可有效且可靠地近似有限年龄跨度结构种群模型的再生数，并具有应用于流行病学分析的潜力。

Abstract: We rigorously investigate the convergence of a new numerical method, recently proposed by the authors, to approximate the reproduction numbers of a large class of age-structured population models with finite age span. The method consists in reformulating the problem on a space of absolutely continuous functions via an integral mapping. For any chosen splitting into birth and transition processes, we first define an operator that maps a generation to the next one (corresponding to the Next Generation Operator in the case of R0). Then, we approximate the infinite-dimensional operator with a matrix using pseudospectral discretization. In this paper, we prove that the spectral radius of the resulting matrix converges to the true reproduction number, and the (interpolation of the) corresponding eigenvector converges to the associated eigenfunction, with convergence order that depends on the regularity of the model coefficients. Results are confirmed experimentally and applications to epidemiology are discussed.

</details>


### [602] [Low-Frequency Stabilizations of the PMCHWT Equation for Dielectric and Conductive Media: On a Full-Wave Alternative to Eddy-Current Solvers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.01321)
*V. Giunzioni,A. Scazzola,A. Merlini,F. P. Andriulli*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于准亥姆霍兹投影子的新型PMCHWT方程稳定化策略，解决了频率和导电率相关的不稳定性问题，能够在整个低频区域（包括涡流区域）保持良好条件数，适用于任意可穿透材料（从介质到导体），并通过适当选择准亥姆霍兹分量的重新缩放系数防止低频精度损失，同时兼容快速求解器并适用于多连通几何结构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: PMCHWT方程在低频和导电率变化时存在数值不稳定性问题，现有方法（如Loop-Star分解）与快速求解器不兼容且难以处理多连通几何结构，需要一种更稳定、普适且高效的解决方案。

Method: 利用准亥姆霍兹投影子对PMCHWT方程进行重新缩放和稳定化处理，通过适当选择准亥姆霍兹分量的重新缩放系数来防止低频精度损失，避免了传统的Loop-Star分解，从而兼容快速求解器并支持多连通几何结构。

Result: 所提方法在整个低频区域（包括涡流区域）保持良好条件数，适用于从介质到导体的任意可穿透材料，在电感型和电容型磁扇激励下不出现低频精度损失，并通过数值算例验证了在简单连通和多连通几何结构上的有效性。

Conclusion: 该稳定化策略有效解决了PMCHWT方程的频率和导电率相关不稳定性，具有广泛适用性、与快速求解器兼容性及处理多连通几何结构的能力，为电磁计算中低频问题提供了一种高效稳定的方案。

Abstract: We propose here a novel stabilization strategy for the PMCHWT equation that cures its frequency and conductivity related instabilities and is obtained by leveraging quasi-Helmholtz projectors. The resulting formulation is well-conditioned in the entire low-frequency regime, including the eddy current one, and can be applied to arbitrarily penetrable materials, ranging from dielectric to conductive ones. In addition, by choosing the rescaling coefficients of the quasi-Helmholtz components appropriately, we prevent the typical loss of accuracy occurring at low frequency in the presence of inductive and capacitive type magnetic frill excitations, commonly used in circuit modeling to impose a potential difference. Finally, leveraging on quasi-Helmholtz projectors instead than on the standard Loop-Star decomposition, our formulation is also compatible with most fast solvers and is amenable to multiply connected geometries, without any computational overhead for the search for the global loops of the structure. The efficacy of the proposed preconditioning scheme when applied to both simply and multiply connected geometries is corroborated by numerical examples.

</details>


### [603] [A Line Search Algorithm for Multiphysics Problems with Fracture Deformation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.01184)
*Ivar Stefansson*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文针对多物理场问题中因断裂接触力学引起的强非线性和不连续性，提出了一种基于自适应变量缩放和线搜索的廉价可靠算法，通过识别接触状态转变并控制更新权重来避免Newton法发散，并在多孔介质断裂问题的多案例中验证了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多物理场问题中的断裂接触力学引入开/闭和滑/粘等不连续性，导致Newton法常不收敛，而传统全局残差线搜索成本高且效果不佳，因此需要一种廉价可靠的求解策略。

Method: 提出自适应变量缩放算法：利用线搜索识别接触状态转变点，然后选择解更新权重，确保断裂单元不会过度越过转变面。

Result: 在裂缝性多孔介质的孔隙力学和热孔隙力学测试案例中进行了验证，涵盖单裂缝和多裂缝情形，并讨论了变量与方程恰当缩放的重要性。

Conclusion: 所提方法能够高效、可靠地处理断裂接触非线性，优于传统Newton法和全局线搜索策略。

Abstract: Models for multiphysics problems often contain strong nonlinearities. Including fracture contact mechanics introduces discontinuities at the transition between open and closed or sliding and sticking fractures. The resulting system of equations is highly challenging to solve. The naïve choice of Newton's method frequently fails to converge, calling for more refined solution techniques such as line search methods. When dealing with strong nonlinearities and discontinuities, a global line search based on the magnitude of the residual of all equations is at best costly to evaluate and at worst fails to converge. We therefore suggest a cheap and reliable approach tailored to the discontinuities. Utilising adaptive variable scaling, the algorithm uses a line search to identify the transition between contact states. Then, a solution update weight is chosen to ensure that no fracture cells move too far beyond the transition. We demonstrate the algorithm on a series of test cases for poromechanics and thermoporomechanics in fractured porous media. We consider both single- and multifracture cases and study the importance of proper scaling of variables and equations.

</details>


### [604] [Convergence of Noise-Free Sampling Algorithms with Regularized Wasserstein Proximals](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.01567)
*Fuqun Han,Stanley Osher,Wuchen Li*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文研究后向正则化Wasserstein近端（BRWP）方法的收敛性，该方法用于采样目标分布。BRWP可视为概率流ODE的半隐式时间离散化，其得分函数密度满足过阻尼Langevin动力学的Fokker-Planck方程。通过核表示（来自正则化Wasserstein近端算子）近似密度及得分函数演化，并结合对偶公式和局部泰勒级数展开，我们建立了BRWP方法在KL散度下对强log-concave目标分布的收敛保证，并识别了最优和最大步长。实验表明，BRWP在收敛速度和偏差上优于ULA等经典Langevin蒙特卡洛方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有Langevin蒙特卡洛方法（如ULA）存在收敛速度慢和偏差大的问题，亟需更高效的采样方法。BRWP方法通过半隐式离散化和正则化Wasserstein近端算子进行密度演化近似，有潜力在理论上保证更快收敛和更小偏差。

Method: 1. 将BRWP方法表述为概率流ODE的半隐式时间离散化，其得分函数密度满足Fokker-Planck方程；2. 通过正则化Wasserstein近端算子的核表示近似密度及得分函数演化；3. 利用对偶公式和局部泰勒级数推导该核公式的渐近展开；4. 基于KL散度建立收敛性分析，确定最优和最大步长。

Result: 建立了BRWP方法在KL散度下对强log-concave目标分布的收敛保证，识别了最优和最大步长；理论分析和数值实验均表明BRWP比ULA等经典Langevin蒙特卡洛方法收敛更快、偏差更小。

Conclusion: BRWP是一种理论上保证收敛且优于经典Langevin蒙特卡洛方法的采样方法，其半隐式确定性方案在收敛速度和偏差方面具有显著优势。

Abstract: In this work, we investigate the convergence properties of the backward regularized Wasserstein proximal (BRWP) method for sampling a target distribution. The BRWP approach can be shown as a semi-implicit time discretization for a probability flow ODE with the score function whose density satisfies the Fokker-Planck equation of the overdamped Langevin dynamics. Specifically, the evolution of the density, hence the score function, is approximated via a kernel representation derived from the regularized Wasserstein proximal operator. By applying the dual formulation and a localized Taylor series to obtain the asymptotic expansion of this kernel formula, we establish guaranteed convergence in terms of the Kullback-Leibler divergence for the BRWP method towards a strongly log-concave target distribution. Our analysis also identifies the optimal and maximum step sizes for convergence. Furthermore, we demonstrate that the deterministic and semi-implicit BRWP scheme outperforms many classical Langevin Monte Carlo methods, such as the Unadjusted Langevin Algorithm (ULA), by offering faster convergence and reduced bias. Numerical experiments further validate the convergence analysis of the BRWP method.

</details>


### [605] [Error analysis of DGTD for linear Maxwell equations with inhomogeneous interface conditions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.01398)
*Benjamin Dörich,Julian Dörner,Marlis Hochbruck*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文针对带有非均匀界面条件的线性各向同性Maxwell方程，采用空间上不连续Galerkin方法和时间上蛙跳格式进行离散化。建立了分析框架，证明了问题的适定性，推导了稳定性估计，并利用这些结果在误差分析中推导了空间和全离散化的严格误差界。数值实验验证了理论结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为带有非均匀界面条件的Maxwell方程提供严格的数学分析框架，包括适定性、稳定性和误差界，弥补该领域理论分析的不足。

Method: 采用空间上的不连续Galerkin方法（DG）和时间上的蛙跳格式（leapfrog scheme）对线性各向同性Maxwell方程进行离散化，并在分析框架中证明适定性、推导稳定性估计，进而进行严格的误差分析。

Result: 建立了问题的适定性，得到了稳定性估计，并推导了空间离散和全离散化的严格误差界，数值实验验证了理论结果。

Conclusion: 本文提出的不连续Galerkin-蛙跳格式对于带有非均匀界面条件的Maxwell方程是有效且可靠的，具有严格的数学理论基础。

Abstract: In the present paper we consider linear and isotropic Maxwell equations with inhomogeneous interface conditions. We discretize the problem with the discontinuous Galerkin method in space and with the leapfrog scheme in time. An analytical setting is provided in which we show wellposedness of the problem, derive stability estimates, and exploit this in the error analysis to prove rigorous error bounds for both the spatial and full discretization. The theoretical findings are confirmed with numerical experiments.

</details>


### [606] [Petrov-Galerkin Dynamical Low Rank Approximation:SUPG stabilisation of advection-dominated problems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.01404)
*Fabio Nobile,Thomas Trigo Trindade*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 提出了一种广义Petrov-Galerkin动态低秩近似（DLR）框架，用于随机PDE问题。该框架基于标准动态低秩近似的动态正交形式，能够无缝集成多种标准稳定化技术（广义Galerkin或Petrov-Galerkin方法）。将其应用于对流主导问题中带有小随机扰动的SUPG稳定化，分析了两种时间离散化的范数稳定性。数值实验证实SUPG的稳定性质自然延续到DLR框架中。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的动态低秩近似方法缺乏系统性的稳定化机制，难以处理对流主导问题中的数值不稳定性。需要一种通用框架，能将成熟稳定化技术引入DLR体系，以提升其对随机PDE的求解鲁棒性。

Method: 1) 提出广义Petrov-Galerkin DLR框架，将标准动态正交DLR推广为可容纳广义Galerkin和Petrov-Galerkin稳定化方法的形式；2) 将该框架应用于SUPG稳定化，处理带有小随机扰动的对流主导输运问题；3) 分析两种时间离散格式的范数稳定性。

Result: 证明了所提出的框架能够将SUPG稳定化自然地嵌入DLR方法中，两种时间离散化方案均具备范数稳定性，数值实验验证了稳定化性质的有效保留。

Conclusion: 提出的广义Petrov-Galerkin DLR框架为随机PDE求解提供了一种系统化的稳定化途径，连接了经典稳定化技术与低秩近似方法，具有较好的通用性和应用前景。

Abstract: We propose a novel framework of generalised Petrov-Galerkin Dynamical Low Rank Approximations (DLR) in the context of random PDEs. It builds on the standard Dynamical Low Rank Approximations in their Dynamically Orthogonal formulation. It allows to seamlessly build-in many standard and well-studied stabilisation techniques that can be framed as either generalised Galerkin methods, or Petrov-Galerkin methods. The framework is subsequently applied to the case of Streamine Upwind/Petrov Galerkin (SUPG) stabilisation of advection-dominated problems with small stochastic perturbations of the transport field. The norm-stability properties of two time discretisations are analysed. Numerical experiments confirm that the stabilising properties of the SUPG method naturally carry over to the DLR framework.

</details>


### [607] [Optimal Compactly Supported Functions in Sobolev Spaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.01759)
*Robert Schaback*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文构造了Sobolev空间中具有最小范数、最大支撑和最大中心值的紧支撑函数，这些函数可用作插值/逼近的优化基函数或无网格法中的形函数，并给出了插值收敛率 $h^{m-d/2}$ 的正确阶数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在Sobolev空间中构造紧支撑的优化基函数，以在插值或逼近中获得最优收敛率，并填补关于收敛速率 $m-d/2$ 的理论空白。

Method: 通过Hilbert空间中的投影方法以及迹算子分析进行构造；在有限光滑度的Sobolev空间中实现紧支撑函数的优化。

Result: 成功构造了具有最小范数、最大支撑和最大中心值的紧支撑函数；给出了插值收敛率 $h^{m-d/2}$ 的正确阶数，以及支撑半径 $r\to 0$ 时范数 blow-up 为 $r^{-(m-d/2)}$ 的结论。

Conclusion: 在有限光滑度的Sobolev空间中可构造紧支撑的优化函数，而在无限光滑核（如Gaussian）的Hilbert空间中则不存在此类函数；所构造的函数可用于证明插值收敛率的上界。

Abstract: This paper constructs unique compactly supported functions in Sobolev spaces that have minimal norm, maximal support, and maximal central value, under certain renormalizations. They may serve as optimized basis functions in interpolation or approximation, or as shape functions in meshless methods for PDE solving. Their norm is useful for proving upper bounds for convergence rates of interpolation in Sobolev spaces $H_2^m(\R^d)$, and this paper gives the correct rate $m-d/2$ that arises as convergence like $h^{m-d/2}$ for interpolation at meshwidth $h\to 0$ or a blow-up like $r^{-(m-d/2)}$ for norms of compactly supported functions with support radius $r\to 0$. In Hilbert spaces with infinitely smooth reproducing kernels, like Gaussians or inverse multiquadrics, there are no compactly supported functions at all, but in spaces with limited smoothness, compactly supported functions exist and can be optimized in the above way. The construction is described in Hilbert space via projections, and analytically via trace operators. Numerical examples are provided.

</details>


### [608] [The random timestep Euler method and its continuous dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.01409)
*Jonas Latz*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文提出并研究了随机欧拉动力学，这是一种连续时间马尔可夫过程，等价于随机时间步长欧拉方法的线性样条插值。通过生成元分析、局部截断误差分析、Foster-Lyapunov准则等方法，证明了该动力学方法收敛到ODE解，并建立了稳定性结果，最后通过数值实验验证了理论分析。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随机时间步长的ODE求解器出现在混沌动力系统、低正则性微分方程以及随机优化等场景中，但缺乏系统的理论分析。本文旨在为这类方法建立严格的收敛性和稳定性理论基础。

Method: 首先提出随机欧拉动力学（连续时间马尔可夫过程），等价于随机步长欧拉法的线性样条插值。通过确定性欧拉动力学的生成元一阶近似获得定性理解，利用无穷小生成元分析和局部截断误差分析证明收敛性，通过随机步长欧拉法的直接分析和Foster-Lyapunov准则证明稳定性（包括收敛到平稳分布的速度界）。

Result: 证明了随机欧拉动力学收敛到ODE解，通过Foster-Lyapunov准则给出了稳定性保证及收敛到平稳分布的速度界，并讨论了二阶随机欧拉动力学。

Conclusion: 随机欧拉动力学可作为随机时间步长ODE求解器的理论框架，所提出的收敛性和稳定性分析为相关算法提供了理论保障，数值实验验证了理论结果的正确性。

Abstract: ODE solvers with randomly sampled timestep sizes appear in the context of chaotic dynamical systems, differential equations with low regularity, and, implicitly, in stochastic optimisation. In this work, we propose and study the stochastic Euler dynamics - a continuous-time Markov process that is equivalent to a linear spline interpolation of a random timestep (forward) Euler method. We understand the stochastic Euler dynamics as a path-valued ansatz for the ODE solution that shall be approximated. We first obtain qualitative insights by studying deterministic Euler dynamics which we derive through a first order approximation to the infinitesimal generator of the stochastic Euler dynamics. Then we show convergence of the stochastic Euler dynamics to the ODE solution by studying the associated infinitesimal generators and by a novel local truncation error analysis. Next we prove stability by an immediate analysis of the random timestep Euler method and by deriving Foster-Lyapunov criteria for the stochastic Euler dynamics; the latter also yield bounds on the speed of convergence to stationarity. The paper ends with a discussion of second-order stochastic Euler dynamics and a series of numerical experiments that appear to verify our analytical results.

</details>


### [609] [Efficient Shallow Ritz Method For 1D Diffusion-Reaction Problems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.01496)
*Zhiqiang Cai,Anastassia Doktorova,Robert D. Falgout,César Herrera*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文针对一维扩散反应问题，提出了浅层Ritz方法的阻尼块牛顿（dBN）方法，通过交替优化线性与非线性参数，以O(n)计算成本实现近最优逼近阶，并能有效处理非光滑问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在扩散反应问题中，浅层ReLU神经网络的Ritz方法面临新挑战：线性参数的质量矩阵稠密且病态程度比刚度矩阵更严重，非线性参数的Hessian矩阵稠密且可能奇异。本文旨在解决这些困难，设计高效优化方法。

Method: 提出阻尼块牛顿（dBN）方法，交替优化浅层ReLU神经网络的线性参数（通过求解线性系统）和非线性参数（通过阻尼牛顿步更新），实现Ritz泛函的优化。该方法计算复杂度为O(n)。

Result: 数值实验表明，以均匀分区作为非线性参数初值，dBN方法能将网格点移动到近最优位置。该方法不仅适用于扩散反应问题，也可推广至最小二乘逼近问题。

Conclusion: dBN方法有效解决了扩散反应问题中线性与非线性参数优化的双重困难，以线性计算成本实现了近最优逼近阶，为非光滑问题的神经网络求解提供了高效方案。

Abstract: This paper studies the shallow Ritz method for solving one-dimensional diffusion-reaction problems. The method is capable of improving the order of approximation for non-smooth problems. By following a similar approach to the one presented in [9], we present a damped block Newton (dBN) method to achieve nearly optimal order of approximation. The dBN method optimizes the Ritz functional by alternating between the linear and non-linear parameters of the shallow ReLU neural network (NN). For diffusion-reaction problems, new difficulties arise: (1) for the linear parameters, the mass matrix is dense and even more ill-conditioned than the stiffness matrix, and (2) for the non-linear parameters, the Hessian matrix is dense and may be singular. This paper addresses these challenges, resulting in a dBN method with computational cost of ${\cal O}(n)$.
  The ideas presented for diffusion-reaction problems can also be applied to least-squares approximation problems. For both applications, starting with the non-linear parameters as a uniform partition, numerical experiments show that the dBN method moves the mesh points to nearly optimal locations.

</details>


### [610] [Nonlinear PageRank Problem for Local Graph Partitioning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.01834)
*Costy Kodsi,Dimosthenis Pasadakis*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于Moore-Penrose逆的非线性PageRank推广方法，用于局部图划分。利用Levenberg-Marquardt方法求解，通过电导率准则选择最佳聚类。实验表明该方法在低电导率集合生成和聚类准确性上持续超越现有算法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 局部图划分任务中，传统PageRank方法在处理非线性结构时存在局限性，需要一种更通用的框架来提升聚类质量和准确性。

Method: 首先构建关联矩阵的Moore-Penrose逆，将PageRank问题推广到非线性形式；然后采用全秩Jacobian变体的Levenberg-Marquardt方法进行数值求解；最后根据解提供的排序形成顶点集合，并用电导率准则判定最佳聚类。

Result: 在合成图和真实世界图上，该方法不仅生成了低电导率集合，而且在局部聚类恢复准确性上持续超越现有最先进算法。

Conclusion: 非线性PageRank推广结合Levenberg-Marquardt求解策略是局部图划分的有效方法，在性能上优于现有技术。

Abstract: A nonlinear generalisation of the PageRank problem involving the Moore-Penrose inverse of an incidence matrix is developed for local graph partitioning purposes. The Levenberg-Marquardt method with a full rank Jacobian variant provides a strategy for obtaining a numerical solution to the generalised problem. Sets of vertices are formed according to the ranking supplied by the solution, and a conductance criterion decides upon the set that best represents the cluster around a starting vertex. Experiments on both synthetic and real-world inspired graphs demonstrate the capability of the approach to not only produce low conductance sets, but to also recover local clusters with an accuracy that consistently surpasses state-of-the-art algorithms.

</details>


### [611] [Using Linearized Optimal Transport to Predict the Evolution of Stochastic Particle Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.01857)
*Nicholas Karris,Evangelos A. Nikitopoulos,Ioannis G. Kevrekidis,Seungjoon Lee,Alexander Cloninger*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种无需显式学习演化算子的欧拉型方法，用于预测时变概率测度的演化。通过线性化最优传输理论证明了测度版本欧拉法在测度"平滑"演化时具有一阶精度。针对经验测度（如随机粒子系统）不平滑的情况，该方法仍能在大步长下准确预测集体行为，从而减少微观模拟步数，起到宏观时间步进器的作用。在生物智能体模型、PDE模型和Langevin动力学三个示例中验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统方法需要显式学习控制概率测度演化的算子，而许多实际系统中仅能通过微观智能体模拟访问系统行为，缺乏宏观演化算子。作者希望开发一种仅基于微观数据就能直接预测宏观概率分布演化的方法，避免学习中间算子，同时在大时间步长下保持精度以减少计算成本。

Method: 提出概率测度版本的欧拉方法（Euler-type method），利用线性化最优传输理论进行精度分析。当测度平滑演化时证明其一阶收敛性；当测度为经验分布（不平滑）时，算法仍可直接应用，利用分布层面的平滑性进行大步长预测。算法本质上是一个宏观时间步进器，只需少量微观模拟步即可推进宏观时间。

Result: 理论证明了平滑演化下的一阶精度；在三个示例（生物智能体模型、PDE模型、Langevin动力学）中，该方法在较大欧拉步长下仍能准确预测集体行为，显著减少了所需的微观模拟步数。

Conclusion: 本文提供了一种有效的大尺度时间步进方法，通过概率测度层面的欧拉法绕过了显式学习演化算子的需求，在保持精度的同时大幅降低微观模拟成本，适用于多尺度建模场景。

Abstract: We develop an Euler-type method to predict the evolution of a time-dependent probability measure without explicitly learning an operator that governs its evolution. We use linearized optimal transport theory to prove that the measure-valued analog of Euler's method is first-order accurate when the measure evolves ``smoothly.'' In applications of interest, however, the measure is an empirical distribution of a system of stochastic particles whose behavior is only accessible through an agent-based micro-scale simulation. In such cases, this empirical measure does not evolve smoothly because the individual particles move chaotically on short time scales. However, we can still perform our Euler-type method, and when the particles' collective distribution approximates a measure that \emph{does} evolve smoothly, we observe that the algorithm still accurately predicts this collective behavior over relatively large Euler steps, thus reducing the number of micro-scale steps required to step forward in time. In this way, our algorithm provides a ``macro-scale timestepper'' that requires less micro-scale data to still maintain accuracy, which we demonstrate with three illustrative examples: a biological agent-based model, a model of a PDE, and a model of Langevin dynamics.

</details>


### [612] [Preconditioning of the generalized Stokes problem arising from the approximation of the time-dependent Navier-Stokes equations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.01783)
*Melvin Creff,Jean-Luc Guermond*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文系统比较了求解非定常不可压Navier-Stokes方程广义Stokes问题的多种迭代方法（包括Schur补、全耦合系统、有无增广拉格朗日等预处理技术），在6800万自由度的细非结构网格上测试发现：虽然大多数方法的GMRES/CG收敛率与网格尺寸无关且随雷诺数增加而改善，但所有方法的吞吐量平均比传统压力修正和速度修正方法慢25倍，因此不适用于时间依赖问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究各种先进的迭代求解器（Schur补、全耦合系统、增广拉格朗日等）能否在吞吐量上与传统的压力修正和速度修正方法竞争，评估其应用于非定常问题的可行性。

Method: 在6800万自由度的非结构网格上，对广义Stokes问题的多种迭代求解方法进行数值测试，包括Schur补预处理、全耦合系统预处理、增广拉格朗日方法等，以吞吐量（每个核心每秒每时间步处理的自由度数量）作为主要性能指标。

Result: (1) 求解压力Schur补与全耦合系统在吞吐量上无显著差异；(2) 增广拉格朗日方法并行可扩展性很好，但未使用增广拉格朗日时吞吐量更优；(3) 所有测试方法的吞吐量平均比传统压力修正和速度修正方法慢25倍。

Conclusion: 这些迭代方法虽然对稳态问题非常高效，但由于吞吐量远低于传统方法，均不适用于求解时间依赖问题。

Abstract: The paper compares standard iterative methods for solving the generalized Stokes problem arising from the time and space approximation of the time-dependent incompressible Navier-Stokes equations. Various preconditioning techniques are considered (Schur complement, fully coupled system, with and without augmented Lagrangian). One investigates whether these methods can compete with traditional pressure-correction and velocity-correction methods in terms of throughput (number of degrees of freedom per time step per core per second). Numerical tests on fine unstructured meshes (68 millions degrees of freedoms) demonstrate GMRES/CG convergence rates that are independent of the mesh size and improve with the Reynolds number for most methods. Three conclusions are drawn: (1) Whether solving the pressure Schur complement or the fully coupled system does not make any significant difference in terms of throughput. (2) Although very good parallel scalability is observed for the augmented Lagrangian method, the best throughput is achieved without using the augmented Lagrangian formulation. (3) The throughput of all the methods tested in the paper are on average 25 times slower than that of traditional pressure-correction and velocity-correction methods. Hence, although all these methods are very efficient for solving steady state problems, none of them is unfortunately competitive for solving time-dependent problems.

</details>


### [613] [ELM-FBPINNs: An Efficient Multilevel Random Feature Method](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.01949)
*Samuel Anderson,Victorita Dolean,Ben Moseley,Jennifer Pestana*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结合多级域分解、单位分割构造与随机特征模型的混合方法（多级ELM-FBPINN），通过用极限学习机替代可训练子域网络，完全消除反向传播，将训练简化为结构化线性最小二乘问题。实验表明该方法在保持竞争精度的同时显著加速收敛，并提高了对架构和优化参数的鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于域分解的物理信息神经网络变体（如FBPINN）虽通过局部化缓解了PINN的收敛慢和谱偏差问题，但仍依赖子域内的迭代非线性优化，计算效率受限。

Method: 将多级域分解和单位-of-one构造与随机特征模型（极限学习机）结合，用ELM替换可训练子域网络，消除反向传播，将训练转化为结构化线性最小二乘问题。

Result: ELM-FBPINN和多级ELM-FBPINN在代表性基准问题上达到竞争精度，显著加速收敛，并提高了对架构和优化参数的鲁棒性。消融研究明确了域分解和随机特征增强在控制表达能力、条件数和可扩展性方面的不同作用。

Conclusion: 所提出的混合方法有效解决了传统PINN及其域分解变体的计算瓶颈，为物理信息机器学习提供了一种更高效、更稳健的替代方案。

Abstract: Domain-decomposed variants of physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) such as finite basis PINNs (FBPINNs) mitigate some of PINNs' issues like slow convergence and spectral bias through localisation, but still rely on iterative nonlinear optimisation within each subdomain. In this work, we propose a hybrid approach that combines multilevel domain decomposition and partition-of-unity constructions with random feature models, yielding a method referred to as multilevel ELM-FBPINN. By replacing trainable subdomain networks with extreme learning machines, the resulting formulation eliminates backpropagation entirely and reduces training to a structured linear least-squares problem. We provide a systematic numerical study comparing ELM-FBPINNs and multilevel ELM-FBPINNs with standard PINNs and FBPINNs on representative benchmark problems, demonstrating that ELM-FBPINNs and multilevel ELM-FBPINNs achieve competitive accuracy while significantly accelerating convergence and improving robustness with respect to architectural and optimisation parameters. Through ablation studies, we further clarify the distinct roles of domain decomposition and random feature enrichment in controlling expressivity, conditioning, and scalability.

</details>


### [614] [A Fast Fourier-Galerkin Method for Solving Boundary Integral Equations on Torus-Shaped Surfaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.02199)
*Yiying Fang,Ying Jiang,Jiafeng Su*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种快速傅里叶-伽辽金方法，用于求解环面形状表面上的边界积分方程。通过分析积分算子核的性质，推导了表示矩阵元素的衰减模式，并设计了一种截断策略，将稠密表示矩阵压缩为仅包含O(N ln² N)个非零元素的稀疏形式。证明了该策略具有拟最优收敛阶O(N^{-p/2} ln N)，并保持了数值稳定性。数值实验验证了理论结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 环面形状表面上的边界积分方程求解中，传统方法生成的表示矩阵是稠密的，计算和存储成本高昂。现有方法难以高效处理这类问题，亟需一种能够利用算子核特性进行压缩加速的解法。

Method: 采用快速傅里叶-伽辽金方法；分析积分算子核性质以推导表示矩阵元素的衰减模式；基于该衰减模式设计截断策略，将稠密矩阵压缩为仅含O(N ln² N)个非零元素的稀疏矩阵。

Result: 截断策略达到拟最优收敛阶O(N^{-p/2} ln N)；矩阵非零元素数量为O(N ln² N)；数值稳定性在整个求解过程中得以保持；数值实验验证了理论分析。

Conclusion: 所提出的快速傅里叶-伽辽金方法能高效求解环面表面上的边界积分方程，在显著降低计算复杂度的同时保持拟最优收敛精度和数值稳定性，为环面几何上的边界积分方程求解提供了有效的加速方案。

Abstract: In this paper, we introduce a fast Fourier-Galerkin method for solving boundary integral equations on torus-shaped surfaces, which are diffeomorphic to a torus. We analyze the properties of the integral operator's kernel to derive the decay pattern of the entries in the representation matrix. Leveraging this decay pattern, we devise a truncation strategy that efficiently compresses the dense representation matrix of the integral operator into a sparser form containing only $\mathcal{O}(N\ln^2 N)$ nonzero entries, where $N$ denotes the degrees of freedom of the discretization method. We prove that this truncation strategy achieves a quasi-optimal convergence order of $\mathcal{O}(N^{-p/2}\ln N)$, with $p$ representing the degree of regularity of the exact solution to the boundary integral equation. Additionally, we confirm that the truncation strategy preserves stability throughout the solution process. Numerical experiments validate our theoretical findings and demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method.

</details>


### [615] [Generalized Fourier Diffraction Theorem and Filtered Backpropagation for Tomographic Reconstruction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.01793)
*Clemens Kirisits,Michael Quellmalz,Eric Setterqvist*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文建立了任意维度下傅里叶衍射定理的严格推广，给出了散射场测量与散射势重建之间的精确傅里叶域关系，并推导了适用于多种实验设置的通用滤波反传播公式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有衍射断层重建理论在傅里叶衍射定理的推广上缺乏任意维度的严格数学形式，且对不同实验参数（物体取向、入射方向、照明频率）同时变化下的重建方法研究不足，需要建立统一的理论框架。

Method: 首先严格推广傅里叶衍射定理至任意维度，建立散射场测量与散射势在傅里叶域的精确定量关系；在此基础上分析不同实验设置下的傅里叶覆盖范围；最后通过允许参数同时且不连续变化，推导通用的滤波反传播公式。

Result: 得到了任意维度下傅里叶衍射定理的严格形式，明确了不同实验参数对傅里叶覆盖范围的影响，并导出了适用于一大类实验设置的散射势显式近似重建公式。

Conclusion: 该工作为衍射断层重建提供了严格的数学基础，所提出的通用滤波反传播公式可以适用于多种灵活的实验配置，具有广泛的应用潜力。

Abstract: This paper concerns diffraction-tomographic reconstruction of an object characterized by its scattering potential. We establish a rigorous generalization of the Fourier diffraction theorem in arbitrary dimension, giving a precise relation in the Fourier domain between measurements of the scattered wave and reconstructions of the scattering potential. With this theorem at hand, Fourier coverages for different experimental setups are investigated taking into account parameters such as object orientation, direction of incidence and frequency of illumination.
