Allowing for simultaneous and discontinuous variation of these parameters, a general filtered backpropagation formula is derived resulting in an explicit approximation of the scattering potential for a large class of experimental setups.

</details>


### [616] [Joint Approximate Partial Diagonalization of Large Matrices](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.02005)
*Abd-Krim Seghouane,Yousef Saad*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文针对大规模对称矩阵集合，提出“部分联合对角化”问题：寻找一个子空间的正交基，使得所有矩阵在该子空间上的表示接近对角化，并给出求解方法与应用示例。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当矩阵维度很高时，传统的正交联合对角化（OJD）要求完全对角化过于严格且计算成本高。自然推广是寻找一个公共的近特征子空间，而非完整对角化。

Method: 首先寻找输入矩阵集合的近似公共近特征子空间，然后在该子空间上对矩阵的限制进行联合对角化。

Result: 提出了几种求解方法，并展示了该问题的潜在应用。

Conclusion: 部分联合对角化是高维矩阵联合对角化问题的合理推广，能有效降低计算复杂度，并在实际应用中具有潜力。

Abstract: Given a set of $p$ symmetric (real) matrices, the Orthogonal Joint Diagonalization (OJD) problem consists of finding an orthonormal basis in which the representation of each of these $p$ matrices is as close as possible to a diagonal matrix. We argue that when the matrices are of large dimension, then the natural generalization of this problem is to seek an orthonormal basis of a certain subspace that is a near eigenspace for all the matrices in the set. We refer to this as the problem of ``partial joint diagonalization of matrices.'' The approach proposed first finds this approximate common near eigenspace and then proceeds to a joint diagonalization of the restrictions of the input matrices in this subspace. A few solution methods for this problem are proposed and illustrations of its potential applications are provided.

</details>


### [617] [Scalable Multilevel Monte Carlo Methods Exploiting Parallel Redistribution on Coarse Levels](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.02241)
*Hillary R. Fairbanks,Delyan Z. Kalchev,Chak Shing Lee,Panayot S. Vassilevski*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于元素凝聚粗化策略的AMGe方法，该策略允许在粗层元素数量少于计算核心数时进行数据重分布，从而突破核心数量对粗化过程的限制，提升了多层级求解器和多层蒙特卡洛（MLMC）模拟的可扩展性。通过Darcy方程随机对数正态渗透率场的MLMC模拟，验证了该方法的可扩展性优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统AMGe方法在粗化过程中受到可用计算核心数量的限制，当粗层元素数量少于核心数时，可扩展性下降。本文旨在通过引入数据重分布机制，解除这一约束，从而提升AMGe在多层级求解器和MLMC模拟中的可扩展性。

Method: 提出了一种元素凝聚粗化策略，在粗层元素数量小于计算核心数时执行数据重分布。该方法基于元素代数多重网格（AMGe）框架，生成由细网格单元构成的非结构化粗元素集合，且粗空间通过构造包含与细层同阶的分片多项式，保持近似性质。

Result: 所提方法使得AMGe粗化过程不再受可用核心数量的约束，从而改进了多层级求解器和MLMC方法的可扩展性。通过对Darcy方程随机对数正态渗透率场的MLMC模拟，展示了详细的可扩展性研究结果。

Conclusion: 本文表明，解除粗化过程对核心数量的依赖能够有效提升AMGe在非线性偏微分方程多层级求解及MLMC模拟中的可扩展性，为大规模并行计算提供了实用方案。

Abstract: We study an element agglomeration coarsening strategy that requires data redistribution at coarse levels when the number of coarse elements becomes smaller than the used computational units (cores). The overall procedure generates coarse elements (general unstructured unions of fine grid elements) within the framework of element-based algebraic multigrid methods (or AMGe) studied previously. The AMGe generated coarse spaces have the ability to exhibit approximation properties of the same order as the fine-level ones since by construction they contain the piecewise polynomials of the same order as the fine level ones. These approximation properties are key for the successful use of AMGe in multilevel solvers for nonlinear partial differential equations as well as for multilevel Monte Carlo (MLMC) simulations. The ability to coarsen without being constrained by the number of available cores, as described in the present paper, allows to improve the scalability of these solvers as well as in the overall MLMC method. The paper illustrates this latter fact with detailed scalability study of MLMC simulations applied to model Darcy equations with a stochastic log-normal permeability field.

</details>


### [618] [Error analysis for a viscoelastic phase separation model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.01803)
*Aaron Brunk,Herbert Egger,Oliver Habrich,Maria Lukacova-Medvidova*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文针对粘弹性相分离模型提出了一种无条件稳定的离散化方法，结合有限元空间近似和变分时间离散策略，保留了系统的能量耗散结构，基于相对能量概念建立了全离散非线性稳定性估计，并在最小光滑性假设下推导了最优阶误差估计，数值模拟验证了理论结果和物理效应再现能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 实现对聚合物-溶剂混合物脱混过程的粘弹性相分离模型的系统性数值逼近，需要一种既保持底层系统能量耗散结构又能提供严格误差保证的离散化方法。

Method: 采用有限元空间近似结合变分时间离散化策略，提出无条件稳定的离散格式；基于相对能量概念建立全离散非线性稳定性估计，并据此推导最优阶误差估计。

Result: 在问题数据最小光滑性假设下获得了最优阶误差估计，数值模拟验证了理论结果，并展示了方法再现实验中观测到的相关物理效应的能力。

Conclusion: 所提出的方法成功保留了系统的能量耗散结构，具有无条件稳定性，能在弱正则性条件下达到最优收敛阶，并能有效模拟粘弹性相分离中的关键物理现象。

Abstract: We consider systematic numerical approximation of a viscoelastic phase separation model that describes the demixing of a polymer solvent mixture. An unconditionally stable discretisation method is proposed based on a finite element approximation in space and a variational time discretization strategy. The proposed method preserves the energy-dissipation structure of the underlying system exactly and allows to establish a fully discrete nonlinear stability estimate in natural norms based on the concept of relative energy. These estimates are used to derive order optimal error estimates for the method under minimal smoothness assumptions on the problem data, despite the presence of various strong nonlinearities in the equations. The theoretical results and main properties of the method are illustrated by numerical simulations which also demonstrate the capability to reproduce the relevant physical effects observed in experiments.

</details>


### [619] [Very high-order symmetric positive-interior quadrature rules on triangles and tetrahedra](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.02027)
*Zelalem Arega Worku,Jason E. Hicken,David W. Zingg*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文提出了三角形上最高84阶、四面体上最高40阶的全对称正权重严格内部节点数值积分规则，通过张量积结构和节点消除方法，实现了超过95%（三角形）和80%（四面体）的效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在有限元等数值方法中，高精度数值积分规则对计算效率和精度至关重要。现有的单纯形（三角形和四面体）上的积分规则在高阶时效率不足，需要开发更高效的对称积分规则。

Method: 利用四边形/六面体子域上的Legendre-Gauss节点构造张量积结构作为初始猜测，结合节点消除方法求解非线性方程组，生成全对称、正权重、严格内部节点的数值积分规则。

Result: 获得了三角形上最高84阶、四面体上最高40阶的积分规则；三角形上几乎所有阶数的效率超过95%，四面体上超过80%。

Conclusion: 提出的方法能够高效生成高精度单纯形上的数值积分规则，且验证了其准确性和高效率。

Abstract: We present novel fully-symmetric quadrature rules with positive weights and strictly interior nodes of degrees up to 84 on triangles and 40 on tetrahedra. Initial guesses for solving the nonlinear systems of equations needed to derive quadrature rules are generated by forming tensor-product structures on quadrilateral/hexahedral subdomains of the simplices using the Legendre-Gauss nodes on the first half of the line reference element. In combination with a methodology for node elimination, these initial guesses lead to the development of highly efficient quadrature rules, even for very high polynomial degrees. Using existing estimates of the minimum number of quadrature points for a given degree, we show that the derived quadrature rules on triangles and tetrahedra are more than 95% and 80% efficient, respectively, for almost all degrees. The accuracy of the quadrature rules is demonstrated through numerical examples.

</details>


### [620] [Accelerated 3D Maxwell Integral Equation Solver using the Interpolated Factored Green Function Method](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.02274)
*Jagabandhu Paul,Constantine Sideris*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于插值因子格林函数(IFGF)加速策略的O(N log N)方法，用于三维边界积分方程求解麦克斯韦方程组中的介质散射问题，首次将IFGF方法应用于全矢量3D Maxwell问题，并在600万未知数实例中实现了42倍加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统基于混合Nyström-配置法和Chebyshev多项式的边界积分方程方法会产生稠密线性系统，每次迭代需要O(N²)操作，计算成本高昂。作者希望引入IFGF加速策略将每次迭代成本降低到O(N log N)。

Method: 采用Chebyshev多项式为基础的混合Nyström-配置边界积分方程方法，结合插值因子格林函数(IFGF)加速策略。首先介绍Chebyshev积分求解器和IFGF方法，然后将标量IFGF扩展至矢量Maxwell情况。

Result: 通过多个数值算例验证了O(N log N)的计算复杂度，包括球体散射、复杂CAD模型和纳米光子波导器件。在超过600万未知数的实例中，加速后的IFGF求解器比未加速方法快42倍。

Conclusion: 该工作首次将IFGF方法成功应用于全矢量3D Maxwell问题，在保持精度的同时显著降低了计算复杂度，为大规模电磁散射问题提供了高效的数值求解方案。

Abstract: This article presents an $O(N\log N)$ method for numerical solution of Maxwell's equations for dielectric scatterers using a 3D boundary integral equation (BIE) method. The underlying BIE method used is based on a hybrid Nyström-collocation method using Chebyshev polynomials. It is well known that such an approach produces a dense linear system, which requires $O(N^2)$ operations in each step of an iterative solver. In this work, we propose an approach using the recently introduced Interpolated Factored Green's Function (IFGF) acceleration strategy to reduce the cost of each iteration to $O(N\log N)$. To the best of our knowledge, this paper presents the first ever application of the IFGF method to fully-vectorial 3D Maxwell problems. The Chebyshev-based integral solver and IFGF method are first introduced, followed by the extension of the scalar IFGF to the vectorial Maxwell case. Several examples are presented verifying the $O(N\log N)$ computational complexity of the approach, including scattering from spheres, complex CAD models, and nanophotonic waveguiding devices. In one particular example with more than 6 million unknowns, the accelerated IFGF solver runs 42x faster than the unaccelerated method.

</details>


### [621] [Science DMZ Networks: How Different are They Really?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.01822)
*Emily Mutter,Susmit Shannigrahi*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文通过为期两年的定量网络测量研究，对比了Science DMZ与通用校园网络在数据传输性能上的差异，发现Science DMZ在延迟、吞吐量和抖动方面表现更优，但也存在路径更长、延迟更高的非直观情况，且性能优势并非自动获得，需要针对特定用例进行网络调优。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Science DMZ作为一种专为科学应用优化的网络环境已被广泛采用，但缺乏将其与传统生产网络进行定量比较的研究，本文旨在填补这一空白。

Method: 开展了为期两年的定量网络测量研究，对比Science DMZ与通用校园网络在延迟、吞吐量、抖动等网络特性和数据传输性能方面的差异。

Result: Science DMZ在延迟更低、吞吐量更高、抖动更低方面表现更优；但同时发现非直观结果：DMZ到外部目的地可能路径更长、延迟高于校园网络。

Conclusion: Science DMZ模型能够提升研究者的数据传输性能，但收益并非自动获得，需要基于特定用例进行细致的网络调优才能充分发挥其潜力。

Abstract: The Science Demilitarized Zone (Science DMZ) is a network environment optimized for scientific applications. A Science DMZ provides an environment mostly free from competing traffic flows and complex security middleware such as firewalls or intrusion detection systems that often impede data transfer performance. The Science DMZ model provides a reference set of network design patterns, tuned hosts and protocol stacks dedicated to large data transfers and streamlined security postures that significantly improve data transfer performance, accelerating scientific collaborations and discovery.
  Over the past decade, many universities and organizations have adopted this model for their research computing. Despite becoming increasingly popular, there is a lack of quantitative studies comparing such a specialized network to conventional production networks regarding network characteristics and data transfer performance. We strive to answer the following research questions in this study: Does a Science DMZ exhibit significantly different behavior than a general-purpose campus network? Does it improve application performance compared to such general-purpose networks? Through a two-year-long quantitative network measurement study, we find that a Science DMZ exhibits lower latency, higher throughput, and lower jitter behaviors. However, we also see several non-intuitive results. For example, a DMZ may take a longer route to external destinations and experience higher latency than the campus network. While the DMZ model benefits researchers, the benefits are not automatic - careful network tuning based on specific use cases is required to realize the full potential of such infrastructure.

</details>


### [622] [A virtual element method for a convective Brinkman-Forchheimer problem coupled with a heat equation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.02252)
*Danilo Amigo,Felipe Lepe,Enrique Otarola,Gonzalo Rivera*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种用于求解耦合热方程的对流Brinkman-Forchheimer问题的虚拟单元法，证明了数值格式的适定性，推导了最优误差估计，并通过不同网格族的数值实验验证了理论结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决考虑热扩散和黏度随温度变化的对流Brinkman-Forchheimer问题与热方程耦合的数值求解难题，为该类非线性多物理场耦合问题提供可靠的数值方法。

Method: 采用虚拟单元法（Virtual Element Method）离散耦合模型，在标准离散化假设下建立数值格式，通过理论分析证明格式的适定性，并推导最优误差估计。

Result: 在适当的正则性假设下，推导出了最优误差估计；不同网格族的数值测试结果与理论分析一致，验证了方法的有效性和准确性。

Conclusion: 虚拟单元法能有效求解热扩散和黏度依赖于温度的对流Brinkman-Forchheimer-热方程耦合问题，具有理论上的适定性和最优收敛性，数值实验支持了理论结果。

Abstract: We develop a virtual element method to solve a convective Brinkman-Forchheimer problem coupled with a heat equation. This coupled model may allow for thermal diffusion and viscosity as a function of temperature. Under standard discretization assumptions, we prove the well posedness of the proposed numerical scheme. We also derive optimal error estimates under appropriate regularity assumptions for the solution. We conclude with a series of numerical tests performed with different mesh families that complement our theoretical findings.

</details>


### [623] [High-performance computing for the BGK model of the Boltzmann equation with a meshfree Arbitrary Lagrangian-Eulerian (ALE) method](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.02350)
*Panchatchram Mariappan,Klaas Willems,Gangadhara Boregowda,Sudarshan Tiwari,Axel Klar*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于GPU加速的无网格方法，用于玻尔兹曼方程BGK模型的高性能计算。采用任意拉格朗日-欧拉（ALE）方法，结合加权最小二乘法进行空间导数近似和函数重构，GPU加速相比串行CPU实现了数个数量级的加速比。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 玻尔兹曼方程BGK模型的数值模拟计算量巨大，传统CPU串行计算效率低下，需要高性能计算手段来加速模拟，以解决二维和三维问题中的计算瓶颈。

Method: 采用基于任意拉格朗日-欧拉（ALE）的无网格方法，利用加权最小二乘法进行空间导数近似和函数重构，并利用图形处理器（GPU）对代码进行并行加速。

Result: 在二维和三维驱动方腔问题中，GPU加速版本相比串行CPU模拟实现了数个数量级的加速比。

Conclusion: GPU加速的无网格方法能显著提升BGK模型的计算效率，为实现大规模玻尔兹曼方程模拟提供了有效的高性能计算方案。

Abstract: In this paper, we present high-performance computing for the BGK model of the Boltzmann equation with a mesh-free method. For the numerical simulation of the BGK equation we use an Arbitrary-Lagrangian-Eulerian (ALE) method developed in previous work, where the approximation of spatial derivatives and the reconstruction of a function is based on the weighted least squares method. A Graphics Processing Unit (GPU) is used to accelerate the code. The result is compared with sequential and parallel versions of the CPU code. Two and three-dimensional driven cavity problems are solved, where a speed-up of several orders of magnitude is obtained compared to a sequential CPU simulation.

</details>


### [624] [Enhancing ZFP: A Statistical Approach to Understanding and Reducing Error Bias in a Lossy Floating-Point Compression Algorithm](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.01826)
*Alyson Fox,Peter Lindstrom*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文针对ZFP有损压缩算法对浮点数据产生的误差进行了统计分析，发现误差存在偏差，并提出了简单修改以消除偏差并进一步降低误差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 科学模拟和数据采集产生大量浮点数据，给存储和带宽带来巨大压力。无损压缩对浮点数据效果不佳，而有损压缩虽能减少数据量但会引入误差，需要深入理解误差对数据分析精度的影响。

Method: 对ZFP压缩算法（一种专为浮点数据设计的有损压缩算法）产生的误差进行统计分析，识别出误差存在偏差，并提出对算法的简单修改来中和偏差。

Result: 发现ZFP压缩引入的误差存在系统性偏差，通过简单修改算法可以消除偏差并进一步降低整体误差。

Conclusion: ZFP压缩误差存在偏差，但可通过算法修改来改善，从而提高有损压缩在科学数据中的可用性。

Abstract: The amount of data generated and gathered in scientific simulations and data collection applications is continuously growing, putting mounting pressure on storage and bandwidth concerns. A means of reducing such issues is data compression; however, lossless data compression is typically ineffective when applied to floating-point data. Thus, users tend to apply a lossy data compressor, which allows for small deviations from the original data. It is essential to understand how the error from lossy compression impacts the accuracy of the data analytics. Thus, we must analyze not only the compression properties but the error as well. In this paper, we provide a statistical analysis of the error caused by ZFP compression, a state-of-the-art, lossy compression algorithm explicitly designed for floating-point data. We show that the error is indeed biased and propose simple modifications to the algorithm to neutralize the bias and further reduce the resulting error.

</details>


### [625] [Estimation of Cointegration Vectors in Time Series via Global Optimisation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.02552)
*Alvey Qianli Lin,Zhiwen Zhang*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文提出基于独立成分分析（盲源分离）的优化方法进行协整检验，包括双变量去相关法和多维非高斯性最大化法，在小样本条件下表现优于传统Johansen检验，且计算更简便。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统协整检验（如Engle-Granger、Johansen方法）在小样本数据中表现有限，需要一种在小样本条件下仍能有效识别协整关系的方法。

Method: 基于盲源分离/独立成分分析的优化方法：双变量情形采用去相关法（decorrelation），高维情形采用非高斯性最大化（maximisation of nongaussianity）。

Result: 所提方法在小样本条件下表现优于Johansen协整检验，且计算复杂度更低，具有经验优势。

Conclusion: 基于ICA的协整检验方法在有限样本下具有更好的性能，且计算简便，拓展了协整关系的识别应用范围。

Abstract: Time Series Analysis has been given a great amount of study in which many useful tests were developed. The phenomenal work of Engle and Granger in 1987 and Johansen in 1988 has paved the way for the most commonly used cointegration tests so far. Even though cointegrating relationships focus on long-term behaviour and correlation of multiple nonstationary time series, oftentimes we encounter statistical data with limited sample sizes and other information. Thus other tests with empirical advantages may also be of considerable importance. In this paper, we provide an optimisation approach motivated by the Blind Source Separation, or also known as Independent Component Analysis, for cointegration between financial time series. Two methods for cointegration tests are introduced, namely decorrelation for the bivariate case and maximisation of nongaussianity for higher-dimensions. We highlight the empirical preponderances of independent components and also the computational simplicity, compared to common practices of cointegration such as the Johansen's Cointegration Test. The advantages of our methods, especially the better performances in limited sample size, enable a wider range of application and accessibility for researchers and practitioners to identify cointegrating relationships.

</details>


### [626] [The Immersed Boundary Conformal Method for Kirchhoff-Love and Reissner-Mindlin shells](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.02530)
*Giuliano Guarino,Alberto Milazzo,Annalisa Buffa,Pablo Antolin*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文利用浸入边界共形方法（IBCM）分析Kirchhoff-Love和Reissner-Mindlin壳结构，通过构建共形边界层与高阶样条逼近空间结合，采用Nitsche方法耦合边界层与内部区域，数值实验验证了该方法在复杂壳结构建模中的高效性和准确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 浸入边界法在处理复杂几何时灵活性高，但存在边界条件施加困难和局部加密不便的问题。IBCM通过引入共形边界层，克服了这些局限，同时需要高精度、高效率的数值方案来求解薄壳和厚壳结构问题。

Method: 采用IBCM构建共形于边界的附加层，结合高次样条逼近空间增强效率；使用非对称平均算子的Nitsche方法耦合边界层与内部区域，最小化惩罚参数；对切割单元和界面采用高阶积分规则。

Result: 数值实验表明，所提公式在Kirchhoff-Love和Reissner-Mindlin壳理论下均展现出高效性和精度，包括共形界面的生成、两种理论的耦合以及损伤壳的模拟。

Conclusion: IBCM结合Nitsche耦合与高阶样条逼近，为复杂壳结构（包括损伤情况）提供了一种灵活、精确且稳定的浸入式分析框架。

Abstract: This work utilizes the Immersed Boundary Conformal Method (IBCM) to analyze Kirchhoff-Love and Reissner-Mindlin shell structures within an immersed domain framework. Immersed boundary methods involve embedding complex geometries within a background grid, which allows for great flexibility in modeling intricate shapes and features despite the simplicity of the approach. The IBCM method introduces additional layers conformal to the boundaries, allowing for the strong imposition of Dirichlet boundary conditions and facilitating local refinement. In this study, the construction of boundary layers is combined with high-degree spline-based approximation spaces to further increase efficiency. The Nitsche method, employing non-symmetric average operators, is used to couple the boundary layers with the inner patch, while stabilizing the formulation with minimal penalty parameters. High-order quadrature rules are applied for integration over cut elements and patch interfaces. Numerical experiments demonstrate the efficiency and accuracy of the proposed formulation, highlighting its potential for complex shell structures modeled through Kirchhoff-Love and Reissner-Mindlin theories. These tests include the generation of conformal interfaces, the coupling of Kirchhoff-Love and Reissner-Mindlin theories, and the simulation of a damaged shell.

</details>


### [627] [Conforming/Non-Conforming Mixed Finite Element Methods for Optimal Control of Velocity-Vorticity-Pressure Formulation for the Oseen Problem with Variable Viscosity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.01977)
*Harpal Singh,Arbaz Khan*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文针对具有非恒定黏性的广义Oseen方程的最优分布式控制问题，提出了两种数值方法：一种新的协调增广混合有限元方法(CG)和一种间断伽辽金方法(DG)。两种方法均基于速度-涡量-压力变分公式，并通过最小二乘项增强稳定性。CG方法满足散度一致性，适用于任意Stokes inf-sup稳定的速度-压力有限元对；DG方法采用稳定化技术，并用分片常数离散控制变量。建立了最优先验和残差型后验误差估计，数值实验验证了方法的性能与有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 广义Oseen方程在流体力学中具有重要应用，如Navier-Stokes方程的线性化。非恒定黏性增加了问题的复杂性，现有方法在处理此类最优控制问题时存在稳定性或精度不足的问题。因此，需要开发稳定且高效的数值方法来解决这一挑战。

Method: (1) 提出速度-涡量-压力变分公式，并从本构方程和不可压缩条件引入最小二乘项增强稳定性；(2) 设计协调增广混合有限元方法(CG)，采用散度一致的速度-压力对和通用离散涡度空间；(3) 设计间断伽辽金方法(DG)，利用稳定化技术处理间断性，并使用分片常数离散控制变量；(4) 建立最优先验误差估计和残差型后验误差估计。

Result: 理论分析表明，在黏性参数的某些假设下，连续变分公式是适定的。CG方法满足散度一致性，能适配任意Stokes inf-sup稳定的速度-压力有限元对。两种方法均获得了最优收敛阶的先验误差估计和可靠的残差型后验误差估计。数值实验验证了方法的有效性和优良性能。

Conclusion: 本文提出的CG和DG方法为具有非恒定黏性的广义Oseen方程分布式最优控制问题提供了稳定、高效且具有最优收敛性的数值求解方案。两类方法各有优势：CG方法结构灵活，可适配多种有限元对；DG方法适合处理非协调网格。理论分析和数值实验共同证实了方法的可靠性和实用性。

Abstract: This work examines the distributed optimal control of generalized Oseen equations with non-constant viscosity. We propose and analyze a new conforming augmented mixed finite element method and a Discontinuous Galerkin (DG) method for the velocity-vorticity-pressure formulation. The continuous formulation, which incorporates least-squares terms from both the constitutive equation and the incompressibility condition, is well-posed under certain assumptions on the viscosity parameter. The CG method is divergence-conforming and suits any Stokes inf-sup stable velocity-pressure finite element pair, while a generic discrete space approximates vorticity. The DG scheme employs a stabilization technique, and a piecewise constant discretization estimates the control variable. We establish optimal a priori and residual-based a posteriori error estimates for the proposed schemes. Finally, we provide numerical experiments to showcase the method's performance and effectiveness.

</details>


### [628] [Novel Approach for solving the discrete Stokes problems based on Augmented Lagrangian and Global Techniques: Application to Saddle-Point Linear Systems from Incompressible flow](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.02652)
*A. Badahmane,A. Ratnani,H. Sadok*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于全局Arnoldi的新型增广拉格朗日预条件子，用于加速求解具有3×3块结构的线性系统（源自Stokes方程混合有限元离散），通过分量分裂和谱分析验证了其高效性与鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 针对Stokes方程混合有限元离散产生的3×3块结构线性系统，现有Krylov子空间方法收敛速度较慢，需要设计高效的预条件子来加速求解。

Method: 采用基于全局Arnoldi的增广拉格朗日预条件子；对速度空间使用标准标量有限元基函数进行分量分裂，诱导出自然的3×3块结构；并对精确版本的预条件子进行了谱分析。

Result: 数值实验表明，该方法在求解离散Stokes问题方面比现有方法更高效、更鲁棒，通过计算时间评估了其效率。

Conclusion: 提出的基于全局Arnoldi的增广拉格朗日预条件子在求解Stokes方程离散系统时具有优越的性能，是一种高效且鲁棒的数值方法。

Abstract: In this paper, a novel augmented Lagrangian preconditioner based on global Arnoldi for accelerating the convergence of Krylov subspace methods applied to linear systems of equations with a block three-by-three structure, these systems typically arise from discretizing the Stokes equations using mixed-finite element methods. In practice, the components of velocity are always approximated using a single finite element space. More precisely, in two dimensions, our new approach based on standard space of scalar finite element basis functions to discretize the velocity space. This componentwise splitting can be shown to induce a natural block three-by-three structure. Spectral analyses is established for the exact versions of these preconditioners. Finally, the obtained numerical results claim that our novel approach is more efficient and robust for solving the discrete Stokes problems. The efficiency of our new approach is evaluated by measuring computational time.

</details>


### [629] [A Parareal algorithm without Coarse Propagator?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.02673)
*Martin J. Gander,Mario Ohlberger,Stephan Rave*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文首次提出了一种无粗传播子的Parareal算法，证明了其在抛物问题中的有效性，并给出了新的收敛性证明和数值实验验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的Parareal算法依赖粗传播子G，其质量对算法收敛性至关重要。作者试图探究是否可以完全去掉粗传播子，从而简化算法并降低计算开销。

Method: 提出无粗传播子的Parareal算法变体；给出针对空间近似（而非传统时间近似）的粗传播子的新收敛证明；通过数值实验验证理论结果。

Result: 无粗传播子的Parareal算法在抛物问题中能够很好地收敛；该方法不适用于双曲问题。

Conclusion: 对于抛物型问题，可以设计无粗传播子的Parareal算法且有效收敛，这为时间并行算法提供了新的思路；但对于双曲型问题该方法失效。

Abstract: The Parareal algorithm was invented in 2001 in order to parallelize the solution of evolution problems in the time direction. It is based on parallel fine time propagators called F and sequential coarse time propagators called G, which alternatingly solve the evolution problem and iteratively converge to the fine solution. The coarse propagator G is a very important component of Parareal, as one sees in the convergence analyses. We present here for the first time a Parareal algorithm without coarse propagator, and explain why this can work very well for parabolic problems. We give a new convergence proof for coarse propagators approximating in space, in contrast to the more classical coarse propagators which are approximations in time, and our proof also applies in the absence of the coarse propagator. We illustrate our theoretical results with numerical experiments, and also explain why this approach can not work for hyperbolic problems.

</details>


### [630] [Decoupling methods for fluid-structure interaction with local time-stepping](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.02746)
*Hemanta Kunwar,Hyesuk Lee*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文提出两种全局时间域分解方法（Steklov-Poincaré方法和Robin方法）用于求解流固耦合系统，通过将耦合问题转化为时空界面问题，允许子系统使用不同的时间离散格式和时间步长独立求解，数值实验验证了方法的精度和效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 针对流固耦合问题中传统整体求解方法计算效率低、难以处理不同子系统时间尺度差异的问题，提出可在时间维度上进行域分解的迭代求解方法，实现各子系统独立求解并允许使用不同的时间离散格式和步长。

Method: 提出两种全局时间域分解方法：(1) Steklov-Poincaré方法；(2) Robin方法。将耦合系统构造为时空界面问题，对演化问题直接应用迭代算法，每个时变子域问题独立求解，允许子系统采用不同的时间离散格式和步长。

Result: 在非物理问题和物理问题上进行了数值测试，采用不同网格尺寸和时间步长，验证了所提方法的精度和效率。

Conclusion: 所提出的两种全局时间域分解方法能够有效解耦流固耦合系统，通过允许各子系统独立选择时间离散格式和步长，实现高效模拟时变现象。

Abstract: We introduce two global-in-time domain decomposition methods, namely the Steklov-Poincare method and the Robin method, for solving a fluid-structure interaction system. These methods allow us to formulate the coupled system as a space-time interface problem and apply iterative algorithms directly to the evolutionary problem. Each time-dependent subdomain problem is solved independently, which enables the use of different time discretization schemes and time step sizes in the subsystems. This leads to an efficient way of simulating time-dependent phenomena. We present numerical tests for both non-physical and physical problems, with various mesh sizes and time step sizes to demonstrate the accuracy and efficiency of the proposed methods.

</details>


### [631] [Robust First and Second-Order Differentiation for Regularized Optimal Transport](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.02015)
*Xingjie Li,Fei Lu,Molei Tao,Felix X. -F. Ye*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文通过解析计算最优传输（OT）距离的梯度和熵正则化OT距离的Hessian矩阵，解决了大规模数据集和小正则化强度下的内存消耗大和数值不稳定性问题，实现了SGD-Newton方法的可扩展稳定计算，在混洗回归任务中收敛速度比梯度下降法快数个数量级且参数估计更精确。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的一阶优化器在优化正则化OT距离时收敛速度慢，而二阶优化器虽能加速收敛，但面临Hessian计算中的内存消耗大和数值不稳定等挑战，尤其在大数据集和小正则化强度下更为突出。先前因复杂的张量计算和双层损失函数中参数的复杂依赖关系，未使用解析方法计算Hessian。

Method: 通过解析推导计算OT距离的梯度以及熵正则化OT距离的Hessian矩阵；利用谱分析和解析推导识别并解决了关键线性系统的奇异性与不适定性导致的数值不稳定问题；实现了SGD-Newton方法。

Result: 在混洗回归任务中，SGD-Newton方法的第二阶段收敛速度比纯梯度下降法快数个数量级，同时参数估计精度显著更高。

Conclusion: 解析计算的Hessian结合SGD-Newton方法能有效解决OT距离优化中的数值不稳定和内存瓶颈问题，显著提升收敛速度和参数估计精度。

Abstract: Applications such as unbalanced and fully shuffled regression can be approached by optimizing regularized optimal transport (OT) distances, such as the entropic OT and Sinkhorn distances. A common approach for this optimization is to use a first-order optimizer, which requires the gradient of the OT distance. For faster convergence, one might also resort to a second-order optimizer, which additionally requires the Hessian. The computations of these derivatives are crucial for efficient and accurate optimization. However, they present significant challenges in terms of memory consumption and numerical instability, especially for large datasets and small regularization strengths. We circumvent these issues by analytically computing the gradients for OT distances and the Hessian for the entropic OT distance, which was not previously used due to intricate tensor-wise calculations and the complex dependency on parameters within the bi-level loss function. Through analytical derivation and spectral analysis, we identify and resolve the numerical instability caused by the singularity and ill-posedness of a key linear system. Consequently, we achieve scalable and stable computation of the Hessian, enabling the implementation of the stochastic gradient descent (SGD)-Newton methods. Tests on shuffled regression examples demonstrate that the second stage of the SGD-Newton method converges orders of magnitude faster than the gradient descent-only method while achieving significantly more accurate parameter estimations.

</details>


### [632] [A hybrid FEM-PINN method for time-dependent partial differential equations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.02810)
*Xiaodong Feng,Haojiong Shangguan,Tao Tang,Xiaoliang Wan,Tao Zhou*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 提出了一种混合数值方法，将时间有限元法与深度神经网络相结合求解演化偏微分方程。在时间方向使用有限元基函数，空间依赖系数由神经网络输出定义，通过Galerkin或配置投影在时间方向得到空间相关系数的PDE系统，并在PINN框架下近似。同时开发了基于显式密度模型的自适应采样策略来细化训练集。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统深度学习方法将神经网络定义在时空域上，存在统计误差和高维度、低正则性带来的求解困难。本文旨在通过混合公式避免时间方向上的统计误差，并将神经网络输出视为降维空间基函数，同时解决高维和低正则性问题。

Method: (1) 在时间方向采用有限元基函数，空间依赖系数由神经网络输出定义；(2) 应用Galerkin或配置投影在时间方向得到空间相关系数的PDE系统，在PINN框架下近似求解；(3) 使用显式密度模型逼近PDE残差诱导的分布，通过自适应采样策略用学习到的密度模型生成新的时间相关随机样本以细化训练集。

Result: 通过一系列数值实验验证了该混合方法在求解演化偏微分方程时的有效性和高效性。

Conclusion: 混合公式能避免时间方向积分统计误差，神经网络输出可作为降维空间基函数，自适应采样策略有效缓解了高维度和低正则性带来的困难。

Abstract: In this work, we present a hybrid numerical method for solving evolution partial differential equations (PDEs) by merging the time finite element method with deep neural networks. In contrast to the conventional deep learning-based formulation where the neural network is defined on a spatiotemporal domain, our methodology utilizes finite element basis functions in the time direction where the space-dependent coefficients are defined as the output of a neural network. We then apply the Galerkin or collocation projection in the time direction to obtain a system of PDEs for the space-dependent coefficients which is approximated in the framework of PINN. The advantages of such a hybrid formulation are twofold: statistical errors are avoided for the integral in the time direction, and the neural network's output can be regarded as a set of reduced spatial basis functions. To further alleviate the difficulties from high dimensionality and low regularity, we have developed an adaptive sampling strategy that refines the training set. More specifically, we use an explicit density model to approximate the distribution induced by the PDE residual and then augment the training set with new time-dependent random samples given by the learned density model. The effectiveness and efficiency of our proposed method have been demonstrated through a series of numerical experiments.

</details>


### [633] [An asymptotic-preserving semi-Lagrangian algorithm for the anisotropic heat transport equation with arbitrary magnetic fields](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.02829)
*L. Chacon,G. Di Giannatale*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 将半拉格朗日算法从托卡马克有序 regime 扩展到任意磁场拓扑，保持原有优点（解析格林函数等），通过数值实验验证精度和通用性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 原有半拉格朗日算法仅适用于磁场大小沿磁力线变化不大的托卡马克有序 regime，需要扩展以处理任意磁场拓扑的极端各向异性热输运问题。

Method: 对原有半拉格朗日算法进行小幅修改，保留解析格林函数等关键特性，使其能处理完全通用的磁场构型。

Result: 通过人为制造解析解的数值实验，验证了扩展后的算法在任意磁场拓扑下仍保持精度和通用性。

Conclusion: 成功将半拉格朗日算法推广到任意磁场拓扑，扩展后的方案保持了原有方案的优良数值特性，且仅需微小修改。

Abstract: We extend the recently proposed semi-Lagrangian algorithm for the extremely anisotropic heat transport equation [Chacón et al., J. Comput. Phys., 272 (2014)] to deal with arbitrary magnetic field topologies. The original scheme (which showed remarkable numerical properties) was valid for the so-called tokamak-ordering regime, in which the magnetic field magnitude was not allowed to vary much along field lines. The proposed extension maintains the attractive features of the original scheme (including the analytical Green's function, which is critical for tractability) with minor modifications, while allowing for completely general magnetic fields. The accuracy and generality of the approach are demonstrated by numerical experiment with an analytical manufactured solution.

</details>


### [634] [A posteriori error estimates for parabolic partial differential equations on stationary surfaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.02101)
*Balázs Kovács,Michael Lantelme*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文针对封闭静止曲面上的抛物型偏微分方程，提出并讨论了一种基于残差的后验误差估计器。空间离散采用曲面有限元法，时间离散采用向后欧拉法。所提出的误差指示器能够在空间上全局地上下界估计误差量，在时间上全局上界且局部下界估计误差量。基于此误差指示器，提出了一种时空自适应算法，并通过数值实验验证了理论结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 发展针对曲面抛物型偏微分方程的高效数值解法，特别是能够指导自适应网格细化的可靠后验误差估计理论，以平衡计算精度与计算成本。

Method: 采用曲面有限元法（空间离散）结合向后欧拉法（时间离散）对问题进行全离散；推导基于残差的后验误差估计器，证明其全局空间上下界和全局时间上界/局部时间下界性质；设计时空自适应算法。

Result: 所提出的误差指示器在空间上具有全局上下界估计能力，在时间上具有全局上界和局部下界估计能力，数值实验验证了理论的有效性。

Conclusion: 该工作为曲面抛物型偏微分方程的时空自适应计算提供了可靠的理论基础，具有实际应用价值。

Abstract: This paper develops and discusses a residual-based a posteriori error estimator for parabolic surface partial differential equations on closed stationary surfaces. The full discretization uses the surface finite element method in space and the backward Euler method in time. The proposed error indicator bounds the error quantities globally in space from above and below, and globally in time from above and locally from below. Based on the derived error indicator, a space-time adaptive algorithm is proposed. Numerical experiments illustrate and complement the theory.

</details>


### [635] [Nonlinear Monolithic Two-Level Schwarz Methods for the Navier-Stokes Equations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.03041)
*Axel Klawonn,Martin Lanser*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文首次将单块GDSW粗基函数应用于非线性两水平Schwarz方法求解Navier-Stokes方程，并与经典全局Newton法（带线性Schwarz预条件）进行了对比。针对高Reynolds数方腔驱动流问题，还首次讨论了子域局部压力校正和粗基函数回收等不同选项。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 非线性区域分解方法能显著改善Newton法对复杂问题的非线性收敛行为，但此前尚未有研究将单块GDSW粗基函数用于Navier-Stokes方程的非线性两水平Schwarz方法中。

Method: 提出了一种非线性两水平Schwarz方法，并首次为其配备单块GDSW粗基函数；讨论了子域局部压力校正和粗基函数回收等策略。

Result: 在高Reynolds数方腔驱动流问题上进行了数值实验，并与经典全局Newton法（带线性Schwarz预条件）进行了对比。

Conclusion: 非线性两水平Schwarz方法结合GDSW粗基函数能有效改善Navier-Stokes方程的非线性收敛行为，局部压力校正和粗基函数回收等策略具有进一步研究价值。

Abstract: Nonlinear domain decomposition methods became popular in recent years since they can improve the nonlinear convergence behavior of Newton's method significantly for many complex problems. In this article, a nonlinear two-level Schwarz approach is considered and, for the first time, equipped with monolithic GDSW (Generalized Dryja-Smith-Widlund) coarse basis functions for the Navier-Stokes equations. Results for lid-driven cavity problems with high Reynolds numbers are presented and compared with classical global Newton's method equipped with a linear Schwarz preconditioner. Different options, for example, local pressure corrections on the subdomain and recycling of coarse basis functions are discussed in the nonlinear Schwarz approach for the first time.

</details>


### [636] [Numerical Ergodicity of Stochastic Allen--Cahn Equation driven by Multiplicative White Noise](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.02935)
*Zhihui Liu*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文证明了具有多项式增长漂移和有界扩散系数的单调SPDE全离散格式的唯一遍历性，通过Lyapunov条件、一致矩估计和正则性分析，并应用于随机Allen-Cahn方程验证了结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 建立单调SPDE全离散格式的唯一遍历性理论，特别是针对具有多项式增长漂移和乘性白噪声驱动的随机偏微分方程，填补离散化方法在遍历性分析方面的空白。

Method: 通过Lyapunov条件满足和一致矩估计，结合全离散格式的正则性；将原随机方程转化为等价的随机方程，其中离散随机卷积被一致控制，从而导出所需的一致矩估计。

Result: 证明了全离散格式的唯一遍历性；对于随机Allen-Cahn方程，该全离散格式在任何界面厚度下都是唯一遍历的；数值实验验证了理论结果。

Conclusion: 该全离散格式在较一般的条件下（多项式增长漂移、有界扩散系数、乘性白噪声）具有唯一遍历性，为单调SPDE的数值分析提供了理论基础。

Abstract: We establish the unique ergodicity of a fully discrete scheme for monotone SPDEs with polynomial growth drift and bounded diffusion coefficients driven by multiplicative white noise. The main ingredient of our method depends on the satisfaction of a Lyapunov condition followed by a uniform moments' estimate, combined with the regularity property for the full discretization. We transform the original stochastic equation into an equivalent random equation where the discrete stochastic convolutions are uniformly controlled to derive the desired uniform moments' estimate. Applying the main result to the stochastic Allen--Cahn equation driven by multiplicative white noise indicates that this full discretization is uniquely ergodic for any interface thickness. Numerical experiments validate our theoretical results.

</details>


### [637] [Towards optimal hierarchical training of neural networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.02242)
*Michael Feischl,Alexander Rieder,Fabian Zehetgruber*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 提出了一种分层训练算法，在优化到达驻点时自适应扩展前馈神经网络架构，通过求解低维优化问题跳出局部极小值/驻点，在稳定网络可逼近性假设下实现最优收敛率，并得到可计算的最优性指标和新的泛化误差定义。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准前馈神经网络训练常陷入局部极小值或驻点，且固定架构难以保证收敛到全局最优。现有方法缺乏在训练过程中动态调整网络架构并跳出驻点的理论保证。

Method: 提出分层训练算法：当优化到达驻点时，通过求解低维优化问题自适应扩展网络架构（增加隐藏单元或层），从而证明性地逃离当前驻点。结合稳定神经网络的逼近性假设进行分析。

Result: 该算法在稳定网络可逼近性假设下达到最优收敛率 s，即损失随参数数量以 O(N^{-s}) 速率下降。同时得到可计算的最优性指标（判断训练状态是否为全局最优）以及基于此的新泛化误差定义。

Conclusion: 该工作为动态扩展网络的训练范式提供了理论收敛保证，建立了网络容量与收敛速率之间的量化关系，并提出了实用的训练最优性判断工具。

Abstract: We propose a hierarchical training algorithm for standard feed-forward neural networks that adaptively extends the network architecture as soon as the optimization reaches a stationary point. By solving small (low-dimensional) optimization problems, the extended network provably escapes any local minimum or stationary point. Under some assumptions on the approximability of the data with stable neural networks, we show that the algorithm achieves an optimal convergence rate s in the sense that loss is bounded by the number of parameters to the -s. As a byproduct, we obtain computable indicators which judge the optimality of the training state of a given network and derive a new notion of generalization error.

</details>


### [638] [On the backward stability of s-step GMRES](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.03079)
*Erin Carson,Yuxin Ma*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文针对通信避免的s步GMRES方法（即s-step GMRES），提出了一个改进的后向稳定性分析框架。该框架通过隔离QR分解和最小二乘问题求解中舍入误差的影响，简化了稳定性分析，并明确指出正交化方法对后向误差的影响。基于此框架，分析了块MGS和重正交化块CGS两种正交化方法，发现经典s步Arnoldi过程存在不稳定性。为此，提出了一种改进的s步Arnoldi过程，支持更大的块大小s同时保持良好精度，数值实验验证了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 经典Krylov子空间方法在现代计算机架构上面临通信瓶颈，通信避免的变体方法虽然在精确算术中等价，但在有限精度下可能不稳定。本文旨在解决s步GMRES的后向稳定性问题，并提出更有效的稳定性分析框架和改进方案。

Method: 提出改进的后向稳定性分析框架，将舍入误差的影响隔离为QR分解和最小二乘问题求解两部分；基于该框架分析块MGS和重正交化块CGS算法；设计改进的s步Arnoldi过程以支持更大的块大小。

Result: 新框架清晰揭示了正交化方法对后向误差的影响路径，简化了分析流程；发现经典s步Arnoldi过程与s步GMRES结合时存在不稳定性；提出的改进s步Arnoldi过程能支持更大块大小s并保持良好精度。

Conclusion: 改进的框架为s步GMRES的稳定性分析提供了更简洁有效的工具，所提出的改进Arnoldi过程有效缓解了经典方法的不稳定性问题，数值实验验证了其在实际应用中的可行性。

Abstract: Communication, i.e., data movement, is a critical bottleneck for the performance of classical Krylov subspace method solvers on modern computer architectures. Variants of these methods which avoid communication have been introduced, which, while equivalent in exact arithmetic, can be unstable in finite precision. In this work, we address the backward stability of $s$-step GMRES, also known as communication-avoiding GMRES. Compared to the ``modular framework'' proposed in [A.~Buttari, N.~J.~Higham, T.~Mary, \& B.~Vieublé. Preprint in 2024.], we present an improved framework for simplifying the analysis of $s$-step GMRES, which includes standard GMRES ($s=1$) as a special case, by isolating the effects of rounding errors in the QR factorization and the solution of the least squares problem. The key advantage of this new framework is that it is evident how the orthogonalization method affects the backward error, and it is not necessary to re-evaluate anything other than the orthogonalization itself when modifying the orthogonalization used in GMRES. Using this framework, we analyze $s$-step GMRES with popular block orthogonalization methods: block modified Gram--Schmidt and reorthogonalized block classical Gram--Schmidt algorithms.
  An example illustrates the resulting instability of $s$-step GMRES when paired with the classical $s$-step Arnoldi process and shows the limitations of popular strategies for resolving this instability. To address this issue, we propose a modified $s$-step Arnoldi process that allows for much larger block size $s$ while maintaining satisfactory accuracy, as confirmed by our numerical experiments.

</details>


### [639] [Flexible Quaternion Generalized Minimal Residual Method for Ill-Posed Quaternion Inverse Problems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.03032)
*Xuan Liu,Zhigang Jia,Xiaoqing Jin*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于四元数全变分正则化的新模型，用于求解线性不适定四元数逆问题（如三维信号滤波和彩色图像处理）。模型采用协作全变分正则化和迭代重加权四元数范数逼近，并引入灵活的四元数广义最小残差法加速求解。建立了改进的收敛理论，为四元数最小残差法提供残差范数的尖锐上界，并扩展至预处理版本。数值实验表明，该模型和算法在迭代步数、CPU时间和恢复图像质量上优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在处理四元数域线性不适定逆问题时存在收敛速度慢、重建质量不高的问题，尤其缺乏针对四元数全变分正则化的高效求解器和严格的收敛理论分析。

Method: 1) 构建四元数全变分正则化模型，使用协作全变分正则化项，并通过四元数迭代重加权范数近似。2) 提出灵活的四元数广义最小残差法（Flexible QGMRES）用于快速求解。3) 建立改进的收敛理论，推导QGMRES残差范数的尖锐上界，并给出预处理版本的收敛分析。

Result: 数值实验证明，所提模型和算法在迭代步数、CPU时间以及彩色图像恢复的多种质量指标上均优于现有最先进方法。

Conclusion: 提出了一种结合协作全变分正则化与灵活QGMRES的四元数逆问题求解框架，在理论和实验层面均验证了其有效性和先进性。

Abstract: The main goal of this paper is to propose a new quaternion total variation regularization model for solving linear ill-posed quaternion inverse problems, which arise from three-dimensional signal filtering or color image processing. The quaternion total variation term in the model is represented by collaborative total variation regularization and approximated by a quaternion iteratively reweighted norm. A novel flexible quaternion generalized minimal residual method is presented to quickly solve this model. An improved convergence theory is established to obtain a sharp upper bound of the residual norm of quaternion minimal residual method (QGMRES). The convergence theory is also presented for preconditioned QGMRES. Numerical experiments indicate the superiority of the proposed model and algorithms over the state-of-the-art methods in terms of iteration steps, CPU time, and the quality criteria of restored color images.

</details>


### [640] [Solution of parameter-dependent diffusion equation in layered media](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.02257)
*Antti Autio,Antti Hannukainen*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文研究二维局部镜像对称多层区域中依赖于参数的扩散方程，发现双层情况下可得到包含三项且显式依赖扩散系数的解公式，并将其推广到多层近似解，为简化基方法提供了理论基础。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 寻找具有少量项的参数到解映射的近似公式，以降低问题复杂度，为简化基方法提供支持。

Method: 将解分解为与各层及层间界面相关的正交部分，推导双层精确解公式，再推广到多层近似解；对正方形层给出解析公式，对一般层使用有限元方法。

Result: 双层情况下得到仅含三项且显式依赖扩散系数的解公式；多层情况下得到近似公式；通过数值算例验证了有效性。

Conclusion: 所提公式可用于简化基方法中分析Kolmogorov n-width，降低参数化扩散问题的计算复杂度。

Abstract: This work studies the parameter-dependent diffusion equation in a two-dimensional domain consisting of locally mirror symmetric layers. It is assumed that the diffusion coefficient is a constant in each layer. The goal is to find approximate parameter-to-solution maps that have a small number of terms. It is shown that in the case of two layers one can find a solution formula consisting of three terms with explicit dependencies on the diffusion coefficient. The formula is based on decomposing the solution into orthogonal parts related to both of the layers and the interface between them. This formula is then expanded to an approximate one for the multi-layer case. We give an analytical formula for square layers and use the finite element formulation for more general layers. The results are illustrated with numerical examples and have applications for reduced basis methods by analyzing the Kolmogorov n-width.

</details>


### [641] [On Advanced Monte Carlo Methods for Linear Algebra on Advanced Accelerator Architectures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.03095)
*Anton Lebedev,Vassil Alexandrov*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文通过计算实验研究了马尔可夫链蒙特卡洛矩阵求逆方法在不同加速器架构上的性能和可扩展性，并将其作为预条件子与GMRES或BICGstab等迭代求解器结合用于线性方程组求解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索(MC)²MI方法在多种加速器架构上的计算性能与可扩展性，评估其作为预条件子用于迭代求解器的实际效用。

Method: 将(MC)²MI方法作为预条件子，结合GMRES或BICGstab等迭代方法求解线性方程组，并在多种加速器架构上进行数值实验。

Result: 通过数值实验揭示了两种方法在性能和可扩展性方面的优势与不足。

Conclusion: 评估了(MC)²MI方法在加速器架构上的整体实用性及其可扩展性特征。

Abstract: In this paper we present computational experiments with the Markov Chain Monte Carlo Matrix Inversion ($(\text{MC})^2\text{MI}$) on several accelerator architectures and investigate their impact on performance and scalability of the method. The method is used as a preconditioner and for solving the corresponding system of linear equations iterative methods, such as generalized minimal residuals (GMRES) or bi-conjugate gradient (stabilized) (BICGstab), are used.
  Numerical experiments are carried out to highlight the benefits and deficiencies of both approaches and to assess their overall usefulness in light of scalability of the method.

</details>


### [642] [Probabilistic error analysis of limited-precision stochastic rounding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.03069)
*El-Mehdi El Arar,Massimiliano Fasi,Silviu-Ioan Filip,Mantas Mikaitis*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新的舍入模式——有限精度随机舍入（limited-precision SR），该模式通过考虑使用的随机位数r，更准确地匹配硬件实现。分析表明该模式存在与r相关的偏差，当r趋近无穷时收敛于理想无偏随机舍入。研究为使用随机舍入的算法开发了新的概率误差分析模型，并通过数值实验验证了理论结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的随机舍入概率误差分析均假设舍入操作是精确实现的，这通常需要大量随机位，不适合实际硬件实现。因此需要研究随机位数对概率舍入误差分析的影响，并建立更贴近实际硬件实现的模型。

Method: 引入有限精度随机舍入（limited-precision SR）这一新舍入模式，将随机位数r作为参数纳入考量；建立新的概率误差分析模型；通过数值实验进行验证。

Result: 有限精度随机舍入是有偏的，偏差大小是随机位数r的函数；当r趋近无穷时，偏差消失并收敛于理想无偏随机舍入；新的概率误差分析模型能够有效刻画这种舍入模式的误差特性。

Conclusion: 随机位数r是影响随机舍入偏置和误差分析的关键因素，有限精度随机舍入模型更符合实际硬件实现，为实际应用中随机舍入的误差分析提供了理论依据。

Abstract: Classical probabilistic rounding error analysis is particularly well suited to stochastic rounding (SR), and it yields strong results when dealing with floating-point algorithms that rely heavily on summation. For many numerical linear algebra algorithms, one can prove probabilistic error bounds that grow as O(nu), where n is the problem size and u is the unit roundoff. These probabilistic bounds are asymptotically tighter than the worst-case ones, which grow as O(nu). For certain classes of algorithms, SR has been shown to be unbiased. However, all these results were derived under the assumption that SR is implemented exactly, which typically requires a number of random bits that is too large to be suitable for practical implementations. We investigate the effect of the number of random bits on the probabilistic rounding error analysis of SR. To this end, we introduce a new rounding mode, limited-precision SR. By taking into account the number r of random bits used, this new rounding mode matches hardware implementations accurately, unlike the ideal SR operator generally used in the literature. We show that this new rounding mode is biased and that the bias is a function of r. As r approaches infinity, however, the bias disappears, and limited-precision SR converges to the ideal, unbiased SR operator. We develop a novel model for probabilistic error analysis of algorithms employing SR. Several numerical examples corroborate our theoretical findings.

</details>


### [643] [The weak form of the SDOF and MDOF equation of motion, part II: A numerical method for the SDOF problem](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.02377)
*Nikolaos Karaliolios,Dimitiros L. Karabalis*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于运动方程弱形式的高效SDOF问题数值方法，使用分段多项式插值函数，可实现任意高阶近似率并保持机械能守恒，克服了Dahlqvist Barrier定理的限制和数值阻尼需求等现有算法的重大缺陷。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 克服现有SDOF数值算法的局限性，特别是Dahlqvist Barrier定理所施加的限制以及引入数值阻尼的必要性，同时提高计算效率和精度。

Method: 基于运动方程的弱形式，采用分段多项式函数作为插值函数，构建了一种新的数值方法。近似率可通过调整插值函数的多项式阶数任意提高（受数值稳定性约束），且系统机械能守恒。

Result: 该方法实现了任意高阶的近似率（仅受数值不稳定性的限制），并且机械能守恒，从而克服了Dahlqvist Barrier定理的限制，无需引入数值阻尼。

Conclusion: 该新方法在效率、精度和能量守恒特性上优于现有算法，有效解决了SDOF问题中长期存在的数值计算难题。

Abstract: A new, more efficient, numerical method for the SDOF problem is presented. Its construction is based on the weak form of the equation of motion, as obtained in part I of the paper, using piece-wise polynomial functions as interpolation functions. The approximation rate can be arbitrarily high, proportional to the degree of the interpolation functions, tempered only by numerical instability. Moreover, the mechanical energy of the system is conserved. Consequently, all significant drawbacks of existing algorithms, such as the limitations imposed by the Dahlqvist Barrier theorem and the need for introduction of numerical damping, have been overcome.

</details>


### [644] [Approximation and application of minimizing movements for surface PDE](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.03139)
*Elliott Ginder,Karel Svadlenka,Takuma Muramatsu*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文利用最近点法将最小化运动推广到曲面偏微分方程环境，创建了相应的逼近方法并观察其收敛性，进而开发了用于曲面约束界面运动的阈值动力学算法，特别是通过广义MBO和HMBO算法实现了曲面上多相保体积曲率流的逼近。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将最小化运动方法从欧氏空间扩展到曲面PDE环境，以处理曲面约束的界面运动问题，填补现有方法在曲面上的应用空白。

Method: 采用最近点法作为核心技术手段，推广最小化运动到曲面设定；构建相应的数值逼近方法；基于这些方法开发阈值动力学算法（广义MBO和HMBO算法）。

Result: 成功观察到所创建逼近方法的收敛性；实现了曲面上多相保体积曲率流的有效逼近。

Conclusion: 最小化运动结合最近点法可有效推广至曲面PDE环境，由此衍生的阈值动力学算法能够处理复杂的曲面约束界面运动问题。

Abstract: By employing the closest point method, we extend the applicability of minimizing movements to the surface PDE setting. The corresponding approximation methods are created, and their convergence is observed. The numerical methods are then used to develop threshold dynamics algorithms for surface-constrained interfacial motions. In particular, show how the minimizing movements enable one to approximate multiphase, volume-preserving, curvature flows on surfaces via generalized MBO and HMBO algorithms.

</details>


### [645] [An explicit factorization of the Green's function for an acoustic half-space problem with impedance boundary conditions into an oscillatory exponential and a slowly varying function](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.03108)
*C. Lin,J. M. Melenk,S. Sauter*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文提出了声学d维半空间问题中阻抗边界条件格林函数的新表示，其核心特点是将格林函数分解为振荡复指数函数与缓变函数的乘积，从而支持高效多项式逼近，且所有参数统一由单一解析乘积公式给出。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有格林函数表示在处理阻抗边界条件时，往往难以兼顾计算效率与参数统一性，尤其在数值逼近中，振荡部分与缓变部分的耦合导致多项式逼近效率低下。本文旨在提出一种能够分离振荡成分并保持解析形式统一的新表示方法。

Method: 通过将格林函数中除Dirichlet/Neumann边界条件已有附加项之外的剩余部分，分解为以波数与程函乘积为参数的振荡复指数函数与一个缓变剩余函数的乘积；该表示对所有参数统一采用两个解析函数的乘积形式。

Result: 新表示的关键成果是：缓变剩余函数允许高效的多项式逼近，且整个公式在所有参数范围内保持单一解析形式，克服了传统表示中参数敏感性或分段表达的问题。

Conclusion: 该工作为阻抗边界条件下声学格林函数的数值计算提供了更高效、统一的解析框架，特别适用于需要快速多项式逼近的工程与科学计算场景。

Abstract: In this paper, new representations of the Green's function for an acoustic d-dimensional half-space problem with impedance boundary conditions are presented. The main features of the new representation are: a) in addition to additive terms that appear also in the case of Dirichlet or Neumann boundary conditions, the remaining part of the Green's function is factored into an oscillatory complex exponential function (with the product of the wavenumber and the eikonal as argument) and a remaining function which is slowly varying and hence allows for efficient polynomial approximation; b) the representation is given uniformly for all parameters by a single formula which consists of the product of two analytic functions.

</details>


### [646] [Elasticity-based morphing technique and application to reduced-order modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.02433)
*Abbas Kabalan,Fabien Casenave,Felipe Bordeu,Virginie Ehrlacher,Alexandre Ern*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于线性弹性方程序列求解的新形态构建方法，用于拓扑相同的形状间变形，无需边界参数化或预先计算边界变形，支持点/线/面约束对齐，并可集成到离线-在线框架中用于变形状降阶建模，在二维翼型阻力/升力系数回归问题中验证了鲁棒性和计算效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有形态构建方法通常需要边界参数化知识或预先计算边界变形，限制了其在复杂形状和降阶建模中的适用性。本文旨在提出一种无需边界参数化、不要求预先计算边界变形，且能有效集成到离线-在线范式中的新方法，以提高变形状降阶建模的灵活性和计算效率。

Method: 通过求解一系列线性弹性方程，将参考形状变形到每个目标形状；不需要边界参数化知识，也无需预先计算边界变形；可在参考域中施加点、线、面约束以确保变形后与目标域对应特征对齐；将该方法集成到离线-在线范式中，实现不同几何配置下形态的高效计算。

Result: 在二维测试案例上验证了方法的鲁棒性和计算效率，包括非参数化变形状翼型的阻力系数和升力系数回归问题。

Conclusion: 所提出的形态构建方法无需边界参数化，支持特征约束对齐，且能有效集成到离线-在线框架中，显著提升了变形状降阶建模的灵活性和计算效率，在二维翼型气动力系数回归问题中表现出良好的鲁棒性。

Abstract: The aim of this article is to introduce a new methodology for constructing morphings between shapes that have identical topology. The morphings are obtained by deforming a reference shape, through the resolution of a sequence of linear elasticity equations, onto every target shape. In particular, our approach does not assume any knowledge of a boundary parametrization, and the computation of the boundary deformation is not required beforehand. Furthermore, constraints can be imposed on specific points, lines and surfaces in the reference domain to ensure alignment with their counterparts in the target domain after morphing. Additionally, we show how the proposed methodology can be integrated in an offline and online paradigm, which is useful in reduced-order modeling involving variable shapes. This framework facilitates the efficient computation of the morphings in various geometric configurations, thus improving the versatility and applicability of the approach. The robustness and computational efficiency of the methodology is illustrated on two-dimensional test cases, including the regression problem of the drag and lift coefficients of airfoils of non-parameterized variable shapes.

</details>


### [647] [A priori and a posteriori error bounds for the fully mixed FEM formulation of poroelasticity with stress-dependent permeability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.03246)
*Arbaz Khan,Bishnu P. Lamichhane,Ricardo Ruiz-Baier,Segundo Villa-Fuentes*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文针对非线性多孔弹性模型，发展了一族混合有限元方法。通过重写本构方程使渗透率依赖于总多孔弹性应力和流体压力，利用带弱对称应力条件的Hellinger-Reissner原理处理Biot方程。基于固定点论证和Babuska-Brezzi理论分析系统唯一可解性，采用经典PEERS_k单元实现离散，方法精确守恒且鲁棒。推导了先验和后验误差估计，后验指示子可靠、高效且鲁棒，用于驱动自适应网格细化，并通过2D和3D数值算例验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有非线性多孔弹性问题的混合有限元方法在处理渗透率依赖于总应力和压力时面临挑战，需要发展一套兼具理论严谨性、计算鲁棒性和自适应能力的数值框架。

Method: 重写本构方程使渗透率依赖于总多孔弹性应力和流体压力；采用Hellinger-Reissner原理弱对称应力；将问题结构化为一个鞍点系统（一个鞍点公式、一个线性化摄动鞍点公式、两个非对角摄动）；利用固定点论证和Babuska-Brezzi理论分析唯一可解性；采用PEERS_k单元离散；推导先验和后验误差估计。

Result: 证明了连续问题和离散问题的唯一可解性；方法具有精确动量和质量守恒性，对近不可压缩和零储容极限鲁棒；后验误差指示子可靠、高效且对近不可压缩极限鲁棒；2D和3D数值算例验证了理论分析。

Conclusion: 所发展的混合有限元方法为非线性多孔弹性问题提供了兼具理论保障和实用价值的数值方案，后验误差估计可有效驱动自适应网格细化。

Abstract: We develop a family of mixed finite element methods for a model of nonlinear poroelasticity where, thanks to a rewriting of the constitutive equations, the permeability depends on the total poroelastic stress and on the fluid pressure and therefore we can use the Hellinger--Reissner principle with weakly imposed stress symmetry for Biot's equations. The problem is adequately structured into a coupled system consisting of one saddle-point formulation, one linearised perturbed saddle-point formulation, and two off-diagonal perturbations. This system's unique solvability requires assumptions on regularity and Lipschitz continuity of the inverse permeability, and the analysis follows fixed-point arguments and the Babuška--Brezzi theory. The discrete problem is shown uniquely solvable by applying similar fixed-point and saddle-point techniques as for the continuous case. The method is based on the classical PEERS$_k$ elements, it is exactly momentum and mass conservative, and it is robust with respect to the nearly incompressible as well as vanishing storativity limits. We derive a priori error estimates, we also propose fully computable residual-based a posteriori error indicators, and show that they are reliable and efficient with respect to the natural norms, and robust in the limit of near incompressibility. These a posteriori error estimates are used to drive adaptive mesh refinement. The theoretical analysis is supported and illustrated by several numerical examples in 2D and 3D.

</details>


### [648] [Generalised gradients for virtual elements and applications to a posteriori error analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.03148)
*Théophile Chaumont-Frelet,Joscha Gedicke,Lorenzo Mascotto*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种将标准节点虚拟单元法重写为广义梯度方法的新框架，通过局部重构单元子三角剖分上的间断通量和势能，实现了可靠且高效的误差估计，并证明了误差界的上下界常数独立于方法的稳定性项。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有节点虚拟单元法（VEM）的误差估计通常依赖于特定的稳定化参数，导致估计器的可靠性和效率受到限制。本文旨在通过将标准VEM重新表述为广义梯度方法，克服这一局限性，使得误差估计器的上下界常数与稳定化项解耦，从而获得更普适且鲁棒的误差控制手段。

Method: 首先将标准节点VEM重新表述为广义梯度方法；然后利用单元子三角剖分技术，局部重构间断的通量和势能；基于重构结果构建误差估计器，并证明其满足可靠性和效率的上下界估计，且界常数与稳定化参数无关；在特定网格假设及精度条件下，进一步验证该估计器的渐近精确性。

Result: 成功证明了所构造误差估计器的上界（可靠性）和下界（效率）成立，且常数与方法的稳定化项无关；在网格满足技术性假设时，该估计器还能在精度上保持渐近正确性。

Conclusion: 该广义梯度重写框架有效解除了虚拟单元法误差估计对稳定化参数的依赖，为VEM的后验误差控制提供了一种既可靠又高效的新途径，有望推广至更一般的多边形/多面体网格及高阶情形。

Abstract: We rewrite the standard nodal virtual element method as a generalised gradient method. This re-formulation allows for computing a reliable and efficient error estimator by locally reconstructing broken fluxes and potentials on elemental subtriangulations. We prove the usual upper and lower bounds with constants independent of the stabilisation of the method and, under technical assumptions on the mesh, the degree of accuracy.

</details>


### [649] [Properties of core-EP matrices and binary relationships](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.02602)
*Ehsan Kheirandish,Abbas Salemi,Néstor Thome*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文研究了core-EP矩阵的各种性质，引入了与之关联的MPDMP矩阵，并通过它得到了core-EP矩阵的一些性质及等价条件。同时研究了MPD、DMP和CMP逆的性质，证明了在core-EP矩阵类中，DMP、MPD和Drazin逆是相同的。此外，引入了DMP和MPD二元关系序，并探讨了这些序与其他二元关系序的关系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深入理解core-EP矩阵的结构特性，并通过引入新工具（MPDMP矩阵）来揭示其内在性质，同时厘清几种广义逆（MPD、DMP、CMP）在core-EP矩阵类中的关系。

Method: 引入MPDMP矩阵作为分析工具，通过代数推导证明core-EP矩阵的等价条件；对比分析MPD、DMP、CMP及Drazin逆在core-EP矩阵类中的关系；定义DMP和MPD二元关系序，并与现有序关系进行比较。

Result: 建立了core-EP矩阵的若干新性质及等价条件；证明了在core-EP矩阵类中，DMP逆、MPD逆与Drazin逆三者一致；提出了DMP序和MPD序，并厘清了它们与其他二元关系序的联系。

Conclusion: MPDMP矩阵是研究core-EP矩阵的有效工具；core-EP矩阵类中多种广义逆的等价性简化了相关理论；新引入的DMP和MPD序丰富了矩阵偏序理论体系。

Abstract: In this paper, various properties of core-EP matrices are investigated. We introduce the MPDMP matrix associated with $A$ and by means of it, some properties and equivalent conditions of core-EP matrices can be obtained. Also, properties of MPD, DMP, and CMP inverses are studied and we prove that in the class of core-EP matrices, DMP, MPD, and Drazin inverses are the same. Moreover, DMP and MPD binary relation orders are introduced and the relationship between these orders and other binary relation orders are considered.

</details>


### [650] [Deep Neural Networks with Symplectic Preservation Properties](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00294)
*Qing He,Wei Cai*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种深度神经网络架构，其输出为输入的逆可逆辛同胚映射，借鉴了real NVP归一化流方法的设计思想，使得网络能够在不破坏相空间固有辛结构的前提下学习未知哈密顿系统。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的神经网络在学习哈密顿系统时往往会破坏相空间的辛结构，导致物理不一致性。本文旨在设计一种能保持辛结构的神经网络架构，从而更准确地建模未知哈密顿系统。

Method: 提出一种深度神经网络架构，其输出构成输入的逆可逆辛同胚映射。该设计借鉴了real NVP（实值非体积保持）归一化流技术，通过特殊的网络结构确保映射的辛性质。

Result: 该网络能够在不破坏相空间固有辛结构的前提下完成对未知哈密顿系统的学习任务。

Conclusion: 所提出的辛神经网络架构成功地结合了归一化流的思想，为学习哈密顿系统提供了一种保持物理结构一致性的有效方法。

Abstract: We propose a deep neural network architecture designed such that its output forms an invertible symplectomorphism of the input. This design draws an analogy to the real-valued non-volume-preserving (real NVP) method used in normalizing flow techniques. Utilizing this neural network type allows for learning tasks on unknown Hamiltonian systems without breaking the inherent symplectic structure of the phase space.

</details>


<div id='math.AP'></div>

# math.AP [[Back]](#toc)

### [651] [On the near soliton dynamics for the 2D cubic Zakharov-Kuznetsov equations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00300)
*Gong Chen,Yang Lan,Xu Yuan*

Main category: math.AP

TL;DR: 本文研究二维立方（质量临界）Zakharov-Kuznetsov方程的Cauchy问题，证明了初始数据在H^1中接近孤立子时，解仅有有限时间离开、有限时间爆破或全局收敛于孤立子三种可能行为，且对非正能量且质量超阈值的初始数据必发生爆破。证明基于改进的调制估计和修正的能量-维里Lyapunov泛函，通过变换方法克服了Schrödinger算子缺乏强制性的困难。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 旨在完整刻画二维立方ZK方程中接近孤立子的初始数据所对应的解的全部渐近行为，并特别关注非正能量且质量超阈值情形下解的爆破性质。

Method: 借鉴Martel-Merle-Raphaël处理质量临界gKdV方程的技术，采用精细调制估计和修正的能量-维里Lyapunov泛函。针对virial型估计中Schrödinger算子缺乏强制性的关键困难，引入Kenig-Martel的变换方法将原问题转化为伴随问题，并利用Farah-Holmer-Roudenko-Yang对伴随问题中算子强制性的数值验证结果。

Result: 证明了接近孤立子的初始数据对应的解仅有三种可能行为：有限时间离开孤立子邻域、有限时间爆破、或全局存在并收敛于孤立子。特别地，对非正能量且质量大于阈值质量的初始数据，解必发生有限时间爆破。

Conclusion: 成功将质量临界gKdV方程的动力学分类框架推广至二维ZK方程，解决了Schrödinger算子非强制性带来的技术难点，为ZK方程解的动力学行为研究提供了完整的分类结果。

Abstract: In this article, we consider the Cauchy problem for the cubic (mass-critical) Zakharov-Kuznetsov equations in dimension two: $$\partial_t u+\partial_{x_1}(Δu+u^3)=0,\quad (t,x)\in [0,\infty)\times \mathbb{R}^{2}.$$ For initial data in $H^1$ close to the soliton with a suitable space-decay property, we fully describe the asymptotic behavior of the corresponding solution. More precisely, for such initial data, we show that only three possible behaviors can occur: 1) The solution leaves a tube near soliton in finite time; 2) the solution blows up in finite time; 3) the solution is global and locally converges to a soliton. In addition, we show that for initial data near a soliton with non-positive energy and above the threshold mass, the corresponding solution will blow up as described in Case 2.
  Our proof is inspired by the techniques developed for mass-critical generalized Korteweg-de Vries equation (gKdV) equation in a similar context by Martel-Merle-Raphaël. More precisely, our proof relies on refined modulation estimates and a modified energy-virial Lyapunov functional. The primary challenge in our problem is the lack of coercivity of the Schrödinger operator which appears in the virial-type estimate. To overcome the difficulty, we apply a transform, which was first introduced in Kenig-Martel [13], to perform the virial computations after converting the original problem to the adjoint one. Th coercivity of the Schrödinger operator in the adjoint problem has been numerically verified by Farah-Holmer-Roudenko-Yang [9].

</details>


### [652] [Pointwise estimates for the fundamental solutions of higher order Schrödinger equations in odd dimensions II: high dimensional case](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00117)
*Han Cheng,Shanlin Huang,Tianxiao Huang,Quan Zheng*

Main category: math.AP

TL;DR: 本文研究了高阶薛定谔方程在奇数维空间中的基本解，其中位势V具有特定光滑性和衰减性。在H无正嵌入本征值的假设下，得到了积分核K(t,x,y)的衰减估计，其衰减速率依赖于0是否为H的本征值，并给出了光滑算子H^{α/(2m)}e^{-i t H}P_{ac}(H)的类似结果。位势的正则性条件在二阶情形下是最优的，在高阶情形下也似乎是最优的。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究高阶薛定谔方程基本解的衰减性质，特别是位势对散射行为的影响，以及零能量本征值对长时间衰减的效应。

Method: 采用谱理论和散射理论的方法，考虑H=(-Δ)^m+V的绝对连续谱投影，通过分析积分核的估计式得到衰减速率，区分0是否为H的本征值两种情况（σ=2或σ=0）。

Result: 得到了积分核K(t,x,y)的显式衰减估计：|K(t,x,y)| ≤ C(1+|t|)^{-(n/(2m)-σ)}(1+|t|^{-n/(2m)})(1+|t|^{-1/(2m)}|x-y|)^{-n(m-1)/(2m-1)}，其中σ=2（若0是H的本征值）或σ=0（否则）。同时给出了光滑算子H^{α/(2m)}e^{-i t H}P_{ac}(H)的类似结果。

Conclusion: 位势的正则性条件V∈C^{(n+1)/2-2m}在二阶情形（m=1）是最优的，在高阶情形（m>1）也似乎是最优的。

Abstract: In this paper, for any odd $n$ and any integer $m\geq1$ with $n>4m$, we study the fundamental solution of the higher order Schrödinger equation \begin{equation*} \mathrm{i}\partial_tu(x,t)=((-Δ)^m+V(x))u(x,t),\quad t\in \mathbb{R},\,\,x\in \mathbb{R}^n, \end{equation*} where $V$ is a real-valued $C^{\frac{n+1}{2}-2m}$ potential with certain decay. Let $P_{ac}(H)$ denote the projection onto the absolutely continuous spectrum space of $H=(-Δ)^m+V$, and assume that $H$ has no positive embedded eigenvalue. Our main result says that $e^{-\mathrm{i}tH}P_{ac}(H)$ has integral kernel $K(t,x,y)$ satisfying \begin{equation*} |K(t, x,y)|\le C(1+|t|)^{-(\frac{n}{2m}-σ)}(1+|t|^{-\frac{n}{2 m}})\left(1+|t|^{-\frac{1}{2 m}}|x-y|\right)^{-\frac{n(m-1)}{2 m-1}},\quad t\neq0,\,x,y\in\mathbb{R}^n, \end{equation*} where $σ=2$ if $0$ is an eigenvalue of $H$, and $σ=0$ otherwise. A similar result for smoothing operators $H^\fracα{2m}e^{-\mathrm{i}tH}P_{ac}(H)$ is also given. The regularity condition $V\in C^{\frac{n+1}{2}-2m}$ is optimal in the second order case, and it also seems optimal when $m>1$.

</details>


### [653] [To collide, or not to collide, that is the question -- a survey](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00010)
*Florian Oschmann*

Main category: math.AP

TL;DR: 本文对物体与容器边界发生（无）碰撞的已知结果进行了详细综述。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 系统梳理物体与容器边界碰撞/无碰撞问题的已有研究成果，为该领域提供全面的理论基础和文献参考。

Method: 采用文献综述方法，对物体与边界碰撞相关已知结果进行详细概述和分类整理。

Result: 提供了该研究领域已知结果的详细综述，涵盖碰撞与无碰撞两种情况。

Conclusion: 本文作为一篇综述性论文，系统总结了物体与容器边界相互作用的研究现状。

Abstract: We give a detailed overview over known results for (no-)collision of a body with the boundary of its container.

</details>


### [654] [Stability of travelling waves to Korteweg--de Vries type equations with fractional dispersion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00321)
*Kaito Kokubu*

Main category: math.AP

TL;DR: 本文研究了具有分数阶色散和整数指标双幂非线性的KdV型方程的行波解的稳定性，从奇偶性和色散强度角度对行波解现象进行了分类，重点关注稳定行波解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理解奇偶性组合和色散强度如何影响分数阶色散KdV型方程中基态解的存在性，进而探究行波解的稳定性规律。

Method: 通过分析非线性项中两个指标的不同奇偶性组合以及色散强度参数，对行波解的存在性和稳定性进行理论分类研究。

Result: 给出了行波解稳定性现象的分类结果，揭示了奇偶性和色散强度与行波解稳定性之间的依赖关系。

Conclusion: 分数阶色散KdV型方程中行波解的稳定性取决于非线性指标的奇偶性组合和色散强度，论文给出了相应的稳定性分类。

Abstract: We study stability of travelling wave solutions to Korteweg--de Vries type equations which has the fractional dispersion and integer-indices double power nonlinearities. It may depend on parity combinations of the two indices and the strength of dispersion whether these equations have a ground state solution. Therefore, we observe the stability phenomena on travelling wave solutions from the perspective of the parities and the dispersion, and we give the classification of phenomena on travelling wave solutions. In this paper, we focus on stable travelling wave solutions.

</details>


### [655] [Fundamental Solution for a New Class of Non-Archimedean Pseudo-Differential Equations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00136)
*Anatoly N. Kochubei,Mariia V. Serdiuk*

Main category: math.AP

TL;DR: 本文研究了两变量p-adic函数上的新型伪微分方程，证明了柯西问题解的唯一性，并探究了有限依赖性和L^1估计等性质。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 拓展伪微分方程理论到两变量p-adic函数空间，建立解的适定性理论基础。

Method: 对两变量p-adic函数定义新型伪微分算子，通过算子理论分析柯西问题的解的存在唯一性，并利用函数空间性质推导解的有限依赖性和L^1估计。

Result: 证明了对应柯西问题存在唯一解；解满足有限依赖性；解具有L^1可积性估计。

Conclusion: 建立了两变量p-adic伪微分方程的解的适定性理论，揭示了该类方程的解具有有限依赖性和L^1可积性等良好性质。

Abstract: In this paper we study a new class of pseudo-differential equations on functions of two $p$-adic variables. It is proved that the correspondent Cauchy problem has a unique solution. Some properties of this solution are studied, in particular, the finite dependence property and an $L^1$-estimate.

</details>


### [656] [Factorizations and Power Weighted Rellich and Hardy--Rellich-Type Inequalities](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00013)
*Fritz Gesztesy,Michael M. H. Pang,Jake Parmentier,Jonathan Stanfill*

Main category: math.AP

TL;DR: 本文重新审视并扩展了与幂加权Rellich和Hardy-Rellich不等式相关的一系列不等式，包括Schmincke不等式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 重新审视并扩展现有的幂加权Rellich和Hardy-Rellich不等式，特别是Schmincke不等式，以填补理论空白或改进已知结果。

Method: 通过理论分析重新审视并扩展幂加权Rellich和Hardy-Rellich不等式，包括对Schmincke不等式的推广。

Result: 获得了更一般形式的幂加权Rellich和Hardy-Rellich不等式，并扩展了Schmincke不等式。

Conclusion: 本文成功扩展了相关不等式族，为该领域提供了更广泛的理论基础。

Abstract: We revisit and extend a variety of inequalities related to power weighted Rellich and Hardy--Rellich inequalities, including an inequality due to Schmincke.

</details>


### [657] [New type of solutions for a critical Grushin-type problem with competing potentials](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00353)
*Wenjing Chen,Zexi Wang*

Main category: math.AP

TL;DR: 本文研究了一类具有双势的临界Grushin型问题，通过约化论证和局部Pohouzaev恒等式，构造了一族新的解，这些解集中在圆柱的顶部和底部圆上。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究临界Grushin型问题中解的存在性与集中现象，特别是具有双势情形下的新解族构造。

Method: 采用约化论证（reduction argument）和局部Pohouzaev恒等式（local Pohouzaev identities）作为主要分析工具。

Result: 成功构造了一族新的解，这些解的浓度点位于圆柱的顶部和底部圆上。

Conclusion: 对于具有双势的临界Grushin型问题，存在一族集中在圆柱顶部和底部圆上的新解，这丰富了该类问题解的结构。

Abstract: In this paper, we consider a critical Grushin-type problem with double potentials. By applying the reduction argument and local Pohouzaev identities, we construct a new family of solutions to this problem, which are concentrated at points lying on the top and the bottom circles of a cylinder.

</details>


### [658] [A strongly degenerate fully nonlinear mean field game with nonlocal diffusion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00152)
*Indranil Chowdhury,Espen R. Jakobsen,Miłosz Krupski*

Main category: math.AP

TL;DR: 本文针对同时兼具完全非线性和退化扩散特性的平均场博弈系统，证明了存在唯一性。这是首次在退化设定下应用完全非线性MFG的适定性理论，通过处理低阶纯跳跃Lévy扩散和单调平滑耦合，利用粘性解、非标准变量加倍法和自举程序解决了退化的非光滑Fokker-Plank方程的唯一性问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 目前关于完全非线性或退化扩散的MFG系统结果很少，本文旨在研究同时包含这两种困难的问题，填补该领域的空白。

Method: 基于前期建立的完全非线性MFG适定性理论，采用粘性解方法、非标准双变量论证和自举程序，处理低阶（小于1阶）纯跳跃非局部Lévy扩散和单调平滑耦合。

Result: 证明了该退化、完全非线性MFG系统解的存在唯一性，其中唯一性的成立取决于扩散阶数足够低。

Conclusion: 本文首次在退化扩散设定下成功应用了完全非线性MFG的适定性理论，为相关研究提供了重要方法基础。

Abstract: There are few results on mean field game (MFG) systems where the PDEs are either fully nonlinear or have degenerate diffusions. This paper introduces a problem that combines both difficulties. We prove existence and uniqueness for a strongly degenerate, fully nonlinear MFG system by using the well-posedness theory for fully nonlinear MFGs established in our previous paper. It is the first such application in a degenerate setting. Our MFG involves a controlled pure jump (nonlocal) Lévy diffusion of order less than one, and monotone, smoothing couplings. The key difficulty is obtaining uniqueness for the corresponding degenerate, non-smooth Fokker-Plank equation: since the regularity of the coefficient and the order of the diffusion are interdependent, it holds when the order is sufficiently low. Viscosity solutions and a non-standard doubling of variables argument are used along with a bootstrapping procedure.

</details>


### [659] [Stationary solution to Stochastically Forced Euler-Poisson Equations in Bounded Domain: Part 1. 3-D Insulating Boundary](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00017)
*Yachun Li,Ming Mei,Lizhen Zhang*

Main category: math.AP

TL;DR: 本文研究了带绝缘边界条件的3D随机Euler-Poisson方程（受Wiener过程驱动），建立了全局解的存在唯一性，证明了解随时间渐近收敛到稳态，并利用加权能量估计得到了收敛速率，发现不变测度即为稳态生成的Dirac测度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随机偏微分方程理论需要处理带噪声的Euler-Poisson系统，其确定性情形已有结果，但随机情形下的全局适定性和长时间行为尚不清楚，特别是需要发展不同于确定性情形的加权能量估计方法。

Method: 采用加权能量估计方法处理随机项带来的技术困难，结合随机分析工具（Wiener过程、伊藤公式）和偏微分方程经典估计，建立全局存在唯一性并推导收敛速率。

Result: 证明了3D随机Euler-Poisson方程全局解的存在唯一性，解随时间指数收敛到稳态，不变测度为稳态对应的Dirac测度。

Conclusion: 随机Euler-Poisson系统在绝缘边界条件下具有全局适定性和指数稳定性的稳态，其不变测度是退化的Dirac测度，加权能量估计是处理随机情形关键技术。

Abstract: This paper is concerned with $3$-D stochastic Euler-Poisson equations with insulating boundary conditions forced by the Wiener process. We first establish the global existence and uniqueness of the solution to the system, then we prove that the solution converges to its steady-state time-asymptotically. To obtain the converging rate, we need to develop weighted energy estimates, which are not required for the deterministic counterpart of the problem. Moreover, we observe that the invariant measure is just the Dirac measure generated by the steady-state, in which the time-exponential convergence rate to the steady-state plays an essential role.

</details>


### [660] [On selection dynamics for a nonlocal phenotype-structured model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00354)
*Shen Bian,Jiale Bu*

Main category: math.AP

TL;DR: 本文分析了一种无表型变化的表型结构模型的长期行为，证明了非局部方程的唯一解在长时间极限下会收敛到以适应性峰值为中心的狄拉克测度，若适应性峰值不在解的支持域内，则解会在边界附近发生无限时间爆破。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为了理解在表型不发生变化的条件下，给定环境中最佳适应性状如何被自然选择所筛选出来的长期动力学行为。

Method: 采用数学分析的方法，研究非局部方程的唯一解的长时间极限行为，并结合数值结果进行验证。

Result: 长时间极限下解收敛到以适应性峰值为中心的狄拉克测度；若适应性峰值不在解的支持域内，则解在边界附近发生无限时间爆破。

Conclusion: 该模型成功刻画了无表型变化情况下的自然选择过程，数值结果进一步帮助理解中心位置的识别。

Abstract: This paper is devoted to the analysis of the long-time behavior of a phenotypic-structured model where phenotypic changes do not occur. We give a mathematical description of the process in which the best adapted trait is selected in a given environment created by the total population. It is exhibited that the long-time limit of the unique solution to the nonlocal equation is given by a Dirac mass centered at the peak of the fitness within or at the boundary of the region where the initial data is positive. Specially, If the peak of the fitness can't be in the support of the solution, then the infinite time blow-up of the solution occurs near the boundary of the region where the solution is positive. Moreover, our numerical results facilitate a deeper understanding of identifying the position of the centers.

</details>


### [661] [Boundary driven instabilities of Couette flows](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00307)
*Dongfen Bian,Emmanuel Grenier,Nader Masmoudi,Weiren Zhao*

Main category: math.AP

TL;DR: 证明了经典Couette流在H^s空间中的失稳阈值为ν^{1/2}，失稳完全由边界驱动，流动动力学形成宽度为ν^{1/2}的Prandtl型边界层，该边界层自身线性不稳定，进而引发二次失稳并产生子层。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究经典Couette流在高正则性Sobolev空间H^s中的失稳阈值，探索边界层驱动的失稳机制。

Method: 通过理论分析证明失稳阈值，分析Prandtl型边界层的形成及其线性不稳定性，揭示二次失稳和子层生成机制。

Result: 经典Couette流在H^s中的失稳阈值为ν^{1/2}，失稳完全由边界驱动，边界层宽度为ν^{1/2}。

Conclusion: 边界层驱动的失稳机制导致二次失稳和子层形成，揭示了高Reynolds数下壁面剪切流的转捩路径。

Abstract: In this article, we prove that the threshold of instability of the classical Couette flow in $H^s$ for large $s$ is $ν^{1/2}$. The instability is completely driven by the boundary. The dynamic of the flow creates a Prandtl type boundary layer of width $ν^{1/2}$ which is itself linearly unstable. This leads to a secondary instability which in turn creates a sub-layer.

</details>


### [662] [Optimal design problem with thermal radiation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00021)
*Kosuke Kita,Kei Matsushima,Tomoyuki Oka*

Main category: math.AP

TL;DR: 本文研究具有非线性边界条件（主要由极大单调算子描述）的两材料热导体配置优化问题，旨在最小化稳态扩散方程的Dirichlet能量。通过建立均匀化定理、松弛问题存在性定理，并引入带周长约束的近似问题以避免灰度域，证明了近似问题极小值在特定情况下收敛至松弛问题解。优化配置高度依赖于非线性问题的力项，并应用于实际物理问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决具有非线性边界条件（如热辐射边界条件）的两材料热导体拓扑优化问题，由于非线性边界条件导致优化配置深度依赖于力项，传统线性问题的优化方法不再适用。

Method: 1) 建立均匀化定理并应用于松弛问题极小值存在性证明；2) 针对热辐射边界条件推导Dirichlet能量的Fréchet导数以估计最小值；3) 引入基于水平集函数正部的周长约束问题作为近似，避免松弛问题中的灰度域；4) 证明特定情况下近似问题极小值的极限等于松弛问题极小值；5) 采用非线性扩散方程的时间离散版本构造近似问题的候选极小值。

Result: 证明了均匀化定理和松弛问题极小值的存在性；推导了热辐射边界条件下Dirichlet能量的Fréchet导数；证明了周长约束近似问题极小值的存在性，以及特定情况下其极限收敛至松弛问题解；揭示了优化配置对力项的深度依赖关系。

Conclusion: 非线性边界条件下两材料热导体的最优配置深度依赖于力项，这是非线性问题的显著特征；所提出的均匀化-松弛-周长约束近似框架有效解决了此类非线性拓扑优化问题，并可通过非线性扩散方程的时间离散版本构造近似解。

Abstract: This paper is concerned with configurations of two-material thermal conductors that minimize the Dirichlet energy for steady-state diffusion equations with nonlinear boundary conditions described mainly by maximal monotone operators. To find such configurations, a homogenization theorem will be proved and applied to an existence theorem for minimizers of a relaxation problem whose minimum value is equivalent to an original design problem. As a typical example of nonlinear boundary conditions, thermal radiation boundary conditions will be the focus, and then the Fréchet derivative of the Dirichlet energy will be derived, which is used to estimate the minimum value. Since optimal configurations of the relaxation problem involve the so-called grayscale domains that do not make sense in general, a perimeter constraint problem via the positive part of the level set function will be introduced as an approximation problem to avoid such domains, and moreover, the existence theorem for minimizers of the perimeter constraint problem will be proved. In particular, it will also be proved that the limit of minimizers for the approximation problem becomes that of the relaxation problem in a specific case, and then candidates for minimizers of the approximation problem will be constructed by employing time-discrete versions of nonlinear diffusion equations. In this paper, it will be shown that optimized configurations deeply depend on force terms as a characteristic of nonlinear problems and will also be applied to real physical problems.

</details>


### [663] [Reaction-diffusion systems in annular domains: source stability estimates with boundary observations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00399)
*Catalin-George Lefter,Elena-Alexandra Melnig*

Main category: math.AP

TL;DR: 该论文针对环形区域中带有零阶耦合项的反应-扩散方程组，利用Carleman估计和正性改善性质，建立了源项关于边界观测的Lipschitz稳定性估计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究环形区域中耦合反应-扩散方程组的源项反问题稳定性，特别是在一般齐次边界条件下，利用边界观测数据（解或其法向导数）来定量刻画源项的Lipschitz稳定性。

Method: 主要工具包括：(1) 带有边界观测的L^2范数Carleman估计；(2) 抛物型方程及方程组解的正性改善性质。

Result: 在环形区域中，针对零阶耦合的反应-扩散方程组，建立了源项关于解或其法向导数（在边界某连通分量上）的Lipschitz稳定性估计。

Conclusion: 本文证明了在环形区域几何条件下，通过边界观测可以稳定地反演反应-扩散方程组中的源项，为相关反问题提供了理论保证。

Abstract: We consider systems of reaction-diffusion equations coupled in zero order terms, with general homogeneous boundary conditions in domains with a particular geometry (annular type domains). We establish Lipschitz stability estimates in L^2 norm for the source in terms of the solution and/or its normal derivative on a connected component of the boundary. The main tools are represented by: appropriate Carleman estimates in L^2 norms, with boundary observations, and positivity improving properties for the solutions to parabolic equations and systems.

</details>


### [664] [The 3D kinetic Couette flow via the Boltzmann equation in the diffusive limit](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00311)
*Renjun Duan,Shuangqian Liu,Robert M. Strain,Anita Yang*

Main category: math.AP

TL;DR: 研究三维动力学库埃特流在通道区域中的玻尔兹曼方程的扩散极限，证明一阶近似由扰动不可压Navier-Stokes-Fourier系统控制，且无外力时三维动力学库埃特流随时间渐近收敛到一维稳态平面动力学库埃特流。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究动力学库埃特流在扩散极限下的渐近行为，建立玻尔兹曼方程到流体动力学方程的严格数学推导。

Method: 利用傅里叶变换将三维问题降维为一维问题；采用各向异性Chemin-Lerner型函数空间（结合Wiener代数）处理非线性和克努森数奇异性；运用Caflisch分解与L²∩L∞交互技巧控制大速度增长。

Result: 一阶近似解由扰动不可压Navier-Stokes-Fourier系统描述；无外力时三维动力学库埃特流渐近收敛到一维稳态平面动力学库埃特流。

Conclusion: 严格建立了三维动力学库埃特流在扩散极限下的流体动力学极限，揭示了从动力学模型到宏观流体模型的渐近一致性。

Abstract: In the paper we study the Boltzmann equation in the diffusive limit in a channel domain $\mathbb{T}^2\times (-1,1)$ for the 3D kinetic Couette flow. Our results demonstrate that the first-order approximation of the solutions is governed by the perturbed incompressible Navier-Stokes-Fourier system around the fluid Couette flow. Moverover, in the absence of external forces, the 3D kinetic Couette flow asymptotically converges over time to the 1D steady planar kinetic Couette flow. Our proof relies on (i) the Fourier transform on $\mathbb{T}^2$ to essentially reduce the 3D problem to a one-dimensional one, (ii) anisotropic Chemin-Lerner type function spaces, incorporating the Wiener algebra, to control nonlinear terms and address the singularity associated with a small Knudsen number in the diffusive limit, and (iii) Caflisch's decomposition, combined with the $L^2\cap L^\infty$ interplay technique, to manage the growth of large velocities.

</details>


### [665] [Sharp kernel bounds for parabolic operators with first order degeneracy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00031)
*Luigi Negro,Chiara Spina*

Main category: math.AP

TL;DR: 本文证明了半空间 $\mathbb{R}^{N+1}_+$ 中，在 Neumann 或斜导数边界条件下，奇异椭圆算子 $\mathcal L=\mbox{Tr }\left(AD^2\right)+\frac{(v,\nabla)}y$ 的抛物核的 sharp 上界和下界估计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为奇异椭圆算子在 Neumann 或斜导数边界条件下的抛物核建立精确的上下界估计，填补相关理论空白。

Method: 通过分析奇异椭圆算子 $\mathcal L$ 的结构，结合抛物核的性质，推导 sharp 的上下界估计。

Result: 得到了该奇异椭圆算子在 Neumann 或斜导数边界条件下抛物核的 sharp 上界和下界估计。

Conclusion: 成功建立了半空间中奇异椭圆算子在特定边界条件下的抛物核的精确估计，为后续研究提供理论基础。

Abstract: We prove sharp upper and lower estimates for the parabolic kernel of the singular elliptic operator \begin{align*}
