Abstract: We provide a fine classification of rigid three-dimensional torus quotients with isolated canonical singularities, up to biholomorphism and diffeomorphism. This complements the classification of Calabi-Yau 3-folds of type $\rm{III}_0$, which are those quotients with Gorenstein singularities.

</details>


### [779] [The Hitchin Fibration for Symmetric Pairs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00961)
*Thomas Hameister,Benedict Morrissey*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文介绍了对称空间Hitchin纤维化中的"regular quotient"概念，并阐述了其对Higgs丛的基本推论。特别地，针对GL_{2n}/(GL_n×GL_n)空间，提出了谱覆盖的不变理论方法，同时研究了拟分裂对的regular centralizer群概形及其Galois描述，并总结了这些结果对Hitchin系统的若干基本影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 对称空间的Hitchin纤维化及其相关的regular quotient结构在已有文献中尚未被系统建立和描述，本文旨在填补这一空白，为更广泛的对称空间情形下的Higgs丛和Hitchin系统研究提供理论基础。

Method: 1. 定义并描述对称空间Hitchin纤维化的regular quotient；2. 采用不变量理论的方法处理GL_{2n}/(GL_n×GL_n)的谱覆盖；3. 研究拟分裂对的regular centralizer群概形，并通过Galois作用给出其描述。

Result: 建立了对称空间情形下regular quotient的概念，给出了GL_{2n}/(GL_n×GL_n)谱覆盖的不变量理论刻画，并提供了拟分裂对regular centralizer群概形的Galois描述。

Conclusion: regular quotient的引入为对称空间上的Hitchin系统提供了一种统一的处理框架，所得的群概形描述和谱覆盖结果为进一步研究相关模空间和可积系统奠定了基础。

Abstract: We introduce and describe the "regular quotient" for the Hitchin fibration for symmetric spaces and explain some basic consequences for Higgs bundles. We include an invariant theoretic approach to spectral covers in this setting for the particular space $\mathrm{GL}_{2n}/(\mathrm{GL}_n\times \mathrm{GL}_n)$. We also include a study of the regular centralizer group scheme for quasisplit pairs, including a Galois description of a closely related group scheme. We collect some basic consequences for Hitchin systems associated to such pairs.

</details>


### [780] [The embedded Nash problem in singular spaces: the case of surfaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.01533)
*Javier de la Bodega*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文提出了允许环境空间存在奇点的嵌入Nash问题，并在曲面情形下解决了该问题，推广了文献[BdlB]中的定理1.22。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将经典的Nash问题（关于弧空间与Nash簇）推广到环境空间允许奇点的更一般情形，解决曲面上的嵌入Nash问题。

Method: 通过引入允许奇点的嵌入Nash问题的定义，并运用曲面情形下的代数几何与奇点理论方法，推广已有结论。

Result: 在曲面情形下成功解决了嵌入Nash问题，即证明了环境空间允许奇点时，Nash簇与某个典范对象之间的双射对应仍然成立。

Conclusion: 该工作将Nash问题的适用范围扩展到了带奇点的环境空间，并给出了曲面情形的完整证明，为进一步研究高维情形奠定了基础。

Abstract: We introduce the embedded Nash problem allowing singularities in the ambient space, and solve it in the case of surfaces, generalizing \cite[Theorem 1.22]{BdlB}.

</details>


### [781] [The real Mordell-Weil group of rational elliptic surfaces and real lines on del Pezzo surfaces of degree $K^2=1$](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.01202)
*Sergey Finashin,Viatcheslav Kharlamov*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文研究了实有理椭圆曲面X的实Mordell-Weil群MW_R的拓扑性质，以及X上和“从属”的1次del Pezzo曲面Y上的实直线。给出了Y_R上实直线的同位型分类和MW_R在映射类群Mod(X_R)中的显式表示，并建立了MW_R在H_1(X_R)上作用的显式公式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 旨在理解实有理椭圆曲面的Mordell-Weil群的拓扑性质，特别是其在同调群和映射类群中的作用，以及与之相关的实直线的同位型分类。

Method: 通过研究实有理椭圆曲面X及其从属的1次del Pezzo曲面Y上的实直线，给出Y_R上实直线的同位型分类和MW_R在映射类群Mod(X_R)中的显式表示。

Result: 给出了Y_R上实直线的同位型分类的显式描述，以及MW_R在映射类群Mod(X_R)中的显式表示，并建立了MW_R作用于一阶同调群H_1(X_R)的显式公式。

Conclusion: 成功建立了实有理椭圆曲面的Mordell-Weil群与映射类群及同调群之间的具体联系，为理解其拓扑性质提供了显式代数-拓扑描述。

Abstract: We undertake a study of topological properties of the real Mordell-Weil group $\operatorname{MW}_{\mathbb R}$ of real rational elliptic surfaces $X$ which we accompany by a related study of real lines on $X$ and on the "subordinate" del Pezzo surfaces $Y$ of degree 1. We give an explicit description of isotopy types of real lines on $Y_{\mathbb R}$ and an explicit presentation of $\operatorname{MW}_{\mathbb R}$ in the mapping class group $\operatorname{Mod}(X_{\mathbb R})$. Combining these results we establish an explicit formula for the action of $\operatorname{MW}_{\mathbb R}$ in $H_1(X_{\mathbb R})$.

</details>


### [782] [The companion section for classical groups](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00962)
*Thomas Hameister,Ngo Bao Chau*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文利用GL_n的伴随矩阵构造，为经典群和G_2群构建了Chevalley映射[g/G]→g//G的规范截面。通过构造相关谱覆盖上的规范张量，文章明确给出了经典群和G_2群上仿射Springer纤维和Hitchin纤维的格点描述。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为经典群和G_2群构建Chevalley映射的规范截面，并给出仿射Springer纤维和Hitchin纤维的显式格点描述。

Method: 利用GL_n的伴随矩阵构造，通过构造谱覆盖上的规范张量来实现经典群和G_2群的Chevalley映射截面构建。

Result: 成功构建了经典群和G_2群的Chevalley映射规范截面，并给出了仿射Springer纤维和Hitchin纤维的显式格点描述。

Conclusion: 本文方法有效推广了GL_n的伴随矩阵构造到更广泛的群类，为相关几何对象的描述提供了系统框架。

Abstract: We use the companion matrix construction for $\mathrm{GL}_n$ to build canonical sections of the Chevalley map $[\mathfrak{g}/G]\to \mathfrak{g}/\!/ G$ for classical groups $G$ as well as the group $G_2$. To do so, we construct canonical tensors on the associated spectral covers. As an application, we make explicit lattice descriptions of affine Springer fibers and Hitchin fibers for classical groups and $G_2$.

</details>


### [783] [Geometric families of degenerations from mutations of polytopes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.01785)
*Laura Escobar,Megumi Harada,Christopher Manon*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文提出了“多翼格”（polyptych lattice）的概念，用于编码由分段线性双射关联的格族，并发展了与之相关的凸几何与多面体理论。在某些情形下，多翼格关联的多面体能编码仿射簇的紧化，其坐标环可装备到与多翼格关联的半代数上的赋值。研究表明，紧化的几何性质可组合地理解：在若干假设下，所得紧化是算术科恩-麦考利（arithmetically Cohen-Macaulay）的，且具有有限生成的类群和Cox环。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 经典凸几何与环面几何中，扇（fan）通过有理分段线性函数关联格与对偶格，而多翼格将此框架推广到更一般的格族及其分段线性双射，旨在建立一种统一的理论，用于构造和理解更广泛类型的代数簇紧化，特别是那些坐标环具有非平凡赋值结构的簇。

Method: 定义多翼格作为一族格及其分段线性双射的集合；在此基础上发展凸几何对象（多翼多面体等）；通过赋值将代数簇的坐标环映射到与多翼格关联的半代数上，从而将紧化问题转化为组合数据。

Result: 多翼格关联的多面体可编码仿射簇的紧化；在适当假设下，这些紧化具有算术科恩-麦考利性质，类群和Cox环均有限生成。

Conclusion: 多翼格提供了一种新颖而统一的组合框架，用于研究一类仿射簇紧化的代数几何性质，使得许多几何不变量可通过组合手段刻画。

Abstract: We introduce the notion of a polyptych lattice, which encodes a collection of lattices related by piecewise linear bijections. We initiate a study of the new theory of convex geometry and polytopes associated to polyptych lattices. In certain situations, such a polytope associated to a polyptych lattice encodes a compactification of an affine variety whose coordinate ring can be equipped with a valuation into a certain semialgebra associated to the polyptych lattice. We show that aspects of the geometry of the compactification can be understood combinatorially; for instance, under some hypotheses, the resulting compactifications are arithmetically Cohen-Macaulay, and have finitely generated class group and finitely generated Cox rings.

</details>


### [784] [Boundedness of complements for log Calabi-Yau threefolds](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.01310)
*Guodu Chen,Jingjun Han,Qingyuan Xue*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文研究Calabi-Yau型三维代数簇对的补理论，证明了存在一个有限正整数集N，使得任意具有klt型R-补的三维簇对(Z∋z,B)都有一个n-补（n∈N），并证明了R-补曲面簇对的补有界性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将Shokurov的补理论从系数集{1}推广到更一般的系数集[0,1]，研究Calabi-Yau型簇上的补存在性与有界性问题。

Method: 利用双有理几何的极小模型纲领（MMP）和奇点理论，通过分析R-补的结构，构造有限集N并证明n-补的存在性。

Result: 对三维Calabi-Yau型簇对，证明了存在有限正整数集N使得从R-补可推出n-补；对曲面簇对，证明了R-补的有界性。

Conclusion: 将补理论推广到更一般的系数集[0,1]，在三维和曲面情形给出了补的存在性与有界性结果。

Abstract: In this paper, we study the theory of complements, introduced by Shokurov, for Calabi-Yau type varieties with the coefficient set $[0,1]$. We show that there exists a finite set of positive integers $\mathcal{N}$, such that if a threefold pair $(X/Z\ni z,B)$ has an $\mathbb{R}$-complement which is klt over a neighborhood of $z$, then it has an $n$-complement for some $n\in\mathcal{N}$. We also show the boundedness of complements for $\mathbb{R}$-complementary surface pairs.

</details>


### [785] [Anti-ample bundle, nef vector bundle, big vector bundle](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.01151)
*Indranil Biswas,Fatima Laytimi,D. S. Nagaraj,Werner Nahm*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文证明在非奇异射影簇的有限平坦态射下，反丰沛向量丛的直接像仍是反丰沛的；并证明了丰沛与nef向量丛的张量积保持nef且丰沛的性质，推广了Schneider的结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究代数几何中向量丛在有限平坦态射下的正性（positivity）传递性质，以及丰沛（big）和nef向量丛的张量积运算的封闭性。

Method: 利用代数几何中的有限平坦态射性质、向量丛的正性定义（反丰沛、nef、丰沛）以及张量积运算，通过严格的代数推理完成证明。

Result: 反丰沛向量丛在有限平坦态射下的直接像保持反丰沛性；nef向量丛与nef且丰沛向量丛的张量积仍为nef且丰沛。

Conclusion: 推广了Schneider的相关结论，深化了对向量丛正性在态射与张量积下传递性质的理解。

Abstract: We prove that the direct image of an anti-ample vector bundle is anti-ample under any finite flat morphism of non-singular projective varieties. In the second part we prove some properties of big and nef vector bundles. In particular it is shown that the tensor product of a nef vector bundle with a nef and big vector bundle is again nef and big. This generalizes a result of Schneider.

</details>


### [786] [Gorenstein-Fano polytopes and compactifications of rank 2 polyptych lattices](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.01788)
*Adrian Cook,Laura Escobar,Megumi Harada,Christopher Manon*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文构建了一类显式的秩2双图格族M_s，通过具体计算验证了Escobar-Harada-Manon提出的双图格抽象理论，包括点的空间、自对偶性、凸几何现象、Gorenstein-Fano多面体以及去热带化与Cox环的显式表示。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为Escobar-Harada-Manon提出的双图格抽象理论提供具体的显式构造和计算实例，填补理论缺乏具体例证的空白。

Method: 构造秩2、含2个图表的双图格族M_s；计算点的空间并证明其满性与自对偶性；通过点-凸包样例展示凸几何的新现象；构造二维“图表-Gorenstein-Fano”多面体；对M_s进行去热带化，并在s=1（UFD情形）下给出Cox环的生成元与关系显式表示。

Result: 成功构造了显式的双图格族M_s，验证了理论的满性与自对偶性；发现了经典凸几何中不存在的现象；得到了与突变相关的经典Gorenstein-Fano多面体对；在s=1情形下给出了Cox环的显式生成元与关系表示。

Conclusion: 双图格理论不仅具有丰富的抽象结构，而且可以通过具体构造和计算进行实例化，其凸几何行为比经典情形更丰富，并与代数几何中的Cox环、Fano多面体等概念有深刻联系。

Abstract: The notion of polyptych lattices, introduced by Escobar, Harada, and Manon, wraps the data of a collection of lattices related by piecewise-linear bijections together into a single semi-algebraic object, equipped with its own notions of convexity and polyhedra. The main purpose of this manuscript is to construct an explicit family of polyptych lattices, and to illustrate via explicit computations the abstract theory introduced by Escobar-Harada-Manon. Specifically, we first construct a family of rank-$2$ polyptych lattices $\mathcal{M}_s$ with $2$ charts, compute their space of points, and prove that they are full and self-dual. We then give a concrete sample computation of a point-convex hull in $\mathcal{M}_s \otimes \mathbb{R}$ to illustrate that convex geometry in the polyptych lattice setting can exhibit phenomena not seen in the classical situation. We also give multiple examples of $2$-dimensional ``chart-Gorenstein-Fano'' polytopes, which give rise to pairs of mutation-related $2$-dimensional (classical) Gorenstein-Fano polytopes. Finally, we produce detropicalizations $(\mathcal{A}_s, \mathfrak{v}_s)$ of $\mathcal{M}_s$, and in the case $s=1$ where the detropicalization is a UFD, and with respect to a certain choice of PL polytope $\mathcal{P}$, we give an explicit generators-and-relations presentation of the (finitely generated) Cox ring of the compactification $X_{\mathcal{A}_s}(\mathcal{P})$ of $\mathrm{Spec}(\mathcal{A}_s)$ with respect to $\mathcal{P}$.

</details>


### [787] [Rational weighted projective hypersurfaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.01333)
*Louis Esser*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文研究加权射影空间中高次超曲面的有理性问题，给出了许多新的有理构造，并肯定回答了Okada关于所有维度n≥6上存在非常一般终端Fano有理加权超曲面的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 复射影空间中超曲面的有理性问题（d≤2时有理，d,n≥3时预期无理）已得到广泛研究，但加权射影空间中次数相对权重较小的超曲面同样有理，而更高次的情况有待探索。作者受到T. Okada关于终端Fano有理加权超曲面存在性问题的启发，旨在构造更多高次有理加权超曲面。

Method: 通过引入加权超曲面的有理构造方法，在任意域上构造新的有理加权超曲面实例。具体方法涉及对加权投影空间中高次超曲面的结构分析，利用权重与次数的特定关系来保证有理性的构造。

Result: 成功构造了大量新的有理加权超曲面例子，覆盖任意域上的情形。特别地，对所有n≥6的维度，证明了非常一般终端Fano有理加权超曲面的存在性，从而肯定了Okada的问题。

Conclusion: 本文扩展了加权超曲面有理性的已知范围，建立了高次情形下的有理构造，并为终端Fano超曲面的有理性研究提供了重要进展。

Abstract: A very general hypersurface of dimension $n$ and degree $d$ in complex projective space is rational if $d \leq 2$, but is expected to be irrational for all $n, d \geq 3$. Hypersurfaces in weighted projective space with degree small relative to the weights are likewise rational. In this paper, we introduce rationality constructions for weighted hypersurfaces of higher degree that provide many new rational examples over any field. We answer in the affirmative a question of T. Okada about the existence of very general terminal Fano rational weighted hypersurfaces in all dimensions $n \geq 6$.

</details>


### [788] [The Noether inequality for threefolds and three moduli spaces with minimal volumes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.01276)
*Meng Chen,Yong Hu,Chen Jiang*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文证明了所有几何亏格5≤p_g≤10的一般型射影三维流形的Noether不等式Vol(X)≥(4/3)p_g(X)-10/3，解决了三维流形Noether不等式的所有剩余情况。进一步研究了小亏格和最小体积典范三维流形的模空间，具体描述了p_g=2且典范体积为1/3时的典范环，并证明了相关模空间M_{1/3,2}、M_{1,3}、M_{2,4}的不可约性、单有理性和维数（分别为189、236、270），且每个成员均为单连通。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 建立并完善一般型三维射影流形的Noether不等式，解决此前尚未覆盖的几何亏格5到10之间的情形；同时系统研究小几何亏格和最小典范体积的典范三维流形的模空间结构，揭示其典范环的显式描述及模空间的几何性质。

Method: 通过代数几何方法，利用典范体积与几何亏格之间的不等式关系，针对几何亏格5≤p_g≤10的情形进行证明；对具体低亏格情形（p_g=2,3,4），通过构造典范模型（如p_g=2时典范模型为P(1,1,2,3,8)中的16次超曲面）显式描述典范环，进而分析模空间的不可约性、单有理性和维数。

Result: 完全解决了三维流形Noether不等式的所有剩余情况（p_g=5~10）；给出了p_g=2且典范体积为1/3时典范环的显式描述（P(1,1,2,3,8)中的16次超曲面）；证明了模空间M_{1/3,2}（维数189）、M_{1,3}（维数236）、M_{2,4}（维数270）均为不可约、单有理的，且每个成员单连通。

Conclusion: 三维流形的Noether不等式已完整建立；小亏格最小体积典范三维流形的模空间具有良好的几何性质（不可约、单有理、单连通），为典范三维流形的分类提供了重要信息。

Abstract: We establish the Noether inequality
  \[\textrm{Vol}(X)\geq \frac{4}{3}p_g(X)-\frac{10}{3}\] for all projective $3$-folds $X$ of general type with geometric genus $5\leq p_g(X)\leq 10$ where $\textrm{Vol}(X)$ is the canonical volume. This result resolves all remaining cases of the Noether inequality for $3$-folds.
  We further investigate the moduli spaces of canonical $3$-folds with small genera and minimal volumes. For a $3$-fold of general type with geometric genus $2$ and with minimal canonical volume $\frac{1}{3}$, we prove that its canonical model is a hypersurface of degree $16$ in $\mathbb{P}(1,1,2,3,8)$, which gives an explicit description of its canonical ring. This implies that the coarse moduli space $\mathcal{M}_{\frac{1}{3}, 2}$, parametrizing all canonical $3$-folds with canonical volume $\frac{1}{3}$ and geometric genus $2$, is an irreducible unirational variety of dimension $189$. Parallel studies show that $\mathcal{M}_{1, 3}$ is irreducible, unirational, and $236$-dimensional, and that $\mathcal{M}_{2, 4}$ is irreducible, unirational, and $270$-dimensional. As being conceived, every member in these 3 families is simply-connected.

</details>


### [789] [Remarks on the Griffiths infinitesimal invariant of algebraic curves](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.01907)
*Haohua Deng*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文研究了光滑亏格4代数曲线模空间上两类典型可容许正规函数（包括Ceresa正规函数）的Griffiths无穷小不变量，并针对特定曲线族分析了其消失条件。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究亏格4曲线模空间上两类典范可容许正规函数（含Ceresa正规函数）的Griffiths无穷小不变量的消失条件，以深入理解这些正规函数的几何性质。

Method: 通过理论分析，研究两类典型可容许正规函数（包括Ceresa正规函数）在光滑亏格4代数曲线模空间上的性质，并针对特定曲线族计算其Griffiths无穷小不变量的消失条件。

Result: 给出了两类正规函数（含Ceresa正规函数）在特定曲线族上Griffiths无穷小不变量消失的判据。

Conclusion: 该研究深化了对亏格4曲线模空间上正规函数及其无穷小不变量的理解，为相关几何不变量提供了新的消失准则。

Abstract: We study two canonically defined admissible normal functions on the moduli space of smooth genus 4 algebraic curves including the Ceresa normal function. In particular, we study the vanishing criteria for the Griffiths infinitesimal invariants of both normal functions over a specific family of curves.

</details>


### [790] [A Real Generalized Trisecant Trichotomy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.01356)
*Kristian Ranestad,Anna Seigal,Kexin Wang*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文证明了一般化三割线引理的实类比，给出了实射影簇与补维线性空间交点数目的三岔分类，并应用于Segre-Veronese簇以分析ICA、张量分解的可识别性和典型张量秩。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将经典代数几何中一般化三割线引理推广到实域，解决实射影簇与补维线性空间相交时交点数的可能取值问题，为实代数几何提供新工具。

Method: 基于实代数几何方法，证明一个三分性定理（trichotomy），刻画实射影簇与补维线性空间的交点数取值范围，证明任意满足奇偶性且在最小与最大值之间的整数均可实现。

Result: 建立了实一般化三割线引理的三分性分类；完整刻画了实射影簇与补维线性空间交点数目的可达整数集合；对Segre-Veronese簇给出ICA可识别性、张量分解及典型张量秩的具体应用。

Conclusion: 实一般化三割线引理为实代数几何提供了基础性结论，在独立成分分析可识别性、张量分解唯一性及典型张量秩等应用问题中具有重要价值。

Abstract: The classical trisecant lemma says that a general chord of a non-degenerate space curve is not a trisecant; that is, the chord only meets the curve in two points. The generalized trisecant lemma extends the result to higher-dimensional varieties. It states that the linear space spanned by general points on a projective variety intersects the variety in exactly these points, provided the dimension of the linear space is smaller than the codimension of the variety and that the variety is irreducible, reduced, and non-degenerate. We prove a real analogue of the generalized trisecant lemma, which takes the form of a trichotomy. Along the way, we characterize the possible numbers of real intersection points between a real projective variety and a complimentary dimension real linear space. We show that any integer of correct parity between a minimum and a maximum number can be achieved. We then specialize to Segre-Veronese varieties, where our results apply to the identifiability of independent component analysis, tensor decomposition and to typical tensor ranks.

</details>


### [791] [Generalized Motives through Witt Vectors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.01417)
*Xin Tong*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 该论文通过Witt向量和广义线丛的模空间，推广了压缩动机（condensed motives）理论。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有压缩动机理论在代数几何与数论中的应用存在局限性，论文试图通过引入Witt向量和广义线丛模空间来扩展其适用范围。

Method: 利用Witt向量构造广义线丛的模栈，并在此基础上对压缩动机范畴进行推广。

Result: 获得了更一般的压缩动机理论框架，可涵盖更广泛的代数几何对象。

Conclusion: 推广后的压缩动机理论能够处理更多经典算术几何和代数几何中的问题。

Abstract: We generalize condensed motives, through Witt vectors and the associated moduli stacks of generalized line bundles.

</details>


### [792] [Limiting mixed Hodge structures associated to I-surfaces with simple elliptic singularities](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.02062)
*Robert Friedman,Phillip Griffiths*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文研究了一般型I曲面（满足$K_X^2=1$, $p_g(X)=2$）在获得简单椭圆奇点时周期映射的渐近行为，描述了变形理论与d-半稳定模型的关系，分析了混合Hodge结构，并证明了全局Torelli定理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理解I曲面在退化过程中周期映射的渐近行为，特别是当曲面获得简单椭圆奇点时，其混合Hodge结构的变化规律及边界分层结构。

Method: 1. 建立I曲面变形理论与d-半稳定模型之间的关系；2. 分析d-半稳定模型上的混合Hodge结构、极限混合Hodge结构及单值性；3. 分类满足$\dim W_1 = 4$的6种可能边界层，利用幂零轨道刻画边界层结构。

Result: 确定了6种边界层，其极限混合Hodge结构满足$\dim W_1 = 4$，且$W_2/W_1$为纯$(1,1)$型；证明了每种情形下极限混合Hodge结构的幂零轨道唯一确定边界层；对其中一个边界层证明了全局Torelli定理。

Conclusion: I曲面的周期映射在边界上展现出丰富结构，极限混合Hodge结构可以有效区分不同退化类型，全局Torelli定理的成立表明在某些边界层上周期映射仍然是单射。

Abstract: An I-surface $X$ is a surface of general type with $K_X^2 =1$ and $p_g(X) =2$. This paper studies the asymptotic behavior of the period map for I-surfaces acquiring simple elliptic singularities. First we describe the relationship between the deformation theory of such surfaces and their $d$-semistable models. Next we analyze the mixed Hodge structures on the $d$-semistable models, the corresponding limiting mixed Hodge structures, and the monodromy. There are $6$ possible boundary strata for which the relevant limiting mixed Hodge structures satisfy: $\dim W_1 = 4$, and hence $W_2/W_1$ is of pure type $(1,1)$. We show that, in each case, the nilpotent orbit of limiting mixed Hodge structures determines the boundary stratum and prove a global Torelli theorem for one such stratum.

</details>


### [793] [Relative-Hyper GAGA Theorem](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.01481)
*Eita Haibara,Taewan Kim*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文提出了相对超上同调版本的Serre GAGA定理，证明了复射影簇上复形层的相对超上同调与其解析化的相对超上同调同构，该结果蕴含了原始的Serre GAGA定理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将经典的Serre GAGA定理推广到相对超上同调的框架下，建立复代数几何与解析几何之间更广泛的对应关系。

Method: 通过构造相对超上同调理论，并证明在开子簇或闭子簇条件下，代数簇上复形层的相对超上同调与其解析化后的相对超上同调之间存在自然同构。

Result: 成功证明了相对超上同调版本的GAGA同构定理，并且该定理能够还原为原始的Serre GAGA定理。

Conclusion: 该工作将Serre GAGA定理从绝对上同调推广到相对情形，为代数几何与解析几何之间的桥梁提供了更丰富的理论工具。

Abstract: In this paper, we provide a relative hypercohomology version of Serre's GAGA theorem. We prove that the relative hypercohomology of a complex of sheaves on a complex projective variety is isomorphic to the relative hypercohomology of its analytification, with respect to an open or closed subvariety. This result implies Serre's original GAGA theorem.

</details>


### [794] [Toward Qin's Conjecture on Hilbert schemes of points and quasi-modular forms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.01554)
*Mazen M Alhwaimel*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文证明了在光滑射影曲面X（其标准除子数值平凡）上，对于线丛L，Qin关于约化生成级数⟨ch₁^{L₁}ch₁^{L₂}⟩′为拟模形式的猜想成立。主要方法借鉴了QY文献的思路，并构建了多重q-ζ值与拟模形式之间的多种关系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Qin曾猜想：当光滑射影曲面X的标准除子数值平凡时，Okounkov引入的约化生成级数为拟模形式。本文旨在验证该猜想在⟨ch₁^{L₁}ch₁^{L₂}⟩′这一特殊情况下的正确性。

Method: 采用QY文献中提出的方法框架，通过构造多重q-ζ值与拟模形式之间的多种关系来推导证明。

Result: 成功验证了Qin猜想在⟨ch₁^{L₁}ch₁^{L₂}⟩′情形下成立，即该约化生成级数是拟模形式。

Conclusion: 本文证实了Qin猜想的一个特例，为更广泛地证明该猜想提供了方法论基础和技术支撑。

Abstract: For a line bundle $L$ on a smooth projective surface $X$ and nonnegative integers $k_1, \ldots, k_N$, Okounkov \cite{Oko} introduced the reduced generating series $\big \langle {\rm ch}_{k_1}^{L} \cdots {\rm ch}_{k_N}^{L} \big \rangle'$ for the intersection numbers among the Chern characters of the tautological bundles over the Hilbert schemes of points on $X$ and the total Chern classes of the tangent bundles of these Hilbert schemes. In \cite{Qin2}, Qin conjectured that these reduced generating series are quasi-modular forms if the canonical divisor of $X$ is numerically trivial. In this paper, we verify that Qin's conjecture holds for $\langle {\rm ch}_1^{L_1}{\rm ch}_1^{L_2} \rangle'$. The main approaches are to use the methods laid out in \cite{QY} and construct various relations regarding multiple $q$-zeta values and quasi-modular forms.

</details>


### [795] [Quasi-BPS categories for Higgs bundles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.02168)
*Tudor Pădurariu,Yukinobu Toda*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文针对扭曲Higgs丛引入拟BPS范畴，该范畴是半稳定扭曲Higgs丛模叠上凝聚层导出范畴的构建块。在BPS条件下，这些拟BPS范畴是Hitchin可积系统的非交换类比。作者提出一个关于欧拉示性数与权重的对称性猜想，受Dolbeault几何Langlands对偶、Hausel-Thaddeus镜像对称及Calabi-Yau三维流形上曲线BPS不变量χ-独立性现象启发。在秩二亏格零情形证明了该猜想，在更高亏格下证明了秩二稳定扭曲Higgs模空间的导出等价作为特例。另一篇论文中证明了拓扑K-理论版本的猜想并讨论了与局部Calabi-Yau三维流形BPS不变量的关系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 构建并研究扭曲Higgs丛的拟BPS范畴，这些范畴是半稳定扭曲Higgs丛模叠上导出范畴的基本构件，并探索其对称性猜想。

Method: 引入拟BPS范畴概念，提出交换欧拉示性数与权重的对称性猜想，通过秩二亏格零情形的直接证明以及更高亏格下秩二稳定扭曲Higgs模空间导出等价作为特例来验证猜想。

Result: 在秩二亏格零情形证明了对称性猜想；在更高亏格下证明了秩二稳定扭曲Higgs模空间的导出等价；在另一篇论文中证明了拓扑K-理论版本的猜想。

Conclusion: 拟BPS范畴是研究扭曲Higgs丛模空间导出范畴的基本工具，所提出的对称性猜想在若干情形得到验证，并且与Dolbeault几何Langlands对偶、镜像对称及BPS不变量χ-独立性现象有深刻联系。

Abstract: We introduce quasi-BPS categories for twisted Higgs bundles, which are building blocks of the derived category of coherent sheaves on the moduli stack of semistable twisted Higgs bundles over a smooth projective curve. Under some condition (called BPS condition), the quasi-BPS categories are non-commutative analogues of Hitchin integrable systems.
  We begin the study of these quasi-BPS categories by focusing on a conjectural symmetry which swaps the Euler characteristic and the weight. Our conjecture is inspired by the Dolbeault Geometric Langlands equivalence of Donagi--Pantev, by the Hausel--Thaddeus mirror symmetry, and by the $χ$-independence phenomenon for BPS invariants of curves on Calabi-Yau threefolds.
  We prove our conjecture in the case of rank two and genus zero. In higher genus, we prove a derived equivalence of rank two stable twisted Higgs moduli spaces as a special case of our conjecture.
  In a separate paper, we prove a version of our conjecture for the topological K-theory of quasi-BPS categories and we discuss the relation between quasi-BPS categories and BPS invariants of the corresponding local Calabi-Yau threefold.

</details>


### [796] [On the geometry of spaces of filtrations on local rings](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.01705)
*Lu Qi*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文研究了Noetherian局部域上滤子空间的几何结构，引入了一个类似Darvas度量的度量d1，使其成为测地度量空间；在toric情形下通过Newton-Okounkov体将饱和单项式滤子空间与L^1_loc的子空间等同；并研究了log canonical threshold函数的半连续性以及滤子空间的格结构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 受复几何中Darvas度量的启发，旨在建立代数几何中滤子空间的度量几何理论，并推广经典理想格结构及Kollár-Demailly关于log canonical threshold半连续性的结果。

Method: (1) 在饱和滤子空间上定义度量d1并证明其测地性；(2) 在toric情形下利用Newton-Okounkov体建立与L^1_loc子空间的等同；(3) 研究多种拓扑及其性质；(4) 建立饱和滤子空间的格结构。

Result: (1) 饱和滤子空间在d1下成为测地度量空间；(2) toric情形下饱和单项式滤子空间与L^1_loc子空间同构；(3) log canonical threshold函数在适当拓扑下具有半连续性；(4) 饱和滤子空间构成一个格，推广了理想的格结构。

Conclusion: 该工作建立了滤子空间的度量几何框架，连接了代数几何中的滤子理论与复几何中的Darvas度量理论，为研究奇点理论和toric几何提供了新工具。

Abstract: We study the geometry of spaces of fitrations on a Noetherian local domain. We introduce a metric $d_1$ on the space of saturated filtrations, inspired by the Darvas metric in complex geometry, such that it is a geodesic metric space. In the toric case, using Newton-Okounkov bodies, we identify the space of saturated monomial filtrations with a subspace of $L^1_\mathrm{loc}$. We also consider several other topologies on such spaces and study the semi-continuity of the log canonical threshold function in the spirit of Kollár-Demailly. Moreover, there is a natural lattice structure on the space of saturated filtrations, which is a generalization of the classical result that the ideals of a ring form a lattice.

</details>


### [797] [Ample vector bundles and moduli of tame stacks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.01743)
*Daniel Bragg,Martin Olsson,Rachel Webb*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种将驯服堆嵌入到广义加权射影堆中的方法，通过引入驯服堆上的丰富向量丛概念，并以此构造了带丰富向量丛的驯服堆的代数模堆以及驯服轨道曲线的代数堆。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 已有的堆嵌入理论主要针对Deligne-Mumford堆或特定条件下的代数堆，缺乏适用于一般驯服堆的嵌入框架。本文旨在填补这一空白，通过推广Ample向量丛的概念到驯服堆上，建立更一般的嵌入定理。

Method: 首先在诺特环上的驯服堆上定义Ample向量丛的概念，然后利用该概念构造嵌入到广义加权射影堆中。具体技术细节可能涉及堆的范畴性质、向量丛的渐近性质以及射影性判断准则。

Result: 成功建立了驯服堆到广义加权射影堆的嵌入定理，并以此为基础构造了两个代数模堆：带丰富向量丛的驯服堆的模堆，以及驯服轨道曲线的代数堆。

Conclusion: 提出的嵌入方法为驯服堆的几何研究提供了新工具，所构造的模堆为相关几何对象的分类和变形理论奠定了代数基础。

Abstract: We explain how to define an embedding of a tame stack over a noetherian ring into a certain generalization of a weighted projective stack using a notion of ample vector bundle on the stack. As applications we construct algebraic moduli stacks of tame stacks equipped with an ample vector bundle and algebraic stacks of tame orbicurves.

</details>


### [798] [The Automorphism groups of zero-dimensional monomial algebras](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.02197)
*Roberto Díaz,Alvaro Liendo,Gonzalo Manzano-Flores,Andriy Regeta*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文研究特征零域上有限维单项式代数B的自同构群，通过对B的齐次局部幂零导子进行显式分类，并将结果推广到半群代数的更一般情形。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 确定有限维单项式代数在特征零域上的自同构群，填补该领域的研究空白。

Method: 通过对齐次局部幂零导子进行显式分类来刻画自同构群，并将问题推广到更一般的半群代数框架中处理。

Result: 给出了有限维单项式代数B的自同构群的完整分类，且该结果适用于更一般的半群代数。

Conclusion: 在特征零域条件下，通过局部幂零导子分类成功刻画了单项式代数的自同构群，并建立了向半群代数推广的普适性结论。

Abstract: A monomial algebra B is defined as a quotient of a polynomial ring by a monomial ideal, which is an ideal generated by a finite set of monomials. In this paper, we determine the automorphism group of a monomial algebra B, under the assumption that B is a finite-dimensional vector space over a field of characteristic zero. We achieve this by providing an explicit classification of the homogeneous locally nilpotent derivations of B. The main body of the paper addresses the more general case of semigroup algebras, with the polynomial ring being a particular case.

</details>


### [799] [New solutions of the Poincaré Center Problem in degree 3](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.01751)
*Hans-Christian von Bothmer*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文针对平面自治系统，提出了基于拟齐次奇点的代数积分曲线配置的Darboux可积性新判据，并利用该判据构造了三阶中心簇中先前未知的分量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在平面自治系统中，判断系统是否具有Darboux可积性是一个经典问题。现有的判据依赖于代数积分曲线的奇点性质，但针对奇点为拟齐次的情形缺乏系统性的充分条件。本文旨在填补这一空白，并为构造中心簇的新分量提供理论工具。

Method: 首先，假设平面自治系统 ω 的代数积分曲线配置 C 的所有奇点都是拟齐次的。在此基础上，提出了保证Darboux可积性的新充分条件（判据）。然后，将该判据应用于三次系统（degree 3）的中心簇分类问题，通过分析拟齐次奇点的代数曲线配置，系统性地构造了先前未知的中心簇分量。

Result: 成功建立了基于拟齐次奇点的代数积分曲线配置的Darboux可积性新判据；利用该判据，在三阶（degree 3）平面自治系统中发现了新的中心簇分量，这些分量在已有文献中未被报道。

Conclusion: 本文提出的新判据拓展了Darboux可积性的适用范围，特别适用于奇点结构为拟齐次的情形。在三阶系统中的应用不仅验证了判据的有效性，还丰富了中心簇的分类结果，为后续高维或更高阶系统的研究奠定了基础。

Abstract: Let $ω$ be a plane autonomous system and C its configuration of algebraic integral curves. If the singularities of C are quasi-homogeneous we we present new criteria that guarantee Darboux integrability. We use this to construct previously unknown components of the center variety in degree 3.

</details>


### [800] [Notes on Siegfried Bosch's Algebraic Geometry and Commutative Algebra (dedicated to Grothendieck)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.01829)
*Eric Schmid*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文是关于交换代数与代数几何的综合性笔记，涵盖环、理想、模、预层、层、概型、同调代数、平展上同调等进阶主题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为学习者提供系统的交换代数与代数几何笔记，覆盖从基础到高级的多个核心主题，便于自修与参考。

Method: 采用笔记形式，系统梳理交换代数与代数几何的基本概念与理论框架，从环论、理想、模块出发，逐步深入到预层、层、概型、同调代数及平展上同调等高级内容。

Result: 形成了一套涵盖交换代数与代数几何核心内容的综合性笔记体系。

Conclusion: 该笔记为学习和研究交换代数与代数几何提供了系统的参考资料。

Abstract: Notes on Commutative Alegbra and Algebraic Geometry covering rings, ideals, modules, presheaves, sheaves, schemes, homological algebra, étale cohomology and further topics that are more advanced.

</details>


### [801] [A geometric interpretation of Krull dimensions of $\boldsymbol{T}$-algebras](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.02366)
*JuAe Song,Yasuhito Nakajima*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文研究了热带几何中半环和半域的Krull维数。对于热带洛朗多项式半环上的同余C，若其有限子集T满足V(T)=V(C)，则T称为C的有限同余热带基。证明了当C和C_B均具有有限同余热带基时，商半环的Krull维数等于V(C)作为多面体复形的维数加一与V(C_B)维数中的最大值。进而证明不含单点的热带曲线有理函数半域的Krull维数为二。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 热带几何中半环和半域的Krull维数尚未得到充分研究，本文旨在建立同余热带基与Krull维数之间的联系，为热带代数簇的维数理论提供代数基础。

Method: 1) 定义有限同余热带基概念；2) 利用多面体复形维数与同余热带基的关系，推导商半环Krull维数的表达式；3) 将结果应用于热带曲线有理函数半域。

Result: 商半环Krull维数 = max{ dim(V(C)) + 1, dim(V(C_B)) }；热带曲线（非单点）的有理函数半域Krull维数为2。

Conclusion: 建立了同余热带基与Krull维数的定量关系，并成功计算了热带曲线有理函数半域的维数。

Abstract: We investigate Krull dimensions of semirings and semifields dealt in tropical geometry. For a congruence $C$ on a tropical Laurent polynomial semiring $\boldsymbol{T}[X_1^{\pm}, \ldots, X_n^{\pm}]$, a finite subset $T$ of $C$ is called a finite congruence tropical basis of $C$ if the congruence variety $\boldsymbol{V}(T)$ associated with $T$ coincides with $\boldsymbol{V}(C)$. For $C$ proper, we prove that the Krull dimension of the quotient semiring $\boldsymbol{T}[X_1^{\pm}, \ldots, X_n^{\pm}] / C$ coincides with the maximum of the dimension of $\boldsymbol{V}(C)$ as a polyhedral complex plus one and that of $\boldsymbol{V}(C_{\boldsymbol{B}})$ when both $C$ and $C_{\boldsymbol{B}}$ have finite congruence tropical bases, respectively. Here $C_{\boldsymbol{B}}$ is the congruence on $\boldsymbol{T}[X_1^{\pm}, \ldots, X_n^{\pm}]$ generated by $\{ (f_{\boldsymbol{B}}, g_{\boldsymbol{B}}) \,|\, (f, g) \in C \}$ and $f_{\boldsymbol{B}}$ is defined as the tropical Laurent polynomial obtained from $f$ by replacing the coefficients of all non $-\infty$ terms of $f$ with the real number zero. With this fact, we also show that rational function semifields of tropical curves that do not consist of only one point have Krull dimension two.

</details>


### [802] [On the prismatization of $O_K$ beyond the Hodge-Tate locus](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.02051)
*Zeyu Liu*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文对n-截断棱镜晶体上的完美复形进行了分类（n≤1+(p-1)/e），并通过其与Hodge-Tate栈的nilpotent thickening关系，描述了G_K的连续半线性表示及其B_dR,n^+系数上同调，同时分类了arXiv:2205.14914中研究的de Rham棱镜晶体的某些积分模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 分类n-截断棱镜晶体上的完美复形，并建立其与G_K半线性表示之间的联系，以理解棱镜上同调理论在截断情形下的结构。

Method: 通过研究X的n-截断棱镜化（即X棱镜化内部Hodge-Tate栈的nilpotent thickening）上的完美复形，并利用向量丛的有理化和微小收缩来实现分类。

Result: 给出了n-截断棱镜晶体完美复形的分类，描述了G_K连续半线性表示及其B_dR,n^+系数上同调的范畴，并分类了arXiv:2205.14914中的某些de Rham棱镜晶体的积分模型。

Conclusion: 棱镜上同调理论在截断情形下与G_K表示论有深刻联系，且可统一处理积分与有理化结构。

Abstract: Let $X=\mathrm{Spf}(\mathcal{O}_K)$. We classify perfect complexes of $n$-truncated prismatic crystals on the prismatic site of $X$ when $n\leq 1+\frac{p-1}{e}$ by studying perfect complexes on the $n$-truncated prismatization of $X$, which are certain nilpotent thickenings of the Hodge-Tate stack of $X$ inside the prismatization of $X$. We describe the category of continuous semilinear representations and their cohomology for $G_K$ with coefficients in $B_{\mathrm{dR},n}^+$ via rationalization of vector bundles on the slight shrinking of the $n$-truncated prismatization of $X$. Along the way, we classify certain integral models for de Rham prismatic crystals studied in arXiv:2205.14914.

</details>


### [803] [Neighborhood of a rational curve with an ordinary cusp](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.01877)
*Takayuki Koike,Takato Uehara*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文研究嵌入在非奇异复曲面中的、具有普通尖点的约化有理曲线邻域的复解析性质，该曲线的自交数为零。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理解具有奇点的曲线在复曲面中的局部解析结构，特别是自交数为零的普通尖点曲线的邻域性质。

Method: 运用复解析几何方法，研究约化有理曲线（带普通尖点）在非奇异复曲面中的邻域结构，聚焦于自交数为零的情形。

Result: 揭示了自交数为零的带普通尖点的约化有理曲线在非奇异复曲面中的邻域的复解析性质。

Conclusion: 对具有普通尖点且自交数为零的约化有理曲线的邻域复解析结构进行了刻画。

Abstract: We investigate complex analytic properties of a neighborhood of a reduced rational curve with an ordinary cusp embedded in a non-singular complex surface whose self-intersection number is zero.

</details>


### [804] [Abelian surfaces over finite fields containing no curves of genus $3$ or less](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.02493)
*Elena Berardini,Alejandro Giangreco Maidana,Stefano Marseglia*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文研究有限域上的阿贝尔曲面，完整刻画了不含低亏格（≤3）曲线的阿贝尔曲面的等周类，并证明了简单阿贝尔曲面包含亏格3曲线等价于存在4次极化，进而分类了不含亏格≤2曲线且无4次极化的等周类，最后描述了这些曲面上绝对不可约的亏格3曲线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 补全和扩展先前工作中关于不含亏格≤2曲线的阿贝尔曲面等周类的刻画，并进一步研究不含亏格≤3曲线的情形。

Method: 首先完善等周类分类；然后通过证明“包含亏格3曲线 ⇔ 存在4次极化”这一等价关系，利用现有算法检验同构类是否具有4次极化；最后分类无4次极化的等周类，并描述曲面上绝对不可约的亏格3曲线。

Result: 1) 完整刻画了不含亏格≤2曲线的等周类；2) 建立了简单阿贝尔曲面中亏格3曲线存在性与4次极化的等价性；3) 刻画了不含亏格≤2曲线且无4次极化的等周类；4) 描述了曲面上绝对不可约的亏格3曲线。

Conclusion: 通过极化的角度，系统地分类了有限域上不含低亏格曲线的阿贝尔曲面，为理解其几何结构提供了新的刻画工具。

Abstract: We study abelian surfaces defined over finite fields which do not contain any possibly singular curve of genus less than or equal to $3$. Firstly, we complete and expand the characterisation of isogeny classes of abelian surfaces with no curves of genus up to $2$ initiated by the first author \emph{et al.~}in previous work. Secondly, we show that, for simple abelian surfaces, containing a curve of genus $3$ is equivalent to admitting a polarisation of degree $4$. Thanks to this result, we can use existing algorithms to check which isomorphism classes in the isogeny classes containing no genus $2$ curves have a polarisation of degree $4$. Thirdly, we characterise isogeny classes of abelian surfaces with no curves of genus $\leq 2$, containing no abelian surface with a polarisation of degree $4$. Finally, we describe the absolutely irreducible genus $3$ curves lying on abelian surfaces containing no curves of genus less than or equal to $2$.

</details>


### [805] [Uniform bundles on quadrics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.02365)
*Xinyi Fang,Duo Li,Yanjie Li*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文研究了射影空间中均匀向量丛的分裂性质，证明了在特定条件下仅存在常值态射，改进了均匀丛分裂的上界，分类了极小秩的不可分裂均匀丛，并部分回答了Ellia猜想。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究均匀向量丛的分裂性质是代数几何中的重要问题。本文旨在改进Kachi和Sato关于均匀丛分裂上界的结果，分类某些旗流形上极小秩的不可分裂均匀丛，并验证Ellia关于特殊分裂型均匀丛必然分裂的猜想。

Method: 利用从有理二次曲面到格拉斯曼流形的态射理论，通过对偶性和同调代数方法分析均匀丛的分裂类型约束，结合特殊旗流形$B_n/P_k$和$D_n/P_k$的几何结构进行分类讨论。

Result: 1) 证明在$\mathbb{Q}^{2n+1}$到$\mathbb{G}(l,2n+1)$的态射中，当$l$为偶数且$(l,2n+1)\neq(2,5)$时仅存在常值态射；2) 在$\mathbb{Q}^{2m+1}$和$\mathbb{Q}^{2m+2}(m\geq3)$上，秩不超过$2m$的均匀丛均分裂，改进了之前的上界；3) 分类了$B_n/P_k(k=2n/3,k\geq6)$和$D_n/P_k(k=(2n-2)/3,k\geq6)$上极小秩的不可分裂均匀丛；4) 部分验证了Ellia猜想，并给出了极小秩不可分裂均匀丛分裂类型的限制条件。

Conclusion: 本文通过态射分析建立了均匀丛分裂的新上界，完成了特定旗流形上极小秩均匀丛的分类，并为Ellia猜想提供了部分证据。这些结果深化了对射影空间上向量丛分裂性质的理解。

Abstract: We show that there exist only constant morphisms from $\mathbb{Q}^{2n+1}(n\geq 1)$ to $\mathbb{G}(l,2n+1)$ if $l$ is even $(0<l<2n)$ and $(l,2n+1)$ is not $ (2,5)$. As an application, we prove on $\mathbb{Q}^{2m+1}$ and $\mathbb{Q}^{2m+2}(m\geq 3)$, any uniform bundle of rank at most $2m$ splits, which improves the upper bound of splitting for uniform bundles obtained by Kachi and Sato. We classify all unsplit uniform bundles of minimal rank on $B_n/P_k$ $(k=\frac{2n}{3},k\ge6)$ and $D_n/P_k$ $(k=\frac{2n-2}{3},k\ge 6)$. We partially answer a conjecture of Ellia, which predicts that some uniform bundles of special splitting types on $\mathbb{P}^n$ necessarily split and we find some restrictions on the splitting types of unsplit uniform bundles of minimal rank.

</details>


### [806] [Group schemes over LG-rings and applications to cancellation theorems and Azumaya algebras](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.02021)
*Philippe Gille,Erhard Neher*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文证明了LG环上约化群方案的一些结果（如极大环面存在性、抛物子群共轭性），推广了SGA3中半局部环的特例，并应用于埃尔米特型和二次型的消去定理，以及证明了连通LG环上Azumaya代数的Brauer类有唯一代表元并允许Brauer分解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将SGA3中关于半局部环上约化群方案的经典结果（极大环面存在性、抛物子群共轭性）推广到更一般的LG环上，并利用这些推广结果解决埃尔米特型和二次型的消去问题，以及Azumaya代数的Brauer类分解问题。

Method: 首先在LG环上建立约化群方案的结构定理（极大环面、抛物子群共轭等），然后将这些群论工具应用于代数K-理论和二次型理论，推导埃尔米特型和二次型的消去定理，最后分析连通LG环上Azumaya代数的Brauer类性质。

Result: 成功将SGA3的结论从半局部环推广到LG环；建立了LG环上埃尔米特型和二次型的消去定理；证明了连通LG环上Azumaya代数的Brauer类存在唯一代表元且具有Brauer分解性质。

Conclusion: LG环是一类适合进行约化群方案和二次型理论研究的环，其上许多经典结构定理成立，且这些定理能有效应用于代数与几何中的分类和消去问题。

Abstract: We prove several results on reductive group schemes over LG-rings, e.g., existence of maximal tori and conjugacy of parabolic subgroups. These were  proven in SGA3 for the special case of semilocal rings. We apply these results to establish cancellation theorems for hermitian and quadratic forms over LG-rings and show that the Brauer classes of Azumaya algebras over connected LG-rings have a unique representative and allow Brauer decomposition.

</details>


### [807] [Singularity categories of rational double points in arbitrary characteristic](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.02532)
*Yuta Takashima,Hokuto Uehara*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文建立了任意特征下有理二重点的奇点范畴与单李型Dynkin图之间的一一对应关系，并证明了在特征2、3、5中存在非解析同构但奇点范畴三角等价的例子，进而构造了Hua-Keller定理在正特征下的反例。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 经典结论在特征零下成立，但有理二重点在正特征下不一定是商奇点，且部分有理二重点在特征2、3、5中非taut，因此需要重新考察该对应关系是否在任意特征下成立。

Method: 通过建立奇点范畴与Dynkin图之间的双射，利用非taut有理二重点的存在性，构造三角等价但非解析同构的奇点对，并基于此反例证伪Hua-Keller定理在正特征下的推广。

Result: 在任意特征下建立了有理二重点奇点范畴与单李型Dynkin图的一一对应；发现了特征2、3、5中非解析同构但奇点范畴等价的例子；构造了正特征下Hua-Keller定理的反例。

Conclusion: 奇点范畴不能完全决定超曲面奇点的Tyurina代数，该结论在正特征下失效，表明正特征奇点理论具有与特征零不同的丰富结构。

Abstract: We establish a one-to-one correspondence between the singularity categories of rational double points and the simply-laced Dynkin graphs in arbitrary characteristic. This correspondence is well-known in characteristic zero since the rational double points are quotient singularities in characteristic zero whereas not necessarily in positive characteristic. Considering some rational double points are not taut in characteristic two, three or five, we can see there exist two rational double points which are not analytically isomorphic but whose singularity categories are triangulated equivalent. As an application, we construct a counter-example in positive characteristic of a theorem of Hua and Keller: the dg singularity category of a hypersurface singularity determines its Tyurina algebra.

</details>


### [808] [Locally Trivial Deformations of Toric Varieties](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.02824)
*Nathan Ilten,Sharon Robins*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文从组合角度研究环面簇的局部平凡形变，为任意扇Σ构造形变函子Def_Σ，证明其在适当条件下与环面簇X_Σ的局部平凡形变函子同构，并应用于计算高阶障碍、给出光滑完备环面簇形变无障碍的新判据，以及显式计算多种环面簇的形变空间。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 建立环面簇局部平凡形变的组合刻画，将形变问题转化为扇上的单纯复形Čech上链计算，从而简化形变空间的构造与计算。

Method: 针对任意扇Σ，利用Čech零上链构造形变函子Def_Σ；在适当假设下证明Def_Σ与环面簇X_Σ的局部平凡形变函子Def'_X_Σ同构；对于在余维2光滑、余维3 Q-因子的完备环面簇，证明Def_Σ与全局形变函子Def_X同构。应用该函子推导形变无障碍判据和更高阶障碍公式（推广Ilten-Turo的杯积公式），并对多种环面簇进行显式形变空间计算。

Result: 给出了光滑完备环面簇形变无障碍的新判据；推广了Ilten-Turo的杯积公式到更高阶障碍；对一系列环面簇（包括迭代P^1-丛的三维环面簇）完成了形变空间的显式分类与计算，观察到了此前未报道的现象。

Conclusion: 所构造的Def_Σ函子为环面簇的形变理论提供了有效的组合工具，能够覆盖包括局部平凡形变和全局形变在内的广泛情形，并可用于精确刻画形变无障碍条件及计算高阶障碍。

Abstract: We study locally trivial deformations of toric varieties from a combinatorial point of view. For any fan $Σ$, we construct a deformation functor $\mathrm{Def}_Σ$ by considering Čech zero-cochains on certain simplicial complexes. We show that under appropriate hypotheses, $\mathrm{Def}_Σ$ is isomorphic to $\mathrm{Def}'_{X_Σ}$, the functor of locally trivial deformations for the toric variety $X_Σ$ associated to $Σ$. In particular, for any complete toric variety $X$ that is smooth in codimension $2$ and $\mathbb{Q}$-factorial in codimension $3$, there exists a fan $Σ$ such that $\mathrm{Def}_Σ$ is isomorphic to $\mathrm{Def}_X$, the functor of deformations of $X$. We apply these results to give a new criterion for a smooth complete toric variety to have unobstructed deformations, and to compute formulas for higher order obstructions, generalizing a formula of Ilten and Turo for the cup product. We use the functor $\mathrm{Def}_Σ$ to explicitly compute the deformation spaces for a number of toric varieties, and provide examples exhibiting previously unobserved phenomena. In particular, we classify exactly which toric threefolds arising as iterated $\mathbb{P}^1$-bundles have unobstructed deformation space.

</details>


### [809] [Mixed Hodge modules on stacks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.02256)
*Swann Tubach*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文利用作者先前构造的混合Hodge模的∞-范畴加强，将混合Hodge模典范地推广到代数叠上，并保留了全部6个操作和权结构；同时证明了Drew的动机Hodge模方法给出一个∞-范畴，该范畴完全忠实地嵌入混合Hodge模中，并识别其像为几何来源的混合Hodge模。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将混合Hodge模理论从代数簇扩展到代数叠上，并阐明Drew的动机Hodge模与经典混合Hodge模之间的精确关系。

Method: 利用作者先前工作中建立的混合Hodge模的∞-范畴加强，通过范畴论方法实现典范延拓；采用完全忠实嵌入的方式比较Drew的构造与经典对象。

Result: 成功将混合Hodge模及其6个操作和权结构典范地延拓到代数叠上；Drew的动机Hodge模∞-范畴完全忠实地嵌入混合Hodge模中，其像恰好是几何来源的混合Hodge模。

Conclusion: 混合Hodge模可以自然地推广到代数叠框架中，并且Drew的动机Hodge模提供了几何来源混合Hodge模的一个∞-范畴刻画。

Abstract: Using the $\infty$-categorical enhancement of mixed Hodge modules constructed by the author in a previous paper, we explain how mixed Hodge modules canonically extend to algebraic stacks, together with all the $6$ operations and weights. We also prove that Drew's approach to motivic Hodge modules gives an $\infty$-category that embeds fully faithfully in mixed Hodge modules, and we identify the image as mixed Hodge modules of geometric origin.

</details>


### [810] [The Hodge filtration and parametrically prime divisors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.02601)
*Daniel Bath,Henry Dakin*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文研究了沿除子的亚纯函数层$\mathscr{O}_X(*D)$上的典范Hodge滤过。对于Bernstein-Sato多项式根在$(-2,0)$内的解析函数芽$f$，给出了Hodge滤过零阶项的一个简单代数公式，并界定了包含$f^{-1}$的Hodge滤过第一步。当$f$满足欧拉齐次和参数素性时，将代数公式推广到Hodge滤过的所有步，证明Hodge滤过包含于诱导序滤过。最后通过大量例子验证了定理，并识别出若干满足条件的除子类。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 旨在给出沿除子的亚纯函数层上典范Hodge滤过的显式代数描述，特别是对Bernstein-Sato多项式根满足特定条件（含于$(-2,0)$）的解析函数芽，建立Hodge滤过与代数结构之间的清晰联系。

Method: 首先对Bernstein-Sato多项式根在$(-2,0)$内的解析函数芽$f$，推导Hodge滤过零阶项的代数公式，并估计$f^{-1}$所在滤过步的界。然后引入欧拉齐次和参数素性条件，将代数公式推广到任意滤过步，建立Hodge滤过与诱导序滤过的包含关系。最后通过具体例子和除子分类验证理论结果。

Result: 得到了零阶Hodge滤过的简单代数公式；给出了包含$f^{-1}$的最小滤过步的界；在欧拉齐次且参数素性条件下，得到了所有步Hodge滤过的代数公式，并证明Hodge滤过$\subseteq$诱导序滤过；通过大量例子和除子类验证了定理的适用性。

Conclusion: 本文建立了特定条件下Hodge滤过的显式代数刻画，深化了对沿除子亚纯函数层上Hodge理论的理解，为后续计算提供了代数工具，并指出了若干满足条件的除子类。

Abstract: We study the canonical Hodge filtration on the sheaf $\mathscr{O}_X(*D)$ of meromorphic functions along a divisor. For a germ of an analytic function $f$ whose Bernstein-Sato's polynomial's roots are contained in $(-2,0)$, we: give a simple algebraic formula for the zeroeth piece of the Hodge filtration; bound the first step of the Hodge filtration containing $f^{-1}$. If we additionally require $f$ to be Euler homogeneous and parametrically prime, then we extend our algebraic formula to compute every piece of the canonical Hodge filtration, proving in turn that the Hodge filtration is contained in the induced order filtration. Finally, we compute the Hodge filtration in many examples and identify several large classes of divisors realizing our theorems.

</details>


### [811] [Quadrics on Gushel-Mukai varieties](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.03528)
*Olivier Debarre,Alexander Kuznetsov*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文研究了光滑Gushel-Mukai簇X（维数n∈{2,3,4,5,6}）上k维二次曲面的Hilbert概型（k∈{0,1,2,3}），通过将其与X自然关联的一族(n-1)维二次曲面在P^5爆破点上的相对Hilbert概型（关于(k+1)维线性子空间）建立联系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究Gushel-Mukai簇上二次曲面的Hilbert概型结构，这类簇是Fano簇的重要子类，其几何结构复杂且与超凯勒几何、模空间理论紧密相关，理解其上子簇的模空间结构有助于深入认识GM簇的几何性质。

Method: 建立Gushel-Mukai簇X上k维二次曲面的Hilbert概型与一个辅助构造——由X自然诱导的(n-1)维二次曲面的族在P^5 blowup上的(k+1)维线性子空间的相对Hilbert概型——之间的对应关系，利用该关联进行几何分析。

Result: 成功将GM簇上二次曲面Hilbert概型转化为更易处理的相对线性子空间Hilbert概型问题，建立了不同维数参数(k,n)之间的系统性对应。

Conclusion: 通过将问题约化为相对Hilbert概型，为GM簇上二次曲面的模空间研究提供了有效途径，揭示了GM簇与射影空间blowup上二次曲面族之间的深层结构联系。

Abstract: We study Hilbert schemes of quadrics of dimension $k \in \{0,1,2,3\}$ on smooth Gushel-Mukai varieties $X$ of dimension $n \in \{2,3,4,5,6\}$ by relating them to the relative Hilbert schemes of linear subspaces of dimension $k + 1$ of a certain family, naturally associated with $X$, of quadrics of dimension $n - 1$ over the blowup of $\mathbf{P}^5$ at a point.

</details>


### [812] [Fundamentals of Broken Line Convex Geometry](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.02427)
*Juan Bosco Frías-Medina,Timothy Magee*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新的凸几何理论——"broken line convex geometry"（断线凸几何），其中空间是簇变量的有理热带化，用断线段替代传统线段，并采用了[CMN21]中的凸性概念，证明了该理论下许多标准凸几何结果的对应版本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统凸几何建立在向量空间上，而本文旨在将凸性的概念推广到簇变量的有理热带化这一更一般的空间中，从而建立一种新的凸几何框架。

Method: 将传统凸几何中的线段替换为"broken line segments"（断线段），并采用[CMN21]中定义的凸性概念，在热带化簇变量的空间上重新构建凸几何的基本概念和定理。

Result: 成功建立了断线凸几何的基本理论框架，证明了许多标准凸几何结果在该新框架下的对应版本。

Conclusion: 断线凸几何是一种在簇变量热带化空间上自然成立的凸性理论，扩展了经典凸几何的适用范围，为相关领域提供了新的几何工具。

Abstract: We develop the fundamentals of a new theory of convex geometry -- which we call "broken line convex geometry". This is a theory of convexity where the ambient space is the rational tropicalization of a cluster variety, as opposed to an ambient vector space. In this theory, line segments are replaced by broken line segments, and we adopt the notion of convexity in [CMN21]. We state and prove broken line convex geometry versions of many standard results from usual convex geometry.

</details>


### [813] [Symmetric powers: structure, smoothability, and applications](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.02754)
*Cosimo Flavi,Joachim Jelisiejew,Mateusz Michałek*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文研究了多项式的扭曲幂的边界秩和代数对称幂的可光滑性，证明了后者是可光滑的，对前者给出了边界秩的上界并证明了在温和条件下的最优性，并将结果应用于复杂性理论。引入了“包含多项式”（encompassing polynomial）这一概念作为核心工具。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索多项式扭曲幂的边界秩与代数对称幂的可光滑性，这两个问题在代数复杂性和张量理论中具有基础性地位。理解这些结构有助于揭示计算复杂度的下界和代数几何中的退化现象。

Method: 引入“包含多项式”（encompassing polynomial）这一概念作为核心分析工具。通过代数几何与张量秩理论的方法，对对称幂的可光滑性进行证明，并对扭曲幂的边界秩进行上界估计与最优性条件分析。

Result: 1）证明了代数对称幂是可光滑的；2）给出了多项式扭曲幂的边界秩的一般上界；3）在温和条件下证明了这些上界是最优的；4）将结果应用于复杂性理论。

Conclusion: 本文通过引入“包含多项式”概念，系统地解决了多项式扭曲幂的边界秩上界问题与代数对称幂的可光滑性问题，并为复杂性理论提供了新的工具与视角。

Abstract: We investigate border ranks of twisted powers of polynomials and smoothability of symmetric powers of algebras. We prove that the latter are smoothable. For the former, we obtain upper bounds for the border rank in general and prove that they are optimal under mild conditions. We give applications to complexity theory. Many of the results rest on the notion of an encompassing polynomial, which we introduce.

</details>


### [814] [K-polystability of Fano 4-folds with large Lefschetz defect](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.03571)
*Eleonora A. Romano,Saverio A. Secci*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文研究了具有Lefschetz缺陷至少为2的光滑复杂Fano四维流形的K-多重稳定性，重点关注Lefschetz缺陷为3的情形以及Lefschetz缺陷为2的Casagrande-Druel Fano四维流形。结果表明，在19个Lefschetz缺陷为3的Fano四维流形族中，恰好有5个是K-多重稳定的；而在175个Casagrande-Druel Fano四维流形族中，5个是K-多重稳定的，132个是K-不稳定的。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Fano流形的K-稳定性与其存在常数量曲率Kähler度量密切相关，是代数几何中重要的研究课题。本文旨在系统性地刻画具有较大Lefschetz缺陷的Fano四维流形的K-稳定性，填补该领域对高维Fano流形K-稳定性分类的空白。

Method: 采用代数几何与微分几何相结合的方法，通过分析Lefschetz缺陷与K-稳定性的内在联系，对特定类别的Fano四维流形族进行分类研究，利用已知的稳定性判别准则进行计算和判定。

Result: (1) 在19个Lefschetz缺陷为3的Fano四维流形族中，5个是K-多重稳定的；(2) 在175个Casagrande-Druel Fano四维流形族中，5个是K-多重稳定的，132个是K-不稳定的，其余待定。

Conclusion: 具有较大Lefschetz缺陷的Fano四维流形中，K-多重稳定流形仅占少数，多数流形是K-不稳定的，这表明此类流形的K-稳定性具有严格的构造约束。

Abstract: In this paper, we investigate K-polystability on smooth complex Fano 4-folds with Lefschetz defect at least 2, focusing on the case of Lefschetz defect 3 and on Casagrande-Druel Fano 4-folds with Lefschetz defect 2. We show that exactly 5 of the 19 families of Fano 4-folds with Lefschetz defect 3 are K-polystable. Moreover, among 175 families of Casagrande-Druel Fano 4-folds with Lefschetz defect 2, we prove that 5 are K-polystable, while 132 are K-unstable.

</details>


### [815] [The Signed Goldman-Iwahori Space and Real Tropical Linear Spaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.02619)
*Kevin Kuehn,Arne Kuhrs*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文为实闭域上的非阿基米德赋价值引入了**带符号Goldman-Iwahori空间**（带符号半范数的同伦类空间），该空间同时是Jell-Scheiderer-Yu提出的射影空间实解析化的线性代数类比，以及之前工作中Goldman-Iwahori半范数空间的带符号细化。主要结果：(1) 将其刻画为射影空间所有实热带化的逆向极限（Payne定理的实类比）；(2) 给出基于底向量空间上**泛可实现定向赋值拟阵**的拟阵论描述。常数系数情形 K=ℝ 时，带符号半范数恰好是可对角化的（依赖超平面分离定理，对其它实闭域不成立），从而得到基于带符号子空间旗的显式描述，并证明该空间与泛定向拟阵的**实Bergman扇**相同。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将Goldman-Iwahori半范数空间推广到带符号情形，以融合两个几何视角：(a) 作为射影空间实解析化的线性代数对应物；(b) 作为此前Goldman-Iwahori半范数空间的带符号精细化。目标是为实闭域上的非阿基米德几何提供带符号的度量/组合结构，并建立其与热带几何、拟阵理论的联系。

Method: (1) 定义带符号半范数及其同伦类，构造带符号Goldman-Iwahori空间。(2) 建立其与射影空间所有实热带化的逆向极限的同胚关系（Payne定理的实类比）。(3) 利用定向赋值拟阵理论，给出该空间的拟阵论描述：等同于底向量空间上的泛可实现定向赋值拟阵。(4) 对 K=ℝ 常数系数情形，借助超平面分离定理证明带符号半范数等价于可对角化半范数，进而用带符号子空间旗显式刻画空间结构，并证明其等于泛定向拟阵的实Bergman扇。

Result: (1) 带符号Goldman-Iwahori空间同胚于射影空间所有实热带化的逆向极限。(2) 该空间等同于底向量空间上泛可实现定向赋值拟阵的拟阵论对象。(3) K=ℝ 时，空间有基于带符号子空间旗的显式组合描述，且恰为泛定向拟阵的实Bergman扇。

Conclusion: 带符号Goldman-Iwahori空间成功统一了实解析几何与带符号半范数理论，建立了与非阿基米德几何、热带几何、定向拟阵理论的深层联系。常数系数情形 ℝ 的特例揭示了超平面分离定理在其中起到的关键作用，以及该结构本质上等价于实Bergman扇。

Abstract: For a real closed field $K$ with a non-Archimedean absolute value, we introduce the signed Goldman--Iwahori space, the space of homothety classes of signed seminorms on a finite-dimensional vector space over $K$. This space merges two geometric perspectives: it is the linear-algebraic analogue of the real analytification of projective space introduced by Jell, Scheiderer, and Yu, and a signed refinement of the Goldman--Iwahori space of seminorms studied in our previous work. Our first main result identifies it as the inverse limit of all real tropicalizations of projective space, the real analogue of a theorem of Payne. Our second main result gives a matroid-theoretic description in terms of the universal realizable oriented valuated matroid on the underlying vector space. In the constant coefficient case for $K = \mathbb{R}$, signed seminorms are exactly the diagonalizable ones which is a consequence of hyperplane separation that fails for all other real closed fields. In this case, this yields an explicit description of the signed Goldman--Iwahori space in terms of signed flags of subspaces and lets us show that the space coincides with the real Bergman fan of the universal oriented matroid.

</details>


### [816] [Drinfeld's lemma for algebraic stacks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.02991)
*Lei Zhang*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文证明了Drinfeld引理在代数栈上同样成立，该引理原本用于分裂有限域上连通方案乘积上定义的ℓ-adic局部系统，现在被推广到代数栈的情形。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Drinfeld引理是分裂有限域上连通方案乘积上ℓ-adic局部系统的强大工具，但原版本仅适用于连通方案。将这一重要工具推广到代数栈上，可以扩大其应用范围，处理更一般的几何对象。

Method: 本文通过理论推导和证明，将Drinfeld引理从连通方案的情形推广到代数栈上，验证了该引理在更广泛的代数几何对象上的成立性。

Result: 成功证明了Drinfeld引理在代数栈上仍然成立，即该引理可以适用于比连通方案更一般的代数栈结构。

Conclusion: Drinfeld引理可以被推广到代数栈上，这扩展了该工具的应用范围，使得在代数栈上也可以利用该引理来分裂ℓ-adic局部系统。

Abstract: Drinfeld's lemma is a powerful tool for splitting $\ell$-adic local systems defined over a product of connected schemes over a finite field. In this paper, we show that Drinfeld's lemma also holds true for algebraic stacks.

</details>


### [817] [On a combinatorial description of the Gorenstein index for varieties with torus action](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.03649)
*Philipp Iber,Eva Reinert,Milena Wrobel*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文展示了复杂度为1的带环面作用的Fano簇（以及更一般的general arrangement簇）的Gorenstein指数可以从其反标准复形中通过格距读出，完全类似于环面Fano多面体的情况。作为应用，给出了具有二维极大环面的约化自同构群、Picard数为1的几乎齐次Fano三维簇的定义数据基于其Gorenstein指数的具体界限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将环面几何中Fano多面体的特征扩展到更广泛的簇类，特别是复杂度为1的带环面作用的Fano簇，以及general arrangement簇。

Method: 利用反标准复形（anticanonical complex）这一组合工具，通过计算格距（lattice distances）来读取Gorenstein指数。

Result: 证明了Gorenstein指数可以从反标准复形中以格距形式读出，并给出了几乎齐次Fano三维簇定义数据的具体界限。

Conclusion: 反标准复形可以像环面Fano多面体一样有效地编码更广泛簇类的Gorenstein指数信息，并可用于约束具体分类中的定义数据。

Abstract: The anticanonical complex is a combinatorial tool that was invented to extend the features of the Fano polytope from toric geometry to wider classes of varieties. In this note we show that the Gorenstein index of Fano varieties with torus action of complexity one (and even more general of the so-called general arrangement varieties) can be read off its anticanonical complex in terms of lattice distances in full analogy to the toric Fano polytope. As an application we give concrete bounds on the defining data of almost homogeneous Fano threefolds of Picard number one having a reductive automorphism group with two-dimensional maximal torus depending on their Gorenstein index.

</details>


### [818] [A dual basis for the equivariant quantum $K$-theory of cominuscule varieties](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.02703)
*Kevin Summers*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文在余极小旗流形的等变量子K-理论环中定义了量子化理想层基，证明其与Schubert基关于量子K-度量满足对偶关系，给出了统一组合公式，并应用于计算Grassmannian中乘法结构常数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 经典K-理论中，旗流形的理想层基与Schubert基关于Euler示性数对偶；作者希望将这一对偶关系推广到量子K-理论，即定义量子化理想层使其与Schubert基关于量子K-度量对偶。

Method: 针对余极小旗流形，在等变量子K-理论中定义量子化理想层基，推导出关于Schubert基的统一组合公式（类型统一），并利用这些量子化理想层计算与tautological商丛最高外幂相乘的Schubert结构常数。

Result: 给出了余极小旗流形上量子化理想层的显式组合公式；证明了该类与Schubert基关于量子K-度量的对偶性；在Grassmannian QK_T(Gr(k,n))中成功计算了由tautological商丛最高外幂乘法诱导的Schubert结构常数。

Conclusion: 量子化理想层是连接经典与量子K-理论的有效工具，可为Schubert结构常数的计算提供新方法。

Abstract: The equivariant quantum $K$-theory ring of a flag variety is a Frobenius algebra equipped with a perfect pairing called the quantum $K$-metric. It is known that in the classical $K$-theory ring for a given flag variety the ideal sheaf basis is dual to the Schubert basis with regard to the sheaf Euler characteristic. We define a quantization of the ideal sheaf basis for the equivariant quantum $K$-theory of cominuscule flag varieties. These quantized ideal sheaves are then dual to the Schubert basis with regard to the quantum $K$-metric. We prove explicit type-uniform combinatorial formulae for the quantized ideal sheaves in terms of the Schubert basis for any cominuscule flag variety. We also provide an application ultilizing the quantized ideal sheaves to calculate the Schubert structure constants associated to multiplication by the top exterior power of the tautological quotient bundle in $QK_T(Gr(k,n))$.

</details>


### [819] [Towards a characterization of toric hyperkähler varieties among symplectic singularities](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.03012)
*Yoshinori Namikawa*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文证明：具有n维代数环面有效哈密顿作用的2n维锥形辛簇，若存在射影辛解消，则必同构于单模矩阵A对应的环面超凯勒簇Y(A,0)。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 刻画具有充分大环面对称性的锥形辛簇的分类，证明环面超凯勒簇Y(A,0)在此类几何结构中具有唯一性特征。

Method: 利用锥形辛簇上的T^n-哈密顿作用与相容C^*-作用，通过矩映射的等变复解析同构，建立到标准环面超凯勒簇Y(A,0)的显式同构。

Result: 任意满足条件的锥形辛簇(X,ω)存在T^n-等变复解析同构φ: (X,ω) → (Y(A,0), ω_{Y(A,0)})，且矩映射与中心点在该同构下均被保持。

Conclusion: 具有n维环面哈密顿作用的2n维锥形辛簇的射影辛解消存在性，等价于其同构于单模矩阵A对应的环面超凯勒簇Y(A,0)。

Abstract: Let $(X, ω)$ be a conical symplectic variety of dimension $2n$ which has a projective symplectic resolution. Assume that $X$ admits an effective Hamiltonian action of an $n$-dimensional algebraic torus $T^n$, compatible with the conical $\mathbf{C}^*$-action. A typical example of $X$ is a toric hyperkahler variety $Y(A,0)$.
  In this article, we prove that this property characterizes $Y(A,0)$ with $A$ unimodular. More precisely, if $(X, ω)$ is such a conical symplectic variety, then there is a $T^n$-equivariant (complex analytic) isomorphism $\varphi: (X, ω) \to (Y(A,0), ω_{Y(A,0)})$ under which both moment maps are identified. Moreover $\varphi$ sends the center $0_X$ of $X$ to the center $0_{Y(A,0)}$ of $Y(A,0)$.

</details>


### [820] [Fixed point counts and motivic invariants of bow varieties of affine type A](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.03859)
*Ádám Gyenge,Richárd Rimányi*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文计算了仿射A型Cherkis弓形变体的环面不动点的等变K-理论，推导了欧拉数的生成级数公式并观察到其模性，还将Nakajima-Yoshioka的结果推广到了 motivic 层次上的一类弓形变体（严格包含Nakajima quiver varieties），并定义了Nekrasov配分函数的抛物类比及其与经典配分函数的关系方程。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将Nakajima-Yoshioka关于Nakajima quiver varieties的生成级数结果推广到更一般的Cherkis bow varieties（仿射A型），并探索其模性及motivic层次的精细公式。

Method: 通过计算环面不动点的等变K-理论，推导欧拉数生成级数公式，并在motivic层次上得到精细公式；同时定义Nekrasov配分函数的抛物类比并建立其与经典配分函数的关系方程。

Result: 得到了Cherkis bow varieties的欧拉数生成级数公式，在某些情况下观察到模性；在motivic层次上得到了严格包含Nakajima quiver varieties的一类弓形变体的精细公式；作为特例得到了Zastava空间的公式；定义了Nekrasov配分函数的抛物类比并建立了关系方程。

Conclusion: 本文的结果推广了Nakajima-Yoshioka的经典结论，揭示了弓形变体与模形式、配分函数之间的深层联系。

Abstract: We compute the equivariant K-theory of torus fixed points of Cherkis bow varieties of affine type A. We deduce formulas for the generating series of the Euler numbers of these varieties and observe their modularity in certain cases. We also obtain refined formulas on the motivic level for a class of bow varieties strictly containing Nakajima quiver varieties. These series hence generalise results of Nakajima-Yoshioka. As a special case, we obtain formulas for certain Zastava spaces. We define a parabolic analogue of Nekrasov's partition function and find an equation relating it to the classical partition function.

</details>


### [821] [Algorithm to Compute Orbit Zariski Closure in Affine Plane](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.02739)
*Young Joon Ley*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种计算仿射平面上有限生成群代数作用轨道Zariski闭包的算法。算法前半部分判定有限生成群是否包含于某个代数群中，后半部分通过计算单个三角自同构的不变子簇，进而推广到有限生成群的轨道Zariski闭包计算。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 求解仿射平面上有限生成群代数作用轨道的Zariski闭包是一个基础且重要的问题，但此前缺乏系统性的计算方法。

Method: 算法分为两半：首先判定有限生成群是否包含在代数群中；然后计算单个三角自同构的所有不变子簇，再将单个生成元的计算结果组合应用于有限生成群的轨道Zariski闭包计算。

Result: 成功给出了计算仿射平面上有限生成群代数作用轨道Zariski闭包的完整算法流程。

Conclusion: 通过将问题分解为群包含性判定和单个三角自同构不变子簇计算两个子问题，实现了对轨道Zariski闭包的有效计算。

Abstract: The article demonstrates the procedure how to compute the Zariski closure of an orbit by an algebraic action of finitely generated group on the affine plane. First half of the algorithm is about deciding whether given finitely generated group is contained in an algebraic group. For the next half, we compute the totality of the invariant subvarieties for a single triangular automorphism. Then, the computation for the individual generators is applied to compute the orbit Zariski closure for a finitely generated group.

</details>


### [822] [Injectives obstruct Fourier-Mukai functors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.03027)
*Felix Küng*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文利用内射对象作为大倾斜对象，来阻碍精确函子提升到微分分次（dg）层次。通过将内射对象嵌入典范心，替代倾斜对象计算特征态射，并将其应用于证明候选非傅里叶-三木函子（即不具有A∞/dg提升的函子）的不可提升性。该方法允许显式计算A∞提升的障碍，并特别发现对于光滑度d>2的超曲面，存在大量非傅里叶-三木函子。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为了系统性地构造和识别那些不能提升到A∞/dg层次的精确函子（即非傅里叶-三木函子），并显式计算其提升障碍。

Method: 使用内射对象作为大倾斜对象来阻碍函子的dg提升；将内射对象嵌入典范心，替代传统倾斜对象来计算特征态射，从而得到A∞提升障碍的显式表达式。

Result: 成功实现了对候选非傅里叶-三木函子不可提升性的证明；对于光滑度d>2的超曲面，发现了大量非傅里叶-三木函子。

Conclusion: 内射对象可以有效地替代倾斜对象用于计算特征态射和提升障碍，该方法在光滑高次超曲面上能系统性地生成大量非傅里叶-三木函子。

Abstract: We use injectives as a big tilting object to obstruct liftability of exact functors to the $\dg$-level.
  We use the inclusion of injectives into the canonical heart as a replacement for tilting objects in computations of the characteristic morphism. Then we apply this construction to proofs of non-liftability of candidate non-Fourier-Mukai functors, i.e.\ functors that do not admit an $\Ainfty$/$\dg$-lift. This approach allows explicit computation of the obstruction against an $\Ainfty$-lift. We in particular observe that this computation gives for smooth degree $d>2$ hypersurfaces an abundance of non-Fourier-Mukai functors.

</details>


### [823] [Extendability of projective varieties via degeneration to ribbons with applications to Calabi-Yau threefolds](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.03960)
*Purnaprajna Bangere,Jayan Mukherjee*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文研究光滑射影簇通过退化为ribbon的可延拓性，并将其应用于Calabi-Yau三维流形。主要发现：对于Fano三维流形（Picard秩1）的Calabi-Yau双覆盖的一般形变$X_t$，当嵌入次数$l=j$（$j$为$Y$的指数）时，$X_t$与$Y$本身一样多次光滑可延拓；但当$l \geq l_Y$（某个有效整数）时，一般$X_t$不可延拓。该结果与低维类比（K3曲面和典型曲线）既有对比又有平行：大度极化K3曲面的典型曲线截面不填满整个分支（对比），但其典型曲线截面恰好是一次可延拓的（平行）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究光滑射影簇通过退化为ribbon的可延拓性，并应用该技术研究Calabi-Yau三维流形的可延拓性，特别是与低维情形（K3曲面、典型曲线）的对比与平行关系。

Method: 将光滑射影簇退化为ribbon，利用Hilbert scheme中嵌入Calabi-Yau ribbons的特殊轨迹$\mathscr{H}_l^Y$，结合Mukai varieties分类，分析不同嵌入次数$l$下一般Calabi-Yau三维流形的可延拓性。

Result: 当$l=j$时，一般Calabi-Yau三维流形与$Y$本身一样多次光滑可延拓；当$l \geq l_Y$时，一般元素不可延拓。且此时一般超平面截面填充了整个不可约分支$\mathscr{S}_l^Y$，该分支恰好是1-可延拓的。

Conclusion: Calabi-Yau三维流形的可延拓性表现出与低维类比（K3曲面、典型曲线）既有相似又不同的性质：大度K3曲面的典型曲线截面不填满整个分支（对比），但典型曲线截面恰好是一次可延拓的（平行）。

Abstract: In this article we study the extendability of a smooth projective variety by degenerating it to a ribbon. We apply the techniques to study extendability of Calabi-Yau threefolds $X_t$ that are general deformations of Calabi-Yau double covers of Fano threefolds of Picard rank $1$. The Calabi-Yau threefolds $X_t \hookrightarrow \mathbb{P}^{N_l}$, embedded by the complete linear series $|lA_t|$, where $A_t$ is the generator of Pic$(X_t)$, $l \geq j$ and $j$ is the index of $Y$, are general elements of a unique irreducible component $\mathscr{H}_l^Y$ of the Hilbert scheme which contains embedded Calabi-Yau ribbons on $Y$ as a special locus. For $l = j$, using the classification of Mukai varieties, we show that the general Calabi-Yau threefold parameterized by $\mathscr{H}_j^Y$ is as many times smoothly extendable as $Y$ itself. On the other hand, we find for each deformation type $Y$, an effective integer $l_Y$ such that for $l \geq l_Y$, the general Calabi-Yau threefold parameterized by $\mathscr{H}_l^Y$ is not extendable. These results provide a contrast and a parallel with the lower dimensional analogues; namely, $K3$ surfaces and canonical curves, which stems from the following result we prove: for $l \geq l_Y$, the general hyperplane sections of elements of $\mathscr{H}_l^Y$ fill out an entire irreducible component $\mathscr{S}_l^Y$ of the Hilbert scheme of canonical surfaces which are precisely $1-$ extendable with $\mathscr{H}^Y_l$ being the unique component dominating $\mathscr{S}_l^Y$. The contrast lies in the fact that for polarized $K3$ surfaces of large degree, the canonical curve sections do not fill out an entire component while the parallel is in the fact that the canonical curve sections are exactly one-extendable.

</details>


### [824] [Modules of derivations, logarithmic ideals and singularities of maps on analytic varieties](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.02947)
*Carles Bivià-Ausina,Konstantinos Kourliouros,Maria Aparecida Soares Ruas*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文引入了与解析映射h和子模M相关的导子模Θ_{h,M}，分析了相关的正合序列，并得到了关于数值不变量和对数向量场模的解析不变量的表达式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为了系统地研究与解析映射和子模相关的导子结构，并建立相关数值不变量与对数向量场模之间的联系。

Method: 通过定义导子模Θ_{h,M}，分析其相关的正合序列，推导与映射对(h,M)及解析映射芽f相关的数值不变量公式。

Result: 得到了与(h,M)和f相关的数值不变量的公式，以及对解析子簇X的对数向量场模Θ_X的解析不变量表达式。

Conclusion: 本文为解析映射和子模的导子结构提供了系统的代数分析框架，并建立了相关不变量之间的联系。

Abstract: We introduce the module of derivations $Θ_{h,M}$ attached to a given analytic map $h:(\mathbb C^n,0)\to (\mathbb C^p,0)$ and a submodule $M\subseteq \mathcal O_n^p$ and analyse several exact sequences related to $Θ_{h,M}$. Moreover, we obtain formulas for several numerical invariants associated to the pair $(h,M)$ and a given analytic map germ $f:(\mathbb C^n,0)\to (\mathbb C^q,0)$. In particular, if $X$ is an analytic subvariety of $\mathbb C^n$, we derive expressions for analytic invariants defined in terms of the module $Θ_X$ of logarithmic vector fields of $X$.

</details>


### [825] [Delta invariants of weighted hypersurfaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.03057)
*Taro Sano,Luca Tasin*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文研究了拟光滑加权超曲面的基本除子的delta不变量下界，证明了指数1的拟光滑Fano超曲面和指数1、2的所有光滑Fano加权超曲面的K-稳定性，基于Abban-Zhuang方法和加权超曲面旗上的线性系统研究。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 建立拟光滑加权超曲面的基本除子的delta不变量下界，进而证明一大类Fano超曲面的K-稳定性。

Method: 利用Abban-Zhuang方法，结合加权超曲面旗上线性系统的研究来推导下界和证明K-稳定性。

Result: 得到了拟光滑加权超曲面基本除子的delta不变量下界；证明了指数1的拟光滑Fano超曲面和指数1、2的所有光滑Fano加权超曲面的K-稳定性。

Conclusion: 本文推广了K-稳定性已知结果的范围，特别是对指数1和2的加权超曲面情形给出了完整的K-稳定性刻画。

Abstract: We give a lower bound for the delta invariant of the fundamental divisor of a quasi-smooth weighted hypersurface. As a consequence, we prove K-stability of a large class of quasi-smooth Fano hypersurfaces of index 1 and of all smooth Fano weighted hypersurfaces of index 1 and 2. The proofs are based on the Abban--Zhuang method and on the study of linear systems on flags of weighted hypersurfaces.

</details>


### [826] [The Syzygy Matrix and the Differential for Rational Curves in Projective Space](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.03985)
*Chen Song*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文研究给定从ℙ¹切丛到某平衡向量丛的态射是否由ℙⁿ中d次有理曲线上切丛T_{ℙⁿ}的限制诱导，基于Mathematica计算提出猜想，并对某些n和d值给出计算机辅助证明。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索射影空间有理曲线上的切丛限制与一般平衡向量丛之间的态射诱导关系，理解有理曲线的几何嵌入性质。

Method: 通过Mathematica计算特定例子进行数值探索，提出猜想，并利用计算机辅助证明对特定参数范围进行验证。

Result: 对某些n和d的值，给出了猜想成立的计算机辅助证明。

Conclusion: 该问题存在一般性猜想，并在部分情形下得到了验证，但完整结论仍需进一步研究。

Abstract: In this paper, we study whether a given morphism $f$ from the tangent bundle of $\mathbb{P}^1$ to a balanced vector bundle of degree $(n+1)d$ is induced by the restriction of the tangent bundle $T_{\mathbb{P}^n}$ to a rational curve of degree $d$ in $\mathbb{P}^n$. We propose a conjecture on this problem based on Mathematica computations of some examples and provide computer-assisted proof of the conjecture for certain values of $n$ and $d$.

</details>


### [827] [Existence of arithmetic degrees for generic orbits and dynamical Lang-Siegel problem](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.03097)
*Yohsuke Matsuzawa*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文证明了对于支配有理自映射，在轨道为一般点的点处算术度的存在性；作为推论，证明了拟射影簇上平展态射的算术度存在性。并将此证明应用于动力朗-西格尔问题，证明了零维子概形关联的局部高度函数沿有理映射轨道缓慢增长，以及自态射轨道中使局部高度函数快速增长的子集具有零巴拿赫密度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 算术度是动力系统与数论交叉的重要不变量，但其存在性在一般情形下尚未完全解决。本文旨在建立更广泛情形下算术度的存在性，并将其应用于动力朗-西格尔问题，理解有理映射轨道上高度函数的增长行为。

Method: 利用轨道为一般点的条件证明算术度存在性，进而通过平展态射的特殊性质推广到拟射影簇情形。在动力朗-西格尔问题中，分别处理零维子概形（慢增长）和一般闭子概形（快增长子集零密度）两种情形，运用算术度存在性证明及相关动力系统技术。

Result: 1) 支配有理自映射在轨道为一般点的点处算术度存在；2) 拟射影簇上平展态射的算术度在任何点处存在；3) 零维子概形局部高度函数沿有理映射轨道缓慢增长；4) 自态射轨道中局部高度函数快速增长的子集具有零巴拿赫密度。

Conclusion: 本文建立了更广泛情形下算术度的存在性定理，并揭示了动力轨道上高度函数的增长模式：零维子概形对应慢增长，一般闭子概形的快增长只能发生在稀疏（零巴拿赫密度）子集上，深化了对动力系统算术性质的理解。

Abstract: We prove the existence of the arithmetic degree for dominant rational self-maps at any point whose orbit is generic. As a corollary, we prove the same existence for étale morphisms on quasi-projective varieties and any points on it. We apply the proof of this fact to dynamical Lang-Siegel problem. Namely, we prove that local height function associated with zero-dimensional subscheme grows slowly along orbits of a rational map under reasonable assumption. Also if local height function associated with any proper closed subscheme grows fast on a subset of an orbit of a self-morphism, we prove that such subset has Banach density zero under some assumptions.

</details>


### [828] [Bott-Chern characteristic classes of blow-ups](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.03210)
*Xiaojun Wu,Song Yang,Xiangdong Yang*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文证明了紧复流形的Bott-Chern特征类的爆破公式，通过建立无分母的Riemann-Roch定理，并将其应用于Iwasawa流形在爆破变换下的Bott-Chern特征类行为研究。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究紧复流形在爆破变换下Bott-Chern特征类的行为，填补该领域在Bott-Chern理论中的空白。

Method: 建立了Bott-Chern特征类的无分母Riemann-Roch版本，并利用该结果推导出爆破公式。

Result: 成功证明了Bott-Chern特征类的爆破公式，并给出了Iwasawa流形在爆破变换下的具体应用分析。

Conclusion: 该工作扩展了Bott-Chern特征类的理论框架，为研究复流形在奇点解消下的不变量行为提供了新工具。

Abstract: We prove a blow-up formula for Bott-Chern characteristic classes of compact complex manifolds. To this end, we establish a version of Riemann-Roch without denominators for the Bott-Chern characteristic classes. In particular, as an application, we study the behaviour of the Bott-Chern characteristic classes of the Iwasawa manifold under a blow-up transformation.

</details>


### [829] [The Geometry of Locally Bounded Rational Functions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.04232)
*Victor Delage,Goulwen Fichou,Aftab Patel*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文发展了非奇异实代数簇上局部有界有理函数的几何理论，建立了任意维度的基本几何与代数结果（包括Łojasiewicz不等式），并在二维情形下揭示了该函数类与复代数几何及实代数几何中其他函数类（如regulous函数）之间的对应关系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在实代数几何中，有理函数是一类重要的研究对象，但局部有界有理函数的几何性质尚未被系统研究。本文旨在填补这一空白，建立其基础理论框架，并探索其在低维情形下与复代数几何中经典对应关系及实代数几何中其他函数类（如regulous函数）的联系。

Method: 本文采用几何与代数相结合的方法。首先在任意维度上建立局部有界有理函数的基本性质，通过代数工具推导出Łojasiewicz不等式。随后聚焦于二维情形，利用低维特有的几何结构，展示该函数类与复代数几何中的经典对应关系以及实代数几何中regulous函数等类之间的类似对应。

Result: 在任意维度的非奇异实代数簇上，建立了局部有界有理函数的基本几何与代数结果，包括Łojasiewicz不等式。在二维情形下，证明了该函数类存在与复代数几何及实代数几何中regulous函数等类相似的代数-几何对应关系。

Conclusion: 本文系统地发展了非奇异实代数簇上局部有界有理函数的几何理论，为后续研究奠定了基础。二维情形下的结果表明该函数类具有丰富的结构，能够与经典复代数几何及实代数几何中其他重要函数类建立对应，展示了其理论价值与研究潜力。

Abstract: This paper develops the geometry of locally bounded rational functions on non-singular real algebraic varieties. First various basic geometric and algebraic results regarding these functions are established in any dimension, culminating with a version of Łojasiewicz's inequality. The geometry is further developed for the case of dimension 2, where it can be shown that there exist many of the usual correspondences between the algebra and geometry of these functions that one expects from complex algebraic geometry and from other classes of functions in real algebraic geometry such as regulous functions.

</details>


### [830] [Derivative of the Riemann-Hilbert map](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.03296)
*Vladimir Marković,Ognjen Tošić*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文研究了闭黎曼曲面上全纯联络的Riemann-Hilbert映射，计算了其导数，并给出了映射为单射的轨迹的简洁描述，同时复现了若干已有结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Riemann-Hilbert对应是几何与表示论中的核心工具，但对其导数的系统性分析和单射性条件尚缺乏简洁统一的描述。本文旨在填补这一空白。

Method: 通过计算Riemann-Hilbert映射在闭黎曼曲面$X$上的全纯联络$\nabla$处的导数，利用无穷小形变与单值表示之间的关系进行分析，并刻画单射性轨迹。

Result: 给出了Riemann-Hilbert映射导数的显式计算公式，并找到了映射为单射的精确轨迹描述，该描述简洁且统一了此前分散的结论。

Conclusion: 本文的结果为理解Riemann-Hilbert对应的局部性质提供了更清晰的图景，并为后续研究模空间上的几何结构奠定了基础。

Abstract: Given a pair $(X,\nabla)$, consisting of a closed Riemann surface $X$ and a holomorphic connection $\nabla$ on the trivial principal bundle $X\times\mathrm{SL}_2(\mathbb{C})\to X$, the Riemann-Hilbert map sends $(X,\nabla)$ to its monodromy representation. We compute the derivative of this map, and provide a simple description of the locus where it is injective, recovering in the process several previously obtained results.

</details>


### [831] [Topology of $\mathbb{G}_m$-actions and applications to the moduli of Higgs bundles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.03275)
*Andres Fernandez Herrero,Siqing Zhang*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文研究了带乘法群作用的簇和叠的拓扑性质，并将其应用于Higgs丛模空间。主要成果是将正特征下的非阿贝尔霍奇上同调定理提升为与杯积兼容的上同调环同构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有正特征下的非阿贝尔霍奇定理仅给出了上同调群级别的同构，尚未建立与杯积相容的上同调环同构。该工作旨在填补这一空白。

Method: 通过分析乘法群G_m作用下的簇和叠的拓扑结构，将相关技术应用于Higgs丛模空间的研究。

Result: 成功将正特征下的非阿贝尔霍奇上同调定理提升为与杯积兼容的上同调环同构。

Conclusion: 建立了正特征下更精细的上同调环同构，深化了对Higgs丛模空间拓扑结构的理解。

Abstract: We explain some results concerning the topology of varieties and stacks equipped with an action of the multiplicative group $\mathbb{G}_m$. We apply these techniques to the moduli of Higgs bundles. Our main application is to upgrade the cohomological Nonabelian Hodge Theorem in positive characteristic to an isomorphism of cohomology rings compatible with cup product.

</details>


### [832] [Siegel operators for holomorphic differential forms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.04315)
*Shouhei Ma*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文对Siegel模簇上全纯微分形式的Siegel算子给出了几何解释，将其与环面紧化边界上的Kuga簇的受限与下降联系起来，并证明了边界消失概念的等价性，同时推广到正交模簇情形。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为Siegel算子建立严格的几何解释，阐明其在Siegel模簇边界行为中的几何意义。

Method: 通过环面紧化扩展全纯微分形式，利用全纯Leray滤过分析微分形式在边界Kuga簇上的受限与下降。

Result: 证明了Siegel算子本质描述了全纯微分形式到边界Kuga簇的受限与下降过程，并建立了多种“边界消失”概念之间的等价性。

Conclusion: 给出了Siegel算子的几何解释，统一了边界消失的多个定义，并将结果推广至正交模簇。

Abstract: We give a geometric interpretation of the Siegel operators for holomorphic differential forms on Siegel modular varieties. This involves extension of the differential forms over a toroidal compactification, and we show that the Siegel operator essentially describes the restriction and descent to the boundary Kuga variety via holomorphic Leray filtration. As a consequence, we obtain equivalence of various notions of "vanishing at boundary'' for holomorphic forms. We also study the case of orthogonal modular varieties.

</details>


### [833] [Relative Polar Multiplicities and the Real Link](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.03313)
*David B. Massey*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文为复解析超曲面定义了一个自由阿贝尔群链复形，其秩由相对极重数给出，该复形的上同调与实链环的约化上同调同构，从而导出了实链环贝蒂数与相对极重数之间的 Morse 型不等式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 建立复解析超曲面实链环的拓扑不变量（贝蒂数）与函数的相对极重数之间的代数-组合联系，从而通过极重数来估计实链环的同调信息。

Method: 通过构造一个自由阿贝尔群链复形，其秩由相对极重数显式给出，并证明该复形的上同调同构于实链环的约化上同调。

Result: 所构造的链复形的上同调与实链环的约化上同调同构，并由此导出了 Morse 型不等式，将实链环的贝蒂数与相对极重数联系起来。

Conclusion: 该工作揭示了复分析超曲面的极重数与实链环拓扑之间的深层联系，为通过代数不变量研究实链环的同调性质提供了新的工具。

Abstract: For a hypersurface defined by a complex analytic function, we obtain a chain complex of free abelian groups, with ranks given in terms of relative polar multiplicities, which has cohomology isomorphic to the reduced cohomology of the real link. This leads to Morse-type inequalities between the Betti numbers of the real link of the hypersurface and the relative polar multiplicities of the function.

</details>


### [834] [The Relevant Domain of the Hilbert Function of a Finite Multiprojective Scheme](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.03477)
*Mario Maican*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文证明了一个关于零维方案（可能非既约）在多重投影空间中的Hilbert函数的结果：该函数完全由其在各分量投影长度s_i对应的区间[0, s_i-1]的乘积上的限制决定，将Van Tuyl关于既约情形的结论推广到了非既约方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Van Tuyl已证明对于既约的零维方案，其Hilbert函数完全由其在乘积区间上的限制决定。本文旨在将该结论推广到非既约（即含重结构）的零维方案情形，填补这一理论空白。

Method: 论文通过代数几何与交换代数的方法，分析零维方案在多重投影空间中的结构，利用投影映射和长度信息，研究非既约方案下Hilbert函数的性质，并证明其仍由乘积区间上的限制完全确定。

Result: 成功证明了对于非既约的零维方案X，其Hilbert函数同样完全由其在乘积区间[0, s_1-1] × ... × [0, s_n-1]上的限制所决定，其中s_i为X在第i个分量上的投影长度。

Conclusion: 该结果将Van Tuyl的定理从既约方案推广到了更一般的非既约情形，完善了关于多重投影空间中零维方案Hilbert函数的结构理论。

Abstract: Let X be a zero-dimensional scheme contained in a multiprojective space. Let $s_i$ be the length of the projection of X onto the i-th component of the multiprojective space. A result of Van Tuyl states that the Hilbert function of X, in the case when X is reduced, is completely determined by its restriction to the product of the intervals $[0, s_i - 1]$. We prove that the same is also true for non-reduced schemes X.

</details>


### [835] [Prismatic logarithm and prismatic Hochschild homology via norm](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.04400)
*Zhouhang Mao*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文提出了利用棱镜对数的细化构造霍奇-泰特晶体线丛的第一陈类的初等方法，该构造基于Yuri Sulyma在（动画）棱镜上的范数，并与棱镜Witt向量和棱镜Hochschild同调相关联。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 提供一个初等的构造方法来定义霍奇-泰特晶体线丛的第一陈类，并建立与Bhatt相关工作及Kaledin多项式Witt向量的联系，同时提出非交换类比。

Method: 通过对棱镜对数进行细化，利用Yuri Sulyma在动画棱镜上定义的范数，构造霍奇-泰特晶体线丛的第一陈类；并将其与棱镜Witt向量关联，推广Kaledin的多项式Witt向量；进一步提出棱镜Hochschild同调作为棱镜de Rham复形的非交换类比。

Result: 成功给出了霍奇-泰特晶体线丛第一陈类的初等构造，建立了与棱镜Witt向量的联系，并提出了棱镜Hochschild同调这一新概念。

Conclusion: 该构造提供了理解棱镜上同调理论的新视角，并为非交换棱镜理论奠定了基础。

Abstract: In this brief note, we present an elementary construction of the first Chern class of Hodge--Tate crystals in line bundles using a refinement of the prismatic logarithm, which should be comparable to the one considered by Bhargav Bhatt. The key to constructing this refinement is Yuri Sulyma's norm on (animated) prisms. We explain the relation of this construction to prismatic Witt vectors, as a generalization of Kaledin's polynomial Witt vectors. We also propose the prismatic Hochschild homology as a noncommutative analogue of prismatic de Rham complex.

</details>


### [836] [Stable rationality of hypersurfaces of mock toric variety II](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.03354)
*Taro Yoshino*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文通过将Nicaise-Ottem的环面退化方法从toric variety推广到mock toric variety，证明了如果复射影空间$\mathbb{P}^{2n-5}_\mathbb{C}$中非常一般的光滑超曲面非稳定有理，则复Grassmannian $\mathrm{Gr}_\mathbb{C}(2, n)$中非常一般的光滑超曲面也非稳定有理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 动机在于利用motivic方法（退化族构造）判断代数簇的稳定有理性。由于具体构造退化族通常困难，且已有方法局限于toric variety中的超曲面，本文希望将这一方法推广到更一般的空间（如Grassmannian）中的超曲面。

Method: 用mock toric variety替代toric variety，构造具有良好性质的退化族，并应用motivic方法（退化技巧、组合方法）证明关于稳定有理性的传递性定理。

Result: 建立了稳定非有理性的传递结果：若$\mathbb{P}^{2n-5}_\mathbb{C}$中非常一般d次超曲面非稳定有理，则$\mathrm{Gr}_\mathbb{C}(2, n)$中非常一般d次超曲面亦非稳定有理。

Conclusion: 本文通过引入mock toric variety拓宽了motivic退化方法的适用范围，为判断更一般代数簇（如Grassmannian中超曲面）的（非）稳定有理性提供了新工具。

Abstract: In recent years, there has been a development in approaching rationality problems through motivic methods (cf. [Kontsevich--Tschinkel'19], [Nicaise--Shinder'19], [Nicaise--Ottem'21]). This method requires the explicit construction of degeneration families of curves with favorable properties. While the specific construction is generally difficult, [Nicaise--Ottem'22] combines combinatorial methods to construct degeneration families of hypersurfaces in toric varieties and mentions the stable rationality of a very general hypersurface in projective spaces. In this paper, we substitute mock toric varieties for toric varieties and we prove the following theorem from the motivic method: If a very general hypersurface of degree $d$ in $\mathbb{P}^{2n-5}_\mathbb{C}$ is not stably rational, then a very general hypersurface of degree $d$ in $\mathrm{Gr}_\mathbb{C}(2, n)$ is not stably rational.

</details>


### [837] [On the genus of projective curves not contained in hypersurfaces of given degree, II](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.03715)
*Vincenzo Di Gennaro,Giambattista Marini*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文针对射影空间$\mathbb P^r$中非退化、不可约的复射影曲线$C$，在$d\gg \max\{r,i\}$条件下给出了算术亏格$p_a(C)$的Castelnuovo界$G_0(r;d,i)$，并研究了该界的尖锐性：当$i=2, r=6$且$d\equiv 0,3,6 \pmod{9}$时界是紧的；当$i=2, r\geq 9$且$r$被3整除时，若界非紧则最大亏格仅有三种可能；对于$i=2$且$r$不被3整除的情形已有文献覆盖。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在代数几何中，给定度数$d$和嵌入维数$r$的射影曲线，其算术亏格的最大可能取值是一个经典问题。Castelnuovo理论给出了经典上界，但该界依赖于曲线不包含于低次超曲面的假设。本文旨在推广到更一般的条件（曲线不包含于次数$\leq i$的超曲面），建立新的Castelnuovo型上界，并探索其尖锐性，特别是对$i=2$的情形进行深入分析。

Method: 采用Castelnuovo理论的经典方法，结合对曲线的超曲面截面进行精细分析。通过构造合适的线性系统和对曲线的嵌入性质进行组合几何估计，推导出$p_a(C)$的上界$G_0(r;d,i)$。对于尖锐性证明，利用模$d$同余条件和维数整除性条件构造极值曲线，并通过分类讨论分析非紧情形下最大亏格的可能取值。

Result: (1) 在$d\gg \max\{r,i\}$假设下，得到Castelnuovo上界$G_0(r;d,i)$；(2) 当$i=2, r=6$且$d\equiv 0,3,6 \pmod{9}$时，该界是紧的；(3) 当$i=2, r\geq 9$且$3\mid r$时，若$G_0$非紧，则最大亏格仅有三种可能值；(4) 对极值曲线的结构给出了部分信息。

Conclusion: 本文推广了Castelnuovo型算术亏格上界到更一般的超曲面避让条件，部分解决了$i=2$情形下界的尖锐性问题，但一般情形下的紧性仍待研究。结果丰富了高维射影空间中曲线亏格极值问题的理论。

Abstract: Fix integers $r\geq 4$ and $i\geq 2$. Let $C$ be a non-degenerate, reduced and irreducible complex projective curve in $\mathbb P^r$, of degree $d$, not contained in a hypersurface of degree $\leq i$. Let $p_a(C)$ be the arithmetic genus of $C$. Continuing previous research, under the assumption $d\gg \max\{r,i\}$, in the present paper we exhibit a Castelnuovo bound $G_0(r;d,i)$ for $p_a(C)$. In general, we do not know whether this bound is sharp. However, we are able to prove it is sharp when $i=2$, $r=6$ and $d\equiv 0,3,6$ (mod $9$). Moreover, when $i=2$, $r\geq 9$, $r$ is divisible by $3$, and $d\equiv 0$ (mod $r(r+3)/6$), we prove that if $G_0(r;d,i)$ is not sharp, then for the maximal value of $p_a(C)$ there are only three possibilities.
