The case in which $i=2$ and $r$ is not divisible by $3$ has already been examined in the literature. We give some information on the extremal curves.

</details>


### [838] [Explicit desingularisation of Kummer surfaces in characteristic two via specialisation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.04532)
*Alvaro Gonzalez-Hernandez*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文研究亏格2曲线Jacobian簇的Kummer曲面的双有理几何，特别关注特征2的域。通过显式计算一般亏格2曲线的Jacobian的射影嵌入，构造其Kummer曲面，并在特征不为2的域上给出解奇异化模型；在特征2下得到部分解奇异化模型。利用trope描述Picard格点，在p-秩非零时给出完全解奇异化模型。最后计算了在二次域上具有处处好约化的Kummer曲面实例，并建立了与好约化判别准则的联系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究亏格2曲线Jacobian的Kummer曲面在特征2域上的双有理几何结构，填补该特殊特征下Kummer曲面构造与解奇异化的理论空白，并建立与好约化判别准则的联系。

Method: 显式计算一般亏格2曲线Jacobian的射影嵌入，由此构造Kummer曲面模型；通过trope理论描述Picard格点结构；在特征2下对部分解奇异化模型进行特殊化处理，并在p-秩非零时给出完全解奇异化模型。

Result: 获得了特征不为2域上的解奇异化Kummer曲面模型，特征2域上的部分解奇异化模型，以及p-秩非零时的完全解奇异化模型；给出了二次域上具有处处好约化的Kummer曲面实例及其与好约化判别准则的联系。

Conclusion: 本文建立的Kummer曲面显式模型和好约化判别准则为特征2域上的双有理几何研究提供了系统框架，实例验证了理论结果的有效性。

Abstract: We study the birational geometry of the Kummer surfaces associated to the Jacobian varieties of genus two curves, with a particular focus on fields of characteristic two. In order to do so, we explicitly compute a projective embedding of the Jacobian of a general genus two curve and, from this, we construct its associated Kummer surface. This explicit construction produces a model for desingularised Kummer surfaces over any field of characteristic not two, and specialising these equations to characteristic two provides a model of a partial desingularisation. Adapting the classic description of the Picard lattice in terms of tropes, we also describe how to explicitly find completely desingularised models of Kummer surfaces whenever the $p$-rank is not zero. In the final section of this paper, we compute an example of a Kummer surface with everywhere good reduction over a quadratic number field, and draw connections between the models we computed and a criterion that determines when a Kummer surface has good reduction at two.

</details>


### [839] [On the Zariski invariant of plane branches](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.03461)
*Marcelo Escudeiro Hernandes,Mauro Fernando Hernández Iglesias*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文展示了如何通过接触阶或与特定曲线族中元素的相交重数来获得平面分支的Zariski不变量，并给出了该结果的一些推论。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 作者希望找到一种新的方法来计算平面分支的Zariski不变量，从而深化对平面代数曲线奇点理论的理解。

Method: 通过分析平面分支与特定曲线族中元素的接触阶或相交重数，推导出Zariski不变量的计算方法。

Result: 成功建立了Zariski不变量与接触阶/相交重数之间的联系，并得到了若干推论。

Conclusion: 该结果提供了一种计算Zariski不变量的新途径，对奇点理论具有重要价值。

Abstract: We show how to obtain the Zariski invariant of a plane branch employing the contact order or the intersection multiplicity with elements in a particular family of curves and we present some consequences of this result.

</details>


### [840] [An abundance-type result for the tangent bundles of smooth Fano varieties](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.03799)
*Juanyong Wang*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文证明了对任意光滑Fano簇X，其切丛T_X为nef当且仅当T_X是big且semiample（即重言线丛O_{PT_X}(1)是big且semiample的），由此建立了Campana-Peternell猜想的一个弱形式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Campana-Peternell猜想（1991）是关于Fano簇切丛性质的重要猜想，本文旨在建立该猜想的一个弱形式，即证明切丛nef性与big且semiample性之间的等价关系。

Method: 通过分析光滑Fano簇X的切丛T_X的重言线丛O_{PT_X}(1)的丰沛性（bigness）与半丰沛性（semiampleness），建立其与T_X为nef之间的等价关系。

Result: 证明了对于任意光滑Fano簇X，切丛T_X是nef当且仅当T_X是big且semiample的（即重言线丛是big且semiample的）。

Conclusion: 该结果建立了Campana-Peternell猜想的一个弱形式，为理解Fano簇的切丛性质提供了新的见解。

Abstract: In this paper we prove the following abundance-type result: for any smooth Fano variety $X$, the tangent bundle $T_X$ is nef if and only if it is big and semiample in the sense that the tautological line bundle $\mathscr{O}_{\mathbb{P}T_X}(1)$ is so, by which we establish a weak form of the Campana-Peternell conjecture (Camapan-Peternell, 1991).

</details>


### [841] [On the instability of syzygy bundles on toric surfaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.04666)
*Lucie Devey,Milena Hering,Katharina Jochemko,Hendrik Süß*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文证明了除射影平面和两个射影直线的乘积外，每个环面曲面上的足够高次幂的线丛所关联的syzygy丛不是斜率稳定的。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究环面曲面上syzygy丛的斜率稳定性条件，特别是找出哪些环面曲面会导致syzygy丛不稳定。

Method: 通过对环面曲面的分类讨论，排除射影平面和双射影直线乘积这两种特殊情况，证明在其余环面曲面上存在适当的极化，使得足够高次幂的线丛关联的syzygy丛不满足斜率稳定性。

Result: 发现除射影平面和两个射影直线的乘积外，所有环面曲面的syzygy丛在适当极化和高次幂下都不稳定。

Conclusion: 环面曲面的syzygy丛稳定性有明确的反例边界，即仅有两个特殊曲面保持稳定。

Abstract: We show that for every toric surface apart from the projective plane and a product of two projective lines and every ample line bundle there exists a polarisation such that the syzygy bundle associated to sufficiently high powers of the line bundle is not slope stable.

</details>


### [842] [Universal piecewise polynomiality for counting curves in toric surfaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.03761)
*Marvin Anas Hahn,Vincenzo Reda*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文证明了h-横截多边形对应的环面曲面上的双Gromov-Witten不变量具有分段多项式结构，并将其表示为二维玻色子Fock空间中的矩阵元。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Ardila和Brugallé引入了Hirzebruch曲面上的双Gromov-Witten不变量作为二维类比，并观察到其分段多项式性质；Ardila和Block进一步推测这种多项式性可能对更一般的环面曲面（对应h-横截多边形）也成立。本文旨在证实这一猜想。

Method: 利用h-横截多边形的组合结构，将双Gromov-Witten不变量与二维玻色子Fock空间的矩阵元建立对应关系，从而证明多项式性。

Result: 成功证实了对于h-横截多边形对应的环面曲面，双Gromov-Witten不变量具有分段多项式结构；并给出了这些不变量在Fock空间中的矩阵元表示。

Conclusion: 将Ardila-Brugallé的结果从Hirzebruch曲面推广到了更一般的环面曲面，并建立了与量子场论中Fock空间的联系，为这类枚举问题的代数化处理提供了新途径。

Abstract: Inspired by piecewise polynomiality results of double Hurwitz numbers, Ardila and Brugallé introduced an enumerative problem which they call double Gromov--Witten invariants of Hirzebruch surfaces. These invariants serve as a two-dimensional analogue and satisfy a similar piecewise polynomial structure. More precisely, they introduced the enumeration of curves in Hirzebruch surfaces satisfying point conditions and tangency conditions on the two parallel toric boundaries. These conditions are stored in four partitions and the resulting invariants are piecewise polynomial in their entries. Moreover, they found that these expressions also behave polynomially with respect to the parameter determining the underlying Hirzebruch surfaces. Based on work of Ardila and Block, they proposed that such a polynomiality could also hold while changing between more general toric surfaces corresponding to $h$-transverse polygons. In this work, we answer this question affirmatively. Moreover, we express the resulting invariants for $h$-transverse polygons as matrix elements in the two-dimensional bosonic Fock space.

</details>


### [843] [Lüroth's theorem for fields of rational functions in infinitely many permuted variables](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.04028)
*M. Rovinsky*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文研究了无限集合Ψ上几何不可约簇X的笛卡尔幂X^Ψ到某簇的占优有理映射，这些映射需满足关于因子X的所有置换的等变性。在特征0且dim X=1时，这类映射完全由构造h: X^Ψ → Y^Ψ → H\Y^Ψ给出（其中f: X→Y占优，H是Y|k的双有理自同构群）；对一般X仅得到部分结果。此外简要涉及了X^Ψ上有限型等变积分概形的描述问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Lüroth定理描述了域上有理曲线的占优映射，本文将其推广到无限笛卡尔幂的等变占优有理映射情境，试图刻画这类映射的结构。

Method: 通过构造h: X^Ψ → Y^Ψ → H\Y^Ψ形式的映射（其中f: X→Y是占优k-映射，H是Y|k的双有理自同构群），在特征0且dim X=1时证明了适当修改后该构造给出全部等变占优映射；对一般X则仅得到部分结果。

Result: 在特征0且dim X=1时，完整刻画了所有等变占优有理映射；对任意维数X仅得到部分结果。此外简要讨论了X^Ψ上有限型等变积分概形的描述问题。

Conclusion: 推广了Lüroth定理到无限笛卡尔幂的等变情境，在曲线情形得到完整分类，高维情形仍待进一步研究。

Abstract: Lüroth's theorem describes the dominant maps from rational curves over a field.
  In this note we study those dominant rational maps from cartesian powers $X^Ψ$ of geometrically irreducible varieties $X$ over a field $k$ for infinite sets $Ψ$ that are equivariant with respect to all permutations of the factors $X$. At least some of such maps arise as compositions $h:X^Ψ\xrightarrow{f^Ψ}Y^Ψ\to H\backslash Y^Ψ$, where $X\xrightarrow{f}Y$ is a dominant $k$-map and $H$ is a group of birational automorphisms of $Y|k$, acting diagonally on $Y^Ψ$.
  In characteristic 0, we show that this construction, when properly modified, gives all dominant equivariant maps from $X^Ψ$, if $\dim X=1$. For arbitrary $X$, the results are only partial.
  Also, a somewhat similar problem of describing the equivariant integral schemes over $X^Ψ$ of finite type is touched very briefly.

</details>


### [844] [Counting points on generic character varieties](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.04735)
*Masoud Kamgarpour,GyeongHyeon Nam,Bailey Whitbread,Stefano Giannini*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文研究了带穿孔曲面的特征簇上的点计数问题，发现这些簇上的点数构成回文多项式，并据此提出了一个P=W猜想。同时，对相应的加法特征簇进行点计数，发现点数也是多项式，并推测这些多项式具有非负系数，可视为彗星形箭图的Kac多项式的约化类比。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理解特征簇的几何结构和计数性质，揭示其与表示论、箭图理论之间的联系，并探索P=W猜想的适用性。

Method: 对带穿孔曲面特征簇（与正则半单一般共轭类关联）进行点计数，并分析计数结果的多项式性质；同时对加法特征簇进行类似计数。

Result: 特征簇的点数是回文多项式；加法特征簇的点数也是多项式，且推测具有非负系数。

Conclusion: 特征簇的回文多项式性质暗示了P=W猜想的成立；加法特征簇的多项式可视为彗星形箭图Kac多项式的约化类比，为非负系数猜想提供了依据。

Abstract: We count points on character varieties associated with punctured surfaces and regular semisimple generic conjugacy classes in reductive groups. We find that the number of points are palindromic polynomials. This suggests a $P=W$ conjecture for these varieties. We also count points on the corresponding additive character varieties and find that the number of points are also polynomials, which we conjecture have non-negative coefficients. These polynomials can be considered as the reductive analogues of the Kac polynomials of comet-shaped quivers.

</details>


### [845] [Projectivity of good moduli spaces of vector bundles on stacky curves](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.04412)
*Chiara Damiolini,Victoria Hoskins,Svetlana Makarova,Lisanne Taams*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文研究了stacky曲线上向量丛的模空间，证明了半稳定向量丛的模stack存在proper good模空间，并证明了其上的行列式线丛是充分的，从而得到射影性，同时给出了该线丛幂次无基点的有效界，并推广到抛物丛模空间的新构造。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: stacky曲线（orbifold曲线）上的向量丛模空间与经典曲线情形类似，但由于存在额外的数值不变量导致多种稳定性概念，需要统一的理论框架来处理这些模空间的几何性质。

Method: 利用stack的良好模空间存在性判据，结合行列式线丛的充分性分析，通过模论方法证明射影性，并给出线丛幂次无基点的有效界。

Result: 证明了stacky曲线上半稳定向量丛的模stack存在proper good模空间，该模空间是射影的，且得到了行列式线丛充分性的有效界，作为特例给出了抛物丛模空间的新有效构造。

Conclusion: 将经典曲线向量丛模空间理论推广到stacky曲线情形，解决了因额外数值不变量带来的稳定性多样化问题，并为抛物丛模空间提供了有效的构造方法。

Abstract: Moduli of vector bundles on stacky curves behave similarly to moduli of vector bundles on curves, except there are additional numerical invariants giving many different notions of stability. We apply the existence criterion for good moduli spaces of stacks to show that the moduli stack of semistable vector bundles on a stacky curve has a proper good moduli space. We moduli-theoretically prove that a natural determinantal line bundle on this moduli space is ample, thus proving this moduli space is projective. Our methods give effective bounds for when a power of this line bundle is basepoint-free. As a special case, we obtain new and effective constructions of moduli spaces of parabolic bundles.

</details>


### [846] [Quartic surfaces with an outer Galois point and K3 surfaces with an automorphism of order 4](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.04137)
*Kei Miura,Shingo Taki*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文证明了光滑四次曲面与外Galois点之间存在一一对应关系，并将其表征为具有特定4阶自同构的K3曲面，同时刻画了具有两个或更多外Galois点的四次曲面。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 建立光滑四次曲面中外Galois点与K3曲面中特定4阶自同构之间的严格对应关系，从而利用K3曲面的理论工具来研究外Galois点的存在性与结构特征。

Method: 通过数学证明建立光滑四次曲面与外Galois点之间的双射对应，并将其映射到K3曲面中具有4阶自同构的结构上；进一步分析多个外Galois点的情况，给出其在K3曲面框架下的刻画。

Result: 成功证明光滑四次曲面上的每个外Galois点唯一对应一个具有特定4阶自同构的K3曲面；具有两个或更多外Galois点的四次曲面在K3曲面分类中得到完整刻画。

Conclusion: 该对应关系为利用K3曲面理论研究和分类外Galois点提供了新途径，深化了对四次曲面几何性质的理解。

Abstract: We prove that there exists a one-to-one correspondence between smooth quartic surfaces with an outer Galois point and K3 surfaces with a certain automorphism of order 4. Furthermore, we characterize quartic surfaces with two or more outer Galois points as K3 surfaces.

</details>


### [847] [Algebraic Gromov ellipticity: a brief survey](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.04776)
*Mikhail Zaidenberg*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文对Gromov意义下的代数椭圆簇进行了综述。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 系统梳理和总结代数椭圆簇这一研究方向的已有成果与进展。

Method: 通过文献调研与分类整理，对代数椭圆簇的定义、性质及相关结果进行综述性分析。

Result: 呈现了代数椭圆簇领域的主要定理、例子及未解决问题。

Conclusion: 该综述为代数椭圆簇的研究提供了全面的参考框架。

Abstract: We survey on algebraically elliptic varieties in the sense of Gromov.

</details>


### [848] [Chip-firing on the Platonic solids: a primer for studying graph gonality](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.05158)
*Marchelle Beougher,Kexin Ding,Max Everett,Robin Huang,Chan Lee,Ralph Morrison,Ben Weber*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文以柏拉图立体图为例，友好介绍了芯片发射游戏与图亏格（gonality）的概念，利用独立集、树宽、scramble number和Dhar燃烧算法等工具进行分析，并首次证明了十二面体图亏格为6、二十面体图亏格为9。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 通过具体的柏拉图立体图实例，为读者提供芯片发射游戏和图亏格的直观理解，同时填补特定图类的亏格计算空白。

Method: 以五种柏拉图立体图为研究对象，运用独立集、树宽、scramble number和Dhar燃烧算法等多种组合与图论工具，对芯片发射游戏进行系统分析并计算图亏格。

Result: 首次证明了十二面体图的亏格为6，二十面体图的亏格为9；同时展示了一些已知结果。

Conclusion: 本文提供了一种友好、示例驱动的芯片发射游戏与图亏格教学介绍，并通过柏拉图立体图验证了多种分析工具的有效性，贡献了新的亏格计算结果。

Abstract: This paper provides a friendly introduction to chip-firing games and graph gonality. We use graphs coming from the five Platonic solids to illustrate different tools and techniques for studying these games, including independent sets, treewidth, scramble number, and Dhar's burning algorithm. In addition to showcasing some previously known results, we present the first proofs that the dodecahedron graph has gonality $6$, and that the icosahedron graph has gonality~$9$.

</details>


### [849] [The intrinsic reductions and the intrinsic depths in non-archimedean dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.04415)
*Yûsuke Okuyama*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文给出了Rumely关于p进有理函数ordResφ的type II极小轨迹的模理论刻画的一个更概念化、更简单的证明，以及DeMarco-Faber退化极限定理的一个更简单自然的证明，并引入了非阿基米德有理函数的内蕴约化和方向性内蕴深度的概念。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为Rumely的模理论刻画和DeMarco-Faber退化极限定理提供更简洁、更概念化的证明方法，并建立适用于这些目标的非阿基米德动力学工具。

Method: 引入非阿基米德有理函数φ在Berkovich射影直线上每点的内蕴约化及其方向性内蕴深度，利用Berkovich射影直线的树结构和解析结构定义这些概念，并建立两个非阿基米德动力学的关键定理。

Result: 给出了Rumely定理的更简单证明和DeMarco-Faber退化极限定理的改进形式的更自然证明。

Conclusion: 通过引入内蕴约化和方向性内蕴深度这两个新概念，为非阿基米德动力学中的关键结果提供了更简洁、更自然的证明路径，展示了Berkovich空间树结构与解析结构在动力系统中的应用价值。

Abstract: In this short paper, we aim at giving a more conceptual and simpler proof of Rumely's moduli theoretic characterization of type II minimal locus of the resultant function $\operatorname{ordRes}_φ$ on the Berkovich hyperbolic space for a rational function $φ$ on $\mathbb{P}^1$ defined over an algebraically closed and complete field that is equipped with a non-trivial and non-archimedean absolute value, and also aim at giving a much simpler and more natural proof of a degenerating limit theorem, in an improved form after DeMarco--Faber, for the family of the unique maximal entropy measures on $\mathbb{P}^1(\mathbb{C})$ associated to a meromorphic family of complex rational functions. We introduce the intrinsic reduction of a non-archimedean rational function $φ$ at each point in the Berkovich projective line and its directionwise intrinsic depths, which are suitable notions for the above aims and defined in terms of the tree and analytic structures of the Berkovich projective line. Then we establish two theorems in non-archimedean dynamics, both of which play key roles in the above aims.

</details>


### [850] [The realization spaces of certain conic-line arrangements of degree 7](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.05011)
*Shinzo Bannai,Hiro-o Tokunaga,Emiko Yorisaki*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文研究了七次圆锥-线排列的嵌入拓扑，给出了两个新的Zariski对例子，确定了排列的连通分支数，并利用SageMath和Sirocco包计算了基本群。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究七次圆锥-线排列的嵌入拓扑结构，寻找新的Zariski对，并系统分析该类排列的拓扑不变量。

Method: 通过拓扑学方法研究圆锥-线排列的嵌入拓扑，利用SageMath和Sirocco包计算基本群，分析排列的连通分支数。

Result: 发现两个新的Zariski对例子，确定了七次圆锥-线排列的连通分支数量。

Conclusion: 本文丰富了Zariski对的案例库，为圆锥-线排列的拓扑分类提供了新的见解。

Abstract: We study the embedded topology of certain conic-line arrangements of degree 7. Two new examples of Zariski pairs are given. Furthermore, we determine the number of connected components of the conic-line arrangements. We also calculate the fundamental groups using SageMath and the package Sirocco in the appendix.

</details>


### [851] [Algebraic cycles and Hitchin systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.05177)
*Davesh Maulik,Junliang Shen,Qizheng Yin*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文研究了GL_n Hitchin系统的动机方面，包括证明了Corti-Hanamura的动机分解猜想、相对Hard Lefschetz对称性的逆由相对代数对应诱导、强迷向性界以及χ-独立性结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究Hitchin系统的动机方面，建立其动机分解定理和相对Lefschetz标准猜想等深层代数几何结构。

Method: 结合紧致化Jacobian纤维化的Fourier变换、邻近与消失圈技术，以及抛物Hitchin模空间的Springer理论解释。

Result: (a)证明Hitchin系统的动机分解猜想，构造动机迷向滤子；(b)确认相对Lefschetz标准猜想；(c)证明万有丛正则Chern类的强迷向性界；(d)证明Hitchin系统相对Chow动机的χ-独立性。

Conclusion: 为Hitchin系统建立了完整的动机理论框架，提升了先前上同调/层论结果到动机层面。

Abstract: The purpose of this paper is to study motivic aspects of the Hitchin system for $\mathrm{GL}_n$. Our results include the following. (a) We prove the motivic decomposition conjecture of Corti-Hanamura for the Hitchin system; in particular, the decomposition theorem associated with the Hitchin system is induced by algebraic cycles. This yields an unconditional construction of the motivic perverse filtration for the Hitchin system, which lifts the cohomological/sheaf-theoretic perverse filtration. (b) We prove that the inverse of the relative Hard Lefschetz symmetry is induced by a relative algebraic correspondence, confirming the relative Lefschetz standard conjecture for the Hitchin system. (c) We show a strong perversity bound for the normalized Chern classes of a universal bundle with respect to the motivic perverse filtration; this specializes to the sheaf-theoretic result obtained earlier by Maulik-Shen. (d) We prove a $χ$-independence result for the relative Chow motives associated with Hitchin systems.
  Our methods combine Fourier transforms for compactified Jacobian fibrations associated with integral locally planar curves, nearby and vanishing cycle techniques, and a Springer-theoretic interpretation of parabolic Hitchin moduli spaces.

</details>


### [852] [Rational Curves on Real Classical Groups](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.04453)
*Zijia Li,Ke Ye*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文研究了实典型群上的有理曲线，主要贡献有三：确定了二次有理曲线的结构，证明了有理曲线的分解定理，并将Kempe普遍性定理推广到齐性空间。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究实典型群（如酉群、正交群等）上有理曲线的结构，这些群在几何与物理中具有重要地位，但此前关于其上有理曲线的系统分类和分解理论尚不完善。

Method: 通过代数与几何相结合的方法，具体分析了实典型群上二次有理曲线的结构，并建立了一个类似于代数学基本定理和部分分式分解的非交换推广的分解定理。

Result: (i) 完全分类了U_n、O_n(R)、O_{n-1,1}(R)和O_{n-2,2}(R)上的二次有理曲线；(ii) 建立了实典型群上有理曲线的分解定理；(iii) 将Kempe普遍性定理推广至齐性空间上的有理曲线。

Conclusion: 本文为实典型群上的有理曲线提供了系统的结构描述和分解工具，并展示了其在几何普遍性定理推广中的应用价值。

Abstract: This paper is concerned with rational curves on real classical groups. Our contributions are three-fold: (i) We determine the structure of quadratic rational curves on real classical groups. As a consequence, we completely classify quadratic rational curves on $\mathrm{U}_n$, $\mathrm{O}_n(\mathbb{R})$, $\mathrm{O}_{n-1,1}(\mathbb{R})$ and $\mathrm{O}_{n-2,2}(\mathbb{R})$. (ii) We prove a decomposition theorem for rational curves on real classical groups, which can be regarded as a non-commutative generalization of the fundamental theorem of algebra and partial fraction decomposition. (iii) As an application of (i) and (ii), we generalize Kempe's Universality Theorem to rational curves on homogeneous spaces.

</details>


### [853] [Parahoric reduction theory of formal connections (or Higgs fields)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.05073)
*Zhi Hu,Pengfei Huang,Ruiran Sun,Runhong Zong*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文建立了具有抛物型结构的正式主丛上形式联络（或Higgs场）的抛物约化理论，推广了Babbitt-Varadarajan无抛物结构情形和Boalch正则奇点情形的结果，并给出了正则奇点的内蕴-外延定义等价性证明、相对正则性判据以及Frenkel-Zhu Borel约化定理的抛物版本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将经典的形式联络约化理论推广到带有抛物（parahoric）结构的更一般情形，统一并扩展已有结果。

Method: 建立抛物约化理论框架，推广Babbitt-Varadarajan和Boalch的方法。

Result: 证明了正则奇点的内蕴定义与外延定义等价；给出了形式联络相对正则性的判据；得到了Frenkel-Zhu Borel约化定理的抛物版本。

Conclusion: 抛物约化理论成功推广了经典约化理论，并在正则奇点刻画和约化定理方面取得了重要应用成果。

Abstract: In this paper, we establish the parahoric reduction theory of formal connections (or Higgs fields) on a formal principal bundle with parahoric structures, which generalizes Babbitt-Varadarajan's result for the case without parahoric structures [5] and Boalch's result for the case of regular singularity [9]. As applications, we prove the equivalence between extrinsic definition and intrinsic definition of regular singularity and provide a criterion of relative regularity for formal connections, and also demonstrate a parahoric version of Frenkel-Zhu's Borel reduction theorem of formal connections [23].

</details>


### [854] [A characterization of quasi-homogeneous singularities of free and nearly free plane curves](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.05819)
*Aline V. Andrade,Valentina Beorchia,Rosa M. Miró-Roig*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文提出了自由曲线和近自由曲线在复射影平面上的拟齐次孤立奇点的新表征，该准则基于与曲线的雅可比理想相关的第一合冲矩阵。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 旨在建立自由曲线和近自由曲线拟齐次孤立奇点的新刻画，填补该领域在代数曲线奇点理论中判据的不足。

Method: 通过构造与曲线方程f的雅可比理想J_f相关的第一合冲矩阵，分析其代数性质来推导拟齐次孤立奇点的判别条件。

Result: 得到了一个基于第一合冲矩阵的准则，能够有效表征自由曲线和近自由曲线的拟齐次孤立奇点。

Conclusion: 该准则为自由曲线和近自由曲线的奇点分类提供了新的代数工具，深化了对拟齐次孤立奇点结构的理解。

Abstract: The goal of this paper is to establish a new characterization of quasi-homogeneous isolated singularities of free curves and nearly free curves $C$ in $\mathbb{P}_\mathbb{C}^2$. The criterion will be in terms of a first syzygy matrix associated with the Jacobian ideal $J_f$ of $f$, where $f=0$ is the equation of the plane curve $C$.

</details>


### [855] [On compact complex surfaces with finite homotopy rank-sum](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.04558)
*Indranil Biswas,Buddhadev Hajra*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文研究了光滑紧致Kähler曲面的同伦秩和有限性，并证明了在其万有覆盖全纯凸的条件下万有覆盖的Stein性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 旨在刻画哪些光滑紧致Kähler曲面具有有限的同伦秩和（即从第二同伦群开始的所有高阶同伦群的秩之和为有限），并进一步探讨这些曲面的万有覆盖在满足全纯凸性时的Stein性质。

Method: 采用拓扑与复几何相结合的方法，通过分析同伦群的秩和来分类光滑紧致Kähler曲面，并利用全纯凸性假设研究万有覆盖的Stein性。

Result: 给出了光滑紧致Kähler曲面具有有限同伦秩和的完全刻画；同时证明了在万有覆盖全纯凸的条件下，此类曲面的万有覆盖是Stein的。

Conclusion: 成功分类了满足有限同伦秩和条件的光滑紧致Kähler曲面，并建立了在其万有覆盖全纯凸时万有覆盖的Stein性结论。

Abstract: A topological space (not necessarily simply connected) is said to have finite homotopy rank-sum if the sum of the ranks of all higher homotopy groups (from the second homotopy group onward) is finite. In this article, we characterize the smooth compact complex Kaehler surfaces having finite homotopy rank-sum. We also prove the Steinness of the universal cover of these surfaces assuming holomorphic convexity of the universal cover.

</details>


### [856] [Transverse-freeness in finite geometries](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.05248)
*Charlie Bruggemann,Vera Choi,Brian Freidin,Jaedon Whyte*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文研究有限域上射影曲线和超曲面的切触性质，首先探讨与所有k维子空间相切的光滑超曲面的最低次数，然后构造与最低次曲线均相切的射影曲面，作为有限反演平面和双曲平面的模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将Asgarli在二维情形下的工作推广到高维，探索与所有低维子空间相切的光滑超曲面的最低可达次数；同时构造有限反演平面和双曲平面的射影曲面模型，并在这些曲面上构造与所有最低次基域曲线相切的曲线。

Method: 采用代数几何方法，研究有限域上射影空间中的切触条件。对于超曲面情形，分析其与所有k维子空间相切时的次数下界；对于曲面情形，利用有限反演平面和双曲平面的几何结构进行构造。

Result: 获得了与所有k维子空间相切的光滑超曲面的最低次数结果，并将Asgarli的二维工作成功推广到高维；构造了与所有最低次基域曲线相切的射影曲面。

Conclusion: 本文在有限域几何中建立了新的切触性质结果，既推广了已有结论到高维情形，又通过有限几何模型构造了具有特殊切触性质的曲面。

Abstract: We study projective curves and hypersurfaces defined over a finite field that are tangent to every member of a class of low-degree varieties. Extending 2-dimensional work of Asgarli, we first explore the lowest degrees attainable by smooth hypersurfaces in $n$-dimensional projective space that are tangent to every $k$-dimensional subspace, for some value of $n$ and $k$. We then study projective surfaces that serve as models of finite inversive and hyperbolic planes, finite analogs of spherical and hyperbolic geometries. In these surfaces we construct curves tangent to each of the lowest degree curves defined over the base field.

</details>


### [857] [A remark on the paper of Deninger and Murre](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.05837)
*Ben Moonen*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文表明Deninger和Murre的证明直接蕴含了阿贝尔概形的de Rham丛的陈类是Chow环中的 torsion 元，这一结果后来被van der Geer证明；同时讨论了这些类的阶数问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 验证并建立Deninger和Murre的早期结果与van der Geer关于阿贝尔概形de Rham丛陈类为Chow环中torsion元这一结论之间的直接蕴含关系。

Method: 基于Deninger和Murre已有的定理进行逻辑推导，分析其与van der Geer结果之间的直接联系，并进一步研究这些torsion类的阶数。

Result: 证明了Deninger和Murre的结果直接蕴含阿贝尔概形的de Rham丛的陈类是Chow环中的torsion元，并对这些torsion类的阶数给出了若干讨论。

Conclusion: Deninger和Murre的工作足以直接推出van der Geer关于de Rham丛陈类为torsion的结论，且对这些torsion类的阶数有进一步的刻画。

Abstract: We show that the results proven by Deninger and Murre directly imply that the Chern classes of the de Rham bundle of an abelian scheme are torsion elements in the Chow ring, a result that was later proven by van der Geer. We also discuss several results about the orders of these classes.

</details>


### [858] [Approximability and Rouquier dimension for noncommutative algebras over schemes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.04561)
*Timothy De Deyn,Pat Lank,Kabeer Manali Rahul*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文研究了与非交换代数相关的三角范畴的近似性（Neeman意义下）和Rouquier维数。主要结果：对于分离Noetherian概形上的Noetherian拟凝聚代数，其完美复形范畴是强生成的当且仅当存在一个仿射开覆盖使得该代数具有有限全局维数。这解决了Neeman提出的一个开放问题，并首次应用于Azumaya代数的生成元存在性研究。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究非交换代数（特别是Noetherian拟凝聚代数）在分离Noetherian概形上的三角范畴的近似性与Rouquier维数，并解决Neeman提出的一个开放问题。

Method: 利用三角范畴的近似性理论（Neeman意义）和Rouquier维数工具，通过仿射开覆盖与有限全局维数条件建立等价刻画。

Result: 建立了完美复形范畴强生成的充要条件（存在仿射开覆盖且代数有限全局维数），由此解决了Neeman的开放问题。

Conclusion: 该结果为非交换代数在概形上的三角范畴生成性提供了完整刻画，并展示了在Azumaya代数等具体对象中的应用价值。

Abstract: This work is concerned with approximability (à la Neeman) and Rouquier dimension for triangulated categories associated to noncommutative algebras over schemes. Amongst other things, we establish that the category of perfect complexes of a Noetherian quasi-coherent algebra over a separated Noetherian scheme is strongly generated if, and only if, there exists an affine open cover where the algebra has finite global dimension. As a consequence, we solve an open problem posed by Neeman. Further, as a first application, we study the existence of generators for Azumaya algebras.

</details>


### [859] [Fibrations by plane projective rational quartic curves in characteristic two](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.05464)
*Cesar Hilario,Karl-Otto Stöhr*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文在特征为2的域上，对所有由平面射影有理四次曲线构成的纤维丛进行了双有理等价下的完全分类。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在特征为2的代数几何中，平面四次曲线的纤维丛分类问题尚未完全解决，特别是奇异性态与特征2特有的现象（如Frobenius映射）使得分类更加复杂。本文旨在填补这一空白，给出完整的双有理分类。

Method: 通过分析特征2下平面有理四次曲线的几何性质，利用双有理变换、奇异点分析以及Frobenius映射等技术手段，对所有可能的纤维结构进行分类。

Result: 给出了特征2下所有由平面射影有理四次曲线构成的纤维丛在双有理等价意义下的完全分类。

Conclusion: 完成了特征2情形下平面有理四次曲线纤维丛的双有理分类，为特征2代数几何中的纤维丛理论提供了重要补充。

Abstract: We give a complete classification, up to birational equivalence, of all fibrations by plane projective rational quartic curves in characteristic two.

</details>


### [860] [Categorifying Quiver Linking/Unlinking using CoHA Modules](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.05605)
*Okke van Garderen*

Main category: math.AG

TL;DR: 本文建立了扭结与箭图之间的对应关系，并从表示论角度解释了箭图的链接/去链接操作，给出了这些操作的范畴化（CoHA模层面）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扭结-箭图对应将扭结不变量与箭图的计数不变量联系起来，但链接/去链接操作的几何与表示论解释尚不清晰，本文旨在填补这一空白。

Method: 通过研究箭图及其链接/去链接的模空间之间的自然关系，利用Cohomological Hall Algebra（CoHA）的作用，在CoHA模的层面上进行范畴化。

Result: 建立了箭图链接/去链接操作在CoHA模层面的范畴化，得到了模空间上同调之间的关系，且该关系与CoHA作用相容。

Conclusion: 给出了链接/去链接操作纯表示论的解释，为扭结-箭图对应提供了更深层的范畴化理解。

Abstract: The knots-quivers correspondence is a relation between knot invariants and enumerative invariants of quivers, which in particular translates the knot operations of linking and unlinking to a certain mutation operation on quivers. In this paper we show that the moduli spaces of a quiver and its linking/unlinking are naturally related, giving a purely representation theoretic interpretation of these operations. We obtain a relation between the cohomologies of these spaces which is moreover compatible with a natural action of the Cohomological Hall Algebra. The result is a categorification of quiver linking/unlinking at the level of CoHA modules.

</details>


<div id='physics.comp-ph'></div>

# physics.comp-ph [[Back]](#toc)

### [861] [Mixed Steklov-Neumann problem: asymptotic analysis and applications to diffusion-controlled reactions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00213)
*Denis S. Grebenkov*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文研究了混合Steklov-Neumann谱问题，通过积分算子方法推导了当Steklov边界子集尺寸趋零时的渐近行为，并验证了数值精度，进而应用于第一通过程和扩散控制反应，特别扩展了窄逃逸问题至更复杂的表面反应。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为了理解当Steklov边界条件施加于光滑边界上的连通子集且该子集尺寸趋零时，混合Steklov-Neumann谱问题的渐近行为，并揭示其在第一通过程和扩散控制反应中的应用价值。

Method: 将原始问题重新表述为积分算子形式，其核为限制在子集上的Green函数（或伪Green函数）；通过分析核在边界上的奇异行为推导特征值和特征函数的渐近公式；在圆盘弧和球面帽两个基本例子上进行数值求解验证。

Result: 得到了Steklov-Neumann问题特征值和特征函数的渐近公式；数值验证表明这些公式即使子集尺寸不小也具有高精度；将谱结果应用于平均首次反应时间的小目标极限；量化了多次失败反应尝试的效应，得到通用函数。

Conclusion: 所提出的渐近分析方法有效且高精度，其谱结果可推广至更复杂的表面反应场景，超越传统窄逃逸问题的适用范围。

Abstract: We consider the mixed Steklov-Neumann spectral problem for the modified Helmholtz equation in a bounded domain when the Steklov condition is imposed on a connected subset of the smooth boundary. In order to deduce the asymptotic behavior in the limit when the size of the subset goes to zero, we reformulate the original problem in terms of an integral operator whose kernel is the restriction of a suitable Green's function (or pseudo-Green's function) to the subset. Its singular behavior on the boundary yields the asymptotic formulas for the eigenvalues and eigenfunctions of the Steklov-Neumann problem. While this analysis remains at a formal level, it is supported by extensive numerical results for two basic examples: an arc on the boundary of a disk and a spherical cap on the boundary of a ball. Solving the original Steklov-Neumann problem numerically in these domains, we validate the asymptotic formulas and reveal their high accuracy, even when the subset is not small. A straightforward application of these spectral results to first-passage processes and diffusion-controlled reactions is presented. We revisit the small-target limit of the mean first-reaction time on perfectly or partially reactive targets. The effect of multiple failed reaction attempts is quantified by a universal function for the whole range of reactivities. Moreover, we extend these results to more sophisticated surface reactions that go beyond the conventional narrow escape problem.

</details>


### [862] [Fast and scalable finite-element based approach for density functional theory calculations using projector-augmented wave method](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00504)
*Kartick Ramakrishnan,Sambit Das,Phani Motamarri*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于有限元离散的投影缀加波（PAW）方法的局域实空间计算框架，通过Chebyshev滤波子空间迭代和低秩扰动策略高效求解广义本征问题，在保持精度的前提下，相比平面波方法实现了5-10倍的计算加速，并支持超过50,000电子的大规模DFT模拟。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的平面波PAW方法在计算大尺度体系时计算成本高昂，而传统实空间方法难以兼顾PAW形式的高效率和系统性可改进性。作者希望开发一种实空间PAW框架，既能利用PAW形式处理光滑电子场的优势，又能借助高阶有限元基组的系统性可改进性，实现高效且可扩展的大规模电子结构计算。

Method: 采用局域实空间有限元离散化PAW方法，利用Chebyshev滤波子空间迭代（CheFSI）求解广义本征问题；通过有限元基重叠矩阵的低秩扰动结合降阶求积规则高效求逆PAW重叠矩阵；利用离散化PAW哈密顿矩阵和重叠矩阵的局域与非局域部分的稀疏性。

Result: 在周期性和非周期性系统的代表性算例上验证了精度；相比先进平面波方法，在中大规模体系（约6,000-35,000电子）上实现了约5-10倍的计算加速；相比基于有限元离散的模守恒赝势计算，自由度显著减少，实现超过50,000电子规模DFT模拟且计算成本降低一个数量级。

Conclusion: 提出的PAW-FE方法是首个结合PAW形式与高阶有限元基组的实空间DFT方案，在保持精度的同时大幅提升计算效率，为大规模电子结构模拟提供了一种有前景的替代方案。

Abstract: In this work, we present a computationally efficient methodology that utilizes a local real-space formulation of the projector augmented wave (PAW) method discretized with a finite-element (FE) basis to enable accurate and large-scale electronic structure calculations. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first real-space approach for DFT calculations, combining the efficiency of PAW formalism involving smooth electronic fields with the ability of systematically improvable higher-order finite-element basis to achieve significant computational gains. In particular, we have developed efficient strategies for solving the underlying FE discretized PAW generalized eigenproblem by employing the Chebyshev filtered subspace iteration approach to compute the desired eigenspace in each self-consistent field iteration. These strategies leverage the low-rank perturbation of the FE basis overlap matrix in conjunction with reduced order quadrature rules to invert the discretized PAW overlap matrix while also exploiting the sparsity of both the local and non-local parts of the discretized PAW Hamiltonian and overlap matrices. Using the proposed approach, we benchmark the accuracy and performance on various representative examples involving periodic and non-periodic systems with plane-wave-based PAW implementations. Furthermore, we also demonstrate a considerable computational advantage ($\sim$ 5$\times$ -- 10$\times$) over state-of-the-art plane-wave methods for medium to large-scale systems ($\sim$ 6,000 -- 35,000 electrons). Finally, we show that our approach (PAW-FE) significantly reduces the degrees of freedom to achieve the desired accuracy, thereby enabling large-scale DFT simulations ($>$ 50,000 electrons) at an order of magnitude lower computational cost compared to norm-conserving pseudopotential calculations using finite-element discretized calculations.

</details>


### [863] [Hyperboloidal Method for Quasinormal Modes of Non-Relativistic Operators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.01487)
*Christopher Burgess,Friedrich Koenig*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文扩展了最近报道的紧致化超曲面方法，将其从相对论领域推广到非相对论领域，展示了该方法在计算薛定谔方程的准正规模式以及解决相关束缚态问题中的应用，并讨论了非相对论准正规模式对黑洞光谱学计划的重要性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 紧致化超曲面方法在准正规模式的数值计算中具有广泛应用（涉及引力物理和光学等领域），但该方法原本是相对论性的，作者希望将其推广到非相对论领域，以扩展其适用范围并探索非相对论准正规模式对黑洞光谱学的意义。

Method: 将原本用于相对论领域的紧致化超曲面方法进行推广，使其适用于非相对论领域；具体而言，利用该方法计算薛定谔方程的准正规模式，并解决相关的束缚态问题；同时进一步讨论该方法的泛化能力。

Result: 成功将紧致化超曲面方法从相对论领域扩展到非相对论领域，并验证了其在薛定谔方程的准正规模式计算和束缚态问题中的有效性。

Conclusion: 非相对论准正规模式在黑洞光谱学计划中具有重要意义，该方法为相关研究提供了新的视角和工具。

Abstract: The recently reported compactified hyperboloidal method has found wide use in the numerical computation of quasinormal modes, with implications for fields as diverse as gravitational physics and optics. We extend this intrinsically relativistic method into the non-relativistic domain, demonstrating its use to calculate the quasinormal modes of the Schrödinger equation and solve related bound-state problems. We also describe how to further generalize this method, offering a perspective on the importance of non-relativistic quasinormal modes for the programme of black hole spectroscopy.

</details>


### [864] [Data-Efficient Construction of High-Fidelity Graph Deep Learning Interatomic Potentials](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.00957)
*Tsz Wai Ko,Shyue Ping Ong*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种数据高效的多保真度方法，通过将低保真度GGA计算与少量（10%）高保真度SCAN计算结合训练M3GNet模型，在硅和水体系上实现了与使用8倍数量SCAN数据训练的单保真度模型相当的精度，从而为低成本构建高保真机器学习势能面铺平了道路。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 元GGA泛函（如SCAN）相较于GGA泛函（如PBE）能显著改善原子相互作用的描述，但其计算成本高昂，阻碍了其在机器学习势能开发中的应用。本文旨在通过多保真度学习方法，在利用现有低保真度数据集的基础上，以较低成本实现高保真度MLP的构建。

Method: 采用多保真度M3GNet（Materials 3-body Graph Network）模型，将低保真度GGA（PBE）计算数据与少量（10%）高保真度SCAN计算数据结合训练；以硅和水为测试体系，与使用8倍数量SCAN数据训练的单保真度M3GNet模型进行精度对比。

Result: 多保真度M3GNet模型在仅使用10%高保真度SCAN数据的情况下，达到了与使用8倍SCAN数据训练的单保真度模型相当的精度水平。

Conclusion: 多保真度方法能够显著降低高保真度MLP开发的数据成本，通过利用已有的低保真度数据集，可以经济高效地构建高精度机器学习势能模型。

Abstract: Machine learning potentials (MLPs) have become an indispensable tool in large-scale atomistic simulations because of their ability to reproduce ab initio potential energy surfaces (PESs) very accurately at a fraction of computational cost. For computational efficiency, the training data for most MLPs today are computed using relatively cheap density functional theory (DFT) methods such as the Perdew-Burke-Ernzerhof (PBE) generalized gradient approximation (GGA) functional. Meta-GGAs such as the recently developed strongly constrained and appropriately normed (SCAN) functional have been shown to yield significantly improved descriptions of atomic interactions for diversely bonded systems, but their higher computational cost remains an impediment to their use in MLP development. In this work, we outline a data-efficient multi-fidelity approach to constructing Materials 3-body Graph Network (M3GNet) interatomic potentials that integrate different levels of theory within a single model. Using silicon and water as examples, we show that a multi-fidelity M3GNet model trained on a combined dataset of low-fidelity GGA calculations with 10% of high-fidelity SCAN calculations can achieve accuracies comparable to a single-fidelity M3GNet model trained on a dataset comprising 8x the number of SCAN calculations. This work paves the way for the development of high-fidelity MLPs in a cost-effective manner by leveraging existing low-fidelity datasets.

</details>


### [865] [Hyperparameter Optimization for Atomic Cluster Expansion Potentials](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00656)
*Daniel F. Thomas du Toit,Yuxing Zhou,Volker L. Deringer*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文介绍了基于ACE框架的机器学习势能模型的超参数自动化优化方法，并通过扩展XPOT包、系统扫描超参数空间，在Si和Sb₂Te₃两个体系中验证了该方法对优化ML势函数形式和复杂度的重要性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: ML势能模型的性能高度依赖于超参数选择，现有方法缺乏系统性和自动化手段，因此需要开发一种自动化的超参数优化流程，以提升ACE势模型的准确性和泛化能力。

Method: 扩展开源XPOT Python包，集成ACE势拟合接口；通过系统扫描相关超参数空间，对势模型的功能形式和复杂度进行优化；在硅（共价网络）和Sb₂Te₃（相变材料）两个典型体系中验证该方法。

Result: 成功实现了ACE势超参数的自动化优化，在两个不同性质的体系（共价键Si和相变材料Sb₂Te₃）中均展现出良好的性能，证明系统化超参数搜索对提升ML势质量至关重要。

Conclusion: 超参数选择是开发先进ML势模型的关键环节，本文提出的自动化优化方法为ACE框架及更广泛的ML势领域提供了一种有效的超参数调优策略。

Abstract: Machine-learning-based interatomic potentials enable accurate materials simulations on extended time- and lengthscales. ML potentials based on the Atomic Cluster Expansion (ACE) framework have recently shown promising performance for this purpose. Here, we describe a largely automated computational approach to optimizing hyperparameters for ACE potential models. We extend our openly available Python package, XPOT, to include an interface for ACE fitting, and discuss the optimization of the functional form and complexity of these models based on systematic sweeps across relevant hyperparameters. We showcase the usefulness of the approach for two example systems: the covalent network of silicon and the phase-change material Sb$_{2}$Te$_{3}$. More generally, our work emphasizes the importance of hyperparameter selection in the development of advanced ML potential models.

</details>


### [866] [Simple proof that there is no sign problem in Path Integral Monte Carlo simulations of fermions in one dimension](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.01618)
*Siu A. Chin*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文正式证明了费米子路径积分蒙特卡洛（PIMC）在一维中不存在符号问题，反证了置换采样法即使在一维中仍存在弱符号问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管PIMC模拟一维费米子时已知不存在符号问题，但文献中缺乏直接证明，作者旨在填补这一理论空白。

Method: 通过分析N-费米子反对称自由传播子的符号，将其表示为所有粒子对相对位移的乘积，并证明PIMC所需的闭环传播子乘积中，相邻传播子的相对位移构成完全平方，从而确保闭环乘积为正——该性质仅在一维成立。

Result: 一维PIMC的闭环传播子乘积必然为正，即无符号问题；而置换采样法因未精确计算反对称传播子的行列式，即使在一维中仍存在低水平符号问题。

Conclusion: 该结果为一维费米子PIMC无符号问题提供了严格数学证明，并揭示了置换采样法与精确PIMC在符号问题上的本质差异。

Abstract: It is widely known that there is no sign problem in Path Integral Monte Carlo (PIMC) simulations of fermions in one dimension. Yet, as far as the author is aware, there is no direct proof of this in the literature. This work shows that the $sign$ of the $N$-fermion anti-symmetric free propagator is given by the product of all possible pairs of particle separations, or relative displacements. For a non-vanishing closed-loop product of such propagators, as required by PIMC, all relative displacements from adjacent propagators are paired into perfect squares, and therefore the loop product must be positive, but only in one dimension. By comparison, permutation sampling, which does not evaluate the determinant of the anti-symmetric propagator exactly, remains plagued by a low-level sign problem, even in one dimension.

</details>


### [867] [The role of sputtered atom and ion energy distribution in films deposited by Physical Vapor Deposition: A molecular dynamics approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.01049)
*Soumya Atmane,Maroussiak Alexandre,Amaël Caillard,Anne-Lise Thomann,Movaffaq Kateb,Jón Tómas Gudmundsson,Pascal Brault*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文通过分子动力学模拟，比较了恒能中性束、热蒸发、直流磁控溅射、高功率脉冲磁控溅射（HiPIMS）和双极HiPIMS等物理气相沉积技术对铜薄膜生长的影响。研究表明，不同技术在薄膜质量、生长速率和衬底侵蚀方面存在显著差异。双极HiPIMS在特定条件下具有改善薄膜结构的潜力，但衬底侵蚀加剧。其中，含10% Cu+离子的双极+180V HiPIMS在结晶度和原子应力方面表现最佳。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 不同物理气相沉积（PVD）技术对薄膜质量、生长速率和衬底侵蚀的影响差异显著，但目前缺乏对这些技术进行系统比较的研究，尤其是双极HiPIMS等新兴技术的表现尚不明确。

Method: 采用分子动力学（MD）模拟方法，利用实验测定的能量分布函数来建模不同沉积过程，对比恒能中性束、热蒸发、直流磁控溅射、HiPIMS和双极HiPIMS五种PVD技术下铜薄膜的生长行为。

Result: 不同PVD技术在薄膜质量、生长速率和衬底侵蚀方面存在显著差异。双极HiPIMS在特定条件下可改善薄膜结构但增加衬底侵蚀；含10% Cu+离子的双极+180V HiPIMS在所有技术中展现出最佳的结晶度和原子应力性能。

Conclusion: 双极HiPIMS，特别是双极+180V HiPIMS（含10% Cu+离子），在优化铜薄膜的结晶度和降低原子应力方面具有显著优势，是所研究PVD技术中最有潜力的方法，但需注意其增加的衬底侵蚀问题。

Abstract: We present a comparative study of copper film growth with a constant energy neutral beam, thermal evaporation, dc magnetron sputtering, high-power impulse magnetron sputtering (HiP-IMS), and bipolar HiPIMS, through molecular dynamics simulations. Experimentally determined energy distribution functions were utilized to model the deposition processes. Our results indicate significant differences in the film quality, growth rate, and substrate erosion between the various physical vapor deposition techniques. Bipolar HiPIMS shows the potential for improved film structure under certain conditions, albeit with increased substrate erosion. Bipolar +180 V HiPIMS with 10% Cu + ions exhibited the best film properties in terms of crystallinity and atomic stress among the PVD processes investigated.

</details>


### [868] [An iterative Monte Carlo method to solve nonlinear second-order differential equations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.00742)
*Martín Chávez-Páez,Enrique González-Tovar,Guillermo Iván Guerrero-García*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种迭代蒙特卡洛算法，用于求解带有狄利克雷边界条件的非线性二阶微分方程，并给出了使用示例。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 蒙特卡洛方法在多个领域广泛应用，但现有方法在处理非线性二阶微分方程方面仍有不足，需要更通用的求解算法。

Method: 提出了一个迭代蒙特卡洛算法，专门用于求解带有狄利克雷边界条件的非常一般的非线性二阶微分方程。

Result: 报告了一个算法使用示例，但摘要未提供具体数值结果或性能对比。

Conclusion: 该迭代蒙特卡洛算法能有效处理非线性二阶微分方程，扩展了蒙特卡洛方法的应用范围。

Abstract: The Monte Carlo method is a thriving and mathematically beautiful numerical technique used extensively, nowadays, to deal with many demanding problems in diverse fields. Here, we present an iterative Monte Carlo algorithm to work out very general nonlinear second-order differential equations, with Dirichlet boundary conditions. An example of its usage is, also, reported.

</details>


### [869] [Kubernetes Deployment Options for On-Prem Clusters](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.01620)
*Lincoln Bryant,Robert W. Gardner,Fengping Hu,David Jordan,Ryan P. Taylor*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文比较了三种主流本地部署Kubernetes集群的策略：Kubeadm+Kubespray、OpenShift/OKD和Rancher (K3S/RKE2)，为系统管理员选择本地Kubernetes部署方案提供参考。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Kubernetes已成为科学工作流的关键基础设施，但本地部署生产级集群对系统管理员而言存在诸多挑战（如商业云环境中的专有集成在本地环境中需要替代方案），因此需要对比不同部署策略以指导实践。

Method: 对比分析三种部署策略：1) Kubeadm配合Kubespray；2) OpenShift/OKD；3) Rancher (通过K3S/RKE2)。

Result: 文章尚未给出具体结果，但预期将呈现三种策略在部署复杂度、功能完整性、运维成本等方面的对比结论。

Conclusion: 旨在帮助系统管理员根据自身需求选择最适合的本地Kubernetes部署方案。

Abstract: Over the last decade, the Kubernetes container orchestration platform has become essential to many scientific workflows. Despite its popularity, deploying a production-ready Kubernetes cluster on-premises can be challenging for system administrators. Many of the proprietary integrations that application developers take for granted in commercial cloud environments must be replaced with alternatives when deployed locally. This article will compare three popular deployment strategies for sites deploying Kubernetes on-premise: Kubeadm with Kubespray, OpenShift / OKD and Rancher via K3S/RKE2.

</details>


### [870] [Two-stage initial-value iterative physics-informed neural networks for simulating solitary waves of nonlinear wave equations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.01124)
*Jin Song,Ming Zhong,George Em Karniadakis,Zhenya Yan*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 提出了一种两阶段初值迭代神经网络（IINN）算法，结合传统数值迭代方法与物理信息神经网络（PINNs），仅需初值即可求解非线性波动方程的孤立波解，并在多种非线性波方程上验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统数值迭代方法求解非线性波动方程的孤立波解时，通常需要边界条件等额外数据信息，而现有的PINNs方法也存在数据依赖问题。本文旨在提出一种仅依赖初值、无需边界条件的神经网络方法，以更高效地计算孤立波解。

Method: 提出两阶段初值迭代神经网络（IINN）框架：第一阶段用一个子网络拟合给定的初始值；第二阶段在第一个子网络基础上引入物理信息继续训练，无需任何额外数据（包括边界条件）。同时提供了相应的理论保证。

Result: 成功应用于一维/二维/三维NLS方程（含/不含势能）、一维饱和NLS方程（PT对称光晶格）、一维聚焦-散焦耦合NLS方程、KdV方程、二维修正GP方程、(2+1)维KP方程等多种非线性波动方程，均能有效学习孤立波解。与传统方法对比展现了优势。

Conclusion: IINN方法仅依赖初值即可高效求解多种非线性波动方程的孤立波解，具有广泛的适用性和优越性，为孤立波计算提供了一种新的有效途径。

Abstract: We propose a new two-stage initial-value iterative neural network (IINN) algorithm for solitary wave computations of nonlinear wave equations based on traditional numerical iterative methods and physics-informed neural networks (PINNs). Specifically, the IINN framework consists of two subnetworks, one of which is used to fit a given initial value, and the other incorporates physical information and continues training on the basis of the first subnetwork. Importantly, the IINN method does not require any additional data information including boundary conditions, apart from the given initial value. Corresponding theoretical guarantees are provided to demonstrate the effectiveness of our IINN method. The proposed IINN method is efficiently applied to learn some types of solutions in different nonlinear wave equations, including the one-dimensional (1D) nonlinear Schrödinger equations (NLS) equation (with and without potentials), the 1D saturable NLS equation with PT -symmetric optical lattices, the 1D focusing-defocusing coupled NLS equations, the KdV equation, the two-dimensional (2D) NLS equation with potentials, the 2D amended GP equation with a potential, the (2+1)-dimensional KP equation, and the 3D NLS equation with a potential. These applications serve as evidence for the efficacy of our method. Finally, by comparing with the traditional methods, we demonstrate the advantages of the proposed IINN method.

</details>


### [871] [Exact average many-body interatomic interaction model for random alloys](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.01216)
*Max Hodapp*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文发展了一种基于线性机器学习原子间势的统计平均模型，通过对特征向量的高阶统计量进行解析展开，将随机合金中材料性质的计算简化为单晶计算，从而绕过了随机采样的需求。该模型成功预测了NbMoTaW中熵合金中紧凑螺旋位错核心结构，与密度泛函理论一致，优于传统的平均嵌入原子方法势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随机合金中变形机制的物理起源需要同时理解其平均行为和局域涨落的作用。然而，直接通过随机构型模拟计算某些材料性质（特别是多缺陷之间的相互作用能）非常困难，甚至不清楚如何通过随机采样正确计算。

Method: 在线性机器学习原子间势的框架下，利用高阶统计量工具，推导出平均多体原子能量的解析展开式，该展开式以特征向量的平均张量积表示，且计算复杂度与原子邻域大小呈线性关系。为避免形成高阶张量，采用等变张量网络势实现，在取平均之前先将特征向量收缩为小尺寸张量。

Result: 该平均模型成功预测了NbMoTaW中熵合金中紧凑的螺旋位错核心结构，与密度泛函理论结果一致；而传统的平均嵌入原子方法势则预测出人为极化的位错核心。

Conclusion: 该平均模型有望用于理解随机合金材料性质的机理起源，以及开发具有预测能力的力学性质模型。

Abstract: Understanding the physical origin of deformation mechanisms in random alloys requires an understanding of their average behavior and, equally important, the role of local fluctuations around the average. Material properties of random alloys can be computed using direct simulations on random configurations but some properties are very difficult to compute, for others it is not even fully understood how to compute them using random sampling, in particular, interaction energies between multiple defects. To that end, we develop an atomistic model that does the averaging on the level of interatomic potentials. Then, the problem of averaging via random sampling is bypassed since computing material properties on random configurations reduces to computing material properties on a single crystal, the average alloy.
  We develop our average model on the class of linear machine-learning interatomic potentials. To that end, using tools from higher-order statistics, we derive an analytic expansion of the average many-body per-atom energy in terms of average tensor products of the feature vectors that scales linearly with the size of an atomic neighborhood. In order to avoid forming higher-order tensors composed of products of feature vectors, we develop an implementation using equivariant tensor network potentials in which the feature vectors are contracted to small-sized tensors before taking the average. We show that our average model predicts the compact screw dislocation core structure in the NbMoTaW medium-entropy alloy, in agreement with density functional theory, as opposed to state-of-the-art average embedded atom method potentials that predict artificial polarized cores. Hence, we anticipate that our model will become useful for understanding mechanistic origins of material properties and for developing predictive models of mechanical properties of random alloys.

</details>


### [872] [Efficient Forward-Mode Algorithmic Derivatives of Geant4](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.02966)
*Max Aehle,Xuan Tung Nguyen,Mihály Novák,Tommaso Dorigo,Nicolas R. Gauger,Jan Kieseler,Markus Klute,Vassil Vassilev*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文将基于运算符重载的前向模式算法微分（AD）工具应用于蒙特卡洛粒子模拟工具包Geant4，实现了对用户定义输出相对于输入的均值路径导数的计算，为高能物理及其他领域的基于梯度的优化技术奠定了基础。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 实现Geant4应用的梯度计算，从而支持高能物理及其他领域中基于梯度的优化方法。

Method: 采用运算符重载的前向模式算法微分（AD）技术，对Geant4进行微分处理，构建可计算路径导数的原型系统。

Result: 成功构建了微分版Geant4原型，能够计算用户定义输出关于输入的均值路径导数，并获得了初步分析结果。

Conclusion: 这是将运算符重载AD应用于Geant4的技术初步报告，证明了可行性，后续将进行更精细的分析。

Abstract: We have applied an operator-overloading forward-mode algorithmic differentiation tool to the Monte-Carlo particle simulation toolkit Geant4. Our differentiated version of Geant4 allows computing mean pathwise derivatives of user-defined outputs of Geant4 applications with respect to user-defined inputs. This constitutes a major step towards enabling gradient-based optimization techniques in high-energy physics, as well as other application domains of Geant4.
  This is a preliminary report on the technical aspects of applying operator-overloading AD to Geant4, as well as a first analysis of some results obtained by our differentiated Geant4 prototype. We plan to follow up with a more refined analysis.

</details>


### [873] [Multi-frequency Neural Born Iterative Method for Solving 2-D Inverse Scattering Problems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.01315)
*Daoqi Liu,Tao Shan,Maokun Li,Fan Yang,Shenheng Xu*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的多频电磁逆散射成像方法——多频神经波恩迭代法（NeuralBIM），通过结合多任务学习与物理约束的无监督训练，实现了高精度、高效率且抗噪性强的逆散射求解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统多频电磁逆散射问题求解精度和计算效率有限，需要一种结合深度学习与电磁物理规律的新方法，以充分利用多频数据的互补信息，提升重建质量。

Method: 基于单频NeuralBIM原理扩展至多频场景，采用多任务学习框架，通过同方差不确定性（homoscedastic uncertainty）自适应分配各频率数据权重；使用受ISP物理定律约束的无监督学习方式进行训练，无需对比度与总场标签数据。

Result: 在合成数据与实验数据上均验证了有效性，相比传统方法在精度和计算效率上均有提升；模型展现出良好的泛化能力与噪声鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 多频NeuralBIM为多频电磁逆散射问题提供了一种新颖且有效的解决方案，拓展了深度学习在多频EM数据反演中的应用路径。

Abstract: In this work, we propose a deep learning-based imaging method for addressing the multi-frequency electromagnetic (EM) inverse scattering problem (ISP). By combining deep learning technology with EM physical laws, we have successfully developed a multi-frequency neural Born iterative method (NeuralBIM), guided by the principles of the single-frequency NeuralBIM. This method integrates multitask learning techniques with NeuralBIM's efficient iterative inversion process to construct a robust multi-frequency Born iterative inversion model. During training, the model employs a multitask learning approach guided by homoscedastic uncertainty to adaptively allocate the weights of each frequency's data. Additionally, an unsupervised learning method, constrained by the physical laws of ISP, is used to train the multi-frequency NeuralBIM model, eliminating the need for contrast and total field data. The effectiveness of the multi-frequency NeuralBIM is validated through synthetic and experimental data, demonstrating improvements in accuracy and computational efficiency for solving ISP. Moreover, this method exhibits strong generalization capabilities and noise resistance. The multi-frequency NeuralBIM method explores a novel inversion method for multi-frequency EM data and provides an effective solution for the electromagnetic ISP of multi-frequency data.

</details>


### [874] [PLIC-Net: A Machine Learning Approach for 3D Interface Reconstruction in Volume of Fluid Methods](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.01383)
*Andrew Cahaly,Fabien Evrard,Olivier Desjardins*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文提出PLIC-Net，一种基于前馈深度神经网络的PLIC平面重构方法，利用3×3×3模板内的体积分数和相心数据预测法向量，在保持体积守恒的同时，相比传统(E)LVIRA算法能有效减少伪平面生成、实现更干净的界面破碎，且计算成本更低，证明了机器学习在VOF界面重构中的可行性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的PLIC方法依赖复杂优化算法和精心设计的启发式策略来选择平面或抛物面，计算成本高且可能产生伪平面。机器学习模型有潜力以更低成本提供广泛适用的界面重构方案，因此作者希望探索机器学习在VOF界面重构中的可行性。

Method: 使用前馈深度神经网络，以3×3×3模板内的体积分数和相心数据为输入，预测PLIC平面的法向量；通过平移保证体积精确守恒；网络被设计为对笛卡尔平面反射具有等变性；训练数据采用约10^6个随机抛物面解析生成，覆盖广泛界面形状。

Result: PLIC-Net在多相流模拟中与标准(E)LVIRA算法对比，显著减少了伪平面的形成，实现了更干净的界面数值破碎；同时计算成本低于(E)LVIRA；训练数据统计特征对性能有影响。

Conclusion: 机器学习是VOF界面重构的可行方法，在某些情况下优于传统重构算法，PLIC-Net在计算效率和重构质量上均有优势。

Abstract: The accurate reconstruction of immiscible fluid-fluid interfaces from the volume fraction field is a critical component of geometric Volume of Fluid (VOF) methods. A common strategy is the Piecewise Linear Interface Calculation (PLIC), which fits a plane in each mixed-phase computational cell. However, recent work goes beyond PLIC by using two planes or even a paraboloid. To select such planes or paraboloids, complex optimization algorithms as well as carefully crafted heuristics are necessary. Yet, the potential exists for a well-trained machine learning model to efficiently provide broadly applicable solutions to the interface reconstruction problem at lower costs. In this work, the viability of a machine learning approach is demonstrated in the context of a single plane reconstruction. A feed-forward deep neural network is used to predict the normal vector of a PLIC plane given volume fraction and phasic barycenter data in a $3\times3\times3$ stencil. The PLIC plane is then translated in its cell to ensure exact volume conservation. Our proposed neural network PLIC reconstruction (PLIC-Net) is equivariant to reflections about the Cartesian planes. Training data is analytically generated with $\mathcal{O}(10^6)$ randomized paraboloid surfaces, which allows for sampling a wide range of interface shapes. PLIC-Net is tested in multiphase flow simulations where it is compared to standard (E)LVIRA reconstruction algorithms, and the impact of training data statistics on PLIC-Net's performance is also explored. It is found that PLIC-Net greatly limits the formation of spurious planes and generates cleaner numerical break-up of the interface. Additionally, the computational cost of PLIC-Net is lower than that of (E)LVIRA. These results establish that machine learning is a viable approach to VOF interface reconstruction and is superior to current reconstruction algorithms for some cases.

</details>


### [875] [The qspec Python package: A physics toolbox for laser spectroscopy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.01417)
*Patrick Müller,Wilfried Nörtershäuser*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: qspec是一个为激光光谱学及相关领域设计的Python包，提供物理公式、仿真和数据分析函数，支持numpy数组加速计算，包含多维线性回归、线型模型拟合和原子时间演化仿真等功能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在激光光谱学研究中，实验数据分析需要大量重复编写相同功能的Python脚本，缺乏一个统一、高效的函数库来提高代码复用率和开发效率。

Method: 开发了一个Python包qspec，包含：1）与numpy兼容的物理公式和数据分析函数；2）多维线性回归算法支持King plot分析；3）模块化线型模型框架用于拟合光谱数据；4）仿真模块提供无需显式推导哈密顿量的原子相干时间演化模拟方法。

Result: qspec包提供了激光光谱学常用的物理公式、仿真和数据分析功能，支持快速的大样本数据计算，能够进行多原子跃迁的King plot分析，拟合大规模光谱数据集，以及便捷地模拟原子在电磁场中的相干时间演化。

Conclusion: qspec作为一个开源Python包，为激光光谱学领域的研究人员提供了一套标准化的计算工具，减少了重复编码工作，提高了研究效率。

Abstract: The analysis of experimental results with Python often requires writing many code scripts which all need access to the same set of functions. In a common field of research, this set will be nearly the same for many users. The qspec Python package was developed to provide functions for physical formulas, simulations and data analysis routines widely used in laser spectroscopy and related fields. Most functions are compatible with numpy arrays, enabling fast calculations with large samples of data. A multidimensional linear regression algorithm enables a King plot analyses over multiple atomic transitions. A modular framework for constructing lineshape models can be used to fit large sets of spectroscopy data. A simulation module within the package provides user-friendly methods to simulate the coherent time-evolution of atoms in electro-magnetic fields without the need to explicitly derive a Hamiltonian.

</details>


### [876] [Computational Self-Assembly of a Six-Fold Chiral Quasicrystal](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.01984)
*Nydia Roxana Varela-Rosales,Michael Engel*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文通过分子动力学模拟，在二维粒子体系中利用Lennard-Jones-Gauss对势和周期性基底势，自组装形成了六重手性准晶，并通过衍射图案和序参量确认了手性对称性，揭示了基底势深度和温度对准晶结构（包括拼贴结构、对称性和漫散射程度）的关键影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 准晶作为一种具有长程有序但不具周期性的独特材料，已在金属合金、软物质和粒子模拟中被观察到。与周期性晶体不同，准晶的对称性需要在倒易空间中用空间群描述。现有研究对于手性准晶（尤其是六重对称手性准晶）的自组装机制尚不清晰，外部场（如基底势）在调控准晶结构中的作用也缺乏深入理解。

Method: 采用分子动力学（MD）模拟，构建二维粒子系统；粒子间相互作用采用Lennard-Jones-Gauss（LJG）对势；施加周期性基底势场；通过衍射图案和序参量确认手性对称性；分析不同基底势深度和温度下准晶的拼贴结构、对称性和漫散射特征。

Result: 成功自组装出六重手性准晶；通过衍射图案和序参量证实了手性对称性；在实空间和倒易空间均观察到独特的局部基序；基底势深度和温度对准晶的拼贴结构、对称性以及漫散射程度具有显著调控作用。

Conclusion: 本研究揭示了手性准晶形成的机制，阐明了外部场（基底势）在定制准晶结构中的潜力，为通过外加场调控复杂准晶材料的设计提供了新的理论依据和计算方案。

Abstract: Quasicrystals are unique materials characterized by long-range order without periodicity. They are observed in systems such as metallic alloys, soft matter, and particle simulations. Unlike periodic crystals, which are invariant under real-space symmetry operations, quasicrystals possess symmetry that requires description by a space group in reciprocal space. In this study, we report the self-assembly of a six-fold chiral quasicrystal using molecular dynamics simulations of a two-dimensional particle system. The particles interact via the Lennard-Jones-Gauss pair potential and are subjected to a periodic substrate potential. We confirm the presence of chiral symmetry through diffraction patterns and order parameters, revealing unique local motifs in both real and reciprocal space. The quasicrystal's properties, including the tiling structure and symmetry and the extent of diffuse scattering, are strongly influenced by substrate potential depth and temperature. Our results provide insights into the mechanisms of chiral quasicrystal formation and the role and potential of external fields in tailoring quasicrystal structures.

</details>


### [877] [Peering inside the black box: Learning the relevance of many-body functions in Neural Network potentials](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.04526)
*Klara Bonneau,Jonas Lederer,Clark Templeton,David Rosenberger,Klaus-Robert Müller,Cecilia Clementi*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文针对图神经网络粗粒化势函数可解释性不足的问题，引入可解释人工智能（XAI）工具，将神经网络势分解为不同阶数的相关性贡献，并在甲烷、水和NTL9蛋白三个体系上验证了该方法能够提供物理洞察。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统机器学习势函数虽然精确，但其神经网络推理出的能量缺乏可解释性，不如传统简单函数形式直观。作者希望解决这一问题，使基于图神经网络的粗粒化势函数变得可解释。

Method: 将可解释人工智能（XAI）领域的最新工具扩展到基于图神经网络（GNN）的粗粒化势函数中，将网络预测的能量分解为不同阶数的相关性贡献（relevance contributions）。

Result: 在甲烷、水两种流体和NTL9蛋白三个不同粗粒化体系上，神经网络势函数可以被成功分解为不同阶数的可解释相关性贡献，并从中提取物理洞察。

Conclusion: XAI方法能够有效解释图神经网络粗粒化势函数的预测结果，使这类机器学习势函数兼具精度与可解释性，为复杂体系的物理理解提供新途径。

Abstract: Machine learned potentials are becoming a popular tool to define an effective energy model for complex systems, either incorporating electronic structure effects at the atomistic resolution, or effectively renormalizing part of the atomistic degrees of freedom at a coarse-grained resolution. One of the main criticisms to machine learned potentials is that the energy inferred by the network is not as interpretable as in more traditional approaches where a simpler functional form is used. Here we address this problem by extending tools recently proposed in the nascent field of Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) to coarse-grained potentials based on graph neural networks (GNN). We demonstrate the approach on three different coarse-grained systems including two fluids (methane and water) and the protein NTL9. On these examples, we show that the neural network potentials can be in practice decomposed in relevance contributions to different orders, that can be directly interpreted and provide physical insights on the systems of interest.

</details>


### [878] [Causality-guided adaptive sampling method for physics-informed neural networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.01536)
*Shuning Lin,Yong Chen*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种因果引导的自适应采样（Causal AS）方法用于物理信息神经网络（PINNs），通过加权PDE残差指导配点选择，并引入时间对齐驱动更新（TADU）方案动态调整超参数，在多个时间依赖方程上取得了比Causal R3更优的精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: PINNs中配点的选择和分布对其性能至关重要，且因果训练是当前流行的训练模式。现有方法在因果训练框架下缺乏高效的自适应采样策略，且超参数通常固定为常数，缺乏动态调整机制。

Method: 1) 利用因果训练的特性，以加权PDE残差作为指标选择配点，聚焦于训练区域内残差较大的区域；2) 提出时间对齐驱动更新（TADU）方案，实现对超参数p的动态更新而非固定常数；3) 每次自适应采样后释放已选配点，避免累积效应并降低计算成本；4) 结合时间推进技术，通过傅里叶展开嵌入输入坐标严格施加周期边界条件。

Result: 将Causal AS方法应用于Allen-Cahn、NLS、KdV和mKdV等多个时间依赖方程，预测解与真实解高度吻合。与Causal R3方法相比，所提方法在精度上表现出显著优势。

Conclusion: Causal AS方法能有效提升PINNs在因果训练模式下的求解精度，动态超参数更新和配点释放机制有助于提高训练效率和模型性能。

Abstract: Compared to purely data-driven methods, a key feature of physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) - a proven powerful tool for solving partial differential equations (PDEs) - is the embedding of PDE constraints into the loss function. The selection and distribution of collocation points for evaluating PDE residuals are critical to the performance of PINNs. Furthermore, the causal training is currently a popular training mode. In this work, we propose the causality-guided adaptive sampling (Causal AS) method for PINNs. Given the characteristics of causal training, we use the weighted PDE residuals as the indicator for the selection of collocation points to focus on areas with larger PDE residuals within the regions being trained. For the hyper-parameter $p$ involved, we develop the temporal alignment driven update (TADU) scheme for its dynamic update beyond simply fixing it as a constant. The collocation points selected at each time will be released before the next adaptive sampling step to avoid the cumulative effects caused by previously chosen collocation points and reduce computational costs. To illustrate the effectiveness of the Causal AS method, we apply it to solve time-dependent equations, including the Allen-Cahn equation, the NLS equation, the KdV equation and the mKdV equation. During the training process, we employe a time-marching technique and strictly impose the periodic boundary conditions by embedding the input coordinates into Fourier expansion to mitigate optimization challenges. Numerical results indicate that the predicted solution achieves an excellent agreement with the ground truth. Compared to a similar work, the causal extension of R3 sampling (Causal R3), our proposed Causal AS method demonstrates a significant advantage in accuracy.

</details>


### [879] [Distilling Machine Learning's Added Value: Pareto Fronts in Atmospheric Applications](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.02161)
*Tom Beucler,Arthur Grundner,Sara Shamekh,Peter Ukkonen,Matthew Chantry,Ryan Lagerquist*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文提出通过Pareto最优模型层次（在误差-复杂度平面上定义）来解释机器学习在天气和气候应用中的附加价值，并在云覆盖参数化、短波辐射传输模拟和热带降水关系建模三个案例中展示了该方法如何揭示系统复杂性、提炼物理理解并提升模型可信度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管机器学习（尤其是深度学习）在天气和气候应用中表现出性能提升，但解释其"附加价值"（即为何以及如何带来改进）仍然困难。现有研究多关注性能指标，缺乏系统性的解释框架。受气候模型层次结构启发，作者希望建立一种可解释的方法论来揭示复杂模型为何有效。

Method: 提出在误差-复杂度平面上构建Pareto最优模型层次的方法：从半经验模型到深度学习算法，系统性地比较不同复杂度模型的性能，识别哪些物理特征和结构带来了真正的性能增益。通过三个案例（云覆盖参数化、短波辐射传输仿真、热带降水与对流组织关系）验证该框架。

Result: 1）云覆盖参数化中，神经网络发现了非线性关系和被忽略的特征（如相对湿度垂直梯度），这些知识被凝练成一个仅含十个参数的方程，性能媲美深度学习模型；2）短波辐射传输中，揭示了双向垂直连接对多云层吸收和散射建模的关键性；3）降水建模中，强调了对流组织信息的重要性，以及在高分辨率空间信息缺失时时间记忆的补充作用。

Conclusion: 通过Pareto最优性将数据驱动模型与现有方案直接比较，可以层次化地揭示系统复杂性，促进过程理解，提升机器学习模型在大气科学应用中的可信度。该方法不仅有助于理解"黑箱"模型的附加价值，还能指导更透明、物理可解释的模型开发。

Abstract: The added value of machine learning for weather and climate applications is measurable through performance metrics, but explaining it remains challenging, particularly for large deep learning models. Inspired by climate model hierarchies, we propose that a full hierarchy of Pareto-optimal models, defined within an appropriately determined error-complexity plane, can guide model development and help understand the models' added value. We demonstrate the use of Pareto fronts in atmospheric physics through three sample applications, with hierarchies ranging from semi-empirical models with minimal parameters to deep learning algorithms. First, in cloud cover parameterization, we find that neural networks identify nonlinear relationships between cloud cover and its thermodynamic environment, and assimilate previously neglected features such as vertical gradients in relative humidity that improve the representation of low cloud cover. This added value is condensed into a ten-parameter equation that rivals deep learning models. Second, we establish a machine learning model hierarchy for emulating shortwave radiative transfer, distilling the importance of bidirectional vertical connectivity for accurately representing absorption and scattering, especially for multiple cloud layers. Third, we emphasize the importance of convective organization information when modeling the relationship between tropical precipitation and its surrounding environment. We discuss the added value of temporal memory when high-resolution spatial information is unavailable, with implications for precipitation parameterization. Therefore, by comparing data-driven models directly with existing schemes using Pareto optimality, we promote process understanding by hierarchically unveiling system complexity, with the hope of improving the trustworthiness of machine learning models in atmospheric applications.

</details>


### [880] [Limit theorems for the neutron transport equation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.04820)
*Eric Dumonteil,Emma Horton,Andreas E. Kyprianou,Andrea Zola*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文针对蒙特卡洛方法中迭代裂变概率（IFP）方法，建立了渐近中子种群矩的严格数学结果，并提出了可用于生产级蒙特卡洛代码验证的简单基准配置及精确解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管IFP方法已广泛应用于反应堆物理中双线性形式的无偏估计（如动力学参数、灵敏度系数），但其渐近中子种群矩（尤其是方差）的理论基础尚不完善，缺乏可用于代码验证的精确基准解。

Method: 从单初始粒子出发的中子裂变链出发，严格推导渐近中子种群的一阶矩（平均值）和二阶矩（方差）的数学表达式；并设计一个简单的基准配置，在此配置下可解析求解这些矩。

Result: 得到了渐近中子种群平均值和方差的严格数学结果；给出了一个简单基准配置下的精确解析解。

Conclusion: 该基准配置可用于生产级蒙特卡洛代码中IFP方法新功能的验证，填补了该领域缺乏标准验证案例的空白。

Abstract: Over the last decade, ingenuous developments in Monte Carlo methods have enabled the unbiased estimation of adjoint-weighted reactor parameters expressed as bilinear forms, such as kinetics parameters and sensitivity coefficients. A prominent example is the Iterated Fission Probability method, which relies on the simulation of the fission chains descending from an ancestor neutron: the neutron population at an asymptotic fission generation yields an estimate of the importance function (and hence of the adjoint fundamental eigenmode) at the phase-space coordinates of the ancestor neutron. In this paper we first establish rigorous results concerning the moments of the asymptotic neutron population stemming from a single initial particle, with special focus on the average and the variance. Then, we propose a simple benchmark configuration where exact solutions are derived for these moments, which can be used for the verification of new functionalities of production Monte Carlo codes involving the Iterated Fission Probability method.

</details>


### [881] [Radiative hydrodynamic equations with nonequilibrium radiative transfer](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.01827)
*Mingyu Quan,Xiaojian Yang,Yufeng Wei,Kun Xu*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种用于辐射等离子体系统中辐射、电子和离子耦合演化的动力学模型，通过GKS求解电子/离子流体动力学和UGKS求解非平衡辐射输运，成功实现了平衡等离子体与非平衡辐射输运的耦合模拟，并在多个测试案例中验证了方法的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决辐射等离子体系统中辐射、电子和离子在多尺度、非平衡条件下的耦合演化问题，现有方法难以同时处理平衡等离子体与非平衡辐射输运的复杂交互。

Method: 采用两种方法求解：气体动力学格式（GKS）用于电子和离子流体动力学，统一气体动力学格式（UGKS）用于非平衡辐射输运。UGKS能够精确捕捉从自由流到扩散的多尺度光子输运，适应不同流体不透明度下的输运行为。

Result: 通过多个测试案例验证模型能力，包括：动力学与扩散区的辐射输运、Marshak波、辐射激波、3T双Lax激波管问题、二维Sedov爆炸波以及二维Tophat问题。

Conclusion: 该方案成功实现了平衡等离子体与非平衡辐射输运的耦合模拟，具备处理多种辐射等离子体场景的能力。

Abstract: This paper presents a kinetic model for the coupled evolution of radiation, electrons, and ions in a radiation plasma system. The model is solved using two methods. The gas-kinetic scheme (GKS) for electron and ion hydrodynamics and the unified gas-kinetic scheme (UGKS) for non-equilibrium radiative transfer. The UGKS accurately captures multiscale photon transport from free streaming to diffusion across varying fluid opacities. This approach enables the scheme to model equilibrium plasma with non-equilibrium radiation transport. The model is validated through several test cases, including radiative transfer in kinetic and diffusion regimes, Marshak wave, Radiative shock, 3T(three-temperature) double lax shock tube problem, two-dimensional Sedov blast wave, and two-dimensional tophat based problem. These tests demonstrate the current scheme's capability to handle diverse radiation plasma scenarios.

</details>


### [882] [Diff-PIC: Revolutionizing Particle-In-Cell Nuclear Fusion Simulation with Diffusion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.02693)
*Chuan Liu,Chunshu Wu,Shihui Cao,Mingkai Chen,James Chenhao Liang,Ang Li,Michael Huang,Chuang Ren,Dongfang Liu,Ying Nian Wu,Tong Geng*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文提出Diff-PIC框架，利用条件扩散模型替代计算密集的粒子网格（PIC）模拟，高效生成激光-等离子体相互作用（LPI）高保真数据，相比传统PIC实现16,200倍加速，并在MAE/RMSE/FID指标上分别降低59.21%/57.15%/39.46%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 核聚变研究中，激光-等离子体相互作用（LPI）的复杂性使得解析方法不可行，而依赖粒子网格（PIC）模拟生成数据计算成本极高，成为推进聚变研究的瓶颈，亟需计算高效的替代方案。

Method: Diff-PIC框架基于条件扩散模型，通过两项增强设计：(1) 物理信息编码，将物理参数以物理感知方式编码以捕捉参数与结果间的复杂关系；(2) 采用整流流（rectified flow）技术将模型转化为一步条件扩散模型，兼顾效率与保真度。

Result: 在100皮秒仿真中，Diff-PIC相比传统PIC实现16,200倍加速，相较于其他两种SOTA数据生成方法，MAE/RMSE/FID平均分别降低59.21%/57.15%/39.46%。

Conclusion: Diff-PIC作为计算高效的替代方案，成功将PIC模拟的物理模式蒸馏到扩散模型中，在显著加速的同时保持了高保真度和物理有效性，为核聚变研究中的数据生成瓶颈提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: The rapid development of AI highlights the pressing need for sustainable energy, a critical global challenge for decades. Nuclear fusion, generally seen as an ultimate solution, has been the focus of intensive research for nearly a century, with investments reaching hundreds of billions of dollars. Recent advancements in Inertial Confinement Fusion have drawn significant attention to fusion research, in which Laser-Plasma Interaction (LPI) is critical for ensuring fusion stability and efficiency. However, the complexity of LPI upon fusion ignition makes analytical approaches impractical, leaving researchers depending on extremely computation-demanding Particle-in-Cell (PIC) simulations to generate data, presenting a significant bottleneck to advancing fusion research. In response, this work introduces Diff-PIC, a novel framework that leverages conditional diffusion models as a computationally efficient alternative to PIC simulations for generating high-fidelity scientific LPI data. In this work, physical patterns captured by PIC simulations are distilled into diffusion models associated with two tailored enhancements: (1) To effectively capture the complex relationships between physical parameters and corresponding outcomes, the parameters are encoded in a physically-informed manner. (2) To further enhance efficiency while maintaining high fidelity and physical validity, the rectified flow technique is employed to transform our model into a one-step conditional diffusion model. Experimental results show that Diff-PIC achieves 16,200$\times$ speedup compared to traditional PIC on a 100 picosecond simulation, with an average reduction in MAE / RMSE / FID of 59.21% / 57.15% / 39.46% with respect to two other SOTA data generation approaches.

</details>


### [883] [Fast and spectrally accurate construction of adaptive diagonal basis sets for electronic structure](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.06171)
*Michael Lindsey,Sandeep Sharma*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文将周期sinc基集与曲线坐标系结合用于电子结构计算，通过求解Monge-Ampère方程构建坐标变换实现变分辨率，并使用伪谱方法高效计算哈密顿量积分，实现了log-linear计算复杂度下的均值场计算，且比均匀分辨率基集更快逼近完备基集极限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统均匀分辨率基集在原子核附近需要大量基函数才能达到足够精度，而电子结构问题中波函数在原子核附近变化剧烈、在原子间区域变化平缓，因此需要一种能自适应调整分辨率的基集方法，以在保持精度的同时降低计算成本。

Method: 1) 将周期sinc基集与曲线坐标系相结合，实现计算域内的变分辨率能力；2) 采用伪谱方法评估构建哈密顿量所需的积分；3) 提出"循环Knothe-Rosenblatt流"这一新方法求解Monge-Ampère方程，以构建合适的坐标变换。

Result: 该方法实现了log-linear（近线性）计算复杂度的均值场计算；相比均匀分辨率基集，该方法能更快地逼近完备基集极限；并且这些基集满足对角近似性质（来源于伪谱方法）。

Conclusion: 变分辨率周期sinc基集结合曲线坐标系是一种高效的电子结构计算方法，在均值场理论、张量网络方法、量子计算和量子蒙特卡洛等多种框架中都适用，对角近似的满足进一步增强了其应用价值。

Abstract: In this article, we combine the periodic sinc basis set with a curvilinear coordinate system for electronic structure calculations. This extension allows for variable resolution across the computational domain, with higher resolution close to the nuclei and lower resolution in the inter-atomic regions. We address two key challenges that arise while using basis sets obtained by such a coordinate transformation. First, we use pseudospectral methods to evaluate the integrals needed to construct the Hamiltonian in this basis. Second, we demonstrate how to construct an appropriate coordinate transformation by solving the Monge-Ampère equation using a new approach that we call the cyclic Knothe-Rosenblatt flow. The solution of both of these challenges enables mean-field calculations at a cost that is log-linear in the number of basis functions. We demonstrate that our method approaches the complete basis set limit faster than basis sets with uniform resolution. We also emphasize how these basis sets satisfy the diagonal approximation, which is shown to be a consequence of the pseudospectral method. The diagonal approximation is highly desirable for the solution of the electronic structure problem in many frameworks, including mean field theories, tensor network methods, quantum computing, and quantum Monte Carlo.

</details>


### [884] [Perspective: Floquet engineering topological states from effective models towards realistic materials](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.02774)
*Fangyang Zhan,Rui Chen,Zhen Ning,Da-Shuai Ma,Ziming Wang,Dong-Hui Xu,Rui Wang*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文综述了通过周期性光场（Floquet工程）调控拓扑物态的理论进展，包括从有效模型到真实材料的研究，展示了光辐照可引入对称性破缺以实现非平衡拓扑态（如Weyl费米子、四极拓扑绝缘体、量子反常霍尔效应等），并基于第一性原理计算和Floquet定理提出了若干候选材料，为实验验证提供了依据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着拓扑物质分类的成熟，拓扑物理学的关注点转向量子调控，特别是拓扑物态的创建与操控。Floquet工程通过周期性外场调控系统性质，能够实现平衡态下无法存在的非平衡拓扑态，因此探索其理论基础和材料可行性具有重要意义。

Method: 采用Floquet定理处理周期性光场下的电子结构，结合对称性分析（引入对称性破缺）设计拓扑态；同时基于第一性原理计算筛选真实材料候选者，将有效模型推广至实际体系。

Result: 光辐照可实现多种拓扑态，包括一阶和高阶Weyl费米子、含周期性驱动和无序的四极拓扑绝缘体、具有可调Chern数的量子反常霍尔效应等。同时识别出多个适合实现Floquet拓扑态的真实材料候选者。

Conclusion: Floquet工程是调控拓扑物态的强大工具，能够实现平衡态无法达到的非平衡拓扑相；基于第一性原理与Floquet定理的结合为实验验证提供了可行路径，有望推动光诱导拓扑现象的进一步研究。

Abstract: With significant advances in classifying and cataloguing topological matter, the focus of topological physics has shifted towards quantum control, particularly the creation and manipulation of topological phases of matter. Floquet engineering, the concept of tailoring a system by periodic fields, offers a powerful tool to manipulate electronic properties of condensed systems, and even to create exotic non-equilibrium topological states that are impossibly present in equilibrium scenarios. In this perspective, we give a brief review of recent progress in theoretical investigations of Floquet engineering topological states from effective models towards realistic materials. We show that light irradiation can realize various desired topological states through the introduction of symmetry breaking, such as first- and higher-order Weyl fermions, quadrupole topological insulator with periodic driving and disorder, quantum anomalous Hall effects with a tunable Chern number, as well as beyond. Moreover, based on first-principles calculations and Floquet theorem, we show several realistic material candidates proposed as potential hosts for promising Floquet topological states, facilitating their verification in experiments. We believe that our perspective on Floquet engineering of topological states will advance further studies of rich exotic light-induced phenomena in condensed matter physics.

</details>


### [885] [G4CASCADE: A data-driven implementation of (n, $γ$) cascades in Geant4](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.02774)
*Leo Weimer,Emma Ellingwood,Otis Fischer,Michela Lai,Shawn Westerdale*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: G4CASCADE是一个新的数据驱动型Geant4模块，用于模拟中子俘获后的γ退激级联过程，通过改进对2-15 MeV能区γ射线谱线和关联性的描述，相比现有模块显著提升了模拟精度，并已在GitHub开源。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有Geant4模块(G4NDL和G4PhotoEvaporation)在模拟中子俘获(n, γ)信号的γ退激级联时，无法准确再现2-15 MeV能量范围内已知的γ射线谱线和关联性，这限制了MeV量级信号背景建模的精度。

Method: 开发了数据驱动的Geant4模块G4CASCADE，基于ENSDF数据库的核结构数据，采用实测的γ射线谱线和能级结构信息来模拟退激路径，并提供多种选项处理核数据不完备的情况。

Result: 与ENSDF数据库中实测γ射线谱线和能级结构的基准比较显示，G4CASCADE在残差和能量守恒方面均有显著改进。

Conclusion: G4CASCADE为核物理和粒子物理实验中MeV能区的背景建模提供了更准确的工具，对于暗物质探测等需要精确扣除(n, γ)背景的实验具有重要意义。

Abstract: De-excitation $γ$ cascades from neutron captures form a dominant background to MeV-scale signals. The Geant4 Monte Carlo simulation toolkit is widely used to model backgrounds in nuclear and particle physics experiments. While its current modules for simulating (n, $γ$) signals, G4NDL and G4PhotoEvaporation, are excellent for many applications, they do not reproduce known gamma-ray lines and correlations relevant at 2-15 MeV. G4CASCADE is a new data-driven Geant4 module that simulates (n, $γ$) de-excitation pathways, with options for how to handle shortcomings in nuclear data. Benchmark comparisons to measured gamma-ray lines and level structures in the ENSDF database show significant improvements, with decreased residuals and full energy conservation. This manuscript describes the underlying calculations performed by G4CASCADE, its various usage options, and benchmark comparisons. G4CASCADE for Geant4-10 is available on GitHub at https://github.com/UCRDarkMatter/CASCADE

</details>


### [886] [Beyond theory driven discovery: hot random search and datum derived structures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.06294)
*Chris J. Pickard*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文提出两种结合机器学习加速（EDDP）的随机结构搜索方法：热AIRSS（hot-AIRSS）通过高通量退火偏置采样低能构型，用于复杂硼结构搜索；以及基于EDDP环境向量距离优化的生成方法，从单金刚石结构直接生成碳材料（石墨、纳米管、富勒烯等），并成功恢复石榴石结构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统AIRSS在处理复杂体系时采样效率有限，而数据驱动的机器学习势能（MLIPs）虽然加速计算，但依赖大量训练数据。作者希望结合理论驱动（AIRSS）与机器学习加速的优势，在不牺牲随机搜索并行性的前提下，提升对高复杂度体系的低能构型采样能力，并探索从已知结构直接生成新结构的可能性。

Method: 1) **hot-AIRSS**：将基于EDDP的高通量退火（在结构弛豫之间）引入AIRSS流程，利用瞬时数据衍生势加速搜索，偏置采样向低能构型。2) **距离优化生成方法**：以实验金刚石结构的EDDP环境向量为参考，随机生成候选结构后优化其环境向量差异，该差异由主动学习的EDDP捕获，从而生成碳的同素异形体（石墨、纳米管、富勒烯、四面体框架结构等）。

Result: hot-AIRSS成功用于大晶胞复杂硼结构搜索；距离优化方法从单金刚石结构生成了石墨、小纳米管、笼状富勒烯类结构及多种四面体框架碳结构。同样的方法从不同化学组成的小晶胞AIRSS结构中恢复了pyrope石榴石结构（Mg₃Al₂(SiO₄)₃）。

Conclusion: 机器学习加速的EDDP可以显著增强AIRSS对复杂体系的采样能力，并且基于环境向量距离的生成方法无需大量训练数据即可从已知结构衍生出多样化的低能构型，与扩散模型生成方法具有内在关联。

Abstract: Data driven methods have transformed the prospects of the computational chemical sciences, with machine learned interatomic potentials (MLIPs) speeding up calculations by several orders of magnitude. I reflect on theory driven, as opposed to data driven, discovery based on ab initio random structure searching (AIRSS), and then introduce two methods which exploit machine learning acceleration.
