I show how long high throughput anneals, between direct structural relaxation, enabled by ephemeral data derived potentials (EDDPs), can be incorporated into AIRSS to bias the sampling of challenging systems towards low energy configurations. Hot AIRSS (hot-AIRSS) preserves the parallel advantage of random search, while allowing much more complex systems to be tackled. This is demonstrated through searches for complex boron structures in large unit cells. I then show how low energy carbon structures can be directly generated from a single, experimentally determined, diamond structure. An extension to the generation of random sensible structures, candidates are stochastically generated and then optimised to minimise the difference between the EDDP environment vector and that of the reference diamond structure. The distance-based cost function is captured in an actively learned EDDP. Graphite, small nanotubes and caged, fullerene-like, structures emerge from searches using this potential, along with a rich variety of tetrahedral framework structures. Using the same approach, the pyrope, Mg$_3$Al$_2$(SiO$_4$)$_3$, garnet structure is recovered from a low energy AIRSS structure generated in a smaller unit cell with a different chemical composition. The relationship of this approach to modern diffusion model based generative methods is discussed.

</details>


### [887] [AI-Machine Learning-Enabled Tokamak Digital Twin](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.03112)
*William Tang,Eliot Feibush,Ge Dong,Noah Borthwick,Apollo Lee,Juan-Felipe Gomez,Tom Gibbs,John Stone,Peter Messmer,Jack Wells,Xishuo Wei,Zhihong Lin*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 普林斯顿大学与NVIDIA合作，利用AI深度学习、Omniverse平台和HPC技术，为GA/DIII-D托卡马克开发数字孪生模型，旨在实现近实时仿真工作流，支持美国能源部2035年聚变示范电厂愿景。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 响应美国能源部2022年提出的"聚变示范电厂十年愿景"（2035年建成），需要开发集成真实工程与供应链数据、并利用机器学习加速先进科学模型的软件工具。

Method: 采用Princeton大学AI深度学习近实时模拟器与NVIDIA Omniverse平台相结合，基于GA/DIII-D托卡马克CAD文件（含平衡演化数据），集成AI/HPC近实时动力学，连接并加速合成HPC模拟器，构建数字孪生托卡马克。

Result: 在数字孪生托卡马克交付方面取得了有希望的早期进展，实现了近实时仿真工作流的集成与加速。

Conclusion: 最终目标是交付一个先进磁约束聚变托卡马克的交互式科学数字孪生，支持近实时仿真工作流，为清洁聚变发电开辟新能力。

Abstract: In addressing the Department of Energy's April, 2022 announcement of a Bold Decadal Vision for delivering a Fusion Pilot Plant by 2035, associated software tools need to be developed for the integration of real world engineering and supply chain data with advanced science models that are accelerated with Machine Learning. An associated research and development effort has been introduced here with promising early progress on the delivery of a realistic Digital Twin Tokamak that has benefited from accelerated advances by the Princeton University AI Deep Learning innovative near-real-time simulators accompanied by technological capabilities from the NVIDIA Omniverse, an open computing platform for building and operating applications that connect with leading scientific computing visualization software. Working with the CAD files for the GA/DIII-D tokamak including equilibrium evolution as an exemplar tokamak application using Omniverse, the Princeton-NVIDIA collaboration has integrated modern AI/HPC-enabled near-real-time kinetic dynamics to connect and accelerate state-of-the-art, synthetic, HPC simulators to model fusion devices and control systems. The overarching goal is to deliver an interactive scientific digital twin of an advanced MFE tokamak that enables near-real-time simulation workflows built with Omniverse to eventually help open doors to new capabilities for generating clean power for a better future.

</details>


### [888] [Revisiting Shooting Point Monte Carlo Methods for Transition Path Sampling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.03054)
*Sebastian Falkner,Alessandro Coretti,Baron Peters,Peter G. Bolhuis,Christoph Dellago*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文针对过渡路径采样（TPS）中因射击点记忆效应导致的采样偏差问题，提出一个基于扩展系综的理论框架，将路径与射击索引共同纳入采样空间，并推导出修正的接受准则，特别指出现有柔性长度无目标射击法和弹簧射击法需要修正接受标准。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 过渡路径采样是研究分子罕见事件的标准方法，但现有方法中射击点可能从一个路径继承到下一个路径，产生记忆效应，而传统理论框架未对此进行严格处理，可能导致采样不正确。

Method: 引入扩展系综理论框架，将路径和射击索引（shooting indices）共同作为采样变量；在此基础上重新推导不同路径采样算法的接受规则，确保能够正确采样过渡路径系综。

Result: 揭示了在柔性长度无目标射击法（flexible-length aimless shooting）和弹簧射击法（spring shooting）中，原有接受准则存在缺陷，需要根据新框架进行修正。

Conclusion: 扩展系综框架为含记忆效应的路径采样算法提供了严格的接受准则，修正后的算法能保证过渡路径系综的正确采样。

Abstract: Rare event sampling algorithms are essential for understanding processes that occur infrequently on the molecular scale, yet they are important for the long-time dynamics of complex molecular systems. One of these algorithms, transition path sampling (TPS), has become a standard technique to study such rare processes since no prior knowledge on the transition region is required. Most TPS methods generate new trajectories from old trajectories by selecting a point along the old trajectory, modifying its momentum in some way, and then ``shooting'' a new trajectory by integrating forward and backward in time. In some procedures, the shooting point is selected independently for each trial move, but in others, the shooting point evolves from one path to the next so that successive shooting points are related to each other. To account for this memory effect, we introduce a theoretical framework based on an extended ensemble that includes both paths and shooting indices. We derive appropriate acceptance rules for various path sampling algorithms in this extended formalism, ensuring the correct sampling of the transition path ensemble. Our framework reveals the need for amended acceptance criteria in the flexible-length aimless shooting and spring shooting methods.

</details>


### [889] [Structure Preserving Restarts of the Non-Symmetric Lanczos Algorithm via the Implicitly shifted LR algorithm](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.06561)
*Prabal S. Negi,Cristobal Arratia*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于隐式平移LR迭代的非对称Lanczos算法重启策略，该策略通过隐式多项式滤波保留三对角结构，用于计算大型矩阵的少数主导特征值。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 隐式平移QR迭代已成功用于Arnoldi方法的重启，但非对称Lanczos算法（生成三对角矩阵）缺乏类似的重启机制。本文旨在将隐式平移LR迭代的思想应用于Lanczos算法，在保留三对角结构的同时实现有效的重启。

Method: 借鉴隐式平移QR迭代中多项式滤波的思想，采用隐式平移LR迭代作为非对称Lanczos算法的重启过程。通过LR迭代的隐式平移操作，在保持缩减矩阵三对角结构的前提下，实现特征值计算中的重启。

Result: 成功将隐式多项式滤波技术从QR迭代扩展到LR迭代，为非对称Lanczos算法提供了保留三对角结构的重启策略。

Conclusion: 隐式平移LR迭代可以有效地作为非对称Lanczos算法的重启过程，该方法保留了矩阵的三对角结构，为大型非对称矩阵的主导特征值计算提供了一种新的有效途径。

Abstract: The implicitly shifted QR iteration is used as a restart procedure for the Arnoldi method for the calculation of a few dominant eigenvalues of a large matrix. We show that the underlying idea of implicit polynomial filtering can be utilized in much the same manner via the implicitly shifted LR iteration to create a restart procedure for the non-symmetric Lanczos algorithm for eigenvalue computations, which preserves the tri-diagonal structure of the reduced matrix.

</details>


### [890] [Efficient prediction of potential energy surface and physical properties with Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.03430)
*Rui Wang,Hongyu Yu,Yang Zhong,Hongjun Xiang*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本研究在三种机器学习框架（Allegro、NequIP、ETGNN）中用KAN替代MLP，发现在输出块中替换KAN可提升预测精度，部分情况下缩短训练时间；仅在输出块使用KAN比全模型使用更具计算效率；最优基函数选择依赖于具体问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks (KANs)作为传统多层感知机(MLPs)的替代方案，在材料科学性质预测中提升机器学习框架的性能。

Method: 在三种机器学习框架（Allegro、NequIP、ETGNN）中，将MLPs替换为KANs，并在输出块或整个模型中分别进行替换，评估预测精度、训练时间和推理效率。

Result: KANs的集成普遍提升了预测精度；在输出块替换MLP可显著提高准确性并在某些情况下缩短训练时间；仅在输出块使用KAN比全模型使用具有更快的推理速度和更好的计算效率。

Conclusion: KANs在增强机器学习势和材料性质预测方面具有强大潜力，最优基函数选择依赖于具体问题。

Abstract: The application of machine learning methodologies for predicting properties within materials science has garnered significant attention. Among recent advancements, Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks (KANs) have emerged as a promising alternative to traditional Multi-Layer Perceptrons (MLPs). This study evaluates the impact of substituting MLPs with KANs within three established machine learning frameworks: Allegro, Neural Equivariant Interatomic Potentials (NequIP), and the Edge-Based Tensor Prediction Graph Neural Network (ETGNN). Our results demonstrate that the integration of KANs generally yields enhanced prediction accuracies. Specifically, replacing MLPs with KANs in the output blocks leads to notable improvements in accuracy and, in certain scenarios, also results in reduced training times. Furthermore, employing KANs exclusively in the output block facilitates faster inference and improved computational efficiency relative to utilizing KANs throughout the entire model. The selection of an optimal basis function for KANs is found to be contingent upon the particular problem at hand. Our results demonstrate the strong potential of KANs in enhancing machine learning potentials and material property predictions.

</details>


### [891] [Performance Portable Monte Carlo Neutron Transport in MCDC via Numba](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.04668)
*Joanna Piper Morgan,Ilham Variansyah,Braxton Cuneo,Todd S. Palmer,Kyle E. Niemeyer*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文提出使用Numba编译器在Python中实现蒙特卡罗/动态代码(MC/DC)的可移植性方案，使同一应用程序能以纯Python、编译CPU或编译GPU模式运行，并在GPU模式下结合Harmonize异步调度器提升性能，在256节点规模下与生产级C++代码性能相当。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在GPU和CPU上实现高性能计算的可移植性、快速开发和开放协作是软件工程中的挑战，现有方法难以同时满足这三方面的需求。

Method: 使用Numba编译器为Python实现可移植性方案，构建MC/DC作为新型中子传输应用；在GPU模式下，将Numba与异步GPU调度器Harmonize配对使用以提升GPU性能。

Result: 时间相关问题在CPU和GPU上的性能结果（包括256节点的弱扩展测试），与生产级C++代码相比具有竞争力。

Conclusion: 基于Numba的Python可移植性方案能够实现跨CPU/GPU的高性能计算，同时保持快速开发和开放协作的优势，性能可与生产级C++代码相媲美。

Abstract: Finding a software engineering approach that allows for portability, rapid development, and open collaboration for high-performance computing on GPUs and CPUs is a challenge. We implement a portability scheme using the Numba compiler for Python in Monte Carlo / Dynamic Code (MC/DC), a new neutron transport application for rapidly developing Monte Carlo. Using this scheme, we have built MC/DC as an application that can run as a pure Python, compiled CPU, or compiled GPU solver. In GPU mode, we use Numba paired with an asynchronous GPU scheduler called Harmonize to increase GPU performance. We present performance results (including weak scaling up to 256 nodes) for a time-dependent problem on both CPUs and GPUs and compare favorably to a production C++ code.

</details>


### [892] [Review of the finite difference Hartree-Fock method for atoms and diatomic molecules, and its implementation in the x2dhf program](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.03679)
*Jacek Kobus,Susi Lehtola*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文综述了二维有限差分Hartree-Fock (FD HF) 方法，并介绍了其在X2DHF程序最新版本中的实现。该程序支持原子和双原子分子的HF极限计算、多极矩、极化率与超极化率计算，新增了基于Libxc库的Kohn-Sham密度泛函计算功能，简化了初始化流程，并支持多种单粒子势计算。程序通过GitHub发布，支持CMake构建和双/四精度算术。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为满足对双原子分子高精度电子结构计算的需求，特别是获取Hartree-Fock极限值以及评估和开发原子基组，需要对原有的FD HF程序进行更新和扩展，增加DFT功能和简化使用流程。

Method: 采用二维有限差分Hartree-Fock方法，在X2DHF程序中实现；新增基于Libxc库的局域和广义梯度近似交换关联泛函的Kohn-Sham密度泛函计算；采用有限场方法计算极化率和超极化率；支持点核和有限核模型；提供单粒子势（Coulomb、Green-Sellin-Zachor、Krammers-Henneberger及原子势叠加）计算；通过CMake和x2dhfctl脚本简化构建过程。

Result: X2DHF程序可计算HF极限的总能量和多极矩，以及极化率α_{zz}、超极化率β_{zzz}、γ_{zzzz}、A_{z,zz}、B_{zz,zz}；新增KS-DFT计算能力；简化了初始化；支持双精度和四精度算术；易于从GitHub安装和构建。

Conclusion: X2DHF作为一个成熟的FD HF程序，通过新增DFT功能和简化使用流程，扩展了其应用范围，使其不仅能用于HF极限计算和基组评估，还能用于DFT研究，为原子和分子电子结构计算提供了一个可靠且易用的工具。

Abstract: We present an extensive review of the two-dimensional finite difference Hartree--Fock (FD HF) method, and present its implementation in the newest version of X2DHF, the FD HF program for atoms and diatomic molecules. The program was originally published in Comput. Phys. Commun. in 1996, and was last revised in 2013. X2DHF can be used to obtain HF limit values of total energies and multipole moments for a wide range of diatomic molecules and their ions, using either point nuclei or a finite nuclear model. Polarizabilities ($α_{zz}$) and hyperpolarizabilities ($β_{zzz}$, $γ_{zzzz}$, ${A}_{z,zz}$, ${B}_{zz,zz}$) can also be computed by the program with the finite-field method. X2DHF has been extensively used in the literature to assess the accuracy of existing atomic basis sets and to help in developing new ones. As a new feature since the last revision, the program can now also perform Kohn-Sham density functional calculations with local and generalized gradient exchange-correlation functionals with the Libxc library of density functionals, enabling new types of studies. Furthermore, the initialization of calculations has been greatly simplified. As before, X2DHF can also perform one-particle calculations with (smooth) Coulomb, Green-Sellin-Zachor and Krammers-Henneberger potentials, while calculations with a superposition of atomic potentials have been added as a new feature. The program is easy to install from the GitHub repository and build via CMake using the x2dhfctl script that facilitates creating its single- and multiple-threaded versions, as well as building in Libxc support. Calculations can be carried out with X2DHF in double- or quadruple-precision arithmetic.

</details>


### [893] [Unified Gas-Kinetic Wave-Particle Method for Multiscale Flow Simulation of Partially Ionized Plasma](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.07929)
*Zhigang Pu,Kun Xu*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种用于部分电离等离子体的统一气体动理学波粒(UGKWP)方法，该方法兼具多尺度特性和统一保持(UP)特性，能够从稀薄态的粒子输运平滑过渡到连续态的双流体和MHD模拟，并已在多种跨尺度现象中验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 经典的PIC/MCC方法仅适用于单尺度模拟，无法高效处理从动力学稀薄态到连续流体态跨越多个物理尺度的部分电离等离子体问题，亟需一种兼具多尺度和统一保持特性的数值方法。

Method: UGKWP方法融合微观速度分布演化与宏观平均场量演化，采用Andries-Aoki-Perthame(AAP)模型近似不同物种间的动量与能量交换，并通过Crank-Nicolson方案处理流体与电磁场相互作用，使得时间步长不受等离子体回旋周期的限制。

Result: 该方法在从动力学Landau阻尼到宏观流动问题（如Brio-Wu激波管、Orszag-Tang涡旋、GEM磁重联）等系列基准测试中表现良好，能够无缝捕捉跨尺度的PIP基本特征。

Conclusion: UGKWP方法实现了从稀薄态的PIC方法到连续态的MHD求解器的平滑过渡，具备多尺度和统一保持特性，为部分电离等离子体的跨尺度模拟提供了有效工具。

Abstract: The Unified Gas-Kinetic Wave-Particle (UGKWP) method is constructed for partially ionized plasma (PIP). This method possesses both multiscale and unified preserving (UP) properties. The multiscale property allows the method to capture a wide range of plasma physics, from the particle transport in the kinetic regime to the two-fluid and magnetohydrodynamics (MHD) in the near continuum regimes, with the variation of local cell Knudsen number and normalized Larmor radius.The unified preserving property ensures that the numerical time step is not limited by the particle collision time in the continuum regime for the capturing of dissipative macroscopic solutions of the resistivity, Hall-effect, and all the way to the ideal MHD equations.The UGKWP is clearly distinguishable from the classical single scale Particle-in-Cell/Monte Carlo Collision (PIC/MCC) methods.The UGKWP method combines the evolution of microscopic velocity distribution with the evolution of macroscopic mean field quantities, granting it UP properties. Moreover, the time step in UGKWP is not constrained by the plasma cyclotron period through the Crank-Nicolson scheme for fluid and electromagnetic field interactions. The momentum and energy exchange between different species is approximated by the Andries-Aoki-Perthame (AAP) model. Overall, the UGKWP method enables a smooth transition from the PIC method in the rarefied regime to the MHD solvers in the continuum regime. This method has been extensively tested on a variety of phenomena ranging from kinetic Landau damping to the macroscopic flow problems, such as the Brio-Wu shock tube, Orszag-Tang vortex, and Geospace Environmental Modeling (GEM) magnetic reconnection. These tests demonstrate that the proposed method can capture the fundamental features of PIP across different scales seamlessly.

</details>


### [894] [A Hamiltonian structure-preserving discretization of Maxwell's equations in nonlinear media](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.04891)
*William Barham,Yaman Güçlü,Philip J. Morrison,Eric Sonnendrücker*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 提出了一种适用于非线性光学的哈密顿建模框架，特别针对三次非线性光学介质，并基于有限元外微积分实现了保结构离散，该离散格式能量稳定且精确守恒高斯定律。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 非线性光学中现有的数值方法往往难以同时保证能量稳定性和守恒律的精确满足，亟需一种既能描述一般非线性介质哈密顿结构、又能实现结构保持离散的通用框架。

Method: 首先建立适用于一般非线性光学模型的哈密顿框架，将其特化到三次非线性光学介质；利用泊松括号与场无关的特性，采用有限元外微积分（FEEC）进行保结构离散化。

Result: 得到了一种针对三次非线性介质中麦克斯韦方程组的有限元离散格式，该格式是能量稳定的，且能精确守恒高斯定律。

Conclusion: 该哈密顿框架兼具一般性与简洁性，适用于模拟宽类时域非线性光学问题，且易于推广到更一般的非线性介质。

Abstract: A simple Hamiltonian modeling framework for general models in nonlinear optics is given. This framework is specialized to describe the Hamiltonian structure of electromagnetic phenomena in cubicly nonlinear optical media. The model has a simple Poisson bracket structure with the Hamiltonian encoding all of the nonlinear coupling of the fields. The field-independence of the Poisson bracket facilitates a straightforward Hamiltonian structure-preserving discretization using finite element exterior calculus. The generality and relative simplicity of this Hamiltonian framework makes it amenable for simulating a broad class of time-domain nonlinear optical problems. The main contribution of this work is a finite element discretization of Maxwell's equations in cubicly nonlinear media which is energy-stable and exactly conserves Gauss's laws. Moreover, this approach may be readily adapted to consider more general nonlinear media in subsequent work.

</details>


### [895] [Accelerating crystal structure search through active learning with neural networks for rapid relaxations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.04073)
*Stefaan S. P. Hessmann,Kristof T. Schütt,Niklas W. A. Gebauer,Michael Gastegger,Tamio Oguchi,Tomoki Yamashita*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 提出了一种结合主动学习与不确定性估计的神经网络力场方法，用于高效优化晶体组成，在结构弛豫中大幅降低计算成本（可达两个数量级），并在多个基准系统及更复杂系统中成功找到最稳定结构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 晶体组成全局优化是发现新材料中稳定结构的关键方法，但计算成本极高。现有方法在探索化学空间时效率不足，亟需一种能显著降低计算开销同时保持准确性的方法。

Method: 采用带有不确定性估计的神经网络力场，通过主动学习迭代指导随机生成的候选结构向局部能量极小值弛豫；仅将最有希望的候选结构提交给密度泛函理论（DFT）进行最终评估。

Result: 在Si16、Na8Cl8、Ga8As8和Al4O6基准系统中，计算成本可靠地降低了最多两个数量级；在更复杂的未见系统Si46和Al16O24中成功找到最稳定极小值；以Si16为例，仅增加少量计算开销即可发现多个相关局部极小值。

Conclusion: 该方法在显著降低晶体结构优化计算成本的同时，能够有效发现最稳定结构及多个相关局部极小值，为大规模晶体组成搜索提供了一种高效且可靠的解决方案。

Abstract: Global optimization of crystal compositions is a significant yet computationally intensive method to identify stable structures within chemical space. The specific physical properties linked to a three-dimensional atomic arrangement make this an essential task in the development of new materials. We present a method that efficiently uses active learning of neural network force fields for structure relaxation, minimizing the required number of steps in the process. This is achieved by neural network force fields equipped with uncertainty estimation, which iteratively guide a pool of randomly generated candidates towards their respective local minima. Using this approach, we are able to effectively identify the most promising candidates for further evaluation using density functional theory (DFT). Our method not only reliably reduces computational costs by up to two orders of magnitude across the benchmark systems Si16 , Na8Cl8 , Ga8As8 and Al4O6 , but also excels in finding the most stable minimum for the unseen, more complex systems Si46 and Al16O24 . Moreover, we demonstrate at the example of Si16 that our method can find multiple relevant local minima while only adding minor computational effort.

</details>


### [896] [Accelerating Eigenvalue Computation for Nuclear Structure Calculations via Perturbative Corrections](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.08901)
*Dong Min Roh,Esmond Ng,Chao Yang,Dean Lee,Pieter Maris,James P. Vary*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种子空间投影与微扰修正（SPPC）方法，通过将核多体哈密顿量分解为小空间矩阵和微扰项，利用小空间上的线性方程组求解修正向量，构建更优子空间来加速特征对求解。数值实验表明，SPPC在效率上优于Lanczos、块Lanczos和LOBPCG等传统方法，并可与其他方法结合避免收敛停滞。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在无核芯壳模型（NCSM）中，核多体哈密顿量的特征值问题规模庞大，传统迭代方法（如Lanczos、块Lanczos、LOBPCG）计算效率有限，需要一种利用哈密顿量层次结构的更高效求解方法。

Method: 将NCSM哈密顿量分解为小空间矩阵（可高效求解特征对）和微扰矩阵两部分；通过求解小空间上的序列线性方程组获得特征向量的微扰修正；将近似特征向量与修正向量组合构造投影子空间，在该子空间中投影得到更精确的特征对近似。该方法称为子空间投影与微扰修正（SPPC）方法。

Result: 数值实验表明，SPPC方法在计算最低几个特征对时，效率优于Lanczos、块Lanczos和LOBPCG等传统大规模特征值迭代求解方法。同时，该方法可与其他方法结合以克服收敛停滞问题。

Conclusion: SPPC是一种高效利用NCSM哈密顿量层次结构的特征值求解新方法，具有优于传统迭代方法的计算效率，且具备良好的可扩展性和可组合性。

Abstract: We present a new method for computing the lowest few eigenvalues and the corresponding eigenvectors of a nuclear many-body Hamiltonian represented in a truncated configuration interaction subspace, i.e., the no-core shell model (NCSM). The method uses the hierarchical structure of the NCSM Hamiltonian to partition the Hamiltonian as the sum of two matrices. The first matrix corresponds to the Hamiltonian represented in a small configuration space, whereas the second is viewed as the perturbation to the first matrix. Eigenvalues and eigenvectors of the first matrix can be computed efficiently. Perturbative corrections to the eigenvectors of the first matrix can be obtained from the solutions of a sequence of linear systems of equations defined in the small configuration space. These correction vectors can be combined with the approximate eigenvectors of the first matrix to construct a subspace from which more accurate approximations of the desired eigenpairs can be obtained. We call this method a Subspace Projection with Perturbative Corrections (SPPC) method. We show by numerical examples that the SPPC method can be more efficient than conventional iterative methods for solving large-scale eigenvalue problems such as the Lanczos, block Lanczos and the locally optimal block preconditioned conjugate gradient (LOBPCG) method. The method can also be combined with other methods to avoid convergence stagnation.

</details>


### [897] [Kinetic representation of the unified gas-kinetic wave-particle method and beyond](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.05691)
*Zhaoli Guo,Yajun Zhu,Kun Xu*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文重新审视了UGKWP方法中模拟粒子和波分子的时间演化，提出了对应的动理学方程，该动理学系统可视为原始动理学方程的碰撞分解，为开发全流域流动的动理学方法提供了基础。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: UGKWP方法最初是在离散层面作为直接建模方法开发的，缺乏对其各部分（模拟粒子和波分子）时间演化的理论分析，需要从连续动理学方程角度重新审视。

Method: 重新审视UGKWP方法中确定性流体波和随机粒子输运两部分的时间演化，推导对应的动理学方程，构建原始Boltzmann型方程的碰撞分解系统。

Result: 得到了UGKWP方法的动理学方程表示，该方程可视为原始动理学方程的碰撞分解，明确了确定性与随机性成分在动理学层面的数学描述。

Conclusion: 该动理学系统为开发全流域（从稀薄到连续流）的新动理学方法提供了理论基础和框架。

Abstract: The unified gas-kinetic wave-particle (UGKWP) method is a hybrid method for multiscale flow simulations, in which the contributions to the whole gas evolution from deterministic hydrodynamic wave and stochastic particle transport are combined simultaneously. Originally, the UGKWP method was developed as a direct modeling approach at discrete level. In this work, we revisit the time evolution of each part of the involved simulation particles and wave molecules in UGKWP, and present the corresponding kinetic equations. The resultant kinetic system can be viewed as a collision decomposition of the original kinetic equation, which can serve as a basis for developing other kinetic methods for flows in all flow regimes.

</details>


### [898] [RBMD: A molecular dynamics package enabling to simulate 10 million all-atom particles in a single graphics processing unit](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.09315)
*Weihang Gao,Teng Zhao,Yongfa Guo,Jiuyang Liang,Huan Liu,Maoying Luo,Zedong Luo,Wei Qin,Yichao Wang,Qi Zhou,Shi Jin,Zhenli Xu*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文介绍了一个基于随机批处理方法的高效分子动力学模拟包RBMD，在GPU-CPU异构架构上实现，可单GPU模拟千万级粒子系统，每步仅需8.20毫秒（百万粒子系统），显著优于传统LAMMPS方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有分子动力学模拟包在处理大规模粒子系统时面临计算和内存开销大的问题，传统Ewald方法和Verlet列表方法在大规模模拟中效率受限，亟需更高效的算法和实现来支持纳米/微米尺度粒子系统的快速模拟。

Method: 采用随机批处理方法：长程Coulomb相互作用使用随机批处理Ewald算法（傅里叶空间），线性复杂度且超可扩展；短程相互作用使用随机批处理列表算法构建近邻列表，降低计算和内存成本。在GPU-CPU异构架构上实现，支持全原子系统的经典力场。

Result: 与LAMMPS中的PPPM和Verlet列表方法在三种NVIDIA GPU上对比，RBMD在异构架构上效率更高；单GPU+CPU核可模拟高达1000万粒子；百万粒子全原子系统每步仅需8.20 ms。

Conclusion: RBMD包在大规模分子动力学模拟中具有显著的高效性和可扩展性，能够在桌面级设备上运行实际应用的大规模模拟，展示了随机批处理方法在分子动力学中的巨大潜力。

Abstract: This paper introduces a random-batch molecular dynamics (RBMD) package for fast simulations of particle systems at the nano/micro scale. Different from existing packages, the RBMD uses random batch methods for nonbonded interactions of particle systems. The long-range part of Coulomb interactions is calculated in Fourier space by the random batch Ewald algorithm, which achieves linear complexity and superscalability, surpassing classical lattice-based Ewald methods. For the short-range part, the random batch list algorithm is used to construct neighbor lists, significantly reducing both computational and memory costs. The RBMD is implemented on GPU-CPU heterogeneous architectures, with classical force fields for all-atom systems. Benchmark systems are used to validate accuracy and performance of the package. Comparison with the particle-particle particle-mesh method and the Verlet list method in the LAMMPS package is performed on three different NVIDIA GPUs, demonstrating high efficiency of the RBMD on heterogeneous architectures. Our results also show that the RBMD enables simulations on a single GPU with a CPU core up to 10 million particles. Typically, for systems of one million particles, the RBMD allows simulating all-atom systems with a high efficiency of 8.20 ms per step, demonstrating the attractive feature for running large-scale simulations of practical applications on a desktop machine.

</details>


### [899] [The design, verification, and applications of Hotspice: a Monte Carlo simulator for artificial spin ice](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.05580)
*Jonathan Maes,Diego De Gusem,Ian Lateur,Jonathan Leliaert,Aleksandr Kurenkov,Bartel Van Waeyenberge*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: Hotspice是一款用于模拟人工自旋冰（ASI）系统动力学与平衡态的蒙特卡洛软件，支持面内（IP）和面外（OOP）几何构型。通过采用Ising-like宏自旋模型，并引入偶极相互作用计算修正、非对称能垒等改进，在pinwheel和kagome晶格上验证了与实验数据更吻合的结果，最后展示了其在pinwheel和OOP square ASI中用于储层计算的“时钟”应用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的人工自旋冰蒙特卡洛模拟在准确性上存在不足，特别是在不同几何构型（面内与面外）下偶极相互作用的计算以及能垒对称性假设方面，需要更精确的模型来匹配实验观测。

Method: 开发了Hotspice蒙特卡洛模拟软件，采用Ising-like宏自旋模型，每个纳米磁体视为一个宏自旋，开关事件由热涨落、静磁相互作用和外场驱动。通过在面内和面外ASI中改进偶极相互作用计算，并引入非对称能垒修正来提升精度。

Result: 通过pinwheel和kagome ASI晶格的模拟与实验数据对比，验证了所引入的修正（偶极计算改进、非对称能垒）能够更准确地模拟这些系统的行为。最后展示了在pinwheel和OOP square ASI中实现“时钟”功能，应用于储层计算。

Conclusion: Hotspice通过对传统Ising-like模型的多项修正（特别是偶极相互作用计算和非对称能垒），显著提升了人工自旋冰模拟的准确性，并在储层计算等新兴应用中展示了潜力。

Abstract: We present Hotspice, a Monte Carlo simulation software designed to capture the dynamics and equilibrium states of Artificial Spin Ice (ASI) systems with both in-plane (IP) and out-of-plane (OOP) geometries. An Ising-like model is used where each nanomagnet is represented as a macrospin, with switching events driven by thermal fluctuations, magnetostatic interactions, and external fields. To improve simulation accuracy, we explore the impact of several corrections to this model, concerning for example the calculation of the dipole interaction in IP and OOP ASI, as well as the impact of allowing asymmetric rather than symmetric energy barriers between stable states. We validate these enhancements by comparing simulation results with experimental data for pinwheel and kagome ASI lattices, demonstrating how these corrections enable a more accurate simulation of the behavior of these systems. We finish with a demonstration of `clocking' in pinwheel and OOP square ASI as an example of reservoir computing.

</details>


### [900] [Simulating the dynamics of NV^- formation in diamond in the presence of carbon self-interstitials](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.05881)
*Guangzhao Chen,Joseph C. A. Prentice,Jason M. Smith*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本研究利用线性标度密度泛函理论(DFT)并开发了新的碳氮机器学习势(GAP-CN)，在碳势(GAP20)基础上，研究了金刚石中碳自间隙原子(Ci)与氮空位(NV)色心的相互作用，重点关注其激发态和扩散行为。通过模拟激发态，根据吸收光谱特征将缺陷构型分类为'Bright'、'Spike'和'Dark'三类。机器学习分子动力学模拟揭示了Ci和NV可能的扩散机制，表明Ci可以扩散离开或与NV重新结合。该研究为量子技术应用中金刚石NV缺陷的形成提供了新见解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理解金刚石中碳自间隙原子(Ci)与氮空位(NV)色心之间的相互作用机制，特别是其激发态特性和扩散行为，以优化NV缺陷在量子技术中的应用。

Method: 采用线性标度密度泛函理论(DFT)结合机器学习方法，开发了基于GAP20的碳氮机器学习势(GAP-CN)，并通过机器学习分子动力学模拟研究缺陷的激发态和扩散行为。

Result: 根据吸收光谱特征将缺陷构型分为三类：'Bright'、'Spike'和'Dark'；阐明了Ci可以扩散离开或与NV重新结合的两种可能机制。

Conclusion: 该研究为金刚石中NV缺陷的形成提供了新的理解，对量子技术应用具有重要指导意义。

Abstract: This study utilises linear-scaling density functional theory (DFT) and develops a new machine-learning potential for carbon and nitrogen (GAP-CN), based on the carbon potential (GAP20), to investigate the interaction between carbon self-interstitials and nitrogen-vacancy (NV) centers in diamond, focusing on their excited states and diffusion behaviour. From the simulated excited states, 'Bright', 'Spike', and 'Dark' defect configurations are classified based on their absorption spectrum features. Furthermore, machine learning molecular dynamics simulation provides insight into the possible diffusion mechanism of Ci and NV, showing that Ci can diffuse away or recombine with NV. The study yields new insight into the formation of NV defects in diamond for quantum technology applications.

</details>


### [901] [A robust fourth-order finite-difference discretization for the strongly anisotropic transport equation in magnetized plasmas](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.06070)
*L. Chacon,Jason Hamilton,Natalia Krasheninnikova*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 提出了一种用于强各向异性热输运方程的二阶时间隐式、四阶空间精度离散格式，结合非线性单调性保持限制器和多重网格预处理策略，实现了高达七个量级各向异性比的高效可扩展求解，并在2D螺旋和3D环形几何的磁流体动力学模拟中得到验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 热核聚变等离子体中的热输运具有极强的各向异性（平行输运系数远大于垂直输运系数），传统数值格式面临混合导数扩散通量导致离散最大原理失效、交叉场数值污染严重、线性迭代收敛缓慢等挑战，亟需开发高精度、高效且可扩展的数值方案。

Method: 1) 采用二阶时间隐式与四阶空间精度的有限差分离散；2) 将混合导数扩散通量（破坏离散最大原理的根源）转化为非线性平流通量，并应用非线性求解器友好的单调性保持限制器；3) 提出基于二阶精度近似的多重网格预处理策略，提升网格细化下的效率与可扩展性。

Result: 1) 支持高达10^7量级的热输运系数各向异性比，交叉场数值污染极低；2) 线性迭代次数对网格分辨率和网格各向异性依赖性极弱，与隐式时间步长的平方根成正比；3) 数值测试验证了预期的空间收敛阶数和强算法性能；4) 成功应用于2D螺旋几何中Bennett箍缩的扭结不稳定性及3D环形几何中ITER装置的完全非线性MHD模拟。

Conclusion: 所提出的四阶精度隐式格式结合多重网格预处理策略，能够高效、可扩展地求解强各向异性热输运问题，为聚变等离子体大规模数值模拟提供了可靠的数值工具。

Abstract: We propose a second-order temporally implicit, fourth-order-accurate spatial discretization scheme for the strongly anisotropic heat transport equation characteristic of hot, fusion-grade plasmas. Following [Du Toit et al., Comp. Phys. Comm., 228 (2018)], the scheme transforms mixed-derivative diffusion fluxes (which are responsible for the lack of a discrete maximum principle) into nonlinear advective fluxes, amenable to nonlinear-solver-friendly monotonicity-preserving limiters. The scheme enables accurate multi-dimensional heat transport simulations with up to seven orders of magnitude of heat-transport-coefficient anisotropies with low cross-field numerical error pollution and excellent algorithmic performance, with the number of linear iterations scaling very weakly with grid resolution and grid anisotropy, and scaling with the square-root of the implicit timestep. We propose a multigrid preconditioning strategy based on a second-order-accurate approximation that renders the scheme efficient and scalable under grid refinement. Several numerical tests are presented that display the expected spatial convergence rates and strong algorithmic performance, including fully nonlinear magnetohydrodynamics simulations of kink instabilities in a Bennett pinch in 2D helical geometry and of ITER in 3D toroidal geometry.

</details>


### [902] [SOFI: Finding point group symmetries in atomic clusters as finding the set of degenerate solutions in a shape-matching problem](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.06131)
*Miha Gunde,Nicolas Salles,Luca Grisanti,Layla Martin-Samos,Anne Hemeryck*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 提出了一种名为SOFI的新算法，通过将点群对称性识别转化为简并形状匹配问题，实现了对原子团簇对称操作的自动搜索，并作为IRA库的一部分开源发布。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 点群对称性在理论化学和计算材料科学中至关重要，但缺乏能够自动、高效且准确地识别通用原子团簇对称操作的方法。

Method: 将点群对称性识别问题建模为简并形状匹配问题，通过寻找多个解来对应不同的对称操作，从而开发了SOFI算法。

Result: 在大量原子团簇数据集上与三种现有算法进行了对比，并通过示例用例展示了SOFI的有效性。

Conclusion: SOFI算法在点群对称操作识别任务上表现出色，已作为开源代码整合到IRA库中，可供研究社区使用。

Abstract: Point Group (PG) symmetries play a fundamental role in many aspects of theoretical chemistry and computational materials science. With the objective to automatize the search of PG symmetry operations of generic atomic clusters, we present a new algorithm called Symmetry Operation FInder (SOFI). SOFI addresses the problem of identifying PG symmetry by framing it as a degenerate shape-matching problem, where the multiple solutions correspond to distinct symmetry operations. The developed algorithm is compared against three other algorithms dedicated to PG identification, on a large set of atomic clusters. The results, along with some illustrative use cases, showcase the effectiveness of SOFI. The SOFI algorithm is released as part of the IRA library, accessible at https://github.com/mammasmias/IterativeRotationsAssignments.

</details>


### [903] [Introducing GPU-acceleration into the Python-based Simulations of Chemistry Framework](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.09700)
*Rui Li,Qiming Sun,Xing Zhang,Garnet Kin-Lic Chan*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文介绍了GPU4PySCF模块，它为PySCF提供了GPU加速功能，核心是基于Rys求积法实现了含g函数的收缩基组双电子排斥积分（ERI）的GPU计算，并展示了其在哈特里-福克（Hartree-Fock）Fock构建和核梯度计算中的应用。基准测试表明，相较于PySCF的多线程CPU代码，速度提升约两个数量级，性能与GAMESS和QUICK等GPU加速量子化学包在单块NVIDIA A100 GPU上相当。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: PySCF作为广泛使用的量子化学软件包，其CPU实现在处理大规模计算时效率有限。现有GPU加速量子化学包（如GAMESS、QUICK）虽性能优异，但缺乏与PySCF生态的集成。因此，开发一个专门针对PySCF的GPU加速模块，以显著提升其计算效率并保持与现有工作流的兼容性。

Method: 开发了GPU4PySCF模块，采用Rys求积法在GPU上实现了含g函数的收缩基组双电子排斥积分（ERI）计算。将该积分高效集成到积分直接法HF的Fock矩阵构建和核梯度计算流程中，利用GPU并行计算优势加速整个量子化学工作流。

Result: 基准测试显示，相较于PySCF多线程CPU代码，GPU4PySCF实现了约两个数量级的加速。在单块NVIDIA A100 GPU上，其性能与GAMESS和QUICK等GPU加速量子化学包相当。

Conclusion: GPU4PySCF成功为PySCF提供了高效的GPU加速能力，显著提升了HF计算效率，性能达到与主流GPU加速量子化学包相当的水平，有望推动更大规模量子化学计算在PySCF中的普及。

Abstract: We introduce the first version of GPU4PySCF, a module that provides GPU acceleration of methods in PySCF. As a core functionality, this provides a GPU implementation of two-electron repulsion integrals (ERIs) for contracted basis sets comprising up to g functions using Rys quadrature. As an illustration of how this can accelerate a quantum chemistry workflow, we describe how to use the ERIs efficiently in the integral-direct Hartree-Fock Fock build and nuclear gradient construction. Benchmark calculations show a significant speedup of two orders of magnitude with respect to the multi-threaded CPU Hartree-Fock code of PySCF, and performance comparable to other GPU-accelerated quantum chemical packages including GAMESS and QUICK on a single NVIDIA A100 GPU.

</details>


### [904] [FEAST nonlinear eigenvalue algorithm for $GW$ quasiparticle equations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.06119)
*Dongming Li,Eric Polizzi*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于FEAST特征值算法的方法，通过将能量域扩展到复平面并引入超复数进行轮廓变形计算，精确求解$G_0W_0$准粒子方程中的非线性特征值问题，无需Kohn-Sham波函数近似。计算结果表明KS方程的HOMO与$GW$结果接近，但LUMO存在显著差异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 量子多体理论中使用格林函数（如$GW$近似）常导致非线性特征值问题，传统方法依赖Kohn-Sham波函数近似或图形解近似，精度有限，需要更精确的求解方法。

Method: 基于FEAST特征值算法处理非线性特征值问题，将能量域扩展到复平面；引入超复数（hypercomplex number）进行$GW$自能的轮廓变形计算，同时携带格林函数和FEAST求积节点的虚部信息。

Result: 对多种分子的计算结果表明，KS方程得到的HOMO与$GW$结果非常接近，但LUMO存在明显差异。

Conclusion: 所提出的基于FEAST算法的方法能够精确求解$G_0W_0$准粒子方程，避免Kohn-Sham波函数近似，且揭示了KS方程中LUMO能级与$GW$结果的差异。

Abstract: The use of Green's function in quantum many-body theory often leads to nonlinear eigenvalue problems, as Green's function needs to be defined in energy domain. The $GW$ approximation method is one of the typical examples. In this article, we introduce a method based on the FEAST eigenvalue algorithm for accurately solving the nonlinear eigenvalue $G_0W_0$ quasiparticle equation, eliminating the need for the Kohn-Sham wavefunction approximation. Based on the contour integral method for nonlinear eigenvalue problem, the energy (eigenvalue) domain is extended to complex plane. Hypercomplex number is introduced to the contour deformation calculation of $GW$ self-energy to carry imaginary parts of both Green's functions and FEAST quadrature nodes. Calculation results for various molecules are presented and compared with a more conventional graphical solution approximation method. It is confirmed that the Highest Occupied Molecular Orbital (HOMO) from the Kohn-Sham equation is very close to that of $GW$, while the Least Unoccupied Molecular Orbital (LUMO) shows noticeable differences.

</details>


### [905] [Thermal Stoner-Wohlfarth Model for Magnetodynamics of Single Domain Nanoparticles: Implementation and Validation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.06136)
*Deniz Mostarac,Andrey A. Kuznetsov,Santiago Helbig,Claas Abert,Pedro A. Sanchez,Dieter Suess,Sofia S. Kantorovich*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文提出了热Stoner-Wohlfarth (tSW)模型，并将其应用于分子动力学模拟中，验证了该模型在固定温度下、不同各向异性强度和磁场/磁矩耦合组合条件下，对固态超顺磁体和稀磁流体平衡与动态性质的适用性和效率，发现当粒子各向异性高于热涨落五倍以上时tSW模型有效且高效，能够考虑Néel和Brownian弛豫之间的相互作用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有磁性软物质理论研究中常采用固定点偶极子表示，忽略了Néel和Brownian弛豫之间的相互作用，缺乏能够同时兼顾这两种弛豫机制的有效模型。

Method: 提出热Stoner-Wohlfarth (tSW)模型，通过分子动力学模拟，对固定取向随机排列的单轴粒子（固态超顺磁体）和经典稀磁流体进行验证，比较分析结果与模拟结果，评估tSW模型在不同各向异性强度和磁场/磁矩耦合条件下的表现。

Result: 当粒子各向异性高于热涨落五倍以上时，tSW模型在再现磁性软物质系统的平衡性质（含/不含偶极-偶极相互作用）和动态性质（不含偶极-偶极相互作用）方面有效且高效。

Conclusion: tSW模型能够有效考虑Néel和Brownian弛豫之间的相互作用，弥补了固定点偶极子表示的不足，为磁性软物质的模拟提供了一种新的高效方法。

Abstract: We present the thermal Stoner-Wohlfarth (tSW) model and apply it in the context of Molecular Dynamics simulations. The model is validated against an ensemble of immobilized, randomly oriented uniaxial particles (solid superparamagnet) and a classical dilute ferrofluid for different combinations of anisotropy strength and magnetic field/moment coupling, at a fixed temperature. We compare analytical and simulation results to quantify the viability of the tSW model in reproducing the equilibrium (with and without dipole-dipole interactions) and dynamic (without dipole-dipole interactions) properties of magnetic soft matter systems. We show that if the anisotropy of a particle is more than five times higher than the thermal fluctuations, tSW is applicable and efficient. This approach allows one to consider the interplay between Néel and Brownian relaxation, often neglected in the fixed point-dipole representation-based magnetic soft matter theoretical investigations.

</details>


### [906] [Uncertainty Quantification in Reduced-Order Gas-Phase Atmospheric Chemistry Modeling using Ensemble SINDy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.09757)
*Lin Guo,Xiaokai Yang,Zhonghua Zheng,Nicole Riemer,Christopher W. Tessum*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结合主成分分析(PCA)和集成稀疏非线性动力学识别(E-SINDy)的概率代理建模方法，用于自动简化气相化学机制并量化简化引入的不确定性。在小型光化学箱模型中，该方法对臭氧的校准R²达到0.98，预测不确定性与实际误差吻合良好；与确定性版本相比，精度提升约50-60%。尽管代理模型比参考模型慢，但在更复杂的模型上应用有望实现加速，从而改进大气成分模型中的不确定性量化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大气化学建模中的不确定性量化计算成本高昂，通常需要大量复杂模型模拟；而大规模建模为降低计算负担常采用简化化学机制，但简化会引入不确定性。现有方法难以同时实现机制自动简化和不确定性量化，因此需要一种概率代理建模方法来解决这一矛盾。

Method: 采用PCA对高维化学物种空间进行降维，提取潜在变量；结合E-SINDy从稀疏数据中自动识别潜在变量的非线性动力学方程；通过集成方法（100个成员）生成概率性预测，从而同时实现化学机制的自动简化和简化引入的不确定性量化。

Result: 在臭氧形成的小型光化学箱模型中：三个潜在物种平均校准R²为0.96，臭氧校准R²为0.98；与确定性版本相比，集成预测均值精度提升约60%，最优单一集成成员确定性预测精度提升约50%；臭氧测试RMSE为其均方根浓度的15.1%。

Conclusion: 该方法成功实现了化学机制的自动简化与不确定性量化的一体化建模，预测不确定性与实际误差吻合良好且精度优于确定性方法。尽管当前代理模型比参考模型慢，但在更复杂参考模型上应用有望实现加速，未来可推广至全尺度化学机制，改善大气成分模型的不确定性量化，为空气质量管控提供更可靠支持。

Abstract: Uncertainty quantification during atmospheric chemistry modeling is computationally expensive as it typically requires a large number of simulations using complex models. As large-scale modeling is typically performed with simplified chemical mechanisms for computational tractability, we describe a probabilistic surrogate modeling method using principal components analysis (PCA) and Ensemble Sparse Identification of Nonlinear Dynamics (E-SINDy) to both automatically simplify a gas-phase chemistry mechanism and to quantify the uncertainty introduced when doing so. We demonstrate the application of this method on a small photochemical box model for ozone formation. With 100 ensemble members, the calibration $R$-squared value is 0.96 among the three latent species on average and 0.98 for ozone, demonstrating that predicted model uncertainty aligns well with actual model error. In addition to uncertainty quantification, this probabilistic method also improves accuracy as compared to an equivalent deterministic version, by $\sim$60% for the ensemble prediction mean or $\sim$50% for deterministic prediction by the best-performing single ensemble member. Overall, the ozone testing root mean square error (RMSE) is 15.1% of its root mean square (RMS) concentration. Although our probabilistic ensemble simulation ends up being slower than the reference model it emulates, we expect that use of a more complex reference model in future work will result in additional opportunities for acceleration. Versions of this approach applied to full-scale chemical mechanisms may result in improved uncertainty quantification in models of atmospheric composition, leading to enhanced atmospheric understanding and improved support for air quality control and regulation.

</details>


### [907] [Perfectly Matched Layer implementation for E-H fields and Complex Wave Envelope propagation in the Smilei PIC code](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.06287)
*Guillaume Bouchard,Arnaud Beck,Francesco Massimo,Arnd Specka*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文介绍了完美匹配层（PML）在粒子网格（PIC）模拟中的实现，包括用于麦克斯韦方程组和首次用于包络波动方程，适用于笛卡尔和方位角模式分解几何，并在开源代码Smilei中实现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 吸收边界条件（ABC）在数值模拟中设计困难，存在伪反射、角度和波长依赖性，甚至某些方程组无法使用ABC。PML层能够有效吸收出射波和反射波，弥补这些不足。

Method: 针对有限差分时域（FDTD）格式的PIC代码，将PML分别应用于麦克斯韦方程组和二阶包络波动方程，后者需要显著改进。在笛卡尔和方位角模式（AM）分解两种几何中实现，基于开源代码Smilei。

Result: PML能够在所有角度和频率下吸收并防止反射，计算成本适中，提高模拟精度，避免因ABC导致的模拟区域过度扩大。

Conclusion: PML是有效的吸收边界方案，首次成功应用于包络波动方程，拓展了其在激光等离子体模拟中的应用范围。

Abstract: The design of absorbing boundary conditions (ABC) in a numerical simulation is a challenging task. In the best cases, spurious reflections remain for some angles of incidence or at certain wave lengths. In the worst, ABC are not even possible for the set of equations and/or numerical schemes used in the simulation and reflections can not be avoided at all. Perflectly Matched Layer (PML) are layers of absorbing medium which can be added at the simulation edges in order to significantly damp both outgoing and reflected waves, thus effectively playing the role of an ABC. They are able to absorb waves and prevent reflections for all angles and frequencies at a modest computational cost. It increases the simulation accuracy and negates the need of oversizing the simulation usually imposed by ABC and leading to a waste of computational resources and power. PML for finite-difference time-domain (FDTD) schemes in Particle-In-cell (PIC) codes are presented for both Maxwell's equations and, for the first time, the envelope wave equation. Being of the second order, the latter requires significant evolutions with respect to the former. It applies in particular to simulations of lasers propagating in plasmas using the reduced Complex Envelope model. The implementation is done in the open source code Smilei for both Cartesian and azimuthal modes (AM) decomposition geometries.

</details>


### [908] [Graph-based Descriptors for Condensed Matter](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.06156)
*An Wang,Gabriele C. Sosso*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文提出将网络科学中的图描述符（如节点中心性和聚类系数）用于凝聚态系统的表征，并在Lennard-Jones体系中证明其优于传统对称函数描述符，能够更准确地预测动力学性质和相变。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有凝聚态系统描述符（如对称函数、SOAP）主要基于粒子空间构型，而基于图的描述符在凝聚态领域应用有限，作者希望引入网络科学中的图描述符作为替代表征方法。

Method: 将凝聚态系统中的粒子视为节点、粒子间相互作用视为边，构建图结构；然后计算节点中心性、聚类系数等网络科学中的图描述符，将其作为系统的特征表示；在Lennard-Jones体系中比较图描述符与对称函数描述符的性能。

Result: 图描述符在预测Lennard-Jones体系的动力学性质和相变方面优于传统的对称函数描述符。

Conclusion: 图描述符在凝聚态系统表征中具有广泛适用性，有望通过融合网络科学概念推动凝聚态领域的发展。

Abstract: Computational scientists have long been developing a diverse portfolio of methodologies to characterise condensed matter systems. Most of the descriptors resulting from these efforts are ultimately based on the spatial configurations of particles, atoms, or molecules within these systems. Noteworthy examples include symmetry functions and the smooth overlap of atomic positions (SOAP) descriptors, which have significantly advanced the performance of predictive machine learning models for both condensed matter and small molecules. However, while graph-based descriptors are frequently employed in machine learning models to predict the functional properties of small molecules, their application in the context of condensed matter has been limited. In this paper, we put forward a number of graph-based descriptors (such as node centrality and clustering coefficients) traditionally utilised in network science, as alternative representations for condensed matter systems. We apply this graph-based formalism to investigate the dynamical properties and phase transitions of the prototypical Lennard-Jones system. We find that our graph-based formalism outperforms symmetry function descriptors in predicting the dynamical properties and phase transitions of this system. These results demonstrate the broad applicability of graph-based features in representing condensed matter systems, paving the way for exciting advancements in the field of condensed matter through the integration of network science concepts.

</details>


### [909] [Thermalized and mixed meanfield ADP potentials for magnesium hydrides](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.10030)
*M. Molinos,M. Ortiz,M. P. Ariza*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文在非平衡统计力学框架下，发展了镁及镁氢化物角度依赖势（ADPs）的均场近似和数值求积方案，用于有限温度和任意摩尔分数下的热化和混合，并导出了局部平衡关系。通过自由熵、热容、热膨胀、摩尔体积、状态方程和弹性常数等数值实验和实验验证，证明热化/混合ADPs（TADPs）预测的局部平衡性质与通过分子动力学直接计算结果高度吻合。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有角度依赖势（ADPs）在有限温度和混合组分下的计算效率不足，需要开发均场近似与数值求积方案，以实现热化和混合状态下ADPs的高效评估。

Method: 基于非平衡统计力学框架，采用均场近似和数值求积方案，对镁及镁氢化物的ADPs进行热化和混合处理，推导局部平衡关系。

Result: TADPs预测的自由熵、热容、热膨胀、摩尔体积、状态方程和弹性常数等局部平衡性质，与直接通过ADP分子动力学计算的结果高度一致。

Conclusion: 所提出的均场近似和数值求积方案能够高效且准确地评估热化/混合ADPs，为有限温度和任意组分下材料性质的预测提供了可靠方法。

Abstract: We develop meanfield approximation and numerical quadrature schemes for the evaluation of Angular-Dependent interatomic Potentials (ADPs) for magnesium and magnesium hydrides at finite temperature (thermalization) and arbitrary atomic molar fractions (mixing) within a non-equilibrium statistical mechanical framework and derive local equilibrium relations. We numerically verify and experimentally validate the accuracy and fidelity of the resulting thermalized/mixed ADPs (TADPs) by means of selected numerical tests including free entropy, heat capacity, thermal expansion, molar volumes, equation of state and elastic constants. We show that the local equilibrium properties predicted by TADPs agree closely with those computed directly from ADP by means of Molecular Dynamics (MD).

</details>


### [910] [Active Learning for Discovering Complex Phase Diagrams with Gaussian Processes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.07042)
*Max Zhu,Jian Yao,Marcus Mynatt,Hubert Pugzlys,Shuyi Li,Sergio Bacallado,Qingyuan Zhao,Chunjing Jia*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 提出了一种贝叶斯主动学习算法，通过新颖的采集函数高效绘制相图，在二维和三维相空间中仅用8%的样本点即可达到<5%的误差，显著优于传统网格搜索和支持向量机方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统相图绘制方法（如网格搜索）需要大量样本点，计算和实验成本高昂；现有主动学习方法在多相高维相图中的效率仍有提升空间。本文旨在开发一种更高效的主动学习算法来加速相图构建。

Method: 基于贝叶斯主动学习框架，设计了一种新型采集函数，同时评估下一个观测点的信息增益（影响）和不确定性（可能性），从而迭代选择最具信息量的实验点进行采样。

Result: 在具有反对称相互作用的蜂窝格子自旋哈密顿量相图识别中，仅用8%的总可能样本点，以<5%的误差成功识别了由斯格明子相、螺旋相和极化相组成的完整相图（包括二维和三维相空间）。在三维相图构建中显著降低了计算和实验成本。

Conclusion: 该方法在效率上优于传统网格搜索和基于支持向量机的方法，并且可扩展到更高维度的多相相图，具有出色的通用性和有效性。

Abstract: We introduce a Bayesian active learning algorithm that efficiently elucidates phase diagrams. Using a novel acquisition function that assesses both the impact and likelihood of the next observation, the algorithm iteratively determines the most informative next experiment to conduct and rapidly discerns the phase diagrams with multiple phases. Comparative studies against existing methods highlight the superior efficiency of our approach. We demonstrate the algorithm's practical application through the successful identification of the entire phase diagram of a spin Hamiltonian with antisymmetric interaction on Honeycomb lattice, using significantly fewer sample points than traditional grid search methods and a previous method based on support vector machines. Our algorithm identifies the phase diagram consisting of skyrmion, spiral and polarized phases with error less than 5% using only 8% of the total possible sample points, in both two-dimensional and three-dimensional phase spaces. Additionally, our method proves highly efficient in constructing three-dimensional phase diagrams, significantly reducing computational and experimental costs. Our methodological contributions extend to higher-dimensional phase diagrams with multiple phases, emphasizing the algorithm's effectiveness and versatility in handling complex, multi-phase systems in various dimensions.

</details>


### [911] [Asymptotic perpendicular transport in low-beta collisionless plasma](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.06559)
*Jack Coughlin,Jingwei Hu,Uri Shumlak*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文针对无碰撞和弱碰撞等离子体中的垂直输运问题，通过慢动力学（漂移序）下的渐进分析，发展了一种新的“半流体”形式体系，推导出热流和应力张量的闭合关系，并提出了对Braginskii闭合的修正，使其在存在温度梯度时更准确。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Braginskii陀粘应力张量闭合基于强碰撞假设（快动力学序），在高温等离子体（无碰撞/弱碰撞）中有效性降低。需要发展适用于无碰撞和弱碰撞条件的闭合模型，以准确描述FLR效应及K-H、R-T等不稳定性。

Method: 对弱碰撞Vlasov方程进行慢动力学（漂移序）下的渐进分析，采用“半流体”形式体系（在垂直速度方向积分得到五矩系统），通过Hilbert展开确定热流和应力张量闭合；提出调整后的Braginskii闭合以计入温度梯度驱动的应力；通过连续动理学模拟（可变磁化率和温度梯度的剪切流构型）验证该展开。

Result: 观察到随磁化率增加的预期收敛性；分析了残差与高阶项的关系；调整后的Braginskii闭合能够准确修正Braginskii陀粘应力张量在存在温度梯度时的误差。

Conclusion: 提出的半流体漂移序展开及修正的Braginskii闭合在无碰撞/弱碰撞条件下有效，能更准确描述温度梯度驱动的应力效应，为高温等离子体流体模拟提供了改进的闭合方案。

Abstract: Kinetic physics, including finite Larmor radius (FLR) effects, are known to affect the physics of magnetized plasma phenomena such as the Kelvin-Helmholtz and Rayleigh-Taylor instabilities. Accurately incorporating FLR effects into fluid simulations requires moment closures for the heat flux and stress tensor, including the gyroviscous stress in collisionless magnetized plasmas. However, the most commonly used gyroviscous stress tensor closure (Braginskii Rev. Plasma Phys., 1965) is based on a strongly collisional assumption for the asymptotic expansion of the kinetic equation in the so-called fast-dynamics ordering. This collisional assumption becomes less valid for some high-temperature plasmas. To explore perpendicular transport in collisionless and weakly collisional plasmas, an asymptotic analysis of the weakly collisional Vlasov equation in the slow-dynamics or drift ordering is performed in a new "semi-fluid" formalism, which integrates in perpendicular velocity to obtain a five-moment system. The associated heat flux and stress tensor closures are determined via a Hilbert expansion of the kinetic equation. A numerically affordable approximation to the stress tensor is proposed which adjusts the Braginskii closure to account for temperature gradient-driven stress. Continuum kinetic simulations of a family of sheared-flow configurations with variable magnetization and temperature gradients are performed to validate the drift ordering semi-fluid expansion. The expected convergence with magnetization is observed, and residuals are examined and discussed in terms of their relationship to higher-order terms in the expansion. The adjusted Braginskii closure is found to accurately correct for the error committed by the Braginskii gyroviscous stress tensor closure in the presence of temperature gradients.

</details>


### [912] [One-dimensional gas-fueled nuclear reactor with thermal feedback](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.12530)
*Mathis Caprais,Kacim François-Elie,Daniele Tomatis*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本研究构建了气态燃料石墨慢化反应堆一维子通道的稳态模型，通过中子学-热工流体耦合分析，揭示了入口压力对临界性的影响，并验证了燃料热膨胀导致的强热反馈效应。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索气态燃料反应堆中由于燃料高热膨胀可能产生的强中子-热工耦合现象，评估该类反应堆的可运行性与设计可行性。

Method: 采用离散纵坐标法求解一维单群中子标量通量与有效增殖因子；使用六组缓发中子先驱核模型考虑燃料漂移效应；可压缩欧拉方程以整体法求解；热工-中子双物理耦合通过Picard迭代处理。

Result: 有效增殖因子随入口压力增加而升高；临界压力随燃料混合物组分变化；热反馈系数因燃料高热膨胀而较大；氦气比例显著影响临界工况下的堆芯出口温度。

Conclusion: 气态燃料反应堆可通过调节入口压力实现临界，热反馈效应强烈，系统设计时必须予以充分考虑。

Abstract: This study explores a simplified one-dimensional subchannel of a graphite-moderated nuclear reactor operating with a gaseous core in steady-state conditions, reproducing a neutronic-thermal-fluid-dynamics coupled problem with thermal feedback. The fuel gas, consisting of a homogeneous mixture of uranium hexfluoride (\ce{UF_6}) and helium, is assumed to be ideal, with simplifications made to its thermodynamic state. Due to the high thermal expansion of the fuel, a possible interesting strong coupling is anticipated. The discrete ordinates' method is used to compute the one group scalar flux, the effective multiplication factor and the power released by the core. Six groups of Delayed Neutron Precursors (DNPs) are used to take into account the fuel motion drift. Compressible Euler equations are solved with a monolithic approach and the two-physics problem is treated with Picard iterations. As expected, the effective multiplication factor of a subchannel is shown to increase with the inlet pressure. The critical pressure, representing the threshold at which the system achieves criticality, changes as the fuel mixture changes. High thermal feedback coefficients are observed due to the high thermal expansion of the fuel. The amount of helium in the mixture greatly affects the temperature at core outlet in critical configurations. This study shows that a gaseous fuel reactor can be brought to criticality varying the inlet pressure. The thermal feedback is strong and should be taken into account in the design of the system.

</details>


### [913] [Logarithmically complex rigorous Fourier space solution to the 1D grating diffraction problem](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.07821)
*Evgeniy Levdik,Alexey A. Shcherbakov*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文通过引入张量列车（Tensor Train）分解技术，大幅压缩了傅里叶模态方法在求解大周期多尺度一维光栅衍射问题时所需存储的信息量，使计算复杂度从指数级增长降至对数级增长，从而突破了传统严格电磁计算在大规模周期结构上的计算瓶颈。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统傅里叶空间方法（如傅里叶模态法）在求解大尺度和多尺度周期光学结构时计算量过大，标准离散化方案产生的数据量（数百万至数十亿）对于给定精度的衍射问题计算而言存在严重的冗余，亟需一种高效的压缩技术来突破计算瓶颈。

Method: 采用张量列车（Tensor Train）分解这一张量压缩技术，对傅里叶模态方法中的大尺度离散化数据进行压缩表示，并将TT算法适配到麦克斯韦方程的严格求解框架中，以光栅衍射问题为例进行了验证。

Result: 证明了标准离散化方案产生的海量数据对于给定精度下的衍射问题计算是过量的；通过TT分解，仅需对数级增长的信息量即可实现麦克斯韦方程的可靠严格求解。

Conclusion: Tensor Train分解能够有效克服传统严格电磁计算方法在大周期多尺度结构上的计算复杂度瓶颈，将所需的存储和计算量从指数级降至对数级，为大规模周期性电磁结构的严格分析提供了新的可行路径。

Abstract: The rigorous solution to the grating diffraction problem is a cornerstone step in many scientific fields and industrial applications ranging from the study of the fundamental properties of metasurfaces to the simulation of photolithography masks. Fourier space methods, such as the Fourier Modal Method, are established tools for the analysis of the electromagnetic properties of periodic structures, but are too computationally demanding to be directly applied to large and multiscale optical structures. This work focuses on pushing the limits of rigorous computations of periodic electromagnetic structures by adapting a powerful tensor compression technique called the Tensor Train decomposition. We have found that the millions and billions of numbers produced by standard discretization schemes are inherently excessive for storing the information about diffraction problems required for computations with a given accuracy, and we show how to adapt the TT algorithms to have a logarithmically growing amount of information to be sufficient for reliable rigorous solution of the Maxwell's equations on an example of large period multiscale 1D grating structures.

</details>


### [914] [Advancing Nonadiabatic Molecular Dynamics Simulations for Solids: Achieving Supreme Accuracy and Efficiency with Machine Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.06654)
*Changwei Zhang,Yang Zhong,Zhi-Guo Tao,Xinming Qing,Honghui Shang,Zhenggang Lan,Oleg V. Prezhdo,Xin-Gao Gong,Weibin Chu,Hongjun Xiang*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 提出了一种名为N²AMD的通用框架，采用E(3)-等变深度神经网络哈密顿量来提升非绝热分子动力学（NAMD）模拟的精度和效率，在多个半导体体系中实现了优于传统方法的大规模载流子复合模拟。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有NAMD模拟在大规模体系中精度和效率不足，传统机器学习方法预测关键量时存在一致性差的问题，亟需一种既能保持物理对称性又能高效准确计算的方法。

Method: 采用E(3)-等变深度神经网络直接学习哈密顿量，利用欧几里得对称性约束提升模型性能，并直接从神经网络哈密顿量计算NAMD所需的关键物理量。

Result: 在多个典型半导体体系（包括完美和缺陷体系）中，N²AMD成功实现大规模载流子复合模拟，克服了传统NAMD低估寿命甚至定性错误预测的问题，展现了优异的泛化能力。

Conclusion: N²AMD框架不仅显著提升了NAMD模拟的效率和精度，还具备良好的可扩展性和与现有NAMD技术的兼容性，为材料科学研究开辟了新途径。

Abstract: Non-adiabatic molecular dynamics (NAMD) simulations have become an indispensable tool for investigating excited-state dynamics in solids. In this work, we propose a general framework, N$^2$AMD which employs an E(3)-equivariant deep neural Hamiltonian to boost the accuracy and efficiency of NAMD simulations. The preservation of Euclidean symmetry of Hamiltonian enables N$^2$AMD to achieve state-of-the-art performance. Distinct from conventional machine learning methods that predict key quantities in NAMD, N$^2$AMD computes these quantities directly with a deep neural Hamiltonian, ensuring supreme accuracy, efficiency, and consistency. Furthermore, N$^2$AMD demonstrates excellent generalizability and enables seamless integration with advanced NAMD techniques and infrastructures. Taking several extensively investigated semiconductors as the prototypical system, we successfully simulate carrier recombination in both pristine and defective systems at large scales where conventional NAMD often significantly underestimates or even qualitatively incorrectly predicts lifetimes. This framework not only boosts the efficiency and precision of NAMD simulations but also opens new avenues to advance materials research.

</details>


### [915] [Application of a spectral scheme to simulate horizontally slowly varying three-dimensional ocean acoustic propagation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.13801)
*Houwang Tu,Yongxian Wang,Xiaolan Zhou,Guojun Xu,Dongbao Gao,Shuqing Ma*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于Chebyshev谱方法离散的三维绝热模态-抛物线方程混合模型，用于水下声传播数值模拟。垂直方向采用Chebyshev谱方法求解模态函数并处理介质分层与泄漏模态，水平方向采用完美匹配层技术处理无界域。数值结果验证了该方法的可靠性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有三维声传播模型多采用有限差分方法离散，而谱方法具有计算精度高、收敛速度快等优势，但尚未被充分应用于绝热模态-抛物线方程混合模型中。本文旨在将谱方法引入该混合模型，以提升计算性能。

Method: 本文提出了一种基于谱方法离散的三维绝热模态-抛物线方程混合模型。在垂直方向，采用Chebyshev谱方法求解模态函数，通过区域分解策略处理介质分层，并利用特征值变换技术处理半无限边界条件下的泄漏模态。在水平方向，采用完美匹配层技术处理无界计算域，并将PML与计算域分割为多层。水平方向的折射方程采用"分裂步长"广角抛物线方程模型求解。

Result: 数值仿真表明，Chebyshev谱方法在绝热模态-抛物线方程混合模型的应用中取得了可靠的结果。

Conclusion: 基于谱方法离散的三维绝热模态-抛物线方程混合模型是可行的，能够有效应用于水下声传播数值模拟。

Abstract: Three-dimensional numerical models for underwater sound propagation are popular in computational ocean acoustics. For horizontally slowly varying waveguide environments, an adiabatic mode-parabolic equation hybrid theory can be used for simulation. This theory employs adiabatic modes in the vertical direction, simplifying the solution of the sound pressure to the solution of horizontal refractive index of vertical modes. The refractive equations in the horizontal direction are further solved by a ``split-step" wide-angle parabolic equation model, following the approach of the ``vertical modes and horizontal parabolic equation". Existing three-dimensional sound propagation models mostly use finite difference methods for discretization, but in recent years, the academic community has proposed new types of sound propagation models based on spectral methods. Spectral methods are numerical discretization methods based on orthogonal polynomial approximation and weighted residual principles. They offer advantages such as high computational accuracy and fast convergence. In this study, a three-dimensional adiabatic mode-parabolic equation hybrid model discretized using spectral methods is proposed. In the vertical direction, the modal functions are solved using the Chebyshev spectral method. The medium layering is handled using a domain decomposition strategy, and the leaky modes under semi-infinite boundary conditions are addressed using an eigenvalue transformation technique. In the horizontal direction, the perfectly matched layer technique is utilized to handle unbounded computational domains, and the perfectly matched layer and computational domain are segmented into multiple layers. Numerical simulations show that the Chebyshev spectral method achieves reliable results in the application of the adiabatic mode-parabolic equation hybrid model.

</details>


### [916] [Stochastic models of advection-diffusion in layered media](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.08447)
*Elliot J. Carr*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文针对异质分层介质中扩散与平流-扩散输运问题，推导了一套等效的随机游走模型（离散时间-离散空间马尔可夫链），通过对连续介质模型（偏微分方程）进行空间（有限体积法）和时间（前向欧拉或精确指数离散化）离散化获得。前向欧拉法得到局部随机游走（近邻跃迁），精确指数法得到非局部随机游走（矩阵指数），并给出了步长约束条件以确保跃迁概率非负。MATLAB代码验证了随机模型与连续模型的一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 确定性连续介质模型虽然经典，但无法处理许多问题中固有的随机性，且仅在大数量粒子情况下有效。需要建立等效的随机模型来弥补这一不足。

Method: 采用有限体积法进行空间离散化，结合前向欧拉离散化（得到局部近邻随机游走）或精确指数离散化（得到非局部随机游走，通过矩阵指数定义跃迁概率），推导出与连续模型等效的马尔可夫链模型。

Result: 两种离散化方案均成功得到了等效随机游走模型，并给出了确保跃迁概率非负的空间/时间步长约束条件。MATLAB仿真结果与连续模型吻合良好。

Conclusion: 所提出的随机建模框架能够有效处理异质分层介质中跨全透或半透界面的输运问题，为含固有随机性的应用场景提供了可靠的建模工具。

Abstract: Mathematically modelling diffusive and advective transport of particles in heterogeneous layered media is important to many applications in computational, biological and medical physics. While deterministic continuum models of such transport processes are well established, they fail to account for randomness inherent in many problems and are valid only for a large number of particles. To address this, this paper derives a suite of equivalent stochastic (discrete-time discrete-space random walk) models for several standard continuum (partial differential equation) models of diffusion and advection-diffusion across a fully- or semi-permeable interface. Our approach involves discretising the continuum model in space and time to yield a Markov chain, which governs the transition probabilities between spatial lattice sites during each time step. Discretisation in space is carried out using a standard finite volume method while two options are considered for discretisation in time. A simple forward Euler discretisation yields a stochastic model taking the form of a local (nearest-neighbour) random walk with simple analytical expressions for the transition probabilities while an exact exponential discretisation yields a non-local random walk with transition probabilities defined numerically via a matrix exponential. Constraints on the size of the spatial and/or temporal steps are provided for each option to ensure the transition probabilities are non-negative. MATLAB code comparing the stochastic and continuum models is available on GitHub (https://github.com/elliotcarr/Carr2024c) with simulation results demonstrating good agreement for several example problems.

</details>


### [917] [Insights on molecular P implantation for scalable spin-qubit arrays](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.07363)
*Tomás Fernández Bouvier,Ville Jantunen,Saana Vihuri,Alvaro López Cazalilla,Flyura Djurabekova*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文通过分子动力学模拟研究使用PF₂分子离子进行磷注入硅基底的方案，旨在减少磷施主在硅中的位置不确定性同时保持检测效率。研究发现：表面a-SiO₂层会导致分子立即解离；离子-固体相互作用的电子信号强度与磷的穿透深度并非必然相关。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 固态自旋量子比特（特别是硅中磷施主自旋）在量子计算中前景广阔，但面临精确且可扩展的磷原子定位挑战。现有注入技术的位置不确定性限制了量子比特阵列的规模化制备，亟需降低注入位置散布同时保持可检测性。

Method: 采用分子动力学模拟方法，研究PF₂分子离子注入硅基底的物理过程。分析了能量传递、分子完整性、注入分布、电子信号分量以及稳定损伤等多个方面。

Result: 1) 晶体表面存在的a-SiO₂层会导致PF₂分子立即解离；2) 离子-固体相互作用产生的电子信号强度与磷原子的穿透深度之间不存在必然的相关性。

Conclusion: 使用PF₂分子离子注入并不能如预期那样通过保持分子完整性来降低磷的定位不确定性；表面氧化层导致分子立即破碎，且电子信号无法可靠指示注入深度，这对基于离子注入的量子比特制备策略提出了重要限制。

Abstract: Quantum information technologies hold immense promise, with quantum computers poised to revolutionize problem-solving capabilities. Among the leading contenders are solid-state spin-qubits, particularly those utilizing the spin of phosphorous donors (31 P ). While significant progress has been made in enhancing quantum coherence and qubit control, challenges persist, notably in achieving precise and scalable P placement in Si substrate. This paper investigates by means of molecular dynamics the use of molecular PF2 ions for implantation, aiming to reduce placement uncertainty while maintaining detection efficiency. We examine energy transfer, molecule integrity, implantation profiles, electronic signal components, and stable damage. Among other things we find that the assumption that the molecule only breaks apart immediately due to the presence of an a-SiO2 layer on the surface of the crystal and that the intensity of the electronic signal from ion-solid interactions does not correlate necessarily with the penetration depth of P.

</details>


### [918] [Discrete element method model of soot aggregates](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.14254)
*Egor V. Demidov,Gennady Y. Gor,Alexei F. Khalizov*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文开发了一种离散元接触模型，模拟烟尘聚集体在凝结和团聚过程中的结构重整，揭示了颈部连接比例决定重整路径（局部或全局压实），且完全压实发生在纳秒量级，远快于凝结老化时间尺度，表明凝结速率影响颈部断裂数量，进而改变烟尘的辐射强迫效应。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 目前缺乏严格描述烟尘聚集体结构重整过程的模型，导致大气气溶胶模型的预测精度降低。烟尘颗粒在获得涂层后会发生显著压实，改变其直接气候强迫效应，因此需要建立能够准确模拟这一过程的物理模型。

Method: 基于原子力光谱数据参数化离散元接触模型，将烟尘聚集体表示为由内聚力和烧结颈连接的球体集合，模拟不同颈部连接比例下的结构重整过程。

Result: 聚集体中颈部连接比例决定了重整路径：较少颈部时发生局部压实，几乎完全颈部连接时倾向于全局压实；完全压实发生在数十纳秒内，远快于凝结老化的时间尺度。

Conclusion: 在大气烟尘聚集体中，凝结速率决定了同时断裂的颈部数量，从而影响重整路径，能够产生如近期研究中观察到的高度压实、薄层涂覆的烟尘颗粒。

Abstract: Soot is a component of atmospheric aerosols that affects climate by scattering and absorbing the sunlight. Soot particles are fractal aggregates composed of elemental carbon. In the atmosphere, the aggregates acquire coatings by condensation and coagulation, resulting in significant compaction of the aggregates that changes the direct climate forcing of soot. Currently, no models exist to rigorously describe the process of soot restructuring, reducing prediction accuracy of atmospheric aerosol models. We develop a discrete element method contact model to simulate restructuring of fractal soot aggregates, represented as assemblies of spheres joined by cohesion and by sintered necks. The model is parametrized based on atomic force spectroscopy data and is used to simulate soot restructuring, showing that the fraction of necks in aggregates determines the restructuring pathway. Aggregates with fewer necks undergo local compaction, while aggregates with nearly-full necking prefer global compaction. Additionally, full compaction occurs within tens of nanoseconds, orders of magnitude faster than the time scale of soot aging through condensation. An important implication is that in atmospheric soot aggregates, the rate of condensation determines how many necks are fractured simultaneously, affecting the restructuring pathway, e.g., producing highly compact, thinly-coated soot as observed in recent studies.

</details>


### [919] [Classification of electronic structures and state preparation for quantum computation of reaction chemistry](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.08910)
*Maximilian Mörchen,Guang Hao Low,Thomas Weymuth,Hongbin Liu,Matthias Troyer,Markus Reiher*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文研究化学反应中量子计算的状态制备问题，提出了基于轨道纠缠信息的电子结构新分类方案，将多组态分子分为两类：第1类由少数行列式主导（常见于反应化学），第2类无法选出有限数量的重要行列式（如某些铁硫簇和固氮酶铁钼辅因子），后一类是传统方法的难点和量子计算的目标。关键结论是：基于低成本近似电子结构信息，始终可以为化学反应基态初始化引导态。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 量子计算求解化学问题需要构建与目标态重叠足够的引导态，但平均场初始态在多组态电子结构中重叠降低甚至随系统尺寸消失，因此需要研究反应化学中状态制备的困难程度。

Method: 基于轨道纠缠信息提出电子结构的新分类方案，将多组态分子分为两类（class-1和class-2），并通过分子轨道基组依赖性和系统构建方式分析其性质。

Result: 第1类分子由少量行列式主导，常见于反应化学；第2类分子无法选出有限数量的重要行列式，对传统方法极难处理，是量子计算的终极目标。开放壳层铁硫簇属于第2类。真正的第2类分子不依赖于轨道基组的选择，固氮酶铁钼辅因子是典型例子。

Conclusion: 基于低成本近似电子结构信息，利用原子结构的有限尺寸特性，始终可以为化学反应基态初始化引导态。

Abstract: Quantum computation for chemical problems will require the construction of guiding states with sufficient overlap with a target state. Since easily available and initializable mean-field states are characterized by an overlap that is reduced for multi-configurational electronic structures and even vanishes with growing system size, we here investigate the severity of state preparation for reaction chemistry. We emphasize weaknesses in current traditional approaches (even for weakly correlated molecules) and highlight the advantage of quantum phase estimation algorithms. An important result is the introduction of a new classification scheme for electronic structures based on orbital entanglement information. We identify two categories of multi-configurational molecules. Whereas class-1 molecules are dominated by very few determinants and often found in reaction chemistry, class-2 molecules do not allow one to single out a reasonably sized number of important determinants. The latter are particularly hard for traditional approaches and an ultimate target for quantum computation. Some open-shell iron-sulfur clusters belong to class 2. We discuss the role of the molecular orbital basis set and show that true class-2 molecules remain in this class independent of the choice of the orbital basis, with the iron-molybdenum cofactor of nitrogenase being a prototypical example. We stress that class-2 molecules can be build in a systematic fashion from open-shell centers or unsaturated carbon atoms. Our key result is that it will always be possible to initialize a guiding state for chemical reaction chemistry in the ground state based on initial low-cost approximate electronic structure information, which is facilitated by the finite size of the atomistic structures to be considered.

</details>


### [920] [A gradient flow model for ground state calculations in Wigner formalism based on density functional theory](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.10851)
*Guanghui Hu,Ruo Li,Hongfei Zhan*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于梯度流模型的Wigner形式基态计算方法，结合密度泛函理论，通过能量泛函设计梯度流模型，并开发了算子分裂与傅里叶谱配点法相结合的高效算法（单次迭代复杂度O(n log n)），在一维（高达2^21粒子）和三维（含缺陷）系统的数值实验中验证了精度与大规模模拟潜力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为Wigner形式下的多体系统基态计算提供新视角，克服传统方法在处理大规模系统和含缺陷系统时的计算瓶颈。

Method: 提出Wigner形式下的基态能量泛函，结合密度泛函理论构建梯度流模型；采用算子分裂方法与傅里叶谱配点法设计高效数值算法，单次迭代复杂度为O(n_DoF log n_DoF)。

Result: 一维系统可处理高达2^21个粒子，三维系统可处理含缺陷情形，数值实验验证了预期精度。

Conclusion: 所提方法在大规模模拟及含缺陷系统计算方面展现出潜力，为Wigner形式下的基态计算提供了高效可行的新途径。

Abstract: In this paper, a gradient flow model is proposed for conducting ground state calculations in Wigner formalism of many-body system in the framework of density functional theory. More specifically, an energy functional for the ground state in Wigner formalism is proposed to provide a new perspective for ground state calculations of the Wigner function. Employing density functional theory, a gradient flow model is designed based on the energy functional to obtain the ground state Wigner function representing the whole many-body system. Subsequently, an efficient algorithm is developed using the operator splitting method and the Fourier spectral collocation method, whose numerical complexity of single iteration is $O(n_{\rm DoF}\log n_{\rm DoF})$. Numerical experiments demonstrate the anticipated accuracy, encompassing the one-dimensional system with up to $2^{21}$ particles and the three-dimensional system with defect, showcasing the potential of our approach to large-scale simulations and computations of systems with defect.

</details>


### [921] [CNUCTRAN: A program for computing final nuclide concentrations using a direct simulation approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.08378)
*K. A. Bala,M. R Omar,John Y. H. Soon,W. M. H. Wan*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文介绍了一种名为CNUCTRAN的新型计算机程序，它采用概率方法而非传统确定性方法来估算嬗变问题中的核素浓度，通过直接模拟核反应来避免Bateman方程求解中的非物理解问题，且与最先进的CRAM方法相比，浓度预测相对误差小于0.001%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 精确确定嬗变问题中放射性核素浓度的演化至关重要，而传统基于矩阵指数近似的确定性方法求解Bateman方程时存在数值挑战，可能产生非物理的浓度结果。

Method: CNUCTRAN采用概率方法直接模拟各种核反应引起的核素转变，而非传统确定性方法中通过矩阵指数近似求解Bateman方程。

Result: 与最先进的CRAM方法对比，CNUCTRAN在不同测试案例中的浓度预测相对误差小于0.001%。

Conclusion: CNUCTRAN可成为嬗变分析中有价值的替代工具，有效规避了传统方法中矩阵指数近似可能产生非物理解的风险。

Abstract: It is essential to precisely determine the evolving concentrations of radioactive nuclides within transmutation problems. It is also a crucial aspect of nuclear physics with widespread applications in nuclear waste management and energy production. This paper introduces CNUCTRAN, a novel computer program that employs a probabilistic approach to estimate nuclide concentrations in transmutation problems. CNUCTRAN directly simulates nuclei transformations arising from various nuclear reactions, diverging from the traditional deterministic methods that solve the Bateman equation using matrix exponential approximation. This approach effectively addresses numerical challenges associated with solving the Bateman equations, therefore, circumventing the need for matrix exponential approximations that risk producing nonphysical concentrations. Our sample calculations using CNUCTRAN shows that the concentration predictions of CNUCTRAN have a relative error of less than 0.001% compared to the state-of-the-art method, CRAM, in different test cases. This makes CNUCTRAN a valuable alternative tool for transmutation analysis

</details>


### [922] [Machine Learning for Improved Current Density Reconstruction from 2D Vector Magnetic Images](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.14553)
*Niko R. Reed,Danyal Bhutto,Matthew J. Turner,Declan M. Daly,Sean M. Oliver,Jiashen Tang,Kevin S. Olsson,Nicholas Langellier,Mark J. H. Ku,Matthew S. Rosen,Ronald L. Walsworth*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于深度卷积神经网络的电流密度重建方法，用于从量子金刚石显微镜获取的二维矢量磁场图像中重建电流密度，该方法在存在高噪声或大间距时显著优于传统解析重建方法，可将数据采集时间减少约400倍，并支持更弱和三维电流源的重建。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统解析重建方法在处理高空间频率噪声或大间距时性能严重下降，限制了可研究的系统类型。需要一种更鲁棒的电流密度重建方法，以支持低信噪比、弱电流源和三维电流源的应用场景。

Method: 使用深度卷积神经网络，从量子金刚石显微镜（QDM）通过氮空位（NV）色心层获取的二维矢量磁场图像中重建电流密度。

Result: 训练后的网络性能在高噪声或大间距条件下显著优于传统解析重建方法；可在低信噪比数据上实现高质量反演，将数据采集时间减少约400倍。

Conclusion: 基于深度学习的电流密度重建方法为较弱和三维电流源的研究提供了可行性，有望扩展该技术在材料科学、电路设计、质量控制、等离子体物理和生物学等领域的应用。

Abstract: The reconstruction of electrical current densities from magnetic field measurements is an important technique with applications in materials science, circuit design, quality control, plasma physics, and biology. Analytic reconstruction methods exist for planar currents, but break down in the presence of high spatial frequency noise or large standoff distance, restricting the types of systems that can be studied. Here, we demonstrate the use of a deep convolutional neural network for current density reconstruction from two-dimensional (2D) images of vector magnetic fields acquired by a quantum diamond microscope (QDM) utilizing a surface layer of Nitrogen Vacancy (NV) centers in diamond. Trained network performance significantly exceeds analytic reconstruction for data with high noise or large standoff distances. This machine learning technique can perform quality inversions on lower SNR data, reducing the data collection time by a factor of about 400 and permitting reconstructions of weaker and three-dimensional current sources.

</details>


### [923] [A modified recursive transfer matrix algorithm for radiation and scattering computation of a multilayer sphere](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.10877)
*Jianing Zhang*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文针对多层球电磁散射与辐射问题，提出了一种改进的传输矩阵算法，通过结合递归方法与传输矩阵法、引入德拜势和对数导数，解决了大复变量下贝塞尔函数的数值溢出以及对数导数奇异性问题，在薄壳和强吸收介质等复杂情形下表现出优越的稳定性和适用性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多层球电磁散射与辐射问题中，传统Lorentz-Mie理论在处理多层球时存在数值稳定性问题，尤其是大复变量下贝塞尔函数的数值溢出以及对数导数的奇异性，需要一种稳定高效的算法来求解电磁散射系数。

Method: 将递归方法与传输矩阵法相结合，引入德拜势和对数导数简化递归公式；采用混合递归策略解决对数导数的奇异性问题，从而避免贝塞尔函数在大复变量下的数值溢出。

Result: 数值测试表明，该算法在薄壳和强吸收介质等复杂情形下具有优越的稳定性和适用性。

Conclusion: 改进的传输矩阵算法有效克服了传统方法在多层球电磁散射计算中的数值不稳定问题，能够稳定高效地计算电磁散射系数。

Abstract: We discuss the electromagnetic scattering and radiation problems of multilayered spheres, reviewing the history of the Lorentz-Mie theory and the numerical stability issues encountered in handling multilayered spheres. By combining recursive methods with the transfer matrix method, we propose a modified transfer matrix algorithm designed for the stable and efficient calculation of electromagnetic scattering coefficients of multilayered spheres. The new algorithm simplifies the recursive formulas by introducing Debye potentials and logarithmic derivatives, effectively avoiding numerical overflow issues associated with Bessel functions under large complex variables. Moreover, by adopting a hybrid recursive strategy, this algorithm can resolve the singularity problem associated with logarithmic derivatives in previous algorithms. Numerical test results demonstrate that this algorithm offers superior stability and applicability when dealing with complex cases such as thin shells and strongly absorbing media.

</details>


### [924] [The Steepest Slope toward a Quantum Few-body Solution: Gradient Variational Methods for the Quantum Few-body Problem](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.08522)
*Paolo Recchia,Debabrota Basu,Mario Gattobigio,Christian Miniatura,Stéphane Bressan*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文提出一类梯度变分方法替代随机搜索，用于优化量子少体问题中的相关高斯基函数参数，实验表明梯度方法与混合方法在效率和效果上优于传统的随机变分方法，并讨论了奇异性、振荡和梯度优化策略的影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 量子少体问题的薛定谔方程对于三体及以上系统无法解析求解，需要近似方法。传统随机变分方法虽然有效，但随着粒子数增加面临数值和优化方面的挑战，亟需更高效的方法。

Method: 提出一类梯度变分方法（gradient variational methods），用梯度优化替代随机搜索来选择和优化相关高斯基函数的参数；同时构建了混合方法融合两者优势，并在多个少体问题上进行对比实验。

Result: 梯度方法和混合方法在效率和有效性上均优于基准的随机变分方法；奇异性、振荡以及梯度优化策略的选择对方法性能有显著影响。

Conclusion: 梯度变分方法能有效克服随机变分方法在高维参数空间中的优化瓶颈，为更大规模量子少体系统的精确求解提供了新途径。

Abstract: Quantum few-body systems are deceptively simple. Indeed, with the notable exception of a few special cases, their associated Schrodinger equation cannot be solved analytically for more than two particles. One has to resort to approximation methods to tackle quantum few-body problems. In particular, variational methods have been proposed to ease numerical calculations and obtain precise solutions. One such method is the Stochastic Variational Method, which employs a stochastic search to determine the number and parameters of correlated Gaussian basis functions used to construct an ansatz of the wave function. Stochastic methods, however, face numerical and optimization challenges as the number of particles increases.
  We introduce a family of gradient variational methods that replace stochastic search with gradient optimization. We comparatively and empirically evaluate the performance of the baseline Stochastic Variational Method, several instances of the gradient variational method family, and some hybrid methods for selected few-body problems. We show that gradient and hybrid methods can be more efficient and effective than the Stochastic Variational Method. We discuss the role of singularities, oscillations, and gradient optimization strategies in the performance of the respective methods.

</details>


### [925] [ELEQTRONeX: A GPU-Accelerated Exascale Framework for Non-Equilibrium Quantum Transport in Nanomaterials](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.14633)
*Saurabh Sawant,François Léonard,Zhi Yao,Andrew Nonaka*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文提出了ELEQTRONeX，一个基于GPU加速的大规模并行框架，用于自洽求解非平衡格林函数和静电学问题，在512个GPU上实现了数量级的计算加速，可处理碳纳米管场效应晶体管等复杂三维器件/材料几何结构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 非平衡电子量子输运对于现有和未来的电子、光电子及自旋电子器件至关重要，但将原子尺度到介观尺度的模拟统一在同一非平衡器件仿真方法中一直面临高保真耦合多物理场和多尺度需求带来的巨大计算成本挑战。

Method: 提出了ELEQTRONeX框架，采用大规模并行GPU加速架构，通过为GPU多线程定制算法，自洽求解非平衡格林函数形式与静电学问题；支持在多达512个GPU和数十亿空间网格单元上运行。

Result: 计算速度提升了数个数量级，在512个GPU上实现了优异的可扩展性；成功验证了碳纳米管场效应晶体管各种3D构型的能带结构、电流-电压特性、电导和漏致势垒降低效应；展示了在非周期性几何结构（如错位碳纳米管阵列）中的适用性。
