Conclusion: ELEQTRONeX框架能够高效处理传统周期性方法无法应对的复杂器件/材料几何结构，为大规模非平衡量子输运仿真提供了可行的高性能计算方案。

Abstract: Non-equilibrium electronic quantum transport is crucial for the operation of existing and envisioned electronic, optoelectronic, and spintronic devices. The ultimate goal of encompassing atomistic to mesoscopic length scales in the same nonequilibrium device simulation approach has traditionally been challenging due to the computational cost of high-fidelity coupled multiphysics and multiscale requirements. In this work, we present ELEQTRONeX (ELEctrostatic Quantum TRansport modeling Of Nanomaterials at eXascale), a massively-parallel GPU-accelerated framework for self-consistently solving the nonequilibrium Green's function formalism and electrostatics in complex device geometries. By customizing algorithms for GPU multithreading, we achieve orders of magnitude improvement in computational time, and excellent scaling on up to 512 GPUs and billions of spatial grid cells. We validate our code by computing band structures, current-voltage characteristics, conductance, and drain-induced barrier lowering for various 3D configurations of carbon nanotube field-effect transistors. We also demonstrate that ELEQTRONeX is suitable for complex device/material geometries where periodic approaches are not feasible, such as modeling of arrays of misaligned carbon nanotubes requiring fully 3D simulations.

</details>


### [926] [Modeling a frustrated Ising square lattice with the D-Wave Quantum Annealer](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.11259)
*C. Marin,A. Fontana,V. Bellani,F. Pederiva,A. Quaranta,F. Rossella,A. Salamon,G. Salina*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文在D-Wave量子退火器上实现了包含最近邻铁磁耦合(J1)和次近邻对角反铁磁耦合(J2)的二维正方晶格Ising模型，成功观测到铁磁、顺磁和条纹反铁磁三种相，并研究了退火参数对解的影响，最后与经典计算机的完整相图进行了比较。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在简单Ising模型（仅最近邻）的基础上，引入竞争性的次近邻反铁磁相互作用（J1-J2模型），利用D-Wave量子退火器研究由此产生的阻挫效应和更丰富的相变行为（包括条纹相）。

Method: 在D-Wave量子退火器上实现J1-J2 Ising模型，通过调节铁磁与反铁磁耦合比（J1/J2）观察相变，并改变链强度（chain strength）和退火时间等参数研究解的稳定性；同时在经典计算机上考虑温度作为自由参数，绘制完整相图进行对比。

Result: 在D-Wave硬件上成功观测到铁磁、顺磁和条纹反铁磁三种相；发现退火参数（链强度和退火时间）对解的质量有显著影响；通过改变J1/J2比值识别出相变点；与经典计算结果进行了比较。

Conclusion: D-Wave量子退火器能够有效模拟具有阻挫效应的J1-J2 Ising模型并复现其相图，但温度在量子退火器中是固定参数，而经典模拟可以自由调节温度以探索更完整的相空间，两者互补。

Abstract: The Ising model with nearest-neighbor interactions on a two-dimensional (2D) square lattice is one of the simplest models for studying ferro-magnetic to para-magnetic transitions. Extensive results are available in the literature for this model, which has become a paradigm for the study of magnetic phase transitions in materials, both theoretically and numerically. After a brief review of the main results obtained with a classical computer, we show how to implement on the D- Wave quantum annealer a more complex Ising model with the addition of competing antiferromagnetic interactions between the diagonal next-to-nearest neighbors with two coupling constants J1 and J2. The dynamics of this system, owing to frustration, are richer than those of the simple Ising model and exhibit a third striped (or antiferromagnetic) phase in addition to the ferro- and para-magnetic phases. In this work, we observed all three phases on the D-Wave hardware, studied the behavior of the solution with different annealing parameters, such as the chain strength and annealing time, and showed how to identify the phase transition by varying the ratio between the ferromagnetic and antiferromagnetic couplings. The same system is studied on a classical computer, with the possibility of taking into account the temperature (fixed on D-Wave) as a free parameter and to explore the full phase diagram: some comparative conclusions with D-Wave are drawn.

</details>


### [927] [Application of mesh refinement to relativistic magnetic reconnection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.08960)
*Revathi Jambunathan,Henry Jones,Lizzette Corrales,Hannah Klion,Michael Rowan,Andrew Myers,Weiqun Zhang,Jean-Luc Vay*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文研究了在相对论性磁重联模拟中应用网格细化技术，通过改进算法（如PSATD求解器和吸收层）来消除粗-细网格界面处的非物理伪影，实现了8倍网格细化下仅用36%的宏粒子和71%的计算节点小时即可获得与高分辨率基准模拟一致的结果，该方法对三维系统具有更大的内存节省潜力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 磁重联过程中存在固有的尺度差异（大尺度拓扑变化与小尺度粒子加速），直接进行高分辨率模拟计算成本过高，因此需要高效的网格细化方法来平衡精度与计算资源。

Method: 采用网格细化技术，结合超高阶PSATD麦克斯韦求解器替代传统FDTD/Yee方法以减少数值色散；在粗-细网格界面引入吸收层消除伪影；对吸收层中的电磁场和电流密度进行阻尼处理以防止非物理的电荷和电流积累。

Result: 在二维磁重联模拟中使用8倍网格细化比，仅需36%的宏粒子和71%的计算节点小时即可达到与高分辨率基准模拟良好吻合的效果。

Conclusion: 该网格细化方法在三维系统中预计能实现比二维更高的内存节省，为未来高效、全面的三维磁重联研究提供了技术基础。

Abstract: During relativistic magnetic reconnection, antiparallel magnetic fields undergo a rapid change in topology, releasing a large amount of energy in the form of non-thermal particle acceleration. This work explores the application of mesh refinement to 2D reconnection simulations to efficiently model the ineherent disparity in length-scales. We have systematically investigated the effects of mesh refinement and determined necessary modifications to the algorithm required to mitigate non-physical artifacts at the coarse-fine interface. We have used the ultrahigh-order Pseudo-Spectral Analytical Time-Domain (PSATD) Maxwell solver to analyze how its use can mitigate the numerical dispersion that occurs with the finite-difference time-domain (FDTD) (or ``Yee'') method. Absorbing layers are introduced at the coarse-fine interface to eliminate spurious effects that occur with mesh refinement. We also study how damping the electromagnetic fields and current density in the absorbing layer can help prevent the non-physical accumulation of charge and current density at the coarse-fine interface. Using a mesh refinement ratio of 8 for two-dimensional magnetic reconnection simulations, we obtained good agreement with the high resolution baseline simulation, using only 36% of the macroparticles and 71% of the node-hours needed for the baseline. The methods presented here are especially applicable to 3D systems where higher memory savings are expected than in 2D, enabling comprehensive, computationally efficient 3D reconnection studies in the future.

</details>


### [928] [Shock Hugoniot calculations using on-the-fly machine learned force fields with ab initio accuracy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.15290)
*Shashikant Kumar,John E. Pask,Phanish Suryanarayana*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文提出基于机器学习力场（MLFF）分子动力学模拟计算冲击Hugoniot曲线的框架，通过核方法与贝叶斯线性回归构建MLFF模型计算电子自由能、原子力和压力，并利用电子内能与自由能间的线性回归模型计算内能。在碳的Hugoniot上验证精度后，将该方法应用于FPEOS数据库中14种材料（9种单质和5种化合物）在10 kK至2 MK温度范围内的Hugoniot计算，结果表明与第一性原理结果吻合良好且误差更小，计算速度提升两个数量级，同时证实化合物中元素间相互作用随温度升高而减弱。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统基于Kohn-Sham DFT的冲击Hugoniot计算成本极高，难以在大温度范围内高效处理多种材料体系。本文旨在开发一种兼顾第一性原理精度与机器学习效率的计算框架，以实现对多种材料Hugoniot的高通量、高精度预测。

Method: 1) 采用基于核方法和贝叶斯线性回归的MLFF模型，从Kohn-Sham DFT生成训练数据，在线计算电子自由能、原子力和压力；2) 通过电子内能与自由能之间的线性回归模型计算内能；3) 结合上述量在分子动力学模拟中计算冲击Hugoniot曲线。

Result: 1) 在碳的Hugoniot上与近期Kohn-Sham DFT结果一致验证了方法准确性；2) 计算速度相比Kohn-Sham DFT提升两个数量级且保持第一性原理精度；3) 成功计算FPEOS数据库中14种材料的Hugoniot，与文献第一性原理结果吻合良好且误差更小；4) 证实化合物中元素间相互作用随温度升高而减弱。

Conclusion: 本文提出的MLFF框架能够在保持ab initio精度的前提下大幅加速冲击Hugoniot计算，为高温高压条件下材料状态方程的高效研究提供了可行方案，并揭示了化合物中元素间相互作用随温度变化的物理规律。

Abstract: We present a framework for computing the shock Hugoniot using on-the-fly machine learned force field (MLFF) molecular dynamics simulations. In particular, we employ an MLFF model based on the kernel method and Bayesian linear regression to compute the electronic free energy, atomic forces, and pressure; in conjunction with a linear regression model between the electronic internal and free energies to compute the internal energy, with all training data generated from Kohn-Sham density functional theory (DFT). We verify the accuracy of the formalism by comparing the Hugoniot for carbon with recent Kohn-Sham DFT results in the literature. In so doing, we demonstrate that Kohn-Sham calculations for the Hugoniot can be accelerated by up to two orders of magnitude, while retaining ab initio accuracy. We apply this framework to calculate the Hugoniots of 14 materials in the FPEOS database, comprising 9 single elements and 5 compounds, between temperatures of 10 kK and 2 MK. We find good agreement with first principles results in the literature while providing tighter error bars. In addition, we confirm that the inter-element interaction in compounds decreases with temperature.

</details>


### [929] [On the generalization ability of coarse-grained molecular dynamics models for non-equilibrium processes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.11519)
*Liyao Lyu,Huan Lei*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种数据驱动的粗粒度分子动力学（CGMD）建模方法，通过时间滞后独立成分分析（TICA）选择辅助粗粒度变量以最小化未解析变量的熵贡献，从而确保非平衡条件下未解析变量的条件分布接近平衡状态，提升模型对非平衡过程的泛化能力。聚合物熔体系统的数值结果验证了该方法在预测复杂粘弹性响应方面的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统粗粒度模型基于预选变量（如质心）构建，其未解析变量的条件分布在非平衡条件下与平衡条件不一致，导致模型对各类非平衡过程的泛化能力无法保证。作者旨在解决这一关键但被广泛忽视的问题。

Method: 采用时间滞后独立成分分析（TICA）从全原子动力学中学习一组辅助粗粒度变量，以最小化未解析变量的熵贡献，使得非平衡条件下未解析变量的条件分布尽可能接近平衡条件，从而提升模型对非平衡过程的泛化能力。

Result: 在聚合物熔体系统中，该方法在多种非平衡流动条件下成功预测了复杂粘弹性响应，验证了未解析变量条件分布一致性这一指标对于模型泛化能力的重要性。

Conclusion: 通过TICA选择适当的辅助粗粒度变量可有效保持未解析变量条件分布在非平衡条件下的稳定性，是提升粗粒度模型对非平衡过程预测能力的有效策略。

Abstract: One essential goal of constructing coarse-grained molecular dynamics (CGMD) models is to accurately predict non-equilibrium processes beyond the atomistic scale. While a CG model can be constructed by projecting the full dynamics onto a set of resolved variables, the dynamics of the CG variables can recover the full dynamics only when the conditional distribution of the unresolved variables is close to the one associated with the particular projection operator. In particular, the model's applicability to various non-equilibrium processes is generally unwarranted due to the inconsistency in the conditional distribution. Here, we present a data-driven approach for constructing CGMD models that retain certain generalization ability for non-equilibrium processes. Unlike the conventional CG models based on pre-selected CG variables (e.g., the center of mass), the present CG model seeks a set of auxiliary CG variables based on the time-lagged independent component analysis to minimize the entropy contribution of the unresolved variables. This ensures the distribution of the unresolved variables under a broad range of non-equilibrium conditions approaches the one under equilibrium. Numerical results of a polymer melt system demonstrate the significance of this broadly-overlooked metric for the model's generalization ability, and the effectiveness of the present CG model for predicting the complex viscoelastic responses under various non-equilibrium flows.

</details>


### [930] [GSIS-ALE for moving boundary problems in rarefied gas flows](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.09316)
*Jianan Zeng,Yanbing Zhang,Lei Wu*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文基于广义合成迭代格式(GSIS)，结合双时间步法、任意拉格朗日-欧拉(ALE)框架、重叠网格和六自由度刚体动力学，开发了一种高效求解多尺度稀薄气体中大幅运动刚体问题的数值方法，并通过四个典型算例验证了其精度和效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多尺度稀薄气体中移动边界问题的数值模拟面临网格运动管理和跨流域计算效率的双重挑战，现有方法难以同时兼顾精度与效率。

Method: 采用双时间步法在ALE框架中交替求解介观动理学方程与宏观合成方程；利用重叠网格处理大位移运动；耦合六自由度刚体动力学方程追踪固体运动轨迹。

Result: 通过周期性翼型俯仰、空腔驱动流中粒子运动、超声速两体分离和三维月球着陆四个算例，验证了GSIS在重叠网格框架下处理多尺度移动边界问题的准确性和高效性。

Conclusion: GSIS结合重叠网格方法能够高效、准确地模拟跨流域稀薄气体中的大幅刚体运动问题，为工程应用中复杂移动边界问题提供了可靠数值工具。

Abstract: Multiscale rarefied gas flows with moving boundaries pose significant challenges to the numerical simulation, where the primary difficulties involve robustly managing the mesh movement and ensuring computational efficiency across all flow regimes. Build upon recent advancements of the general synthetic iterative scheme (GSIS), this paper presents an efficient solver to simulate the large displacement of rigid-body in rarefied gas flows. The newly developed solver utilizes a dual time step method to solve the mesoscopic kinetic and macroscopic synthetic equations alternately, in an arbitrary Lagrangian-Eulerian framework. Additionally, the overset mesh is used and the six degree-of-freedom rigid body dynamics equation is integrated to track the motion of solids. Four moving boundary problems encompassing a wide range of flow velocities and gas rarefaction are simulated, including the periodic pitching of airfoil, particle motion in lid-driven cavity flow, two-body separation in supersonic flow, and three-dimensional lunar landing, demonstrating the accuracy and efficiency of the GSIS in handling multi-scale moving boundary problems within an overset framework.

</details>


### [931] [Benchmark: Tao's symplectic integration method](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.15970)
*Matheus Lazarotto,Iberê Caldas,Yves Elskens*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 对Molei Tao提出的新型显式辛积分方法进行了基准测试，与Störmer-Verlet和Runge-Kutta方法比较。该方法虽比优化的Runge-Kutta-Cash-Karp慢，但性能与Störmer-Verlet相当，且优势在于更通用、无需隐式方程，适用于可分和不可分哈密顿系统。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Tao方法因具有显式演化方程、适用于可分与不可分哈密顿系统、算法易于实现和泛化而引发关注，需要系统评估其实际性能。

Method: 通过基准测试，在CPU时间、系统不变量函数守恒和数值辛面积守恒三个维度上，将Tao方法与Störmer-Verlet和Runge-Kutta-Cash-Karp进行对比。

Result: Tao方法比优化的Runge-Kutta-Cash-Karp慢，但性能与Störmer-Verlet相当。

Conclusion: Tao方法的优势在于更通用且无需隐式方程求解运动方程，可作为Störmer-Verlet的有效替代方案。

Abstract: A benchmark test was conducted for a new symplectic integration method originally developed by Molei Tao. The method raises interest due to its explicit evolution equation, with applicability to both separable and non-separable Hamiltonian systems, and an easy-to-implement, easily generalizable algorithm. In order to compare the method with other, more well-known methods, namely Störmer-Verlet and Runge-Kutta, we conducted a series of benchmark tests comparing their performance in terms of CPU time, system invariants functions conservation, and numerical symplectic area conservation. Overall, it was found that despite being slower than the more optimized Runge-Kutta-Cash-Karp, Tao's method presents a similar performance to Störmer-Verlet, with the extra perk of being more generic and not requiring the use of implicit equations for the evolution of the equations of motion.

</details>


### [932] [Shifting sands of hardware and software in exascale quantum mechanical simulations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.11881)
*Ravindra Shinde,Claudia Filippi,Anthony Scemama,William Jalby*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文探讨了百亿亿次计算时代下量子力学模拟面临的机遇与挑战，重点分析了异构架构（尤其是GPU）主导的硬件变革对量子化学软件开发策略的根本性影响，指出了传统算法的局限性，并讨论了软件栈碎片化、GPU高效算法开发（包括低精度版本）以及标准化库和编程模型建设等关键问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着计算能力从千万亿次向百亿亿次迈进，高性能计算系统正朝着异构架构（尤其是GPU主导）方向转变，传统量子力学模拟算法和软件实现方式已无法适应这一变革，亟需重新审视和调整软件开发策略。

Method: 采用Perspective（观点性文章）的研究方式，通过分析当前百亿亿次计算时代硬件和软件格局的变化，指出传统算法和软件实现的局限性，并讨论量子化学软件适配新架构所面临的具体挑战。

Result: 识别出异构架构转型带来的三大核心挑战：软件栈碎片化；需要开发针对GPU的更高效算法（包括低精度版本）；以及建立标准化库和编程模型的重要性。

Conclusion: 百亿亿次计算时代要求量子化学软件进行根本性的开发策略转变，必须正视异构架构的主导地位，通过开发GPU适配的高效算法、解决软件栈碎片化问题以及推进标准化建设来应对挑战。

Abstract: The era of exascale computing presents both exciting opportunities and unique challenges for quantum mechanical simulations. Although the transition from petaflops to exascale computing has been marked by a steady increase in computational power, it is accompanied by a shift towards heterogeneous architectures, with graphical processing units (GPUs) in particular gaining a dominant role. The exascale era, therefore, demands a fundamental shift in software development strategies. This Perspective examines the changing landscape of hardware and software for exascale computing, highlighting the limitations of traditional algorithms and software implementations in light of the increasing use of heterogeneous architectures in high-end systems. We discuss the challenges of adapting quantum chemistry software to these new architectures, including the fragmentation of the software stack, the need for more efficient algorithms (including reduced precision versions) tailored for GPUs, and the importance of developing standardized libraries and programming models.

</details>


### [933] [Towards a Field Based Bayesian Evidence Inference from Nested Sampling Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.09889)
*Margret Westerkamp,Jakob Roth,Philipp Frank,Will Handley,Torsten Enßlin*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文提出将嵌套抽样中的先验体积估计转化为贝叶斯推理问题，通过引入似然-先验体积关系的平滑性假设来提高对数证据计算的精度，该方法作为NS的后处理步骤运行，在活性样本少于100时显著提升精度，但超过此范围容易出现数值问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 嵌套抽样中对数证据计算的精度受限于对似然等高线所包围的先验体积的随机估计，作者希望通过改进体积估计的准确性来提升整体对数证据计算的质量。

Method: 将先验体积估计转化为贝叶斯推理问题，引入似然-先验体积关系的平滑性假设，作为嵌套抽样的后处理步骤运行，提供似然-先验体积关系的后验样本，从中计算对数证据。

Result: 在两个已知真实证据的合成数据集上，该方法在嵌套抽样活性样本少于100时显著提升了精度，但超过100个活性样本后容易出现数值问题。

Conclusion: 该方法作为NS的后处理步骤能有效提升小样本情况下的证据计算精度，但在活性样本较多时存在数值稳定性问题，需要进一步改进。

Abstract: Nested sampling (NS) is a stochastic method for computing the log-evidence of a Bayesian problem. It relies on stochastic estimates of prior volumes enclosed by likelihood contours, which limits the accuracy of the log-evidence calculation. We propose to transform the prior volume estimation into a Bayesian inference problem, which allows us to incorporate a smoothness assumption for likelihood-prior volume relations. As a result, we aim to increase the accuracy of the volume estimates and thus improve the overall log-evidence calculation using NS. The method presented works as a post-processing step for NS and provides posterior samples of the likelihood-prior-volume relation, from which the log-evidence can be calculated. We demonstrate an implementation of the algorithm and compare its results with plain NS on two synthetic datasets for which the underlying evidence is known. We find a significant improvement in accuracy for runs with less than one hundred active samples in NS, but are prone to numerical problems beyond this point.

</details>


### [934] [Application of Machine Learning and Convex Limiting to Subgrid Flux Modeling in the Shallow-Water Equations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.17214)
*Ilya Timofeyev,Alexey Schwarzmann,Dmitri Kuzmin*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文提出将机器学习与通量限制器相结合，用于一维浅水方程的亚网格尺度建模。通过神经网络参数化亚网格分量，并使用通量限制器确保正性保持和局部最大原理的有效性。数值实验表明，该方法即使在未训练的场景下也能生成有意义的闭合模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统有限体积法在粗网格上求解浅水方程时，亚网格尺度信息丢失导致精度不足，而纯机器学习方法难以保证物理约束（如正性保持和局部最大原理）。因此需结合两者优势。

Method: 1) 采用通量限制有限体积法作为离散框架；2) 使用神经网络参数化亚网格尺度分量，将目标格式的数值通量拟合到细网格单调离散的粗网格平均；3) 通过通量限制器约束等效波动形式中的中间状态，使其保持在凸允许集内，确保正性保持和局部最大原理。

Result: 数值研究表明，机器学习与整体通量限制的结合能够产生有意义的闭合模型，即使在网络未训练过的场景下也表现良好，说明该方法具有一定泛化能力。

Conclusion: 机器学习与通量限制的组合是一种有效的属性保持亚网格建模策略，能够在保持物理约束的前提下提升粗网格求解精度，并对未见场景具有泛化能力。

Abstract: We propose a combination of machine learning and flux limiting for property-preserving subgrid scale modeling in the context of flux-limited finite volume methods for the one-dimensional shallow-water equations. The numerical fluxes of a conservative target scheme are fitted to the coarse-mesh averages of a monotone fine-grid discretization using a neural network to parametrize the subgrid scale components. To ensure positivity preservation and the validity of local maximum principles, we use a flux limiter that constrains the intermediate states of an equivalent fluctuation form to stay in a convex admissible set. The results of our numerical studies confirm that the proposed combination of machine learning with monolithic convex limiting produces meaningful closures even in scenarios for which the network was not trained.

</details>


### [935] [Physics aware machine learning for micromagnetic energy minimization: recent algorithmic developments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.12877)
*Sebastian Schaffer,Thomas Schrefl,Harald Oezelt,Norbert J Mauser,Lukas Exl*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文探索了先进机器学习技术（PINNs和ELMs）结合硬约束，用于最小化全3D微磁模拟中的吉布斯自由能，通过重构Brown能量界在有限域上的变分公式，采用交替优化方案和Cayley变换及R函数施加约束，在磁静电场计算和能量最小化（如磁滞回线计算）中展现出与传统数值方法相当的精度和竞争力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 全3D微磁模拟中计算Gibbs自由能最小化面临全空间积分带来的巨大计算挑战，传统数值方法在处理复杂几何和大规模问题时变得不可行。

Method: 1) 基于Brown磁静能界重构有限域上的变分公式；2) 采用交替优化方案联合最小化Brown能量界与Gibbs自由能；3) 使用Cayley变换严格施加单位范数约束；4) 利用R函数施加磁静电场计算中的本质边界条件；5) 集成物理信息神经网络（PINNs）和极限学习机（ELMs）并融入硬约束。

Result: 所提出的方法计算磁静电场和能量最小化（如磁滞回线计算）具有高精度，与传统数值方法相比表现具有竞争力。

Conclusion: 该方法在处理复杂几何（如晶粒结构模型）和大规模问题方面具有巨大潜力，为未来研究方向开辟了道路。

Abstract: In this work, we explore advanced machine learning techniques for minimizing Gibbs free energy in full 3D micromagnetic simulations. Building on Brown's bounds for magnetostatic self-energy, we revisit their application in the context of variational formulations of the transmission problems for the scalar and vector potential. To overcome the computational challenges posed by whole-space integrals, we reformulate these bounds on a finite domain, making the method more efficient and scalable for numerical simulation. Our approach utilizes an alternating optimization scheme for joint minimization of Brown's energy bounds and the Gibbs free energy. The Cayley transform is employed to rigorously enforce the unit norm constraint, while R-functions are used to impose essential boundary conditions in the computation of magnetostatic fields. Our results highlight the potential of mesh-free Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs) and Extreme Learning Machines (ELMs) when integrated with hard constraints, providing highly accurate approximations. These methods exhibit competitive performance compared to traditional numerical approaches, showing significant promise in computing magnetostatic fields and the application for energy minimization, such as the computation of hysteresis curves. This work opens the path for future directions of research on more complex geometries, such as grain structure models, and the application to large scale problem settings which are intractable with traditional numerical methods.

</details>


### [936] [Monte Carlo Physics-informed neural networks for multiscale heat conduction via phonon Boltzmann transport equation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.10965)
*Qingyi Lin,Chuang Zhang,Xuhui Meng,Zhaoli Guo*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文提出蒙特卡洛物理信息神经网络（MC-PINNs）求解声子玻尔兹曼输运方程（BTE），用于模拟固体材料中从弹道到扩散 regime 的多尺度热传导。该方法通过深度神经网络近似BTE解，利用自动微分编码方程及边界/初始条件，并创新性地提出两步采样策略提升训练效率。数值实验验证了其在准一维、二维、三维问题中的有效性，且相较于传统数值方法和现有PINNs更具内存效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 声子BTE是描述固体材料中多尺度热传导的核心方程，但这是一个7维积分-微分方程，传统数值求解方法面临维数灾难，计算成本极高。现有的PINNs在求解BTE时存在采样效率低下和不准确的问题，亟需一种既能克服维数灾难、又能高效准确求解BTE的新方法。

Method: 1. 构建深度神经网络逼近BTE的解；2. 利用自动微分将BTE方程及边界/初始条件编码为损失函数；3. 提出两步采样策略：第一步在时空域随机采样，第二步在固体角空间随机采样，通过张量积构造训练点；4. 该方法不受维数灾难影响，且内存效率高。

Result: 在准一维稳态/非稳态薄膜热传导、准二维和三维方形域热传导等数值算例中，MC-PINNs成功模拟了从扩散 regime 到弹道 regime 的热传导过程。与最先进的数值方法相比，MC-PINNs在计算时间和内存使用上展现出优势，具有处理大规模实际问题的潜力。

Conclusion: MC-PINNs有效解决了求解声子BTE时的高维挑战，两步采样策略显著提升了PINNs的训练效率和精度，为多尺度热传导模拟提供了一种高效、内存友好的新范式，尤其适用于大规模工程应用。

Abstract: The phonon Boltzmann transport equation (BTE) is widely used for describing multiscale heat conduction (from nm to $μ$m or mm) in solid materials. Developing numerical approaches to solve this equation is challenging since it is a 7-dimensional integral-differential equation. In this work, we propose Monte Carlo physics-informed neural networks (MC-PINNs), which do not suffer from the "curse of dimensionality", to solve the phonon BTE to model the multiscale heat conduction in solid materials. MC-PINNs use a deep neural network to approximate the solution to the BTE, and encode the BTE as well as the corresponding boundary/initial conditions using the automatic differentiation. In addition, we propose a novel two-step sampling approach to address inefficiency and inaccuracy issues in the widely used sampling methods in PINNs. In particular, we first randomly sample a certain number of points in the temporal-spatial space (Step I), and then draw another number of points randomly in the solid angular space (Step II). The training points at each step are constructed based on the data drawn from the above two steps using the tensor product. The two-step sampling strategy enables MC-PINNs (1) to model the heat conduction from ballistic to diffusive regimes, and (2) is more memory-efficient compared to conventional numerical solvers or existing PINNs for BTE. A series of numerical examples including quasi-one-dimensional (quasi-1D) steady/unsteady heat conduction in a film, and the heat conduction in a quasi-two- and three-dimensional square domains, are conducted to justify the effectiveness of the MC-PINNs for heat conduction spanning diffusive and ballistic regimes. Finally, we compare the computational time and memory usage of the MC-PINNs and one of the state-of-the-art numerical methods to demonstrate the potential of the MC-PINNs for large scale problems in real-world applications.

</details>


### [937] [An Efficient Algorithm for Constrained CASSCF(1,2) and CASSCF(3,2) Simulations as Relevant to Electron and Hole Transfer Problems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.14631)
*Tian Qiu,Joseph E. Subotnik*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 提出了一种高效的eDSC/hDSC算法，通过将约束最小化问题分解为无约束自洽场（SCF）问题和约束非自洽场（nSCF）问题，并采用DIIS加速技术，计算成本较SQP方法降低8-20倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决eDSC/hDSC方法中约束最小化问题的计算效率瓶颈，实现电荷转移态和D1-D0交叉点的高效计算。

Method: 将约束最小化问题分解为无约束SCF问题和约束nSCF问题；采用DIIS技术加速SCF问题求解。

Result: 整体计算成本较直接使用SQP降低8-20倍。

Conclusion: 该算法可推广至其他约束最小化问题，且未来引入梯度后可实现快速非绝热动力学模拟。

Abstract: We propose an efficient algorithm for the recently published electron/hole-transfer Dynamical-weighted State-averaged Constrained CASSCF (eDSC/hDSC) method studying charge transfer states and D$_1$-D$_0$ crossings for systems with odd numbers of electrons. By separating the constrained minimization problem into an unconstrained self-consistent-field (SCF) problem and a constrained non-self-consistent-field (nSCF) problem, and accelerating the direct inversion in the iterative subspace (DIIS) technique to solve the SCF problem, the overall computational cost is reduced by a factor of 8 to 20 compared with directly using sequential quadratic programming (SQP). This approach should be applicable for other constrained minimization problems and, in the immediate future, once gradients are available, the present eDSC/hDSC algorithm should allow for speedy non-adiabatic dynamics simulations.

</details>


### [938] [Structure and dynamics of the magnetite(001)/water interface from molecular dynamics simulations based on a neural network potential](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.11538)
*Salvatore Romano,Pablo Montero de Hijes,Matthias Meier,Georg Kresse,Cesare Franchini,Christoph Dellago*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本研究开发了磁铁矿/水界面的神经网络势函数（NNP），通过大规模分子动力学模拟，揭示了低覆盖度水分子在SCV模型上的新基态、密度分层、各向异性扩散及解离机制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 磁铁矿/水界面在自然界和技术应用中至关重要，但分子尺度上的结构和动力学性质理解仍有限，亟需高效准确的计算方法进行深入探索。

Method: 采用Behler-Parrinello神经网络势（NNP），基于密度泛函理论（DFT）精确生成参考数据，对磁铁矿(001)表面进行从单分子到体相水的广泛覆盖度下的分子动力学模拟。

Result: 发现了低覆盖度水在SCV模型上的多个新基态；获得了具有明显分层特征的水密度分布；通过均方位移计算揭示了不同覆盖度下水分子的显著各向异性扩散；定性揭示了表面水分子的解离机制。

Conclusion: 开发的NNP能有效模拟磁铁矿/水界面，所获结果加深了对该界面分子尺度结构和动力学的理解。

Abstract: The magnetite/water interface is commonly found in nature and plays a crucial role in various technological applications. However, our understanding of its structural and dynamical properties at the molecular scale remains still limited. In this study, we develop an efficient Behler-Parrinello neural network potential (NNP) for the magnetite/water system, paying particular attention to the accurate generation of reference data with density functional theory. Using this NNP, we performed extensive molecular dynamics simulations of the magnetite (001) surface across a wide range of water coverages, from the single molecule to bulk water. Our simulations revealed several new ground states of low coverage water on the Subsurface Cation Vacancy (SCV) model and yielded a density profile of water at the surface that exhibits marked layering. By calculating mean square displacements, we obtained quantitative information on the diffusion of water molecules on the SCV for different coverages, revealing significant anisotropy. Additionally, our simulations provided qualitative insights into the dissociation mechanisms of water molecules at the surface.

</details>


### [939] [Inherent structural descriptors via machine learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.17924)
*Emanuele Telari,Antonio Tinti,Manoj Settem,Morgan Rees,Henry Hoddinott,Malcom Dearg,Bernd von Issendorff,Georg Held,Thomas J. A. Slater,Richard E. Palmer,Luca Maragliano,Riccardo Ferrando,Alberto Giacomello*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于机器学习的集体变量构建方法，通过将系统瞬时构型与其固有结构（inherent structures）关联，从复杂高维数据中提取少量物理相关的集体变量。该方法在147个金原子纳米团簇的结构相变研究中成功表征了复杂自由能景观、计算了转变速率，并描述了非平衡熔融和凝固过程，展示了在液体、玻璃和蛋白质等广泛系统中的适用潜力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 复杂系统和过程的模拟中，寻找合适的集体变量是最具挑战性的任务之一，这限制了实验和模拟数据的解释以及增强采样技术的应用。现有方法难以从高维构型空间中自动蒸馏出物理意义明确的少维集体变量。

Method: 提出一种机器学习方法，将系统瞬时构型与液体理论中定义的固有结构（inherent structures）相关联，从而蒸馏出少量物理相关的集体变量（固有结构变量）。将该方法应用于147个金原子纳米团簇的结构相变研究。

Result: 该方法成功表征了纳米团簇的复杂自由能景观，计算了转变速率，并有效描述了非平衡熔融和凝固过程。固有结构变量在复杂自由能计算和动力学过程描述中表现出有效性和鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 以固有结构这一普遍适用概念为指导的机器学习策略，有望为液体、玻璃和蛋白质等广泛系统设计有效的集体变量，推动增强采样和复杂系统模拟的发展。

Abstract: Finding proper collective variables for complex systems and processes is one of the most challenging tasks in simulations, which limits the interpretation of experimental and simulated data and the application of enhanced sampling techniques. Here, we propose a machine learning approach able to distill few, physically relevant variables by associating instantaneous configurations of the system to their corresponding inherent structures as defined in liquids theory. We apply this approach to the challenging case of structural transitions in nanoclusters, managing to characterize and explore the structural complexity of an experimentally relevant system constituted by 147 gold atoms. Our inherent-structure variables are shown to be effective at computing complex free-energy landscapes, transition rates, and at describing non-equilibrium melting and freezing processes. The effectiveness of this machine learning strategy guided by the generally-applicable concept of inherent structures shows promise to devise collective variables for a vast range of systems, including liquids, glasses, and proteins.

</details>


### [940] [A multi-dimensional, robust, and cell-centered finite-volume scheme for the ideal MHD equations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.14992)
*Pascal Tremblin,Rémi Bourgeois,Solène Bulteau,Samuel Kokh,Thomas Padioleau,Maxime Delorme,Antoine Strugarek,Matthias González,Allan Sacha Brun*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 提出了一种适用于理想MHD方程的新型多维、鲁棒、单元中心有限体积格式，该格式基于松弛和分裂技术，通过在全守恒（非熵满足但低等离子体β下更鲁棒）和熵满足（非守恒但保持可接受状态）两个版本间依据等离子体β和阿尔芬数进行局部先验切换，在广泛的标准MHD测试中表现出鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有标准约束输运格式在低等离子体β（低磁压比）条件下鲁棒性不足，需要一种能够在宽范围等离子体β和阿尔芬数条件下保持鲁棒性且易于推广到高阶的MHD数值格式。

Method: 基于松弛和分裂技术的单元中心有限体积格式；设计了全守恒版本（非熵满足，低β下更鲁棒）和熵满足版本（非守恒，保持可接受状态）；根据当地等离子体β和阿尔芬数进行先验局部切换；二阶精度采用经典的MUSCL-Hancock方案实现。

Result: 全守恒版本在低等离子体β下比标准约束输运格式更鲁棒；熵满足版本在极低β和高阿尔芬数下保持可接受状态；两版本局部切换策略在广泛的标准MHD测试中表现鲁棒。

Conclusion: 该自适应切换策略能够兼顾低β下的鲁棒性和极端条件下的熵满足性，是一种处理宽范围MHD问题的有效方案。

Abstract: We present a new multi-dimensional, robust, and cell-centered finite-volume scheme for the ideal MHD equations. This scheme relies on relaxation and splitting techniques and can be easily used at high order. A fully conservative version is not entropy satisfying but is observed experimentally to be more robust than standard constrained transport schemes at low plasma beta. At very low plasma beta and high Alfvén number, we have designed an entropy-satisfying version that is not conservative for the magnetic field but preserves admissible states and we switch locally a-priori between the two versions depending on the regime of plasma beta and Alfvén number. This strategy is robust in a wide range of standard MHD test cases, all performed at second order with a classic MUSCL-Hancock scheme.

</details>


### [941] [Spin relaxation in graphite due to spin-orbital-phonon interaction from first-principles density-matrix approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.12054)
*Junqing Xu*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文利用第一性原理密度矩阵方法预测了石墨中自旋-轨道-声子相互作用导致的本征自旋弛豫时间 T₁，在 300K 时约为 600 ns，对应面内自旋扩散长度约 110 μm；并检验了 Elliot-Yafet 关系的适用性，发现其仅在退简并阈值足够大时定性成立。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 石墨作为一种重要的二维材料，其自旋输运性质对自旋电子学应用至关重要。然而，石墨中由自旋-轨道-声子相互作用主导的本征自旋弛豫时间（T₁）的上限尚不清楚，且经典的Elliot-Yafet关系在石墨中的定量适用性存在争议，亟需第一性原理级别的精确评估。

Method: 采用作者自行发展的第一性原理密度矩阵方法，计算了石墨中自旋-轨道耦合与电子-声子相互作用共同导致的自旋弛豫时间 T₁；通过漂移-扩散模型推导了面内自旋扩散长度；通过改变退简并阈值 t^deg 系统检验了 Elliot-Yafet 关系 T₁α⁻¹ ∝ ⟨bα²⟩ τp⁻¹ 的定量适用性。

Result: (1) 石墨本征 T₁ 超长，300 K 时约 600 ns，面内自旋扩散长度约 110 μm；(2) T₁ 的各向异性比 T₁z/T₁x 约为 0.6，数值较小；(3) Elliot-Yafet 关系在退简并阈值 t^deg 较大（≥10⁻³ eV）时定性成立，但在 t^deg 过小（≤10⁻⁶ eV）时失效。

Conclusion: 该预测为给定温度和费米能级下的石墨 T₁ 设定了理论上限；Elliot-Yafet 关系的适用性取决于退简并阈值的选取，不能在所有尺度下成立，需谨慎应用。

Abstract: We predict "intrinsic" spin relaxation times ($T_{1}$) of graphite due to spin-orbit-phonon interaction, i.e., the combination of spin-orbit coupling and electron-phonon interaction, using our developed first-principles density-matrix approach. We obtain ultralong $T_{1}$, e.g., $\sim$600 ns at 300 K, which leads to ultralong in-plane spin diffusion length $\sim$110 $μ$m within the drift-diffusion model. Our prediction sets the upper bound of $T_{1}$ of graphite at each given temperature and Fermi level. The anisotropy ratios of $T_{1}$ or values of $T_{1z}/T_{1x}$ are found small and around 0.6. We examine the applicability of the well-known Elliot-Yafet (EY) relation, which declares that spin relaxation rate $T_{1α}^{-1}$ ($α=x,y,z$) is proportional to the product of the ensemble average of spin mixing parameter $\left\langle b_α^{2}\right\rangle $ and carrier relaxation rate $τ_{p}^{-1}$. Our numerical tests suggest that the EY relation works qualitatively if the degeneracy threshold $t^{\mathrm{deg}}$ for evaluating $b_α^{2}$ is elatively large (not much smaller than or comparable to $k_{B}T$), e.g., $10^{-3}$ eV or larger, but fails if $t^{\mathrm{deg}}$ is too tiny (much smaller than $k_{B}T$), e.g., $10^{-6}$ eV or smaller.

</details>


### [942] [Solving physics-based initial value problems with unsupervised machine learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.18320)
*Jack Griffiths,Steven A. Wrathmall,Simon A. Gardiner*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于无监督机器学习的深度神经网络框架，用于求解物理学中的初值问题（常微分方程组+初始条件），能够处理非线性、耦合及混沌动力系统，并在自由粒子、引力场、单摆和Hénon-Heiles系统上验证了有效性。网络能保持能量守恒和 stationary action 性质，且需要概率激活函数和耦合神经网络来严格求解初值问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的数值方法求解初值问题存在局限性，而深度学习提供了一种灵活的替代方案，能够处理非线性、耦合和混沌系统，同时在无监督条件下学习物理守恒律。

Method: 采用无监督深度神经网络框架，通过概率激活函数和耦合神经网络来建模多种力学系统的动力学行为。方法无需标记数据，直接利用物理方程和初始条件作为约束进行训练。

Result: 在自由粒子、引力场中的粒子、经典单摆以及 Henon-Heiles 系统上，深度神经网络成功近似求解，生成的轨迹能够保持能量守恒和 stationary action 等物理性质。

Conclusion: 无监督深度学习可以有效求解初值问题，概率激活函数是严格求解的必要条件，耦合神经网络适用于耦合系统求解，该方法为物理仿真提供了有前景的新路径。

Abstract: Initial value problems -- a system of ordinary differential equations and corresponding initial conditions -- can be used to describe many physical phenomena including those arise in classical mechanics. We have developed a novel approach to solve physics-based initial value problems using unsupervised machine learning. We propose a deep learning framework that models the dynamics of a variety of mechanical systems through neural networks. Our framework is flexible, allowing us to solve non-linear, coupled, and chaotic dynamical systems. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach on systems including a free particle, a particle in a gravitational field, a classical pendulum, and the Hénon--Heiles system (a pair of coupled harmonic oscillators with a non-linear perturbation, used in celestial mechanics). Our results show that deep neural networks can successfully approximate solutions to these problems, producing trajectories which conserve physical properties such as energy and those with stationary action. We note that probabilistic activation functions, as defined in this paper, are required to learn any solutions of initial value problems in their strictest sense, and we introduce coupled neural networks to learn solutions of coupled systems.

</details>


### [943] [Kinetically Consistent Coarse Graining using Kernel-based Extended Dynamic Mode Decomposition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.16396)
*Vahid Nateghi,Feliks Nüske*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文提出基于Koopman生成元的gEDMD方法，用于识别保留原始动力学最慢过渡时间尺度的粗粒化变量，并结合力匹配方法学习粗粒化空间中的有效扩散和自由能，构建完整的有效动力学模型。在二维模型、丙氨酸二肽和Chignolin小蛋白的分子动力学模拟中验证了该方法能稳健恢复全模型的动力学和热力学性质。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有粗粒化方法难以同时准确捕捉系统的动力学（尤其是慢时间尺度）和热力学性质，需要一种能够从高维分子动力学数据中学习低维有效动力学模型的方法，在降维的同时保持关键动力学特征。

Method: 基于gEDMD（生成元扩展动态模式分解）方法构建Koopman生成元的核模型用于识别保留最慢过渡时间尺度的粗粒化变量；结合力匹配方法学习有效自由能；通过gEDMD模型评估粗粒化模型的动力学精度，从而推断完整的有效扩散动力学模型。

Result: 在二维模型系统、丙氨酸二肽和Chignolin小蛋白的分子动力学模拟数据上，该方法成功且稳健地恢复了全模型的关键动力学和热力学性质，且方法参数可通过标准模型验证技术确定。

Conclusion: 基于gEDMD的粗粒化方法能够有效识别慢变量、推断有效自由能和扩散系数，构建兼具动力学和热力学精度的粗粒化模型，为复杂分子系统的多尺度模拟提供了有力工具。

Abstract: In this paper, we show how kernel-based models for the Koopman generator -- the gEDMD method -- can be used to identify coarse-grained dynamics on reduced variables, which retain the slowest transition timescales of the original dynamics. The centerpiece of this study is a learning method to identify an effective diffusion in coarse-grained space, which is similar in spirit to the force matching method. By leveraging the gEDMD model for the Koopman generator, the kinetic accuracy of the CG model can be evaluated. By combining this method with a suitable learning method for the effective free energy, such as force matching, a complete model for the effective dynamics can be inferred. Using a two-dimensional model system and molecular dynamics simulation data of alanine dipeptide and the Chignolin mini-protein, we demonstrate that the proposed method successfully and robustly recovers the essential kinetic and also thermodynamic properties of the full model. The parameters of the method can be determined using standard model validation techniques.

</details>


### [944] [Simulation of atom trajectories in the original Stern-Gerlach experiment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.14530)
*Faraz Mostafaeipour,S. Suleyman Kahraman,Kelvin Titimbo,Yixuan Tan,Lihong V. Wang*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文通过有限元方法数值模拟了斯特恩-革拉赫实验中的磁场分布，并结合蒙特卡洛方法模拟原子平移动力学，首次精确重现了历史上报告的量子化末端图案及其尺寸，提供了文献中最准确的磁场描述。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 对历史文献进行全面分析后，旨在精确建模斯特恩-革拉赫实验的几何结构，以数值计算其磁场，从而更准确地理解和重现该经典量子力学实验的观测结果。

Method: 采用有限元方法计算基于历史实验几何结构的磁场分布，然后结合蒙特卡洛方法模拟原子在磁场中的平移动力学轨迹。

Result: 成功生成了与历史报告数值和图像相匹配的、具有正确尺寸的量子化末端图案，且该有限元方法提供了文献中最准确的磁场和末端图案描述。

Conclusion: 该数值模拟方法能够最精确地再现斯特恩-革拉赫实验的磁场和量子化图案，验证了历史实验的观测结果。

Abstract: Following a comprehensive analysis of the historical literature, we model the geometry of the Stern$\unicode{x2013}$Gerlach experiment to numerically calculate the magnetic field using the finite-element method. Using this calculated field and Monte Carlo methods, the atomic translational dynamics are simulated to produce the well-known quantized end-pattern with matching dimensions. The finite-element method used provides the most accurate description of the Stern$\unicode{x2013}$Gerlach magnetic field and end-pattern in the literature, matching the historically reported values and figures.

</details>


### [945] [On the relation between the velocity- and position-Verlet integrators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.18726)
*Liyan Ni,Zhonghan Hu*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文从哈密顿量表示的角度，系统分析了速度Verlet和位置Verlet两种积分器在线性与非线性系统中的异同。对于简谐振子，两种积分器生成的位置轨迹遵循相同的二阶微分方程，可通过调整初始条件匹配；而对于非线性系统，哈密顿量的级数展开显示两者存在本质差异。数值模拟验证了理论分析结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 厘清速度Verlet和位置Verlet两种广泛使用的辛积分器之间的异同，从哈密顿力学的理论层面解释它们在线性与非线性系统中表现差异的根源。

Method: 通过构造精确哈密顿量（对简谐振子）和哈密顿量级数展开（对非线性系统）的理论分析方法，结合数值模拟对简谐和非简谐振子进行验证。

Result: 线性系统中两种积分器位置轨迹可匹配；非线性系统中两种积分器本质不同；数值实验与理论分析一致。

Conclusion: 速度Verlet和位置Verlet积分器在非线性动力学中具有根本性差异，不可简单等同。

Abstract: The difference and similarity between the velocity- and position-Verlet integrators are discussed from the viewpoint of their Hamiltonian representations for both linear and nonlinear systems. For a harmonic oscillator, the exact Hamiltonians reveal that positional trajectories generated by the two integrators follow an identical second-order differential equation and thus can be matched by adjusting initial conditions. In contrast, the series expansion of the Hamiltonians for the nonlinear discrete dynamics clearly indicate that the two integrators differ fundamentally. These analytical results are confirmed by simple numerical simulations of harmonic and anharmonic oscillators.

</details>


### [946] [Generalised tangent stabilised nonlinear elasticity: An automated framework for controlling material and geometric instabilities](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.17822)
*Roman Poya,Rogelio Ortigosa,Antonio J. Gil,Theodore Kim,Javier Bonet*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文推广了切线稳定的大应变各向同性弹性理论，将其扩展到几乎所有已知的各向异性与各向同性不变形式，导出了封闭形式的切线特征系统，并提出了几何稳定的多凸大应变弹性概念，适用于横向各向同性材料。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Poya等人先前提出了切线稳定的大应变各向同性弹性理论，通过主拉伸方向直接工作获得了封闭形式的切线特征结构，能够在不使用负载增量和时间步长的情况下鲁棒地模拟复杂变形。本文旨在将该理论推广到所有已知的不变形式（包括F、C、b基公式和横向各向同性情形），并引入几何稳定的多凸大应变弹性概念。

Method: 本文推导了各向同性Total Lagrangian变形梯度F基、右Cauchy-Green C基以及Updated Lagrangian左Cauchy-Green b基公式的封闭形式切线特征系统，给出了以切线刚度和初始刚度特征值形式表述的精确凸性条件。对于材料稳定但存在几何不稳定的模型，提出了几何稳定的多凸大应变弹性框架，以谱分解形式解析构造初始刚度。同时将该框架推广到横向各向同性不变量的情形。

Result: 证明了无论采用何种不变形式或完整性基，封闭形式的切线特征分解都是容易获得的。给出了各主要公式的切线特征系统及其精确凸性条件，并成功将几何稳定化框架扩展到横向各向同性材料。

Conclusion: 该推广框架继承了原切线稳定方法的鲁棒性优势，能够在不依赖路径跟踪技术的情况下自动捕捉失稳行为，为非线性有限元分析提供了更通用的解析稳定化策略。

Abstract: Tangent stabilised large strain isotropic elasticity was recently proposed by Poya et al. [1] wherein by working directly with principal stretches the entire eigenstructure of constitutive and geometric/initial stiffness terms were found in closed-form, giving fresh insights into exact convexity conditions of highly non-convex functions in discrete settings. Consequently, owing to these tangent eigenvalues an analytic tangent stabilisation was proposed bypassing incumbent numerical approaches routinely used in nonlinear finite element analysis. This formulation appears to be extremely robust for quasi-static simulation of complex deformations even with no load increments and time stepping while still capturing instabilities automatically in ways that are infeasible for path-following techniques in practice. In this work, we generalise the notion of tangent stabilised elasticity to virtually all known invariant formulations of nonlinear elasticity. We show that, closed-form eigen-decomposition of tangents is easily available irrespective of invariant formulation or integrity basis. In particular, we work out closed-form tangent eigensystems for isotropic Total Lagrangian deformation gradient (F )-based and right Cauchy-Green (C)-based as well as Updated Lagrangian left Cauchy-Green (b)-based formulations and present their exact convexity conditions postulated in terms of their corresponding tangent and initial stiffness eigenvalues. In addition, we introduce the notion of geometrically stabilised polyconvex large strain elasticity for models that are materially stable but exhibit geometric instabilities for whom we construct their initial stiffness in a spectrally-decomposed form analytically. We further extend this framework to the case of transverse isotropy where once again, closed-form tangent eigensystems are found for common transversely isotropic invariants.

</details>


### [947] [Towards a Unified Benchmark and Framework for Deep Learning-Based Prediction of Nuclear Magnetic Resonance Chemical Shifts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.15681)
*Fanjie Xu,Wentao Guo,Feng Wang,Lin Yao,Hongshuai Wang,Fujie Tang,Zhifeng Gao,Linfeng Zhang,Weinan E,Zhong-Qun Tian,Jun Cheng*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: NMRNet是一个基于SE(3)Transformer的深度学习框架，通过预训练-微调范式实现了液态和固态NMR化学位移的统一预测，在多个基准数据集上达到了最优性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 从分子结构预测NMR谱图极具挑战性（结构-光谱关系复杂），且现有方法缺乏对液态和固态NMR的统一处理框架。

Method: 采用SE(3) Transformer对原子环境进行建模，遵循预训练-微调范式；基于已有研究和数据库构建了覆盖多样化化学体系的综合基准数据集。

Result: 在液态和固态NMR基准数据集上均达到最优性能，首次在统一模型架构中整合了固态和液态NMR预测。

Conclusion: NMRNet为NMR预测设立了新标准，推动了深度学习在分析化学和结构化学中的应用，同时强调了不同原子环境需要领域特定的处理方式。

Abstract: The study of structure-spectrum relationships is essential for spectral interpretation, impacting structural elucidation and material design. Predicting spectra from molecular structures is challenging due to their complex relationships. Herein, we introduce NMRNet, a deep learning framework using the SE(3) Transformer for atomic environment modeling, following a pre-training and fine-tuning paradigm. To support the evaluation of NMR chemical shift prediction models, we have established a comprehensive benchmark based on previous research and databases, covering diverse chemical systems. Applying NMRNet to these benchmark datasets, we achieve state-of-the-art performance in both liquid-state and solid-state NMR datasets, demonstrating its robustness and practical utility in real-world scenarios. This marks the first integration of solid and liquid state NMR within a unified model architecture, highlighting the need for domainspecific handling of different atomic environments. Our work sets a new standard for NMR prediction, advancing deep learning applications in analytical and structural chemistry.

</details>


### [948] [Near-Isotropic Sub-Ångstrom 3D Resolution Phase Contrast Imaging Achieved by End-to-End Ptychographic Electron Tomography](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.19407)
*Shengboy You,Andrey Romanov,Philipp Pelz*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文提出并展示了一种端到端的多切片叠层衍射断层扫描方法，从4D-STEM数据集直接重构样品的静电势三维体积，有效补偿了缺失楔效应，并在模拟和实验中分别以90度受限倾转范围和亚埃级分辨率实现了三维原子级成像。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统透射电镜三维原子分辨率成像受限于缺失楔效应（线性电子断层扫描需要高倾转范围）和多切片叠层衍射技术在深度方向分辨率仅2-3纳米的瓶颈，亟需一种能同时实现横向亚埃级和深度方向高分辨率的端到端三维重构方法。

Method: 提出端到端多切片叠层衍射断层扫描方法，直接从4D-STEM数据集重构静电势体积：在每个断层倾转角恢复多个切片，通过联合优化补偿缺失楔效应。

Result: 模拟实验中，在90度受限倾转范围内从非对齐4D-STEM倾转序列中恢复了Pt@Al₂O₃核壳纳米粒子的重原子（Pt）和轻原子（Al, O）三维结构；实验上，以亚埃级分辨率恢复了Te纳米粒子的三维结构。

Conclusion: 端到端多切片叠层衍射断层扫描能够在有限倾转范围（90度）下实现三维原子级分辨率成像，有效克服缺失楔效应，为透射电镜三维原子成像提供了一种新的有效途径。

Abstract: Three-dimensional atomic resolution imaging using transmission electron microscopes is a unique capability that requires challenging experiments. Linear electron tomography methods are limited by the missing wedge effect, requiring a high tilt range. Multislice ptychography can achieve deep sub-Ångstrom resolution in the transverse direction, but the depth resolution is limited to 2 to 3 nanometers. In this paper, we propose and demonstrate an end-to-end approach to reconstructing the electrostatic potential volume of the sample directly from the 4D-STEM datasets. End-to-end multi-slice ptychographic tomography recovers several slices at each tomography tilt angle and compensates for the missing wedge effect. The algorithm is initially tested in simulation with a Pt@$\mathrm{Al_2O_3}$ core-shell nanoparticle, where both heavy and light atoms are recovered in 3D from an unaligned 4D-STEM tilt series with a restricted tilt range of 90 degrees. We also demonstrate the algorithm experimentally, recovering a Te nanoparticle with sub-Ångstrom resolution.

</details>


### [949] [Classifying acoustic cavitation with machine learning trained on multiple physical models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.16142)
*Trinidad Gatica,Elwin van 't Wout,Reza Haqshenas*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种物理信息驱动的机器学习方法，融合Rayleigh-Plesset、Keller-Miksis和Gilmore三种气泡动力学模型及多种空化分类技术，用于预测声空化阈值图，在保持高预测精度的同时提供概率化的空化机制判断。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 声空化阈值图强烈依赖于所采用的物理模型和分类算法，不同建模方法在共振气泡和大振幅振荡条件下差异显著，现有方法缺乏统一且鲁棒的空化机制预测框架。

Method: 集成三种气泡动力学方程（Rayleigh-Plesset、Keller-Miksis、Gilmore），结合最大半径、声学马赫数、声发射峰度因子和Flynn惯性/压力函数准则四种分类技术，采用等权重策略融合，通过求解不同超声参数和材料参数下的微分方程进行交叉验证训练。

Result: 该方法在保留测试数据上展现出空化机制的高预测准确性，能够提供不同物理模型和分类策略组合下的空化概率化见解。

Conclusion: 物理信息驱动的机器学习框架可有效融合多种物理模型的严谨性和可解释性，为空化阈值预测提供更鲁棒的概率化方案。

Abstract: Acoustic cavitation threshold charts are used to map between acoustic parameters (mainly intensity and frequency) and different regimes of acoustic cavitation. The two main regimes are transient cavitation, where a bubble collapses, and stable cavitation, where a bubble undergoes periodic oscillations without collapse. The cavitation charts strongly depend on the physical model used to compute the bubble dynamics and the algorithm for classifying the cavitation threshold. The differences between modeling approaches become especially noticeable for resonant bubbles and when sonication parameters result in large-amplitude oscillations. This paper proposes a machine learning approach that integrates three physical models, i.e., the Rayleigh-Plesset, Keller-Miksis and Gilmore equations, and multiple cavitation classification techniques. Specifically, we classify the cavitation regimes based on the maximum radius, the acoustic Mach number, the kurtosis factor of acoustic emissions, and the Flynn criterion on the inertial and pressure functions. Four machine learning strategies were developed to predict the likelihood of the transient and stable cavitation, using equally weighted contributions from classification techniques. By solving the differential equations for bubble dynamics across a range of sonication and material parameters and applying cross-validation on held-out test data, our framework demonstrates high predictive accuracy for cavitation regimes. This physics-informed machine learning approach offers probabilistic insights into cavitation likelihood, combining diverse physical models and classification strategies, each contributing different levels of physical rigor and interpretability.

</details>


### [950] [Dynamic Mode Decomposition Accelerated Forecast and Optimization of Geological CO2 Storage in Deep Saline Aquifers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.20541)
*Dimitrios Voulanas,Eduardo Gildin*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文研究了数据驱动、非侵入式的DMDc和DMDspc模型在CO2地质封存模拟与优化中的应用。结果表明，这些模型能将数小时的模拟时间缩短至数分钟，压力重构与预测精度较高，但CO2饱和度预测的模态压缩效果有限。DMDspc监控单元方法进一步缩短了优化时间，且优化结果与全快照重构一致。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统CO2地质封存模拟耗时长，难以满足快速优化需求。本文旨在利用数据驱动方法（DMDc/DMDspc）在不牺牲精度的前提下大幅提升模拟与优化效率。

Method: 采用DMDc和DMDspc两种非侵入式降阶建模方法，基于商业模拟器生成的周、月、年尺度压力和CO2饱和度快照训练模型。在含超10万个网格的大规模非均质海上储层模型中，测试注入与注入+产水两种工况。DMDspc通过稀疏编码减少模态数量，并引入监控单元方法仅重构优化关注的网格。

Result: DMD重构将模拟时间从数小时降至数分钟；DMDspc在压力场中成功减少模态且误差略高于DMDc（仍可接受），但在CO2饱和度模态压缩上效果有限。所有压力模型几乎都能成功预测，而仅部分饱和度模型可用（误差<5% PCE或<0.01 MAE）。优化结果在不同DMD模型和时间尺度上保持一致性。DMDspc监控单元法进一步缩短优化时间且结果一致。

Conclusion: DMDc和DMDspc是加速CO2地质封存模拟与优化的有效工具，尤以压力场重构与预测表现最佳。DMDspc的模态压缩特性和监控单元策略在保证精度的同时进一步提升了计算效率。

Abstract: Data-driven and non-intrusive DMDc and DMDspc models successfully expedite the reconstruction and forecasting of CO2 fluid flow with acceptable accuracy margins, aiding in the rapid optimization of geological CO2 storage forecast and optimization. DMDc and DMDspc models were trained with weekly, monthly, and yearly simulation pressure and CO2 saturation fields using a commercial simulator. The domain of interest is a large-scale, offshore, highly heterogeneous reservoir model with over 100,000 cells. DMD snapshot reconstruction significantly reduced simulation times from several hours to mere minutes. DMDspc reduced the number of DMD modes for pressure without losing accuracy while sometimes even improving accuracy. Two operation cases were considered: 1. CO2 injection, 2. CO2 injection and water production for pressure maintenance. For pressure, DMDspc achieved a slightly higher than DMDc average error by removing several modes. On the other hand, DMDspc showed limited success in reducing modes for CO2 saturation. The forecast performance of DMD models was evaluated using percent change error, mean absolute error and Pearsons R correlation coefficient metrics. Almost all DMD pressure models managed to successfully forecast pressure fields, while a smaller number of DMD models managed to forecast CO2 saturation. While forecast errors have a considerable range, only DMD models with errors below 5% PCE for pressure or 0.01 MAE for saturation were considered acceptable for geological CO2 storage optimization. Optimized CO2 injection and water production amounts were consistent across selected DMD models and all time scales. The DMDspc-monitored cells approach, which only reconstructs the monitored-during-optimization cells, reduced even further optimization time while providing consistent results with the optimization that used full snapshot reconstruction.

</details>


### [951] [Studies of the Fermi-Hubbard Model Using Quantum Computing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.16175)
*Adam Prokofiew,Nidhish Sharma,Steven Schnetzer*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文研究了利用量子计算机计算Fermi-Hubbard模型自旋晶格基态能量的方法，在小型晶格上实现了高精度（误差0.18%-1.50%），并具备可扩展至经典计算机无法处理的更大晶格的潜力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 凝聚态物理中Fermi-Hubbard模型的基态能量计算至关重要，但经典计算机在处理大规模晶格时存在局限性。量子计算机由于量子比特的叠加态特性，能够执行某些经典计算机无法完成的计算，因此探索利用量子计算机解决该问题具有重要价值。

Method: 建立了一种计算小型晶格基态能量的方法，该方法应可扩展到更大晶格。研究了半填充的1x4、2x2、2x4和3x4晶格，分别在有/无库仑排斥条件下进行能量计算。

Result: 无库仑排斥时，1x4和2x2晶格计算能量与真实值误差在0.60%以内；有库仑排斥时，1x4晶格误差在0.60%以内，2x2晶格误差在1.50%以内。对于2x4晶格，无库仑排斥时计算能量与真实值误差为0.18%。

Conclusion: 所提方法在小型晶格上取得了与真实值高度吻合的结果，具备可扩展性，有望用于经典计算机无法处理的大规模晶格基态能量计算。

Abstract: The use of quantum computers to calculate the ground state (lowest) energies of a spin lattice of electrons described by the Fermi-Hubbard model of great importance in condensed matter physics has been studied. The ability of quantum bits (qubits) to be in a superposition state allows quantum computers to perform certain calculations that are not possible with even the most powerful classical (digital) computers. This work has established a method for calculating the ground state energies of small lattices which should be scalable to larger lattices that cannot be calculated by classical computers. Half-filled lattices of sizes 1x4, 2x2, 2x4, and 3x4 were studied. The calculated energies for the 1x4 and 2x2 lattices without Coulomb repulsion between the electrons and for the 1x4 lattice with Coulomb repulsion agrees with the true energies to within 0.60%, while for the 2x2 lattice with Coulomb repulsion the agreement is within 1.50% For the 2x4 lattice, the true energy without Coulomb repulsion was found to agree within 0.18%.

</details>


### [952] [Approximating electromagnetic fields in discontinuous media using a single physics-informed neural network](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.20833)
*Michel Nohra,Steven Dufour*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于物理信息神经网络(PINNs)的求解器，用于模拟不连续介质中的三维瞬态和静态参数化电磁问题。采用一阶麦克斯韦方程组训练神经网络，利用水平集函数表示界面并丰富网络输入以处理高频信息，在多个三维参数化静态和瞬态问题上验证了方法的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统PINNs在处理具有高频特征（如不连续性或尖锐梯度）的问题时表现不佳，而电磁问题中的不连续介质界面恰好具有此类特性。因此，需要开发一种能够处理高频和不连续界面的PINN方法。

Method: 采用一阶麦克斯韦方程组作为物理约束训练神经网络；引入水平集函数以连续函数形式表示不连续界面，并将其作为附加输入信息馈入网络，从而增强网络对高频和界面信息的感知能力。

Result: 在多个三维参数化静态和瞬态电磁问题上进行了验证，证明了该方法能够有效处理不连续介质中的电磁问题。

Conclusion: 提出的基于水平集增强的PINN方法能够有效解决传统PINNs在不连续介质和高频电磁问题上的局限性，拓展了PINNs在计算电磁学中的应用范围。

Abstract: Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs) are a new family of numerical methods, based on deep learning, for modeling boundary value problems. They offer an advantage over traditional numerical methods for high-dimensional, parametric, and data-driven problems. However, they perform poorly on problems where the solution exhibits high frequencies, such as discontinuities or sharp gradients. In this work, we develop a PINN-based solver for modeling three-dimensional, transient and static, parametric electromagnetic problems in discontinuous media. We use the first-order Maxwell's equations to train the neural network. We use a level-set function to represent the interface with a continuous function, and to enrich the network's inputs with high-frequencies and interface information. Finally, we validate the proposed methodology on multiple 3D, parametric, static, and transient problems.

</details>


### [953] [PyFR v2.0.3: Towards Industrial Adoption of Scale-Resolving Simulations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.16509)
*Freddie D. Witherden,Peter E. Vincent,Will Trojak,Yoshiaki Abe,Amir Akbarzadeh,Semih Akkurt,Mohammad Alhawwary,Lidia Caros,Tarik Dzanic,Giorgio Giangaspero,Arvind S. Iyer,Antony Jameson,Marius Koch,Niki Loppi,Sambit Mishra,Rishit Modi,Gonzalo Sáez-Mischlich,Jin Seok Park,Brian C. Vermeire,Lai Wang*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: PyFR v2.0.3 是一个基于高通量通量重构方法的开源计算流体动力学框架，专为复杂工程几何结构周围的高精度尺度解析模拟而设计。论文介绍了自2013年首次发布以来的新功能增强、社区发展努力，以及在 ORNL 的 Frontier（最多1024个 AMD Instinct MI250X 加速器，每个含两个 GCD）和 CSCS 的 Alps（最多2048个 NVIDIA GH200 GPU）上的最新性能和扩展结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 推动 PyFR 框架的工业应用，通过持续增强功能、发展用户与开发者社区，并在现代高性能计算平台上验证其可扩展性。

Method: 基于通量重构（Flux Reconstruction）高精度方法，实现跨平台计算流体动力学求解；通过社区建设和技术增强推动工业级应用。

Result: 在 Frontier 上最高使用1024个 AMD MI250X 加速器，在 Alps 上最高使用2048个 NVIDIA GH200 GPU，展示了最新的性能和扩展性结果。

Conclusion: PyFR v2.0.3 已具备面向工业级高精度仿真的能力，并在大规模异构高性能计算平台上表现出良好的可扩展性。

Abstract: PyFR is an open-source cross-platform computational fluid dynamics framework based on the high-order Flux Reconstruction approach, specifically designed for undertaking high-accuracy scale-resolving simulations in the vicinity of complex engineering geometries. Since the initial release of PyFR v0.1.0 in 2013, a range of new capabilities have been added to the framework, with a view to enabling industrial adoption of the capability. This paper provides details of those enhancements as released in PyFR v2.0.3, explains efforts to grow an engaged developer and user community, and provides latest performance and scaling results on up to 1024 AMD Instinct MI250X accelerators of Frontier at ORNL (each with two GCDs), and up to 2048 NVIDIA GH200 GPUs on Alps at CSCS.

</details>


### [954] [BMach: a Bayesian machine for optimizing Hubbard U parameters in DFT+U with machine learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.20848)
*Ritwik Das*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文提出BMach——一种基于贝叶斯优化的算法，通过同时优化电子性质（带隙、本征值）和结构性质（晶格参数）来精确确定DFT+U中的有效Hubbard参数Ueff，在Quantum Espresso平台上实现，相比传统方法具有更高精度和更低计算成本，为高通量材料发现和电子性质表征提供稳健框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: DFT+U计算中有效Hubbard参数Ueff的确定长期依赖经验方法或线性响应理论，这些方法往往无法准确预测材料性质，需要一种更精确、高效且自动化的Ueff确定方法。

Method: 采用先进的贝叶斯优化算法BMach，将电子性质（如带隙、本征值）和结构性质（如晶格参数）共同作为优化目标，在Quantum Espresso平台上实现Ueff的自适应优化。

Result: BMach优化后的Ueff值能够产生与实验和高水平理论结果高度一致的电子性质，同时相比传统方法具有更高的精度和更低的计算成本。

Conclusion: BMach为高通量材料发现和多样化材料体系的电子性质表征提供了稳健且高效的框架，显著改进了DFT+U方法的预测能力。

Abstract: Accurately determining the effective Hubbard parameter $(U_{eff})$ in Density Functional Theory plus U (DFT+U) remains a significant challenge, often relying on empirical methods or linear response theory, which frequently fail to predict accurate material properties. This study introduces BMach, an advanced Bayesian optimization algorithm that refines $U_{eff}$ by incorporating electronic properties, such as band gaps and eigenvalues, alongside structural properties like lattice parameters. Implemented within the Quantum Espresso platform, BMach demonstrates superior accuracy and reduced computational cost compared to traditional methods. The BMach-optimized $U_{eff}$ values yield electronic properties that align closely with experimental and high-level theoretical results, providing a robust framework for high-throughput materials discovery and detailed electronic property characterization across diverse material systems.

</details>


### [955] [SOLAX: A Python solver for fermionic quantum systems with neural network support](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.16915)
*Louis Thirion,Philipp Hansmann,Pavlo Bilous*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: SOLAX是一个基于JAX构建的Python库，利用第二量子化形式计算和分析费米子多体量子系统，并通过集成机器学习能力来缓解希尔伯特空间维度指数增长问题，已在单杂质安德森模型中得到应用验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 费米子多体量子系统在不同研究领域面临相似的计算挑战，尤其是希尔伯特空间维度随系统规模指数增长的问题，亟需通用且高效的计算工具。

Method: 采用第二量子化形式构建模块化框架，用于构造和操作基组、量子态和算符；利用JAX库实现核心底层功能以支持自动微分和GPU加速；集成机器学习技术以应对大量子簇中的指数增长问题。

Result: 成功应用于单杂质安德森模型，验证了SOLAX在处理电子结构和确定有限大小希尔伯特空间中多体量子态方面的有效性。

Conclusion: SOLAX为原子物理、量子化学和凝聚态物理等领域的研究人员提供了一种灵活且强大的多体量子系统计算工具。

Abstract: Numerical modeling of fermionic many-body quantum systems presents similar challenges across various research domains, necessitating universal tools, including state-of-the-art machine learning techniques. Here, we introduce SOLAX, a Python library designed to compute and analyze fermionic quantum systems using the formalism of second quantization. SOLAX provides a modular framework for constructing and manipulating basis sets, quantum states, and operators, facilitating the simulation of electronic structures and determining many-body quantum states in finite-size Hilbert spaces. The library integrates machine learning capabilities to mitigate the exponential growth of Hilbert space dimensions in large quantum clusters. The core low-level functionalities are implemented using the recently developed Python library JAX. Demonstrated through its application to the Single Impurity Anderson Model, SOLAX offers a flexible and powerful tool for researchers addressing the challenges of many-body quantum systems across a broad spectrum of fields, including atomic physics, quantum chemistry, and condensed matter physics.

</details>


### [956] [Multilevel Fast Multipole Algorithm for Electromagnetic Scattering by Large Metasurfaces using Static Mode Representation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.21724)
*Emanuele Corsaro,Giovanni Miano,Antonello Tamburrino,Salvatore Ventre,Carlo Forestiere*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结合MLFMA与静态模式表示（SMR）的边界元方法，用于高效模拟超表面和超透镜，在100λ×100λ尺度金属透镜的全波仿真中验证了其精度与计算效率优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 超表面由大量亚波长散射体构成，电尺寸大且具有多尺度特性，通用计算方法面临巨大挑战，亟需高效的专用数值方法。

Method: 基于PMCHWT公式的边界元方法，将MLFMA与静态模式表示（SMR）相结合，SMR使用仅依赖于物体形状、与材料和频率无关的全局基函数来压缩未知量数目，MLFMA提供O(N log N)的矩阵-向量乘积复杂度。

Result: 与经典MLFMA结合RWG基函数相比，MLFMA-SMR方法显著降低了CPU时间和内存需求，并在100λ×100λ金属透镜的全波仿真中验证了精度与效率。

Conclusion: MLFMA-SMR方法为超表面和超透镜的分析与优化提供了显著的计算优势。

Abstract: Metasurfaces, consisting of large arrays of interacting subwavelength scatterers, pose significant challenges for general-purpose computational methods due to their large electric dimensions and multiscale nature. This paper introduces an efficient boundary element method specifically tailored for metasurfaces, leveraging the Poggio-Miller-Chang-Harrington-Wu-Tsai (PMCHWT) formulation. Our method combines the Multilevel Fast Multipole Algorithm (MLFMA) with a representation of the unknown equivalent surface current density by means of static modes, a set of entire domain basis functions dependent only on object shape but independent of the material and frequency. The compression of the number of unknowns enabled by the Static Mode Representation (SMR), combined with the \(\mathcal{O}(N \log N)\) complexity of MLFMA matrix-vector products, significantly reduces CPU time and memory requirements compared to classical MLFMA with RWG basis functions. We demonstrate the accuracy, time, and memory requirements of this method through several test cases including the full-wave simulation of a $100 λ\times 100 λ$ canonical metalens. The MLFMA-SMR method offers substantial benefits for the analysis and optimization of metasurfaces and metalenses.

</details>


### [957] [Exploring Nonlinear System with Machine Learning: Chua and Lorenz Circuits Analyzed](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.16972)
*Zhe Wang,Haixia Fan,Jiyuan Zhang,Xiao-Yun Wang*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文首次利用基于神经网络和符号回归的SINDy-PI模型系统学习蔡氏电路和Lorenz电路的吸引子数值结果，通过误差分析探究输入数据精度与数据量对算法的影响，并测试了两种电路的抗噪声能力，发现Lorenz电路噪声鲁棒性优于蔡氏电路。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 非线性电路是研究非线性动力学和混沌行为的重要载体，尤其在生物神经元模拟中具有关键作用。现有研究缺乏对典型非线性电路（蔡氏电路和Lorenz电路）通过机器学习方法进行系统性对比分析，特别是从数据精度和数据量角度探究算法模型的学习能力与鲁棒性。

Method: 采用升级优化的SINDy-PI模型（基于神经网络和符号回归算法），学习两种非线性电路吸引子的数值结果；通过误差分析考察输入数据精度和数据量对算法模型的影响；通过向测试数据加入噪声测试不同电路的抗干扰能力及算法的鲁棒性。

Result: 当输入数据量和数据精度落在一定范围内时，算法模型能有效识别并恢复两种电路对应的微分方程表达式；在相同噪声扰动下，Lorenz电路比蔡氏电路具有更好的抗噪性能。

Conclusion: 该研究为利用深度学习算法进一步研究非线性电路及相关系统提供了参考，并为相关物理问题及应用的研究奠定了初步理论基础。

Abstract: Nonlinear circuits serve as crucial carriers and physical models for investigating nonlinear dynamics and chaotic behavior, particularly in the simulation of biological neurons. In this study, Chua's circuit and Lorenz circuit are systematically explored for the first time through machine learning correlation algorithms. Specifically, the upgraded and optimized SINDy-PI model, which is based on neural network and symbolic regression algorithm, is utilized to learn the numerical results of attractors generated by these two nonlinear circuits. Through error analysis, we examine the effects of the precision of input data and the amount of data on the algorithmic model. The findings reveal that when the input data quantity and data precision fall within a certain range, the algorithm model can effectively recognize and restore the differential equation expressions corresponding to the two circuits. Additionally, we test the anti-interference ability of different circuits and the robustness of the algorithm by introducing noise into the test data. The results indicate that under the same noise disturbance, the Lorenz circuit has better noise resistance than Chua's circuit, providing a starting point for further studying the intrinsic properties and characteristics of different nonlinear circuits. The above results will not only offer a reference for the further study of nonlinear circuits and related systems using deep learning algorithms but also lay a preliminary theoretical foundation for the study of related physical problems and applications.

</details>


<div id='nlin.AO'></div>

# nlin.AO [[Back]](#toc)

### [958] [Studying power-grid synchronization with incremental refinement of model heterogeneity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.02758)
*Bálint Hartmann,Géza Ódor,Kristóf Benedek,István Papp*

Main category: nlin.AO

TL;DR: 本文讨论了电力系统建模在可再生能源转型中的重要性，指出可再生能源远离消费点（如风能的海陆分布），高压电网故障可能导致灾难性经济影响（大停电事件呈现幂律尾部分布）。现有自组织临界直流（DC）模型能较好描述幂律指数，但无法解释交流（AC）电网中相位差驱动的功率流细节。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 可再生能源转型需要重新设计能源传输系统，而现有直流模型无法捕捉交流电网中相位差导致的关键功率流机制，因此需要更精确的交流模型来理解大停电事件的统计特性。

Method: 通过对比自组织临界直流（DC）模型与交流（AC）电网的实际运行特性，指出交流系统中相位差是功率流的主要驱动因素，暗示需要构建基于交流的模型来分析电力系统。

Result: 自组织临界DC模型可以较好地拟合大停电事件概率分布的幂律指数，但在解释AC电网中相位差引起的功率流细节方面存在局限。

Conclusion: 现有DC模型虽能描述停电事件的宏观统计特征，但AC电网中相位差是功率流的核心机制，因此需要发展交流模型以更全面地理解和预测电力系统的行为。

Abstract: Modeling power-grid systems has got a major importance in present days as transformation to renewable energy sources requires the complete re-design of energy transmission. Renewable energy sources can be located quite far from their consumption points because urban and industrial structures do not follow physical constraints and capabilities. Important examples are the sea coast vs inland divisions in the case of wind power. Ill-constructed high-voltage (HV) power grids can cause catastrophic damages to economies as it was demonstrated in recent history via the emergence of large blackout events. The probability distributions of such events was found to be fat-tailed, exhibiting power-law (PL) tails very often. To understand them, self-organized critical direct current (DC) models have been constructed~\cite{car2} and have been shown to describe well the PL exponents of empirical values. However, many details could not be understood as power-grids work with alternating currents (AC) in which phase differences are the primary causes of the power-flows.

</details>


### [959] [Dynamical robustness of network of oscillators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.02260)
*Soumen Majhi,Biswambhar Rakshit,Amit Sharma,Jürgen Kurths,Dibakar Ghosh*

Main category: nlin.AO

TL;DR: 本文综述了复杂网络中集体振荡动力学的鲁棒性研究，重点关注网络在面临动态单元退化（老化）时维持全局振荡的能力，涵盖不同网络结构、耦合函数及异质性因素的影响，并讨论了当前挑战与未来方向。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 复杂系统（如物理和生物系统）常因自然或环境因素导致动态活动衰退，这种"老化"现象可能严重影响网络性能。理解网络如何在不活跃动态单元增加的情况下维持全局振荡，对于评估和设计鲁棒的网络系统至关重要。

Method: 本文采用综述方法，系统梳理了关于复杂网络动力学鲁棒性的理论研究和增强机制，重点分析了不同网络结构（如异质性连接）、耦合函数以及动态单元异质性对网络维持集体振荡能力的影响。

Result: 综述展示了从网络连接异质性到动态单元异质性等多个维度对动力学鲁棒性的研究成果，揭示了网络维持全局振荡的关键机制和影响因素。

Conclusion: 总结了当前动力学鲁棒性研究的主要进展，指出了该领域存在的挑战和未来值得探索的开放性问题。

Abstract: Most complex systems are nonlinear, relying on emergent behavior from interacting subsystems, often characterized by oscillatory dynamics. Collective oscillatory behavior is essential for the proper functioning of many real world systems. Complex networks have proven efficient in elucidating the topological structures of both natural and artificial systems and describing diverse processes occurring within them. Recent advancements have significantly enhanced our understanding of emergent dynamics in complex networks. Among various processes, a substantial body of work explores the dynamical robustness of complex networks, their ability to withstand degradation in network constituents while maintaining collective oscillatory dynamics. Many physical and biological systems experience a decline in dynamic activities due to natural or environmental factors. The impact of such damages on network performance can be significant, and the system's robustness indicates its capability to maintain functionality despite dynamic changes, often termed aging. This review provides a comprehensive overview of notable research examining how networks sustain global oscillation despite increasing inactive dynamical units. We present contemporary research dedicated to the theoretical understanding and enhancement mechanisms of dynamical robustness in complex networks. Our focus includes various network structures and coupling functions, elucidating the persistence of networked systems. We cover system characteristics from heterogeneity in network connectivity to heterogeneity in dynamical units. Finally, we discuss challenges in this field and open areas for future studies.

</details>


### [960] [Why and How do Complex Systems Self-Organize at All? Average Action Efficiency as a Predictor, Measure, Driver, and Mechanism of Self-Organization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.10278)
*Matthew J Brouillet,Georgi Yordanov Georgiev*

Main category: nlin.AO

TL;DR: 本文提出将单位作用量递减与总作用量递增两个动态变分原理作为自组织系统的核心机制，并以平均作用效率作为自组织程度的量化指标。通过基于智能体的仿真验证，该模型有效解释了复杂系统中的自组织现象，并展现了幂律关系等特征，为回答"什么是复杂性及系统有多复杂"提供了新视角。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自组织是复杂系统中减少随机性、涌现有序结构的关键过程，但现有研究缺乏动态度量标准和统一的动态变分原理来定量刻画其程度与演化机制。

Method: 基于单位作用量递减和总作用量递增两个动态变分原理，以平均作用效率作为自组织程度的量化测度，并通过正反馈回路将其与复杂系统其他特征关联，最后采用基于智能体的仿真进行验证。

Result: 所提出的变分原理能够很好地解释自组织现象，仿真结果确认了模型的有效性，系统各特征之间呈现幂律关系。

Conclusion: 平均作用效率可作为衡量复杂性的新指标，该模型兼具解释力和预测力，有助于理解和设计更优的复杂系统。

Abstract: Self-organization in complex systems is a process in which randomness is reduced and emergent structures appear that allow the system to function in a more competitive way with other states of the system or with other systems. It occurs only in the presence of energy gradients, facilitating energy transmission through the system and entropy production. Being a dynamic process, self-organization requires a dynamic measure and dynamic principles. The principles of decreasing unit action and increasing total action are two dynamic variational principles that are viable to utilize in a self-organizing system. Based on this, average action efficiency can serve as a quantitative measure of the degree of self-organization. Positive feedback loops connect this measure with all other characteristics of a complex system, providing all of them with a mechanism for exponential growth, and indicating power law relationships between each of them as confirmed by data and simulations. In this study, we apply those principles and the model to agent-based simulations. We find that those principles explain self-organization well and that the results confirm the model. By measuring action efficiency we can have a new answer to the question: "What is complexity and how complex is a system?". This work shows the explanatory and predictive power of those models, which can help understand and design better complex systems.

</details>


### [961] [How much regulation do we need from genomes to society?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.02884)
*Vicky Chuqiao Yang,Christopher P. Kempes,S. Redner,José Ignacio Arroyo,Geoffrey B. West,Hyejin Youn*

Main category: nlin.AO

TL;DR: 本研究通过跨系统（生物有机体、人类组织、去中心化实体）的大规模数据分析，发现监管功能随系统规模呈系统性标度关系：小规模混合系统呈超线性标度，大规模模块化系统呈亚线性或线性标度，且社会经济系统中职业功能多样性会增加监管成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究复杂系统中监管功能规模与系统大小之间的标度关系，理解监管成本与收益的平衡机制。

Method: 对细菌/真核基因组、公司、联邦机构、大学、Wikipedia、城市等多领域大规模数据集进行实证分析，结合概念模型预测监管成本的标度行为。

Result: 监管功能在生物和社会经济系统中呈现系统性标度规律；小规模混合系统呈超线性标度，大规模模块化系统呈亚线性或线性标度；职业功能多样性增加监管成本。

Conclusion: 跨系统比较为理解监管功能提供了机制性框架，可用于分析不同系统中监管功能的成本与收益。

Abstract: Regulatory functions are essential in both socioeconomic and biological systems, from corporate managers to regulatory genes. Regulatory functions come with substantial costs and benefits, and the balance of the two is often taken for granted. A fundamental question for all complex systems becomes how much regulatory function do they need for their size and function? Here, we present empirical evidence that regulatory functions scale systematically across diverse systems: biological organisms (bacterial and eukaryotic genomes), human organizations (companies, federal agencies, universities), and decentralized entities (Wikipedia, cities). We combine an analysis of large data sets from each of these domains with a simple conceptual model. The model predicts that the scaling of regulatory costs shifts with system structure. Well-mixed small systems exhibit superlinear scaling between size and regulatory function, while modular large ones show sublinear or linear scaling, both in agreement with data. Finally, we find that socioeconomic systems that contain more diverse occupational functions tend to have more regulatory costs than expected from the scaling relationships, confirming the hypothesis that the type and complexity of interactions also play a role in regulatory costs. Our cross-system comparison offers a mechanistic framework for understanding regulatory function and can potentially guide efforts to analyze the costs and benefits of regulatory function in diverse systems.

</details>


### [962] [Inverse stochastic resonance in adaptive small-world neural networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.03151)
*Marius E. Yamakou,Jinjie Zhu,Erik A. Martens*

Main category: nlin.AO

TL;DR: 本文研究了在具有小世界拓扑的噪声FitzHugh-Nagumo神经元网络中，自适应机制（STDP和HSP）对逆随机共振（ISR）的影响，发现两种机制均能增强ISR，且STDP的增强效果优于HSP。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: ISR已被实验验证能优化神经元输入-输出脉冲序列之间的信息传递，且在具有小世界拓扑的神经网络中表现出高效的信息处理能力。然而，网络自适应（如突触可塑性）对ISR的影响尚不清楚，因此需要系统研究自适应机制如何调控ISR。

Method: 采用数值模拟方法，构建具有小世界拓扑的噪声FitzHugh-Nagumo（FHN）神经元网络（双稳区域：稳定不动点+极限环）。引入两种自适应机制：基于脉冲时间依赖可塑性（STDP）的突触权重调节（参数P控制长时程增强/抑制主导），以及基于稳态结构可塑性（HSP）的突触重连（参数F控制重连频率）。系统扫描FHN模型的时间尺度分离参数ε、噪声强度和自适应参数，观察ISR的变化。

Result: 1) ISR程度高度依赖于FHN模型的时间尺度分离参数ε；2) 在FHN神经元的双稳区域内，STDP和HSP均能增强ISR；3) 在双稳区较大的ε值下，更高的重连频率F在中度突触噪声强度下增强ISR；4) 抑制主导的P值增强ISR，而增强主导的P值削弱ISR；5) STDP参数P对ISR的影响大于HSP参数F。

Conclusion: 研究发现为未来在噪声人工神经电路中增强ISR提供了策略指导，旨在优化神经形态系统中输入-输出脉冲序列的信息传递，并为神经网络实验提供了新的研究方向。

Abstract: Inverse stochastic resonance (ISR) is a phenomenon where noise reduces rather than increases the firing rate of a neuron, sometimes leading to complete quiescence. ISR was first experimentally verified with cerebellar Purkinje neurons. These experiments showed that ISR enables optimal information transfer between the input and output spike train of neurons. Subsequent studies demonstrated the efficiency of information processing and transfer in neural networks with small-world topology. We conducted a numerical investigation into the impact of adaptivity on ISR in a small-world network of noisy FitzHugh-Nagumo (FHN) neurons, operating in a bistable regime with a stable fixed point and a limit cycle -- a prerequisite for ISR. Our results show that the degree of ISR is highly dependent on the FHN model's timescale separation parameter $ε$. The network structure undergoes dynamic adaptation via mechanisms of either spike-time-dependent plasticity (STDP) with potentiation-/depression-domination parameter $P$, or homeostatic structural plasticity (HSP) with rewiring frequency $F$. We demonstrate that both STDP and HSP amplify ISR when $ε$ lies within the bistability region of FHN neurons. Specifically, at larger values of $ε$ within the bistability regime, higher rewiring frequencies $F$ enhance ISR at intermediate (weak) synaptic noise intensities, while values of $P$ consistent with depression-domination (potentiation-domination) enhance (deteriorate) ISR. Moreover, although STDP and HSP parameters may jointly enhance ISR, $P$ has a greater impact on ISR compared to $F$. Our findings inform future ISR enhancement strategies in noisy artificial neural circuits, aiming to optimize information transfer between input and output spike trains in neuromorphic systems, and prompt venues for experiments in neural networks.

</details>


### [963] [Self-Organization in Computation & Chemistry: Return to AlChemy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.12137)
*Cole Mathis,Devansh Patel,Westley Weimer,Stephanie Forrest*

Main category: nlin.AO

TL;DR: 本文重新审视了1990年代Walter Fontana和Leo Buss提出的基于λ演算的AlChemy模型，利用现代计算资源复现并扩展了原始研究，发现该系统展现出意料之外的动态鲁棒性与脆弱性的混合特征：复杂稳定组织比预期更频繁出现，且不易坍缩为平凡不动点，但难以组合为更高层实体。此外，研究还分析了随机表达式生成器的影响，并提供了基于类型化λ演算的扩展模型可模拟任意化学反应网络中状态转换的构造性证明。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索复杂自适应系统（如生命）如何从简单组成部分涌现出来，这是自组织和生命起源研究的核心问题。AlChemy模型提供了一个独特的计算视角，但过去三十年未被充分研究，因此需要重新审视并利用现代计算资源验证其结果的稳健性。

Method: 复现AlChemy模型的原始实验，利用更大规模的计算资源进行系统性的参数扫描和随机分析；研究两种随机表达式生成器的初始分布及其对结果的影响；通过构造性证明展示基于类型化λ演算的扩展模型与化学反应网络的等价性。

Result: 复杂稳定组织涌现频率高于预期；这些组织对坍缩为平凡不动点具有鲁棒性，但难以组合为更高层实体；随机生成器的选择显著影响初始对象分布和最终结果；构造性证明表明扩展模型可模拟任意化学反应网络的状态转换。

Conclusion: AlChemy模型揭示了简单规则在组合空间中涌现复杂组织的动力学特性，其鲁棒性与脆弱性的混合特征对理解生命起源和自组织现象具有重要意义。未来可应用于现代编程语言中的自组织现象以及生命起源的定量研究。

Abstract: How do complex adaptive systems, such as life, emerge from simple constituent parts? In the 1990s Walter Fontana and Leo Buss proposed a novel modeling approach to this question, based on a formal model of computation known as $λ$ calculus. The model demonstrated how simple rules, embedded in a combinatorially large space of possibilities, could yield complex, dynamically stable organizations, reminiscent of biochemical reaction networks. Here, we revisit this classic model, called AlChemy, which has been understudied over the past thirty years. We reproduce the original results and study the robustness of those results using the greater computing resources available today. Our analysis reveals several unanticipated features of the system, demonstrating a surprising mix of dynamical robustness and fragility. Specifically, we find that complex, stable organizations emerge more frequently than previously expected, that these organizations are robust against collapse into trivial fixed-points, but that these stable organizations cannot be easily combined into higher order entities. We also study the role played by the random generators used in the model, characterizing the initial distribution of objects produced by two random expression generators, and their consequences on the results. Finally, we provide a constructive proof that shows how an extension of the model, based on typed $λ$ calculus, could simulate transitions between arbitrary states in any possible chemical reaction network, thus indicating a concrete connection between AlChemy and chemical reaction networks. We conclude with a discussion of possible applications of AlChemy to self-organization in modern programming languages and quantitative approaches to the origin of life.

</details>
