### [964] [Gaussian Process Phase Interpolation for estimating the asymptotic phase of a limit cycle oscillator from time series data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.03290)
*Taichi Yamamoto,Hiroya Nakao,Ryota Kobayashi*

Main category: nlin.AO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于高斯过程回归的渐近相位估计方法（GPPI），能够从时间序列数据中准确估计极限环振荡器的渐近相位，并在存在高观测噪声和强非线性的情况下仍表现良好，同时可有效用于数据驱动的相位控制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生物系统中普遍存在节律性活动，通常建模为极限环振荡器。相缩减理论是阐明同步机制的有用框架，但为了理解和控制真实世界中的节律现象，需要从观测数据中估计渐近相位。

Method: 首先在极限环上评估渐近相位，然后利用高斯过程回归估计极限环外的渐近相位。高斯过程的高表达力使其能捕捉多种函数，且易于扩展到高维系统。

Result: 在Stuart-Landau振荡器和Hodgkin-Huxley振荡器的仿真数据上测试，GPPI即使在存在高观测噪声和强非线性时也能准确估计渐近相位，并成功应用于Hodgkin-Huxley振荡器的数据驱动相位控制。

Conclusion: 提出的GPPI方法将促进极限环振荡器的数据驱动建模。

Abstract: Rhythmic activity commonly observed in biological systems, occurring from the cellular level to the organismic level, is typically modeled as limit cycle oscillators. Phase reduction theory serves as a useful analytical framework for elucidating the synchronization mechanism of these oscillators. Essentially, this theory describes the dynamics of a multi-dimensional nonlinear oscillator using a single variable called asymptotic phase. In order to understand and control the rhythmic phenomena in the real world, it is crucial to estimate the asymptotic phase from the observed data. In this study, we propose a new method, Gaussian Process Phase Interpolation (GPPI), for estimating the asymptotic phase from time series data. The GPPI method first evaluates the asymptotic phase on the limit cycle and subsequently estimates the asymptotic phase outside the limit cycle employing Gaussian process regression. Thanks to the high expressive power of Gaussian processes, the GPPI is capable of capturing a variety of functions. Furthermore, it is easily applicable even when the dimension of the system increases. The performance of the GPPI is tested by using simulation data from the Stuart-Landau oscillator and the Hodgkin-Huxley oscillator. The results demonstrate that the GPPI can accurately estimate the asymptotic phase even in the presence of high observation noise and strong nonlinearity. Additionally, the GPPI is demonstrated as an effective tool for data-driven phase control of a Hodgkin-Huxley oscillator. Thus, the proposed GPPI will facilitate the data-driven modeling of the limit cycle oscillators.

</details>


### [965] [Continuum limit of the adaptive Kuramoto model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.03433)
*Rok Cestnik,Erik A. Martens*

Main category: nlin.AO

TL;DR: 本文研究了自适应Kuramoto模型在连续极限下的动力学行为，揭示了密集多稳态现象及双簇态等新状态，通过行平均简化推导了自洽方程，并展示了正负适应对同步行为的影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索慢速自适应Kuramoto模型在连续极限下的动力学特性，理解适应机制如何导致密集多稳态行为及新同步状态的出现。

Method: 采用连续极限分析（N→∞），通过耦合矩阵行平均进行模型约简，推导自洽方程，并结合大规模有限系统的数值模拟验证理论结果。

Result: 发现了双簇态等新状态；建立了约简模型的自洽方程；给出了正负适应参数下的稳定性图；数值模拟验证了理论分析的有效性。

Conclusion: 适应机制对同步行为有显著影响，正负适应导致不同的多稳态结构，进一步扩展了对自适应耦合振荡器系统的理解。

Abstract: We investigate the dynamics of the adaptive Kuramoto model with slow adaptation in the continuum limit, $N\to\infty$. This model is distinguished by dense multistability, where multiple states coexist for the same system parameters. The underlying cause of this multistability is that some oscillators can lock at different phases or switch between locking and drifting depending on their initial conditions. We identify new states, such as two-cluster states. To simplify the analysis we introduce an approximate reduction of the model via row-averaging of the coupling matrix. We derive a self-consistency equation for the reduced model and present a stability diagram illustrating the effects of positive and negative adaptation. Our theoretical findings are validated through numerical simulations of a large finite system. Comparisons to previous work highlight the significant influence of adaptation on synchronization behavior.

</details>


### [966] [Synchronization in adaptive higher-order networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.12235)
*Md Sayeed Anwar,S. Nirmala Jenifer,Paulsamy Muruganandam,Dibakar Ghosh,Timoteo Carletti*

Main category: nlin.AO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个同时包含群组交互和自适应性的高阶网络通用框架，证明了全局同步的存在条件，并揭示了群组交互与自适应连接性的相互作用会导致稳定区域的形成，从而引发同步与去同步之间的转变。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自适应网络模型大多仅关注成对交互，无法捕捉复杂系统中随时间变化的群组动态（如生物群体、社会网络等），亟需一个能同时刻画高阶交互和自适应性的统一框架。

Method: 构建自适应高阶网络通用框架，将群组交互（higher-order interactions）与自适应性（adaptivity）相结合；利用主稳定性方程（Master Stability Equation）分离动力学与结构特性；推导全局同步的稳定性必要条件；通过带相位延迟的广义Kuramoto振子耦合网络进行理论验证。

Result: 证明了自适应高阶网络中存在全局同步状态；给出了稳定同步状态出现的必要条件；发现该条件与主稳定性方程密切相关，可实现动力学与结构特性的解耦；揭示了群组交互与自适应连接性的耦合会形成特定稳定区域，这些区域可以诱导同步与去同步之间的转换。

Conclusion: 自适应高阶网络能有效描述兼具群组交互和时变连接的现实复杂系统；同步稳定性条件可分离为结构因素和动力学因素；群组交互与自适应性的协同效应是导致同步-去同步转变的关键机制。

Abstract: Many natural and human-made complex systems feature group interactions that adapt over time in response to their dynamic states. However, most of the existing adaptive network models fall short of capturing these group dynamics, as they focus solely on pairwise interactions. In this study, we employ adaptive higher-order networks to describe these systems by proposing a general framework incorporating both adaptivity and group interactions. We demonstrate that global synchronization can exist in those complex structures, and we provide the necessary conditions for the emergence of a stable synchronous state. Additionally, we analyzed some relevant settings, and we showed that the necessary condition is strongly related to the master stability equation, allowing to separate the dynamical and structural properties. We illustrate our theoretical findings through examples involving adaptive higher-order networks of coupled generalized Kuramoto oscillators with phase lag. We also show that the interplay of group interactions and adaptive connectivity results in the formation of stability regions that can induce transitions between synchronization and desynchronization

</details>


### [967] [Non-local transitions and ground state switching in the self-organization of vascular networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.04120)
*Konstantin Klemm,Erik Andreas Martens*

Main category: nlin.AO

TL;DR: 本文研究Hu-Cai血管网络模型，发现树状与循环结构在成本最优性上存在非局域转换，且在慢波动下噪声动力学倾向于循环结构即使其并非成本最优。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究Hu-Cai模型中树状与循环血管网络结构的成本最优性关系，以及不同波动时间尺度下系统的行为，揭示非局域相变现象。

Method: 基于Hu-Cai模型，通过分析鞍结分岔附近的成本函数，比较树状解与循环解的成本，并在小系统和大规模实证血管网络中进行验证，同时分析慢波动条件下的噪声动力学行为。

Result: 发现在鞍结分岔附近存在参数区域，树状解比循环解更优成本；树状与循环解在成本最优性上发生非局域转换；在慢波动下，噪声动力学稳定于循环结构附近，即使这些结构并非成本最优。

Conclusion: Hu-Cai模型中的成本最优状态并非固定为树状或循环结构，两者之间存在非平凡的角色转换；波动的时间尺度对系统最终吸引态有重要影响。

Abstract: The model by Hu and Cai [Phys. Rev. Lett., Vol. 111(13) (2013)] describes the self-organization of vascular networks for transport of fluids from source to sinks. Diameters, and thereby conductances, of vessel segments evolve so as to minimize a cost functional E. The cost is the trade-off between the power required for pumping the fluid and the energy consumption for vessel maintenance. The model has been used to show emergence of cyclic structures in the presence of locally fluctuating demand, i.e. non-constant net flow at sink nodes. Under rapid and sufficiently large fluctuations, the dynamics exhibits bistability of tree-like and cyclic network structures. We compare these solutions in terms of the cost functional E. Close to the saddle-node bifurcation giving rise to the cyclic solutions, we find a parameter regime where the tree-like solution rather than the cyclic solution is cost-optimal. Thus we discover an additional, non-local transition where tree-like and cyclic solutions exchange their roles as minimum-cost (or ground) states. The findings hold both in a small system of one source and a few sinks and in an empirical vascular network with hundreds of sinks. In the small system, we further analyze the case of slower fluctuations, i.e., on the same time scale as network adaptation. We find that the noisy dynamics settles around the cyclic structures even when these structures are not cost-optimal.

</details>


### [968] [Reduced-order adaptive synchronization in a chaotic neural network with parameter mismatch: A dynamical system vs. machine learning approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.16155)
*Jan Kobiolka,Marius E. Yamakou*

Main category: nlin.AO

TL;DR: 本文采用两种方法（Lyapunov主动控制技术 & 基于机器学习的数据驱动控制）实现了不同阶混沌忆阻Hindmarsh-Rose神经元之间的降阶同步。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决不同阶混沌忆阻HR神经元之间的降阶同步问题，探索从传统控制方法向数据驱动控制方法的过渡。

Method: 方法一：Lyapunov主动控制技术，设计控制函数使4D混沌HR神经元（响应系统）与5D混沌HR神经元（驱动系统）的规范投影同步。方法二：数据驱动的机器学习控制技术，采用储层计算（RC）算法组合，包括储层观测器（RO）、在线控制（OC）和在线预测控制（OPC）算法。

Result: 数值仿真验证了Lyapunov主动控制技术的有效性；启发式RC自适应控制算法为数据驱动RC控制方法提供了有效指导。

Conclusion: 本文的工作有望推动更形式化、系统化的数据驱动RC混沌同步控制方法的发展，并启发更多数据驱动的神经形态方法用于控制混沌神经网络同步。

Abstract: In this paper, we address the reduced-order synchronization problem between two chaotic memristive Hindmarsh-Rose (HR) neurons of different orders using two distinct methods. The first method employs the Lyapunov active control technique. Through this technique, we develop appropriate control functions to synchronize a 4D chaotic HR neuron (response system) with the canonical projection of a 5D chaotic HR neuron (drive system). Numerical simulations are provided to demonstrate the effectiveness of this approach. The second method is data-driven and leverages a machine learning-based control technique. Our technique utilizes an ad hoc combination of reservoir computing (RC) algorithms, incorporating reservoir observer (RO), online control (OC), and online predictive control (OPC) algorithms. We anticipate our effective heuristic RC adaptive control algorithm to guide the development of more formally structured and systematic, data-driven RC control approaches to chaotic synchronization problems, and to inspire more data-driven neuromorphic methods for controlling and achieving synchronization in chaotic neural networks in vivo.

</details>


### [969] [Synchronization cluster bursting in adaptive oscillators networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.08348)
*Mengke Wei,Andreas Amann,Oleksandr Burylko,Xiujing Han,Serhiy Yanchuk,Jürgen Kurths*

Main category: nlin.AO

TL;DR: 本文研究了自适应动力学网络中的同步簇爆发现象，揭示了自适应耦合相位振荡器系统中周期性在簇同步与全局同步之间切换的动力学机制，并通过降阶模型将其简化为具有复值自适应的相位振荡器，发现了自适应导致额外对称性和多稳态共存。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自适应动力学网络广泛存在于现实系统中，理解其同步动力学对于揭示复杂系统的行为规律至关重要，但目前对自适应振荡器网络中同步簇爆发这一现象的形成机制尚不清楚。

Method: 基于自适应耦合相位振荡器的范式系统进行数值模拟，观察到同步簇爆发现象；通过构建降阶模型分析其内在机制，最终将最小模型简化为具有复值自适应的单相位振荡器。

Result: 发现了同步簇爆发现象，即系统在簇同步和全局同步之间周期性切换；降阶模型阐明了该现象的机制；最小模型可简化为复值自适应相位振荡器；自适应引入了额外对称性，导致具有不同Kuramoto序参数的稳定爆发解共存。

Conclusion: 自适应耦合振荡器网络能够产生丰富的同步簇爆发动力学行为，其内在机制可通过降阶模型和复值自适应方式理解，自适应性带来的对称性增加导致了多稳态现象。

Abstract: Adaptive dynamical networks are ubiquitous in real-world systems. This paper aims to explore the synchronization dynamics in networks of adaptive oscillators based on a paradigmatic system of adaptively coupled phase oscillators. Our numerical observations reveal the emergence of synchronization cluster bursting, characterized by periodic transitions between cluster synchronization and global synchronization. By investigating a reduced model, the mechanisms underlying synchronization cluster bursting are clarified. We show that a minimal model exhibiting this phenomenon can be reduced to a phase oscillator with complex-valued adaptation. Furthermore, the adaptivity of the system leads to the appearance of additional symmetries and thus to the coexistence of stable bursting solutions with very different Kuramoto order parameters.

</details>


### [970] [A simple intelligent adaptive network](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.04930)
*Mingyang Bai,Daqing Li*

Main category: nlin.AO

TL;DR: 本文受热力学启发，提出了一种仅利用宏观环境熵信息即可在未知环境中实现自适应的网络系统，该系统通过自我重构达到期望拓扑结构，并在多种场景下验证了其自适应能力，具有普适性和可解释性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 实际复杂系统持续受扰动影响，为实现未知变化环境中的生存目标，系统需要根据环境反馈不断自适应调整，这种可适应性被视为通用智能的本质。现有数据驱动方法需要精心选择学习架构和参数，缺乏可理解性。

Method: 基于热力学启发，开发了一种仅利用宏观信息（环境熵）的自适应网络，通过持续估计环境熵并据此重新配置网络结构，实现期望的拓扑景观（拓扑度量）。

Result: 在多种场景下（包括相空间约束和地理约束）实现了网络自适应；发现了一种独特的幂律分布，区别于无记忆系统；该方法可应用于脑网络和通信网络以维持关键拓扑特征。

Conclusion: 该自适应性网络无需精心选择学习架构和参数，具有可理解性，有助于通过热力学视角理解自适应智能的本质。

Abstract: For real-world complex system constantly enduring perturbation, to achieve survival goal in changing yet unknown environments, the central problem is constantly adapting themself to external environments according to environmental feedback. Such adaptability is considered the nature of general intelligence. Inspired by thermodynamics, we develop a self-adaptive network utilizing only macroscopic information to achieve desired landscape through reconfiguring itself in unknown environments. By continuously estimating environment entropy, our network can adaptively realize desired landscape represented by topological measures. Our network achieves adaptation under several scenarios, including confinement on phase space and geographic constraint. A unique power law distinguishes our network from memoryless systems. Furthermore, our simple strategy could enable brain network and communication network to adaptively maintain essential topological characteristics. Compared to data-driven methods, our self-adaptive network is understandable without careful choice of learning architectures and parameters. Our self-adaptive network could help to understand adaptive intelligence through the lens of thermodynamics.

</details>


### [971] [Quantum spin van der Pol oscillator -- a spin-based limit-cycle oscillator exhibiting quantum synchronization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.08791)
*Yuzuru Kato,Hiroya Nakao*

Main category: nlin.AO

TL;DR: 本文提出量子自旋范德波尔振荡器作为自旋基极限环振荡器的原型模型，在自旋数较大时展现半经典极限环行为，并在最小自旋-1系统中观察到相互同步、阿诺德舌、纠缠舌及集体同步等量子同步现象。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有量子光学范德波尔振荡器模型局限于玻色子系统，缺乏自旋基系统的对应模型。本文旨在建立量子自旋范德波尔振荡器，为分析量子自旋同步现象提供通用平台。

Method: 将经典范德波尔振荡器量子化到自旋系统，构建自旋基的量子极限环振荡器模型；通过半经典近似分析大自旋极限下的噪声极限环行为；利用数值模拟研究自旋-1系统中两个耗散耦合振荡器的同步、阿诺德舌和纠缠舌，以及全耦合振荡器的集体同步。

Result: 在高自旋极限下该模型退化为量子光学范德波尔振荡器；半经典区域展示出频率牵引到周期驱动；即使在最小的自旋-1系统中，也清晰观测到相互同步、阿诺德舌、纠缠舌以及全耦合系统中的集体同步现象。

Conclusion: 量子自旋范德波尔振荡器为研究量子自旋同步提供了一个有效的理论平台，拓展了量子同步研究到自旋系统。

Abstract: We introduce a quantum spin van der Pol (vdP) oscillator as a prototypical model of quantum spinbased limit-cycle oscillators, which coincides with the quantum optical vdP oscillator in the high-spin limit. The system is described as a noisy limit-cycle oscillator in the semiclassical regime at large spin numbers, exhibiting frequency entrainment to a periodic drive. Even in the smallest spin-1 case, mutual synchronization, Arnold tongues, and entanglement tongues in two dissipatively coupled oscillators, and collective synchronization in all-to-all coupled oscillators are clearly observed. The proposed quantum spin vdP oscillator will provide a useful platform for analyzing quantum spin synchronization.

</details>


### [972] [Higher-order triadic percolation on random hypergraphs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.14213)
*Hanlin Sun,Ginestra Bianconi*

Main category: nlin.AO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结合渗流理论与非线性动力学的理论框架，研究具有时变巨分量的超图，特别是包含高阶三元交互（可上调或下调超边）的超图。研究发现，在适当条件下，巨分量节点占比（序参量）会经历通向混沌的路径，其普适类与逻辑斯蒂映射一致。研究还扩展了层次化高阶三元渗流，并考虑了相互依赖性和节点调控等泛化情形。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有渗流理论大多关注静态或低阶交互，而实际系统中存在高阶（超图）交互以及动态调控机制（如脑网络中胶质细胞调控突触、生化反应中酶调控多反应物反应），这些复杂调控行为及其导致的非平凡动力学尚缺乏统一理论框架。

Method: 将渗流理论与非线性动力学相结合，建立高阶三元渗流（higher-order triadic percolation）模型；通过数学分析揭示序参量（巨分量节点占比）的动力学行为，并运用逻辑斯蒂映射的普适类理论进行分类；进一步提出层次化高阶三元渗流以及考虑相互依赖性和节点调控的泛化模型。

Result: ① 高阶三元渗流中，巨分量占比可呈现出通向混沌的路径，且属于逻辑斯蒂映射的普适类；② 层次化高阶三元渗流中，组合复杂性的增加对临界现象和动力学性质产生非平凡影响；③ 相互依赖性和节点调控等泛化情形进一步丰富了动力学行为。

Conclusion: 高阶三元交互驱动的超图渗流系统可以表现出丰富的非线性动力学行为（包括混沌），这为理解复杂系统中高阶调控机制引发的涌现现象提供了新的理论工具。

Abstract: In this work, we propose a comprehensive theoretical framework combining percolation theory with nonlinear dynamics in order to study hypergraphs with a time-varying giant component. We consider in particular hypergraphs with higher-order triadic interactions that can upregulate or downregulate the hyperedges. Triadic interactions are a general type of signed regulatory interaction that occurs when a third node regulates the interaction between two other nodes. For example, in brain networks, the glia can facilitate or inhibit synaptic interactions between neurons. However, the regulatory interactions may not only occur between regulator nodes and pairwise interactions but also between regulator nodes and higher-order interactions (hyperedges), leading to higher-order triadic interactions. For instance, in biochemical reaction networks, the enzymes regulate the reactions involving multiple reactants. Here we propose and investigate higher-order triadic percolation on hypergraphs showing that the giant component can have a non-trivial dynamics. Specifically, we demonstrate that, under suitable conditions, the order parameter of this percolation problem, i.e., the fraction of nodes in the giant component, undergoes a route to chaos in the universality class of the logistic map. In hierarchical higher-order triadic percolation, we extend this paradigm in order to treat hierarchically nested triadic interactions demonstrating the non-trivial effect of their increased combinatorial complexity on the critical phenomena and the dynamical properties of the process. Finally, we consider other generalizations of the model studying the effect of considering interdependencies and node regulation instead of hyperedge regulation.

</details>


### [973] [Expected and unexpected routes to synchronization in a system of swarmalators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.10039)
*Steve J. Kongni,Thierry Njougouo,Patrick Louodop,Robert Tchitnga,Fernando F. Ferreira,Hilda A. Cerdeira*

Main category: nlin.AO

TL;DR: 本文研究了耦合内部相位与空间动力学的振荡器系统（swarmalators）中，由相位耦合参数引发的爆炸式同步现象。研究发现，同步转变性质（一阶或二阶）取决于自然频率分布。一阶转变经过静态翼相位波态（SWPW）实现级联同步；特定频率分布下观察到旋转分裂相位波态（RSpRW），通过交替切换的簇逐步达到同步，且频率随相位耦合增加而降低。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究swarmalator系统中相位耦合参数如何导致有限群体中的爆炸式同步，以及不同自然频率分布对同步转变类型（一阶/二阶）的影响。

Method: 利用XY模型表示粒子相位能量，分析不同自然频率分布下从无序到同步的转变过程，识别SWPW和RSpPW两种中间态。

Result: 一阶同步转变通过SWPW中间态以级联方式完成；特定自然频率分布下出现RSpPW态，通过簇交替切换（1→2个簇）逐步同步，且簇频率随相位耦合增强而降低。

Conclusion: Swarmalator系统的同步转变类型（一阶/二阶）由自然频率分布决定，且发现了新的RSpPW中间态及簇交替同步机制。

Abstract: Systems of oscillators whose internal phases and spatial dynamics are coupled, swarmalators, present diverse collective behaviors which in some cases lead to explosive synchronization in a finite population as a function of the coupling parameter between internal phases. Near the synchronization transition, the phase energy of the particles is represented by the XY model, and they undergo a transition which can be of the first order or second depending on the distribution of natural frequencies of their internal dynamics. The first order transition is obtained after an intermediate state (Static Wings Phase Wave state (SWPW)) from which the nodes, in cascade over time, achieve complete phase synchronization at a precise value of the coupling constant. For a particular case of natural frequencies distribution, a new phenomenon of Rotational Splintered Phase Wave state (RSpPW) is observed and leads progressively to synchronization through clusters switching alternatively from one to two and for which the frequency decreases as the phase coupling increases.

</details>


### [974] [Self-organized attractoring in locomoting animals and robots: an emerging field](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.13581)
*Bulcsú Sándor,Claudius Gros*

Main category: nlin.AO

TL;DR: 本文综述了自组织具身化框架下的运动控制进展，重点介绍了"吸引子"概念——即离散与连续谱吸引子集作为高阶控制（如踢动控制）的运动基元。基于"测量-设定目标"的循环交替机制，该方法可在模拟和实体机器人（包括桶形、球形、轮式及腿式机器人）中实现柔顺运动。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索自组织具身化框架中，如何通过局部闭环传感运动回路（如本体感觉）产生的极限环和混沌吸引子，实现无须中央顶层控制的柔顺运动。

Method: 提出"吸引子化"概念，即利用控制器-身体-环境反馈回路中涌现的离散与连续谱吸引子作为运动基元；通过"测量当前状态-设定下一目标"的循环交替生成机制实现自组织具身控制。

Result: 该生成机制使一系列模拟和实体机器人（桶形、球形、轮式、腿式）实现了柔顺运动，验证了自组织具身控制在多形态机器人上的普适有效性。

Conclusion: 自组织具身控制通过局部闭环回路和吸引子动力学，为机器人运动控制提供了一种鲁棒且通用的范式，有望替代传统的开环顶层控制或分散式节律控制方案。

Abstract: Locomotion may be induced on three levels. On a classical level, actuators and limbs follow the sequence of open-loop top-down control signals they receive. Limbs may move alternatively on their own, which implies that interlimb coordination must be mediated either by the body or via decentralized inter-limb signaling. In this case, when embodiment is present, two types of controllers are conceivable for the actuators of the limbs, local pacemaker circuits and control principles based on self-organized embodiment. The latter, self-organized control, is based on limit cycles and chaotic attractors that emerge within the feedback loop composed of controller, body, and environment. For this to happen, the sensorimotor loop must be locally closed, e.g. via propriosensation. Here we review the progress made within the framework of self-organized embodiment, with a particular focus on the concept of attractoring. This concept characterizes situations when sets of attractors combining discrete and continuous spectra are available as motor primitives for higher-order control schemes, such as kick control. In particular, we show that a simple generative principle allows for the robust formulation of self-organized embodiment. Based on the recurrent alternation between measuring the actual status of an actuator and providing a target for the actuator to achieve in the next step, we find that the mechanism leads to compliant locomotion for a range of simulated and real-world robots, which include barrel- and sphere-shaped agents, as well as wheeled and legged robots.

</details>


### [975] [Dynamical analysis of a parameter-aware reservoir computer](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.14951)
*Dishant Sisodia,Sarika Jalan*

Main category: nlin.AO

TL;DR: 本文揭示了储备池计算在预测动力系统临界转变（如Hopf分岔）时的内在机理：训练后的储备池映射会发生Neimark-Sacker分岔，且其临界点与原始系统非常接近。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 储备池计算已被证明能够预测动力系统的临界转变，但其内部工作机制尚不明确。本文旨在从动力系统理论角度解释这一预测能力背后的原理。

Method: 通过数值方法，考虑展示Hopf分岔的动力系统，分析训练后储备池产生的映射是否发生Neimark-Sacker分岔，并比较不同相空间结构。

Result: 成功训练后的储备池映射会发生Neimark-Sacker分岔，且其临界点与原始动力系统的分岔临界点在位置上非常接近。

Conclusion: 该研究为机器学习算法预测临界转变提供了动力系统理论层面的解释，加深了对这类算法工作机制的理解。

Abstract: Reservoir computing has been shown to be a useful framework for predicting critical transitions of a dynamical system if the bifurcation parameter is also provided as an input. Its utility is significant because in real-world scenarios, the exact model equations are unknown. This Letter shows how the theory of dynamical system provides the underlying mechanism behind the prediction. Using numerical methods, by considering dynamical systems which show Hopf bifurcation, we demonstrate that the map produced by the reservoir after a successful training undergoes a Neimark-Sacker bifurcation such that the critical point of the map is in immediate proximity to that of the original dynamical system. In addition, we have compared and analyzed different structures in the phase space. Our findings provide insight into the functioning of machine learning algorithms for predicting critical transitions.

</details>


### [976] [Why collective behaviours self-organise to criticality: A primer on information-theoretic and thermodynamic utility measures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.15668)
*Qianyang Chen,Mikhail Prokopenko*

Main category: nlin.AO

TL;DR: 本文通过将Ising模型解释为感知-行动循环，比较了预测信息、 empowerment、主动推理和热力学效率等内在效用函数，发现热力学效率（系统获得的可预测性与能量成本之比）在临界状态达到最大，并提出了"超效率原则"来解释集体行为自组织到临界状态的现象。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 集体行为经常自组织到临界状态，但现有解释分散在不同学科，仅能部分回答这一问题。本文旨在通过统一框架比较不同的内在效用函数，以解释集体行为为何会自组织到临界状态。

Method: 将Ising模型解释为感知-行动循环，比较预测信息、empowerment、主动推理和热力学效率四种内在效用函数，分析每种效用优化时集体行为呈现的不同特征。

Result: 热力学效率——衡量系统获得的可预测性与能量成本之比——在临界状态达到最大值。不同的内在效用函数会塑造不同的集体行为特征。

Conclusion: 提出了"超效率原则"（Principle of Super-efficiency），认为集体行为自组织到临界状态是因为在该状态下，相对于热力学成本而言的熵减少达到了最优效率。

Abstract: Collective behaviours are frequently observed to self-organise to criticality. Existing proposals to explain these phenomena are fragmented across disciplines and only partially answer the question. This primer compares the underlying, intrinsic, utilities that may explain the self-organisation of collective behaviours near criticality. We focus on information-driven approaches (predictive information, empowerment, and active inference), as well as an approach incorporating both information theory and thermodynamics (thermodynamic efficiency). By interpreting the Ising model as a perception-action loop, we compare how different intrinsic utilities shape collective behaviour and analyse the distinct characteristics that arise when each is optimised. In particular, we highlight that thermodynamic efficiency -- measuring the ratio of predictability gained by the system to its energy costs -- reaches its maximum at the critical regime. Finally, we propose the Principle of Super-efficiency, suggesting that collective behaviours self-organise to the critical regime where optimal efficiency is achieved with respect to the entropy reduction relative to the thermodynamic costs.

</details>


### [977] [Setting of the Poincaré section for accurately calculating the phase of rhythmic spatiotemporal dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.16080)
*Takahiro Arai,Yoji Kawamura,Toshio Aoyagi*

Main category: nlin.AO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种从单网格点测量时间序列计算时空动力学相位的方法，通过Poincaré截面定义事件时间，并评估了与等时线相位的偏差，发现从主导整个时空节律的区域测量时偏差较小。此外，还探索了利用正交分解（如PCA）获取全局时空动力学信号后再应用Poincaré截面的替代方法，并在FitzHugh-Nagumo反应扩散模型的目标波和振荡斑图实验中验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在极限环振荡器的同步分析中，相位计算是关键，但现有方法无法处理时空动力学问题——由于空间结构的存在，难以确定应使用哪些测量数据来准确计算相位。

Method: 1) 从单网格点测量时间序列出发，在测量时间序列与Poincaré截面相交的时刻定义事件时间，使相位在事件间线性增长；2) 利用极限环解附近的线性近似，评估计算相位与基于等时线的相位之间的偏差；3) 探索将Poincaré截面应用于主成分分析（PCA）正交分解后得到的全局时空动力学时间序列的方法。

Result: 当测量点取自主导整个时空节律的区域时，计算相位与等时线相位的偏差较小；基于PCA分解的两种方案可用于从全局时空动力学中提取相位；在FitzHugh-Nagumo反应扩散模型的目标波和振荡斑图模拟中验证了方法的可行性。

Conclusion: 本文为时空动力学的同步分析提供了可行的相位计算方法，解决了空间结构下测量点选择和相位计算标准化的难题，为后续研究复杂时空系统的同步行为奠定了方法基础。

Abstract: The synchronization analysis of limit-cycle oscillators is prevalent in many fields, including physics, chemistry, and life sciences. It relies on the phase calculation that utilizes measurements. However, the synchronization of spatiotemporal dynamics cannot be analyzed because a standardized method for calculating the phase has not been established. The presence of spatial structure complicates the determination of which measurements should be used for accurate phase calculation. To address this, we explore a method for calculating the phase from the time series of measurements taken at a single spatial grid point. The phase is calculated to increase linearly between event times when the measurement time series intersects the Poincaré section. The difference between the calculated phase and the isochron-based phase, resulting from the discrepancy between the isochron and the Poincaré section, is evaluated using a linear approximation near the limit-cycle solution. We found that the difference is small when measurements are taken from regions that dominate the rhythms of the entire spatiotemporal dynamics. Furthermore, we investigate an alternative method where the Poincaré section is applied to the time series obtained through orthogonal decomposition of the entire spatiotemporal dynamics. We present two decomposition schemes that utilize the principal component analysis. For illustration, the phase is calculated from the measurements of spatiotemporal dynamics exhibiting target waves or oscillating spots, simulated by weakly coupled FitzHugh-Nagumo reaction-diffusion models.

</details>


### [978] [Minimal motifs for habituating systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.18204)
*Matthew Smart,Stanislav Y. Shvartsman,Martin Mönnigmann*

Main category: nlin.AO

TL;DR: 本文从非线性动力学视角研究习惯化这一基本学习现象，通过形式化经典习惯化特征，发现带有静态非线性的驱动线性记忆变量动力学能够以数学可解释的方式实现多种习惯化特征，为理解该原始学习行为的动力学基础提供了框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管习惯化在生命系统中普遍存在（从动物到单细胞生物），但其通用机制仍缺乏明确定义。作者希望从非线性动力学角度为这一基本学习形式建立理论基础。

Method: 受自适应步输入响应系统启发，采用非线性动力学视角研究习惯化，形式化了在不同生物和刺激场景中实验确定的经典习惯化特征，并研究了能够实现习惯化的不同动力学回路。

Result: 证明了带有输入输出端静态非线性的驱动线性记忆变量动力学，能够以数学可解释的方式实现多种经典习惯化特征。

Conclusion: 该工作为理解习惯化这一原始学习行为的动力学基础建立了基础，并为在生物系统中识别习惯化回路提供了蓝图。

Abstract: Habituation - a phenomenon in which a dynamical system exhibits a diminishing response to repeated stimulations that eventually recovers when the stimulus is withheld - is universally observed in living systems from animals to unicellular organisms. Despite its prevalence, generic mechanisms for this fundamental form of learning remain poorly defined. Drawing inspiration from prior work on systems that respond adaptively to step inputs, we study habituation from a nonlinear dynamics perspective. This approach enables us to formalize classical hallmarks of habituation that have been experimentally identified in diverse organisms and stimulus scenarios. We use this framework to investigate distinct dynamical circuits capable of habituation. In particular, we show that driven linear dynamics of a memory variable with static nonlinearities acting at the input and output can implement numerous hallmarks in a mathematically interpretable manner. This work establishes a foundation for understanding the dynamical substrates of this primitive learning behavior and offers a blueprint for the identification of habituating circuits in biological systems.

</details>


### [979] [Canard cascading in networks with adaptive mean-field coupling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.20758)
*Juan Balzer,Rico Berner,Kathy Lüdge,Sebastian Wieczorek,Jürgen Kurths,Serhiy Yanchuk*

Main category: nlin.AO

TL;DR: 本文揭示了全局自适应耦合动态网络中“Canard级联”（CC）现象的动力学机制。以自适应耦合半导体激光器为例，CC表现为激光器序列式开关的快速-慢速循环。研究发现：CC是网络规模可扩展的鲁棒自适应效应，无适应则不会发生；系统相空间中存在多个由异宿轨道连接的不稳定慢流形（鞍点准稳态），CC被识别为一种新型的异宿Canard轨道，将不同不稳定准稳态组织成一个复杂快慢极限环；尽管单个准稳态不稳定，但CC循环整体具有吸引性且对参数变化鲁棒。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理解全局自适应耦合动态网络中观察到的Canard级联（CC）现象背后的动力学机制，尤其是这种快速-慢速现象的起源和结构。

Method: 以全局自适应耦合半导体激光器为示例系统进行分析，通过相空间分析识别多个鞍点慢流形（不稳定准稳态）及其间的异宿轨道连接，将CC识别为一种新型异宿Canard轨道，并检验其网络规模可扩展性及对适应性的依赖性。

Result: CC是鲁棒的、真正的自适应网络效应，可随网络规模扩展，且没有适应性就不会发生。发现多个鞍点慢流形由异宿轨道连接，CC是一种新型异宿Canard轨道，将不同不稳定准稳态组织成快慢极限环。CC循环整体吸引且对参数变化鲁棒。

Conclusion: CC现象本质上是一种由异宿Canard轨道介导的快慢极限环，虽然涉及的准稳态都是不稳定的鞍点，但整体循环具有吸引性和参数鲁棒性，揭示了自适应网络中一种新的自组织动力学模式。

Abstract: Canard cascading (CC) is observed in dynamical networks with global adaptive coupling. It is a fast-slow phenomenon characterized by a recurrent sequence of fast transitions between distinct and slowly evolving quasi-stationary states. In this letter, we uncover the dynamical mechanisms behind CC, using an illustrative example of globally and adaptively coupled semiconductor lasers, where CC represents sequential switching on and off the lasers. Firstly, we show that CC is a robust and truly adaptive network effect that is scalable with network size and does not occur without adaptation. Secondly, we uncover multiple saddle slow manifolds (unstable quasi-stationary states) linked by heteroclinic orbits (fast transitions) in the phase space of the system. This allows us to identify CC with a novel heteroclinic canard orbit that organises different unstable quasi-stationary states into an intricate fast-slow limit cycle. Although individual quasi-stationary states are unstable (saddles), the CC cycle as a whole is attractive and robust to parameter changes.

</details>
